00034 #ifndef SAM3XA_H
00035 #define SAM3XA_H
00036 
00037 /** \addtogroup SAM3XA_definitions SAM3XA definitions
00038   This file defines all structures and symbols for SAM3XA:
00039     - registers and bitfields
00040     - peripheral base address
00041     - peripheral ID
00042     - PIO definitions
00043 */
00044 /*@{*/
00045 
00046 #ifdef __cplusplus
00047  extern "C" {
00048 #endif
00049 
00050 #ifndef __ASSEMBLY__
00051 #include <stdint.h>
00052 #ifndef __cplusplus
00053 typedef volatile const uint32_t RoReg; /**< Read only 32-bit register (volatile const unsigned int) */
00054 #else
00055 typedef volatile       uint32_t RoReg; /**< Read only 32-bit register (volatile const unsigned int) */
00056 #endif
00057 typedef volatile       uint32_t WoReg; /**< Write only 32-bit register (volatile unsigned int) */
00058 typedef volatile       uint32_t RwReg; /**< Read-Write 32-bit register (volatile unsigned int) */
00059 #define CAST(type, value) ((type*) (value))
00060 #define REG_ACCESS(type, address) (*(type*)(address)) /**< C code: Register value */
00061 #else
00062 #define CAST(type, value) (value)
00063 #define REG_ACCESS(type, address) (address) /**< Assembly code: Register address */
00064 #endif

00066 /* ************************************************************************** */
00067 /*   CMSIS DEFINITIONS FOR SAM3XA */
00068 /* ************************************************************************** */
00069 /** \addtogroup SAM3XA_cmsis CMSIS Definitions */
00070 /*@{*/
00071 
00072 /**< Interrupt Number Definition */
00073 typedef enum IRQn
00074 {
00075 /******  Cortex-M3 Processor Exceptions Numbers ******************************/
00076   NonMaskableInt_IRQn   = -14, /**<  2 Non Maskable Interrupt                */
00077   MemoryManagement_IRQn = -12, /**<  4 Cortex-M3 Memory Management Interrupt */
00078   BusFault_IRQn         = -11, /**<  5 Cortex-M3 Bus Fault Interrupt         */
00079   UsageFault_IRQn       = -10, /**<  6 Cortex-M3 Usage Fault Interrupt       */
00080   SVCall_IRQn           = -5,  /**< 11 Cortex-M3 SV Call Interrupt           */
00081   DebugMonitor_IRQn     = -4,  /**< 12 Cortex-M3 Debug Monitor Interrupt     */
00082   PendSV_IRQn           = -2,  /**< 14 Cortex-M3 Pend SV Interrupt           */
00083   SysTick_IRQn          = -1,  /**< 15 Cortex-M3 System Tick Interrupt       */
00084 /******  SAM3XA specific Interrupt Numbers *********************************/
00085 
00086   SUPC_IRQn            =  0, /**<  0 SAM3XA Supply Controller (SUPC) */
00087   RSTC_IRQn            =  1, /**<  1 SAM3XA Reset Controller (RSTC) */
00088   RTC_IRQn             =  2, /**<  2 SAM3XA Real Time Clock (RTC) */
00089   RTT_IRQn             =  3, /**<  3 SAM3XA Real Time Timer (RTT) */
00090   WDT_IRQn             =  4, /**<  4 SAM3XA Watchdog Timer (WDT) */
00091   PMC_IRQn             =  5, /**<  5 SAM3XA Power Management Controller (PMC) */
00092   EFC0_IRQn            =  6, /**<  6 SAM3XA Enhanced Flash Controller 0 (EFC0) */
00093   EFC1_IRQn            =  7, /**<  7 SAM3XA Enhanced Flash Controller 1 (EFC1) */
00094   UART_IRQn            =  8, /**<  8 SAM3XA Universal Asynchronous Receiver Transceiver (UART) */
00095   SMC_IRQn             =  9, /**<  9 SAM3XA Static Memory Controller (SMC) */
00096   SDRAMC_IRQn          = 10, /**< 10 SAM3XA Synchronous Dynamic RAM Controller (SDRAMC) */
00097   PIOA_IRQn            = 11, /**< 11 SAM3XA Parallel I/O Controller A, (PIOA) */
00098   PIOB_IRQn            = 12, /**< 12 SAM3XA Parallel I/O Controller B (PIOB) */
00099   PIOC_IRQn            = 13, /**< 13 SAM3XA Parallel I/O Controller C (PIOC) */
00100   PIOD_IRQn            = 14, /**< 14 SAM3XA Parallel I/O Controller D (PIOD) */
00101   PIOE_IRQn            = 15, /**< 15 SAM3XA Parallel I/O Controller E (PIOE) */
00102   PIOF_IRQn            = 16, /**< 16 SAM3XA Parallel I/O Controller F (PIOF) */
00103   USART0_IRQn          = 17, /**< 17 SAM3XA USART 0 (USART0) */
00104   USART1_IRQn          = 18, /**< 18 SAM3XA USART 1 (USART1) */
00105   USART2_IRQn          = 19, /**< 19 SAM3XA USART 2 (USART2) */
00106   USART3_IRQn          = 20, /**< 20 SAM3XA USART 3 (USART3) */
00107   HSMCI_IRQn           = 21, /**< 21 SAM3XA Multimedia Card Interface (HSMCI) */
00108   TWI0_IRQn            = 22, /**< 22 SAM3XA Two-Wire Interface 0 (TWI0) */
00109   TWI1_IRQn            = 23, /**< 23 SAM3XA Two-Wire Interface 1 (TWI1) */
00110   SPI0_IRQn            = 24, /**< 24 SAM3XA Serial Peripheral Interface (SPI0) */
00111   SPI1_IRQn            = 25, /**< 25 SAM3XA Serial Peripheral Interface (SPI1) */
00112   SSC_IRQn             = 26, /**< 26 SAM3XA Synchronous Serial Controller (SSC) */
00113   TC0_IRQn             = 27, /**< 27 SAM3XA Timer Counter 0 (TC0) */
00114   TC1_IRQn             = 28, /**< 28 SAM3XA Timer Counter 1 (TC1) */
00115   TC2_IRQn             = 29, /**< 29 SAM3XA Timer Counter 2 (TC2) */
00116   TC3_IRQn             = 30, /**< 30 SAM3XA Timer Counter 3 (TC3) */
00117   TC4_IRQn             = 31, /**< 31 SAM3XA Timer Counter 4 (TC4) */
00118   TC5_IRQn             = 32, /**< 32 SAM3XA Timer Counter 5 (TC5) */
00119   TC6_IRQn             = 33, /**< 33 SAM3XA Timer Counter 6 (TC6) */
00120   TC7_IRQn             = 34, /**< 34 SAM3XA Timer Counter 7 (TC7) */
00121   TC8_IRQn             = 35, /**< 35 SAM3XA Timer Counter 8 (TC8) */
00122   PWM_IRQn             = 36, /**< 36 SAM3XA Pulse Width Modulation Controller (PWM) */
00123   ADC_IRQn             = 37, /**< 37 SAM3XA ADC Controller (ADC) */
00124   DACC_IRQn            = 38, /**< 38 SAM3XA DAC Controller (DACC) */
00125   DMAC_IRQn            = 39, /**< 39 SAM3XA DMA Controller (DMAC) */
00126   UOTGHS_IRQn          = 40, /**< 40 SAM3XA USB OTG High Speed (UOTGHS) */
00127   TRNG_IRQn            = 41, /**< 41 SAM3XA True Random Number Generator (TRNG) */
00128   EMAC_IRQn            = 42, /**< 42 SAM3XA Ethernet MAC (EMAC) */
00129   CAN0_IRQn            = 43, /**< 43 SAM3XA CAN Controller 0 (CAN0) */
00130   CAN1_IRQn            = 44  /**< 44 SAM3XA CAN Controller 1 (CAN1) */
00131 } IRQn_Type;
00132 
00133 /**
00134  * \brief Configuration of the Cortex-M3 Processor and Core Peripherals
00135  */
00136 
00137 #define __MPU_PRESENT          1 /**< SAM3XA does provide a MPU */
00138 #define __NVIC_PRIO_BITS       4 /**< SAM3XA uses 4 Bits for the Priority Levels */
00139 #define __Vendor_SysTickConfig 0 /**< Set to 1 if different SysTick Config is used */

00149 /* ************************************************************************** */
00150 /**  SOFTWARE PERIPHERAL API DEFINITION FOR SAM3XA */
00151 /* ************************************************************************** */
00152 /** \addtogroup SAM3XA_api Peripheral Software API */
00153 /*@{*/
00154 /* ============================================================================= */
00155 /**  SOFTWARE API DEFINITION FOR Analog-to-digital Converter */
00156 /* ============================================================================= */
00157 /** \addtogroup SAM3XA_ADC Analog-to-digital Converter */
00158 /*@{*/
00159 
00160 #ifndef __ASSEMBLY__
00161 /** \brief Adc hardware registers */
00162 typedef struct {
00163   WoReg ADC_CR;        /**< \brief (Adc Offset: 0x00) Control Register */
00164   RwReg ADC_MR;        /**< \brief (Adc Offset: 0x04) Mode Register */
00165   RwReg ADC_SEQR1;     /**< \brief (Adc Offset: 0x08) Channel Sequence Register 1 */
00166   RwReg ADC_SEQR2;     /**< \brief (Adc Offset: 0x0C) Channel Sequence Register 2 */
00167   WoReg ADC_CHER;      /**< \brief (Adc Offset: 0x10) Channel Enable Register */
00168   WoReg ADC_CHDR;      /**< \brief (Adc Offset: 0x14) Channel Disable Register */
00169   RoReg ADC_CHSR;      /**< \brief (Adc Offset: 0x18) Channel Status Register */
00170   RoReg Reserved1[1];
00171   RoReg ADC_LCDR;      /**< \brief (Adc Offset: 0x20) Last Converted Data Register */
00172   WoReg ADC_IER;       /**< \brief (Adc Offset: 0x24) Interrupt Enable Register */
00173   WoReg ADC_IDR;       /**< \brief (Adc Offset: 0x28) Interrupt Disable Register */
00174   RoReg ADC_IMR;       /**< \brief (Adc Offset: 0x2C) Interrupt Mask Register */
00175   RoReg ADC_ISR;       /**< \brief (Adc Offset: 0x30) Interrupt Status Register */
00176   RoReg Reserved2[2];
00177   RoReg ADC_OVER;      /**< \brief (Adc Offset: 0x3C) Overrun Status Register */
00178   RwReg ADC_EMR;       /**< \brief (Adc Offset: 0x40) Extended Mode Register */
00179   RwReg ADC_CWR;       /**< \brief (Adc Offset: 0x44) Compare Window Register */
00180   RwReg ADC_CGR;       /**< \brief (Adc Offset: 0x48) Channel Gain Register */
00181   RwReg ADC_COR;       /**< \brief (Adc Offset: 0x4C) Channel Offset Register */
00182   RoReg ADC_CDR[16];   /**< \brief (Adc Offset: 0x50) Channel Data Register */
00183   RoReg Reserved3[1];
00184   RwReg ADC_ACR;       /**< \brief (Adc Offset: 0x94) Analog Control Register */
00185   RoReg Reserved4[19];
00186   RwReg ADC_WPMR;      /**< \brief (Adc Offset: 0xE4) Write Protect Mode Register */
00187   RoReg ADC_WPSR;      /**< \brief (Adc Offset: 0xE8) Write Protect Status Register */
00188   RoReg Reserved5[5];
00189   RwReg ADC_RPR;       /**< \brief (Adc Offset: 0x100) Receive Pointer Register */
00190   RwReg ADC_RCR;       /**< \brief (Adc Offset: 0x104) Receive Counter Register */
00191   RwReg ADC_TPR;       /**< \brief (Adc Offset: 0x108) Transmit Pointer Register */
00192   RwReg ADC_TCR;       /**< \brief (Adc Offset: 0x10C) Transmit Counter Register */
00193   RwReg ADC_RNPR;      /**< \brief (Adc Offset: 0x110) Receive Next Pointer Register */
00194   RwReg ADC_RNCR;      /**< \brief (Adc Offset: 0x114) Receive Next Counter Register */
00195   RwReg ADC_TNPR;      /**< \brief (Adc Offset: 0x118) Transmit Next Pointer Register */
00196   RwReg ADC_TNCR;      /**< \brief (Adc Offset: 0x11C) Transmit Next Counter Register */
00197   WoReg ADC_PTCR;      /**< \brief (Adc Offset: 0x120) Transfer Control Register */
00198   RoReg ADC_PTSR;      /**< \brief (Adc Offset: 0x124) Transfer Status Register */
00199 } Adc;
00200 #endif /* __ASSEMBLY__ */
00201 /* -------- ADC_CR : (ADC Offset: 0x00) Control Register -------- */
00202 #define ADC_CR_SWRST (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (ADC_CR) Software Reset */
00203 #define ADC_CR_START (0x1u << 1) /**< \brief (ADC_CR) Start Conversion */
00204 /* -------- ADC_MR : (ADC Offset: 0x04) Mode Register -------- */
00205 #define ADC_MR_TRGEN (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (ADC_MR) Trigger Enable */
00206 #define   ADC_MR_TRGEN_DIS (0x0u << 0) /**< \brief (ADC_MR) Hardware triggers are disabled. Starting a conversion is only possible by software. */
00207 #define   ADC_MR_TRGEN_EN (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (ADC_MR) Hardware trigger selected by TRGSEL field is enabled. */
00208 #define ADC_MR_TRGSEL_Pos 1
00209 #define ADC_MR_TRGSEL_Msk (0x7u << ADC_MR_TRGSEL_Pos) /**< \brief (ADC_MR) Trigger Selection */
00210 #define   ADC_MR_TRGSEL_ADC_TRIG0 (0x0u << 1) /**< \brief (ADC_MR) External : ADCTRG */
00211 #define   ADC_MR_TRGSEL_ADC_TRIG1 (0x1u << 1) /**< \brief (ADC_MR) TIOA Output of the Timer Counter Channel 0 */
00212 #define   ADC_MR_TRGSEL_ADC_TRIG2 (0x2u << 1) /**< \brief (ADC_MR) TIOA Output of the Timer Counter Channel 1 */
00213 #define   ADC_MR_TRGSEL_ADC_TRIG3 (0x3u << 1) /**< \brief (ADC_MR) TIOA Output of the Timer Counter Channel 2 */
00214 #define   ADC_MR_TRGSEL_ADC_TRIG4 (0x4u << 1) /**< \brief (ADC_MR) PWM Event Line 0 */
00215 #define   ADC_MR_TRGSEL_ADC_TRIG5 (0x5u << 1) /**< \brief (ADC_MR) PWM Event Line 0 */
00216 #define ADC_MR_LOWRES (0x1u << 4) /**< \brief (ADC_MR) Resolution */
00217 #define   ADC_MR_LOWRES_BITS_12 (0x0u << 4) /**< \brief (ADC_MR) 12-bit resolution */
00218 #define   ADC_MR_LOWRES_BITS_10 (0x1u << 4) /**< \brief (ADC_MR) 10-bit resolution */
00219 #define ADC_MR_SLEEP (0x1u << 5) /**< \brief (ADC_MR) Sleep Mode */
00220 #define   ADC_MR_SLEEP_NORMAL (0x0u << 5) /**< \brief (ADC_MR) Normal Mode: The ADC Core and reference voltage circuitry are kept ON between conversions */
00221 #define   ADC_MR_SLEEP_SLEEP (0x1u << 5) /**< \brief (ADC_MR) Sleep Mode: The ADC Core and reference voltage circuitry are OFF between conversions */
00222 #define ADC_MR_FWUP (0x1u << 6) /**< \brief (ADC_MR) Fast Wake Up */
00223 #define   ADC_MR_FWUP_OFF (0x0u << 6) /**< \brief (ADC_MR) Normal Sleep Mode: The sleep mode is defined by the SLEEP bit */
00224 #define   ADC_MR_FWUP_ON (0x1u << 6) /**< \brief (ADC_MR) Fast Wake Up Sleep Mode: The Voltage reference is ON between conversions and ADC Core is OFF */
00225 #define ADC_MR_FREERUN (0x1u << 7) /**< \brief (ADC_MR) Free Run Mode */
00226 #define   ADC_MR_FREERUN_OFF (0x0u << 7) /**< \brief (ADC_MR) Normal Mode */
00227 #define   ADC_MR_FREERUN_ON (0x1u << 7) /**< \brief (ADC_MR) Free Run Mode: Never wait for any trigger. */
00228 #define ADC_MR_PRESCAL_Pos 8
00229 #define ADC_MR_PRESCAL_Msk (0xffu << ADC_MR_PRESCAL_Pos) /**< \brief (ADC_MR) Prescaler Rate Selection */
00230 #define ADC_MR_PRESCAL(value) ((ADC_MR_PRESCAL_Msk & ((value) << ADC_MR_PRESCAL_Pos)))
00231 #define ADC_MR_STARTUP_Pos 16
00232 #define ADC_MR_STARTUP_Msk (0xfu << ADC_MR_STARTUP_Pos) /**< \brief (ADC_MR) Start Up Time */
00233 #define   ADC_MR_STARTUP_SUT0 (0x0u << 16) /**< \brief (ADC_MR) 0 periods of ADCClock */
00234 #define   ADC_MR_STARTUP_SUT8 (0x1u << 16) /**< \brief (ADC_MR) 8 periods of ADCClock */
00235 #define   ADC_MR_STARTUP_SUT16 (0x2u << 16) /**< \brief (ADC_MR) 16 periods of ADCClock */
00236 #define   ADC_MR_STARTUP_SUT24 (0x3u << 16) /**< \brief (ADC_MR) 24 periods of ADCClock */
00237 #define   ADC_MR_STARTUP_SUT64 (0x4u << 16) /**< \brief (ADC_MR) 64 periods of ADCClock */
00238 #define   ADC_MR_STARTUP_SUT80 (0x5u << 16) /**< \brief (ADC_MR) 80 periods of ADCClock */
00239 #define   ADC_MR_STARTUP_SUT96 (0x6u << 16) /**< \brief (ADC_MR) 96 periods of ADCClock */
00240 #define   ADC_MR_STARTUP_SUT112 (0x7u << 16) /**< \brief (ADC_MR) 112 periods of ADCClock */
00241 #define   ADC_MR_STARTUP_SUT512 (0x8u << 16) /**< \brief (ADC_MR) 512 periods of ADCClock */
00242 #define   ADC_MR_STARTUP_SUT576 (0x9u << 16) /**< \brief (ADC_MR) 576 periods of ADCClock */
00243 #define   ADC_MR_STARTUP_SUT640 (0xAu << 16) /**< \brief (ADC_MR) 640 periods of ADCClock */
00244 #define   ADC_MR_STARTUP_SUT704 (0xBu << 16) /**< \brief (ADC_MR) 704 periods of ADCClock */
00245 #define   ADC_MR_STARTUP_SUT768 (0xCu << 16) /**< \brief (ADC_MR) 768 periods of ADCClock */
00246 #define   ADC_MR_STARTUP_SUT832 (0xDu << 16) /**< \brief (ADC_MR) 832 periods of ADCClock */
00247 #define   ADC_MR_STARTUP_SUT896 (0xEu << 16) /**< \brief (ADC_MR) 896 periods of ADCClock */
00248 #define   ADC_MR_STARTUP_SUT960 (0xFu << 16) /**< \brief (ADC_MR) 960 periods of ADCClock */
00249 #define ADC_MR_SETTLING_Pos 20
00250 #define ADC_MR_SETTLING_Msk (0x3u << ADC_MR_SETTLING_Pos) /**< \brief (ADC_MR) Analog Settling Time */
00251 #define   ADC_MR_SETTLING_AST3 (0x0u << 20) /**< \brief (ADC_MR) 3 periods of ADCClock */
00252 #define   ADC_MR_SETTLING_AST5 (0x1u << 20) /**< \brief (ADC_MR) 5 periods of ADCClock */
00253 #define   ADC_MR_SETTLING_AST9 (0x2u << 20) /**< \brief (ADC_MR) 9 periods of ADCClock */
00254 #define   ADC_MR_SETTLING_AST17 (0x3u << 20) /**< \brief (ADC_MR) 17 periods of ADCClock */
00255 #define ADC_MR_ANACH (0x1u << 23) /**< \brief (ADC_MR) Analog Change */
00256 #define   ADC_MR_ANACH_NONE (0x0u << 23) /**< \brief (ADC_MR) No analog change on channel switching: DIFF0, GAIN0 and OFF0 are used for all channels */
00257 #define   ADC_MR_ANACH_ALLOWED (0x1u << 23) /**< \brief (ADC_MR) Allows different analog settings for each channel. See ADC_CGR and ADC_COR Registers */
00258 #define ADC_MR_TRACKTIM_Pos 24
00259 #define ADC_MR_TRACKTIM_Msk (0xfu << ADC_MR_TRACKTIM_Pos) /**< \brief (ADC_MR) Tracking Time */
00260 #define ADC_MR_TRACKTIM(value) ((ADC_MR_TRACKTIM_Msk & ((value) << ADC_MR_TRACKTIM_Pos)))
00261 #define ADC_MR_TRANSFER_Pos 28
00262 #define ADC_MR_TRANSFER_Msk (0x3u << ADC_MR_TRANSFER_Pos) /**< \brief (ADC_MR) Transfer Period */
00263 #define ADC_MR_TRANSFER(value) ((ADC_MR_TRANSFER_Msk & ((value) << ADC_MR_TRANSFER_Pos)))
00264 #define ADC_MR_USEQ (0x1u << 31) /**< \brief (ADC_MR) Use Sequence Enable */
00265 #define   ADC_MR_USEQ_NUM_ORDER (0x0u << 31) /**< \brief (ADC_MR) Normal Mode: The controller converts channels in a simple numeric order. */
00266 #define   ADC_MR_USEQ_REG_ORDER (0x1u << 31) /**< \brief (ADC_MR) User Sequence Mode: The sequence respects what is defined in ADC_SEQR1 and ADC_SEQR2 registers. */
00267 /* -------- ADC_SEQR1 : (ADC Offset: 0x08) Channel Sequence Register 1 -------- */
00268 #define ADC_SEQR1_USCH1_Pos 0
00269 #define ADC_SEQR1_USCH1_Msk (0xfu << ADC_SEQR1_USCH1_Pos) /**< \brief (ADC_SEQR1) User Sequence Number 1 */
00270 #define ADC_SEQR1_USCH1(value) ((ADC_SEQR1_USCH1_Msk & ((value) << ADC_SEQR1_USCH1_Pos)))
00271 #define ADC_SEQR1_USCH2_Pos 4
00272 #define ADC_SEQR1_USCH2_Msk (0xfu << ADC_SEQR1_USCH2_Pos) /**< \brief (ADC_SEQR1) User Sequence Number 2 */
00273 #define ADC_SEQR1_USCH2(value) ((ADC_SEQR1_USCH2_Msk & ((value) << ADC_SEQR1_USCH2_Pos)))
00274 #define ADC_SEQR1_USCH3_Pos 8
00275 #define ADC_SEQR1_USCH3_Msk (0xfu << ADC_SEQR1_USCH3_Pos) /**< \brief (ADC_SEQR1) User Sequence Number 3 */
00276 #define ADC_SEQR1_USCH3(value) ((ADC_SEQR1_USCH3_Msk & ((value) << ADC_SEQR1_USCH3_Pos)))
00277 #define ADC_SEQR1_USCH4_Pos 12
00278 #define ADC_SEQR1_USCH4_Msk (0xfu << ADC_SEQR1_USCH4_Pos) /**< \brief (ADC_SEQR1) User Sequence Number 4 */
00279 #define ADC_SEQR1_USCH4(value) ((ADC_SEQR1_USCH4_Msk & ((value) << ADC_SEQR1_USCH4_Pos)))
00280 #define ADC_SEQR1_USCH5_Pos 16
00281 #define ADC_SEQR1_USCH5_Msk (0xfu << ADC_SEQR1_USCH5_Pos) /**< \brief (ADC_SEQR1) User Sequence Number 5 */
00282 #define ADC_SEQR1_USCH5(value) ((ADC_SEQR1_USCH5_Msk & ((value) << ADC_SEQR1_USCH5_Pos)))
00283 #define ADC_SEQR1_USCH6_Pos 20
00284 #define ADC_SEQR1_USCH6_Msk (0xfu << ADC_SEQR1_USCH6_Pos) /**< \brief (ADC_SEQR1) User Sequence Number 6 */
00285 #define ADC_SEQR1_USCH6(value) ((ADC_SEQR1_USCH6_Msk & ((value) << ADC_SEQR1_USCH6_Pos)))
00286 #define ADC_SEQR1_USCH7_Pos 24
00287 #define ADC_SEQR1_USCH7_Msk (0xfu << ADC_SEQR1_USCH7_Pos) /**< \brief (ADC_SEQR1) User Sequence Number 7 */
00288 #define ADC_SEQR1_USCH7(value) ((ADC_SEQR1_USCH7_Msk & ((value) << ADC_SEQR1_USCH7_Pos)))
00289 #define ADC_SEQR1_USCH8_Pos 28
00290 #define ADC_SEQR1_USCH8_Msk (0xfu << ADC_SEQR1_USCH8_Pos) /**< \brief (ADC_SEQR1) User Sequence Number 8 */
00291 #define ADC_SEQR1_USCH8(value) ((ADC_SEQR1_USCH8_Msk & ((value) << ADC_SEQR1_USCH8_Pos)))
00292 /* -------- ADC_SEQR2 : (ADC Offset: 0x0C) Channel Sequence Register 2 -------- */
00293 #define ADC_SEQR2_USCH9_Pos 0
00294 #define ADC_SEQR2_USCH9_Msk (0xfu << ADC_SEQR2_USCH9_Pos) /**< \brief (ADC_SEQR2) User Sequence Number 9 */
00295 #define ADC_SEQR2_USCH9(value) ((ADC_SEQR2_USCH9_Msk & ((value) << ADC_SEQR2_USCH9_Pos)))
00296 #define ADC_SEQR2_USCH10_Pos 4
00297 #define ADC_SEQR2_USCH10_Msk (0xfu << ADC_SEQR2_USCH10_Pos) /**< \brief (ADC_SEQR2) User Sequence Number 10 */
00298 #define ADC_SEQR2_USCH10(value) ((ADC_SEQR2_USCH10_Msk & ((value) << ADC_SEQR2_USCH10_Pos)))
00299 #define ADC_SEQR2_USCH11_Pos 8
00300 #define ADC_SEQR2_USCH11_Msk (0xfu << ADC_SEQR2_USCH11_Pos) /**< \brief (ADC_SEQR2) User Sequence Number 11 */
00301 #define ADC_SEQR2_USCH11(value) ((ADC_SEQR2_USCH11_Msk & ((value) << ADC_SEQR2_USCH11_Pos)))
00302 #define ADC_SEQR2_USCH12_Pos 12
00303 #define ADC_SEQR2_USCH12_Msk (0xfu << ADC_SEQR2_USCH12_Pos) /**< \brief (ADC_SEQR2) User Sequence Number 12 */
00304 #define ADC_SEQR2_USCH12(value) ((ADC_SEQR2_USCH12_Msk & ((value) << ADC_SEQR2_USCH12_Pos)))
00305 #define ADC_SEQR2_USCH13_Pos 16
00306 #define ADC_SEQR2_USCH13_Msk (0xfu << ADC_SEQR2_USCH13_Pos) /**< \brief (ADC_SEQR2) User Sequence Number 13 */
00307 #define ADC_SEQR2_USCH13(value) ((ADC_SEQR2_USCH13_Msk & ((value) << ADC_SEQR2_USCH13_Pos)))
00308 #define ADC_SEQR2_USCH14_Pos 20
00309 #define ADC_SEQR2_USCH14_Msk (0xfu << ADC_SEQR2_USCH14_Pos) /**< \brief (ADC_SEQR2) User Sequence Number 14 */
00310 #define ADC_SEQR2_USCH14(value) ((ADC_SEQR2_USCH14_Msk & ((value) << ADC_SEQR2_USCH14_Pos)))
00311 #define ADC_SEQR2_USCH15_Pos 24
00312 #define ADC_SEQR2_USCH15_Msk (0xfu << ADC_SEQR2_USCH15_Pos) /**< \brief (ADC_SEQR2) User Sequence Number 15 */
00313 #define ADC_SEQR2_USCH15(value) ((ADC_SEQR2_USCH15_Msk & ((value) << ADC_SEQR2_USCH15_Pos)))
00314 #define ADC_SEQR2_USCH16_Pos 28
00315 #define ADC_SEQR2_USCH16_Msk (0xfu << ADC_SEQR2_USCH16_Pos) /**< \brief (ADC_SEQR2) User Sequence Number 16 */
00316 #define ADC_SEQR2_USCH16(value) ((ADC_SEQR2_USCH16_Msk & ((value) << ADC_SEQR2_USCH16_Pos)))
00317 /* -------- ADC_CHER : (ADC Offset: 0x10) Channel Enable Register -------- */
00318 #define ADC_CHER_CH0 (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (ADC_CHER) Channel 0 Enable */
00319 #define ADC_CHER_CH1 (0x1u << 1) /**< \brief (ADC_CHER) Channel 1 Enable */

00374 #define ADC_IER_EOC0 (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (ADC_IER) End of Conversion Interrupt Enable 0 */
00375 #define ADC_IER_EOC1 (0x1u << 1) /**< \brief (ADC_IER) End of Conversion Interrupt Enable 1 */
00376 #define ADC_IER_EOC2 (0x1u << 2) /**< \brief (ADC_IER) End of Conversion Interrupt Enable 2 */

00380 #define ADC_IER_EOC6 (0x1u << 6) /**< \brief (ADC_IER) End of Conversion Interrupt Enable 6 */
00381 #define ADC_IER_EOC7 (0x1u << 7) /**< \brief (ADC_IER) End of Conversion Interrupt Enable 7 */
00382 #define ADC_IER_EOC8 (0x1u << 8) /**< \brief (ADC_IER) End of Conversion Interrupt Enable 8 */
00383 #define ADC_IER_EOC9 (0x1u << 9) /**< \brief (ADC_IER) End of Conversion Interrupt Enable 9 */
00384 #define ADC_IER_EOC10 (0x1u << 10) /**< \brief (ADC_IER) End of Conversion Interrupt Enable 10 */

00389 #define ADC_IER_EOC15 (0x1u << 15) /**< \brief (ADC_IER) End of Conversion Interrupt Enable 15 */
00390 #define ADC_IER_DRDY (0x1u << 24) /**< \brief (ADC_IER) Data Ready Interrupt Enable */
00391 #define ADC_IER_GOVRE (0x1u << 25) /**< \brief (ADC_IER) General Overrun Error Interrupt Enable */
00392 #define ADC_IER_COMPE (0x1u << 26) /**< \brief (ADC_IER) Comparison Event Interrupt Enable */
00393 #define ADC_IER_ENDRX (0x1u << 27) /**< \brief (ADC_IER) End of Receive Buffer Interrupt Enable */

00448 #define ADC_ISR_EOC8 (0x1u << 8) /**< \brief (ADC_ISR) End of Conversion 8 */
00449 #define ADC_ISR_EOC9 (0x1u << 9) /**< \brief (ADC_ISR) End of Conversion 9 */
00450 #define ADC_ISR_EOC10 (0x1u << 10) /**< \brief (ADC_ISR) End of Conversion 10 */
00451 #define ADC_ISR_EOC11 (0x1u << 11) /**< \brief (ADC_ISR) End of Conversion 11 */
00452 #define ADC_ISR_EOC12 (0x1u << 12) /**< \brief (ADC_ISR) End of Conversion 12 */

00455 #define ADC_ISR_EOC15 (0x1u << 15) /**< \brief (ADC_ISR) End of Conversion 15 */
00456 #define ADC_ISR_DRDY (0x1u << 24) /**< \brief (ADC_ISR) Data Ready */
00457 #define ADC_ISR_GOVRE (0x1u << 25) /**< \brief (ADC_ISR) General Overrun Error */
00458 #define ADC_ISR_COMPE (0x1u << 26) /**< \brief (ADC_ISR) Comparison Error */
00459 #define ADC_ISR_ENDRX (0x1u << 27) /**< \brief (ADC_ISR) End of RX Buffer */

00461 /* -------- ADC_OVER : (ADC Offset: 0x3C) Overrun Status Register -------- */
00462 #define ADC_OVER_OVRE0 (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (ADC_OVER) Overrun Error 0 */
00463 #define ADC_OVER_OVRE1 (0x1u << 1) /**< \brief (ADC_OVER) Overrun Error 1 */
00464 #define ADC_OVER_OVRE2 (0x1u << 2) /**< \brief (ADC_OVER) Overrun Error 2 */
00465 #define ADC_OVER_OVRE3 (0x1u << 3) /**< \brief (ADC_OVER) Overrun Error 3 */
00466 #define ADC_OVER_OVRE4 (0x1u << 4) /**< \brief (ADC_OVER) Overrun Error 4 */
00467 #define ADC_OVER_OVRE5 (0x1u << 5) /**< \brief (ADC_OVER) Overrun Error 5 */
00468 #define ADC_OVER_OVRE6 (0x1u << 6) /**< \brief (ADC_OVER) Overrun Error 6 */
00469 #define ADC_OVER_OVRE7 (0x1u << 7) /**< \brief (ADC_OVER) Overrun Error 7 */
00470 #define ADC_OVER_OVRE8 (0x1u << 8) /**< \brief (ADC_OVER) Overrun Error 8 */
00471 #define ADC_OVER_OVRE9 (0x1u << 9) /**< \brief (ADC_OVER) Overrun Error 9 */

00473 #define ADC_OVER_OVRE11 (0x1u << 11) /**< \brief (ADC_OVER) Overrun Error 11 */
00474 #define ADC_OVER_OVRE12 (0x1u << 12) /**< \brief (ADC_OVER) Overrun Error 12 */
00475 #define ADC_OVER_OVRE13 (0x1u << 13) /**< \brief (ADC_OVER) Overrun Error 13 */
00476 #define ADC_OVER_OVRE14 (0x1u << 14) /**< \brief (ADC_OVER) Overrun Error 14 */
