00478 /* -------- ADC_EMR : (ADC Offset: 0x40) Extended Mode Register -------- */
00479 #define ADC_EMR_CMPMODE_Pos 0
00480 #define ADC_EMR_CMPMODE_Msk (0x3u << ADC_EMR_CMPMODE_Pos) /**< \brief (ADC_EMR) Comparison Mode */
00481 #define   ADC_EMR_CMPMODE_LOW (0x0u << 0) /**< \brief (ADC_EMR) Generates an event when the converted data is lower than the low threshold of the window. */
00482 #define   ADC_EMR_CMPMODE_HIGH (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (ADC_EMR) Generates an event when the converted data is higher than the high threshold of the window. */
00483 #define   ADC_EMR_CMPMODE_IN (0x2u << 0) /**< \brief (ADC_EMR) Generates an event when the converted data is in the comparison window. */
00484 #define   ADC_EMR_CMPMODE_OUT (0x3u << 0) /**< \brief (ADC_EMR) Generates an event when the converted data is out of the comparison window. */
00485 #define ADC_EMR_CMPSEL_Pos 4
00486 #define ADC_EMR_CMPSEL_Msk (0xfu << ADC_EMR_CMPSEL_Pos) /**< \brief (ADC_EMR) Comparison Selected Channel */
00487 #define ADC_EMR_CMPSEL(value) ((ADC_EMR_CMPSEL_Msk & ((value) << ADC_EMR_CMPSEL_Pos)))
00488 #define ADC_EMR_CMPALL (0x1u << 9) /**< \brief (ADC_EMR) Compare All Channels */
00489 #define ADC_EMR_CMPFILTER_Pos 12
00490 #define ADC_EMR_CMPFILTER_Msk (0x3u << ADC_EMR_CMPFILTER_Pos) /**< \brief (ADC_EMR) Compare Event Filtering */
00491 #define ADC_EMR_CMPFILTER(value) ((ADC_EMR_CMPFILTER_Msk & ((value) << ADC_EMR_CMPFILTER_Pos)))
00492 #define ADC_EMR_TAG (0x1u << 24) /**< \brief (ADC_EMR) TAG of ADC_LDCR register */
00493 /* -------- ADC_CWR : (ADC Offset: 0x44) Compare Window Register -------- */
00494 #define ADC_CWR_LOWTHRES_Pos 0
00495 #define ADC_CWR_LOWTHRES_Msk (0xfffu << ADC_CWR_LOWTHRES_Pos) /**< \brief (ADC_CWR) Low Threshold */
00496 #define ADC_CWR_LOWTHRES(value) ((ADC_CWR_LOWTHRES_Msk & ((value) << ADC_CWR_LOWTHRES_Pos)))
00497 #define ADC_CWR_HIGHTHRES_Pos 16
00498 #define ADC_CWR_HIGHTHRES_Msk (0xfffu << ADC_CWR_HIGHTHRES_Pos) /**< \brief (ADC_CWR) High Threshold */
00499 #define ADC_CWR_HIGHTHRES(value) ((ADC_CWR_HIGHTHRES_Msk & ((value) << ADC_CWR_HIGHTHRES_Pos)))
00500 /* -------- ADC_CGR : (ADC Offset: 0x48) Channel Gain Register -------- */
00501 #define ADC_CGR_GAIN0_Pos 0
00502 #define ADC_CGR_GAIN0_Msk (0x3u << ADC_CGR_GAIN0_Pos) /**< \brief (ADC_CGR) Gain for channel 0 */
00503 #define ADC_CGR_GAIN0(value) ((ADC_CGR_GAIN0_Msk & ((value) << ADC_CGR_GAIN0_Pos)))
00504 #define ADC_CGR_GAIN1_Pos 2
00505 #define ADC_CGR_GAIN1_Msk (0x3u << ADC_CGR_GAIN1_Pos) /**< \brief (ADC_CGR) Gain for channel 1 */
00506 #define ADC_CGR_GAIN1(value) ((ADC_CGR_GAIN1_Msk & ((value) << ADC_CGR_GAIN1_Pos)))
00507 #define ADC_CGR_GAIN2_Pos 4
00508 #define ADC_CGR_GAIN2_Msk (0x3u << ADC_CGR_GAIN2_Pos) /**< \brief (ADC_CGR) Gain for channel 2 */
00509 #define ADC_CGR_GAIN2(value) ((ADC_CGR_GAIN2_Msk & ((value) << ADC_CGR_GAIN2_Pos)))
00510 #define ADC_CGR_GAIN3_Pos 6
00511 #define ADC_CGR_GAIN3_Msk (0x3u << ADC_CGR_GAIN3_Pos) /**< \brief (ADC_CGR) Gain for channel 3 */
00512 #define ADC_CGR_GAIN3(value) ((ADC_CGR_GAIN3_Msk & ((value) << ADC_CGR_GAIN3_Pos)))
00513 #define ADC_CGR_GAIN4_Pos 8
00514 #define ADC_CGR_GAIN4_Msk (0x3u << ADC_CGR_GAIN4_Pos) /**< \brief (ADC_CGR) Gain for channel 4 */
00515 #define ADC_CGR_GAIN4(value) ((ADC_CGR_GAIN4_Msk & ((value) << ADC_CGR_GAIN4_Pos)))
00516 #define ADC_CGR_GAIN5_Pos 10
00517 #define ADC_CGR_GAIN5_Msk (0x3u << ADC_CGR_GAIN5_Pos) /**< \brief (ADC_CGR) Gain for channel 5 */
00518 #define ADC_CGR_GAIN5(value) ((ADC_CGR_GAIN5_Msk & ((value) << ADC_CGR_GAIN5_Pos)))
00519 #define ADC_CGR_GAIN6_Pos 12
00520 #define ADC_CGR_GAIN6_Msk (0x3u << ADC_CGR_GAIN6_Pos) /**< \brief (ADC_CGR) Gain for channel 6 */
00521 #define ADC_CGR_GAIN6(value) ((ADC_CGR_GAIN6_Msk & ((value) << ADC_CGR_GAIN6_Pos)))
00522 #define ADC_CGR_GAIN7_Pos 14
00523 #define ADC_CGR_GAIN7_Msk (0x3u << ADC_CGR_GAIN7_Pos) /**< \brief (ADC_CGR) Gain for channel 7 */
00524 #define ADC_CGR_GAIN7(value) ((ADC_CGR_GAIN7_Msk & ((value) << ADC_CGR_GAIN7_Pos)))
00525 #define ADC_CGR_GAIN8_Pos 16
00526 #define ADC_CGR_GAIN8_Msk (0x3u << ADC_CGR_GAIN8_Pos) /**< \brief (ADC_CGR) Gain for channel 8 */
00527 #define ADC_CGR_GAIN8(value) ((ADC_CGR_GAIN8_Msk & ((value) << ADC_CGR_GAIN8_Pos)))
00528 #define ADC_CGR_GAIN9_Pos 18
00529 #define ADC_CGR_GAIN9_Msk (0x3u << ADC_CGR_GAIN9_Pos) /**< \brief (ADC_CGR) Gain for channel 9 */
00530 #define ADC_CGR_GAIN9(value) ((ADC_CGR_GAIN9_Msk & ((value) << ADC_CGR_GAIN9_Pos)))
00531 #define ADC_CGR_GAIN10_Pos 20
00532 #define ADC_CGR_GAIN10_Msk (0x3u << ADC_CGR_GAIN10_Pos) /**< \brief (ADC_CGR) Gain for channel 10 */
00533 #define ADC_CGR_GAIN10(value) ((ADC_CGR_GAIN10_Msk & ((value) << ADC_CGR_GAIN10_Pos)))
00534 #define ADC_CGR_GAIN11_Pos 22
00535 #define ADC_CGR_GAIN11_Msk (0x3u << ADC_CGR_GAIN11_Pos) /**< \brief (ADC_CGR) Gain for channel 11 */
00536 #define ADC_CGR_GAIN11(value) ((ADC_CGR_GAIN11_Msk & ((value) << ADC_CGR_GAIN11_Pos)))
00537 #define ADC_CGR_GAIN12_Pos 24
00538 #define ADC_CGR_GAIN12_Msk (0x3u << ADC_CGR_GAIN12_Pos) /**< \brief (ADC_CGR) Gain for channel 12 */
00539 #define ADC_CGR_GAIN12(value) ((ADC_CGR_GAIN12_Msk & ((value) << ADC_CGR_GAIN12_Pos)))
00540 #define ADC_CGR_GAIN13_Pos 26
00541 #define ADC_CGR_GAIN13_Msk (0x3u << ADC_CGR_GAIN13_Pos) /**< \brief (ADC_CGR) Gain for channel 13 */
00542 #define ADC_CGR_GAIN13(value) ((ADC_CGR_GAIN13_Msk & ((value) << ADC_CGR_GAIN13_Pos)))
00543 #define ADC_CGR_GAIN14_Pos 28
00544 #define ADC_CGR_GAIN14_Msk (0x3u << ADC_CGR_GAIN14_Pos) /**< \brief (ADC_CGR) Gain for channel 14 */
00545 #define ADC_CGR_GAIN14(value) ((ADC_CGR_GAIN14_Msk & ((value) << ADC_CGR_GAIN14_Pos)))
00546 #define ADC_CGR_GAIN15_Pos 30
00547 #define ADC_CGR_GAIN15_Msk (0x3u << ADC_CGR_GAIN15_Pos) /**< \brief (ADC_CGR) Gain for channel 15 */
00548 #define ADC_CGR_GAIN15(value) ((ADC_CGR_GAIN15_Msk & ((value) << ADC_CGR_GAIN15_Pos)))
00549 /* -------- ADC_COR : (ADC Offset: 0x4C) Channel Offset Register -------- */
00550 #define ADC_COR_OFF0 (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (ADC_COR) Offset for channel 0 */
00551 #define ADC_COR_OFF1 (0x1u << 1) /**< \brief (ADC_COR) Offset for channel 1 */
00552 #define ADC_COR_OFF2 (0x1u << 2) /**< \brief (ADC_COR) Offset for channel 2 */
00553 #define ADC_COR_OFF3 (0x1u << 3) /**< \brief (ADC_COR) Offset for channel 3 */
00554 #define ADC_COR_OFF4 (0x1u << 4) /**< \brief (ADC_COR) Offset for channel 4 */
00555 #define ADC_COR_OFF5 (0x1u << 5) /**< \brief (ADC_COR) Offset for channel 5 */
00556 #define ADC_COR_OFF6 (0x1u << 6) /**< \brief (ADC_COR) Offset for channel 6 */
00557 #define ADC_COR_OFF7 (0x1u << 7) /**< \brief (ADC_COR) Offset for channel 7 */
00558 #define ADC_COR_OFF8 (0x1u << 8) /**< \brief (ADC_COR) Offset for channel 8 */
00559 #define ADC_COR_OFF9 (0x1u << 9) /**< \brief (ADC_COR) Offset for channel 9 */
00560 #define ADC_COR_OFF10 (0x1u << 10) /**< \brief (ADC_COR) Offset for channel 10 */
00561 #define ADC_COR_OFF11 (0x1u << 11) /**< \brief (ADC_COR) Offset for channel 11 */
00562 #define ADC_COR_OFF12 (0x1u << 12) /**< \brief (ADC_COR) Offset for channel 12 */
00563 #define ADC_COR_OFF13 (0x1u << 13) /**< \brief (ADC_COR) Offset for channel 13 */
00564 #define ADC_COR_OFF14 (0x1u << 14) /**< \brief (ADC_COR) Offset for channel 14 */
00565 #define ADC_COR_OFF15 (0x1u << 15) /**< \brief (ADC_COR) Offset for channel 15 */
00566 #define ADC_COR_DIFF0 (0x1u << 16) /**< \brief (ADC_COR) Differential inputs for channel 0 */
00567 #define ADC_COR_DIFF1 (0x1u << 17) /**< \brief (ADC_COR) Differential inputs for channel 1 */
00568 #define ADC_COR_DIFF2 (0x1u << 18) /**< \brief (ADC_COR) Differential inputs for channel 2 */
00569 #define ADC_COR_DIFF3 (0x1u << 19) /**< \brief (ADC_COR) Differential inputs for channel 3 */
00570 #define ADC_COR_DIFF4 (0x1u << 20) /**< \brief (ADC_COR) Differential inputs for channel 4 */
00571 #define ADC_COR_DIFF5 (0x1u << 21) /**< \brief (ADC_COR) Differential inputs for channel 5 */
00572 #define ADC_COR_DIFF6 (0x1u << 22) /**< \brief (ADC_COR) Differential inputs for channel 6 */
00573 #define ADC_COR_DIFF7 (0x1u << 23) /**< \brief (ADC_COR) Differential inputs for channel 7 */
00574 #define ADC_COR_DIFF8 (0x1u << 24) /**< \brief (ADC_COR) Differential inputs for channel 8 */
00575 #define ADC_COR_DIFF9 (0x1u << 25) /**< \brief (ADC_COR) Differential inputs for channel 9 */
00576 #define ADC_COR_DIFF10 (0x1u << 26) /**< \brief (ADC_COR) Differential inputs for channel 10 */
00577 #define ADC_COR_DIFF11 (0x1u << 27) /**< \brief (ADC_COR) Differential inputs for channel 11 */
00578 #define ADC_COR_DIFF12 (0x1u << 28) /**< \brief (ADC_COR) Differential inputs for channel 12 */
00579 #define ADC_COR_DIFF13 (0x1u << 29) /**< \brief (ADC_COR) Differential inputs for channel 13 */
00580 #define ADC_COR_DIFF14 (0x1u << 30) /**< \brief (ADC_COR) Differential inputs for channel 14 */
00581 #define ADC_COR_DIFF15 (0x1u << 31) /**< \brief (ADC_COR) Differential inputs for channel 15 */
00582 /* -------- ADC_CDR[16] : (ADC Offset: 0x50) Channel Data Register -------- */
00583 #define ADC_CDR_DATA_Pos 0
00584 #define ADC_CDR_DATA_Msk (0xfffu << ADC_CDR_DATA_Pos) /**< \brief (ADC_CDR[16]) Converted Data */
00585 /* -------- ADC_ACR : (ADC Offset: 0x94) Analog Control Register -------- */
00586 #define ADC_ACR_TSON (0x1u << 4) /**< \brief (ADC_ACR) Temperature Sensor On */
00587 #define ADC_ACR_IBCTL_Pos 8
00588 #define ADC_ACR_IBCTL_Msk (0x3u << ADC_ACR_IBCTL_Pos) /**< \brief (ADC_ACR) ADC Bias Current Control */
00589 #define ADC_ACR_IBCTL(value) ((ADC_ACR_IBCTL_Msk & ((value) << ADC_ACR_IBCTL_Pos)))
00590 /* -------- ADC_WPMR : (ADC Offset: 0xE4) Write Protect Mode Register -------- */
00591 #define ADC_WPMR_WPEN (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (ADC_WPMR) Write Protect Enable */
00592 #define ADC_WPMR_WPKEY_Pos 8
00593 #define ADC_WPMR_WPKEY_Msk (0xffffffu << ADC_WPMR_WPKEY_Pos) /**< \brief (ADC_WPMR) Write Protect KEY */
00594 #define ADC_WPMR_WPKEY(value) ((ADC_WPMR_WPKEY_Msk & ((value) << ADC_WPMR_WPKEY_Pos)))
00595 /* -------- ADC_WPSR : (ADC Offset: 0xE8) Write Protect Status Register -------- */
00596 #define ADC_WPSR_WPVS (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (ADC_WPSR) Write Protect Violation Status */
00597 #define ADC_WPSR_WPVSRC_Pos 8
00598 #define ADC_WPSR_WPVSRC_Msk (0xffffu << ADC_WPSR_WPVSRC_Pos) /**< \brief (ADC_WPSR) Write Protect Violation Source */
00599 /* -------- ADC_RPR : (ADC Offset: 0x100) Receive Pointer Register -------- */
00600 #define ADC_RPR_RXPTR_Pos 0
00601 #define ADC_RPR_RXPTR_Msk (0xffffffffu << ADC_RPR_RXPTR_Pos) /**< \brief (ADC_RPR) Receive Pointer Register */
00602 #define ADC_RPR_RXPTR(value) ((ADC_RPR_RXPTR_Msk & ((value) << ADC_RPR_RXPTR_Pos)))
00603 /* -------- ADC_RCR : (ADC Offset: 0x104) Receive Counter Register -------- */
00604 #define ADC_RCR_RXCTR_Pos 0
00605 #define ADC_RCR_RXCTR_Msk (0xffffu << ADC_RCR_RXCTR_Pos) /**< \brief (ADC_RCR) Receive Counter Register */
00606 #define ADC_RCR_RXCTR(value) ((ADC_RCR_RXCTR_Msk & ((value) << ADC_RCR_RXCTR_Pos)))
00607 /* -------- ADC_TPR : (ADC Offset: 0x108) Transmit Pointer Register -------- */
00608 #define ADC_TPR_TXPTR_Pos 0
00609 #define ADC_TPR_TXPTR_Msk (0xffffffffu << ADC_TPR_TXPTR_Pos) /**< \brief (ADC_TPR) Transmit Counter Register */
00610 #define ADC_TPR_TXPTR(value) ((ADC_TPR_TXPTR_Msk & ((value) << ADC_TPR_TXPTR_Pos)))
00611 /* -------- ADC_TCR : (ADC Offset: 0x10C) Transmit Counter Register -------- */
00612 #define ADC_TCR_TXCTR_Pos 0
00613 #define ADC_TCR_TXCTR_Msk (0xffffu << ADC_TCR_TXCTR_Pos) /**< \brief (ADC_TCR) Transmit Counter Register */
00614 #define ADC_TCR_TXCTR(value) ((ADC_TCR_TXCTR_Msk & ((value) << ADC_TCR_TXCTR_Pos)))
00615 /* -------- ADC_RNPR : (ADC Offset: 0x110) Receive Next Pointer Register -------- */
00616 #define ADC_RNPR_RXNPTR_Pos 0
00617 #define ADC_RNPR_RXNPTR_Msk (0xffffffffu << ADC_RNPR_RXNPTR_Pos) /**< \brief (ADC_RNPR) Receive Next Pointer */
00618 #define ADC_RNPR_RXNPTR(value) ((ADC_RNPR_RXNPTR_Msk & ((value) << ADC_RNPR_RXNPTR_Pos)))
00619 /* -------- ADC_RNCR : (ADC Offset: 0x114) Receive Next Counter Register -------- */
00620 #define ADC_RNCR_RXNCTR_Pos 0
00621 #define ADC_RNCR_RXNCTR_Msk (0xffffu << ADC_RNCR_RXNCTR_Pos) /**< \brief (ADC_RNCR) Receive Next Counter */
00622 #define ADC_RNCR_RXNCTR(value) ((ADC_RNCR_RXNCTR_Msk & ((value) << ADC_RNCR_RXNCTR_Pos)))
00623 /* -------- ADC_TNPR : (ADC Offset: 0x118) Transmit Next Pointer Register -------- */
00624 #define ADC_TNPR_TXNPTR_Pos 0
00625 #define ADC_TNPR_TXNPTR_Msk (0xffffffffu << ADC_TNPR_TXNPTR_Pos) /**< \brief (ADC_TNPR) Transmit Next Pointer */
00626 #define ADC_TNPR_TXNPTR(value) ((ADC_TNPR_TXNPTR_Msk & ((value) << ADC_TNPR_TXNPTR_Pos)))
00627 /* -------- ADC_TNCR : (ADC Offset: 0x11C) Transmit Next Counter Register -------- */
00628 #define ADC_TNCR_TXNCTR_Pos 0
00629 #define ADC_TNCR_TXNCTR_Msk (0xffffu << ADC_TNCR_TXNCTR_Pos) /**< \brief (ADC_TNCR) Transmit Counter Next */
00630 #define ADC_TNCR_TXNCTR(value) ((ADC_TNCR_TXNCTR_Msk & ((value) << ADC_TNCR_TXNCTR_Pos)))
00631 /* -------- ADC_PTCR : (ADC Offset: 0x120) Transfer Control Register -------- */
00632 #define ADC_PTCR_RXTEN (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (ADC_PTCR) Receiver Transfer Enable */
00633 #define ADC_PTCR_RXTDIS (0x1u << 1) /**< \brief (ADC_PTCR) Receiver Transfer Disable */
00634 #define ADC_PTCR_TXTEN (0x1u << 8) /**< \brief (ADC_PTCR) Transmitter Transfer Enable */
00635 #define ADC_PTCR_TXTDIS (0x1u << 9) /**< \brief (ADC_PTCR) Transmitter Transfer Disable */
00636 /* -------- ADC_PTSR : (ADC Offset: 0x124) Transfer Status Register -------- */
00637 #define ADC_PTSR_RXTEN (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (ADC_PTSR) Receiver Transfer Enable */
00638 #define ADC_PTSR_TXTEN (0x1u << 8) /**< \brief (ADC_PTSR) Transmitter Transfer Enable */
00639 
00640 /*@}*/
00641 
00642 /* ============================================================================= */
00643 /**  SOFTWARE API DEFINITION FOR Controller Area Network */
00644 /* ============================================================================= */
00645 /** \addtogroup SAM3XA_CAN Controller Area Network */
00646 /*@{*/
00647 
00648 #ifndef __ASSEMBLY__
00649 #define CAN_MB_NUMBER    8
00650 /** \brief CanMb hardware registers */
00651 typedef struct {
00652   RwReg  CAN_MMR;        /**< \brief (CanMb Offset: 0x0) Mailbox Mode Register */
00653   RwReg  CAN_MAM;        /**< \brief (CanMb Offset: 0x4) Mailbox Acceptance Mask Register */
00654   RwReg  CAN_MID;        /**< \brief (CanMb Offset: 0x8) Mailbox ID Register */
00655   RwReg  CAN_MFID;       /**< \brief (CanMb Offset: 0xC) Mailbox Family ID Register */
00656   RwReg  CAN_MSR;        /**< \brief (CanMb Offset: 0x10) Mailbox Status Register */
00657   RwReg  CAN_MDL;        /**< \brief (CanMb Offset: 0x14) Mailbox Data Low Register */
00658   RwReg  CAN_MDH;        /**< \brief (CanMb Offset: 0x18) Mailbox Data High Register */
00659   RwReg  CAN_MCR;        /**< \brief (CanMb Offset: 0x1C) Mailbox Control Register */
00660 } CanMb;
00661 /** \brief Can hardware registers */
00662 typedef struct {
00663   RwReg  CAN_MR;         /**< \brief (Can Offset: 0x0000) Mode Register */
00664   WoReg  CAN_IER;        /**< \brief (Can Offset: 0x0004) Interrupt Enable Register */
00665   WoReg  CAN_IDR;        /**< \brief (Can Offset: 0x0008) Interrupt Disable Register */
00666   RoReg  CAN_IMR;        /**< \brief (Can Offset: 0x000C) Interrupt Mask Register */
00667   RoReg  CAN_SR;         /**< \brief (Can Offset: 0x0010) Status Register */
00668   RwReg  CAN_BR;         /**< \brief (Can Offset: 0x0014) Baudrate Register */
00669   RoReg  CAN_TIM;        /**< \brief (Can Offset: 0x0018) Timer Register */
00670   RoReg  CAN_TIMESTP;    /**< \brief (Can Offset: 0x001C) Timestamp Register */
00671   RoReg  CAN_ECR;        /**< \brief (Can Offset: 0x0020) Error Counter Register */
00672   WoReg  CAN_TCR;        /**< \brief (Can Offset: 0x0024) Transfer Command Register */
00673   WoReg  CAN_ACR;        /**< \brief (Can Offset: 0x0028) Abort Command Register */
00674   RoReg  Reserved1[117];
00675   CanMb  CAN_MB[CAN_MB_NUMBER];      /**< \brief (Can Offset: 0x200) MB = 0 .. 7 */
00676 } Can;
00677 #endif /* __ASSEMBLY__ */
00678 /* -------- CAN_MR : (CAN Offset: 0x0000) Mode Register -------- */
00679 #define CAN_MR_CANEN (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (CAN_MR) CAN Controller Enable */
00680 #define CAN_MR_LPM (0x1u << 1) /**< \brief (CAN_MR) Disable/Enable Low Power Mode */
00681 #define CAN_MR_ABM (0x1u << 2) /**< \brief (CAN_MR) Disable/Enable Autobaud/Listen mode */
00682 #define CAN_MR_OVL (0x1u << 3) /**< \brief (CAN_MR) Disable/Enable Overload Frame */
00683 #define CAN_MR_TEOF (0x1u << 4) /**< \brief (CAN_MR) Timestamp messages at each end of Frame */
00684 #define CAN_MR_TTM (0x1u << 5) /**< \brief (CAN_MR) Disable/Enable Time Triggered Mode */
00685 #define CAN_MR_TIMFRZ (0x1u << 6) /**< \brief (CAN_MR) Enable Timer Freeze */
00686 #define CAN_MR_DRPT (0x1u << 7) /**< \brief (CAN_MR) Disable Repeat */
00687 #define CAN_MR_RXSYNC_Pos 24
00688 #define CAN_MR_RXSYNC_Msk (0x7u << CAN_MR_RXSYNC_Pos) /**< \brief (CAN_MR) Reception Synchronization Stage (not readable) */
00689 #define   CAN_MR_RXSYNC_DOUBLE_PP (0x0u << 24) /**< \brief (CAN_MR) Rx Signal with Double Synchro Stages (2 Positive Edges) */
00690 #define   CAN_MR_RXSYNC_DOUBLE_PN (0x1u << 24) /**< \brief (CAN_MR) Rx Signal with Double Synchro Stages (One Positive Edge and One Negative Edge) */
00691 #define   CAN_MR_RXSYNC_SINGLE_P (0x2u << 24) /**< \brief (CAN_MR) Rx Signal with Single Synchro Stage (Positive Edge) */
00692 #define   CAN_MR_RXSYNC_NONE (0x3u << 24) /**< \brief (CAN_MR) Rx Signal with No Synchro Stage */
00693 /* -------- CAN_IER : (CAN Offset: 0x0004) Interrupt Enable Register -------- */
00694 #define CAN_IER_MB0 (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (CAN_IER) Mailbox 0 Interrupt Enable */
00695 #define CAN_IER_MB1 (0x1u << 1) /**< \brief (CAN_IER) Mailbox 1 Interrupt Enable */
00696 #define CAN_IER_MB2 (0x1u << 2) /**< \brief (CAN_IER) Mailbox 2 Interrupt Enable */
00697 #define CAN_IER_MB3 (0x1u << 3) /**< \brief (CAN_IER) Mailbox 3 Interrupt Enable */
00698 #define CAN_IER_MB4 (0x1u << 4) /**< \brief (CAN_IER) Mailbox 4 Interrupt Enable */
00699 #define CAN_IER_MB5 (0x1u << 5) /**< \brief (CAN_IER) Mailbox 5 Interrupt Enable */
00700 #define CAN_IER_MB6 (0x1u << 6) /**< \brief (CAN_IER) Mailbox 6 Interrupt Enable */
00701 #define CAN_IER_MB7 (0x1u << 7) /**< \brief (CAN_IER) Mailbox 7 Interrupt Enable */
00702 #define CAN_IER_ERRA (0x1u << 16) /**< \brief (CAN_IER) Error Active Mode Interrupt Enable */
00703 #define CAN_IER_WARN (0x1u << 17) /**< \brief (CAN_IER) Warning Limit Interrupt Enable */
00704 #define CAN_IER_ERRP (0x1u << 18) /**< \brief (CAN_IER) Error Passive Mode Interrupt Enable */
00705 #define CAN_IER_BOFF (0x1u << 19) /**< \brief (CAN_IER) Bus Off Mode Interrupt Enable */
00706 #define CAN_IER_SLEEP (0x1u << 20) /**< \brief (CAN_IER) Sleep Interrupt Enable */
00707 #define CAN_IER_WAKEUP (0x1u << 21) /**< \brief (CAN_IER) Wakeup Interrupt Enable */
00708 #define CAN_IER_TOVF (0x1u << 22) /**< \brief (CAN_IER) Timer Overflow Interrupt Enable */
00709 #define CAN_IER_TSTP (0x1u << 23) /**< \brief (CAN_IER) TimeStamp Interrupt Enable */
00710 #define CAN_IER_CERR (0x1u << 24) /**< \brief (CAN_IER) CRC Error Interrupt Enable */
00711 #define CAN_IER_SERR (0x1u << 25) /**< \brief (CAN_IER) Stuffing Error Interrupt Enable */
00712 #define CAN_IER_AERR (0x1u << 26) /**< \brief (CAN_IER) Acknowledgment Error Interrupt Enable */
00713 #define CAN_IER_FERR (0x1u << 27) /**< \brief (CAN_IER) Form Error Interrupt Enable */
00714 #define CAN_IER_BERR (0x1u << 28) /**< \brief (CAN_IER) Bit Error Interrupt Enable */
00715 /* -------- CAN_IDR : (CAN Offset: 0x0008) Interrupt Disable Register -------- */
00716 #define CAN_IDR_MB0 (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (CAN_IDR) Mailbox 0 Interrupt Disable */
00717 #define CAN_IDR_MB1 (0x1u << 1) /**< \brief (CAN_IDR) Mailbox 1 Interrupt Disable */
00718 #define CAN_IDR_MB2 (0x1u << 2) /**< \brief (CAN_IDR) Mailbox 2 Interrupt Disable */
00719 #define CAN_IDR_MB3 (0x1u << 3) /**< \brief (CAN_IDR) Mailbox 3 Interrupt Disable */
00720 #define CAN_IDR_MB4 (0x1u << 4) /**< \brief (CAN_IDR) Mailbox 4 Interrupt Disable */
00721 #define CAN_IDR_MB5 (0x1u << 5) /**< \brief (CAN_IDR) Mailbox 5 Interrupt Disable */
00722 #define CAN_IDR_MB6 (0x1u << 6) /**< \brief (CAN_IDR) Mailbox 6 Interrupt Disable */
00723 #define CAN_IDR_MB7 (0x1u << 7) /**< \brief (CAN_IDR) Mailbox 7 Interrupt Disable */
00724 #define CAN_IDR_ERRA (0x1u << 16) /**< \brief (CAN_IDR) Error Active Mode Interrupt Disable */
00725 #define CAN_IDR_WARN (0x1u << 17) /**< \brief (CAN_IDR) Warning Limit Interrupt Disable */
00726 #define CAN_IDR_ERRP (0x1u << 18) /**< \brief (CAN_IDR) Error Passive Mode Interrupt Disable */
00727 #define CAN_IDR_BOFF (0x1u << 19) /**< \brief (CAN_IDR) Bus Off Mode Interrupt Disable */
00728 #define CAN_IDR_SLEEP (0x1u << 20) /**< \brief (CAN_IDR) Sleep Interrupt Disable */
00729 #define CAN_IDR_WAKEUP (0x1u << 21) /**< \brief (CAN_IDR) Wakeup Interrupt Disable */
00730 #define CAN_IDR_TOVF (0x1u << 22) /**< \brief (CAN_IDR) Timer Overflow Interrupt */
00731 #define CAN_IDR_TSTP (0x1u << 23) /**< \brief (CAN_IDR) TimeStamp Interrupt Disable */
00732 #define CAN_IDR_CERR (0x1u << 24) /**< \brief (CAN_IDR) CRC Error Interrupt Disable */
00733 #define CAN_IDR_SERR (0x1u << 25) /**< \brief (CAN_IDR) Stuffing Error Interrupt Disable */
00734 #define CAN_IDR_AERR (0x1u << 26) /**< \brief (CAN_IDR) Acknowledgment Error Interrupt Disable */
00735 #define CAN_IDR_FERR (0x1u << 27) /**< \brief (CAN_IDR) Form Error Interrupt Disable */
00736 #define CAN_IDR_BERR (0x1u << 28) /**< \brief (CAN_IDR) Bit Error Interrupt Disable */
00737 /* -------- CAN_IMR : (CAN Offset: 0x000C) Interrupt Mask Register -------- */
00738 #define CAN_IMR_MB0 (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (CAN_IMR) Mailbox 0 Interrupt Mask */
00739 #define CAN_IMR_MB1 (0x1u << 1) /**< \brief (CAN_IMR) Mailbox 1 Interrupt Mask */
00740 #define CAN_IMR_MB2 (0x1u << 2) /**< \brief (CAN_IMR) Mailbox 2 Interrupt Mask */
00741 #define CAN_IMR_MB3 (0x1u << 3) /**< \brief (CAN_IMR) Mailbox 3 Interrupt Mask */
00742 #define CAN_IMR_MB4 (0x1u << 4) /**< \brief (CAN_IMR) Mailbox 4 Interrupt Mask */
00743 #define CAN_IMR_MB5 (0x1u << 5) /**< \brief (CAN_IMR) Mailbox 5 Interrupt Mask */
00744 #define CAN_IMR_MB6 (0x1u << 6) /**< \brief (CAN_IMR) Mailbox 6 Interrupt Mask */
00745 #define CAN_IMR_MB7 (0x1u << 7) /**< \brief (CAN_IMR) Mailbox 7 Interrupt Mask */
00746 #define CAN_IMR_ERRA (0x1u << 16) /**< \brief (CAN_IMR) Error Active Mode Interrupt Mask */
00747 #define CAN_IMR_WARN (0x1u << 17) /**< \brief (CAN_IMR) Warning Limit Interrupt Mask */
00748 #define CAN_IMR_ERRP (0x1u << 18) /**< \brief (CAN_IMR) Error Passive Mode Interrupt Mask */
00749 #define CAN_IMR_BOFF (0x1u << 19) /**< \brief (CAN_IMR) Bus Off Mode Interrupt Mask */
00750 #define CAN_IMR_SLEEP (0x1u << 20) /**< \brief (CAN_IMR) Sleep Interrupt Mask */
00751 #define CAN_IMR_WAKEUP (0x1u << 21) /**< \brief (CAN_IMR) Wakeup Interrupt Mask */
00752 #define CAN_IMR_TOVF (0x1u << 22) /**< \brief (CAN_IMR) Timer Overflow Interrupt Mask */
00753 #define CAN_IMR_TSTP (0x1u << 23) /**< \brief (CAN_IMR) Timestamp Interrupt Mask */
00754 #define CAN_IMR_CERR (0x1u << 24) /**< \brief (CAN_IMR) CRC Error Interrupt Mask */
00755 #define CAN_IMR_SERR (0x1u << 25) /**< \brief (CAN_IMR) Stuffing Error Interrupt Mask */
00756 #define CAN_IMR_AERR (0x1u << 26) /**< \brief (CAN_IMR) Acknowledgment Error Interrupt Mask */
00757 #define CAN_IMR_FERR (0x1u << 27) /**< \brief (CAN_IMR) Form Error Interrupt Mask */
00758 #define CAN_IMR_BERR (0x1u << 28) /**< \brief (CAN_IMR) Bit Error Interrupt Mask */
00759 /* -------- CAN_SR : (CAN Offset: 0x0010) Status Register -------- */
00760 #define CAN_SR_MB0 (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (CAN_SR) Mailbox 0 Event */
00761 #define CAN_SR_MB1 (0x1u << 1) /**< \brief (CAN_SR) Mailbox 1 Event */
00762 #define CAN_SR_MB2 (0x1u << 2) /**< \brief (CAN_SR) Mailbox 2 Event */
00763 #define CAN_SR_MB3 (0x1u << 3) /**< \brief (CAN_SR) Mailbox 3 Event */
00764 #define CAN_SR_MB4 (0x1u << 4) /**< \brief (CAN_SR) Mailbox 4 Event */
00765 #define CAN_SR_MB5 (0x1u << 5) /**< \brief (CAN_SR) Mailbox 5 Event */
00766 #define CAN_SR_MB6 (0x1u << 6) /**< \brief (CAN_SR) Mailbox 6 Event */
00767 #define CAN_SR_MB7 (0x1u << 7) /**< \brief (CAN_SR) Mailbox 7 Event */
00768 #define CAN_SR_ERRA (0x1u << 16) /**< \brief (CAN_SR) Error Active Mode */
00769 #define CAN_SR_WARN (0x1u << 17) /**< \brief (CAN_SR) Warning Limit */
00770 #define CAN_SR_ERRP (0x1u << 18) /**< \brief (CAN_SR) Error Passive Mode */
00771 #define CAN_SR_BOFF (0x1u << 19) /**< \brief (CAN_SR) Bus Off Mode */
00772 #define CAN_SR_SLEEP (0x1u << 20) /**< \brief (CAN_SR) CAN controller in Low power Mode */
00773 #define CAN_SR_WAKEUP (0x1u << 21) /**< \brief (CAN_SR) CAN controller is not in Low power Mode */
00774 #define CAN_SR_TOVF (0x1u << 22) /**< \brief (CAN_SR) Timer Overflow */
00775 #define CAN_SR_TSTP (0x1u << 23) /**< \brief (CAN_SR)  */
00776 #define CAN_SR_CERR (0x1u << 24) /**< \brief (CAN_SR) Mailbox CRC Error */
00777 #define CAN_SR_SERR (0x1u << 25) /**< \brief (CAN_SR) Mailbox Stuffing Error */
00778 #define CAN_SR_AERR (0x1u << 26) /**< \brief (CAN_SR) Acknowledgment Error */
00779 #define CAN_SR_FERR (0x1u << 27) /**< \brief (CAN_SR) Form Error */
00780 #define CAN_SR_BERR (0x1u << 28) /**< \brief (CAN_SR) Bit Error */
00781 #define CAN_SR_RBSY (0x1u << 29) /**< \brief (CAN_SR) Receiver busy */
00782 #define CAN_SR_TBSY (0x1u << 30) /**< \brief (CAN_SR) Transmitter busy */
00783 #define CAN_SR_OVLSY (0x1u << 31) /**< \brief (CAN_SR) Overload busy */
00784 /* -------- CAN_BR : (CAN Offset: 0x0014) Baudrate Register -------- */
00785 #define CAN_BR_PHASE2_Pos 0
00786 #define CAN_BR_PHASE2_Msk (0x7u << CAN_BR_PHASE2_Pos) /**< \brief (CAN_BR) Phase 2 segment */
00787 #define CAN_BR_PHASE2(value) ((CAN_BR_PHASE2_Msk & ((value) << CAN_BR_PHASE2_Pos)))
00788 #define CAN_BR_PHASE1_Pos 4
00789 #define CAN_BR_PHASE1_Msk (0x7u << CAN_BR_PHASE1_Pos) /**< \brief (CAN_BR) Phase 1 segment */
00790 #define CAN_BR_PHASE1(value) ((CAN_BR_PHASE1_Msk & ((value) << CAN_BR_PHASE1_Pos)))
00791 #define CAN_BR_PROPAG_Pos 8
00792 #define CAN_BR_PROPAG_Msk (0x7u << CAN_BR_PROPAG_Pos) /**< \brief (CAN_BR) Programming time segment */
00793 #define CAN_BR_PROPAG(value) ((CAN_BR_PROPAG_Msk & ((value) << CAN_BR_PROPAG_Pos)))
00794 #define CAN_BR_SJW_Pos 12
00795 #define CAN_BR_SJW_Msk (0x3u << CAN_BR_SJW_Pos) /**< \brief (CAN_BR) Re-synchronization jump width */
00796 #define CAN_BR_SJW(value) ((CAN_BR_SJW_Msk & ((value) << CAN_BR_SJW_Pos)))
00797 #define CAN_BR_BRP_Pos 16
00798 #define CAN_BR_BRP_Msk (0x7fu << CAN_BR_BRP_Pos) /**< \brief (CAN_BR) Baudrate Prescaler. */
00799 #define CAN_BR_BRP(value) ((CAN_BR_BRP_Msk & ((value) << CAN_BR_BRP_Pos)))
00800 #define CAN_BR_SMP (0x1u << 24) /**< \brief (CAN_BR) Sampling Mode */
00801 #define   CAN_BR_SMP_ONCE (0x0u << 24) /**< \brief (CAN_BR) The incoming bit stream is sampled once at sample point. */
00802 #define   CAN_BR_SMP_THREE (0x1u << 24) /**< \brief (CAN_BR) The incoming bit stream is sampled three times with a period of a MCK clock period, centered on sample point. */
00803 /* -------- CAN_TIM : (CAN Offset: 0x0018) Timer Register -------- */
00804 #define CAN_TIM_TIMER0 (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (CAN_TIM) Timer */
00805 #define CAN_TIM_TIMER1 (0x1u << 1) /**< \brief (CAN_TIM) Timer */
00806 #define CAN_TIM_TIMER2 (0x1u << 2) /**< \brief (CAN_TIM) Timer */
00807 #define CAN_TIM_TIMER3 (0x1u << 3) /**< \brief (CAN_TIM) Timer */
00808 #define CAN_TIM_TIMER4 (0x1u << 4) /**< \brief (CAN_TIM) Timer */
00809 #define CAN_TIM_TIMER5 (0x1u << 5) /**< \brief (CAN_TIM) Timer */
00810 #define CAN_TIM_TIMER6 (0x1u << 6) /**< \brief (CAN_TIM) Timer */
00811 #define CAN_TIM_TIMER7 (0x1u << 7) /**< \brief (CAN_TIM) Timer */
00812 /* -------- CAN_TIMESTP : (CAN Offset: 0x001C) Timestamp Register -------- */
00813 #define CAN_TIMESTP_MTIMESTAMP0 (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (CAN_TIMESTP) Timestamp */
00814 #define CAN_TIMESTP_MTIMESTAMP1 (0x1u << 1) /**< \brief (CAN_TIMESTP) Timestamp */
00815 #define CAN_TIMESTP_MTIMESTAMP2 (0x1u << 2) /**< \brief (CAN_TIMESTP) Timestamp */
00816 #define CAN_TIMESTP_MTIMESTAMP3 (0x1u << 3) /**< \brief (CAN_TIMESTP) Timestamp */
00817 #define CAN_TIMESTP_MTIMESTAMP4 (0x1u << 4) /**< \brief (CAN_TIMESTP) Timestamp */
00818 #define CAN_TIMESTP_MTIMESTAMP5 (0x1u << 5) /**< \brief (CAN_TIMESTP) Timestamp */
00819 #define CAN_TIMESTP_MTIMESTAMP6 (0x1u << 6) /**< \brief (CAN_TIMESTP) Timestamp */
00820 #define CAN_TIMESTP_MTIMESTAMP7 (0x1u << 7) /**< \brief (CAN_TIMESTP) Timestamp */
00821 /* -------- CAN_ECR : (CAN Offset: 0x0020) Error Counter Register -------- */
00822 #define CAN_ECR_REC_Pos 0
00823 #define CAN_ECR_REC_Msk (0xffu << CAN_ECR_REC_Pos) /**< \brief (CAN_ECR) Receive Error Counter */
00824 #define CAN_ECR_TEC_Pos 16
00825 #define CAN_ECR_TEC_Msk (0xffu << CAN_ECR_TEC_Pos) /**< \brief (CAN_ECR) Transmit Error Counter */
00826 /* -------- CAN_TCR : (CAN Offset: 0x0024) Transfer Command Register -------- */
00827 #define CAN_TCR_MB0 (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (CAN_TCR) Transfer Request for Mailbox 0 */
00828 #define CAN_TCR_MB1 (0x1u << 1) /**< \brief (CAN_TCR) Transfer Request for Mailbox 1 */
00829 #define CAN_TCR_MB2 (0x1u << 2) /**< \brief (CAN_TCR) Transfer Request for Mailbox 2 */
00830 #define CAN_TCR_MB3 (0x1u << 3) /**< \brief (CAN_TCR) Transfer Request for Mailbox 3 */
00831 #define CAN_TCR_MB4 (0x1u << 4) /**< \brief (CAN_TCR) Transfer Request for Mailbox 4 */
00832 #define CAN_TCR_MB5 (0x1u << 5) /**< \brief (CAN_TCR) Transfer Request for Mailbox 5 */
00833 #define CAN_TCR_MB6 (0x1u << 6) /**< \brief (CAN_TCR) Transfer Request for Mailbox 6 */
00834 #define CAN_TCR_MB7 (0x1u << 7) /**< \brief (CAN_TCR) Transfer Request for Mailbox 7 */
00835 #define CAN_TCR_TIMRST (0x1u << 31) /**< \brief (CAN_TCR) Timer Reset */
00836 /* -------- CAN_ACR : (CAN Offset: 0x0028) Abort Command Register -------- */
00837 #define CAN_ACR_MB0 (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (CAN_ACR) Abort Request for Mailbox 0 */
00838 #define CAN_ACR_MB1 (0x1u << 1) /**< \brief (CAN_ACR) Abort Request for Mailbox 1 */
00839 #define CAN_ACR_MB2 (0x1u << 2) /**< \brief (CAN_ACR) Abort Request for Mailbox 2 */
00840 #define CAN_ACR_MB3 (0x1u << 3) /**< \brief (CAN_ACR) Abort Request for Mailbox 3 */
00841 #define CAN_ACR_MB4 (0x1u << 4) /**< \brief (CAN_ACR) Abort Request for Mailbox 4 */
00842 #define CAN_ACR_MB5 (0x1u << 5) /**< \brief (CAN_ACR) Abort Request for Mailbox 5 */
00843 #define CAN_ACR_MB6 (0x1u << 6) /**< \brief (CAN_ACR) Abort Request for Mailbox 6 */
00844 #define CAN_ACR_MB7 (0x1u << 7) /**< \brief (CAN_ACR) Abort Request for Mailbox 7 */
00845 /* -------- CAN_MMR : (CAN Offset: N/A) Mailbox Mode Register -------- */
00846 #define CAN_MMR_MTIMEMARK0 (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (CAN_MMR) Mailbox Timemark */
00847 #define CAN_MMR_MTIMEMARK1 (0x1u << 1) /**< \brief (CAN_MMR) Mailbox Timemark */
00848 #define CAN_MMR_MTIMEMARK2 (0x1u << 2) /**< \brief (CAN_MMR) Mailbox Timemark */
00849 #define CAN_MMR_MTIMEMARK3 (0x1u << 3) /**< \brief (CAN_MMR) Mailbox Timemark */
00850 #define CAN_MMR_MTIMEMARK4 (0x1u << 4) /**< \brief (CAN_MMR) Mailbox Timemark */
00851 #define CAN_MMR_MTIMEMARK5 (0x1u << 5) /**< \brief (CAN_MMR) Mailbox Timemark */
00852 #define CAN_MMR_MTIMEMARK6 (0x1u << 6) /**< \brief (CAN_MMR) Mailbox Timemark */
00853 #define CAN_MMR_MTIMEMARK7 (0x1u << 7) /**< \brief (CAN_MMR) Mailbox Timemark */
00854 #define CAN_MMR_PRIOR_Pos 16
00855 #define CAN_MMR_PRIOR_Msk (0xfu << CAN_MMR_PRIOR_Pos) /**< \brief (CAN_MMR) Mailbox Priority */
00856 #define CAN_MMR_PRIOR(value) ((CAN_MMR_PRIOR_Msk & ((value) << CAN_MMR_PRIOR_Pos)))
00857 #define CAN_MMR_MOT_Pos 24
00858 #define CAN_MMR_MOT_Msk (0x7u << CAN_MMR_MOT_Pos) /**< \brief (CAN_MMR) Mailbox Object Type */
00859 #define   CAN_MMR_MOT_MB_DISABLED (0x0u << 24) /**< \brief (CAN_MMR) Mailbox is disabled. This prevents receiving or transmitting any messages with this mailbox. */
00860 #define   CAN_MMR_MOT_MB_RX (0x1u << 24) /**< \brief (CAN_MMR) Reception Mailbox. Mailbox is configured for reception. If a message is received while the mailbox data register is full, it is discarded. */
00861 #define   CAN_MMR_MOT_MB_RX_OVERWRITE (0x2u << 24) /**< \brief (CAN_MMR) Reception mailbox with overwrite. Mailbox is configured for reception. If a message is received while the mailbox is full, it overwrites the previous message. */
00862 #define   CAN_MMR_MOT_MB_TX (0x3u << 24) /**< \brief (CAN_MMR) Transmit mailbox. Mailbox is configured for transmission. */
00863 #define   CAN_MMR_MOT_MB_CONSUMER (0x4u << 24) /**< \brief (CAN_MMR) Consumer Mailbox. Mailbox is configured in reception but behaves as a Transmit Mailbox, i.e., it sends a remote frame and waits for an answer. */
00864 #define   CAN_MMR_MOT_MB_PRODUCER (0x5u << 24) /**< \brief (CAN_MMR) Producer Mailbox. Mailbox is configured in transmission but also behaves like a reception mailbox, i.e., it waits to receive a Remote Frame before sending its contents. */
00865 /* -------- CAN_MAM : (CAN Offset: N/A) Mailbox Acceptance Mask Register -------- */
00866 #define CAN_MAM_MIDvB_Pos 0
00867 #define CAN_MAM_MIDvB_Msk (0x3ffffu << CAN_MAM_MIDvB_Pos) /**< \brief (CAN_MAM) Complementary bits for identifier in extended frame mode */
00868 #define CAN_MAM_MIDvB(value) ((CAN_MAM_MIDvB_Msk & ((value) << CAN_MAM_MIDvB_Pos)))
00869 #define CAN_MAM_MIDvA_Pos 18
00870 #define CAN_MAM_MIDvA_Msk (0x7ffu << CAN_MAM_MIDvA_Pos) /**< \brief (CAN_MAM) Identifier for standard frame mode */
00871 #define CAN_MAM_MIDvA(value) ((CAN_MAM_MIDvA_Msk & ((value) << CAN_MAM_MIDvA_Pos)))
00872 #define CAN_MAM_MIDE (0x1u << 29) /**< \brief (CAN_MAM) Identifier Version */
00873 /* -------- CAN_MID : (CAN Offset: N/A) Mailbox ID Register -------- */
00874 #define CAN_MID_MIDvB_Pos 0
00875 #define CAN_MID_MIDvB_Msk (0x3ffffu << CAN_MID_MIDvB_Pos) /**< \brief (CAN_MID) Complementary bits for identifier in extended frame mode */
00876 #define CAN_MID_MIDvB(value) ((CAN_MID_MIDvB_Msk & ((value) << CAN_MID_MIDvB_Pos)))
00877 #define CAN_MID_MIDvA_Pos 18
00878 #define CAN_MID_MIDvA_Msk (0x7ffu << CAN_MID_MIDvA_Pos) /**< \brief (CAN_MID) Identifier for standard frame mode */
00879 #define CAN_MID_MIDvA(value) ((CAN_MID_MIDvA_Msk & ((value) << CAN_MID_MIDvA_Pos)))
00880 #define CAN_MID_MIDE (0x1u << 29) /**< \brief (CAN_MID) Identifier Version */
00881 /* -------- CAN_MFID : (CAN Offset: N/A) Mailbox Family ID Register -------- */
00882 #define CAN_MFID_MFID_Pos 0
00883 #define CAN_MFID_MFID_Msk (0x1fffffffu << CAN_MFID_MFID_Pos) /**< \brief (CAN_MFID) Family ID */
00884 /* -------- CAN_MSR : (CAN Offset: N/A) Mailbox Status Register -------- */
00885 #define CAN_MSR_MTIMESTAMP0 (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (CAN_MSR) Timer value */
00886 #define CAN_MSR_MTIMESTAMP1 (0x1u << 1) /**< \brief (CAN_MSR) Timer value */
00887 #define CAN_MSR_MTIMESTAMP2 (0x1u << 2) /**< \brief (CAN_MSR) Timer value */
00888 #define CAN_MSR_MTIMESTAMP3 (0x1u << 3) /**< \brief (CAN_MSR) Timer value */
00889 #define CAN_MSR_MTIMESTAMP4 (0x1u << 4) /**< \brief (CAN_MSR) Timer value */
00890 #define CAN_MSR_MTIMESTAMP5 (0x1u << 5) /**< \brief (CAN_MSR) Timer value */
00891 #define CAN_MSR_MTIMESTAMP6 (0x1u << 6) /**< \brief (CAN_MSR) Timer value */
00892 #define CAN_MSR_MTIMESTAMP7 (0x1u << 7) /**< \brief (CAN_MSR) Timer value */
00893 #define CAN_MSR_MDLC_Pos 16
00894 #define CAN_MSR_MDLC_Msk (0xfu << CAN_MSR_MDLC_Pos) /**< \brief (CAN_MSR) Mailbox Data Length Code */
00895 #define CAN_MSR_MRTR (0x1u << 20) /**< \brief (CAN_MSR) Mailbox Remote Transmission Request */
00896 #define CAN_MSR_MABT (0x1u << 22) /**< \brief (CAN_MSR) Mailbox Message Abort */
00897 #define CAN_MSR_MRDY (0x1u << 23) /**< \brief (CAN_MSR) Mailbox Ready */
00898 #define CAN_MSR_MMI (0x1u << 24) /**< \brief (CAN_MSR) Mailbox Message Ignored */
00899 /* -------- CAN_MDL : (CAN Offset: N/A) Mailbox Data Low Register -------- */
00900 #define CAN_MDL_MDL_Pos 0
00901 #define CAN_MDL_MDL_Msk (0xffffffffu << CAN_MDL_MDL_Pos) /**< \brief (CAN_MDL) Message Data Low Value */
00902 #define CAN_MDL_MDL(value) ((CAN_MDL_MDL_Msk & ((value) << CAN_MDL_MDL_Pos)))
00903 /* -------- CAN_MDH : (CAN Offset: N/A) Mailbox Data High Register -------- */
00904 #define CAN_MDH_MDH_Pos 0
00905 #define CAN_MDH_MDH_Msk (0xffffffffu << CAN_MDH_MDH_Pos) /**< \brief (CAN_MDH) Message Data High Value */
00906 #define CAN_MDH_MDH(value) ((CAN_MDH_MDH_Msk & ((value) << CAN_MDH_MDH_Pos)))
00907 /* -------- CAN_MCR : (CAN Offset: N/A) Mailbox Control Register -------- */
00908 #define CAN_MCR_MDLC_Pos 16
00909 #define CAN_MCR_MDLC_Msk (0xfu << CAN_MCR_MDLC_Pos) /**< \brief (CAN_MCR) Mailbox Data Length Code */
00910 #define CAN_MCR_MDLC(value) ((CAN_MCR_MDLC_Msk & ((value) << CAN_MCR_MDLC_Pos)))
00911 #define CAN_MCR_MRTR (0x1u << 20) /**< \brief (CAN_MCR) Mailbox Remote Transmission Request */
00912 #define CAN_MCR_MACR (0x1u << 22) /**< \brief (CAN_MCR) Abort Request for Mailbox x */
00913 #define CAN_MCR_MTCR (0x1u << 23) /**< \brief (CAN_MCR) Mailbox Transfer Command */
00914 
00915 /*@}*/
00916 
00917 /* ============================================================================= */
00918 /**  SOFTWARE API DEFINITION FOR Chip Identifier */
00919 /* ============================================================================= */
00920 /** \addtogroup SAM3XA_CHIPID Chip Identifier */
00921 /*@{*/
00922 
00923 #ifndef __ASSEMBLY__
00924 /** \brief Chipid hardware registers */
00925 typedef struct {
00926   RoReg CHIPID_CIDR; /**< \brief (Chipid Offset: 0x0) Chip ID Register */
00927   RoReg CHIPID_EXID; /**< \brief (Chipid Offset: 0x4) Chip ID Extension Register */
00928 } Chipid;
00929 #endif /* __ASSEMBLY__ */
00930 /* -------- CHIPID_CIDR : (CHIPID Offset: 0x0) Chip ID Register -------- */
00931 #define CHIPID_CIDR_VERSION_Pos 0
00932 #define CHIPID_CIDR_VERSION_Msk (0x1fu << CHIPID_CIDR_VERSION_Pos) /**< \brief (CHIPID_CIDR) Version of the Device */
00933 #define CHIPID_CIDR_EPROC_Pos 5
00934 #define CHIPID_CIDR_EPROC_Msk (0x7u << CHIPID_CIDR_EPROC_Pos) /**< \brief (CHIPID_CIDR) Embedded Processor */
00935 #define   CHIPID_CIDR_EPROC_ARM946ES (0x1u << 5) /**< \brief (CHIPID_CIDR) ARM946ES */
00936 #define   CHIPID_CIDR_EPROC_ARM7TDMI (0x2u << 5) /**< \brief (CHIPID_CIDR) ARM7TDMI */
00937 #define   CHIPID_CIDR_EPROC_CM3 (0x3u << 5) /**< \brief (CHIPID_CIDR) Cortex-M3 */
00938 #define   CHIPID_CIDR_EPROC_ARM920T (0x4u << 5) /**< \brief (CHIPID_CIDR) ARM920T */
00939 #define   CHIPID_CIDR_EPROC_ARM926EJS (0x5u << 5) /**< \brief (CHIPID_CIDR) ARM926EJS */
00940 #define   CHIPID_CIDR_EPROC_CA5 (0x6u << 5) /**< \brief (CHIPID_CIDR) Cortex-A5 */
00941 #define   CHIPID_CIDR_EPROC_CM4 (0x7u << 5) /**< \brief (CHIPID_CIDR) Cortex-M4 */
00942 #define CHIPID_CIDR_NVPSIZ_Pos 8
00943 #define CHIPID_CIDR_NVPSIZ_Msk (0xfu << CHIPID_CIDR_NVPSIZ_Pos) /**< \brief (CHIPID_CIDR) Nonvolatile Program Memory Size */
00944 #define   CHIPID_CIDR_NVPSIZ_NONE (0x0u << 8) /**< \brief (CHIPID_CIDR) None */
00945 #define   CHIPID_CIDR_NVPSIZ_8K (0x1u << 8) /**< \brief (CHIPID_CIDR) 8K bytes */
00946 #define   CHIPID_CIDR_NVPSIZ_16K (0x2u << 8) /**< \brief (CHIPID_CIDR) 16K bytes */
00947 #define   CHIPID_CIDR_NVPSIZ_32K (0x3u << 8) /**< \brief (CHIPID_CIDR) 32K bytes */
00948 #define   CHIPID_CIDR_NVPSIZ_64K (0x5u << 8) /**< \brief (CHIPID_CIDR) 64K bytes */
00949 #define   CHIPID_CIDR_NVPSIZ_128K (0x7u << 8) /**< \brief (CHIPID_CIDR) 128K bytes */
00950 #define   CHIPID_CIDR_NVPSIZ_256K (0x9u << 8) /**< \brief (CHIPID_CIDR) 256K bytes */
00951 #define   CHIPID_CIDR_NVPSIZ_512K (0xAu << 8) /**< \brief (CHIPID_CIDR) 512K bytes */
00952 #define   CHIPID_CIDR_NVPSIZ_1024K (0xCu << 8) /**< \brief (CHIPID_CIDR) 1024K bytes */
00953 #define   CHIPID_CIDR_NVPSIZ_2048K (0xEu << 8) /**< \brief (CHIPID_CIDR) 2048K bytes */
00954 #define CHIPID_CIDR_NVPSIZ2_Pos 12
00955 #define CHIPID_CIDR_NVPSIZ2_Msk (0xfu << CHIPID_CIDR_NVPSIZ2_Pos) /**< \brief (CHIPID_CIDR)  */
00956 #define   CHIPID_CIDR_NVPSIZ2_NONE (0x0u << 12) /**< \brief (CHIPID_CIDR) None */
00957 #define   CHIPID_CIDR_NVPSIZ2_8K (0x1u << 12) /**< \brief (CHIPID_CIDR) 8K bytes */
00958 #define   CHIPID_CIDR_NVPSIZ2_16K (0x2u << 12) /**< \brief (CHIPID_CIDR) 16K bytes */
00959 #define   CHIPID_CIDR_NVPSIZ2_32K (0x3u << 12) /**< \brief (CHIPID_CIDR) 32K bytes */
00960 #define   CHIPID_CIDR_NVPSIZ2_64K (0x5u << 12) /**< \brief (CHIPID_CIDR) 64K bytes */
00961 #define   CHIPID_CIDR_NVPSIZ2_128K (0x7u << 12) /**< \brief (CHIPID_CIDR) 128K bytes */
00962 #define   CHIPID_CIDR_NVPSIZ2_256K (0x9u << 12) /**< \brief (CHIPID_CIDR) 256K bytes */
00963 #define   CHIPID_CIDR_NVPSIZ2_512K (0xAu << 12) /**< \brief (CHIPID_CIDR) 512K bytes */
00964 #define   CHIPID_CIDR_NVPSIZ2_1024K (0xCu << 12) /**< \brief (CHIPID_CIDR) 1024K bytes */
00965 #define   CHIPID_CIDR_NVPSIZ2_2048K (0xEu << 12) /**< \brief (CHIPID_CIDR) 2048K bytes */
00966 #define CHIPID_CIDR_SRAMSIZ_Pos 16
00967 #define CHIPID_CIDR_SRAMSIZ_Msk (0xfu << CHIPID_CIDR_SRAMSIZ_Pos) /**< \brief (CHIPID_CIDR) Internal SRAM Size */
00968 #define   CHIPID_CIDR_SRAMSIZ_48K (0x0u << 16) /**< \brief (CHIPID_CIDR) 48K bytes */
00969 #define   CHIPID_CIDR_SRAMSIZ_1K (0x1u << 16) /**< \brief (CHIPID_CIDR) 1K bytes */
00970 #define   CHIPID_CIDR_SRAMSIZ_2K (0x2u << 16) /**< \brief (CHIPID_CIDR) 2K bytes */
00971 #define   CHIPID_CIDR_SRAMSIZ_6K (0x3u << 16) /**< \brief (CHIPID_CIDR) 6K bytes */
00972 #define   CHIPID_CIDR_SRAMSIZ_24K (0x4u << 16) /**< \brief (CHIPID_CIDR) 24K bytes */
00973 #define   CHIPID_CIDR_SRAMSIZ_4K (0x5u << 16) /**< \brief (CHIPID_CIDR) 4K bytes */
00974 #define   CHIPID_CIDR_SRAMSIZ_80K (0x6u << 16) /**< \brief (CHIPID_CIDR) 80K bytes */
00975 #define   CHIPID_CIDR_SRAMSIZ_160K (0x7u << 16) /**< \brief (CHIPID_CIDR) 160K bytes */
00976 #define   CHIPID_CIDR_SRAMSIZ_8K (0x8u << 16) /**< \brief (CHIPID_CIDR) 8K bytes */
00977 #define   CHIPID_CIDR_SRAMSIZ_16K (0x9u << 16) /**< \brief (CHIPID_CIDR) 16K bytes */
00978 #define   CHIPID_CIDR_SRAMSIZ_32K (0xAu << 16) /**< \brief (CHIPID_CIDR) 32K bytes */
00979 #define   CHIPID_CIDR_SRAMSIZ_64K (0xBu << 16) /**< \brief (CHIPID_CIDR) 64K bytes */
00980 #define   CHIPID_CIDR_SRAMSIZ_128K (0xCu << 16) /**< \brief (CHIPID_CIDR) 128K bytes */
00981 #define   CHIPID_CIDR_SRAMSIZ_256K (0xDu << 16) /**< \brief (CHIPID_CIDR) 256K bytes */
00982 #define   CHIPID_CIDR_SRAMSIZ_96K (0xEu << 16) /**< \brief (CHIPID_CIDR) 96K bytes */
00983 #define   CHIPID_CIDR_SRAMSIZ_512K (0xFu << 16) /**< \brief (CHIPID_CIDR) 512K bytes */
00984 #define CHIPID_CIDR_ARCH_Pos 20
00985 #define CHIPID_CIDR_ARCH_Msk (0xffu << CHIPID_CIDR_ARCH_Pos) /**< \brief (CHIPID_CIDR) Architecture Identifier */
00986 #define   CHIPID_CIDR_ARCH_AT91SAM9xx (0x19u << 20) /**< \brief (CHIPID_CIDR) AT91SAM9xx Series */
00987 #define   CHIPID_CIDR_ARCH_AT91SAM9XExx (0x29u << 20) /**< \brief (CHIPID_CIDR) AT91SAM9XExx Series */
00988 #define   CHIPID_CIDR_ARCH_AT91x34 (0x34u << 20) /**< \brief (CHIPID_CIDR) AT91x34 Series */
00989 #define   CHIPID_CIDR_ARCH_CAP7 (0x37u << 20) /**< \brief (CHIPID_CIDR) CAP7 Series */
00990 #define   CHIPID_CIDR_ARCH_CAP9 (0x39u << 20) /**< \brief (CHIPID_CIDR) CAP9 Series */
00991 #define   CHIPID_CIDR_ARCH_CAP11 (0x3Bu << 20) /**< \brief (CHIPID_CIDR) CAP11 Series */
00992 #define   CHIPID_CIDR_ARCH_AT91x40 (0x40u << 20) /**< \brief (CHIPID_CIDR) AT91x40 Series */
00993 #define   CHIPID_CIDR_ARCH_AT91x42 (0x42u << 20) /**< \brief (CHIPID_CIDR) AT91x42 Series */
00994 #define   CHIPID_CIDR_ARCH_AT91x55 (0x55u << 20) /**< \brief (CHIPID_CIDR) AT91x55 Series */
00995 #define   CHIPID_CIDR_ARCH_AT91SAM7Axx (0x60u << 20) /**< \brief (CHIPID_CIDR) AT91SAM7Axx Series */
00996 #define   CHIPID_CIDR_ARCH_AT91SAM7AQxx (0x61u << 20) /**< \brief (CHIPID_CIDR) AT91SAM7AQxx Series */
00997 #define   CHIPID_CIDR_ARCH_AT91x63 (0x63u << 20) /**< \brief (CHIPID_CIDR) AT91x63 Series */
00998 #define   CHIPID_CIDR_ARCH_AT91SAM7Sxx (0x70u << 20) /**< \brief (CHIPID_CIDR) AT91SAM7Sxx Series */
00999 #define   CHIPID_CIDR_ARCH_AT91SAM7XCxx (0x71u << 20) /**< \brief (CHIPID_CIDR) AT91SAM7XCxx Series */
01000 #define   CHIPID_CIDR_ARCH_AT91SAM7SExx (0x72u << 20) /**< \brief (CHIPID_CIDR) AT91SAM7SExx Series */
01001 #define   CHIPID_CIDR_ARCH_AT91SAM7Lxx (0x73u << 20) /**< \brief (CHIPID_CIDR) AT91SAM7Lxx Series */
01002 #define   CHIPID_CIDR_ARCH_AT91SAM7Xxx (0x75u << 20) /**< \brief (CHIPID_CIDR) AT91SAM7Xxx Series */
01003 #define   CHIPID_CIDR_ARCH_AT91SAM7SLxx (0x76u << 20) /**< \brief (CHIPID_CIDR) AT91SAM7SLxx Series */
01004 #define   CHIPID_CIDR_ARCH_SAM3UxC (0x80u << 20) /**< \brief (CHIPID_CIDR) SAM3UxC Series (100-pin version) */
01005 #define   CHIPID_CIDR_ARCH_SAM3UxE (0x81u << 20) /**< \brief (CHIPID_CIDR) SAM3UxE Series (144-pin version) */
01006 #define   CHIPID_CIDR_ARCH_SAM3AxC (0x83u << 20) /**< \brief (CHIPID_CIDR) SAM3AxC Series (100-pin version) */
01007 #define   CHIPID_CIDR_ARCH_SAM3XxC (0x84u << 20) /**< \brief (CHIPID_CIDR) SAM3XxC Series (100-pin version) */
01008 #define   CHIPID_CIDR_ARCH_SAM3XxE (0x85u << 20) /**< \brief (CHIPID_CIDR) SAM3XxE Series (144-pin version) */
01009 #define   CHIPID_CIDR_ARCH_SAM3XxG (0x86u << 20) /**< \brief (CHIPID_CIDR) SAM3XxG Series (208/217-pin version) */
01010 #define   CHIPID_CIDR_ARCH_SAM3SxA (0x88u << 20) /**< \brief (CHIPID_CIDR) SAM3SxA Series (48-pin version) */
01011 #define   CHIPID_CIDR_ARCH_SAM3SxB (0x89u << 20) /**< \brief (CHIPID_CIDR) SAM3SxB Series (64-pin version) */
01012 #define   CHIPID_CIDR_ARCH_SAM3SxC (0x8Au << 20) /**< \brief (CHIPID_CIDR) SAM3SxC Series (100-pin version) */
01013 #define   CHIPID_CIDR_ARCH_AT91x92 (0x92u << 20) /**< \brief (CHIPID_CIDR) AT91x92 Series */
01014 #define   CHIPID_CIDR_ARCH_SAM3NxA (0x93u << 20) /**< \brief (CHIPID_CIDR) SAM3NxA Series (48-pin version) */
01015 #define   CHIPID_CIDR_ARCH_SAM3NxB (0x94u << 20) /**< \brief (CHIPID_CIDR) SAM3NxB Series (64-pin version) */
01016 #define   CHIPID_CIDR_ARCH_SAM3NxC (0x95u << 20) /**< \brief (CHIPID_CIDR) SAM3NxC Series (100-pin version) */
01017 #define   CHIPID_CIDR_ARCH_SAM3SDxA (0x98u << 20) /**< \brief (CHIPID_CIDR) SAM3SDxA Series (48-pin version) */
01018 #define   CHIPID_CIDR_ARCH_SAM3SDxB (0x99u << 20) /**< \brief (CHIPID_CIDR) SAM3SDxB Series (64-pin version) */
01019 #define   CHIPID_CIDR_ARCH_SAM3SDxC (0x9Au << 20) /**< \brief (CHIPID_CIDR) SAM3SDxC Series (100-pin version) */
01020 #define   CHIPID_CIDR_ARCH_SAM5A (0xA5u << 20) /**< \brief (CHIPID_CIDR) SAM5A */
01021 #define   CHIPID_CIDR_ARCH_AT75Cxx (0xF0u << 20) /**< \brief (CHIPID_CIDR) AT75Cxx Series */
01022 #define CHIPID_CIDR_NVPTYP_Pos 28
01023 #define CHIPID_CIDR_NVPTYP_Msk (0x7u << CHIPID_CIDR_NVPTYP_Pos) /**< \brief (CHIPID_CIDR) Nonvolatile Program Memory Type */
01024 #define   CHIPID_CIDR_NVPTYP_ROM (0x0u << 28) /**< \brief (CHIPID_CIDR) ROM */
01025 #define   CHIPID_CIDR_NVPTYP_ROMLESS (0x1u << 28) /**< \brief (CHIPID_CIDR) ROMless or on-chip Flash */
01026 #define   CHIPID_CIDR_NVPTYP_FLASH (0x2u << 28) /**< \brief (CHIPID_CIDR) Embedded Flash Memory */
01027 #define   CHIPID_CIDR_NVPTYP_ROM_FLASH (0x3u << 28) /**< \brief (CHIPID_CIDR) ROM and Embedded Flash MemoryNVPSIZ is ROM size      NVPSIZ2 is Flash size */
01028 #define   CHIPID_CIDR_NVPTYP_SRAM (0x4u << 28) /**< \brief (CHIPID_CIDR) SRAM emulating ROM */
01029 #define CHIPID_CIDR_EXT (0x1u << 31) /**< \brief (CHIPID_CIDR) Extension Flag */
01030 /* -------- CHIPID_EXID : (CHIPID Offset: 0x4) Chip ID Extension Register -------- */
01031 #define CHIPID_EXID_EXID_Pos 0
01032 #define CHIPID_EXID_EXID_Msk (0xffffffffu << CHIPID_EXID_EXID_Pos) /**< \brief (CHIPID_EXID) Chip ID Extension */
01033 
01034 /*@}*/
01035 
01036 /* ============================================================================= */
01037 /**  SOFTWARE API DEFINITION FOR Digital-to-Analog Converter Controller */
01038 /* ============================================================================= */
01039 /** \addtogroup SAM3XA_DACC Digital-to-Analog Converter Controller */
01040 /*@{*/
01041 
01042 #ifndef __ASSEMBLY__
01043 /** \brief Dacc hardware registers */
01044 typedef struct {
01045   WoReg DACC_CR;       /**< \brief (Dacc Offset: 0x00) Control Register */
01046   RwReg DACC_MR;       /**< \brief (Dacc Offset: 0x04) Mode Register */
01047   RoReg Reserved1[2];
01048   WoReg DACC_CHER;     /**< \brief (Dacc Offset: 0x10) Channel Enable Register */
01049   WoReg DACC_CHDR;     /**< \brief (Dacc Offset: 0x14) Channel Disable Register */
01050   RoReg DACC_CHSR;     /**< \brief (Dacc Offset: 0x18) Channel Status Register */
01051   RoReg Reserved2[1];
01052   WoReg DACC_CDR;      /**< \brief (Dacc Offset: 0x20) Conversion Data Register */
01053   WoReg DACC_IER;      /**< \brief (Dacc Offset: 0x24) Interrupt Enable Register */
01054   WoReg DACC_IDR;      /**< \brief (Dacc Offset: 0x28) Interrupt Disable Register */
01055   RoReg DACC_IMR;      /**< \brief (Dacc Offset: 0x2C) Interrupt Mask Register */
01056   RoReg DACC_ISR;      /**< \brief (Dacc Offset: 0x30) Interrupt Status Register */
01057   RoReg Reserved3[24];
01058   RwReg DACC_ACR;      /**< \brief (Dacc Offset: 0x94) Analog Current Register */
01059   RoReg Reserved4[19];
01060   RwReg DACC_WPMR;     /**< \brief (Dacc Offset: 0xE4) Write Protect Mode register */
01061   RoReg DACC_WPSR;     /**< \brief (Dacc Offset: 0xE8) Write Protect Status register */
01062   RoReg Reserved5[5];
01063   RwReg DACC_RPR;      /**< \brief (Dacc Offset: 0x100) Receive Pointer Register */
01064   RwReg DACC_RCR;      /**< \brief (Dacc Offset: 0x104) Receive Counter Register */
01065   RwReg DACC_TPR;      /**< \brief (Dacc Offset: 0x108) Transmit Pointer Register */
01066   RwReg DACC_TCR;      /**< \brief (Dacc Offset: 0x10C) Transmit Counter Register */
01067   RwReg DACC_RNPR;     /**< \brief (Dacc Offset: 0x110) Receive Next Pointer Register */
01068   RwReg DACC_RNCR;     /**< \brief (Dacc Offset: 0x114) Receive Next Counter Register */
01069   RwReg DACC_TNPR;     /**< \brief (Dacc Offset: 0x118) Transmit Next Pointer Register */
01070   RwReg DACC_TNCR;     /**< \brief (Dacc Offset: 0x11C) Transmit Next Counter Register */
01071   WoReg DACC_PTCR;     /**< \brief (Dacc Offset: 0x120) Transfer Control Register */
01072   RoReg DACC_PTSR;     /**< \brief (Dacc Offset: 0x124) Transfer Status Register */
01073 } Dacc;
01074 #endif /* __ASSEMBLY__ */
01075 /* -------- DACC_CR : (DACC Offset: 0x00) Control Register -------- */
01076 #define DACC_CR_SWRST (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (DACC_CR) Software Reset */
01077 /* -------- DACC_MR : (DACC Offset: 0x04) Mode Register -------- */
01078 #define DACC_MR_TRGEN (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (DACC_MR) Trigger Enable */
01079 #define   DACC_MR_TRGEN_DIS (0x0u << 0) /**< \brief (DACC_MR) External trigger mode disabled. DACC in free running mode. */
01080 #define   DACC_MR_TRGEN_EN (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (DACC_MR) External trigger mode enabled. */
01081 #define DACC_MR_TRGSEL_Pos 1
01082 #define DACC_MR_TRGSEL_Msk (0x7u << DACC_MR_TRGSEL_Pos) /**< \brief (DACC_MR) Trigger Selection */
01083 #define DACC_MR_TRGSEL(value) ((DACC_MR_TRGSEL_Msk & ((value) << DACC_MR_TRGSEL_Pos)))
01084 #define DACC_MR_WORD (0x1u << 4) /**< \brief (DACC_MR) Word Transfer */
01085 #define   DACC_MR_WORD_HALF (0x0u << 4) /**< \brief (DACC_MR) Half-Word transfer */
01086 #define   DACC_MR_WORD_WORD (0x1u << 4) /**< \brief (DACC_MR) Word Transfer */
01087 #define DACC_MR_SLEEP (0x1u << 5) /**< \brief (DACC_MR) Sleep Mode */
01088 #define DACC_MR_FASTWKUP (0x1u << 6) /**< \brief (DACC_MR) Fast Wake up Mode */
01089 #define DACC_MR_REFRESH_Pos 8
01090 #define DACC_MR_REFRESH_Msk (0xffu << DACC_MR_REFRESH_Pos) /**< \brief (DACC_MR) Refresh Period */
01091 #define DACC_MR_REFRESH(value) ((DACC_MR_REFRESH_Msk & ((value) << DACC_MR_REFRESH_Pos)))
01092 #define DACC_MR_USER_SEL_Pos 16
01093 #define DACC_MR_USER_SEL_Msk (0x3u << DACC_MR_USER_SEL_Pos) /**< \brief (DACC_MR) User Channel Selection */
01094 #define   DACC_MR_USER_SEL_CHANNEL0 (0x0u << 16) /**< \brief (DACC_MR) Channel 0 */
01095 #define   DACC_MR_USER_SEL_CHANNEL1 (0x1u << 16) /**< \brief (DACC_MR) Channel 1 */
01096 #define DACC_MR_TAG (0x1u << 20) /**< \brief (DACC_MR) Tag Selection Mode */
01097 #define   DACC_MR_TAG_DIS (0x0u << 20) /**< \brief (DACC_MR) Tag selection mode disabled. Using USER_SEL to select the channel for the conversion. */
01098 #define   DACC_MR_TAG_EN (0x1u << 20) /**< \brief (DACC_MR) Tag selection mode enabled */
01099 #define DACC_MR_MAXS (0x1u << 21) /**< \brief (DACC_MR) Max Speed Mode */
01100 #define DACC_MR_STARTUP_Pos 24
01101 #define DACC_MR_STARTUP_Msk (0x3fu << DACC_MR_STARTUP_Pos) /**< \brief (DACC_MR) Startup Time Selection */
01102 #define   DACC_MR_STARTUP_0 (0x0u << 24) /**< \brief (DACC_MR) 0 periods of DACClock */
01103 #define   DACC_MR_STARTUP_8 (0x1u << 24) /**< \brief (DACC_MR) 8 periods of DACClock */
01104 #define   DACC_MR_STARTUP_16 (0x2u << 24) /**< \brief (DACC_MR) 16 periods of DACClock */
01105 #define   DACC_MR_STARTUP_24 (0x3u << 24) /**< \brief (DACC_MR) 24 periods of DACClock */
01106 #define   DACC_MR_STARTUP_64 (0x4u << 24) /**< \brief (DACC_MR) 64 periods of DACClock */
01107 #define   DACC_MR_STARTUP_80 (0x5u << 24) /**< \brief (DACC_MR) 80 periods of DACClock */
01108 #define   DACC_MR_STARTUP_96 (0x6u << 24) /**< \brief (DACC_MR) 96 periods of DACClock */
01109 #define   DACC_MR_STARTUP_112 (0x7u << 24) /**< \brief (DACC_MR) 112 periods of DACClock */
01110 #define   DACC_MR_STARTUP_512 (0x8u << 24) /**< \brief (DACC_MR) 512 periods of DACClock */
01111 #define   DACC_MR_STARTUP_576 (0x9u << 24) /**< \brief (DACC_MR) 576 periods of DACClock */
01112 #define   DACC_MR_STARTUP_640 (0xAu << 24) /**< \brief (DACC_MR) 640 periods of DACClock */
01113 #define   DACC_MR_STARTUP_704 (0xBu << 24) /**< \brief (DACC_MR) 704 periods of DACClock */
01114 #define   DACC_MR_STARTUP_768 (0xCu << 24) /**< \brief (DACC_MR) 768 periods of DACClock */
01115 #define   DACC_MR_STARTUP_832 (0xDu << 24) /**< \brief (DACC_MR) 832 periods of DACClock */
01116 #define   DACC_MR_STARTUP_896 (0xEu << 24) /**< \brief (DACC_MR) 896 periods of DACClock */
01117 #define   DACC_MR_STARTUP_960 (0xFu << 24) /**< \brief (DACC_MR) 960 periods of DACClock */
01118 #define   DACC_MR_STARTUP_1024 (0x10u << 24) /**< \brief (DACC_MR) 1024 periods of DACClock */
01119 #define   DACC_MR_STARTUP_1088 (0x11u << 24) /**< \brief (DACC_MR) 1088 periods of DACClock */
01120 #define   DACC_MR_STARTUP_1152 (0x12u << 24) /**< \brief (DACC_MR) 1152 periods of DACClock */
01121 #define   DACC_MR_STARTUP_1216 (0x13u << 24) /**< \brief (DACC_MR) 1216 periods of DACClock */
01122 #define   DACC_MR_STARTUP_1280 (0x14u << 24) /**< \brief (DACC_MR) 1280 periods of DACClock */
01123 #define   DACC_MR_STARTUP_1344 (0x15u << 24) /**< \brief (DACC_MR) 1344 periods of DACClock */
01124 #define   DACC_MR_STARTUP_1408 (0x16u << 24) /**< \brief (DACC_MR) 1408 periods of DACClock */
01125 #define   DACC_MR_STARTUP_1472 (0x17u << 24) /**< \brief (DACC_MR) 1472 periods of DACClock */
01126 #define   DACC_MR_STARTUP_1536 (0x18u << 24) /**< \brief (DACC_MR) 1536 periods of DACClock */
01127 #define   DACC_MR_STARTUP_1600 (0x19u << 24) /**< \brief (DACC_MR) 1600 periods of DACClock */
01128 #define   DACC_MR_STARTUP_1664 (0x1Au << 24) /**< \brief (DACC_MR) 1664 periods of DACClock */
01129 #define   DACC_MR_STARTUP_1728 (0x1Bu << 24) /**< \brief (DACC_MR) 1728 periods of DACClock */
01130 #define   DACC_MR_STARTUP_1792 (0x1Cu << 24) /**< \brief (DACC_MR) 1792 periods of DACClock */
01131 #define   DACC_MR_STARTUP_1856 (0x1Du << 24) /**< \brief (DACC_MR) 1856 periods of DACClock */
01132 #define   DACC_MR_STARTUP_1920 (0x1Eu << 24) /**< \brief (DACC_MR) 1920 periods of DACClock */
01133 #define   DACC_MR_STARTUP_1984 (0x1Fu << 24) /**< \brief (DACC_MR) 1984 periods of DACClock */
01134 /* -------- DACC_CHER : (DACC Offset: 0x10) Channel Enable Register -------- */
01135 #define DACC_CHER_CH0 (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (DACC_CHER) Channel 0 Enable */
01136 #define DACC_CHER_CH1 (0x1u << 1) /**< \brief (DACC_CHER) Channel 1 Enable */
01137 /* -------- DACC_CHDR : (DACC Offset: 0x14) Channel Disable Register -------- */
01138 #define DACC_CHDR_CH0 (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (DACC_CHDR) Channel 0 Disable */
01139 #define DACC_CHDR_CH1 (0x1u << 1) /**< \brief (DACC_CHDR) Channel 1 Disable */
01140 /* -------- DACC_CHSR : (DACC Offset: 0x18) Channel Status Register -------- */
01141 #define DACC_CHSR_CH0 (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (DACC_CHSR) Channel 0 Status */
01142 #define DACC_CHSR_CH1 (0x1u << 1) /**< \brief (DACC_CHSR) Channel 1 Status */
01143 /* -------- DACC_CDR : (DACC Offset: 0x20) Conversion Data Register -------- */
01144 #define DACC_CDR_DATA_Pos 0
01145 #define DACC_CDR_DATA_Msk (0xffffffffu << DACC_CDR_DATA_Pos) /**< \brief (DACC_CDR) Data to Convert */
01146 #define DACC_CDR_DATA(value) ((DACC_CDR_DATA_Msk & ((value) << DACC_CDR_DATA_Pos)))
01147 /* -------- DACC_IER : (DACC Offset: 0x24) Interrupt Enable Register -------- */
01148 #define DACC_IER_TXRDY (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (DACC_IER) Transmit Ready Interrupt Enable */
01149 #define DACC_IER_EOC (0x1u << 1) /**< \brief (DACC_IER) End of Conversion Interrupt Enable */
01150 #define DACC_IER_ENDTX (0x1u << 2) /**< \brief (DACC_IER) End of Transmit Buffer Interrupt Enable */
01151 #define DACC_IER_TXBUFE (0x1u << 3) /**< \brief (DACC_IER) Transmit Buffer Empty Interrupt Enable */
01152 /* -------- DACC_IDR : (DACC Offset: 0x28) Interrupt Disable Register -------- */
01153 #define DACC_IDR_TXRDY (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (DACC_IDR) Transmit Ready Interrupt Disable. */
01154 #define DACC_IDR_EOC (0x1u << 1) /**< \brief (DACC_IDR) End of Conversion Interrupt Disable */
01155 #define DACC_IDR_ENDTX (0x1u << 2) /**< \brief (DACC_IDR) End of Transmit Buffer Interrupt Disable */
01156 #define DACC_IDR_TXBUFE (0x1u << 3) /**< \brief (DACC_IDR) Transmit Buffer Empty Interrupt Disable */
01157 /* -------- DACC_IMR : (DACC Offset: 0x2C) Interrupt Mask Register -------- */
01158 #define DACC_IMR_TXRDY (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (DACC_IMR) Transmit Ready Interrupt Mask */
01159 #define DACC_IMR_EOC (0x1u << 1) /**< \brief (DACC_IMR) End of Conversion Interrupt Mask */
01160 #define DACC_IMR_ENDTX (0x1u << 2) /**< \brief (DACC_IMR) End of Transmit Buffer Interrupt Mask */
01161 #define DACC_IMR_TXBUFE (0x1u << 3) /**< \brief (DACC_IMR) Transmit Buffer Empty Interrupt Mask */
01162 /* -------- DACC_ISR : (DACC Offset: 0x30) Interrupt Status Register -------- */
01163 #define DACC_ISR_TXRDY (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (DACC_ISR) Transmit Ready Interrupt Flag */
01164 #define DACC_ISR_EOC (0x1u << 1) /**< \brief (DACC_ISR) End of Conversion Interrupt Flag */
01165 #define DACC_ISR_ENDTX (0x1u << 2) /**< \brief (DACC_ISR) End of DMA Interrupt Flag */
01166 #define DACC_ISR_TXBUFE (0x1u << 3) /**< \brief (DACC_ISR) Transmit Buffer Empty */
01167 /* -------- DACC_ACR : (DACC Offset: 0x94) Analog Current Register -------- */
01168 #define DACC_ACR_IBCTLCH0_Pos 0
01169 #define DACC_ACR_IBCTLCH0_Msk (0x3u << DACC_ACR_IBCTLCH0_Pos) /**< \brief (DACC_ACR) Analog Output Current Control */
01170 #define DACC_ACR_IBCTLCH0(value) ((DACC_ACR_IBCTLCH0_Msk & ((value) << DACC_ACR_IBCTLCH0_Pos)))
01171 #define DACC_ACR_IBCTLCH1_Pos 2
01172 #define DACC_ACR_IBCTLCH1_Msk (0x3u << DACC_ACR_IBCTLCH1_Pos) /**< \brief (DACC_ACR) Analog Output Current Control */
01173 #define DACC_ACR_IBCTLCH1(value) ((DACC_ACR_IBCTLCH1_Msk & ((value) << DACC_ACR_IBCTLCH1_Pos)))
01174 #define DACC_ACR_IBCTLDACCORE_Pos 8
01175 #define DACC_ACR_IBCTLDACCORE_Msk (0x3u << DACC_ACR_IBCTLDACCORE_Pos) /**< \brief (DACC_ACR) Bias Current Control for DAC Core */
01176 #define DACC_ACR_IBCTLDACCORE(value) ((DACC_ACR_IBCTLDACCORE_Msk & ((value) << DACC_ACR_IBCTLDACCORE_Pos)))
01177 /* -------- DACC_WPMR : (DACC Offset: 0xE4) Write Protect Mode register -------- */
01178 #define DACC_WPMR_WPEN (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (DACC_WPMR) Write Protect Enable */
01179 #define DACC_WPMR_WPKEY_Pos 8
01180 #define DACC_WPMR_WPKEY_Msk (0xffffffu << DACC_WPMR_WPKEY_Pos) /**< \brief (DACC_WPMR) Write Protect KEY */
01181 #define DACC_WPMR_WPKEY(value) ((DACC_WPMR_WPKEY_Msk & ((value) << DACC_WPMR_WPKEY_Pos)))
01182 /* -------- DACC_WPSR : (DACC Offset: 0xE8) Write Protect Status register -------- */
01183 #define DACC_WPSR_WPROTERR (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (DACC_WPSR) Write protection error */
01184 #define DACC_WPSR_WPROTADDR_Pos 8
01185 #define DACC_WPSR_WPROTADDR_Msk (0xffu << DACC_WPSR_WPROTADDR_Pos) /**< \brief (DACC_WPSR) Write protection error address */
01186 /* -------- DACC_RPR : (DACC Offset: 0x100) Receive Pointer Register -------- */
01187 #define DACC_RPR_RXPTR_Pos 0
01188 #define DACC_RPR_RXPTR_Msk (0xffffffffu << DACC_RPR_RXPTR_Pos) /**< \brief (DACC_RPR) Receive Pointer Register */
01189 #define DACC_RPR_RXPTR(value) ((DACC_RPR_RXPTR_Msk & ((value) << DACC_RPR_RXPTR_Pos)))
01190 /* -------- DACC_RCR : (DACC Offset: 0x104) Receive Counter Register -------- */
01191 #define DACC_RCR_RXCTR_Pos 0
01192 #define DACC_RCR_RXCTR_Msk (0xffffu << DACC_RCR_RXCTR_Pos) /**< \brief (DACC_RCR) Receive Counter Register */
01193 #define DACC_RCR_RXCTR(value) ((DACC_RCR_RXCTR_Msk & ((value) << DACC_RCR_RXCTR_Pos)))
01194 /* -------- DACC_TPR : (DACC Offset: 0x108) Transmit Pointer Register -------- */
01195 #define DACC_TPR_TXPTR_Pos 0
01196 #define DACC_TPR_TXPTR_Msk (0xffffffffu << DACC_TPR_TXPTR_Pos) /**< \brief (DACC_TPR) Transmit Counter Register */
01197 #define DACC_TPR_TXPTR(value) ((DACC_TPR_TXPTR_Msk & ((value) << DACC_TPR_TXPTR_Pos)))
01198 /* -------- DACC_TCR : (DACC Offset: 0x10C) Transmit Counter Register -------- */
01199 #define DACC_TCR_TXCTR_Pos 0
01200 #define DACC_TCR_TXCTR_Msk (0xffffu << DACC_TCR_TXCTR_Pos) /**< \brief (DACC_TCR) Transmit Counter Register */
01201 #define DACC_TCR_TXCTR(value) ((DACC_TCR_TXCTR_Msk & ((value) << DACC_TCR_TXCTR_Pos)))
01202 /* -------- DACC_RNPR : (DACC Offset: 0x110) Receive Next Pointer Register -------- */
01203 #define DACC_RNPR_RXNPTR_Pos 0
01204 #define DACC_RNPR_RXNPTR_Msk (0xffffffffu << DACC_RNPR_RXNPTR_Pos) /**< \brief (DACC_RNPR) Receive Next Pointer */
01205 #define DACC_RNPR_RXNPTR(value) ((DACC_RNPR_RXNPTR_Msk & ((value) << DACC_RNPR_RXNPTR_Pos)))
01206 /* -------- DACC_RNCR : (DACC Offset: 0x114) Receive Next Counter Register -------- */
01207 #define DACC_RNCR_RXNCTR_Pos 0
01208 #define DACC_RNCR_RXNCTR_Msk (0xffffu << DACC_RNCR_RXNCTR_Pos) /**< \brief (DACC_RNCR) Receive Next Counter */
01209 #define DACC_RNCR_RXNCTR(value) ((DACC_RNCR_RXNCTR_Msk & ((value) << DACC_RNCR_RXNCTR_Pos)))
01210 /* -------- DACC_TNPR : (DACC Offset: 0x118) Transmit Next Pointer Register -------- */
01211 #define DACC_TNPR_TXNPTR_Pos 0
01212 #define DACC_TNPR_TXNPTR_Msk (0xffffffffu << DACC_TNPR_TXNPTR_Pos) /**< \brief (DACC_TNPR) Transmit Next Pointer */
01213 #define DACC_TNPR_TXNPTR(value) ((DACC_TNPR_TXNPTR_Msk & ((value) << DACC_TNPR_TXNPTR_Pos)))
01214 /* -------- DACC_TNCR : (DACC Offset: 0x11C) Transmit Next Counter Register -------- */
01215 #define DACC_TNCR_TXNCTR_Pos 0
01216 #define DACC_TNCR_TXNCTR_Msk (0xffffu << DACC_TNCR_TXNCTR_Pos) /**< \brief (DACC_TNCR) Transmit Counter Next */
01217 #define DACC_TNCR_TXNCTR(value) ((DACC_TNCR_TXNCTR_Msk & ((value) << DACC_TNCR_TXNCTR_Pos)))
01218 /* -------- DACC_PTCR : (DACC Offset: 0x120) Transfer Control Register -------- */
01219 #define DACC_PTCR_RXTEN (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (DACC_PTCR) Receiver Transfer Enable */
01220 #define DACC_PTCR_RXTDIS (0x1u << 1) /**< \brief (DACC_PTCR) Receiver Transfer Disable */
01221 #define DACC_PTCR_TXTEN (0x1u << 8) /**< \brief (DACC_PTCR) Transmitter Transfer Enable */
01222 #define DACC_PTCR_TXTDIS (0x1u << 9) /**< \brief (DACC_PTCR) Transmitter Transfer Disable */
01223 /* -------- DACC_PTSR : (DACC Offset: 0x124) Transfer Status Register -------- */
01224 #define DACC_PTSR_RXTEN (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (DACC_PTSR) Receiver Transfer Enable */
01225 #define DACC_PTSR_TXTEN (0x1u << 8) /**< \brief (DACC_PTSR) Transmitter Transfer Enable */
01226 
01227 /*@}*/
01228 
01229 /* ============================================================================= */
01230 /**  SOFTWARE API DEFINITION FOR DMA Controller */
01231 /* ============================================================================= */
01232 /** \addtogroup SAM3XA_DMAC DMA Controller */
01233 /*@{*/
01234 
01235 #ifndef __ASSEMBLY__
01236 /** \brief DmacCh_num hardware registers */
01237 typedef struct {
01238   RwReg       DMAC_SADDR;     /**< \brief (DmacCh_num Offset: 0x0) DMAC Channel Source Address Register */
01239   RwReg       DMAC_DADDR;     /**< \brief (DmacCh_num Offset: 0x4) DMAC Channel Destination Address Register */
01240   RwReg       DMAC_DSCR;      /**< \brief (DmacCh_num Offset: 0x8) DMAC Channel Descriptor Address Register */
01241   RwReg       DMAC_CTRLA;     /**< \brief (DmacCh_num Offset: 0xC) DMAC Channel Control A Register */
01242   RwReg       DMAC_CTRLB;     /**< \brief (DmacCh_num Offset: 0x10) DMAC Channel Control B Register */
01243   RwReg       DMAC_CFG;       /**< \brief (DmacCh_num Offset: 0x14) DMAC Channel Configuration Register */
01244   RoReg       Reserved1[4];
01245 } DmacCh_num;
01246 /** \brief Dmac hardware registers */
01247 #define DMACCH_NUM_NUMBER 6
01248 typedef struct {
01249   RwReg       DMAC_GCFG;      /**< \brief (Dmac Offset: 0x000) DMAC Global Configuration Register */
01250   RwReg       DMAC_EN;        /**< \brief (Dmac Offset: 0x004) DMAC Enable Register */
01251   RwReg       DMAC_SREQ;      /**< \brief (Dmac Offset: 0x008) DMAC Software Single Request Register */
01252   RwReg       DMAC_CREQ;      /**< \brief (Dmac Offset: 0x00C) DMAC Software Chunk Transfer Request Register */
01253   RwReg       DMAC_LAST;      /**< \brief (Dmac Offset: 0x010) DMAC Software Last Transfer Flag Register */
01254   RoReg       Reserved1[1];
01255   WoReg       DMAC_EBCIER;    /**< \brief (Dmac Offset: 0x018) DMAC Error, Chained Buffer Transfer Completed Interrupt and Buffer Transfer Completed Interrupt Enable register. */
01256   WoReg       DMAC_EBCIDR;    /**< \brief (Dmac Offset: 0x01C) DMAC Error, Chained Buffer Transfer Completed Interrupt and Buffer Transfer Completed Interrupt Disable register. */
01257   RoReg       DMAC_EBCIMR;    /**< \brief (Dmac Offset: 0x020) DMAC Error, Chained Buffer Transfer Completed Interrupt and Buffer transfer completed Mask Register. */
01258   RoReg       DMAC_EBCISR;    /**< \brief (Dmac Offset: 0x024) DMAC Error, Chained Buffer Transfer Completed Interrupt and Buffer transfer completed Status Register. */
01259   WoReg       DMAC_CHER;      /**< \brief (Dmac Offset: 0x028) DMAC Channel Handler Enable Register */
01260   WoReg       DMAC_CHDR;      /**< \brief (Dmac Offset: 0x02C) DMAC Channel Handler Disable Register */
01261   RoReg       DMAC_CHSR;      /**< \brief (Dmac Offset: 0x030) DMAC Channel Handler Status Register */
01262   RoReg       Reserved2[2];
01263   DmacCh_num  DMAC_CH_NUM[DMACCH_NUM_NUMBER]; /**< \brief (Dmac Offset: 0x3C) ch_num = 0 .. 5 */
01264   RoReg       Reserved3[46];
01265   RwReg       DMAC_WPMR;      /**< \brief (Dmac Offset: 0x1E4) DMAC Write Protect Mode Register */
01266   RoReg       DMAC_WPSR;      /**< \brief (Dmac Offset: 0x1E8) DMAC Write Protect Status Register */
01267 } Dmac;
01268 #endif /* __ASSEMBLY__ */
01269 /* -------- DMAC_GCFG : (DMAC Offset: 0x000) DMAC Global Configuration Register -------- */
01270 #define DMAC_GCFG_ARB_CFG (0x1u << 4) /**< \brief (DMAC_GCFG) Arbiter Configuration */
01271 #define   DMAC_GCFG_ARB_CFG_FIXED (0x0u << 4) /**< \brief (DMAC_GCFG) Fixed priority arbiter. */
01272 #define   DMAC_GCFG_ARB_CFG_ROUND_ROBIN (0x1u << 4) /**< \brief (DMAC_GCFG) Modified round robin arbiter. */
01273 /* -------- DMAC_EN : (DMAC Offset: 0x004) DMAC Enable Register -------- */
01274 #define DMAC_EN_ENABLE (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (DMAC_EN)  */
01275 /* -------- DMAC_SREQ : (DMAC Offset: 0x008) DMAC Software Single Request Register -------- */
01276 #define DMAC_SREQ_SSREQ0 (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (DMAC_SREQ) Source Request */
01277 #define DMAC_SREQ_DSREQ0 (0x1u << 1) /**< \brief (DMAC_SREQ) Destination Request */
01278 #define DMAC_SREQ_SSREQ1 (0x1u << 2) /**< \brief (DMAC_SREQ) Source Request */
01279 #define DMAC_SREQ_DSREQ1 (0x1u << 3) /**< \brief (DMAC_SREQ) Destination Request */
01280 #define DMAC_SREQ_SSREQ2 (0x1u << 4) /**< \brief (DMAC_SREQ) Source Request */
01281 #define DMAC_SREQ_DSREQ2 (0x1u << 5) /**< \brief (DMAC_SREQ) Destination Request */
01282 #define DMAC_SREQ_SSREQ3 (0x1u << 6) /**< \brief (DMAC_SREQ) Source Request */
01283 #define DMAC_SREQ_DSREQ3 (0x1u << 7) /**< \brief (DMAC_SREQ) Destination Request */
01284 #define DMAC_SREQ_SSREQ4 (0x1u << 8) /**< \brief (DMAC_SREQ) Source Request */
01285 #define DMAC_SREQ_DSREQ4 (0x1u << 9) /**< \brief (DMAC_SREQ) Destination Request */
01286 #define DMAC_SREQ_SSREQ5 (0x1u << 10) /**< \brief (DMAC_SREQ) Source Request */
01287 #define DMAC_SREQ_DSREQ5 (0x1u << 11) /**< \brief (DMAC_SREQ) Destination Request */
01288 /* -------- DMAC_CREQ : (DMAC Offset: 0x00C) DMAC Software Chunk Transfer Request Register -------- */
01289 #define DMAC_CREQ_SCREQ0 (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (DMAC_CREQ) Source Chunk Request */
01290 #define DMAC_CREQ_DCREQ0 (0x1u << 1) /**< \brief (DMAC_CREQ) Destination Chunk Request */
01291 #define DMAC_CREQ_SCREQ1 (0x1u << 2) /**< \brief (DMAC_CREQ) Source Chunk Request */
01292 #define DMAC_CREQ_DCREQ1 (0x1u << 3) /**< \brief (DMAC_CREQ) Destination Chunk Request */
01293 #define DMAC_CREQ_SCREQ2 (0x1u << 4) /**< \brief (DMAC_CREQ) Source Chunk Request */
01294 #define DMAC_CREQ_DCREQ2 (0x1u << 5) /**< \brief (DMAC_CREQ) Destination Chunk Request */
01295 #define DMAC_CREQ_SCREQ3 (0x1u << 6) /**< \brief (DMAC_CREQ) Source Chunk Request */
01296 #define DMAC_CREQ_DCREQ3 (0x1u << 7) /**< \brief (DMAC_CREQ) Destination Chunk Request */
01297 #define DMAC_CREQ_SCREQ4 (0x1u << 8) /**< \brief (DMAC_CREQ) Source Chunk Request */
01298 #define DMAC_CREQ_DCREQ4 (0x1u << 9) /**< \brief (DMAC_CREQ) Destination Chunk Request */
01299 #define DMAC_CREQ_SCREQ5 (0x1u << 10) /**< \brief (DMAC_CREQ) Source Chunk Request */
01300 #define DMAC_CREQ_DCREQ5 (0x1u << 11) /**< \brief (DMAC_CREQ) Destination Chunk Request */
01301 /* -------- DMAC_LAST : (DMAC Offset: 0x010) DMAC Software Last Transfer Flag Register -------- */
01302 #define DMAC_LAST_SLAST0 (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (DMAC_LAST) Source Last */
01303 #define DMAC_LAST_DLAST0 (0x1u << 1) /**< \brief (DMAC_LAST) Destination Last */
01304 #define DMAC_LAST_SLAST1 (0x1u << 2) /**< \brief (DMAC_LAST) Source Last */
01305 #define DMAC_LAST_DLAST1 (0x1u << 3) /**< \brief (DMAC_LAST) Destination Last */
01306 #define DMAC_LAST_SLAST2 (0x1u << 4) /**< \brief (DMAC_LAST) Source Last */
01307 #define DMAC_LAST_DLAST2 (0x1u << 5) /**< \brief (DMAC_LAST) Destination Last */
01308 #define DMAC_LAST_SLAST3 (0x1u << 6) /**< \brief (DMAC_LAST) Source Last */
01309 #define DMAC_LAST_DLAST3 (0x1u << 7) /**< \brief (DMAC_LAST) Destination Last */
01310 #define DMAC_LAST_SLAST4 (0x1u << 8) /**< \brief (DMAC_LAST) Source Last */
01311 #define DMAC_LAST_DLAST4 (0x1u << 9) /**< \brief (DMAC_LAST) Destination Last */
01312 #define DMAC_LAST_SLAST5 (0x1u << 10) /**< \brief (DMAC_LAST) Source Last */
01313 #define DMAC_LAST_DLAST5 (0x1u << 11) /**< \brief (DMAC_LAST) Destination Last */
