01440 #define DMAC_CHSR_EMPT5 (0x1u << 21) /**< \brief (DMAC_CHSR) Empty [5:0] */
01441 #define DMAC_CHSR_STAL0 (0x1u << 24) /**< \brief (DMAC_CHSR) Stalled [5:0] */
01442 #define DMAC_CHSR_STAL1 (0x1u << 25) /**< \brief (DMAC_CHSR) Stalled [5:0] */
01443 #define DMAC_CHSR_STAL2 (0x1u << 26) /**< \brief (DMAC_CHSR) Stalled [5:0] */
01444 #define DMAC_CHSR_STAL3 (0x1u << 27) /**< \brief (DMAC_CHSR) Stalled [5:0] */
01445 #define DMAC_CHSR_STAL4 (0x1u << 28) /**< \brief (DMAC_CHSR) Stalled [5:0] */
01446 #define DMAC_CHSR_STAL5 (0x1u << 29) /**< \brief (DMAC_CHSR) Stalled [5:0] */
01447 /* -------- DMAC_SADDR : (DMAC Offset: N/A) DMAC Channel Source Address Register -------- */
01448 #define DMAC_SADDR_SADDR_Pos 0
01449 #define DMAC_SADDR_SADDR_Msk (0xffffffffu << DMAC_SADDR_SADDR_Pos) /**< \brief (DMAC_SADDR) Channel x Source Address */
01450 #define DMAC_SADDR_SADDR(value) ((DMAC_SADDR_SADDR_Msk & ((value) << DMAC_SADDR_SADDR_Pos)))
01451 /* -------- DMAC_DADDR : (DMAC Offset: N/A) DMAC Channel Destination Address Register -------- */
01452 #define DMAC_DADDR_DADDR_Pos 0
01453 #define DMAC_DADDR_DADDR_Msk (0xffffffffu << DMAC_DADDR_DADDR_Pos) /**< \brief (DMAC_DADDR) Channel x Destination Address */
01454 #define DMAC_DADDR_DADDR(value) ((DMAC_DADDR_DADDR_Msk & ((value) << DMAC_DADDR_DADDR_Pos)))
01455 /* -------- DMAC_DSCR : (DMAC Offset: N/A) DMAC Channel Descriptor Address Register -------- */
01456 #define DMAC_DSCR_DSCR_Pos 2
01457 #define DMAC_DSCR_DSCR_Msk (0x3fffffffu << DMAC_DSCR_DSCR_Pos) /**< \brief (DMAC_DSCR) Buffer Transfer Descriptor Address */
01458 #define DMAC_DSCR_DSCR(value) ((DMAC_DSCR_DSCR_Msk & ((value) << DMAC_DSCR_DSCR_Pos)))
01459 /* -------- DMAC_CTRLA : (DMAC Offset: N/A) DMAC Channel Control A Register -------- */
01460 #define DMAC_CTRLA_BTSIZE_Pos 0
01461 #define DMAC_CTRLA_BTSIZE_Msk (0xffffu << DMAC_CTRLA_BTSIZE_Pos) /**< \brief (DMAC_CTRLA) Buffer Transfer Size */
01462 #define DMAC_CTRLA_BTSIZE(value) ((DMAC_CTRLA_BTSIZE_Msk & ((value) << DMAC_CTRLA_BTSIZE_Pos)))
01463 #define DMAC_CTRLA_SCSIZE_Pos 16
01464 #define DMAC_CTRLA_SCSIZE_Msk (0x7u << DMAC_CTRLA_SCSIZE_Pos) /**< \brief (DMAC_CTRLA) Source Chunk Transfer Size. */
01465 #define   DMAC_CTRLA_SCSIZE_CHK_1 (0x0u << 16) /**< \brief (DMAC_CTRLA) 1 data transferred */
01466 #define   DMAC_CTRLA_SCSIZE_CHK_4 (0x1u << 16) /**< \brief (DMAC_CTRLA) 4 data transferred */
01467 #define   DMAC_CTRLA_SCSIZE_CHK_8 (0x2u << 16) /**< \brief (DMAC_CTRLA) 8 data transferred */
01468 #define   DMAC_CTRLA_SCSIZE_CHK_16 (0x3u << 16) /**< \brief (DMAC_CTRLA) 16 data transferred */
01469 #define   DMAC_CTRLA_SCSIZE_CHK_32 (0x4u << 16) /**< \brief (DMAC_CTRLA) 32 data transferred */
01470 #define   DMAC_CTRLA_SCSIZE_CHK_64 (0x5u << 16) /**< \brief (DMAC_CTRLA) 64 data transferred */
01471 #define   DMAC_CTRLA_SCSIZE_CHK_128 (0x6u << 16) /**< \brief (DMAC_CTRLA) 128 data transferred */
01472 #define   DMAC_CTRLA_SCSIZE_CHK_256 (0x7u << 16) /**< \brief (DMAC_CTRLA) 256 data transferred */
01473 #define DMAC_CTRLA_DCSIZE_Pos 20
01474 #define DMAC_CTRLA_DCSIZE_Msk (0x7u << DMAC_CTRLA_DCSIZE_Pos) /**< \brief (DMAC_CTRLA) Destination Chunk Transfer Size */
01475 #define   DMAC_CTRLA_DCSIZE_CHK_1 (0x0u << 20) /**< \brief (DMAC_CTRLA) 1 data transferred */
01476 #define   DMAC_CTRLA_DCSIZE_CHK_4 (0x1u << 20) /**< \brief (DMAC_CTRLA) 4 data transferred */
01477 #define   DMAC_CTRLA_DCSIZE_CHK_8 (0x2u << 20) /**< \brief (DMAC_CTRLA) 8 data transferred */
01478 #define   DMAC_CTRLA_DCSIZE_CHK_16 (0x3u << 20) /**< \brief (DMAC_CTRLA) 16 data transferred */
01479 #define   DMAC_CTRLA_DCSIZE_CHK_32 (0x4u << 20) /**< \brief (DMAC_CTRLA) 32 data transferred */
01480 #define   DMAC_CTRLA_DCSIZE_CHK_64 (0x5u << 20) /**< \brief (DMAC_CTRLA) 64 data transferred */
01481 #define   DMAC_CTRLA_DCSIZE_CHK_128 (0x6u << 20) /**< \brief (DMAC_CTRLA) 128 data transferred */
01482 #define   DMAC_CTRLA_DCSIZE_CHK_256 (0x7u << 20) /**< \brief (DMAC_CTRLA) 256 data transferred */
01483 #define DMAC_CTRLA_SRC_WIDTH_Pos 24
01484 #define DMAC_CTRLA_SRC_WIDTH_Msk (0x3u << DMAC_CTRLA_SRC_WIDTH_Pos) /**< \brief (DMAC_CTRLA) Transfer Width for the Source */
01485 #define   DMAC_CTRLA_SRC_WIDTH_BYTE (0x0u << 24) /**< \brief (DMAC_CTRLA) the transfer size is set to 8-bit width */
01486 #define   DMAC_CTRLA_SRC_WIDTH_HALF_WORD (0x1u << 24) /**< \brief (DMAC_CTRLA) the transfer size is set to 16-bit width */
01487 #define   DMAC_CTRLA_SRC_WIDTH_WORD (0x2u << 24) /**< \brief (DMAC_CTRLA) the transfer size is set to 32-bit width */
01488 #define DMAC_CTRLA_DST_WIDTH_Pos 28
01489 #define DMAC_CTRLA_DST_WIDTH_Msk (0x3u << DMAC_CTRLA_DST_WIDTH_Pos) /**< \brief (DMAC_CTRLA) Transfer Width for the Destination */
01490 #define   DMAC_CTRLA_DST_WIDTH_BYTE (0x0u << 28) /**< \brief (DMAC_CTRLA) the transfer size is set to 8-bit width */
01491 #define   DMAC_CTRLA_DST_WIDTH_HALF_WORD (0x1u << 28) /**< \brief (DMAC_CTRLA) the transfer size is set to 16-bit width */
01492 #define   DMAC_CTRLA_DST_WIDTH_WORD (0x2u << 28) /**< \brief (DMAC_CTRLA) the transfer size is set to 32-bit width */
01493 #define DMAC_CTRLA_DONE (0x1u << 31) /**< \brief (DMAC_CTRLA)  */
01494 /* -------- DMAC_CTRLB : (DMAC Offset: N/A) DMAC Channel Control B Register -------- */
01495 #define DMAC_CTRLB_SRC_DSCR (0x1u << 16) /**< \brief (DMAC_CTRLB) Source Address Descriptor */
01496 #define   DMAC_CTRLB_SRC_DSCR_FETCH_FROM_MEM (0x0u << 16) /**< \brief (DMAC_CTRLB) Source address is updated when the descriptor is fetched from the memory. */
01497 #define   DMAC_CTRLB_SRC_DSCR_FETCH_DISABLE (0x1u << 16) /**< \brief (DMAC_CTRLB) Buffer Descriptor Fetch operation is disabled for the source. */
01498 #define DMAC_CTRLB_DST_DSCR (0x1u << 20) /**< \brief (DMAC_CTRLB) Destination Address Descriptor */
01499 #define   DMAC_CTRLB_DST_DSCR_FETCH_FROM_MEM (0x0u << 20) /**< \brief (DMAC_CTRLB) Destination address is updated when the descriptor is fetched from the memory. */
01500 #define   DMAC_CTRLB_DST_DSCR_FETCH_DISABLE (0x1u << 20) /**< \brief (DMAC_CTRLB) Buffer Descriptor Fetch operation is disabled for the destination. */
01501 #define DMAC_CTRLB_FC_Pos 21
01502 #define DMAC_CTRLB_FC_Msk (0x7u << DMAC_CTRLB_FC_Pos) /**< \brief (DMAC_CTRLB) Flow Control */
01503 #define   DMAC_CTRLB_FC_MEM2MEM_DMA_FC (0x0u << 21) /**< \brief (DMAC_CTRLB) Memory-to-Memory Transfer DMAC is flow controller */
01504 #define   DMAC_CTRLB_FC_MEM2PER_DMA_FC (0x1u << 21) /**< \brief (DMAC_CTRLB) Memory-to-Peripheral Transfer DMAC is flow controller */
01505 #define   DMAC_CTRLB_FC_PER2MEM_DMA_FC (0x2u << 21) /**< \brief (DMAC_CTRLB) Peripheral-to-Memory Transfer DMAC is flow controller */
01506 #define   DMAC_CTRLB_FC_PER2PER_DMA_FC (0x3u << 21) /**< \brief (DMAC_CTRLB) Peripheral-to-Peripheral Transfer DMAC is flow controller */
01507 #define DMAC_CTRLB_SRC_INCR_Pos 24
01508 #define DMAC_CTRLB_SRC_INCR_Msk (0x3u << DMAC_CTRLB_SRC_INCR_Pos) /**< \brief (DMAC_CTRLB) Incrementing, Decrementing or Fixed Address for the Source */
01509 #define   DMAC_CTRLB_SRC_INCR_INCREMENTING (0x0u << 24) /**< \brief (DMAC_CTRLB) The source address is incremented */
01510 #define   DMAC_CTRLB_SRC_INCR_DECREMENTING (0x1u << 24) /**< \brief (DMAC_CTRLB) The source address is decremented */
01511 #define   DMAC_CTRLB_SRC_INCR_FIXED (0x2u << 24) /**< \brief (DMAC_CTRLB) The source address remains unchanged */
01512 #define DMAC_CTRLB_DST_INCR_Pos 28
01513 #define DMAC_CTRLB_DST_INCR_Msk (0x3u << DMAC_CTRLB_DST_INCR_Pos) /**< \brief (DMAC_CTRLB) Incrementing, Decrementing or Fixed Address for the Destination */
01514 #define   DMAC_CTRLB_DST_INCR_INCREMENTING (0x0u << 28) /**< \brief (DMAC_CTRLB) The destination address is incremented */
01515 #define   DMAC_CTRLB_DST_INCR_DECREMENTING (0x1u << 28) /**< \brief (DMAC_CTRLB) The destination address is decremented */
01516 #define   DMAC_CTRLB_DST_INCR_FIXED (0x2u << 28) /**< \brief (DMAC_CTRLB) The destination address remains unchanged */
01517 #define DMAC_CTRLB_IEN (0x1u << 30) /**< \brief (DMAC_CTRLB)  */
01518 /* -------- DMAC_CFG : (DMAC Offset: N/A) DMAC Channel Configuration Register -------- */
01519 #define DMAC_CFG_SRC_PER_Pos 0
01520 #define DMAC_CFG_SRC_PER_Msk (0xfu << DMAC_CFG_SRC_PER_Pos) /**< \brief (DMAC_CFG) Source with Peripheral identifier */
01521 #define DMAC_CFG_SRC_PER(value) ((DMAC_CFG_SRC_PER_Msk & ((value) << DMAC_CFG_SRC_PER_Pos)))
01522 #define DMAC_CFG_DST_PER_Pos 4
01523 #define DMAC_CFG_DST_PER_Msk (0xfu << DMAC_CFG_DST_PER_Pos) /**< \brief (DMAC_CFG) Destination with Peripheral identifier */
01524 #define DMAC_CFG_DST_PER(value) ((DMAC_CFG_DST_PER_Msk & ((value) << DMAC_CFG_DST_PER_Pos)))
01525 #define DMAC_CFG_SRC_H2SEL (0x1u << 9) /**< \brief (DMAC_CFG) Software or Hardware Selection for the Source */
01526 #define   DMAC_CFG_SRC_H2SEL_SW (0x0u << 9) /**< \brief (DMAC_CFG) Software handshaking interface is used to trigger a transfer request. */
01527 #define   DMAC_CFG_SRC_H2SEL_HW (0x1u << 9) /**< \brief (DMAC_CFG) Hardware handshaking interface is used to trigger a transfer request. */
01528 #define DMAC_CFG_DST_H2SEL (0x1u << 13) /**< \brief (DMAC_CFG) Software or Hardware Selection for the Destination */
01529 #define   DMAC_CFG_DST_H2SEL_SW (0x0u << 13) /**< \brief (DMAC_CFG) Software handshaking interface is used to trigger a transfer request. */
01530 #define   DMAC_CFG_DST_H2SEL_HW (0x1u << 13) /**< \brief (DMAC_CFG) Hardware handshaking interface is used to trigger a transfer request. */
01531 #define DMAC_CFG_SOD (0x1u << 16) /**< \brief (DMAC_CFG) Stop On Done */
01532 #define   DMAC_CFG_SOD_DISABLE (0x0u << 16) /**< \brief (DMAC_CFG) STOP ON DONE disabled, the descriptor fetch operation ignores DONE Field of CTRLA register. */
01533 #define   DMAC_CFG_SOD_ENABLE (0x1u << 16) /**< \brief (DMAC_CFG) STOP ON DONE activated, the DMAC module is automatically disabled if DONE FIELD is set to 1. */
01534 #define DMAC_CFG_LOCK_IF (0x1u << 20) /**< \brief (DMAC_CFG) Interface Lock */
01535 #define   DMAC_CFG_LOCK_IF_DISABLE (0x0u << 20) /**< \brief (DMAC_CFG) Interface Lock capability is disabled */
01536 #define   DMAC_CFG_LOCK_IF_ENABLE (0x1u << 20) /**< \brief (DMAC_CFG) Interface Lock capability is enabled */
01537 #define DMAC_CFG_LOCK_B (0x1u << 21) /**< \brief (DMAC_CFG) Bus Lock */
01538 #define   DMAC_CFG_LOCK_B_DISABLE (0x0u << 21) /**< \brief (DMAC_CFG) AHB Bus Locking capability is disabled. */
01539 #define DMAC_CFG_LOCK_IF_L (0x1u << 22) /**< \brief (DMAC_CFG) Master Interface Arbiter Lock */
01540 #define   DMAC_CFG_LOCK_IF_L_CHUNK (0x0u << 22) /**< \brief (DMAC_CFG) The Master Interface Arbiter is locked by the channel x for a chunk transfer. */
01541 #define   DMAC_CFG_LOCK_IF_L_BUFFER (0x1u << 22) /**< \brief (DMAC_CFG) The Master Interface Arbiter is locked by the channel x for a buffer transfer. */
01542 #define DMAC_CFG_AHB_PROT_Pos 24
01543 #define DMAC_CFG_AHB_PROT_Msk (0x7u << DMAC_CFG_AHB_PROT_Pos) /**< \brief (DMAC_CFG) AHB Protection */
01544 #define DMAC_CFG_AHB_PROT(value) ((DMAC_CFG_AHB_PROT_Msk & ((value) << DMAC_CFG_AHB_PROT_Pos)))
01545 #define DMAC_CFG_FIFOCFG_Pos 28
01546 #define DMAC_CFG_FIFOCFG_Msk (0x3u << DMAC_CFG_FIFOCFG_Pos) /**< \brief (DMAC_CFG) FIFO Configuration */
01547 #define   DMAC_CFG_FIFOCFG_ALAP_CFG (0x0u << 28) /**< \brief (DMAC_CFG) The largest defined length AHB burst is performed on the destination AHB interface. */
01548 #define   DMAC_CFG_FIFOCFG_HALF_CFG (0x1u << 28) /**< \brief (DMAC_CFG) When half FIFO size is available/filled, a source/destination request is serviced. */
01549 #define   DMAC_CFG_FIFOCFG_ASAP_CFG (0x2u << 28) /**< \brief (DMAC_CFG) When there is enough space/data available to perform a single AHB access, then the request is serviced. */
01550 /* -------- DMAC_WPMR : (DMAC Offset: 0x1E4) DMAC Write Protect Mode Register -------- */
01551 #define DMAC_WPMR_WPEN (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (DMAC_WPMR) Write Protect Enable */
01552 #define DMAC_WPMR_WPKEY_Pos 8
01553 #define DMAC_WPMR_WPKEY_Msk (0xffffffu << DMAC_WPMR_WPKEY_Pos) /**< \brief (DMAC_WPMR) Write Protect KEY */
01554 #define DMAC_WPMR_WPKEY(value) ((DMAC_WPMR_WPKEY_Msk & ((value) << DMAC_WPMR_WPKEY_Pos)))
01555 /* -------- DMAC_WPSR : (DMAC Offset: 0x1E8) DMAC Write Protect Status Register -------- */
01556 #define DMAC_WPSR_WPVS (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (DMAC_WPSR) Write Protect Violation Status */
01557 #define DMAC_WPSR_WPVSRC_Pos 8
01558 #define DMAC_WPSR_WPVSRC_Msk (0xffffu << DMAC_WPSR_WPVSRC_Pos) /**< \brief (DMAC_WPSR) Write Protect Violation Source */
01559 
01560 /*@}*/
01561 
01562 /* ============================================================================= */
01563 /**  SOFTWARE API DEFINITION FOR Embedded Flash Controller */
01564 /* ============================================================================= */
01565 /** \addtogroup SAM3XA_EFC Embedded Flash Controller */
01566 /*@{*/
01567 
01568 #ifndef __ASSEMBLY__
01569 /** \brief Efc hardware registers */
01570 typedef struct {
01571   RwReg EEFC_FMR; /**< \brief (Efc Offset: 0x00) EEFC Flash Mode Register */
01572   WoReg EEFC_FCR; /**< \brief (Efc Offset: 0x04) EEFC Flash Command Register */
01573   RoReg EEFC_FSR; /**< \brief (Efc Offset: 0x08) EEFC Flash Status Register */
01574   RoReg EEFC_FRR; /**< \brief (Efc Offset: 0x0C) EEFC Flash Result Register */
01575 } Efc;
01576 #endif /* __ASSEMBLY__ */
01577 /* -------- EEFC_FMR : (EFC Offset: 0x00) EEFC Flash Mode Register -------- */
01578 #define EEFC_FMR_FRDY (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (EEFC_FMR) Ready Interrupt Enable */
01579 #define EEFC_FMR_FWS_Pos 8
01580 #define EEFC_FMR_FWS_Msk (0xfu << EEFC_FMR_FWS_Pos) /**< \brief (EEFC_FMR) Flash Wait State */
01581 #define EEFC_FMR_FWS(value) ((EEFC_FMR_FWS_Msk & ((value) << EEFC_FMR_FWS_Pos)))
01582 #define EEFC_FMR_SCOD (0x1u << 16) /**< \brief (EEFC_FMR) Sequential Code Optimization Disable */
01583 #define EEFC_FMR_FAM (0x1u << 24) /**< \brief (EEFC_FMR) Flash Access Mode */
01584 /* -------- EEFC_FCR : (EFC Offset: 0x04) EEFC Flash Command Register -------- */
01585 #define EEFC_FCR_FCMD_Pos 0
01586 #define EEFC_FCR_FCMD_Msk (0xffu << EEFC_FCR_FCMD_Pos) /**< \brief (EEFC_FCR) Flash Command */
01587 #define EEFC_FCR_FCMD(value) ((EEFC_FCR_FCMD_Msk & ((value) << EEFC_FCR_FCMD_Pos)))
01588 #define EEFC_FCR_FARG_Pos 8
01589 #define EEFC_FCR_FARG_Msk (0xffffu << EEFC_FCR_FARG_Pos) /**< \brief (EEFC_FCR) Flash Command Argument */
01590 #define EEFC_FCR_FARG(value) ((EEFC_FCR_FARG_Msk & ((value) << EEFC_FCR_FARG_Pos)))
01591 #define EEFC_FCR_FKEY_Pos 24
01592 #define EEFC_FCR_FKEY_Msk (0xffu << EEFC_FCR_FKEY_Pos) /**< \brief (EEFC_FCR) Flash Writing Protection Key */
01593 #define EEFC_FCR_FKEY(value) ((EEFC_FCR_FKEY_Msk & ((value) << EEFC_FCR_FKEY_Pos)))
01594 /* -------- EEFC_FSR : (EFC Offset: 0x08) EEFC Flash Status Register -------- */
01595 #define EEFC_FSR_FRDY (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (EEFC_FSR) Flash Ready Status */
01596 #define EEFC_FSR_FCMDE (0x1u << 1) /**< \brief (EEFC_FSR) Flash Command Error Status */
01597 #define EEFC_FSR_FLOCKE (0x1u << 2) /**< \brief (EEFC_FSR) Flash Lock Error Status */
01598 /* -------- EEFC_FRR : (EFC Offset: 0x0C) EEFC Flash Result Register -------- */
01599 #define EEFC_FRR_FVALUE_Pos 0
01600 #define EEFC_FRR_FVALUE_Msk (0xffffffffu << EEFC_FRR_FVALUE_Pos) /**< \brief (EEFC_FRR) Flash Result Value */
01601 
01602 /*@}*/
01603 
01604 /* ============================================================================= */
01605 /**  SOFTWARE API DEFINITION FOR Ethernet MAC 10/100 */
01606 /* ============================================================================= */
01607 /** \addtogroup SAM3XA_EMAC Ethernet MAC 10/100 */
01608 /*@{*/
01609 
01610 #ifndef __ASSEMBLY__
01611 /** \brief EmacSa hardware registers */
01612 typedef struct {
01613   RwReg   EMAC_SAxB;    /**< \brief (EmacSa Offset: 0x0) Specific Address 1 Bottom Register */
01614   RwReg   EMAC_SAxT;    /**< \brief (EmacSa Offset: 0x4) Specific Address 1 Top Register */
01615 } EmacSa;
01616 /** \brief Emac hardware registers */
01617 #define EMACSA_NUMBER 4
01618 typedef struct {
01619   RwReg   EMAC_NCR;     /**< \brief (Emac Offset: 0x00) Network Control Register */
01620   RwReg   EMAC_NCFGR;   /**< \brief (Emac Offset: 0x04) Network Configuration Register */
01621   RoReg   EMAC_NSR;     /**< \brief (Emac Offset: 0x08) Network Status Register */
01622   RoReg   Reserved1[2];
01623   RwReg   EMAC_TSR;     /**< \brief (Emac Offset: 0x14) Transmit Status Register */
01624   RwReg   EMAC_RBQP;    /**< \brief (Emac Offset: 0x18) Receive Buffer Queue Pointer Register */
01625   RwReg   EMAC_TBQP;    /**< \brief (Emac Offset: 0x1C) Transmit Buffer Queue Pointer Register */
01626   RwReg   EMAC_RSR;     /**< \brief (Emac Offset: 0x20) Receive Status Register */
01627   RwReg   EMAC_ISR;     /**< \brief (Emac Offset: 0x24) Interrupt Status Register */
01628   WoReg   EMAC_IER;     /**< \brief (Emac Offset: 0x28) Interrupt Enable Register */
01629   WoReg   EMAC_IDR;     /**< \brief (Emac Offset: 0x2C) Interrupt Disable Register */
01630   RoReg   EMAC_IMR;     /**< \brief (Emac Offset: 0x30) Interrupt Mask Register */
01631   RwReg   EMAC_MAN;     /**< \brief (Emac Offset: 0x34) Phy Maintenance Register */
01632   RwReg   EMAC_PTR;     /**< \brief (Emac Offset: 0x38) Pause Time Register */
01633   RwReg   EMAC_PFR;     /**< \brief (Emac Offset: 0x3C) Pause Frames Received Register */
01634   RwReg   EMAC_FTO;     /**< \brief (Emac Offset: 0x40) Frames Transmitted Ok Register */
01635   RwReg   EMAC_SCF;     /**< \brief (Emac Offset: 0x44) Single Collision Frames Register */
01636   RwReg   EMAC_MCF;     /**< \brief (Emac Offset: 0x48) Multiple Collision Frames Register */
01637   RwReg   EMAC_FRO;     /**< \brief (Emac Offset: 0x4C) Frames Received Ok Register */
01638   RwReg   EMAC_FCSE;    /**< \brief (Emac Offset: 0x50) Frame Check Sequence Errors Register */
01639   RwReg   EMAC_ALE;     /**< \brief (Emac Offset: 0x54) Alignment Errors Register */
01640   RwReg   EMAC_DTF;     /**< \brief (Emac Offset: 0x58) Deferred Transmission Frames Register */
01641   RwReg   EMAC_LCOL;    /**< \brief (Emac Offset: 0x5C) Late Collisions Register */
01642   RwReg   EMAC_ECOL;    /**< \brief (Emac Offset: 0x60) Excessive Collisions Register */
01643   RwReg   EMAC_TUND;    /**< \brief (Emac Offset: 0x64) Transmit Underrun Errors Register */
01644   RwReg   EMAC_CSE;     /**< \brief (Emac Offset: 0x68) Carrier Sense Errors Register */
01645   RwReg   EMAC_RRE;     /**< \brief (Emac Offset: 0x6C) Receive Resource Errors Register */
01646   RwReg   EMAC_ROV;     /**< \brief (Emac Offset: 0x70) Receive Overrun Errors Register */
01647   RwReg   EMAC_RSE;     /**< \brief (Emac Offset: 0x74) Receive Symbol Errors Register */
01648   RwReg   EMAC_ELE;     /**< \brief (Emac Offset: 0x78) Excessive Length Errors Register */
01649   RwReg   EMAC_RJA;     /**< \brief (Emac Offset: 0x7C) Receive Jabbers Register */
01650   RwReg   EMAC_USF;     /**< \brief (Emac Offset: 0x80) Undersize Frames Register */
01651   RwReg   EMAC_STE;     /**< \brief (Emac Offset: 0x84) SQE Test Errors Register */
01652   RwReg   EMAC_RLE;     /**< \brief (Emac Offset: 0x88) Received Length Field Mismatch Register */
01653   RoReg   Reserved2[1];
01654   RwReg   EMAC_HRB;     /**< \brief (Emac Offset: 0x90) Hash Register Bottom [31:0] Register */
01655   RwReg   EMAC_HRT;     /**< \brief (Emac Offset: 0x94) Hash Register Top [63:32] Register */
01656   EmacSa  EMAC_SA[EMACSA_NUMBER]; /**< \brief (Emac Offset: 0x98) sa = 1 .. 4 */
01657   RwReg   EMAC_TID;     /**< \brief (Emac Offset: 0xB8) Type ID Checking Register */
01658   RoReg   Reserved3[1];
01659   RwReg   EMAC_USRIO;   /**< \brief (Emac Offset: 0xC0) User Input/Output Register */
01660 } Emac;
01661 #endif /* __ASSEMBLY__ */
01662 /* -------- EMAC_NCR : (EMAC Offset: 0x00) Network Control Register -------- */
01663 #define EMAC_NCR_LB (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (EMAC_NCR) LoopBack */
01664 #define EMAC_NCR_LLB (0x1u << 1) /**< \brief (EMAC_NCR) Loopback local */
01665 #define EMAC_NCR_RE (0x1u << 2) /**< \brief (EMAC_NCR) Receive enable */
01666 #define EMAC_NCR_TE (0x1u << 3) /**< \brief (EMAC_NCR) Transmit enable */
01667 #define EMAC_NCR_MPE (0x1u << 4) /**< \brief (EMAC_NCR) Management port enable */
01668 #define EMAC_NCR_CLRSTAT (0x1u << 5) /**< \brief (EMAC_NCR) Clear statistics registers */
01669 #define EMAC_NCR_INCSTAT (0x1u << 6) /**< \brief (EMAC_NCR) Increment statistics registers */
01670 #define EMAC_NCR_WESTAT (0x1u << 7) /**< \brief (EMAC_NCR) Write enable for statistics registers */
01671 #define EMAC_NCR_BP (0x1u << 8) /**< \brief (EMAC_NCR) Back pressure */
01672 #define EMAC_NCR_TSTART (0x1u << 9) /**< \brief (EMAC_NCR) Start transmission */
01673 #define EMAC_NCR_THALT (0x1u << 10) /**< \brief (EMAC_NCR) Transmit halt */
01674 /* -------- EMAC_NCFGR : (EMAC Offset: 0x04) Network Configuration Register -------- */
01675 #define EMAC_NCFGR_SPD (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (EMAC_NCFGR) Speed */
01676 #define EMAC_NCFGR_FD (0x1u << 1) /**< \brief (EMAC_NCFGR) Full Duplex */
01677 #define EMAC_NCFGR_JFRAME (0x1u << 3) /**< \brief (EMAC_NCFGR) Jumbo Frames */
01678 #define EMAC_NCFGR_CAF (0x1u << 4) /**< \brief (EMAC_NCFGR) Copy All Frames */
01679 #define EMAC_NCFGR_NBC (0x1u << 5) /**< \brief (EMAC_NCFGR) No Broadcast */
01680 #define EMAC_NCFGR_MTI (0x1u << 6) /**< \brief (EMAC_NCFGR) Multicast Hash Enable */
01681 #define EMAC_NCFGR_UNI (0x1u << 7) /**< \brief (EMAC_NCFGR) Unicast Hash Enable */
01682 #define EMAC_NCFGR_BIG (0x1u << 8) /**< \brief (EMAC_NCFGR) Receive 1536 bytes frames */
01683 #define EMAC_NCFGR_CLK_Pos 10
01684 #define EMAC_NCFGR_CLK_Msk (0x3u << EMAC_NCFGR_CLK_Pos) /**< \brief (EMAC_NCFGR) MDC clock divider */
01685 #define   EMAC_NCFGR_CLK_MCK_8 (0x0u << 10) /**< \brief (EMAC_NCFGR) MCK divided by 8 (MCK up to 20 MHz). */
01686 #define   EMAC_NCFGR_CLK_MCK_16 (0x1u << 10) /**< \brief (EMAC_NCFGR) MCK divided by 16 (MCK up to 40 MHz). */
01687 #define   EMAC_NCFGR_CLK_MCK_32 (0x2u << 10) /**< \brief (EMAC_NCFGR) MCK divided by 32 (MCK up to 80 MHz). */
01688 #define   EMAC_NCFGR_CLK_MCK_64 (0x3u << 10) /**< \brief (EMAC_NCFGR) MCK divided by 64 (MCK up to 160 MHz). */
01689 #define EMAC_NCFGR_RTY (0x1u << 12) /**< \brief (EMAC_NCFGR) Retry test */
01690 #define EMAC_NCFGR_PAE (0x1u << 13) /**< \brief (EMAC_NCFGR) Pause Enable */
01691 #define EMAC_NCFGR_RBOF_Pos 14
01692 #define EMAC_NCFGR_RBOF_Msk (0x3u << EMAC_NCFGR_RBOF_Pos) /**< \brief (EMAC_NCFGR) Receive Buffer Offset */
01693 #define   EMAC_NCFGR_RBOF_OFFSET_0 (0x0u << 14) /**< \brief (EMAC_NCFGR) No offset from start of receive buffer. */
01694 #define   EMAC_NCFGR_RBOF_OFFSET_1 (0x1u << 14) /**< \brief (EMAC_NCFGR) One-byte offset from start of receive buffer. */
01695 #define   EMAC_NCFGR_RBOF_OFFSET_2 (0x2u << 14) /**< \brief (EMAC_NCFGR) Two-byte offset from start of receive buffer. */
01696 #define   EMAC_NCFGR_RBOF_OFFSET_3 (0x3u << 14) /**< \brief (EMAC_NCFGR) Three-byte offset from start of receive buffer. */
01697 #define EMAC_NCFGR_RLCE (0x1u << 16) /**< \brief (EMAC_NCFGR) Receive Length field Checking Enable */
01698 #define EMAC_NCFGR_DRFCS (0x1u << 17) /**< \brief (EMAC_NCFGR) Discard Receive FCS */
01699 #define EMAC_NCFGR_EFRHD (0x1u << 18) /**< \brief (EMAC_NCFGR)  */
01700 #define EMAC_NCFGR_IRXFCS (0x1u << 19) /**< \brief (EMAC_NCFGR) Ignore RX FCS */
01701 /* -------- EMAC_NSR : (EMAC Offset: 0x08) Network Status Register -------- */
01702 #define EMAC_NSR_MDIO (0x1u << 1) /**< \brief (EMAC_NSR)  */
01703 #define EMAC_NSR_IDLE (0x1u << 2) /**< \brief (EMAC_NSR)  */
01704 /* -------- EMAC_TSR : (EMAC Offset: 0x14) Transmit Status Register -------- */
01705 #define EMAC_TSR_UBR (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (EMAC_TSR) Used Bit Read */
01706 #define EMAC_TSR_COL (0x1u << 1) /**< \brief (EMAC_TSR) Collision Occurred */
01707 #define EMAC_TSR_RLES (0x1u << 2) /**< \brief (EMAC_TSR) Retry Limit exceeded */
01708 #define EMAC_TSR_TGO (0x1u << 3) /**< \brief (EMAC_TSR) Transmit Go */
01709 #define EMAC_TSR_BEX (0x1u << 4) /**< \brief (EMAC_TSR) Buffers exhausted mid frame */
01710 #define EMAC_TSR_COMP (0x1u << 5) /**< \brief (EMAC_TSR) Transmit Complete */
01711 #define EMAC_TSR_UND (0x1u << 6) /**< \brief (EMAC_TSR) Transmit Underrun */
01712 /* -------- EMAC_RBQP : (EMAC Offset: 0x18) Receive Buffer Queue Pointer Register -------- */
01713 #define EMAC_RBQP_ADDR_Pos 2
01714 #define EMAC_RBQP_ADDR_Msk (0x3fffffffu << EMAC_RBQP_ADDR_Pos) /**< \brief (EMAC_RBQP) Receive buffer queue pointer address */
01715 #define EMAC_RBQP_ADDR(value) ((EMAC_RBQP_ADDR_Msk & ((value) << EMAC_RBQP_ADDR_Pos)))
01716 /* -------- EMAC_TBQP : (EMAC Offset: 0x1C) Transmit Buffer Queue Pointer Register -------- */
01717 #define EMAC_TBQP_ADDR_Pos 2
01718 #define EMAC_TBQP_ADDR_Msk (0x3fffffffu << EMAC_TBQP_ADDR_Pos) /**< \brief (EMAC_TBQP) Transmit buffer queue pointer address */
01719 #define EMAC_TBQP_ADDR(value) ((EMAC_TBQP_ADDR_Msk & ((value) << EMAC_TBQP_ADDR_Pos)))
01720 /* -------- EMAC_RSR : (EMAC Offset: 0x20) Receive Status Register -------- */
01721 #define EMAC_RSR_BNA (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (EMAC_RSR) Buffer Not Available */
01722 #define EMAC_RSR_REC (0x1u << 1) /**< \brief (EMAC_RSR) Frame Received */
01723 #define EMAC_RSR_OVR (0x1u << 2) /**< \brief (EMAC_RSR) Receive Overrun */
01724 /* -------- EMAC_ISR : (EMAC Offset: 0x24) Interrupt Status Register -------- */
01725 #define EMAC_ISR_MFD (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (EMAC_ISR) Management Frame Done */
01726 #define EMAC_ISR_RCOMP (0x1u << 1) /**< \brief (EMAC_ISR) Receive Complete */
01727 #define EMAC_ISR_RXUBR (0x1u << 2) /**< \brief (EMAC_ISR) Receive Used Bit Read */
01728 #define EMAC_ISR_TXUBR (0x1u << 3) /**< \brief (EMAC_ISR) Transmit Used Bit Read */
01729 #define EMAC_ISR_TUND (0x1u << 4) /**< \brief (EMAC_ISR) Ethernet Transmit Buffer Underrun */
01730 #define EMAC_ISR_RLEX (0x1u << 5) /**< \brief (EMAC_ISR) Retry Limit Exceeded */
01731 #define EMAC_ISR_TXERR (0x1u << 6) /**< \brief (EMAC_ISR) Transmit Error */
01732 #define EMAC_ISR_TCOMP (0x1u << 7) /**< \brief (EMAC_ISR) Transmit Complete */
01733 #define EMAC_ISR_ROVR (0x1u << 10) /**< \brief (EMAC_ISR) Receive Overrun */
01734 #define EMAC_ISR_HRESP (0x1u << 11) /**< \brief (EMAC_ISR) Hresp not OK */
01735 #define EMAC_ISR_PFRE (0x1u << 12) /**< \brief (EMAC_ISR) Pause Frame Received */
01736 #define EMAC_ISR_PTZ (0x1u << 13) /**< \brief (EMAC_ISR) Pause Time Zero */
01737 /* -------- EMAC_IER : (EMAC Offset: 0x28) Interrupt Enable Register -------- */
01738 #define EMAC_IER_MFD (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (EMAC_IER) Management Frame sent */
01739 #define EMAC_IER_RCOMP (0x1u << 1) /**< \brief (EMAC_IER) Receive Complete */
01740 #define EMAC_IER_RXUBR (0x1u << 2) /**< \brief (EMAC_IER) Receive Used Bit Read */
01741 #define EMAC_IER_TXUBR (0x1u << 3) /**< \brief (EMAC_IER) Transmit Used Bit Read */
01742 #define EMAC_IER_TUND (0x1u << 4) /**< \brief (EMAC_IER) Ethernet Transmit Buffer Underrun */
01743 #define EMAC_IER_RLE (0x1u << 5) /**< \brief (EMAC_IER) Retry Limit Exceeded */
01744 #define EMAC_IER_TXERR (0x1u << 6) /**< \brief (EMAC_IER)  */
01745 #define EMAC_IER_TCOMP (0x1u << 7) /**< \brief (EMAC_IER) Transmit Complete */
01746 #define EMAC_IER_ROVR (0x1u << 10) /**< \brief (EMAC_IER) Receive Overrun */
01747 #define EMAC_IER_HRESP (0x1u << 11) /**< \brief (EMAC_IER) Hresp not OK */
01748 #define EMAC_IER_PFR (0x1u << 12) /**< \brief (EMAC_IER) Pause Frame Received */
01749 #define EMAC_IER_PTZ (0x1u << 13) /**< \brief (EMAC_IER) Pause Time Zero */
01750 /* -------- EMAC_IDR : (EMAC Offset: 0x2C) Interrupt Disable Register -------- */
01751 #define EMAC_IDR_MFD (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (EMAC_IDR) Management Frame sent */
01752 #define EMAC_IDR_RCOMP (0x1u << 1) /**< \brief (EMAC_IDR) Receive Complete */
01753 #define EMAC_IDR_RXUBR (0x1u << 2) /**< \brief (EMAC_IDR) Receive Used Bit Read */
01754 #define EMAC_IDR_TXUBR (0x1u << 3) /**< \brief (EMAC_IDR) Transmit Used Bit Read */
01755 #define EMAC_IDR_TUND (0x1u << 4) /**< \brief (EMAC_IDR) Ethernet Transmit Buffer Underrun */
01756 #define EMAC_IDR_RLE (0x1u << 5) /**< \brief (EMAC_IDR) Retry Limit Exceeded */
01757 #define EMAC_IDR_TXERR (0x1u << 6) /**< \brief (EMAC_IDR)  */
01758 #define EMAC_IDR_TCOMP (0x1u << 7) /**< \brief (EMAC_IDR) Transmit Complete */
01759 #define EMAC_IDR_ROVR (0x1u << 10) /**< \brief (EMAC_IDR) Receive Overrun */
01760 #define EMAC_IDR_HRESP (0x1u << 11) /**< \brief (EMAC_IDR) Hresp not OK */
01761 #define EMAC_IDR_PFR (0x1u << 12) /**< \brief (EMAC_IDR) Pause Frame Received */
01762 #define EMAC_IDR_PTZ (0x1u << 13) /**< \brief (EMAC_IDR) Pause Time Zero */
01763 /* -------- EMAC_IMR : (EMAC Offset: 0x30) Interrupt Mask Register -------- */
01764 #define EMAC_IMR_MFD (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (EMAC_IMR) Management Frame sent */
01765 #define EMAC_IMR_RCOMP (0x1u << 1) /**< \brief (EMAC_IMR) Receive Complete */
01766 #define EMAC_IMR_RXUBR (0x1u << 2) /**< \brief (EMAC_IMR) Receive Used Bit Read */
01767 #define EMAC_IMR_TXUBR (0x1u << 3) /**< \brief (EMAC_IMR) Transmit Used Bit Read */
01768 #define EMAC_IMR_TUND (0x1u << 4) /**< \brief (EMAC_IMR) Ethernet Transmit Buffer Underrun */
01769 #define EMAC_IMR_RLE (0x1u << 5) /**< \brief (EMAC_IMR) Retry Limit Exceeded */
01770 #define EMAC_IMR_TXERR (0x1u << 6) /**< \brief (EMAC_IMR)  */
01771 #define EMAC_IMR_TCOMP (0x1u << 7) /**< \brief (EMAC_IMR) Transmit Complete */
01772 #define EMAC_IMR_ROVR (0x1u << 10) /**< \brief (EMAC_IMR) Receive Overrun */
01773 #define EMAC_IMR_HRESP (0x1u << 11) /**< \brief (EMAC_IMR) Hresp not OK */
01774 #define EMAC_IMR_PFR (0x1u << 12) /**< \brief (EMAC_IMR) Pause Frame Received */
01775 #define EMAC_IMR_PTZ (0x1u << 13) /**< \brief (EMAC_IMR) Pause Time Zero */
01776 /* -------- EMAC_MAN : (EMAC Offset: 0x34) Phy Maintenance Register -------- */
01777 #define EMAC_MAN_DATA_Pos 0
01778 #define EMAC_MAN_DATA_Msk (0xffffu << EMAC_MAN_DATA_Pos) /**< \brief (EMAC_MAN)  */
01779 #define EMAC_MAN_DATA(value) ((EMAC_MAN_DATA_Msk & ((value) << EMAC_MAN_DATA_Pos)))
01780 #define EMAC_MAN_CODE_Pos 16
01781 #define EMAC_MAN_CODE_Msk (0x3u << EMAC_MAN_CODE_Pos) /**< \brief (EMAC_MAN)  */
01782 #define EMAC_MAN_CODE(value) ((EMAC_MAN_CODE_Msk & ((value) << EMAC_MAN_CODE_Pos)))
01783 #define EMAC_MAN_REGA_Pos 18
01784 #define EMAC_MAN_REGA_Msk (0x1fu << EMAC_MAN_REGA_Pos) /**< \brief (EMAC_MAN) Register Address */
01785 #define EMAC_MAN_REGA(value) ((EMAC_MAN_REGA_Msk & ((value) << EMAC_MAN_REGA_Pos)))
01786 #define EMAC_MAN_PHYA_Pos 23
01787 #define EMAC_MAN_PHYA_Msk (0x1fu << EMAC_MAN_PHYA_Pos) /**< \brief (EMAC_MAN) PHY Address */
01788 #define EMAC_MAN_PHYA(value) ((EMAC_MAN_PHYA_Msk & ((value) << EMAC_MAN_PHYA_Pos)))
01789 #define EMAC_MAN_RW_Pos 28
01790 #define EMAC_MAN_RW_Msk (0x3u << EMAC_MAN_RW_Pos) /**< \brief (EMAC_MAN) Read-write */
01791 #define EMAC_MAN_RW(value) ((EMAC_MAN_RW_Msk & ((value) << EMAC_MAN_RW_Pos)))
01792 #define EMAC_MAN_SOF_Pos 30
01793 #define EMAC_MAN_SOF_Msk (0x3u << EMAC_MAN_SOF_Pos) /**< \brief (EMAC_MAN) Start of frame */
01794 #define EMAC_MAN_SOF(value) ((EMAC_MAN_SOF_Msk & ((value) << EMAC_MAN_SOF_Pos)))
01795 /* -------- EMAC_PTR : (EMAC Offset: 0x38) Pause Time Register -------- */
01796 #define EMAC_PTR_PTIME_Pos 0
01797 #define EMAC_PTR_PTIME_Msk (0xffffu << EMAC_PTR_PTIME_Pos) /**< \brief (EMAC_PTR) Pause Time */
01798 #define EMAC_PTR_PTIME(value) ((EMAC_PTR_PTIME_Msk & ((value) << EMAC_PTR_PTIME_Pos)))
01799 /* -------- EMAC_PFR : (EMAC Offset: 0x3C) Pause Frames Received Register -------- */
01800 #define EMAC_PFR_FROK_Pos 0
01801 #define EMAC_PFR_FROK_Msk (0xffffu << EMAC_PFR_FROK_Pos) /**< \brief (EMAC_PFR) Pause Frames received OK */
01802 #define EMAC_PFR_FROK(value) ((EMAC_PFR_FROK_Msk & ((value) << EMAC_PFR_FROK_Pos)))
01803 /* -------- EMAC_FTO : (EMAC Offset: 0x40) Frames Transmitted Ok Register -------- */
01804 #define EMAC_FTO_FTOK_Pos 0
01805 #define EMAC_FTO_FTOK_Msk (0xffffffu << EMAC_FTO_FTOK_Pos) /**< \brief (EMAC_FTO) Frames Transmitted OK */
01806 #define EMAC_FTO_FTOK(value) ((EMAC_FTO_FTOK_Msk & ((value) << EMAC_FTO_FTOK_Pos)))
01807 /* -------- EMAC_SCF : (EMAC Offset: 0x44) Single Collision Frames Register -------- */
01808 #define EMAC_SCF_SCF_Pos 0
01809 #define EMAC_SCF_SCF_Msk (0xffffu << EMAC_SCF_SCF_Pos) /**< \brief (EMAC_SCF) Single Collision Frames */
01810 #define EMAC_SCF_SCF(value) ((EMAC_SCF_SCF_Msk & ((value) << EMAC_SCF_SCF_Pos)))
01811 /* -------- EMAC_MCF : (EMAC Offset: 0x48) Multiple Collision Frames Register -------- */
01812 #define EMAC_MCF_MCF_Pos 0
01813 #define EMAC_MCF_MCF_Msk (0xffffu << EMAC_MCF_MCF_Pos) /**< \brief (EMAC_MCF) Multicollision Frames */
01814 #define EMAC_MCF_MCF(value) ((EMAC_MCF_MCF_Msk & ((value) << EMAC_MCF_MCF_Pos)))
01815 /* -------- EMAC_FRO : (EMAC Offset: 0x4C) Frames Received Ok Register -------- */
01816 #define EMAC_FRO_FROK_Pos 0
01817 #define EMAC_FRO_FROK_Msk (0xffffffu << EMAC_FRO_FROK_Pos) /**< \brief (EMAC_FRO) Frames Received OK */
01818 #define EMAC_FRO_FROK(value) ((EMAC_FRO_FROK_Msk & ((value) << EMAC_FRO_FROK_Pos)))
01819 /* -------- EMAC_FCSE : (EMAC Offset: 0x50) Frame Check Sequence Errors Register -------- */
01820 #define EMAC_FCSE_FCSE_Pos 0
01821 #define EMAC_FCSE_FCSE_Msk (0xffu << EMAC_FCSE_FCSE_Pos) /**< \brief (EMAC_FCSE) Frame Check Sequence Errors */
01822 #define EMAC_FCSE_FCSE(value) ((EMAC_FCSE_FCSE_Msk & ((value) << EMAC_FCSE_FCSE_Pos)))
01823 /* -------- EMAC_ALE : (EMAC Offset: 0x54) Alignment Errors Register -------- */
01824 #define EMAC_ALE_ALE_Pos 0
01825 #define EMAC_ALE_ALE_Msk (0xffu << EMAC_ALE_ALE_Pos) /**< \brief (EMAC_ALE) Alignment Errors */
01826 #define EMAC_ALE_ALE(value) ((EMAC_ALE_ALE_Msk & ((value) << EMAC_ALE_ALE_Pos)))
01827 /* -------- EMAC_DTF : (EMAC Offset: 0x58) Deferred Transmission Frames Register -------- */
01828 #define EMAC_DTF_DTF_Pos 0
01829 #define EMAC_DTF_DTF_Msk (0xffffu << EMAC_DTF_DTF_Pos) /**< \brief (EMAC_DTF) Deferred Transmission Frames */
01830 #define EMAC_DTF_DTF(value) ((EMAC_DTF_DTF_Msk & ((value) << EMAC_DTF_DTF_Pos)))
01831 /* -------- EMAC_LCOL : (EMAC Offset: 0x5C) Late Collisions Register -------- */
01832 #define EMAC_LCOL_LCOL_Pos 0
01833 #define EMAC_LCOL_LCOL_Msk (0xffu << EMAC_LCOL_LCOL_Pos) /**< \brief (EMAC_LCOL) Late Collisions */
01834 #define EMAC_LCOL_LCOL(value) ((EMAC_LCOL_LCOL_Msk & ((value) << EMAC_LCOL_LCOL_Pos)))
01835 /* -------- EMAC_ECOL : (EMAC Offset: 0x60) Excessive Collisions Register -------- */
01836 #define EMAC_ECOL_EXCOL_Pos 0
01837 #define EMAC_ECOL_EXCOL_Msk (0xffu << EMAC_ECOL_EXCOL_Pos) /**< \brief (EMAC_ECOL) Excessive Collisions */
01838 #define EMAC_ECOL_EXCOL(value) ((EMAC_ECOL_EXCOL_Msk & ((value) << EMAC_ECOL_EXCOL_Pos)))
01839 /* -------- EMAC_TUND : (EMAC Offset: 0x64) Transmit Underrun Errors Register -------- */
01840 #define EMAC_TUND_TUND_Pos 0
01841 #define EMAC_TUND_TUND_Msk (0xffu << EMAC_TUND_TUND_Pos) /**< \brief (EMAC_TUND) Transmit Underruns */
01842 #define EMAC_TUND_TUND(value) ((EMAC_TUND_TUND_Msk & ((value) << EMAC_TUND_TUND_Pos)))
01843 /* -------- EMAC_CSE : (EMAC Offset: 0x68) Carrier Sense Errors Register -------- */
01844 #define EMAC_CSE_CSE_Pos 0
01845 #define EMAC_CSE_CSE_Msk (0xffu << EMAC_CSE_CSE_Pos) /**< \brief (EMAC_CSE) Carrier Sense Errors */
01846 #define EMAC_CSE_CSE(value) ((EMAC_CSE_CSE_Msk & ((value) << EMAC_CSE_CSE_Pos)))
01847 /* -------- EMAC_RRE : (EMAC Offset: 0x6C) Receive Resource Errors Register -------- */
01848 #define EMAC_RRE_RRE_Pos 0
01849 #define EMAC_RRE_RRE_Msk (0xffffu << EMAC_RRE_RRE_Pos) /**< \brief (EMAC_RRE) Receive Resource Errors */
01850 #define EMAC_RRE_RRE(value) ((EMAC_RRE_RRE_Msk & ((value) << EMAC_RRE_RRE_Pos)))
01851 /* -------- EMAC_ROV : (EMAC Offset: 0x70) Receive Overrun Errors Register -------- */
01852 #define EMAC_ROV_ROVR_Pos 0
01853 #define EMAC_ROV_ROVR_Msk (0xffu << EMAC_ROV_ROVR_Pos) /**< \brief (EMAC_ROV) Receive Overrun */
01854 #define EMAC_ROV_ROVR(value) ((EMAC_ROV_ROVR_Msk & ((value) << EMAC_ROV_ROVR_Pos)))
01855 /* -------- EMAC_RSE : (EMAC Offset: 0x74) Receive Symbol Errors Register -------- */
01856 #define EMAC_RSE_RSE_Pos 0
01857 #define EMAC_RSE_RSE_Msk (0xffu << EMAC_RSE_RSE_Pos) /**< \brief (EMAC_RSE) Receive Symbol Errors */
01858 #define EMAC_RSE_RSE(value) ((EMAC_RSE_RSE_Msk & ((value) << EMAC_RSE_RSE_Pos)))
01859 /* -------- EMAC_ELE : (EMAC Offset: 0x78) Excessive Length Errors Register -------- */
01860 #define EMAC_ELE_EXL_Pos 0
01861 #define EMAC_ELE_EXL_Msk (0xffu << EMAC_ELE_EXL_Pos) /**< \brief (EMAC_ELE) Excessive Length Errors */
01862 #define EMAC_ELE_EXL(value) ((EMAC_ELE_EXL_Msk & ((value) << EMAC_ELE_EXL_Pos)))
01863 /* -------- EMAC_RJA : (EMAC Offset: 0x7C) Receive Jabbers Register -------- */
01864 #define EMAC_RJA_RJB_Pos 0
01865 #define EMAC_RJA_RJB_Msk (0xffu << EMAC_RJA_RJB_Pos) /**< \brief (EMAC_RJA) Receive Jabbers */
01866 #define EMAC_RJA_RJB(value) ((EMAC_RJA_RJB_Msk & ((value) << EMAC_RJA_RJB_Pos)))
01867 /* -------- EMAC_USF : (EMAC Offset: 0x80) Undersize Frames Register -------- */
01868 #define EMAC_USF_USF_Pos 0
01869 #define EMAC_USF_USF_Msk (0xffu << EMAC_USF_USF_Pos) /**< \brief (EMAC_USF) Undersize frames */
01870 #define EMAC_USF_USF(value) ((EMAC_USF_USF_Msk & ((value) << EMAC_USF_USF_Pos)))
01871 /* -------- EMAC_STE : (EMAC Offset: 0x84) SQE Test Errors Register -------- */
01872 #define EMAC_STE_SQER_Pos 0
01873 #define EMAC_STE_SQER_Msk (0xffu << EMAC_STE_SQER_Pos) /**< \brief (EMAC_STE) SQE test errors */
01874 #define EMAC_STE_SQER(value) ((EMAC_STE_SQER_Msk & ((value) << EMAC_STE_SQER_Pos)))
01875 /* -------- EMAC_RLE : (EMAC Offset: 0x88) Received Length Field Mismatch Register -------- */
01876 #define EMAC_RLE_RLFM_Pos 0
01877 #define EMAC_RLE_RLFM_Msk (0xffu << EMAC_RLE_RLFM_Pos) /**< \brief (EMAC_RLE) Receive Length Field Mismatch */
01878 #define EMAC_RLE_RLFM(value) ((EMAC_RLE_RLFM_Msk & ((value) << EMAC_RLE_RLFM_Pos)))
01879 /* -------- EMAC_HRB : (EMAC Offset: 0x90) Hash Register Bottom [31:0] Register -------- */
01880 #define EMAC_HRB_ADDR_Pos 0
01881 #define EMAC_HRB_ADDR_Msk (0xffffffffu << EMAC_HRB_ADDR_Pos) /**< \brief (EMAC_HRB)  */
01882 #define EMAC_HRB_ADDR(value) ((EMAC_HRB_ADDR_Msk & ((value) << EMAC_HRB_ADDR_Pos)))
01883 /* -------- EMAC_HRT : (EMAC Offset: 0x94) Hash Register Top [63:32] Register -------- */
01884 #define EMAC_HRT_ADDR_Pos 0
01885 #define EMAC_HRT_ADDR_Msk (0xffffffffu << EMAC_HRT_ADDR_Pos) /**< \brief (EMAC_HRT)  */
01886 #define EMAC_HRT_ADDR(value) ((EMAC_HRT_ADDR_Msk & ((value) << EMAC_HRT_ADDR_Pos)))
01887 /* -------- EMAC_SAxB : (EMAC Offset: N/A) Specific Address 1 Bottom Register -------- */
01888 #define EMAC_SAxB_ADDR_Pos 0
01889 #define EMAC_SAxB_ADDR_Msk (0xffffffffu << EMAC_SAxB_ADDR_Pos) /**< \brief (EMAC_SAxB)  */
01890 #define EMAC_SAxB_ADDR(value) ((EMAC_SAxB_ADDR_Msk & ((value) << EMAC_SAxB_ADDR_Pos)))
01891 /* -------- EMAC_SAxT : (EMAC Offset: N/A) Specific Address 1 Top Register -------- */
01892 #define EMAC_SAxT_ADDR_Pos 0
01893 #define EMAC_SAxT_ADDR_Msk (0xffffu << EMAC_SAxT_ADDR_Pos) /**< \brief (EMAC_SAxT)  */
01894 #define EMAC_SAxT_ADDR(value) ((EMAC_SAxT_ADDR_Msk & ((value) << EMAC_SAxT_ADDR_Pos)))
01895 /* -------- EMAC_TID : (EMAC Offset: 0xB8) Type ID Checking Register -------- */
01896 #define EMAC_TID_TID_Pos 0
01897 #define EMAC_TID_TID_Msk (0xffffu << EMAC_TID_TID_Pos) /**< \brief (EMAC_TID) Type ID checking */
01898 #define EMAC_TID_TID(value) ((EMAC_TID_TID_Msk & ((value) << EMAC_TID_TID_Pos)))
01899 /* -------- EMAC_USRIO : (EMAC Offset: 0xC0) User Input/Output Register -------- */
01900 #define EMAC_USRIO_RMII (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (EMAC_USRIO) Reduce MII */
01901 #define EMAC_USRIO_CLKEN (0x1u << 1) /**< \brief (EMAC_USRIO) Clock Enable */
01902 
01903 /*@}*/
01904 
01905 /* ============================================================================= */
01906 /**  SOFTWARE API DEFINITION FOR General Purpose Backup Register */
01907 /* ============================================================================= */
01908 /** \addtogroup SAM3XA_GPBR General Purpose Backup Register */
01909 /*@{*/
01910 
01911 #ifndef __ASSEMBLY__
01912 /** \brief Gpbr hardware registers */
01913 typedef struct {
01914   RwReg SYS_GPBR0; /**< \brief (Gpbr Offset: 0x0) General Purpose Backup Register 0 */
01915   RwReg SYS_GPBR1; /**< \brief (Gpbr Offset: 0x4) General Purpose Backup Register 1 */
01916   RwReg SYS_GPBR2; /**< \brief (Gpbr Offset: 0x8) General Purpose Backup Register 2 */
01917   RwReg SYS_GPBR3; /**< \brief (Gpbr Offset: 0xC) General Purpose Backup Register 3 */
01918   RwReg SYS_GPBR4; /**< \brief (Gpbr Offset: 0x10) General Purpose Backup Register 4 */
01919   RwReg SYS_GPBR5; /**< \brief (Gpbr Offset: 0x14) General Purpose Backup Register 5 */
01920   RwReg SYS_GPBR6; /**< \brief (Gpbr Offset: 0x18) General Purpose Backup Register 6 */
01921   RwReg SYS_GPBR7; /**< \brief (Gpbr Offset: 0x1C) General Purpose Backup Register 7 */
01922 } Gpbr;
01923 #endif /* __ASSEMBLY__ */
01924 /* -------- SYS_GPBR0 : (GPBR Offset: 0x0) General Purpose Backup Register 0 -------- */
01925 #define SYS_GPBR0_GPBR_VALUE0_Pos 0
01926 #define SYS_GPBR0_GPBR_VALUE0_Msk (0xffffffffu << SYS_GPBR0_GPBR_VALUE0_Pos) /**< \brief (SYS_GPBR0) Value of GPBR x */
01927 #define SYS_GPBR0_GPBR_VALUE0(value) ((SYS_GPBR0_GPBR_VALUE0_Msk & ((value) << SYS_GPBR0_GPBR_VALUE0_Pos)))
01928 /* -------- SYS_GPBR1 : (GPBR Offset: 0x4) General Purpose Backup Register 1 -------- */
01929 #define SYS_GPBR1_GPBR_VALUE1_Pos 0
01930 #define SYS_GPBR1_GPBR_VALUE1_Msk (0xffffffffu << SYS_GPBR1_GPBR_VALUE1_Pos) /**< \brief (SYS_GPBR1) Value of GPBR x */
01931 #define SYS_GPBR1_GPBR_VALUE1(value) ((SYS_GPBR1_GPBR_VALUE1_Msk & ((value) << SYS_GPBR1_GPBR_VALUE1_Pos)))
01932 /* -------- SYS_GPBR2 : (GPBR Offset: 0x8) General Purpose Backup Register 2 -------- */
01933 #define SYS_GPBR2_GPBR_VALUE2_Pos 0
01934 #define SYS_GPBR2_GPBR_VALUE2_Msk (0xffffffffu << SYS_GPBR2_GPBR_VALUE2_Pos) /**< \brief (SYS_GPBR2) Value of GPBR x */
01935 #define SYS_GPBR2_GPBR_VALUE2(value) ((SYS_GPBR2_GPBR_VALUE2_Msk & ((value) << SYS_GPBR2_GPBR_VALUE2_Pos)))
01936 /* -------- SYS_GPBR3 : (GPBR Offset: 0xC) General Purpose Backup Register 3 -------- */
01937 #define SYS_GPBR3_GPBR_VALUE3_Pos 0
01938 #define SYS_GPBR3_GPBR_VALUE3_Msk (0xffffffffu << SYS_GPBR3_GPBR_VALUE3_Pos) /**< \brief (SYS_GPBR3) Value of GPBR x */
01939 #define SYS_GPBR3_GPBR_VALUE3(value) ((SYS_GPBR3_GPBR_VALUE3_Msk & ((value) << SYS_GPBR3_GPBR_VALUE3_Pos)))
01940 /* -------- SYS_GPBR4 : (GPBR Offset: 0x10) General Purpose Backup Register 4 -------- */
01941 #define SYS_GPBR4_GPBR_VALUE4_Pos 0
01942 #define SYS_GPBR4_GPBR_VALUE4_Msk (0xffffffffu << SYS_GPBR4_GPBR_VALUE4_Pos) /**< \brief (SYS_GPBR4) Value of GPBR x */
01943 #define SYS_GPBR4_GPBR_VALUE4(value) ((SYS_GPBR4_GPBR_VALUE4_Msk & ((value) << SYS_GPBR4_GPBR_VALUE4_Pos)))
01944 /* -------- SYS_GPBR5 : (GPBR Offset: 0x14) General Purpose Backup Register 5 -------- */
01945 #define SYS_GPBR5_GPBR_VALUE5_Pos 0
01946 #define SYS_GPBR5_GPBR_VALUE5_Msk (0xffffffffu << SYS_GPBR5_GPBR_VALUE5_Pos) /**< \brief (SYS_GPBR5) Value of GPBR x */
01947 #define SYS_GPBR5_GPBR_VALUE5(value) ((SYS_GPBR5_GPBR_VALUE5_Msk & ((value) << SYS_GPBR5_GPBR_VALUE5_Pos)))
01948 /* -------- SYS_GPBR6 : (GPBR Offset: 0x18) General Purpose Backup Register 6 -------- */
01949 #define SYS_GPBR6_GPBR_VALUE6_Pos 0
01950 #define SYS_GPBR6_GPBR_VALUE6_Msk (0xffffffffu << SYS_GPBR6_GPBR_VALUE6_Pos) /**< \brief (SYS_GPBR6) Value of GPBR x */
01951 #define SYS_GPBR6_GPBR_VALUE6(value) ((SYS_GPBR6_GPBR_VALUE6_Msk & ((value) << SYS_GPBR6_GPBR_VALUE6_Pos)))
01952 /* -------- SYS_GPBR7 : (GPBR Offset: 0x1C) General Purpose Backup Register 7 -------- */
01953 #define SYS_GPBR7_GPBR_VALUE7_Pos 0
01954 #define SYS_GPBR7_GPBR_VALUE7_Msk (0xffffffffu << SYS_GPBR7_GPBR_VALUE7_Pos) /**< \brief (SYS_GPBR7) Value of GPBR x */
01955 #define SYS_GPBR7_GPBR_VALUE7(value) ((SYS_GPBR7_GPBR_VALUE7_Msk & ((value) << SYS_GPBR7_GPBR_VALUE7_Pos)))
01956 
01957 /*@}*/
01958 
01959 /* ============================================================================= */
01960 /**  SOFTWARE API DEFINITION FOR High Speed MultiMedia Card Interface */
01961 /* ============================================================================= */
01962 /** \addtogroup SAM3XA_HSMCI High Speed MultiMedia Card Interface */
01963 /*@{*/
01964 
01965 #ifndef __ASSEMBLY__
01966 /** \brief Hsmci hardware registers */
01967 typedef struct {
01968   WoReg HSMCI_CR;        /**< \brief (Hsmci Offset: 0x00) Control Register */
01969   RwReg HSMCI_MR;        /**< \brief (Hsmci Offset: 0x04) Mode Register */
01970   RwReg HSMCI_DTOR;      /**< \brief (Hsmci Offset: 0x08) Data Timeout Register */
01971   RwReg HSMCI_SDCR;      /**< \brief (Hsmci Offset: 0x0C) SD/SDIO Card Register */
01972   RwReg HSMCI_ARGR;      /**< \brief (Hsmci Offset: 0x10) Argument Register */
01973   WoReg HSMCI_CMDR;      /**< \brief (Hsmci Offset: 0x14) Command Register */
01974   RwReg HSMCI_BLKR;      /**< \brief (Hsmci Offset: 0x18) Block Register */
01975   RwReg HSMCI_CSTOR;     /**< \brief (Hsmci Offset: 0x1C) Completion Signal Timeout Register */
01976   RoReg HSMCI_RSPR[4];   /**< \brief (Hsmci Offset: 0x20) Response Register */
01977   RoReg HSMCI_RDR;       /**< \brief (Hsmci Offset: 0x30) Receive Data Register */
01978   WoReg HSMCI_TDR;       /**< \brief (Hsmci Offset: 0x34) Transmit Data Register */
01979   RoReg Reserved1[2];
01980   RoReg HSMCI_SR;        /**< \brief (Hsmci Offset: 0x40) Status Register */
01981   WoReg HSMCI_IER;       /**< \brief (Hsmci Offset: 0x44) Interrupt Enable Register */
01982   WoReg HSMCI_IDR;       /**< \brief (Hsmci Offset: 0x48) Interrupt Disable Register */
01983   RoReg HSMCI_IMR;       /**< \brief (Hsmci Offset: 0x4C) Interrupt Mask Register */
01984   RwReg HSMCI_DMA;       /**< \brief (Hsmci Offset: 0x50) DMA Configuration Register */
01985   RwReg HSMCI_CFG;       /**< \brief (Hsmci Offset: 0x54) Configuration Register */
01986   RoReg Reserved2[35];
01987   RwReg HSMCI_WPMR;      /**< \brief (Hsmci Offset: 0xE4) Write Protection Mode Register */
01988   RoReg HSMCI_WPSR;      /**< \brief (Hsmci Offset: 0xE8) Write Protection Status Register */
01989   RoReg Reserved3[69];
01990   RwReg HSMCI_FIFO[256]; /**< \brief (Hsmci Offset: 0x200) FIFO Memory Aperture0 */
01991 } Hsmci;
01992 #endif /* __ASSEMBLY__ */
01993 /* -------- HSMCI_CR : (HSMCI Offset: 0x00) Control Register -------- */
01994 #define HSMCI_CR_MCIEN (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (HSMCI_CR) Multi-Media Interface Enable */
01995 #define HSMCI_CR_MCIDIS (0x1u << 1) /**< \brief (HSMCI_CR) Multi-Media Interface Disable */
01996 #define HSMCI_CR_PWSEN (0x1u << 2) /**< \brief (HSMCI_CR) Power Save Mode Enable */
01997 #define HSMCI_CR_PWSDIS (0x1u << 3) /**< \brief (HSMCI_CR) Power Save Mode Disable */
01998 #define HSMCI_CR_SWRST (0x1u << 7) /**< \brief (HSMCI_CR) Software Reset */
01999 /* -------- HSMCI_MR : (HSMCI Offset: 0x04) Mode Register -------- */
02000 #define HSMCI_MR_CLKDIV_Pos 0
02001 #define HSMCI_MR_CLKDIV_Msk (0xffu << HSMCI_MR_CLKDIV_Pos) /**< \brief (HSMCI_MR) Clock Divider */
02002 #define HSMCI_MR_CLKDIV(value) ((HSMCI_MR_CLKDIV_Msk & ((value) << HSMCI_MR_CLKDIV_Pos)))
02003 #define HSMCI_MR_PWSDIV_Pos 8
02004 #define HSMCI_MR_PWSDIV_Msk (0x7u << HSMCI_MR_PWSDIV_Pos) /**< \brief (HSMCI_MR) Power Saving Divider */
02005 #define HSMCI_MR_PWSDIV(value) ((HSMCI_MR_PWSDIV_Msk & ((value) << HSMCI_MR_PWSDIV_Pos)))
02006 #define HSMCI_MR_RDPROOF (0x1u << 11) /**< \brief (HSMCI_MR)  */
02007 #define HSMCI_MR_WRPROOF (0x1u << 12) /**< \brief (HSMCI_MR)  */
02008 #define HSMCI_MR_FBYTE (0x1u << 13) /**< \brief (HSMCI_MR) Force Byte Transfer */
02009 #define HSMCI_MR_PADV (0x1u << 14) /**< \brief (HSMCI_MR) Padding Value */
02010 #define HSMCI_MR_BLKLEN_Pos 16
02011 #define HSMCI_MR_BLKLEN_Msk (0xffffu << HSMCI_MR_BLKLEN_Pos) /**< \brief (HSMCI_MR) Data Block Length */
02012 #define HSMCI_MR_BLKLEN(value) ((HSMCI_MR_BLKLEN_Msk & ((value) << HSMCI_MR_BLKLEN_Pos)))
02013 /* -------- HSMCI_DTOR : (HSMCI Offset: 0x08) Data Timeout Register -------- */
02014 #define HSMCI_DTOR_DTOCYC_Pos 0
02015 #define HSMCI_DTOR_DTOCYC_Msk (0xfu << HSMCI_DTOR_DTOCYC_Pos) /**< \brief (HSMCI_DTOR) Data Timeout Cycle Number */
02016 #define HSMCI_DTOR_DTOCYC(value) ((HSMCI_DTOR_DTOCYC_Msk & ((value) << HSMCI_DTOR_DTOCYC_Pos)))
02017 #define HSMCI_DTOR_DTOMUL_Pos 4
02018 #define HSMCI_DTOR_DTOMUL_Msk (0x7u << HSMCI_DTOR_DTOMUL_Pos) /**< \brief (HSMCI_DTOR) Data Timeout Multiplier */
02019 #define   HSMCI_DTOR_DTOMUL_1 (0x0u << 4) /**< \brief (HSMCI_DTOR) DTOCYC */
02020 #define   HSMCI_DTOR_DTOMUL_16 (0x1u << 4) /**< \brief (HSMCI_DTOR) DTOCYC x 16 */
02021 #define   HSMCI_DTOR_DTOMUL_128 (0x2u << 4) /**< \brief (HSMCI_DTOR) DTOCYC x 128 */
02022 #define   HSMCI_DTOR_DTOMUL_256 (0x3u << 4) /**< \brief (HSMCI_DTOR) DTOCYC x 256 */
02023 #define   HSMCI_DTOR_DTOMUL_1024 (0x4u << 4) /**< \brief (HSMCI_DTOR) DTOCYC x 1024 */
02024 #define   HSMCI_DTOR_DTOMUL_4096 (0x5u << 4) /**< \brief (HSMCI_DTOR) DTOCYC x 4096 */
02025 #define   HSMCI_DTOR_DTOMUL_65536 (0x6u << 4) /**< \brief (HSMCI_DTOR) DTOCYC x 65536 */
02026 #define   HSMCI_DTOR_DTOMUL_1048576 (0x7u << 4) /**< \brief (HSMCI_DTOR) DTOCYC x 1048576 */
02027 /* -------- HSMCI_SDCR : (HSMCI Offset: 0x0C) SD/SDIO Card Register -------- */
02028 #define HSMCI_SDCR_SDCSEL_Pos 0
02029 #define HSMCI_SDCR_SDCSEL_Msk (0x3u << HSMCI_SDCR_SDCSEL_Pos) /**< \brief (HSMCI_SDCR) SDCard/SDIO Slot */
02030 #define   HSMCI_SDCR_SDCSEL_SLOTA (0x0u << 0) /**< \brief (HSMCI_SDCR) Slot A is selected. */
02031 #define   HSMCI_SDCR_SDCSEL_SLOTB (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (HSMCI_SDCR) SDCARD/SDIO Slot B selected */
02032 #define   HSMCI_SDCR_SDCSEL_SLOTC (0x2u << 0) /**< \brief (HSMCI_SDCR) - */
02033 #define   HSMCI_SDCR_SDCSEL_SLOTD (0x3u << 0) /**< \brief (HSMCI_SDCR) - */
02034 #define HSMCI_SDCR_SDCBUS_Pos 6
02035 #define HSMCI_SDCR_SDCBUS_Msk (0x3u << HSMCI_SDCR_SDCBUS_Pos) /**< \brief (HSMCI_SDCR) SDCard/SDIO Bus Width */
02036 #define   HSMCI_SDCR_SDCBUS_1 (0x0u << 6) /**< \brief (HSMCI_SDCR) 1 bit */
02037 #define   HSMCI_SDCR_SDCBUS_4 (0x2u << 6) /**< \brief (HSMCI_SDCR) 4 bit */
02038 #define   HSMCI_SDCR_SDCBUS_8 (0x3u << 6) /**< \brief (HSMCI_SDCR) 8 bit */
02039 /* -------- HSMCI_ARGR : (HSMCI Offset: 0x10) Argument Register -------- */
02040 #define HSMCI_ARGR_ARG_Pos 0
02041 #define HSMCI_ARGR_ARG_Msk (0xffffffffu << HSMCI_ARGR_ARG_Pos) /**< \brief (HSMCI_ARGR) Command Argument */
02042 #define HSMCI_ARGR_ARG(value) ((HSMCI_ARGR_ARG_Msk & ((value) << HSMCI_ARGR_ARG_Pos)))
02043 /* -------- HSMCI_CMDR : (HSMCI Offset: 0x14) Command Register -------- */
02044 #define HSMCI_CMDR_CMDNB_Pos 0
02045 #define HSMCI_CMDR_CMDNB_Msk (0x3fu << HSMCI_CMDR_CMDNB_Pos) /**< \brief (HSMCI_CMDR) Command Number */
02046 #define HSMCI_CMDR_CMDNB(value) ((HSMCI_CMDR_CMDNB_Msk & ((value) << HSMCI_CMDR_CMDNB_Pos)))
02047 #define HSMCI_CMDR_RSPTYP_Pos 6
02048 #define HSMCI_CMDR_RSPTYP_Msk (0x3u << HSMCI_CMDR_RSPTYP_Pos) /**< \brief (HSMCI_CMDR) Response Type */
02049 #define   HSMCI_CMDR_RSPTYP_NORESP (0x0u << 6) /**< \brief (HSMCI_CMDR) No response. */
02050 #define   HSMCI_CMDR_RSPTYP_48_BIT (0x1u << 6) /**< \brief (HSMCI_CMDR) 48-bit response. */
02051 #define   HSMCI_CMDR_RSPTYP_136_BIT (0x2u << 6) /**< \brief (HSMCI_CMDR) 136-bit response. */
02052 #define   HSMCI_CMDR_RSPTYP_R1B (0x3u << 6) /**< \brief (HSMCI_CMDR) R1b response type */
02053 #define HSMCI_CMDR_SPCMD_Pos 8
02054 #define HSMCI_CMDR_SPCMD_Msk (0x7u << HSMCI_CMDR_SPCMD_Pos) /**< \brief (HSMCI_CMDR) Special Command */
02055 #define   HSMCI_CMDR_SPCMD_STD (0x0u << 8) /**< \brief (HSMCI_CMDR) Not a special CMD. */
02056 #define   HSMCI_CMDR_SPCMD_INIT (0x1u << 8) /**< \brief (HSMCI_CMDR) Initialization CMD: 74 clock cycles for initialization sequence. */
02057 #define   HSMCI_CMDR_SPCMD_SYNC (0x2u << 8) /**< \brief (HSMCI_CMDR) Synchronized CMD: Wait for the end of the current data block transfer before sending the pending command. */
02058 #define   HSMCI_CMDR_SPCMD_CE_ATA (0x3u << 8) /**< \brief (HSMCI_CMDR) CE-ATA Completion Signal disable Command. The host cancels the ability for the device to return a command completion signal on the command line. */
02059 #define   HSMCI_CMDR_SPCMD_IT_CMD (0x4u << 8) /**< \brief (HSMCI_CMDR) Interrupt command: Corresponds to the Interrupt Mode (CMD40). */
02060 #define   HSMCI_CMDR_SPCMD_IT_RESP (0x5u << 8) /**< \brief (HSMCI_CMDR) Interrupt response: Corresponds to the Interrupt Mode (CMD40). */
02061 #define   HSMCI_CMDR_SPCMD_BOR (0x6u << 8) /**< \brief (HSMCI_CMDR) Boot Operation Request. Start a boot operation mode, the host processor can read boot data from the MMC device directly. */
02062 #define   HSMCI_CMDR_SPCMD_EBO (0x7u << 8) /**< \brief (HSMCI_CMDR) End Boot Operation. This command allows the host processor to terminate the boot operation mode. */
02063 #define HSMCI_CMDR_OPDCMD (0x1u << 11) /**< \brief (HSMCI_CMDR) Open Drain Command */
02064 #define   HSMCI_CMDR_OPDCMD_PUSHPULL (0x0u << 11) /**< \brief (HSMCI_CMDR) Push pull command. */
02065 #define   HSMCI_CMDR_OPDCMD_OPENDRAIN (0x1u << 11) /**< \brief (HSMCI_CMDR) Open drain command. */
02066 #define HSMCI_CMDR_MAXLAT (0x1u << 12) /**< \brief (HSMCI_CMDR) Max Latency for Command to Response */
02067 #define   HSMCI_CMDR_MAXLAT_5 (0x0u << 12) /**< \brief (HSMCI_CMDR) 5-cycle max latency. */
02068 #define   HSMCI_CMDR_MAXLAT_64 (0x1u << 12) /**< \brief (HSMCI_CMDR) 64-cycle max latency. */
02069 #define HSMCI_CMDR_TRCMD_Pos 16
02070 #define HSMCI_CMDR_TRCMD_Msk (0x3u << HSMCI_CMDR_TRCMD_Pos) /**< \brief (HSMCI_CMDR) Transfer Command */
02071 #define   HSMCI_CMDR_TRCMD_NO_DATA (0x0u << 16) /**< \brief (HSMCI_CMDR) No data transfer */
02072 #define   HSMCI_CMDR_TRCMD_START_DATA (0x1u << 16) /**< \brief (HSMCI_CMDR) Start data transfer */
02073 #define   HSMCI_CMDR_TRCMD_STOP_DATA (0x2u << 16) /**< \brief (HSMCI_CMDR) Stop data transfer */
02074 #define HSMCI_CMDR_TRDIR (0x1u << 18) /**< \brief (HSMCI_CMDR) Transfer Direction */
02075 #define   HSMCI_CMDR_TRDIR_WRITE (0x0u << 18) /**< \brief (HSMCI_CMDR) Write. */
02076 #define   HSMCI_CMDR_TRDIR_READ (0x1u << 18) /**< \brief (HSMCI_CMDR) Read. */
02077 #define HSMCI_CMDR_TRTYP_Pos 19
02078 #define HSMCI_CMDR_TRTYP_Msk (0x7u << HSMCI_CMDR_TRTYP_Pos) /**< \brief (HSMCI_CMDR) Transfer Type */
02079 #define   HSMCI_CMDR_TRTYP_SINGLE (0x0u << 19) /**< \brief (HSMCI_CMDR) MMC/SDCard Single Block */
02080 #define   HSMCI_CMDR_TRTYP_MULTIPLE (0x1u << 19) /**< \brief (HSMCI_CMDR) MMC/SDCard Multiple Block */
02081 #define   HSMCI_CMDR_TRTYP_STREAM (0x2u << 19) /**< \brief (HSMCI_CMDR) MMC Stream */
02082 #define   HSMCI_CMDR_TRTYP_BYTE (0x4u << 19) /**< \brief (HSMCI_CMDR) SDIO Byte */
02083 #define   HSMCI_CMDR_TRTYP_BLOCK (0x5u << 19) /**< \brief (HSMCI_CMDR) SDIO Block */
02084 #define HSMCI_CMDR_IOSPCMD_Pos 24
02085 #define HSMCI_CMDR_IOSPCMD_Msk (0x3u << HSMCI_CMDR_IOSPCMD_Pos) /**< \brief (HSMCI_CMDR) SDIO Special Command */
02086 #define   HSMCI_CMDR_IOSPCMD_STD (0x0u << 24) /**< \brief (HSMCI_CMDR) Not an SDIO Special Command */
02087 #define   HSMCI_CMDR_IOSPCMD_SUSPEND (0x1u << 24) /**< \brief (HSMCI_CMDR) SDIO Suspend Command */
02088 #define   HSMCI_CMDR_IOSPCMD_RESUME (0x2u << 24) /**< \brief (HSMCI_CMDR) SDIO Resume Command */
02089 #define HSMCI_CMDR_ATACS (0x1u << 26) /**< \brief (HSMCI_CMDR) ATA with Command Completion Signal */
02090 #define   HSMCI_CMDR_ATACS_NORMAL (0x0u << 26) /**< \brief (HSMCI_CMDR) Normal operation mode. */
02091 #define   HSMCI_CMDR_ATACS_COMPLETION (0x1u << 26) /**< \brief (HSMCI_CMDR) This bit indicates that a completion signal is expected within a programmed amount of time (HSMCI_CSTOR). */
02092 #define HSMCI_CMDR_BOOT_ACK (0x1u << 27) /**< \brief (HSMCI_CMDR) Boot Operation Acknowledge. */
02093 /* -------- HSMCI_BLKR : (HSMCI Offset: 0x18) Block Register -------- */
02094 #define HSMCI_BLKR_BCNT_Pos 0
02095 #define HSMCI_BLKR_BCNT_Msk (0xffffu << HSMCI_BLKR_BCNT_Pos) /**< \brief (HSMCI_BLKR) MMC/SDIO Block Count - SDIO Byte Count */
02096 #define   HSMCI_BLKR_BCNT_MULTIPLE (0x0u << 0) /**< \brief (HSMCI_BLKR) MMC/SDCARD Multiple BlockFrom 1 to 65635: Value 0 corresponds to an infinite block transfer. */
02097 #define   HSMCI_BLKR_BCNT_BYTE (0x4u << 0) /**< \brief (HSMCI_BLKR) SDIO ByteFrom 1 to 512 bytes: Value 0 corresponds to a 512-byte transfer.Values from 0x200 to 0xFFFF are forbidden. */
02098 #define   HSMCI_BLKR_BCNT_BLOCK (0x5u << 0) /**< \brief (HSMCI_BLKR) SDIO BlockFrom 1 to 511 blocks: Value 0 corresponds to an infinite block transfer.Values from 0x200 to 0xFFFF are forbidden. */
02099 #define HSMCI_BLKR_BLKLEN_Pos 16
02100 #define HSMCI_BLKR_BLKLEN_Msk (0xffffu << HSMCI_BLKR_BLKLEN_Pos) /**< \brief (HSMCI_BLKR) Data Block Length */
02101 #define HSMCI_BLKR_BLKLEN(value) ((HSMCI_BLKR_BLKLEN_Msk & ((value) << HSMCI_BLKR_BLKLEN_Pos)))
02102 /* -------- HSMCI_CSTOR : (HSMCI Offset: 0x1C) Completion Signal Timeout Register -------- */
02103 #define HSMCI_CSTOR_CSTOCYC_Pos 0
02104 #define HSMCI_CSTOR_CSTOCYC_Msk (0xfu << HSMCI_CSTOR_CSTOCYC_Pos) /**< \brief (HSMCI_CSTOR) Completion Signal Timeout Cycle Number */
02105 #define HSMCI_CSTOR_CSTOCYC(value) ((HSMCI_CSTOR_CSTOCYC_Msk & ((value) << HSMCI_CSTOR_CSTOCYC_Pos)))
02106 #define HSMCI_CSTOR_CSTOMUL_Pos 4
02107 #define HSMCI_CSTOR_CSTOMUL_Msk (0x7u << HSMCI_CSTOR_CSTOMUL_Pos) /**< \brief (HSMCI_CSTOR) Completion Signal Timeout Multiplier */
02108 #define   HSMCI_CSTOR_CSTOMUL_1 (0x0u << 4) /**< \brief (HSMCI_CSTOR) CSTOCYC x 1 */
02109 #define   HSMCI_CSTOR_CSTOMUL_16 (0x1u << 4) /**< \brief (HSMCI_CSTOR) CSTOCYC x 16 */
02110 #define   HSMCI_CSTOR_CSTOMUL_128 (0x2u << 4) /**< \brief (HSMCI_CSTOR) CSTOCYC x 128 */
02111 #define   HSMCI_CSTOR_CSTOMUL_256 (0x3u << 4) /**< \brief (HSMCI_CSTOR) CSTOCYC x 256 */
02112 #define   HSMCI_CSTOR_CSTOMUL_1024 (0x4u << 4) /**< \brief (HSMCI_CSTOR) CSTOCYC x 1024 */
02113 #define   HSMCI_CSTOR_CSTOMUL_4096 (0x5u << 4) /**< \brief (HSMCI_CSTOR) CSTOCYC x 4096 */
02114 #define   HSMCI_CSTOR_CSTOMUL_65536 (0x6u << 4) /**< \brief (HSMCI_CSTOR) CSTOCYC x 65536 */
02115 #define   HSMCI_CSTOR_CSTOMUL_1048576 (0x7u << 4) /**< \brief (HSMCI_CSTOR) CSTOCYC x 1048576 */
02116 /* -------- HSMCI_RSPR[4] : (HSMCI Offset: 0x20) Response Register -------- */
02117 #define HSMCI_RSPR_RSP_Pos 0
02118 #define HSMCI_RSPR_RSP_Msk (0xffffffffu << HSMCI_RSPR_RSP_Pos) /**< \brief (HSMCI_RSPR[4]) Response */
02119 /* -------- HSMCI_RDR : (HSMCI Offset: 0x30) Receive Data Register -------- */
02120 #define HSMCI_RDR_DATA_Pos 0
02121 #define HSMCI_RDR_DATA_Msk (0xffffffffu << HSMCI_RDR_DATA_Pos) /**< \brief (HSMCI_RDR) Data to Read */
02122 /* -------- HSMCI_TDR : (HSMCI Offset: 0x34) Transmit Data Register -------- */
02123 #define HSMCI_TDR_DATA_Pos 0
02124 #define HSMCI_TDR_DATA_Msk (0xffffffffu << HSMCI_TDR_DATA_Pos) /**< \brief (HSMCI_TDR) Data to Write */
02125 #define HSMCI_TDR_DATA(value) ((HSMCI_TDR_DATA_Msk & ((value) << HSMCI_TDR_DATA_Pos)))
02126 /* -------- HSMCI_SR : (HSMCI Offset: 0x40) Status Register -------- */
02127 #define HSMCI_SR_CMDRDY (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (HSMCI_SR) Command Ready */
02128 #define HSMCI_SR_RXRDY (0x1u << 1) /**< \brief (HSMCI_SR) Receiver Ready */
02129 #define HSMCI_SR_TXRDY (0x1u << 2) /**< \brief (HSMCI_SR) Transmit Ready */
02130 #define HSMCI_SR_BLKE (0x1u << 3) /**< \brief (HSMCI_SR) Data Block Ended */
02131 #define HSMCI_SR_DTIP (0x1u << 4) /**< \brief (HSMCI_SR) Data Transfer in Progress */
02132 #define HSMCI_SR_NOTBUSY (0x1u << 5) /**< \brief (HSMCI_SR) HSMCI Not Busy */
02133 #define HSMCI_SR_SDIOIRQforSlotA (0x1u << 8) /**< \brief (HSMCI_SR)  */
02134 #define HSMCI_SR_SDIOIRQforSlotB (0x1u << 9) /**< \brief (HSMCI_SR)  */
02135 #define HSMCI_SR_SDIOWAIT (0x1u << 12) /**< \brief (HSMCI_SR) SDIO Read Wait Operation Status */
02136 #define HSMCI_SR_CSRCV (0x1u << 13) /**< \brief (HSMCI_SR) CE-ATA Completion Signal Received */
02137 #define HSMCI_SR_RINDE (0x1u << 16) /**< \brief (HSMCI_SR) Response Index Error */
02138 #define HSMCI_SR_RDIRE (0x1u << 17) /**< \brief (HSMCI_SR) Response Direction Error */
02139 #define HSMCI_SR_RCRCE (0x1u << 18) /**< \brief (HSMCI_SR) Response CRC Error */
02140 #define HSMCI_SR_RENDE (0x1u << 19) /**< \brief (HSMCI_SR) Response End Bit Error */
02141 #define HSMCI_SR_RTOE (0x1u << 20) /**< \brief (HSMCI_SR) Response Time-out Error */
02142 #define HSMCI_SR_DCRCE (0x1u << 21) /**< \brief (HSMCI_SR) Data CRC Error */
02143 #define HSMCI_SR_DTOE (0x1u << 22) /**< \brief (HSMCI_SR) Data Time-out Error */
02144 #define HSMCI_SR_CSTOE (0x1u << 23) /**< \brief (HSMCI_SR) Completion Signal Time-out Error */
02145 #define HSMCI_SR_BLKOVRE (0x1u << 24) /**< \brief (HSMCI_SR) DMA Block Overrun Error */
02146 #define HSMCI_SR_DMADONE (0x1u << 25) /**< \brief (HSMCI_SR) DMA Transfer done */
02147 #define HSMCI_SR_FIFOEMPTY (0x1u << 26) /**< \brief (HSMCI_SR) FIFO empty flag */
02148 #define HSMCI_SR_XFRDONE (0x1u << 27) /**< \brief (HSMCI_SR) Transfer Done flag */
02149 #define HSMCI_SR_ACKRCV (0x1u << 28) /**< \brief (HSMCI_SR) Boot Operation Acknowledge Received */
02150 #define HSMCI_SR_ACKRCVE (0x1u << 29) /**< \brief (HSMCI_SR) Boot Operation Acknowledge Error */
02151 #define HSMCI_SR_OVRE (0x1u << 30) /**< \brief (HSMCI_SR) Overrun */
02152 #define HSMCI_SR_UNRE (0x1u << 31) /**< \brief (HSMCI_SR) Underrun */
02153 /* -------- HSMCI_IER : (HSMCI Offset: 0x44) Interrupt Enable Register -------- */
02154 #define HSMCI_IER_CMDRDY (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (HSMCI_IER) Command Ready Interrupt Enable */
02155 #define HSMCI_IER_RXRDY (0x1u << 1) /**< \brief (HSMCI_IER) Receiver Ready Interrupt Enable */
02156 #define HSMCI_IER_TXRDY (0x1u << 2) /**< \brief (HSMCI_IER) Transmit Ready Interrupt Enable */
02157 #define HSMCI_IER_BLKE (0x1u << 3) /**< \brief (HSMCI_IER) Data Block Ended Interrupt Enable */
02158 #define HSMCI_IER_DTIP (0x1u << 4) /**< \brief (HSMCI_IER) Data Transfer in Progress Interrupt Enable */
02159 #define HSMCI_IER_NOTBUSY (0x1u << 5) /**< \brief (HSMCI_IER) Data Not Busy Interrupt Enable */
02160 #define HSMCI_IER_SDIOIRQforSlotA (0x1u << 8) /**< \brief (HSMCI_IER)  */
02161 #define HSMCI_IER_SDIOIRQforSlotB (0x1u << 9) /**< \brief (HSMCI_IER)  */
02162 #define HSMCI_IER_SDIOWAIT (0x1u << 12) /**< \brief (HSMCI_IER) SDIO Read Wait Operation Status Interrupt Enable */
02163 #define HSMCI_IER_CSRCV (0x1u << 13) /**< \brief (HSMCI_IER) Completion Signal Received Interrupt Enable */
02164 #define HSMCI_IER_RINDE (0x1u << 16) /**< \brief (HSMCI_IER) Response Index Error Interrupt Enable */
02165 #define HSMCI_IER_RDIRE (0x1u << 17) /**< \brief (HSMCI_IER) Response Direction Error Interrupt Enable */
02166 #define HSMCI_IER_RCRCE (0x1u << 18) /**< \brief (HSMCI_IER) Response CRC Error Interrupt Enable */
02167 #define HSMCI_IER_RENDE (0x1u << 19) /**< \brief (HSMCI_IER) Response End Bit Error Interrupt Enable */
02168 #define HSMCI_IER_RTOE (0x1u << 20) /**< \brief (HSMCI_IER) Response Time-out Error Interrupt Enable */
02169 #define HSMCI_IER_DCRCE (0x1u << 21) /**< \brief (HSMCI_IER) Data CRC Error Interrupt Enable */
02170 #define HSMCI_IER_DTOE (0x1u << 22) /**< \brief (HSMCI_IER) Data Time-out Error Interrupt Enable */
02171 #define HSMCI_IER_CSTOE (0x1u << 23) /**< \brief (HSMCI_IER) Completion Signal Timeout Error Interrupt Enable */
02172 #define HSMCI_IER_BLKOVRE (0x1u << 24) /**< \brief (HSMCI_IER) DMA Block Overrun Error Interrupt Enable */
02173 #define HSMCI_IER_DMADONE (0x1u << 25) /**< \brief (HSMCI_IER) DMA Transfer completed Interrupt Enable */
02174 #define HSMCI_IER_FIFOEMPTY (0x1u << 26) /**< \brief (HSMCI_IER) FIFO empty Interrupt enable */
02175 #define HSMCI_IER_XFRDONE (0x1u << 27) /**< \brief (HSMCI_IER) Transfer Done Interrupt enable */
02176 #define HSMCI_IER_ACKRCV (0x1u << 28) /**< \brief (HSMCI_IER) Boot Acknowledge Interrupt Enable */
02177 #define HSMCI_IER_ACKRCVE (0x1u << 29) /**< \brief (HSMCI_IER) Boot Acknowledge Error Interrupt Enable */
02178 #define HSMCI_IER_OVRE (0x1u << 30) /**< \brief (HSMCI_IER) Overrun Interrupt Enable */
02179 #define HSMCI_IER_UNRE (0x1u << 31) /**< \brief (HSMCI_IER) Underrun Interrupt Enable */
02180 /* -------- HSMCI_IDR : (HSMCI Offset: 0x48) Interrupt Disable Register -------- */
02181 #define HSMCI_IDR_CMDRDY (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (HSMCI_IDR) Command Ready Interrupt Disable */
02182 #define HSMCI_IDR_RXRDY (0x1u << 1) /**< \brief (HSMCI_IDR) Receiver Ready Interrupt Disable */
02183 #define HSMCI_IDR_TXRDY (0x1u << 2) /**< \brief (HSMCI_IDR) Transmit Ready Interrupt Disable */
02184 #define HSMCI_IDR_BLKE (0x1u << 3) /**< \brief (HSMCI_IDR) Data Block Ended Interrupt Disable */
02185 #define HSMCI_IDR_DTIP (0x1u << 4) /**< \brief (HSMCI_IDR) Data Transfer in Progress Interrupt Disable */
02186 #define HSMCI_IDR_NOTBUSY (0x1u << 5) /**< \brief (HSMCI_IDR) Data Not Busy Interrupt Disable */
02187 #define HSMCI_IDR_SDIOIRQforSlotA (0x1u << 8) /**< \brief (HSMCI_IDR)  */
02188 #define HSMCI_IDR_SDIOIRQforSlotB (0x1u << 9) /**< \brief (HSMCI_IDR)  */
02189 #define HSMCI_IDR_SDIOWAIT (0x1u << 12) /**< \brief (HSMCI_IDR) SDIO Read Wait Operation Status Interrupt Disable */
02190 #define HSMCI_IDR_CSRCV (0x1u << 13) /**< \brief (HSMCI_IDR) Completion Signal received interrupt Disable */
02191 #define HSMCI_IDR_RINDE (0x1u << 16) /**< \brief (HSMCI_IDR) Response Index Error Interrupt Disable */
02192 #define HSMCI_IDR_RDIRE (0x1u << 17) /**< \brief (HSMCI_IDR) Response Direction Error Interrupt Disable */
02193 #define HSMCI_IDR_RCRCE (0x1u << 18) /**< \brief (HSMCI_IDR) Response CRC Error Interrupt Disable */
02194 #define HSMCI_IDR_RENDE (0x1u << 19) /**< \brief (HSMCI_IDR) Response End Bit Error Interrupt Disable */
02195 #define HSMCI_IDR_RTOE (0x1u << 20) /**< \brief (HSMCI_IDR) Response Time-out Error Interrupt Disable */
02196 #define HSMCI_IDR_DCRCE (0x1u << 21) /**< \brief (HSMCI_IDR) Data CRC Error Interrupt Disable */
02197 #define HSMCI_IDR_DTOE (0x1u << 22) /**< \brief (HSMCI_IDR) Data Time-out Error Interrupt Disable */
02198 #define HSMCI_IDR_CSTOE (0x1u << 23) /**< \brief (HSMCI_IDR) Completion Signal Time out Error Interrupt Disable */
02199 #define HSMCI_IDR_BLKOVRE (0x1u << 24) /**< \brief (HSMCI_IDR) DMA Block Overrun Error Interrupt Disable */
02200 #define HSMCI_IDR_DMADONE (0x1u << 25) /**< \brief (HSMCI_IDR) DMA Transfer completed Interrupt Disable */
02201 #define HSMCI_IDR_FIFOEMPTY (0x1u << 26) /**< \brief (HSMCI_IDR) FIFO empty Interrupt Disable */
02202 #define HSMCI_IDR_XFRDONE (0x1u << 27) /**< \brief (HSMCI_IDR) Transfer Done Interrupt Disable */
02203 #define HSMCI_IDR_ACKRCV (0x1u << 28) /**< \brief (HSMCI_IDR) Boot Acknowledge Interrupt Disable */
02204 #define HSMCI_IDR_ACKRCVE (0x1u << 29) /**< \brief (HSMCI_IDR) Boot Acknowledge Error Interrupt Disable */
02205 #define HSMCI_IDR_OVRE (0x1u << 30) /**< \brief (HSMCI_IDR) Overrun Interrupt Disable */
02206 #define HSMCI_IDR_UNRE (0x1u << 31) /**< \brief (HSMCI_IDR) Underrun Interrupt Disable */
02207 /* -------- HSMCI_IMR : (HSMCI Offset: 0x4C) Interrupt Mask Register -------- */
02208 #define HSMCI_IMR_CMDRDY (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (HSMCI_IMR) Command Ready Interrupt Mask */
02209 #define HSMCI_IMR_RXRDY (0x1u << 1) /**< \brief (HSMCI_IMR) Receiver Ready Interrupt Mask */
02210 #define HSMCI_IMR_TXRDY (0x1u << 2) /**< \brief (HSMCI_IMR) Transmit Ready Interrupt Mask */
02211 #define HSMCI_IMR_BLKE (0x1u << 3) /**< \brief (HSMCI_IMR) Data Block Ended Interrupt Mask */
02212 #define HSMCI_IMR_DTIP (0x1u << 4) /**< \brief (HSMCI_IMR) Data Transfer in Progress Interrupt Mask */
02213 #define HSMCI_IMR_NOTBUSY (0x1u << 5) /**< \brief (HSMCI_IMR) Data Not Busy Interrupt Mask */
02214 #define HSMCI_IMR_SDIOIRQforSlotA (0x1u << 8) /**< \brief (HSMCI_IMR)  */
02215 #define HSMCI_IMR_SDIOIRQforSlotB (0x1u << 9) /**< \brief (HSMCI_IMR)  */
02216 #define HSMCI_IMR_SDIOWAIT (0x1u << 12) /**< \brief (HSMCI_IMR) SDIO Read Wait Operation Status Interrupt Mask */
02217 #define HSMCI_IMR_CSRCV (0x1u << 13) /**< \brief (HSMCI_IMR) Completion Signal Received Interrupt Mask */
02218 #define HSMCI_IMR_RINDE (0x1u << 16) /**< \brief (HSMCI_IMR) Response Index Error Interrupt Mask */
02219 #define HSMCI_IMR_RDIRE (0x1u << 17) /**< \brief (HSMCI_IMR) Response Direction Error Interrupt Mask */
02220 #define HSMCI_IMR_RCRCE (0x1u << 18) /**< \brief (HSMCI_IMR) Response CRC Error Interrupt Mask */
02221 #define HSMCI_IMR_RENDE (0x1u << 19) /**< \brief (HSMCI_IMR) Response End Bit Error Interrupt Mask */
02222 #define HSMCI_IMR_RTOE (0x1u << 20) /**< \brief (HSMCI_IMR) Response Time-out Error Interrupt Mask */
02223 #define HSMCI_IMR_DCRCE (0x1u << 21) /**< \brief (HSMCI_IMR) Data CRC Error Interrupt Mask */
02224 #define HSMCI_IMR_DTOE (0x1u << 22) /**< \brief (HSMCI_IMR) Data Time-out Error Interrupt Mask */
02225 #define HSMCI_IMR_CSTOE (0x1u << 23) /**< \brief (HSMCI_IMR) Completion Signal Time-out Error Interrupt Mask */
02226 #define HSMCI_IMR_BLKOVRE (0x1u << 24) /**< \brief (HSMCI_IMR) DMA Block Overrun Error Interrupt Mask */
02227 #define HSMCI_IMR_DMADONE (0x1u << 25) /**< \brief (HSMCI_IMR) DMA Transfer Completed Interrupt Mask */
02228 #define HSMCI_IMR_FIFOEMPTY (0x1u << 26) /**< \brief (HSMCI_IMR) FIFO Empty Interrupt Mask */
02229 #define HSMCI_IMR_XFRDONE (0x1u << 27) /**< \brief (HSMCI_IMR) Transfer Done Interrupt Mask */
02230 #define HSMCI_IMR_ACKRCV (0x1u << 28) /**< \brief (HSMCI_IMR) Boot Operation Acknowledge Received Interrupt Mask */
02231 #define HSMCI_IMR_ACKRCVE (0x1u << 29) /**< \brief (HSMCI_IMR) Boot Operation Acknowledge Error Interrupt Mask */
02232 #define HSMCI_IMR_OVRE (0x1u << 30) /**< \brief (HSMCI_IMR) Overrun Interrupt Mask */
02233 #define HSMCI_IMR_UNRE (0x1u << 31) /**< \brief (HSMCI_IMR) Underrun Interrupt Mask */
02234 /* -------- HSMCI_DMA : (HSMCI Offset: 0x50) DMA Configuration Register -------- */
02235 #define HSMCI_DMA_OFFSET_Pos 0
02236 #define HSMCI_DMA_OFFSET_Msk (0x3u << HSMCI_DMA_OFFSET_Pos) /**< \brief (HSMCI_DMA) DMA Write Buffer Offset */
02237 #define HSMCI_DMA_OFFSET(value) ((HSMCI_DMA_OFFSET_Msk & ((value) << HSMCI_DMA_OFFSET_Pos)))
02238 #define HSMCI_DMA_CHKSIZE (0x1u << 4) /**< \brief (HSMCI_DMA) DMA Channel Read and Write Chunk Size */
02239 #define   HSMCI_DMA_CHKSIZE_1 (0x0u << 4) /**< \brief (HSMCI_DMA) 1 data available */
02240 #define   HSMCI_DMA_CHKSIZE_4 (0x1u << 4) /**< \brief (HSMCI_DMA) 4 data available */
02241 #define HSMCI_DMA_DMAEN (0x1u << 8) /**< \brief (HSMCI_DMA) DMA Hardware Handshaking Enable */
02242 #define HSMCI_DMA_ROPT (0x1u << 12) /**< \brief (HSMCI_DMA) Read Optimization with padding */
02243 /* -------- HSMCI_CFG : (HSMCI Offset: 0x54) Configuration Register -------- */
02244 #define HSMCI_CFG_FIFOMODE (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (HSMCI_CFG) HSMCI Internal FIFO control mode */
02245 #define HSMCI_CFG_FERRCTRL (0x1u << 4) /**< \brief (HSMCI_CFG) Flow Error flag reset control mode */
02246 #define HSMCI_CFG_HSMODE (0x1u << 8) /**< \brief (HSMCI_CFG) High Speed Mode */
02247 #define HSMCI_CFG_LSYNC (0x1u << 12) /**< \brief (HSMCI_CFG) Synchronize on the last block */
02248 /* -------- HSMCI_WPMR : (HSMCI Offset: 0xE4) Write Protection Mode Register -------- */
02249 #define HSMCI_WPMR_WP_EN (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (HSMCI_WPMR) Write Protection Enable */
02250 #define HSMCI_WPMR_WP_KEY_Pos 8
02251 #define HSMCI_WPMR_WP_KEY_Msk (0xffffffu << HSMCI_WPMR_WP_KEY_Pos) /**< \brief (HSMCI_WPMR) Write Protection Key password */
02252 #define HSMCI_WPMR_WP_KEY(value) ((HSMCI_WPMR_WP_KEY_Msk & ((value) << HSMCI_WPMR_WP_KEY_Pos)))
02253 /* -------- HSMCI_WPSR : (HSMCI Offset: 0xE8) Write Protection Status Register -------- */
02254 #define HSMCI_WPSR_WP_VS_Pos 0
02255 #define HSMCI_WPSR_WP_VS_Msk (0xfu << HSMCI_WPSR_WP_VS_Pos) /**< \brief (HSMCI_WPSR) Write Protection Violation Status */
02256 #define   HSMCI_WPSR_WP_VS_NONE (0x0u << 0) /**< \brief (HSMCI_WPSR) No Write Protection Violation occurred since the last read of this register (WP_SR) */
02257 #define   HSMCI_WPSR_WP_VS_WRITE (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (HSMCI_WPSR) Write Protection detected unauthorized attempt to write a control register had occurred (since the last read.) */
02258 #define   HSMCI_WPSR_WP_VS_RESET (0x2u << 0) /**< \brief (HSMCI_WPSR) Software reset had been performed while Write Protection was enabled (since the last read). */
02259 #define   HSMCI_WPSR_WP_VS_BOTH (0x3u << 0) /**< \brief (HSMCI_WPSR) Both Write Protection violation and software reset with Write Protection enabled have occurred since the last read. */
02260 #define HSMCI_WPSR_WP_VSRC_Pos 8
02261 #define HSMCI_WPSR_WP_VSRC_Msk (0xffffu << HSMCI_WPSR_WP_VSRC_Pos) /**< \brief (HSMCI_WPSR) Write Protection Violation SouRCe */
02262 /* -------- HSMCI_FIFO[256] : (HSMCI Offset: 0x200) FIFO Memory Aperture0 -------- */
02263 #define HSMCI_FIFO_DATA_Pos 0
02264 #define HSMCI_FIFO_DATA_Msk (0xffffffffu << HSMCI_FIFO_DATA_Pos) /**< \brief (HSMCI_FIFO[256]) Data to Read or Data to Write */
02265 #define HSMCI_FIFO_DATA(value) ((HSMCI_FIFO_DATA_Msk & ((value) << HSMCI_FIFO_DATA_Pos)))
02266 
02267 /*@}*/
02268 
02269 /* ============================================================================= */
02270 /**  SOFTWARE API DEFINITION FOR AHB Bus Matrix */
02271 /* ============================================================================= */
02272 /** \addtogroup SAM3XA_MATRIX AHB Bus Matrix */
02273 /*@{*/
02274 
02275 #ifndef __ASSEMBLY__
02276 /** \brief Matrix hardware registers */
02277 typedef struct {
02278   RwReg MATRIX_MCFG[6]; /**< \brief (Matrix Offset: 0x0000) Master Configuration Register */
02279   RoReg Reserved1[10];
02280   RwReg MATRIX_SCFG[9]; /**< \brief (Matrix Offset: 0x0040) Slave Configuration Register */
02281   RoReg Reserved2[7];
02282   RwReg MATRIX_PRAS0;   /**< \brief (Matrix Offset: 0x0080) Priority Register A for Slave 0 */
02283   RoReg Reserved3[1];
02284   RwReg MATRIX_PRAS1;   /**< \brief (Matrix Offset: 0x0088) Priority Register A for Slave 1 */
02285   RoReg Reserved4[1];
02286   RwReg MATRIX_PRAS2;   /**< \brief (Matrix Offset: 0x0090) Priority Register A for Slave 2 */
02287   RoReg Reserved5[1];
02288   RwReg MATRIX_PRAS3;   /**< \brief (Matrix Offset: 0x0098) Priority Register A for Slave 3 */
02289   RoReg Reserved6[1];
02290   RwReg MATRIX_PRAS4;   /**< \brief (Matrix Offset: 0x00A0) Priority Register A for Slave 4 */
02291   RoReg Reserved7[1];
02292   RwReg MATRIX_PRAS5;   /**< \brief (Matrix Offset: 0x00A8) Priority Register A for Slave 5 */
02293   RoReg Reserved8[1];
02294   RwReg MATRIX_PRAS6;   /**< \brief (Matrix Offset: 0x00B0) Priority Register A for Slave 6 */
02295   RoReg Reserved9[1];
02296   RwReg MATRIX_PRAS7;   /**< \brief (Matrix Offset: 0x00B8) Priority Register A for Slave 7 */
02297   RoReg Reserved10[1];
02298   RwReg MATRIX_PRAS8;   /**< \brief (Matrix Offset: 0x00C0) Priority Register A for Slave 8 */
02299   RoReg Reserved11[1];
02300   RoReg Reserved12[14];
02301   RwReg MATRIX_MRCR;    /**< \brief (Matrix Offset: 0x0100) Master Remap Control Register */
02302   RoReg Reserved13[4];
02303   RwReg CCFG_SYSIO;     /**< \brief (Matrix Offset: 0x0114) System I/O Configuration register */
02304   RoReg Reserved14[51];
02305   RwReg MATRIX_WPMR;    /**< \brief (Matrix Offset: 0x1E4) Write Protect Mode Register */
02306   RoReg MATRIX_WPSR;    /**< \brief (Matrix Offset: 0x1E8) Write Protect Status Register */
02307 } Matrix;
02308 #endif /* __ASSEMBLY__ */
02309 /* -------- MATRIX_MCFG[6] : (MATRIX Offset: 0x0000) Master Configuration Register -------- */
02310 #define MATRIX_MCFG_ULBT_Pos 0
02311 #define MATRIX_MCFG_ULBT_Msk (0x7u << MATRIX_MCFG_ULBT_Pos) /**< \brief (MATRIX_MCFG[6]) Undefined Length Burst Type */
02312 #define MATRIX_MCFG_ULBT(value) ((MATRIX_MCFG_ULBT_Msk & ((value) << MATRIX_MCFG_ULBT_Pos)))
02313 /* -------- MATRIX_SCFG[9] : (MATRIX Offset: 0x0040) Slave Configuration Register -------- */
02314 #define MATRIX_SCFG_SLOT_CYCLE_Pos 0
02315 #define MATRIX_SCFG_SLOT_CYCLE_Msk (0xffu << MATRIX_SCFG_SLOT_CYCLE_Pos) /**< \brief (MATRIX_SCFG[9]) Maximum Number of Allowed Cycles for a Burst */
02316 #define MATRIX_SCFG_SLOT_CYCLE(value) ((MATRIX_SCFG_SLOT_CYCLE_Msk & ((value) << MATRIX_SCFG_SLOT_CYCLE_Pos)))
02317 #define MATRIX_SCFG_DEFMSTR_TYPE_Pos 16
02318 #define MATRIX_SCFG_DEFMSTR_TYPE_Msk (0x3u << MATRIX_SCFG_DEFMSTR_TYPE_Pos) /**< \brief (MATRIX_SCFG[9]) Default Master Type */
02319 #define MATRIX_SCFG_DEFMSTR_TYPE(value) ((MATRIX_SCFG_DEFMSTR_TYPE_Msk & ((value) << MATRIX_SCFG_DEFMSTR_TYPE_Pos)))
02320 #define MATRIX_SCFG_FIXED_DEFMSTR_Pos 18
02321 #define MATRIX_SCFG_FIXED_DEFMSTR_Msk (0x7u << MATRIX_SCFG_FIXED_DEFMSTR_Pos) /**< \brief (MATRIX_SCFG[9]) Fixed Default Master */
02322 #define MATRIX_SCFG_FIXED_DEFMSTR(value) ((MATRIX_SCFG_FIXED_DEFMSTR_Msk & ((value) << MATRIX_SCFG_FIXED_DEFMSTR_Pos)))
02323 #define MATRIX_SCFG_ARBT_Pos 24
02324 #define MATRIX_SCFG_ARBT_Msk (0x3u << MATRIX_SCFG_ARBT_Pos) /**< \brief (MATRIX_SCFG[9]) Arbitration Type */
02325 #define MATRIX_SCFG_ARBT(value) ((MATRIX_SCFG_ARBT_Msk & ((value) << MATRIX_SCFG_ARBT_Pos)))
02326 /* -------- MATRIX_PRAS0 : (MATRIX Offset: 0x0080) Priority Register A for Slave 0 -------- */
02327 #define MATRIX_PRAS0_M0PR_Pos 0
02328 #define MATRIX_PRAS0_M0PR_Msk (0x3u << MATRIX_PRAS0_M0PR_Pos) /**< \brief (MATRIX_PRAS0) Master 0 Priority */
02329 #define MATRIX_PRAS0_M0PR(value) ((MATRIX_PRAS0_M0PR_Msk & ((value) << MATRIX_PRAS0_M0PR_Pos)))
02330 #define MATRIX_PRAS0_M1PR_Pos 4
02331 #define MATRIX_PRAS0_M1PR_Msk (0x3u << MATRIX_PRAS0_M1PR_Pos) /**< \brief (MATRIX_PRAS0) Master 1 Priority */
02332 #define MATRIX_PRAS0_M1PR(value) ((MATRIX_PRAS0_M1PR_Msk & ((value) << MATRIX_PRAS0_M1PR_Pos)))
02333 #define MATRIX_PRAS0_M2PR_Pos 8
02334 #define MATRIX_PRAS0_M2PR_Msk (0x3u << MATRIX_PRAS0_M2PR_Pos) /**< \brief (MATRIX_PRAS0) Master 2 Priority */
02335 #define MATRIX_PRAS0_M2PR(value) ((MATRIX_PRAS0_M2PR_Msk & ((value) << MATRIX_PRAS0_M2PR_Pos)))
02336 #define MATRIX_PRAS0_M3PR_Pos 12
02337 #define MATRIX_PRAS0_M3PR_Msk (0x3u << MATRIX_PRAS0_M3PR_Pos) /**< \brief (MATRIX_PRAS0) Master 3 Priority */
02338 #define MATRIX_PRAS0_M3PR(value) ((MATRIX_PRAS0_M3PR_Msk & ((value) << MATRIX_PRAS0_M3PR_Pos)))
02339 #define MATRIX_PRAS0_M4PR_Pos 16
02340 #define MATRIX_PRAS0_M4PR_Msk (0x3u << MATRIX_PRAS0_M4PR_Pos) /**< \brief (MATRIX_PRAS0) Master 4 Priority */
02341 #define MATRIX_PRAS0_M4PR(value) ((MATRIX_PRAS0_M4PR_Msk & ((value) << MATRIX_PRAS0_M4PR_Pos)))
02342 #define MATRIX_PRAS0_M5PR_Pos 20
02343 #define MATRIX_PRAS0_M5PR_Msk (0x3u << MATRIX_PRAS0_M5PR_Pos) /**< \brief (MATRIX_PRAS0) Master 5 Priority */
02344 #define MATRIX_PRAS0_M5PR(value) ((MATRIX_PRAS0_M5PR_Msk & ((value) << MATRIX_PRAS0_M5PR_Pos)))
02345 /* -------- MATRIX_PRAS1 : (MATRIX Offset: 0x0088) Priority Register A for Slave 1 -------- */
02346 #define MATRIX_PRAS1_M0PR_Pos 0
02347 #define MATRIX_PRAS1_M0PR_Msk (0x3u << MATRIX_PRAS1_M0PR_Pos) /**< \brief (MATRIX_PRAS1) Master 0 Priority */
02348 #define MATRIX_PRAS1_M0PR(value) ((MATRIX_PRAS1_M0PR_Msk & ((value) << MATRIX_PRAS1_M0PR_Pos)))
02349 #define MATRIX_PRAS1_M1PR_Pos 4
02350 #define MATRIX_PRAS1_M1PR_Msk (0x3u << MATRIX_PRAS1_M1PR_Pos) /**< \brief (MATRIX_PRAS1) Master 1 Priority */
02351 #define MATRIX_PRAS1_M1PR(value) ((MATRIX_PRAS1_M1PR_Msk & ((value) << MATRIX_PRAS1_M1PR_Pos)))
02352 #define MATRIX_PRAS1_M2PR_Pos 8

02354 #define MATRIX_PRAS1_M2PR(value) ((MATRIX_PRAS1_M2PR_Msk & ((value) << MATRIX_PRAS1_M2PR_Pos)))

02479 #define MATRIX_PRAS8_M0PR_Pos 0

02481 #define MATRIX_PRAS8_M0PR(value) ((MATRIX_PRAS8_M0PR_Msk & ((value) << MATRIX_PRAS8_M0PR_Pos)))
