02485 #define MATRIX_PRAS8_M2PR_Pos 8
02486 #define MATRIX_PRAS8_M2PR_Msk (0x3u << MATRIX_PRAS8_M2PR_Pos) /**< \brief (MATRIX_PRAS8) Master 2 Priority */
02487 #define MATRIX_PRAS8_M2PR(value) ((MATRIX_PRAS8_M2PR_Msk & ((value) << MATRIX_PRAS8_M2PR_Pos)))
02488 #define MATRIX_PRAS8_M3PR_Pos 12
02489 #define MATRIX_PRAS8_M3PR_Msk (0x3u << MATRIX_PRAS8_M3PR_Pos) /**< \brief (MATRIX_PRAS8) Master 3 Priority */
02490 #define MATRIX_PRAS8_M3PR(value) ((MATRIX_PRAS8_M3PR_Msk & ((value) << MATRIX_PRAS8_M3PR_Pos)))
02491 #define MATRIX_PRAS8_M4PR_Pos 16

02493 #define MATRIX_PRAS8_M4PR(value) ((MATRIX_PRAS8_M4PR_Msk & ((value) << MATRIX_PRAS8_M4PR_Pos)))
02494 #define MATRIX_PRAS8_M5PR_Pos 20

02496 #define MATRIX_PRAS8_M5PR(value) ((MATRIX_PRAS8_M5PR_Msk & ((value) << MATRIX_PRAS8_M5PR_Pos)))
02497 /* -------- MATRIX_MRCR : (MATRIX Offset: 0x0100) Master Remap Control Register -------- */
02498 #define MATRIX_MRCR_RCB0 (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (MATRIX_MRCR) Remap Command Bit for AHB Master 0 */
02499 #define MATRIX_MRCR_RCB1 (0x1u << 1) /**< \brief (MATRIX_MRCR) Remap Command Bit for AHB Master 1 */
02500 #define MATRIX_MRCR_RCB2 (0x1u << 2) /**< \brief (MATRIX_MRCR) Remap Command Bit for AHB Master 2 */
02501 #define MATRIX_MRCR_RCB3 (0x1u << 3) /**< \brief (MATRIX_MRCR) Remap Command Bit for AHB Master 3 */
02502 #define MATRIX_MRCR_RCB4_Pos 4
02503 #define MATRIX_MRCR_RCB4_Msk (0x3u << MATRIX_MRCR_RCB4_Pos) /**< \brief (MATRIX_MRCR) Remap Command Bit for AHB Master 4 */
02504 #define MATRIX_MRCR_RCB4(value) ((MATRIX_MRCR_RCB4_Msk & ((value) << MATRIX_MRCR_RCB4_Pos)))
02505 #define MATRIX_MRCR_RCB5 (0x1u << 6) /**< \brief (MATRIX_MRCR) Remap Command Bit for AHB Master 5 */
02506 /* -------- CCFG_SYSIO : (MATRIX Offset: 0x0114) System I/O Configuration register -------- */
02507 #define CCFG_SYSIO_SYSIO12 (0x1u << 12) /**< \brief (CCFG_SYSIO) PC0 or ERASE Assignment */
02508 /* -------- MATRIX_WPMR : (MATRIX Offset: 0x1E4) Write Protect Mode Register -------- */
02509 #define MATRIX_WPMR_WPEN (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (MATRIX_WPMR) Write Protect ENable */
02510 #define MATRIX_WPMR_WPKEY_Pos 8
02511 #define MATRIX_WPMR_WPKEY_Msk (0xffffffu << MATRIX_WPMR_WPKEY_Pos) /**< \brief (MATRIX_WPMR) Write Protect KEY (Write-only) */
02512 #define MATRIX_WPMR_WPKEY(value) ((MATRIX_WPMR_WPKEY_Msk & ((value) << MATRIX_WPMR_WPKEY_Pos)))
02513 /* -------- MATRIX_WPSR : (MATRIX Offset: 0x1E8) Write Protect Status Register -------- */
02514 #define MATRIX_WPSR_WPVS (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (MATRIX_WPSR) Write Protect Violation Status */
02515 #define MATRIX_WPSR_WPVSRC_Pos 8
02516 #define MATRIX_WPSR_WPVSRC_Msk (0xffffu << MATRIX_WPSR_WPVSRC_Pos) /**< \brief (MATRIX_WPSR) Write Protect Violation Source */
02517 
02518 /*@}*/
02519 
02520 /* ============================================================================= */
02521 /**  SOFTWARE API DEFINITION FOR Peripheral DMA Controller */
02522 /* ============================================================================= */
02523 /** \addtogroup SAM3XA_PDC Peripheral DMA Controller */
02524 /*@{*/
02525 
02526 #ifndef __ASSEMBLY__
02527 /** \brief Pdc hardware registers */
02528 typedef struct {
02529   RoReg Reserved1[64];
02530   RwReg PERIPH_RPR;    /**< \brief (Pdc Offset: 0x100) Receive Pointer Register */
02531   RwReg PERIPH_RCR;    /**< \brief (Pdc Offset: 0x104) Receive Counter Register */
02532   RwReg PERIPH_TPR;    /**< \brief (Pdc Offset: 0x108) Transmit Pointer Register */
02533   RwReg PERIPH_TCR;    /**< \brief (Pdc Offset: 0x10C) Transmit Counter Register */
02534   RwReg PERIPH_RNPR;   /**< \brief (Pdc Offset: 0x110) Receive Next Pointer Register */
02535   RwReg PERIPH_RNCR;   /**< \brief (Pdc Offset: 0x114) Receive Next Counter Register */
02536   RwReg PERIPH_TNPR;   /**< \brief (Pdc Offset: 0x118) Transmit Next Pointer Register */
02537   RwReg PERIPH_TNCR;   /**< \brief (Pdc Offset: 0x11C) Transmit Next Counter Register */
02538   WoReg PERIPH_PTCR;   /**< \brief (Pdc Offset: 0x120) Transfer Control Register */
02539   RoReg PERIPH_PTSR;   /**< \brief (Pdc Offset: 0x124) Transfer Status Register */
02540 } Pdc;
02541 #endif /* __ASSEMBLY__ */
02542 /* -------- PERIPH_RPR : (PDC Offset: 0x100) Receive Pointer Register -------- */
02543 #define PERIPH_RPR_RXPTR_Pos 0
02544 #define PERIPH_RPR_RXPTR_Msk (0xffffffffu << PERIPH_RPR_RXPTR_Pos) /**< \brief (PERIPH_RPR) Receive Pointer Register */
02545 #define PERIPH_RPR_RXPTR(value) ((PERIPH_RPR_RXPTR_Msk & ((value) << PERIPH_RPR_RXPTR_Pos)))
02546 /* -------- PERIPH_RCR : (PDC Offset: 0x104) Receive Counter Register -------- */
02547 #define PERIPH_RCR_RXCTR_Pos 0
02548 #define PERIPH_RCR_RXCTR_Msk (0xffffu << PERIPH_RCR_RXCTR_Pos) /**< \brief (PERIPH_RCR) Receive Counter Register */
02549 #define PERIPH_RCR_RXCTR(value) ((PERIPH_RCR_RXCTR_Msk & ((value) << PERIPH_RCR_RXCTR_Pos)))
02550 /* -------- PERIPH_TPR : (PDC Offset: 0x108) Transmit Pointer Register -------- */
02551 #define PERIPH_TPR_TXPTR_Pos 0
02552 #define PERIPH_TPR_TXPTR_Msk (0xffffffffu << PERIPH_TPR_TXPTR_Pos) /**< \brief (PERIPH_TPR) Transmit Counter Register */
02553 #define PERIPH_TPR_TXPTR(value) ((PERIPH_TPR_TXPTR_Msk & ((value) << PERIPH_TPR_TXPTR_Pos)))
02554 /* -------- PERIPH_TCR : (PDC Offset: 0x10C) Transmit Counter Register -------- */
02555 #define PERIPH_TCR_TXCTR_Pos 0
02556 #define PERIPH_TCR_TXCTR_Msk (0xffffu << PERIPH_TCR_TXCTR_Pos) /**< \brief (PERIPH_TCR) Transmit Counter Register */
02557 #define PERIPH_TCR_TXCTR(value) ((PERIPH_TCR_TXCTR_Msk & ((value) << PERIPH_TCR_TXCTR_Pos)))
02558 /* -------- PERIPH_RNPR : (PDC Offset: 0x110) Receive Next Pointer Register -------- */
02559 #define PERIPH_RNPR_RXNPTR_Pos 0
02560 #define PERIPH_RNPR_RXNPTR_Msk (0xffffffffu << PERIPH_RNPR_RXNPTR_Pos) /**< \brief (PERIPH_RNPR) Receive Next Pointer */
02561 #define PERIPH_RNPR_RXNPTR(value) ((PERIPH_RNPR_RXNPTR_Msk & ((value) << PERIPH_RNPR_RXNPTR_Pos)))
02562 /* -------- PERIPH_RNCR : (PDC Offset: 0x114) Receive Next Counter Register -------- */
02563 #define PERIPH_RNCR_RXNCTR_Pos 0
02564 #define PERIPH_RNCR_RXNCTR_Msk (0xffffu << PERIPH_RNCR_RXNCTR_Pos) /**< \brief (PERIPH_RNCR) Receive Next Counter */
02565 #define PERIPH_RNCR_RXNCTR(value) ((PERIPH_RNCR_RXNCTR_Msk & ((value) << PERIPH_RNCR_RXNCTR_Pos)))
02566 /* -------- PERIPH_TNPR : (PDC Offset: 0x118) Transmit Next Pointer Register -------- */
02567 #define PERIPH_TNPR_TXNPTR_Pos 0
02568 #define PERIPH_TNPR_TXNPTR_Msk (0xffffffffu << PERIPH_TNPR_TXNPTR_Pos) /**< \brief (PERIPH_TNPR) Transmit Next Pointer */
02569 #define PERIPH_TNPR_TXNPTR(value) ((PERIPH_TNPR_TXNPTR_Msk & ((value) << PERIPH_TNPR_TXNPTR_Pos)))
02570 /* -------- PERIPH_TNCR : (PDC Offset: 0x11C) Transmit Next Counter Register -------- */
02571 #define PERIPH_TNCR_TXNCTR_Pos 0
02572 #define PERIPH_TNCR_TXNCTR_Msk (0xffffu << PERIPH_TNCR_TXNCTR_Pos) /**< \brief (PERIPH_TNCR) Transmit Counter Next */
02573 #define PERIPH_TNCR_TXNCTR(value) ((PERIPH_TNCR_TXNCTR_Msk & ((value) << PERIPH_TNCR_TXNCTR_Pos)))
02574 /* -------- PERIPH_PTCR : (PDC Offset: 0x120) Transfer Control Register -------- */
02575 #define PERIPH_PTCR_RXTEN (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (PERIPH_PTCR) Receiver Transfer Enable */
02576 #define PERIPH_PTCR_RXTDIS (0x1u << 1) /**< \brief (PERIPH_PTCR) Receiver Transfer Disable */
02577 #define PERIPH_PTCR_TXTEN (0x1u << 8) /**< \brief (PERIPH_PTCR) Transmitter Transfer Enable */
02578 #define PERIPH_PTCR_TXTDIS (0x1u << 9) /**< \brief (PERIPH_PTCR) Transmitter Transfer Disable */
02579 /* -------- PERIPH_PTSR : (PDC Offset: 0x124) Transfer Status Register -------- */
02580 #define PERIPH_PTSR_RXTEN (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (PERIPH_PTSR) Receiver Transfer Enable */
02581 #define PERIPH_PTSR_TXTEN (0x1u << 8) /**< \brief (PERIPH_PTSR) Transmitter Transfer Enable */
02582 
02583 /*@}*/
02584 
02585 /* ============================================================================= */
02586 /**  SOFTWARE API DEFINITION FOR Parallel Input/Output Controller */
02587 /* ============================================================================= */
02588 /** \addtogroup SAM3XA_PIO Parallel Input/Output Controller */
02589 /*@{*/
02590 
02591 #ifndef __ASSEMBLY__
02592 /** \brief Pio hardware registers */
02593 typedef struct {
02594   WoReg PIO_PER;       /**< \brief (Pio Offset: 0x0000) PIO Enable Register */
02595   WoReg PIO_PDR;       /**< \brief (Pio Offset: 0x0004) PIO Disable Register */
02596   RoReg PIO_PSR;       /**< \brief (Pio Offset: 0x0008) PIO Status Register */
02597   RoReg Reserved1[1];
02598   WoReg PIO_OER;       /**< \brief (Pio Offset: 0x0010) Output Enable Register */
02599   WoReg PIO_ODR;       /**< \brief (Pio Offset: 0x0014) Output Disable Register */
02600   RoReg PIO_OSR;       /**< \brief (Pio Offset: 0x0018) Output Status Register */
02601   RoReg Reserved2[1];
02602   WoReg PIO_IFER;      /**< \brief (Pio Offset: 0x0020) Glitch Input Filter Enable Register */
02603   WoReg PIO_IFDR;      /**< \brief (Pio Offset: 0x0024) Glitch Input Filter Disable Register */
02604   RoReg PIO_IFSR;      /**< \brief (Pio Offset: 0x0028) Glitch Input Filter Status Register */
02605   RoReg Reserved3[1];
02606   WoReg PIO_SODR;      /**< \brief (Pio Offset: 0x0030) Set Output Data Register */
02607   WoReg PIO_CODR;      /**< \brief (Pio Offset: 0x0034) Clear Output Data Register */
02608   RwReg PIO_ODSR;      /**< \brief (Pio Offset: 0x0038) Output Data Status Register */
02609   RoReg PIO_PDSR;      /**< \brief (Pio Offset: 0x003C) Pin Data Status Register */
02610   WoReg PIO_IER;       /**< \brief (Pio Offset: 0x0040) Interrupt Enable Register */
02611   WoReg PIO_IDR;       /**< \brief (Pio Offset: 0x0044) Interrupt Disable Register */
02612   RoReg PIO_IMR;       /**< \brief (Pio Offset: 0x0048) Interrupt Mask Register */
02613   RoReg PIO_ISR;       /**< \brief (Pio Offset: 0x004C) Interrupt Status Register */
02614   WoReg PIO_MDER;      /**< \brief (Pio Offset: 0x0050) Multi-driver Enable Register */
02615   WoReg PIO_MDDR;      /**< \brief (Pio Offset: 0x0054) Multi-driver Disable Register */
02616   RoReg PIO_MDSR;      /**< \brief (Pio Offset: 0x0058) Multi-driver Status Register */
02617   RoReg Reserved4[1];
02618   WoReg PIO_PUDR;      /**< \brief (Pio Offset: 0x0060) Pull-up Disable Register */
02619   WoReg PIO_PUER;      /**< \brief (Pio Offset: 0x0064) Pull-up Enable Register */
02620   RoReg PIO_PUSR;      /**< \brief (Pio Offset: 0x0068) Pad Pull-up Status Register */
02621   RoReg Reserved5[1];
02622   RwReg PIO_ABSR;      /**< \brief (Pio Offset: 0x0070) Peripheral AB Select Register */
02623   RoReg Reserved6[3];
02624   WoReg PIO_SCIFSR;    /**< \brief (Pio Offset: 0x0080) System Clock Glitch Input Filter Select Register */
02625   WoReg PIO_DIFSR;     /**< \brief (Pio Offset: 0x0084) Debouncing Input Filter Select Register */
02626   RoReg PIO_IFDGSR;    /**< \brief (Pio Offset: 0x0088) Glitch or Debouncing Input Filter Clock Selection Status Register */
02627   RwReg PIO_SCDR;      /**< \brief (Pio Offset: 0x008C) Slow Clock Divider Debouncing Register */
02628   RoReg Reserved7[4];
02629   WoReg PIO_OWER;      /**< \brief (Pio Offset: 0x00A0) Output Write Enable */
02630   WoReg PIO_OWDR;      /**< \brief (Pio Offset: 0x00A4) Output Write Disable */
02631   RoReg PIO_OWSR;      /**< \brief (Pio Offset: 0x00A8) Output Write Status Register */
02632   RoReg Reserved8[1];
02633   WoReg PIO_AIMER;     /**< \brief (Pio Offset: 0x00B0) Additional Interrupt Modes Enable Register */
02634   WoReg PIO_AIMDR;     /**< \brief (Pio Offset: 0x00B4) Additional Interrupt Modes Disables Register */
02635   RoReg PIO_AIMMR;     /**< \brief (Pio Offset: 0x00B8) Additional Interrupt Modes Mask Register */
02636   RoReg Reserved9[1];
02637   WoReg PIO_ESR;       /**< \brief (Pio Offset: 0x00C0) Edge Select Register */
02638   WoReg PIO_LSR;       /**< \brief (Pio Offset: 0x00C4) Level Select Register */
02639   RoReg PIO_ELSR;      /**< \brief (Pio Offset: 0x00C8) Edge/Level Status Register */
02640   RoReg Reserved10[1];
02641   WoReg PIO_FELLSR;    /**< \brief (Pio Offset: 0x00D0) Falling Edge/Low Level Select Register */
02642   WoReg PIO_REHLSR;    /**< \brief (Pio Offset: 0x00D4) Rising Edge/ High Level Select Register */
02643   RoReg PIO_FRLHSR;    /**< \brief (Pio Offset: 0x00D8) Fall/Rise - Low/High Status Register */
02644   RoReg Reserved11[1];
02645   RoReg PIO_LOCKSR;    /**< \brief (Pio Offset: 0x00E0) Lock Status */
02646   RwReg PIO_WPMR;      /**< \brief (Pio Offset: 0x00E4) Write Protect Mode Register */
02647   RoReg PIO_WPSR;      /**< \brief (Pio Offset: 0x00E8) Write Protect Status Register */
02648 } Pio;
02649 #endif /* __ASSEMBLY__ */
02650 /* -------- PIO_PER : (PIO Offset: 0x0000) PIO Enable Register -------- */
02651 #define PIO_PER_P0 (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (PIO_PER) PIO Enable */
02652 #define PIO_PER_P1 (0x1u << 1) /**< \brief (PIO_PER) PIO Enable */
02653 #define PIO_PER_P2 (0x1u << 2) /**< \brief (PIO_PER) PIO Enable */
02654 #define PIO_PER_P3 (0x1u << 3) /**< \brief (PIO_PER) PIO Enable */
02655 #define PIO_PER_P4 (0x1u << 4) /**< \brief (PIO_PER) PIO Enable */
02656 #define PIO_PER_P5 (0x1u << 5) /**< \brief (PIO_PER) PIO Enable */
02657 #define PIO_PER_P6 (0x1u << 6) /**< \brief (PIO_PER) PIO Enable */

02667 #define PIO_PER_P16 (0x1u << 16) /**< \brief (PIO_PER) PIO Enable */

02669 #define PIO_PER_P18 (0x1u << 18) /**< \brief (PIO_PER) PIO Enable */
02670 #define PIO_PER_P19 (0x1u << 19) /**< \brief (PIO_PER) PIO Enable */

02676 #define PIO_PER_P25 (0x1u << 25) /**< \brief (PIO_PER) PIO Enable */
02677 #define PIO_PER_P26 (0x1u << 26) /**< \brief (PIO_PER) PIO Enable */
02678 #define PIO_PER_P27 (0x1u << 27) /**< \brief (PIO_PER) PIO Enable */
02679 #define PIO_PER_P28 (0x1u << 28) /**< \brief (PIO_PER) PIO Enable */
02680 #define PIO_PER_P29 (0x1u << 29) /**< \brief (PIO_PER) PIO Enable */
02681 #define PIO_PER_P30 (0x1u << 30) /**< \brief (PIO_PER) PIO Enable */
02682 #define PIO_PER_P31 (0x1u << 31) /**< \brief (PIO_PER) PIO Enable */
02683 /* -------- PIO_PDR : (PIO Offset: 0x0004) PIO Disable Register -------- */
02684 #define PIO_PDR_P0 (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (PIO_PDR) PIO Disable */
02685 #define PIO_PDR_P1 (0x1u << 1) /**< \brief (PIO_PDR) PIO Disable */
02686 #define PIO_PDR_P2 (0x1u << 2) /**< \brief (PIO_PDR) PIO Disable */

02717 #define PIO_PSR_P0 (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (PIO_PSR) PIO Status */
02718 #define PIO_PSR_P1 (0x1u << 1) /**< \brief (PIO_PSR) PIO Status */

02749 /* -------- PIO_OER : (PIO Offset: 0x0010) Output Enable Register -------- */
02750 #define PIO_OER_P0 (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (PIO_OER) Output Enable */
02751 #define PIO_OER_P1 (0x1u << 1) /**< \brief (PIO_OER) Output Enable */

03541 /* -------- PIO_SCDR : (PIO Offset: 0x008C) Slow Clock Divider Debouncing Register -------- */
03542 #define PIO_SCDR_DIV_Pos 0
03543 #define PIO_SCDR_DIV_Msk (0x3fffu << PIO_SCDR_DIV_Pos) /**< \brief (PIO_SCDR) Slow Clock Divider Selection for Debouncing */
03544 #define PIO_SCDR_DIV(value) ((PIO_SCDR_DIV_Msk & ((value) << PIO_SCDR_DIV_Pos)))
