03868 #define PIO_FELLSR_P25 (0x1u << 25) /**< \brief (PIO_FELLSR) Falling Edge/Low Level Interrupt Selection. */
03869 #define PIO_FELLSR_P26 (0x1u << 26) /**< \brief (PIO_FELLSR) Falling Edge/Low Level Interrupt Selection. */
03870 #define PIO_FELLSR_P27 (0x1u << 27) /**< \brief (PIO_FELLSR) Falling Edge/Low Level Interrupt Selection. */
03871 #define PIO_FELLSR_P28 (0x1u << 28) /**< \brief (PIO_FELLSR) Falling Edge/Low Level Interrupt Selection. */
03872 #define PIO_FELLSR_P29 (0x1u << 29) /**< \brief (PIO_FELLSR) Falling Edge/Low Level Interrupt Selection. */
03873 #define PIO_FELLSR_P30 (0x1u << 30) /**< \brief (PIO_FELLSR) Falling Edge/Low Level Interrupt Selection. */
03874 #define PIO_FELLSR_P31 (0x1u << 31) /**< \brief (PIO_FELLSR) Falling Edge/Low Level Interrupt Selection. */
03875 /* -------- PIO_REHLSR : (PIO Offset: 0x00D4) Rising Edge/ High Level Select Register -------- */
03876 #define PIO_REHLSR_P0 (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (PIO_REHLSR) Rising Edge /High Level Interrupt Selection. */
03877 #define PIO_REHLSR_P1 (0x1u << 1) /**< \brief (PIO_REHLSR) Rising Edge /High Level Interrupt Selection. */
03878 #define PIO_REHLSR_P2 (0x1u << 2) /**< \brief (PIO_REHLSR) Rising Edge /High Level Interrupt Selection. */
03879 #define PIO_REHLSR_P3 (0x1u << 3) /**< \brief (PIO_REHLSR) Rising Edge /High Level Interrupt Selection. */
03880 #define PIO_REHLSR_P4 (0x1u << 4) /**< \brief (PIO_REHLSR) Rising Edge /High Level Interrupt Selection. */
03881 #define PIO_REHLSR_P5 (0x1u << 5) /**< \brief (PIO_REHLSR) Rising Edge /High Level Interrupt Selection. */
03882 #define PIO_REHLSR_P6 (0x1u << 6) /**< \brief (PIO_REHLSR) Rising Edge /High Level Interrupt Selection. */
03883 #define PIO_REHLSR_P7 (0x1u << 7) /**< \brief (PIO_REHLSR) Rising Edge /High Level Interrupt Selection. */
03884 #define PIO_REHLSR_P8 (0x1u << 8) /**< \brief (PIO_REHLSR) Rising Edge /High Level Interrupt Selection. */
03885 #define PIO_REHLSR_P9 (0x1u << 9) /**< \brief (PIO_REHLSR) Rising Edge /High Level Interrupt Selection. */
03886 #define PIO_REHLSR_P10 (0x1u << 10) /**< \brief (PIO_REHLSR) Rising Edge /High Level Interrupt Selection. */
03887 #define PIO_REHLSR_P11 (0x1u << 11) /**< \brief (PIO_REHLSR) Rising Edge /High Level Interrupt Selection. */
03888 #define PIO_REHLSR_P12 (0x1u << 12) /**< \brief (PIO_REHLSR) Rising Edge /High Level Interrupt Selection. */
03889 #define PIO_REHLSR_P13 (0x1u << 13) /**< \brief (PIO_REHLSR) Rising Edge /High Level Interrupt Selection. */
03890 #define PIO_REHLSR_P14 (0x1u << 14) /**< \brief (PIO_REHLSR) Rising Edge /High Level Interrupt Selection. */
03891 #define PIO_REHLSR_P15 (0x1u << 15) /**< \brief (PIO_REHLSR) Rising Edge /High Level Interrupt Selection. */
03892 #define PIO_REHLSR_P16 (0x1u << 16) /**< \brief (PIO_REHLSR) Rising Edge /High Level Interrupt Selection. */
03893 #define PIO_REHLSR_P17 (0x1u << 17) /**< \brief (PIO_REHLSR) Rising Edge /High Level Interrupt Selection. */
03894 #define PIO_REHLSR_P18 (0x1u << 18) /**< \brief (PIO_REHLSR) Rising Edge /High Level Interrupt Selection. */
03895 #define PIO_REHLSR_P19 (0x1u << 19) /**< \brief (PIO_REHLSR) Rising Edge /High Level Interrupt Selection. */
03896 #define PIO_REHLSR_P20 (0x1u << 20) /**< \brief (PIO_REHLSR) Rising Edge /High Level Interrupt Selection. */
03897 #define PIO_REHLSR_P21 (0x1u << 21) /**< \brief (PIO_REHLSR) Rising Edge /High Level Interrupt Selection. */
03898 #define PIO_REHLSR_P22 (0x1u << 22) /**< \brief (PIO_REHLSR) Rising Edge /High Level Interrupt Selection. */
03899 #define PIO_REHLSR_P23 (0x1u << 23) /**< \brief (PIO_REHLSR) Rising Edge /High Level Interrupt Selection. */
03900 #define PIO_REHLSR_P24 (0x1u << 24) /**< \brief (PIO_REHLSR) Rising Edge /High Level Interrupt Selection. */
03901 #define PIO_REHLSR_P25 (0x1u << 25) /**< \brief (PIO_REHLSR) Rising Edge /High Level Interrupt Selection. */
03902 #define PIO_REHLSR_P26 (0x1u << 26) /**< \brief (PIO_REHLSR) Rising Edge /High Level Interrupt Selection. */
03903 #define PIO_REHLSR_P27 (0x1u << 27) /**< \brief (PIO_REHLSR) Rising Edge /High Level Interrupt Selection. */
03904 #define PIO_REHLSR_P28 (0x1u << 28) /**< \brief (PIO_REHLSR) Rising Edge /High Level Interrupt Selection. */
03905 #define PIO_REHLSR_P29 (0x1u << 29) /**< \brief (PIO_REHLSR) Rising Edge /High Level Interrupt Selection. */
03906 #define PIO_REHLSR_P30 (0x1u << 30) /**< \brief (PIO_REHLSR) Rising Edge /High Level Interrupt Selection. */
03907 #define PIO_REHLSR_P31 (0x1u << 31) /**< \brief (PIO_REHLSR) Rising Edge /High Level Interrupt Selection. */
03908 /* -------- PIO_FRLHSR : (PIO Offset: 0x00D8) Fall/Rise - Low/High Status Register -------- */
03909 #define PIO_FRLHSR_P0 (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (PIO_FRLHSR) Edge /Level Interrupt Source Selection. */
03910 #define PIO_FRLHSR_P1 (0x1u << 1) /**< \brief (PIO_FRLHSR) Edge /Level Interrupt Source Selection. */
03911 #define PIO_FRLHSR_P2 (0x1u << 2) /**< \brief (PIO_FRLHSR) Edge /Level Interrupt Source Selection. */
03912 #define PIO_FRLHSR_P3 (0x1u << 3) /**< \brief (PIO_FRLHSR) Edge /Level Interrupt Source Selection. */
03913 #define PIO_FRLHSR_P4 (0x1u << 4) /**< \brief (PIO_FRLHSR) Edge /Level Interrupt Source Selection. */
03914 #define PIO_FRLHSR_P5 (0x1u << 5) /**< \brief (PIO_FRLHSR) Edge /Level Interrupt Source Selection. */
03915 #define PIO_FRLHSR_P6 (0x1u << 6) /**< \brief (PIO_FRLHSR) Edge /Level Interrupt Source Selection. */
03916 #define PIO_FRLHSR_P7 (0x1u << 7) /**< \brief (PIO_FRLHSR) Edge /Level Interrupt Source Selection. */
03917 #define PIO_FRLHSR_P8 (0x1u << 8) /**< \brief (PIO_FRLHSR) Edge /Level Interrupt Source Selection. */
03918 #define PIO_FRLHSR_P9 (0x1u << 9) /**< \brief (PIO_FRLHSR) Edge /Level Interrupt Source Selection. */
03919 #define PIO_FRLHSR_P10 (0x1u << 10) /**< \brief (PIO_FRLHSR) Edge /Level Interrupt Source Selection. */
03920 #define PIO_FRLHSR_P11 (0x1u << 11) /**< \brief (PIO_FRLHSR) Edge /Level Interrupt Source Selection. */
03921 #define PIO_FRLHSR_P12 (0x1u << 12) /**< \brief (PIO_FRLHSR) Edge /Level Interrupt Source Selection. */
03922 #define PIO_FRLHSR_P13 (0x1u << 13) /**< \brief (PIO_FRLHSR) Edge /Level Interrupt Source Selection. */
03923 #define PIO_FRLHSR_P14 (0x1u << 14) /**< \brief (PIO_FRLHSR) Edge /Level Interrupt Source Selection. */
03924 #define PIO_FRLHSR_P15 (0x1u << 15) /**< \brief (PIO_FRLHSR) Edge /Level Interrupt Source Selection. */
03925 #define PIO_FRLHSR_P16 (0x1u << 16) /**< \brief (PIO_FRLHSR) Edge /Level Interrupt Source Selection. */
03926 #define PIO_FRLHSR_P17 (0x1u << 17) /**< \brief (PIO_FRLHSR) Edge /Level Interrupt Source Selection. */
03927 #define PIO_FRLHSR_P18 (0x1u << 18) /**< \brief (PIO_FRLHSR) Edge /Level Interrupt Source Selection. */
03928 #define PIO_FRLHSR_P19 (0x1u << 19) /**< \brief (PIO_FRLHSR) Edge /Level Interrupt Source Selection. */
03929 #define PIO_FRLHSR_P20 (0x1u << 20) /**< \brief (PIO_FRLHSR) Edge /Level Interrupt Source Selection. */
03930 #define PIO_FRLHSR_P21 (0x1u << 21) /**< \brief (PIO_FRLHSR) Edge /Level Interrupt Source Selection. */
03931 #define PIO_FRLHSR_P22 (0x1u << 22) /**< \brief (PIO_FRLHSR) Edge /Level Interrupt Source Selection. */
03932 #define PIO_FRLHSR_P23 (0x1u << 23) /**< \brief (PIO_FRLHSR) Edge /Level Interrupt Source Selection. */
03933 #define PIO_FRLHSR_P24 (0x1u << 24) /**< \brief (PIO_FRLHSR) Edge /Level Interrupt Source Selection. */
03934 #define PIO_FRLHSR_P25 (0x1u << 25) /**< \brief (PIO_FRLHSR) Edge /Level Interrupt Source Selection. */
03935 #define PIO_FRLHSR_P26 (0x1u << 26) /**< \brief (PIO_FRLHSR) Edge /Level Interrupt Source Selection. */
03936 #define PIO_FRLHSR_P27 (0x1u << 27) /**< \brief (PIO_FRLHSR) Edge /Level Interrupt Source Selection. */
03937 #define PIO_FRLHSR_P28 (0x1u << 28) /**< \brief (PIO_FRLHSR) Edge /Level Interrupt Source Selection. */
03938 #define PIO_FRLHSR_P29 (0x1u << 29) /**< \brief (PIO_FRLHSR) Edge /Level Interrupt Source Selection. */
03939 #define PIO_FRLHSR_P30 (0x1u << 30) /**< \brief (PIO_FRLHSR) Edge /Level Interrupt Source Selection. */
03940 #define PIO_FRLHSR_P31 (0x1u << 31) /**< \brief (PIO_FRLHSR) Edge /Level Interrupt Source Selection. */
03941 /* -------- PIO_LOCKSR : (PIO Offset: 0x00E0) Lock Status -------- */
03942 #define PIO_LOCKSR_P0 (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (PIO_LOCKSR) Lock Status. */
03943 #define PIO_LOCKSR_P1 (0x1u << 1) /**< \brief (PIO_LOCKSR) Lock Status. */
03944 #define PIO_LOCKSR_P2 (0x1u << 2) /**< \brief (PIO_LOCKSR) Lock Status. */
03945 #define PIO_LOCKSR_P3 (0x1u << 3) /**< \brief (PIO_LOCKSR) Lock Status. */
03946 #define PIO_LOCKSR_P4 (0x1u << 4) /**< \brief (PIO_LOCKSR) Lock Status. */
03947 #define PIO_LOCKSR_P5 (0x1u << 5) /**< \brief (PIO_LOCKSR) Lock Status. */
03948 #define PIO_LOCKSR_P6 (0x1u << 6) /**< \brief (PIO_LOCKSR) Lock Status. */
03949 #define PIO_LOCKSR_P7 (0x1u << 7) /**< \brief (PIO_LOCKSR) Lock Status. */
03950 #define PIO_LOCKSR_P8 (0x1u << 8) /**< \brief (PIO_LOCKSR) Lock Status. */
03951 #define PIO_LOCKSR_P9 (0x1u << 9) /**< \brief (PIO_LOCKSR) Lock Status. */
03952 #define PIO_LOCKSR_P10 (0x1u << 10) /**< \brief (PIO_LOCKSR) Lock Status. */
03953 #define PIO_LOCKSR_P11 (0x1u << 11) /**< \brief (PIO_LOCKSR) Lock Status. */
03954 #define PIO_LOCKSR_P12 (0x1u << 12) /**< \brief (PIO_LOCKSR) Lock Status. */
03955 #define PIO_LOCKSR_P13 (0x1u << 13) /**< \brief (PIO_LOCKSR) Lock Status. */
03956 #define PIO_LOCKSR_P14 (0x1u << 14) /**< \brief (PIO_LOCKSR) Lock Status. */
03957 #define PIO_LOCKSR_P15 (0x1u << 15) /**< \brief (PIO_LOCKSR) Lock Status. */
03958 #define PIO_LOCKSR_P16 (0x1u << 16) /**< \brief (PIO_LOCKSR) Lock Status. */
03959 #define PIO_LOCKSR_P17 (0x1u << 17) /**< \brief (PIO_LOCKSR) Lock Status. */
03960 #define PIO_LOCKSR_P18 (0x1u << 18) /**< \brief (PIO_LOCKSR) Lock Status. */
03961 #define PIO_LOCKSR_P19 (0x1u << 19) /**< \brief (PIO_LOCKSR) Lock Status. */
03962 #define PIO_LOCKSR_P20 (0x1u << 20) /**< \brief (PIO_LOCKSR) Lock Status. */
03963 #define PIO_LOCKSR_P21 (0x1u << 21) /**< \brief (PIO_LOCKSR) Lock Status. */
03964 #define PIO_LOCKSR_P22 (0x1u << 22) /**< \brief (PIO_LOCKSR) Lock Status. */
03965 #define PIO_LOCKSR_P23 (0x1u << 23) /**< \brief (PIO_LOCKSR) Lock Status. */
03966 #define PIO_LOCKSR_P24 (0x1u << 24) /**< \brief (PIO_LOCKSR) Lock Status. */
03967 #define PIO_LOCKSR_P25 (0x1u << 25) /**< \brief (PIO_LOCKSR) Lock Status. */
03968 #define PIO_LOCKSR_P26 (0x1u << 26) /**< \brief (PIO_LOCKSR) Lock Status. */
03969 #define PIO_LOCKSR_P27 (0x1u << 27) /**< \brief (PIO_LOCKSR) Lock Status. */
03970 #define PIO_LOCKSR_P28 (0x1u << 28) /**< \brief (PIO_LOCKSR) Lock Status. */
03971 #define PIO_LOCKSR_P29 (0x1u << 29) /**< \brief (PIO_LOCKSR) Lock Status. */
03972 #define PIO_LOCKSR_P30 (0x1u << 30) /**< \brief (PIO_LOCKSR) Lock Status. */
03973 #define PIO_LOCKSR_P31 (0x1u << 31) /**< \brief (PIO_LOCKSR) Lock Status. */
03974 /* -------- PIO_WPMR : (PIO Offset: 0x00E4) Write Protect Mode Register -------- */
03975 #define PIO_WPMR_WPEN (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (PIO_WPMR) Write Protect Enable */
03976 #define PIO_WPMR_WPKEY_Pos 8
03977 #define PIO_WPMR_WPKEY_Msk (0xffffffu << PIO_WPMR_WPKEY_Pos) /**< \brief (PIO_WPMR) Write Protect KEY */
03978 #define PIO_WPMR_WPKEY(value) ((PIO_WPMR_WPKEY_Msk & ((value) << PIO_WPMR_WPKEY_Pos)))
03979 /* -------- PIO_WPSR : (PIO Offset: 0x00E8) Write Protect Status Register -------- */
03980 #define PIO_WPSR_WPVS (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (PIO_WPSR) Write Protect Violation Status */
03981 #define PIO_WPSR_WPVSRC_Pos 8
03982 #define PIO_WPSR_WPVSRC_Msk (0xffffu << PIO_WPSR_WPVSRC_Pos) /**< \brief (PIO_WPSR) Write Protect Violation Source */
03983 
03984 /*@}*/
03985 
03986 /* ============================================================================= */
03987 /**  SOFTWARE API DEFINITION FOR Power Management Controller */
03988 /* ============================================================================= */
03989 /** \addtogroup SAM3XA_PMC Power Management Controller */
03990 /*@{*/
03991 
03992 #ifndef __ASSEMBLY__
03993 /** \brief Pmc hardware registers */
03994 typedef struct {
03995   WoReg PMC_SCER;      /**< \brief (Pmc Offset: 0x0000) System Clock Enable Register */
03996   WoReg PMC_SCDR;      /**< \brief (Pmc Offset: 0x0004) System Clock Disable Register */
03997   RoReg PMC_SCSR;      /**< \brief (Pmc Offset: 0x0008) System Clock Status Register */
03998   RoReg Reserved1[1];
03999   WoReg PMC_PCER0;     /**< \brief (Pmc Offset: 0x0010) Peripheral Clock Enable Register 0 */
04000   WoReg PMC_PCDR0;     /**< \brief (Pmc Offset: 0x0014) Peripheral Clock Disable Register 0 */
04001   RoReg PMC_PCSR0;     /**< \brief (Pmc Offset: 0x0018) Peripheral Clock Status Register 0 */
04002   RwReg CKGR_UCKR;     /**< \brief (Pmc Offset: 0x001C) UTMI Clock Register */
04003   RwReg CKGR_MOR;      /**< \brief (Pmc Offset: 0x0020) Main Oscillator Register */
04004   RoReg CKGR_MCFR;     /**< \brief (Pmc Offset: 0x0024) Main Clock Frequency Register */
04005   RwReg CKGR_PLLAR;    /**< \brief (Pmc Offset: 0x0028) PLLA Register */
04006   RoReg Reserved2[1];
04007   RwReg PMC_MCKR;      /**< \brief (Pmc Offset: 0x0030) Master Clock Register */
04008   RoReg Reserved3[1];
04009   RwReg PMC_USB;       /**< \brief (Pmc Offset: 0x0038) USB Clock Register */
04010   RoReg Reserved4[1];
04011   RwReg PMC_PCK[3];    /**< \brief (Pmc Offset: 0x0040) Programmable Clock 0 Register */
04012   RoReg Reserved5[5];
04013   WoReg PMC_IER;       /**< \brief (Pmc Offset: 0x0060) Interrupt Enable Register */
04014   WoReg PMC_IDR;       /**< \brief (Pmc Offset: 0x0064) Interrupt Disable Register */
04015   RoReg PMC_SR;        /**< \brief (Pmc Offset: 0x0068) Status Register */
04016   RoReg PMC_IMR;       /**< \brief (Pmc Offset: 0x006C) Interrupt Mask Register */
04017   RwReg PMC_FSMR;      /**< \brief (Pmc Offset: 0x0070) Fast Startup Mode Register */
04018   RwReg PMC_FSPR;      /**< \brief (Pmc Offset: 0x0074) Fast Startup Polarity Register */
04019   WoReg PMC_FOCR;      /**< \brief (Pmc Offset: 0x0078) Fault Output Clear Register */
04020   RoReg Reserved6[26];
04021   RwReg PMC_WPMR;      /**< \brief (Pmc Offset: 0x00E4) Write Protect Mode Register */
04022   RoReg PMC_WPSR;      /**< \brief (Pmc Offset: 0x00E8) Write Protect Status Register */
04023   RoReg Reserved7[5];
04024   WoReg PMC_PCER1;     /**< \brief (Pmc Offset: 0x0100) Peripheral Clock Enable Register 1 */
04025   WoReg PMC_PCDR1;     /**< \brief (Pmc Offset: 0x0104) Peripheral Clock Disable Register 1 */
04026   RoReg PMC_PCSR1;     /**< \brief (Pmc Offset: 0x0108) Peripheral Clock Status Register 1 */
04027   RwReg PMC_PCR;       /**< \brief (Pmc Offset: 0x010C) Peripheral Control Register */
04028 } Pmc;
04029 #endif /* __ASSEMBLY__ */
04030 /* -------- PMC_SCER : (PMC Offset: 0x0000) System Clock Enable Register -------- */
04031 #define PMC_SCER_UOTGCK (0x1u << 5) /**< \brief (PMC_SCER) Enable USB OTG Clock (48 MHz, USB_48M) for UTMI */
04032 #define PMC_SCER_PCK0 (0x1u << 8) /**< \brief (PMC_SCER) Programmable Clock 0 Output Enable */
04033 #define PMC_SCER_PCK1 (0x1u << 9) /**< \brief (PMC_SCER) Programmable Clock 1 Output Enable */
04034 #define PMC_SCER_PCK2 (0x1u << 10) /**< \brief (PMC_SCER) Programmable Clock 2 Output Enable */
04035 /* -------- PMC_SCDR : (PMC Offset: 0x0004) System Clock Disable Register -------- */
04036 #define PMC_SCDR_UOTGCK (0x1u << 5) /**< \brief (PMC_SCDR) Disable USB OTG Clock (48 MHz, USB_48M) for UTMI */
04037 #define PMC_SCDR_PCK0 (0x1u << 8) /**< \brief (PMC_SCDR) Programmable Clock 0 Output Disable */
04038 #define PMC_SCDR_PCK1 (0x1u << 9) /**< \brief (PMC_SCDR) Programmable Clock 1 Output Disable */
04039 #define PMC_SCDR_PCK2 (0x1u << 10) /**< \brief (PMC_SCDR) Programmable Clock 2 Output Disable */
04040 /* -------- PMC_SCSR : (PMC Offset: 0x0008) System Clock Status Register -------- */
04041 #define PMC_SCSR_UOTGCK (0x1u << 5) /**< \brief (PMC_SCSR) USB OTG Clock (48 MHz, USB_48M) for UTMI */
04042 #define   PMC_SCSR_UOTGCK_DISABLE (0x0u << 5) /**< \brief (PMC_SCSR) USB_48M is disabled in normal operation mode. */
04043 #define   PMC_SCSR_UOTGCK_ENABLE (0x1u << 5) /**< \brief (PMC_SCSR) Enable USB_48M (to use if SPDCONF =1). */
04044 #define PMC_SCSR_PCK0 (0x1u << 8) /**< \brief (PMC_SCSR) Programmable Clock 0 Output Status */
04045 #define PMC_SCSR_PCK1 (0x1u << 9) /**< \brief (PMC_SCSR) Programmable Clock 1 Output Status */
04046 #define PMC_SCSR_PCK2 (0x1u << 10) /**< \brief (PMC_SCSR) Programmable Clock 2 Output Status */
04047 /* -------- PMC_PCER0 : (PMC Offset: 0x0010) Peripheral Clock Enable Register 0 -------- */
04048 #define PMC_PCER0_PID8 (0x1u << 8) /**< \brief (PMC_PCER0) Peripheral Clock 8 Enable */
04049 #define PMC_PCER0_PID9 (0x1u << 9) /**< \brief (PMC_PCER0) Peripheral Clock 9 Enable */
04050 #define PMC_PCER0_PID10 (0x1u << 10) /**< \brief (PMC_PCER0) Peripheral Clock 10 Enable */
04051 #define PMC_PCER0_PID11 (0x1u << 11) /**< \brief (PMC_PCER0) Peripheral Clock 11 Enable */
04052 #define PMC_PCER0_PID12 (0x1u << 12) /**< \brief (PMC_PCER0) Peripheral Clock 12 Enable */
04053 #define PMC_PCER0_PID13 (0x1u << 13) /**< \brief (PMC_PCER0) Peripheral Clock 13 Enable */
04054 #define PMC_PCER0_PID14 (0x1u << 14) /**< \brief (PMC_PCER0) Peripheral Clock 14 Enable */
04055 #define PMC_PCER0_PID15 (0x1u << 15) /**< \brief (PMC_PCER0) Peripheral Clock 15 Enable */
04056 #define PMC_PCER0_PID16 (0x1u << 16) /**< \brief (PMC_PCER0) Peripheral Clock 16 Enable */
04057 #define PMC_PCER0_PID17 (0x1u << 17) /**< \brief (PMC_PCER0) Peripheral Clock 17 Enable */
04058 #define PMC_PCER0_PID18 (0x1u << 18) /**< \brief (PMC_PCER0) Peripheral Clock 18 Enable */
04059 #define PMC_PCER0_PID19 (0x1u << 19) /**< \brief (PMC_PCER0) Peripheral Clock 19 Enable */
04060 #define PMC_PCER0_PID20 (0x1u << 20) /**< \brief (PMC_PCER0) Peripheral Clock 20 Enable */
04061 #define PMC_PCER0_PID21 (0x1u << 21) /**< \brief (PMC_PCER0) Peripheral Clock 21 Enable */
04062 #define PMC_PCER0_PID22 (0x1u << 22) /**< \brief (PMC_PCER0) Peripheral Clock 22 Enable */
04063 #define PMC_PCER0_PID23 (0x1u << 23) /**< \brief (PMC_PCER0) Peripheral Clock 23 Enable */
04064 #define PMC_PCER0_PID24 (0x1u << 24) /**< \brief (PMC_PCER0) Peripheral Clock 24 Enable */
04065 #define PMC_PCER0_PID25 (0x1u << 25) /**< \brief (PMC_PCER0) Peripheral Clock 25 Enable */
04066 #define PMC_PCER0_PID26 (0x1u << 26) /**< \brief (PMC_PCER0) Peripheral Clock 26 Enable */
04067 #define PMC_PCER0_PID27 (0x1u << 27) /**< \brief (PMC_PCER0) Peripheral Clock 27 Enable */
04068 #define PMC_PCER0_PID28 (0x1u << 28) /**< \brief (PMC_PCER0) Peripheral Clock 28 Enable */
04069 #define PMC_PCER0_PID29 (0x1u << 29) /**< \brief (PMC_PCER0) Peripheral Clock 29 Enable */
04070 #define PMC_PCER0_PID30 (0x1u << 30) /**< \brief (PMC_PCER0) Peripheral Clock 30 Enable */
04071 #define PMC_PCER0_PID31 (0x1u << 31) /**< \brief (PMC_PCER0) Peripheral Clock 31 Enable */
04072 /* -------- PMC_PCDR0 : (PMC Offset: 0x0014) Peripheral Clock Disable Register 0 -------- */
04073 #define PMC_PCDR0_PID8 (0x1u << 8) /**< \brief (PMC_PCDR0) Peripheral Clock 8 Disable */
04074 #define PMC_PCDR0_PID9 (0x1u << 9) /**< \brief (PMC_PCDR0) Peripheral Clock 9 Disable */
04075 #define PMC_PCDR0_PID10 (0x1u << 10) /**< \brief (PMC_PCDR0) Peripheral Clock 10 Disable */
04076 #define PMC_PCDR0_PID11 (0x1u << 11) /**< \brief (PMC_PCDR0) Peripheral Clock 11 Disable */
04077 #define PMC_PCDR0_PID12 (0x1u << 12) /**< \brief (PMC_PCDR0) Peripheral Clock 12 Disable */
04078 #define PMC_PCDR0_PID13 (0x1u << 13) /**< \brief (PMC_PCDR0) Peripheral Clock 13 Disable */
04079 #define PMC_PCDR0_PID14 (0x1u << 14) /**< \brief (PMC_PCDR0) Peripheral Clock 14 Disable */
04080 #define PMC_PCDR0_PID15 (0x1u << 15) /**< \brief (PMC_PCDR0) Peripheral Clock 15 Disable */
04081 #define PMC_PCDR0_PID16 (0x1u << 16) /**< \brief (PMC_PCDR0) Peripheral Clock 16 Disable */
04082 #define PMC_PCDR0_PID17 (0x1u << 17) /**< \brief (PMC_PCDR0) Peripheral Clock 17 Disable */
04083 #define PMC_PCDR0_PID18 (0x1u << 18) /**< \brief (PMC_PCDR0) Peripheral Clock 18 Disable */
04084 #define PMC_PCDR0_PID19 (0x1u << 19) /**< \brief (PMC_PCDR0) Peripheral Clock 19 Disable */
04085 #define PMC_PCDR0_PID20 (0x1u << 20) /**< \brief (PMC_PCDR0) Peripheral Clock 20 Disable */
04086 #define PMC_PCDR0_PID21 (0x1u << 21) /**< \brief (PMC_PCDR0) Peripheral Clock 21 Disable */
04087 #define PMC_PCDR0_PID22 (0x1u << 22) /**< \brief (PMC_PCDR0) Peripheral Clock 22 Disable */
04088 #define PMC_PCDR0_PID23 (0x1u << 23) /**< \brief (PMC_PCDR0) Peripheral Clock 23 Disable */
04089 #define PMC_PCDR0_PID24 (0x1u << 24) /**< \brief (PMC_PCDR0) Peripheral Clock 24 Disable */
04090 #define PMC_PCDR0_PID25 (0x1u << 25) /**< \brief (PMC_PCDR0) Peripheral Clock 25 Disable */
04091 #define PMC_PCDR0_PID26 (0x1u << 26) /**< \brief (PMC_PCDR0) Peripheral Clock 26 Disable */
04092 #define PMC_PCDR0_PID27 (0x1u << 27) /**< \brief (PMC_PCDR0) Peripheral Clock 27 Disable */
04093 #define PMC_PCDR0_PID28 (0x1u << 28) /**< \brief (PMC_PCDR0) Peripheral Clock 28 Disable */
04094 #define PMC_PCDR0_PID29 (0x1u << 29) /**< \brief (PMC_PCDR0) Peripheral Clock 29 Disable */
04095 #define PMC_PCDR0_PID30 (0x1u << 30) /**< \brief (PMC_PCDR0) Peripheral Clock 30 Disable */
04096 #define PMC_PCDR0_PID31 (0x1u << 31) /**< \brief (PMC_PCDR0) Peripheral Clock 31 Disable */
04097 /* -------- PMC_PCSR0 : (PMC Offset: 0x0018) Peripheral Clock Status Register 0 -------- */
04098 #define PMC_PCSR0_PID8 (0x1u << 8) /**< \brief (PMC_PCSR0) Peripheral Clock 8 Status */
04099 #define PMC_PCSR0_PID9 (0x1u << 9) /**< \brief (PMC_PCSR0) Peripheral Clock 9 Status */
04100 #define PMC_PCSR0_PID10 (0x1u << 10) /**< \brief (PMC_PCSR0) Peripheral Clock 10 Status */
04101 #define PMC_PCSR0_PID11 (0x1u << 11) /**< \brief (PMC_PCSR0) Peripheral Clock 11 Status */
04102 #define PMC_PCSR0_PID12 (0x1u << 12) /**< \brief (PMC_PCSR0) Peripheral Clock 12 Status */
04103 #define PMC_PCSR0_PID13 (0x1u << 13) /**< \brief (PMC_PCSR0) Peripheral Clock 13 Status */
04104 #define PMC_PCSR0_PID14 (0x1u << 14) /**< \brief (PMC_PCSR0) Peripheral Clock 14 Status */
04105 #define PMC_PCSR0_PID15 (0x1u << 15) /**< \brief (PMC_PCSR0) Peripheral Clock 15 Status */
04106 #define PMC_PCSR0_PID16 (0x1u << 16) /**< \brief (PMC_PCSR0) Peripheral Clock 16 Status */
04107 #define PMC_PCSR0_PID17 (0x1u << 17) /**< \brief (PMC_PCSR0) Peripheral Clock 17 Status */
04108 #define PMC_PCSR0_PID18 (0x1u << 18) /**< \brief (PMC_PCSR0) Peripheral Clock 18 Status */
04109 #define PMC_PCSR0_PID19 (0x1u << 19) /**< \brief (PMC_PCSR0) Peripheral Clock 19 Status */
04110 #define PMC_PCSR0_PID20 (0x1u << 20) /**< \brief (PMC_PCSR0) Peripheral Clock 20 Status */
04111 #define PMC_PCSR0_PID21 (0x1u << 21) /**< \brief (PMC_PCSR0) Peripheral Clock 21 Status */
04112 #define PMC_PCSR0_PID22 (0x1u << 22) /**< \brief (PMC_PCSR0) Peripheral Clock 22 Status */
04113 #define PMC_PCSR0_PID23 (0x1u << 23) /**< \brief (PMC_PCSR0) Peripheral Clock 23 Status */
04114 #define PMC_PCSR0_PID24 (0x1u << 24) /**< \brief (PMC_PCSR0) Peripheral Clock 24 Status */
04115 #define PMC_PCSR0_PID25 (0x1u << 25) /**< \brief (PMC_PCSR0) Peripheral Clock 25 Status */
04116 #define PMC_PCSR0_PID26 (0x1u << 26) /**< \brief (PMC_PCSR0) Peripheral Clock 26 Status */
04117 #define PMC_PCSR0_PID27 (0x1u << 27) /**< \brief (PMC_PCSR0) Peripheral Clock 27 Status */
04118 #define PMC_PCSR0_PID28 (0x1u << 28) /**< \brief (PMC_PCSR0) Peripheral Clock 28 Status */
04119 #define PMC_PCSR0_PID29 (0x1u << 29) /**< \brief (PMC_PCSR0) Peripheral Clock 29 Status */
04120 #define PMC_PCSR0_PID30 (0x1u << 30) /**< \brief (PMC_PCSR0) Peripheral Clock 30 Status */
04121 #define PMC_PCSR0_PID31 (0x1u << 31) /**< \brief (PMC_PCSR0) Peripheral Clock 31 Status */
04122 /* -------- CKGR_UCKR : (PMC Offset: 0x001C) UTMI Clock Register -------- */
04123 #define CKGR_UCKR_UPLLEN (0x1u << 16) /**< \brief (CKGR_UCKR) UTMI PLL Enable */
04124 #define CKGR_UCKR_UPLLCOUNT_Pos 20
04125 #define CKGR_UCKR_UPLLCOUNT_Msk (0xfu << CKGR_UCKR_UPLLCOUNT_Pos) /**< \brief (CKGR_UCKR) UTMI PLL Start-up Time */
04126 #define CKGR_UCKR_UPLLCOUNT(value) ((CKGR_UCKR_UPLLCOUNT_Msk & ((value) << CKGR_UCKR_UPLLCOUNT_Pos)))
04127 /* -------- CKGR_MOR : (PMC Offset: 0x0020) Main Oscillator Register -------- */
04128 #define CKGR_MOR_MOSCXTEN (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (CKGR_MOR) Main Crystal Oscillator Enable */
04129 #define CKGR_MOR_MOSCXTBY (0x1u << 1) /**< \brief (CKGR_MOR) Main Crystal Oscillator Bypass */
04130 #define CKGR_MOR_WAITMODE (0x1u << 2) /**< \brief (CKGR_MOR) Wait Mode Command */
04131 #define CKGR_MOR_MOSCRCEN (0x1u << 3) /**< \brief (CKGR_MOR) Main On-Chip RC Oscillator Enable */
04132 #define CKGR_MOR_MOSCRCF_Pos 4
04133 #define CKGR_MOR_MOSCRCF_Msk (0x7u << CKGR_MOR_MOSCRCF_Pos) /**< \brief (CKGR_MOR) Main On-Chip RC Oscillator Frequency Selection */
04134 #define   CKGR_MOR_MOSCRCF_4MHz (0x0u << 4) /**< \brief (CKGR_MOR) The Fast RC Oscillator Frequency is at 4 MHz (default) */
04135 #define   CKGR_MOR_MOSCRCF_8MHz (0x1u << 4) /**< \brief (CKGR_MOR) The Fast RC Oscillator Frequency is at 8 MHz */
04136 #define   CKGR_MOR_MOSCRCF_12MHz (0x2u << 4) /**< \brief (CKGR_MOR) The Fast RC Oscillator Frequency is at 12 MHz */
04137 #define CKGR_MOR_MOSCXTST_Pos 8
04138 #define CKGR_MOR_MOSCXTST_Msk (0xffu << CKGR_MOR_MOSCXTST_Pos) /**< \brief (CKGR_MOR) Main Crystal Oscillator Start-up Time */
04139 #define CKGR_MOR_MOSCXTST(value) ((CKGR_MOR_MOSCXTST_Msk & ((value) << CKGR_MOR_MOSCXTST_Pos)))
04140 #define CKGR_MOR_KEY_Pos 16
04141 #define CKGR_MOR_KEY_Msk (0xffu << CKGR_MOR_KEY_Pos) /**< \brief (CKGR_MOR) Password */
04142 #define CKGR_MOR_KEY(value) ((CKGR_MOR_KEY_Msk & ((value) << CKGR_MOR_KEY_Pos)))
04143 #define CKGR_MOR_MOSCSEL (0x1u << 24) /**< \brief (CKGR_MOR) Main Oscillator Selection */
04144 #define CKGR_MOR_CFDEN (0x1u << 25) /**< \brief (CKGR_MOR) Clock Failure Detector Enable */
04145 /* -------- CKGR_MCFR : (PMC Offset: 0x0024) Main Clock Frequency Register -------- */
04146 #define CKGR_MCFR_MAINF_Pos 0
04147 #define CKGR_MCFR_MAINF_Msk (0xffffu << CKGR_MCFR_MAINF_Pos) /**< \brief (CKGR_MCFR) Main Clock Frequency */
04148 #define CKGR_MCFR_MAINFRDY (0x1u << 16) /**< \brief (CKGR_MCFR) Main Clock Ready */
04149 /* -------- CKGR_PLLAR : (PMC Offset: 0x0028) PLLA Register -------- */
04150 #define CKGR_PLLAR_DIVA_Pos 0
04151 #define CKGR_PLLAR_DIVA_Msk (0xffu << CKGR_PLLAR_DIVA_Pos) /**< \brief (CKGR_PLLAR) Divider */
04152 #define CKGR_PLLAR_DIVA(value) ((CKGR_PLLAR_DIVA_Msk & ((value) << CKGR_PLLAR_DIVA_Pos)))
04153 #define CKGR_PLLAR_PLLACOUNT_Pos 8
04154 #define CKGR_PLLAR_PLLACOUNT_Msk (0x3fu << CKGR_PLLAR_PLLACOUNT_Pos) /**< \brief (CKGR_PLLAR) PLLA Counter */
04155 #define CKGR_PLLAR_PLLACOUNT(value) ((CKGR_PLLAR_PLLACOUNT_Msk & ((value) << CKGR_PLLAR_PLLACOUNT_Pos)))
04156 #define CKGR_PLLAR_MULA_Pos 16
04157 #define CKGR_PLLAR_MULA_Msk (0x7ffu << CKGR_PLLAR_MULA_Pos) /**< \brief (CKGR_PLLAR) PLLA Multiplier */
04158 #define CKGR_PLLAR_MULA(value) ((CKGR_PLLAR_MULA_Msk & ((value) << CKGR_PLLAR_MULA_Pos)))
04159 #define CKGR_PLLAR_STUCKTO1 (0x1u << 29) /**< \brief (CKGR_PLLAR)  */
04160 /* -------- PMC_MCKR : (PMC Offset: 0x0030) Master Clock Register -------- */
04161 #define PMC_MCKR_CSS_Pos 0
04162 #define PMC_MCKR_CSS_Msk (0x3u << PMC_MCKR_CSS_Pos) /**< \brief (PMC_MCKR) Master Clock Source Selection */
04163 #define   PMC_MCKR_CSS_SLOW_CLK (0x0u << 0) /**< \brief (PMC_MCKR) Slow Clock is selected */
04164 #define   PMC_MCKR_CSS_MAIN_CLK (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (PMC_MCKR) Main Clock is selected */
04165 #define   PMC_MCKR_CSS_PLLA_CLK (0x2u << 0) /**< \brief (PMC_MCKR) PLLA Clock is selected */
04166 #define   PMC_MCKR_CSS_UPLL_CLK (0x3u << 0) /**< \brief (PMC_MCKR) UPLL/2 Clock is selected */
04167 #define PMC_MCKR_PRES_Pos 4
04168 #define PMC_MCKR_PRES_Msk (0x7u << PMC_MCKR_PRES_Pos) /**< \brief (PMC_MCKR) Processor Clock Prescaler */
04169 #define   PMC_MCKR_PRES_CLK_1 (0x0u << 4) /**< \brief (PMC_MCKR) Selected clock */
04170 #define   PMC_MCKR_PRES_CLK_2 (0x1u << 4) /**< \brief (PMC_MCKR) Selected clock divided by 2 */
04171 #define   PMC_MCKR_PRES_CLK_4 (0x2u << 4) /**< \brief (PMC_MCKR) Selected clock divided by 4 */
04172 #define   PMC_MCKR_PRES_CLK_8 (0x3u << 4) /**< \brief (PMC_MCKR) Selected clock divided by 8 */
04173 #define   PMC_MCKR_PRES_CLK_16 (0x4u << 4) /**< \brief (PMC_MCKR) Selected clock divided by 16 */
04174 #define   PMC_MCKR_PRES_CLK_32 (0x5u << 4) /**< \brief (PMC_MCKR) Selected clock divided by 32 */
04175 #define   PMC_MCKR_PRES_CLK_64 (0x6u << 4) /**< \brief (PMC_MCKR) Selected clock divided by 64 */
04176 #define   PMC_MCKR_PRES_CLK_3 (0x7u << 4) /**< \brief (PMC_MCKR) Selected clock divided by 3 */
04177 #define PMC_MCKR_UPLLDIV (0x1u << 13) /**< \brief (PMC_MCKR) UPLL Divider */
04178 /* -------- PMC_USB : (PMC Offset: 0x0038) USB Clock Register -------- */
04179 #define PMC_USB_USBS (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (PMC_USB) USB Input Clock Selection */
04180 #define PMC_USB_USBDIV_Pos 8
04181 #define PMC_USB_USBDIV_Msk (0xfu << PMC_USB_USBDIV_Pos) /**< \brief (PMC_USB) Divider for USB Clock. */
04182 #define PMC_USB_USBDIV(value) ((PMC_USB_USBDIV_Msk & ((value) << PMC_USB_USBDIV_Pos)))
04183 /* -------- PMC_PCK[3] : (PMC Offset: 0x0040) Programmable Clock 0 Register -------- */
04184 #define PMC_PCK_CSS_Pos 0
04185 #define PMC_PCK_CSS_Msk (0x7u << PMC_PCK_CSS_Pos) /**< \brief (PMC_PCK[3]) Master Clock Source Selection */
04186 #define   PMC_PCK_CSS_SLOW_CLK (0x0u << 0) /**< \brief (PMC_PCK[3]) Slow Clock is selected */
04187 #define   PMC_PCK_CSS_MAIN_CLK (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (PMC_PCK[3]) Main Clock is selected */
04188 #define   PMC_PCK_CSS_PLLA_CLK (0x2u << 0) /**< \brief (PMC_PCK[3]) PLLA Clock is selected */
04189 #define   PMC_PCK_CSS_UPLL_CLK (0x3u << 0) /**< \brief (PMC_PCK[3]) UPLL/2 Clock is selected */
04190 #define   PMC_PCK_CSS_MCK (0x4u << 0) /**< \brief (PMC_PCK[3]) Master Clock is selected */
04191 #define PMC_PCK_PRES_Pos 4
04192 #define PMC_PCK_PRES_Msk (0x7u << PMC_PCK_PRES_Pos) /**< \brief (PMC_PCK[3]) Programmable Clock Prescaler */
04193 #define   PMC_PCK_PRES_CLK_1 (0x0u << 4) /**< \brief (PMC_PCK[3]) Selected clock */
04194 #define   PMC_PCK_PRES_CLK_2 (0x1u << 4) /**< \brief (PMC_PCK[3]) Selected clock divided by 2 */
04195 #define   PMC_PCK_PRES_CLK_4 (0x2u << 4) /**< \brief (PMC_PCK[3]) Selected clock divided by 4 */
04196 #define   PMC_PCK_PRES_CLK_8 (0x3u << 4) /**< \brief (PMC_PCK[3]) Selected clock divided by 8 */
04197 #define   PMC_PCK_PRES_CLK_16 (0x4u << 4) /**< \brief (PMC_PCK[3]) Selected clock divided by 16 */
04198 #define   PMC_PCK_PRES_CLK_32 (0x5u << 4) /**< \brief (PMC_PCK[3]) Selected clock divided by 32 */
04199 #define   PMC_PCK_PRES_CLK_64 (0x6u << 4) /**< \brief (PMC_PCK[3]) Selected clock divided by 64 */
04200 /* -------- PMC_IER : (PMC Offset: 0x0060) Interrupt Enable Register -------- */
04201 #define PMC_IER_MOSCXTS (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (PMC_IER) Main Crystal Oscillator Status Interrupt Enable */
04202 #define PMC_IER_LOCKA (0x1u << 1) /**< \brief (PMC_IER) PLL A Lock Interrupt Enable */
04203 #define PMC_IER_MCKRDY (0x1u << 3) /**< \brief (PMC_IER) Master Clock Ready Interrupt Enable */
04204 #define PMC_IER_LOCKU (0x1u << 6) /**< \brief (PMC_IER) UTMI PLL Lock Interrupt Enable */
04205 #define PMC_IER_PCKRDY0 (0x1u << 8) /**< \brief (PMC_IER) Programmable Clock Ready 0 Interrupt Enable */
04206 #define PMC_IER_PCKRDY1 (0x1u << 9) /**< \brief (PMC_IER) Programmable Clock Ready 1 Interrupt Enable */
04207 #define PMC_IER_PCKRDY2 (0x1u << 10) /**< \brief (PMC_IER) Programmable Clock Ready 2 Interrupt Enable */
04208 #define PMC_IER_MOSCSELS (0x1u << 16) /**< \brief (PMC_IER) Main Oscillator Selection Status Interrupt Enable */
04209 #define PMC_IER_MOSCRCS (0x1u << 17) /**< \brief (PMC_IER) Main On-Chip RC Status Interrupt Enable */
04210 #define PMC_IER_CFDEV (0x1u << 18) /**< \brief (PMC_IER) Clock Failure Detector Event Interrupt Enable */
04211 /* -------- PMC_IDR : (PMC Offset: 0x0064) Interrupt Disable Register -------- */
04212 #define PMC_IDR_MOSCXTS (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (PMC_IDR) Main Crystal Oscillator Status Interrupt Disable */
04213 #define PMC_IDR_LOCKA (0x1u << 1) /**< \brief (PMC_IDR) PLL A Lock Interrupt Disable */
04214 #define PMC_IDR_MCKRDY (0x1u << 3) /**< \brief (PMC_IDR) Master Clock Ready Interrupt Disable */
04215 #define PMC_IDR_LOCKU (0x1u << 6) /**< \brief (PMC_IDR) UTMI PLL Lock Interrupt Disable */
04216 #define PMC_IDR_PCKRDY0 (0x1u << 8) /**< \brief (PMC_IDR) Programmable Clock Ready 0 Interrupt Disable */
04217 #define PMC_IDR_PCKRDY1 (0x1u << 9) /**< \brief (PMC_IDR) Programmable Clock Ready 1 Interrupt Disable */
04218 #define PMC_IDR_PCKRDY2 (0x1u << 10) /**< \brief (PMC_IDR) Programmable Clock Ready 2 Interrupt Disable */
04219 #define PMC_IDR_MOSCSELS (0x1u << 16) /**< \brief (PMC_IDR) Main Oscillator Selection Status Interrupt Disable */
04220 #define PMC_IDR_MOSCRCS (0x1u << 17) /**< \brief (PMC_IDR) Main On-Chip RC Status Interrupt Disable */
04221 #define PMC_IDR_CFDEV (0x1u << 18) /**< \brief (PMC_IDR) Clock Failure Detector Event Interrupt Disable */
04222 /* -------- PMC_SR : (PMC Offset: 0x0068) Status Register -------- */
04223 #define PMC_SR_MOSCXTS (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (PMC_SR) Main XTAL Oscillator Status */
04224 #define PMC_SR_LOCKA (0x1u << 1) /**< \brief (PMC_SR) PLL A Lock Status */
04225 #define PMC_SR_MCKRDY (0x1u << 3) /**< \brief (PMC_SR) Master Clock Status */
04226 #define PMC_SR_LOCKU (0x1u << 6) /**< \brief (PMC_SR) UTMI PLL Lock Status */
04227 #define PMC_SR_OSCSELS (0x1u << 7) /**< \brief (PMC_SR) Slow Clock Oscillator Selection */
04228 #define PMC_SR_PCKRDY0 (0x1u << 8) /**< \brief (PMC_SR) Programmable Clock Ready Status */
04229 #define PMC_SR_PCKRDY1 (0x1u << 9) /**< \brief (PMC_SR) Programmable Clock Ready Status */
04230 #define PMC_SR_PCKRDY2 (0x1u << 10) /**< \brief (PMC_SR) Programmable Clock Ready Status */
04231 #define PMC_SR_MOSCSELS (0x1u << 16) /**< \brief (PMC_SR) Main Oscillator Selection Status */
04232 #define PMC_SR_MOSCRCS (0x1u << 17) /**< \brief (PMC_SR) Main On-Chip RC Oscillator Status */
04233 #define PMC_SR_CFDEV (0x1u << 18) /**< \brief (PMC_SR) Clock Failure Detector Event */
04234 #define PMC_SR_CFDS (0x1u << 19) /**< \brief (PMC_SR) Clock Failure Detector Status */
04235 #define PMC_SR_FOS (0x1u << 20) /**< \brief (PMC_SR) Clock Failure Detector Fault Output Status */
04236 /* -------- PMC_IMR : (PMC Offset: 0x006C) Interrupt Mask Register -------- */
04237 #define PMC_IMR_MOSCXTS (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (PMC_IMR) Main Crystal Oscillator Status Interrupt Mask */
04238 #define PMC_IMR_LOCKA (0x1u << 1) /**< \brief (PMC_IMR) PLL A Lock Interrupt Mask */
04239 #define PMC_IMR_MCKRDY (0x1u << 3) /**< \brief (PMC_IMR) Master Clock Ready Interrupt Mask */
04240 #define PMC_IMR_LOCKU (0x1u << 6) /**< \brief (PMC_IMR) UTMI PLL Lock Interrupt Mask */
04241 #define PMC_IMR_PCKRDY0 (0x1u << 8) /**< \brief (PMC_IMR) Programmable Clock Ready 0 Interrupt Mask */
04242 #define PMC_IMR_PCKRDY1 (0x1u << 9) /**< \brief (PMC_IMR) Programmable Clock Ready 1 Interrupt Mask */
04243 #define PMC_IMR_PCKRDY2 (0x1u << 10) /**< \brief (PMC_IMR) Programmable Clock Ready 2 Interrupt Mask */
04244 #define PMC_IMR_MOSCSELS (0x1u << 16) /**< \brief (PMC_IMR) Main Oscillator Selection Status Interrupt Mask */
04245 #define PMC_IMR_MOSCRCS (0x1u << 17) /**< \brief (PMC_IMR) Main On-Chip RC Status Interrupt Mask */
04246 #define PMC_IMR_CFDEV (0x1u << 18) /**< \brief (PMC_IMR) Clock Failure Detector Event Interrupt Mask */
04247 /* -------- PMC_FSMR : (PMC Offset: 0x0070) Fast Startup Mode Register -------- */
04248 #define PMC_FSMR_FSTT0 (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (PMC_FSMR) Fast Startup Input Enable 0 */
04249 #define PMC_FSMR_FSTT1 (0x1u << 1) /**< \brief (PMC_FSMR) Fast Startup Input Enable 1 */
04250 #define PMC_FSMR_FSTT2 (0x1u << 2) /**< \brief (PMC_FSMR) Fast Startup Input Enable 2 */
04251 #define PMC_FSMR_FSTT3 (0x1u << 3) /**< \brief (PMC_FSMR) Fast Startup Input Enable 3 */
04252 #define PMC_FSMR_FSTT4 (0x1u << 4) /**< \brief (PMC_FSMR) Fast Startup Input Enable 4 */
04253 #define PMC_FSMR_FSTT5 (0x1u << 5) /**< \brief (PMC_FSMR) Fast Startup Input Enable 5 */
04254 #define PMC_FSMR_FSTT6 (0x1u << 6) /**< \brief (PMC_FSMR) Fast Startup Input Enable 6 */
04255 #define PMC_FSMR_FSTT7 (0x1u << 7) /**< \brief (PMC_FSMR) Fast Startup Input Enable 7 */
04256 #define PMC_FSMR_FSTT8 (0x1u << 8) /**< \brief (PMC_FSMR) Fast Startup Input Enable 8 */
04257 #define PMC_FSMR_FSTT9 (0x1u << 9) /**< \brief (PMC_FSMR) Fast Startup Input Enable 9 */
04258 #define PMC_FSMR_FSTT10 (0x1u << 10) /**< \brief (PMC_FSMR) Fast Startup Input Enable 10 */
04259 #define PMC_FSMR_FSTT11 (0x1u << 11) /**< \brief (PMC_FSMR) Fast Startup Input Enable 11 */
04260 #define PMC_FSMR_FSTT12 (0x1u << 12) /**< \brief (PMC_FSMR) Fast Startup Input Enable 12 */
04261 #define PMC_FSMR_FSTT13 (0x1u << 13) /**< \brief (PMC_FSMR) Fast Startup Input Enable 13 */
04262 #define PMC_FSMR_FSTT14 (0x1u << 14) /**< \brief (PMC_FSMR) Fast Startup Input Enable 14 */
04263 #define PMC_FSMR_FSTT15 (0x1u << 15) /**< \brief (PMC_FSMR) Fast Startup Input Enable 15 */
04264 #define PMC_FSMR_RTTAL (0x1u << 16) /**< \brief (PMC_FSMR) RTT Alarm Enable */
04265 #define PMC_FSMR_RTCAL (0x1u << 17) /**< \brief (PMC_FSMR) RTC Alarm Enable */
04266 #define PMC_FSMR_USBAL (0x1u << 18) /**< \brief (PMC_FSMR) USB Alarm Enable */
04267 #define PMC_FSMR_LPM (0x1u << 20) /**< \brief (PMC_FSMR) Low Power Mode */
04268 /* -------- PMC_FSPR : (PMC Offset: 0x0074) Fast Startup Polarity Register -------- */
04269 #define PMC_FSPR_FSTP0 (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (PMC_FSPR)  */
04270 #define PMC_FSPR_FSTP1 (0x1u << 1) /**< \brief (PMC_FSPR)  */
04271 #define PMC_FSPR_FSTP2 (0x1u << 2) /**< \brief (PMC_FSPR)  */
04272 #define PMC_FSPR_FSTP3 (0x1u << 3) /**< \brief (PMC_FSPR)  */
04273 #define PMC_FSPR_FSTP4 (0x1u << 4) /**< \brief (PMC_FSPR)  */
04274 #define PMC_FSPR_FSTP5 (0x1u << 5) /**< \brief (PMC_FSPR)  */
04275 #define PMC_FSPR_FSTP6 (0x1u << 6) /**< \brief (PMC_FSPR)  */
04276 #define PMC_FSPR_FSTP7 (0x1u << 7) /**< \brief (PMC_FSPR)  */
04277 #define PMC_FSPR_FSTP8 (0x1u << 8) /**< \brief (PMC_FSPR)  */
04278 #define PMC_FSPR_FSTP9 (0x1u << 9) /**< \brief (PMC_FSPR)  */
04279 #define PMC_FSPR_FSTP10 (0x1u << 10) /**< \brief (PMC_FSPR)  */
04280 #define PMC_FSPR_FSTP11 (0x1u << 11) /**< \brief (PMC_FSPR)  */
04281 #define PMC_FSPR_FSTP12 (0x1u << 12) /**< \brief (PMC_FSPR)  */
04282 #define PMC_FSPR_FSTP13 (0x1u << 13) /**< \brief (PMC_FSPR)  */
04283 #define PMC_FSPR_FSTP14 (0x1u << 14) /**< \brief (PMC_FSPR)  */
04284 #define PMC_FSPR_FSTP15 (0x1u << 15) /**< \brief (PMC_FSPR)  */
04285 /* -------- PMC_FOCR : (PMC Offset: 0x0078) Fault Output Clear Register -------- */
04286 #define PMC_FOCR_FOCLR (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (PMC_FOCR) Fault Output Clear */
04287 /* -------- PMC_WPMR : (PMC Offset: 0x00E4) Write Protect Mode Register -------- */
04288 #define PMC_WPMR_WPEN (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (PMC_WPMR) Write Protect Enable */
04289 #define PMC_WPMR_WPKEY_Pos 8
04290 #define PMC_WPMR_WPKEY_Msk (0xffffffu << PMC_WPMR_WPKEY_Pos) /**< \brief (PMC_WPMR) Write Protect KEY */
04291 #define PMC_WPMR_WPKEY(value) ((PMC_WPMR_WPKEY_Msk & ((value) << PMC_WPMR_WPKEY_Pos)))
04292 /* -------- PMC_WPSR : (PMC Offset: 0x00E8) Write Protect Status Register -------- */
04293 #define PMC_WPSR_WPVS (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (PMC_WPSR) Write Protect Violation Status */
04294 #define PMC_WPSR_WPVSRC_Pos 8
04295 #define PMC_WPSR_WPVSRC_Msk (0xffffu << PMC_WPSR_WPVSRC_Pos) /**< \brief (PMC_WPSR) Write Protect Violation Source */
04296 /* -------- PMC_PCER1 : (PMC Offset: 0x0100) Peripheral Clock Enable Register 1 -------- */
04297 #define PMC_PCER1_PID32 (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (PMC_PCER1) Peripheral Clock 32 Enable */
04298 #define PMC_PCER1_PID33 (0x1u << 1) /**< \brief (PMC_PCER1) Peripheral Clock 33 Enable */
04299 #define PMC_PCER1_PID34 (0x1u << 2) /**< \brief (PMC_PCER1) Peripheral Clock 34 Enable */
04300 #define PMC_PCER1_PID35 (0x1u << 3) /**< \brief (PMC_PCER1) Peripheral Clock 35 Enable */
04301 #define PMC_PCER1_PID36 (0x1u << 4) /**< \brief (PMC_PCER1) Peripheral Clock 36 Enable */
04302 #define PMC_PCER1_PID37 (0x1u << 5) /**< \brief (PMC_PCER1) Peripheral Clock 37 Enable */
04303 #define PMC_PCER1_PID38 (0x1u << 6) /**< \brief (PMC_PCER1) Peripheral Clock 38 Enable */
04304 #define PMC_PCER1_PID39 (0x1u << 7) /**< \brief (PMC_PCER1) Peripheral Clock 39 Enable */
04305 #define PMC_PCER1_PID40 (0x1u << 8) /**< \brief (PMC_PCER1) Peripheral Clock 40 Enable */
04306 #define PMC_PCER1_PID41 (0x1u << 9) /**< \brief (PMC_PCER1) Peripheral Clock 41 Enable */
04307 #define PMC_PCER1_PID42 (0x1u << 10) /**< \brief (PMC_PCER1) Peripheral Clock 42 Enable */
04308 #define PMC_PCER1_PID43 (0x1u << 11) /**< \brief (PMC_PCER1) Peripheral Clock 43 Enable */
04309 #define PMC_PCER1_PID44 (0x1u << 12) /**< \brief (PMC_PCER1) Peripheral Clock 44 Enable */
04310 /* -------- PMC_PCDR1 : (PMC Offset: 0x0104) Peripheral Clock Disable Register 1 -------- */
04311 #define PMC_PCDR1_PID32 (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (PMC_PCDR1) Peripheral Clock 32 Disable */
04312 #define PMC_PCDR1_PID33 (0x1u << 1) /**< \brief (PMC_PCDR1) Peripheral Clock 33 Disable */
04313 #define PMC_PCDR1_PID34 (0x1u << 2) /**< \brief (PMC_PCDR1) Peripheral Clock 34 Disable */
04314 #define PMC_PCDR1_PID35 (0x1u << 3) /**< \brief (PMC_PCDR1) Peripheral Clock 35 Disable */
04315 #define PMC_PCDR1_PID36 (0x1u << 4) /**< \brief (PMC_PCDR1) Peripheral Clock 36 Disable */
04316 #define PMC_PCDR1_PID37 (0x1u << 5) /**< \brief (PMC_PCDR1) Peripheral Clock 37 Disable */
04317 #define PMC_PCDR1_PID38 (0x1u << 6) /**< \brief (PMC_PCDR1) Peripheral Clock 38 Disable */
04318 #define PMC_PCDR1_PID39 (0x1u << 7) /**< \brief (PMC_PCDR1) Peripheral Clock 39 Disable */
04319 #define PMC_PCDR1_PID40 (0x1u << 8) /**< \brief (PMC_PCDR1) Peripheral Clock 40 Disable */
04320 #define PMC_PCDR1_PID41 (0x1u << 9) /**< \brief (PMC_PCDR1) Peripheral Clock 41 Disable */
04321 #define PMC_PCDR1_PID42 (0x1u << 10) /**< \brief (PMC_PCDR1) Peripheral Clock 42 Disable */
04322 #define PMC_PCDR1_PID43 (0x1u << 11) /**< \brief (PMC_PCDR1) Peripheral Clock 43 Disable */
04323 #define PMC_PCDR1_PID44 (0x1u << 12) /**< \brief (PMC_PCDR1) Peripheral Clock 44 Disable */
04324 /* -------- PMC_PCSR1 : (PMC Offset: 0x0108) Peripheral Clock Status Register 1 -------- */
04325 #define PMC_PCSR1_PID32 (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (PMC_PCSR1) Peripheral Clock 32 Status */
04326 #define PMC_PCSR1_PID33 (0x1u << 1) /**< \brief (PMC_PCSR1) Peripheral Clock 33 Status */
04327 #define PMC_PCSR1_PID34 (0x1u << 2) /**< \brief (PMC_PCSR1) Peripheral Clock 34 Status */
04328 #define PMC_PCSR1_PID35 (0x1u << 3) /**< \brief (PMC_PCSR1) Peripheral Clock 35 Status */
04329 #define PMC_PCSR1_PID36 (0x1u << 4) /**< \brief (PMC_PCSR1) Peripheral Clock 36 Status */
04330 #define PMC_PCSR1_PID37 (0x1u << 5) /**< \brief (PMC_PCSR1) Peripheral Clock 37 Status */
04331 #define PMC_PCSR1_PID38 (0x1u << 6) /**< \brief (PMC_PCSR1) Peripheral Clock 38 Status */
04332 #define PMC_PCSR1_PID39 (0x1u << 7) /**< \brief (PMC_PCSR1) Peripheral Clock 39 Status */
04333 #define PMC_PCSR1_PID40 (0x1u << 8) /**< \brief (PMC_PCSR1) Peripheral Clock 40 Status */
04334 #define PMC_PCSR1_PID41 (0x1u << 9) /**< \brief (PMC_PCSR1) Peripheral Clock 41 Status */
04335 #define PMC_PCSR1_PID42 (0x1u << 10) /**< \brief (PMC_PCSR1) Peripheral Clock 42 Status */
04336 #define PMC_PCSR1_PID43 (0x1u << 11) /**< \brief (PMC_PCSR1) Peripheral Clock 43 Status */
04337 #define PMC_PCSR1_PID44 (0x1u << 12) /**< \brief (PMC_PCSR1) Peripheral Clock 44 Status */
04338 /* -------- PMC_PCR : (PMC Offset: 0x010C) Peripheral Control Register -------- */
04339 #define PMC_PCR_PID_Pos 0
04340 #define PMC_PCR_PID_Msk (0x3fu << PMC_PCR_PID_Pos) /**< \brief (PMC_PCR) Peripheral ID */
04341 #define PMC_PCR_PID(value) ((PMC_PCR_PID_Msk & ((value) << PMC_PCR_PID_Pos)))
04342 #define PMC_PCR_CMD (0x1u << 12) /**< \brief (PMC_PCR) Command */
04343 #define PMC_PCR_DIV_Pos 16
04344 #define PMC_PCR_DIV_Msk (0x3u << PMC_PCR_DIV_Pos) /**< \brief (PMC_PCR) Divisor Value */
04345 #define   PMC_PCR_DIV_PERIPH_DIV_MCK (0x0u << 16) /**< \brief (PMC_PCR) Peripheral clock is MCK */
04346 #define   PMC_PCR_DIV_PERIPH_DIV2_MCK (0x1u << 16) /**< \brief (PMC_PCR) Peripheral clock is MCK/2 */
04347 #define   PMC_PCR_DIV_PERIPH_DIV4_MCK (0x2u << 16) /**< \brief (PMC_PCR) Peripheral clock is MCK/4 */
04348 #define PMC_PCR_EN (0x1u << 28) /**< \brief (PMC_PCR) Enable */
04349 
04350 /*@}*/
04351 
04352 /* ============================================================================= */
04353 /**  SOFTWARE API DEFINITION FOR Pulse Width Modulation Controller */
04354 /* ============================================================================= */
04355 /** \addtogroup SAM3XA_PWM Pulse Width Modulation Controller */
04356 /*@{*/
04357 
04358 #ifndef __ASSEMBLY__
04359 /** \brief PwmCh_num hardware registers */
04360 typedef struct {
04361   RwReg      PWM_CMR;       /**< \brief (PwmCh_num Offset: 0x0) PWM Channel Mode Register */
04362   RwReg      PWM_CDTY;      /**< \brief (PwmCh_num Offset: 0x4) PWM Channel Duty Cycle Register */
04363   RwReg      PWM_CDTYUPD;   /**< \brief (PwmCh_num Offset: 0x8) PWM Channel Duty Cycle Update Register */
04364   RwReg      PWM_CPRD;      /**< \brief (PwmCh_num Offset: 0xC) PWM Channel Period Register */
04365   RwReg      PWM_CPRDUPD;   /**< \brief (PwmCh_num Offset: 0x10) PWM Channel Period Update Register */
04366   RwReg      PWM_CCNT;      /**< \brief (PwmCh_num Offset: 0x14) PWM Channel Counter Register */
04367   RwReg      PWM_DT;        /**< \brief (PwmCh_num Offset: 0x18) PWM Channel Dead Time Register */
04368   RwReg      PWM_DTUPD;     /**< \brief (PwmCh_num Offset: 0x1C) PWM Channel Dead Time Update Register */
04369 } PwmCh_num;
04370 /** \brief PwmCmp hardware registers */
04371 typedef struct {
04372   RwReg      PWM_CMPV;      /**< \brief (PwmCmp Offset: 0x0) PWM Comparison 0 Value Register */
04373   RwReg      PWM_CMPVUPD;   /**< \brief (PwmCmp Offset: 0x4) PWM Comparison 0 Value Update Register */
04374   RwReg      PWM_CMPM;      /**< \brief (PwmCmp Offset: 0x8) PWM Comparison 0 Mode Register */
04375   RwReg      PWM_CMPMUPD;   /**< \brief (PwmCmp Offset: 0xC) PWM Comparison 0 Mode Update Register */
04376 } PwmCmp;
04377 /** \brief Pwm hardware registers */
04378 #define PWMCMP_NUMBER 8
04379 #define PWMCH_NUM_NUMBER 8
04380 typedef struct {
04381   RwReg      PWM_CLK;       /**< \brief (Pwm Offset: 0x00) PWM Clock Register */
04382   WoReg      PWM_ENA;       /**< \brief (Pwm Offset: 0x04) PWM Enable Register */
04383   WoReg      PWM_DIS;       /**< \brief (Pwm Offset: 0x08) PWM Disable Register */
04384   RoReg      PWM_SR;        /**< \brief (Pwm Offset: 0x0C) PWM Status Register */
04385   WoReg      PWM_IER1;      /**< \brief (Pwm Offset: 0x10) PWM Interrupt Enable Register 1 */
04386   WoReg      PWM_IDR1;      /**< \brief (Pwm Offset: 0x14) PWM Interrupt Disable Register 1 */
04387   RoReg      PWM_IMR1;      /**< \brief (Pwm Offset: 0x18) PWM Interrupt Mask Register 1 */
04388   RoReg      PWM_ISR1;      /**< \brief (Pwm Offset: 0x1C) PWM Interrupt Status Register 1 */
04389   RwReg      PWM_SCM;       /**< \brief (Pwm Offset: 0x20) PWM Sync Channels Mode Register */
04390   RoReg      Reserved1[1];
04391   RwReg      PWM_SCUC;      /**< \brief (Pwm Offset: 0x28) PWM Sync Channels Update Control Register */
04392   RwReg      PWM_SCUP;      /**< \brief (Pwm Offset: 0x2C) PWM Sync Channels Update Period Register */
04393   WoReg      PWM_SCUPUPD;   /**< \brief (Pwm Offset: 0x30) PWM Sync Channels Update Period Update Register */
04394   WoReg      PWM_IER2;      /**< \brief (Pwm Offset: 0x34) PWM Interrupt Enable Register 2 */
04395   WoReg      PWM_IDR2;      /**< \brief (Pwm Offset: 0x38) PWM Interrupt Disable Register 2 */
04396   RoReg      PWM_IMR2;      /**< \brief (Pwm Offset: 0x3C) PWM Interrupt Mask Register 2 */
04397   RoReg      PWM_ISR2;      /**< \brief (Pwm Offset: 0x40) PWM Interrupt Status Register 2 */
04398   RwReg      PWM_OOV;       /**< \brief (Pwm Offset: 0x44) PWM Output Override Value Register */
04399   RwReg      PWM_OS;        /**< \brief (Pwm Offset: 0x48) PWM Output Selection Register */
04400   WoReg      PWM_OSS;       /**< \brief (Pwm Offset: 0x4C) PWM Output Selection Set Register */
04401   WoReg      PWM_OSC;       /**< \brief (Pwm Offset: 0x50) PWM Output Selection Clear Register */
04402   WoReg      PWM_OSSUPD;    /**< \brief (Pwm Offset: 0x54) PWM Output Selection Set Update Register */
04403   WoReg      PWM_OSCUPD;    /**< \brief (Pwm Offset: 0x58) PWM Output Selection Clear Update Register */
04404   RwReg      PWM_FMR;       /**< \brief (Pwm Offset: 0x5C) PWM Fault Mode Register */
04405   RoReg      PWM_FSR;       /**< \brief (Pwm Offset: 0x60) PWM Fault Status Register */
04406   WoReg      PWM_FCR;       /**< \brief (Pwm Offset: 0x64) PWM Fault Clear Register */
04407   RwReg      PWM_FPV;       /**< \brief (Pwm Offset: 0x68) PWM Fault Protection Value Register */
04408   RwReg      PWM_FPE1;      /**< \brief (Pwm Offset: 0x6C) PWM Fault Protection Enable Register 1 */
04409   RwReg      PWM_FPE2;      /**< \brief (Pwm Offset: 0x70) PWM Fault Protection Enable Register 2 */
04410   RoReg      Reserved2[2];
04411   RwReg      PWM_ELMR[2];   /**< \brief (Pwm Offset: 0x7C) PWM Event Line 0 Mode Register */
04412   RoReg      Reserved3[11];
04413   RwReg      PWM_SMMR;      /**< \brief (Pwm Offset: 0xB0) PWM Stepper Motor Mode Register */
04414   RoReg      Reserved4[12];
04415   WoReg      PWM_WPCR;      /**< \brief (Pwm Offset: 0xE4) PWM Write Protect Control Register */
04416   RoReg      PWM_WPSR;      /**< \brief (Pwm Offset: 0xE8) PWM Write Protect Status Register */
04417   RoReg      Reserved5[5];
04418   RwReg      PWM_RPR;       /**< \brief (Pwm Offset: 0x100) Receive Pointer Register */
04419   RwReg      PWM_RCR;       /**< \brief (Pwm Offset: 0x104) Receive Counter Register */
04420   RwReg      PWM_TPR;       /**< \brief (Pwm Offset: 0x108) Transmit Pointer Register */
04421   RwReg      PWM_TCR;       /**< \brief (Pwm Offset: 0x10C) Transmit Counter Register */
04422   RwReg      PWM_RNPR;      /**< \brief (Pwm Offset: 0x110) Receive Next Pointer Register */
04423   RwReg      PWM_RNCR;      /**< \brief (Pwm Offset: 0x114) Receive Next Counter Register */
04424   RwReg      PWM_TNPR;      /**< \brief (Pwm Offset: 0x118) Transmit Next Pointer Register */
04425   RwReg      PWM_TNCR;      /**< \brief (Pwm Offset: 0x11C) Transmit Next Counter Register */
04426   WoReg      PWM_PTCR;      /**< \brief (Pwm Offset: 0x120) Transfer Control Register */
04427   RoReg      PWM_PTSR;      /**< \brief (Pwm Offset: 0x124) Transfer Status Register */
04428   RoReg      Reserved6[2];
04429   PwmCmp     PWM_CMP[PWMCMP_NUMBER]; /**< \brief (Pwm Offset: 0x130) 0 .. 7 */
04430   RoReg      Reserved7[20];
04431   PwmCh_num  PWM_CH_NUM[PWMCH_NUM_NUMBER]; /**< \brief (Pwm Offset: 0x200) ch_num = 0 .. 7 */
04432 } Pwm;
04433 #endif /* __ASSEMBLY__ */
04434 /* -------- PWM_CLK : (PWM Offset: 0x00) PWM Clock Register -------- */
04435 #define PWM_CLK_DIVA_Pos 0
04436 #define PWM_CLK_DIVA_Msk (0xffu << PWM_CLK_DIVA_Pos) /**< \brief (PWM_CLK) CLKA, CLKB Divide Factor */
04437 #define PWM_CLK_DIVA(value) ((PWM_CLK_DIVA_Msk & ((value) << PWM_CLK_DIVA_Pos)))
04438 #define PWM_CLK_PREA_Pos 8
04439 #define PWM_CLK_PREA_Msk (0xfu << PWM_CLK_PREA_Pos) /**< \brief (PWM_CLK) CLKA, CLKB Source Clock Selection */
04440 #define PWM_CLK_PREA(value) ((PWM_CLK_PREA_Msk & ((value) << PWM_CLK_PREA_Pos)))
04441 #define PWM_CLK_DIVB_Pos 16
04442 #define PWM_CLK_DIVB_Msk (0xffu << PWM_CLK_DIVB_Pos) /**< \brief (PWM_CLK) CLKA, CLKB Divide Factor */
04443 #define PWM_CLK_DIVB(value) ((PWM_CLK_DIVB_Msk & ((value) << PWM_CLK_DIVB_Pos)))
04444 #define PWM_CLK_PREB_Pos 24
04445 #define PWM_CLK_PREB_Msk (0xfu << PWM_CLK_PREB_Pos) /**< \brief (PWM_CLK) CLKA, CLKB Source Clock Selection */
04446 #define PWM_CLK_PREB(value) ((PWM_CLK_PREB_Msk & ((value) << PWM_CLK_PREB_Pos)))
04447 /* -------- PWM_ENA : (PWM Offset: 0x04) PWM Enable Register -------- */
04448 #define PWM_ENA_CHID0 (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (PWM_ENA) Channel ID */
04449 #define PWM_ENA_CHID1 (0x1u << 1) /**< \brief (PWM_ENA) Channel ID */
04450 #define PWM_ENA_CHID2 (0x1u << 2) /**< \brief (PWM_ENA) Channel ID */
04451 #define PWM_ENA_CHID3 (0x1u << 3) /**< \brief (PWM_ENA) Channel ID */
04452 #define PWM_ENA_CHID4 (0x1u << 4) /**< \brief (PWM_ENA) Channel ID */
04453 #define PWM_ENA_CHID5 (0x1u << 5) /**< \brief (PWM_ENA) Channel ID */
04454 #define PWM_ENA_CHID6 (0x1u << 6) /**< \brief (PWM_ENA) Channel ID */
04455 #define PWM_ENA_CHID7 (0x1u << 7) /**< \brief (PWM_ENA) Channel ID */
04456 /* -------- PWM_DIS : (PWM Offset: 0x08) PWM Disable Register -------- */
04457 #define PWM_DIS_CHID0 (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (PWM_DIS) Channel ID */
04458 #define PWM_DIS_CHID1 (0x1u << 1) /**< \brief (PWM_DIS) Channel ID */
04459 #define PWM_DIS_CHID2 (0x1u << 2) /**< \brief (PWM_DIS) Channel ID */
04460 #define PWM_DIS_CHID3 (0x1u << 3) /**< \brief (PWM_DIS) Channel ID */
04461 #define PWM_DIS_CHID4 (0x1u << 4) /**< \brief (PWM_DIS) Channel ID */
04462 #define PWM_DIS_CHID5 (0x1u << 5) /**< \brief (PWM_DIS) Channel ID */
04463 #define PWM_DIS_CHID6 (0x1u << 6) /**< \brief (PWM_DIS) Channel ID */
04464 #define PWM_DIS_CHID7 (0x1u << 7) /**< \brief (PWM_DIS) Channel ID */
04465 /* -------- PWM_SR : (PWM Offset: 0x0C) PWM Status Register -------- */
04466 #define PWM_SR_CHID0 (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (PWM_SR) Channel ID */
04467 #define PWM_SR_CHID1 (0x1u << 1) /**< \brief (PWM_SR) Channel ID */
04468 #define PWM_SR_CHID2 (0x1u << 2) /**< \brief (PWM_SR) Channel ID */
04469 #define PWM_SR_CHID3 (0x1u << 3) /**< \brief (PWM_SR) Channel ID */
04470 #define PWM_SR_CHID4 (0x1u << 4) /**< \brief (PWM_SR) Channel ID */
04471 #define PWM_SR_CHID5 (0x1u << 5) /**< \brief (PWM_SR) Channel ID */
04472 #define PWM_SR_CHID6 (0x1u << 6) /**< \brief (PWM_SR) Channel ID */
04473 #define PWM_SR_CHID7 (0x1u << 7) /**< \brief (PWM_SR) Channel ID */
04474 /* -------- PWM_IER1 : (PWM Offset: 0x10) PWM Interrupt Enable Register 1 -------- */
04475 #define PWM_IER1_CHID0 (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (PWM_IER1) Counter Event on Channel 0 Interrupt Enable */
04476 #define PWM_IER1_CHID1 (0x1u << 1) /**< \brief (PWM_IER1) Counter Event on Channel 1 Interrupt Enable */
04477 #define PWM_IER1_CHID2 (0x1u << 2) /**< \brief (PWM_IER1) Counter Event on Channel 2 Interrupt Enable */
04478 #define PWM_IER1_CHID3 (0x1u << 3) /**< \brief (PWM_IER1) Counter Event on Channel 3 Interrupt Enable */
04479 #define PWM_IER1_CHID4 (0x1u << 4) /**< \brief (PWM_IER1) Counter Event on Channel 4 Interrupt Enable */
04480 #define PWM_IER1_CHID5 (0x1u << 5) /**< \brief (PWM_IER1) Counter Event on Channel 5 Interrupt Enable */
04481 #define PWM_IER1_CHID6 (0x1u << 6) /**< \brief (PWM_IER1) Counter Event on Channel 6 Interrupt Enable */
04482 #define PWM_IER1_CHID7 (0x1u << 7) /**< \brief (PWM_IER1) Counter Event on Channel 7 Interrupt Enable */
04483 #define PWM_IER1_FCHID0 (0x1u << 16) /**< \brief (PWM_IER1) Fault Protection Trigger on Channel 0 Interrupt Enable */
04484 #define PWM_IER1_FCHID1 (0x1u << 17) /**< \brief (PWM_IER1) Fault Protection Trigger on Channel 1 Interrupt Enable */
04485 #define PWM_IER1_FCHID2 (0x1u << 18) /**< \brief (PWM_IER1) Fault Protection Trigger on Channel 2 Interrupt Enable */
04486 #define PWM_IER1_FCHID3 (0x1u << 19) /**< \brief (PWM_IER1) Fault Protection Trigger on Channel 3 Interrupt Enable */
04487 #define PWM_IER1_FCHID4 (0x1u << 20) /**< \brief (PWM_IER1) Fault Protection Trigger on Channel 4 Interrupt Enable */
04488 #define PWM_IER1_FCHID5 (0x1u << 21) /**< \brief (PWM_IER1) Fault Protection Trigger on Channel 5 Interrupt Enable */
04489 #define PWM_IER1_FCHID6 (0x1u << 22) /**< \brief (PWM_IER1) Fault Protection Trigger on Channel 6 Interrupt Enable */
04490 #define PWM_IER1_FCHID7 (0x1u << 23) /**< \brief (PWM_IER1) Fault Protection Trigger on Channel 7 Interrupt Enable */
04491 /* -------- PWM_IDR1 : (PWM Offset: 0x14) PWM Interrupt Disable Register 1 -------- */
04492 #define PWM_IDR1_CHID0 (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (PWM_IDR1) Counter Event on Channel 0 Interrupt Disable */
04493 #define PWM_IDR1_CHID1 (0x1u << 1) /**< \brief (PWM_IDR1) Counter Event on Channel 1 Interrupt Disable */
04494 #define PWM_IDR1_CHID2 (0x1u << 2) /**< \brief (PWM_IDR1) Counter Event on Channel 2 Interrupt Disable */
04495 #define PWM_IDR1_CHID3 (0x1u << 3) /**< \brief (PWM_IDR1) Counter Event on Channel 3 Interrupt Disable */
04496 #define PWM_IDR1_CHID4 (0x1u << 4) /**< \brief (PWM_IDR1) Counter Event on Channel 4 Interrupt Disable */
04497 #define PWM_IDR1_CHID5 (0x1u << 5) /**< \brief (PWM_IDR1) Counter Event on Channel 5 Interrupt Disable */
04498 #define PWM_IDR1_CHID6 (0x1u << 6) /**< \brief (PWM_IDR1) Counter Event on Channel 6 Interrupt Disable */
04499 #define PWM_IDR1_CHID7 (0x1u << 7) /**< \brief (PWM_IDR1) Counter Event on Channel 7 Interrupt Disable */
04500 #define PWM_IDR1_FCHID0 (0x1u << 16) /**< \brief (PWM_IDR1) Fault Protection Trigger on Channel 0 Interrupt Disable */
04501 #define PWM_IDR1_FCHID1 (0x1u << 17) /**< \brief (PWM_IDR1) Fault Protection Trigger on Channel 1 Interrupt Disable */
04502 #define PWM_IDR1_FCHID2 (0x1u << 18) /**< \brief (PWM_IDR1) Fault Protection Trigger on Channel 2 Interrupt Disable */
04503 #define PWM_IDR1_FCHID3 (0x1u << 19) /**< \brief (PWM_IDR1) Fault Protection Trigger on Channel 3 Interrupt Disable */
04504 #define PWM_IDR1_FCHID4 (0x1u << 20) /**< \brief (PWM_IDR1) Fault Protection Trigger on Channel 4 Interrupt Disable */
04505 #define PWM_IDR1_FCHID5 (0x1u << 21) /**< \brief (PWM_IDR1) Fault Protection Trigger on Channel 5 Interrupt Disable */
04506 #define PWM_IDR1_FCHID6 (0x1u << 22) /**< \brief (PWM_IDR1) Fault Protection Trigger on Channel 6 Interrupt Disable */
04507 #define PWM_IDR1_FCHID7 (0x1u << 23) /**< \brief (PWM_IDR1) Fault Protection Trigger on Channel 7 Interrupt Disable */
04508 /* -------- PWM_IMR1 : (PWM Offset: 0x18) PWM Interrupt Mask Register 1 -------- */
04509 #define PWM_IMR1_CHID0 (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (PWM_IMR1) Counter Event on Channel 0 Interrupt Mask */
04510 #define PWM_IMR1_CHID1 (0x1u << 1) /**< \brief (PWM_IMR1) Counter Event on Channel 1 Interrupt Mask */
04511 #define PWM_IMR1_CHID2 (0x1u << 2) /**< \brief (PWM_IMR1) Counter Event on Channel 2 Interrupt Mask */
04512 #define PWM_IMR1_CHID3 (0x1u << 3) /**< \brief (PWM_IMR1) Counter Event on Channel 3 Interrupt Mask */
04513 #define PWM_IMR1_CHID4 (0x1u << 4) /**< \brief (PWM_IMR1) Counter Event on Channel 4 Interrupt Mask */
04514 #define PWM_IMR1_CHID5 (0x1u << 5) /**< \brief (PWM_IMR1) Counter Event on Channel 5 Interrupt Mask */
04515 #define PWM_IMR1_CHID6 (0x1u << 6) /**< \brief (PWM_IMR1) Counter Event on Channel 6 Interrupt Mask */
04516 #define PWM_IMR1_CHID7 (0x1u << 7) /**< \brief (PWM_IMR1) Counter Event on Channel 7 Interrupt Mask */
04517 #define PWM_IMR1_FCHID0 (0x1u << 16) /**< \brief (PWM_IMR1) Fault Protection Trigger on Channel 0 Interrupt Mask */
04518 #define PWM_IMR1_FCHID1 (0x1u << 17) /**< \brief (PWM_IMR1) Fault Protection Trigger on Channel 1 Interrupt Mask */
04519 #define PWM_IMR1_FCHID2 (0x1u << 18) /**< \brief (PWM_IMR1) Fault Protection Trigger on Channel 2 Interrupt Mask */
04520 #define PWM_IMR1_FCHID3 (0x1u << 19) /**< \brief (PWM_IMR1) Fault Protection Trigger on Channel 3 Interrupt Mask */
04521 #define PWM_IMR1_FCHID4 (0x1u << 20) /**< \brief (PWM_IMR1) Fault Protection Trigger on Channel 4 Interrupt Mask */
04522 #define PWM_IMR1_FCHID5 (0x1u << 21) /**< \brief (PWM_IMR1) Fault Protection Trigger on Channel 5 Interrupt Mask */
04523 #define PWM_IMR1_FCHID6 (0x1u << 22) /**< \brief (PWM_IMR1) Fault Protection Trigger on Channel 6 Interrupt Mask */
04524 #define PWM_IMR1_FCHID7 (0x1u << 23) /**< \brief (PWM_IMR1) Fault Protection Trigger on Channel 7 Interrupt Mask */
04525 /* -------- PWM_ISR1 : (PWM Offset: 0x1C) PWM Interrupt Status Register 1 -------- */
04526 #define PWM_ISR1_CHID0 (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (PWM_ISR1) Counter Event on Channel 0 */
04527 #define PWM_ISR1_CHID1 (0x1u << 1) /**< \brief (PWM_ISR1) Counter Event on Channel 1 */
04528 #define PWM_ISR1_CHID2 (0x1u << 2) /**< \brief (PWM_ISR1) Counter Event on Channel 2 */
04529 #define PWM_ISR1_CHID3 (0x1u << 3) /**< \brief (PWM_ISR1) Counter Event on Channel 3 */
04530 #define PWM_ISR1_CHID4 (0x1u << 4) /**< \brief (PWM_ISR1) Counter Event on Channel 4 */
04531 #define PWM_ISR1_CHID5 (0x1u << 5) /**< \brief (PWM_ISR1) Counter Event on Channel 5 */
04532 #define PWM_ISR1_CHID6 (0x1u << 6) /**< \brief (PWM_ISR1) Counter Event on Channel 6 */
04533 #define PWM_ISR1_CHID7 (0x1u << 7) /**< \brief (PWM_ISR1) Counter Event on Channel 7 */
04534 #define PWM_ISR1_FCHID0 (0x1u << 16) /**< \brief (PWM_ISR1) Fault Protection Trigger on Channel 0 */
04535 #define PWM_ISR1_FCHID1 (0x1u << 17) /**< \brief (PWM_ISR1) Fault Protection Trigger on Channel 1 */
04536 #define PWM_ISR1_FCHID2 (0x1u << 18) /**< \brief (PWM_ISR1) Fault Protection Trigger on Channel 2 */
04537 #define PWM_ISR1_FCHID3 (0x1u << 19) /**< \brief (PWM_ISR1) Fault Protection Trigger on Channel 3 */
04538 #define PWM_ISR1_FCHID4 (0x1u << 20) /**< \brief (PWM_ISR1) Fault Protection Trigger on Channel 4 */
04539 #define PWM_ISR1_FCHID5 (0x1u << 21) /**< \brief (PWM_ISR1) Fault Protection Trigger on Channel 5 */
04540 #define PWM_ISR1_FCHID6 (0x1u << 22) /**< \brief (PWM_ISR1) Fault Protection Trigger on Channel 6 */
04541 #define PWM_ISR1_FCHID7 (0x1u << 23) /**< \brief (PWM_ISR1) Fault Protection Trigger on Channel 7 */
04542 /* -------- PWM_SCM : (PWM Offset: 0x20) PWM Sync Channels Mode Register -------- */
04543 #define PWM_SCM_SYNC0 (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (PWM_SCM) Synchronous Channel 0 */
04544 #define PWM_SCM_SYNC1 (0x1u << 1) /**< \brief (PWM_SCM) Synchronous Channel 1 */
04545 #define PWM_SCM_SYNC2 (0x1u << 2) /**< \brief (PWM_SCM) Synchronous Channel 2 */
04546 #define PWM_SCM_SYNC3 (0x1u << 3) /**< \brief (PWM_SCM) Synchronous Channel 3 */
04547 #define PWM_SCM_SYNC4 (0x1u << 4) /**< \brief (PWM_SCM) Synchronous Channel 4 */
04548 #define PWM_SCM_SYNC5 (0x1u << 5) /**< \brief (PWM_SCM) Synchronous Channel 5 */
04549 #define PWM_SCM_SYNC6 (0x1u << 6) /**< \brief (PWM_SCM) Synchronous Channel 6 */
04550 #define PWM_SCM_SYNC7 (0x1u << 7) /**< \brief (PWM_SCM) Synchronous Channel 7 */
04551 #define PWM_SCM_UPDM_Pos 16
04552 #define PWM_SCM_UPDM_Msk (0x3u << PWM_SCM_UPDM_Pos) /**< \brief (PWM_SCM) Synchronous Channels Update Mode */
04553 #define   PWM_SCM_UPDM_MODE0 (0x0u << 16) /**< \brief (PWM_SCM) Manual write of double buffer registers and manual update of synchronous channels */
04554 #define   PWM_SCM_UPDM_MODE1 (0x1u << 16) /**< \brief (PWM_SCM) Manual write of double buffer registers and automatic update of synchronous channels */
04555 #define   PWM_SCM_UPDM_MODE2 (0x2u << 16) /**< \brief (PWM_SCM) Automatic write of duty-cycle update registers by the PDC and automatic update of synchronous channels */
04556 #define PWM_SCM_PTRM (0x1u << 20) /**< \brief (PWM_SCM) PDC Transfer Request Mode */
04557 #define PWM_SCM_PTRCS_Pos 21
04558 #define PWM_SCM_PTRCS_Msk (0x7u << PWM_SCM_PTRCS_Pos) /**< \brief (PWM_SCM) PDC Transfer Request Comparison Selection */
04559 #define PWM_SCM_PTRCS(value) ((PWM_SCM_PTRCS_Msk & ((value) << PWM_SCM_PTRCS_Pos)))
04560 /* -------- PWM_SCUC : (PWM Offset: 0x28) PWM Sync Channels Update Control Register -------- */
04561 #define PWM_SCUC_UPDULOCK (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (PWM_SCUC) Synchronous Channels Update Unlock */
04562 /* -------- PWM_SCUP : (PWM Offset: 0x2C) PWM Sync Channels Update Period Register -------- */
04563 #define PWM_SCUP_UPR_Pos 0
04564 #define PWM_SCUP_UPR_Msk (0xfu << PWM_SCUP_UPR_Pos) /**< \brief (PWM_SCUP) Update Period */
04565 #define PWM_SCUP_UPR(value) ((PWM_SCUP_UPR_Msk & ((value) << PWM_SCUP_UPR_Pos)))
04566 #define PWM_SCUP_UPRCNT_Pos 4
04567 #define PWM_SCUP_UPRCNT_Msk (0xfu << PWM_SCUP_UPRCNT_Pos) /**< \brief (PWM_SCUP) Update Period Counter */
04568 #define PWM_SCUP_UPRCNT(value) ((PWM_SCUP_UPRCNT_Msk & ((value) << PWM_SCUP_UPRCNT_Pos)))
04569 /* -------- PWM_SCUPUPD : (PWM Offset: 0x30) PWM Sync Channels Update Period Update Register -------- */
04570 #define PWM_SCUPUPD_UPRUPD_Pos 0
04571 #define PWM_SCUPUPD_UPRUPD_Msk (0xfu << PWM_SCUPUPD_UPRUPD_Pos) /**< \brief (PWM_SCUPUPD) Update Period Update */
04572 #define PWM_SCUPUPD_UPRUPD(value) ((PWM_SCUPUPD_UPRUPD_Msk & ((value) << PWM_SCUPUPD_UPRUPD_Pos)))
04573 /* -------- PWM_IER2 : (PWM Offset: 0x34) PWM Interrupt Enable Register 2 -------- */
04574 #define PWM_IER2_WRDY (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (PWM_IER2) Write Ready for Synchronous Channels Update Interrupt Enable */
04575 #define PWM_IER2_ENDTX (0x1u << 1) /**< \brief (PWM_IER2) PDC End of TX Buffer Interrupt Enable */
04576 #define PWM_IER2_TXBUFE (0x1u << 2) /**< \brief (PWM_IER2) PDC TX Buffer Empty Interrupt Enable */
04577 #define PWM_IER2_UNRE (0x1u << 3) /**< \brief (PWM_IER2) Synchronous Channels Update Underrun Error Interrupt Enable */
04578 #define PWM_IER2_CMPM0 (0x1u << 8) /**< \brief (PWM_IER2) Comparison 0 Match Interrupt Enable */
04579 #define PWM_IER2_CMPM1 (0x1u << 9) /**< \brief (PWM_IER2) Comparison 1 Match Interrupt Enable */
04580 #define PWM_IER2_CMPM2 (0x1u << 10) /**< \brief (PWM_IER2) Comparison 2 Match Interrupt Enable */

04585 #define PWM_IER2_CMPM7 (0x1u << 15) /**< \brief (PWM_IER2) Comparison 7 Match Interrupt Enable */
04586 #define PWM_IER2_CMPU0 (0x1u << 16) /**< \brief (PWM_IER2) Comparison 0 Update Interrupt Enable */
04587 #define PWM_IER2_CMPU1 (0x1u << 17) /**< \brief (PWM_IER2) Comparison 1 Update Interrupt Enable */
04588 #define PWM_IER2_CMPU2 (0x1u << 18) /**< \brief (PWM_IER2) Comparison 2 Update Interrupt Enable */
04589 #define PWM_IER2_CMPU3 (0x1u << 19) /**< \brief (PWM_IER2) Comparison 3 Update Interrupt Enable */
04590 #define PWM_IER2_CMPU4 (0x1u << 20) /**< \brief (PWM_IER2) Comparison 4 Update Interrupt Enable */

04592 #define PWM_IER2_CMPU6 (0x1u << 22) /**< \brief (PWM_IER2) Comparison 6 Update Interrupt Enable */
04593 #define PWM_IER2_CMPU7 (0x1u << 23) /**< \brief (PWM_IER2) Comparison 7 Update Interrupt Enable */

04595 #define PWM_IDR2_WRDY (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (PWM_IDR2) Write Ready for Synchronous Channels Update Interrupt Disable */
04596 #define PWM_IDR2_ENDTX (0x1u << 1) /**< \brief (PWM_IDR2) PDC End of TX Buffer Interrupt Disable */

04636 /* -------- PWM_ISR2 : (PWM Offset: 0x40) PWM Interrupt Status Register 2 -------- */
04637 #define PWM_ISR2_WRDY (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (PWM_ISR2) Write Ready for Synchronous Channels Update */

04657 /* -------- PWM_OOV : (PWM Offset: 0x44) PWM Output Override Value Register -------- */
04658 #define PWM_OOV_OOVH0 (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (PWM_OOV) Output Override Value for PWMH output of the channel 0 */
04659 #define PWM_OOV_OOVH1 (0x1u << 1) /**< \brief (PWM_OOV) Output Override Value for PWMH output of the channel 1 */

04759 /* -------- PWM_FMR : (PWM Offset: 0x5C) PWM Fault Mode Register -------- */
04760 #define PWM_FMR_FPOL_Pos 0
04761 #define PWM_FMR_FPOL_Msk (0xffu << PWM_FMR_FPOL_Pos) /**< \brief (PWM_FMR) Fault Polarity (fault input bit varies from 0 to 5) */
04762 #define PWM_FMR_FPOL(value) ((PWM_FMR_FPOL_Msk & ((value) << PWM_FMR_FPOL_Pos)))
04763 #define PWM_FMR_FMOD_Pos 8

04765 #define PWM_FMR_FMOD(value) ((PWM_FMR_FMOD_Msk & ((value) << PWM_FMR_FMOD_Pos)))
04766 #define PWM_FMR_FFIL_Pos 16
04767 #define PWM_FMR_FFIL_Msk (0xffu << PWM_FMR_FFIL_Pos) /**< \brief (PWM_FMR) Fault Filtering (fault input bit varies from 0 to 5) */
04768 #define PWM_FMR_FFIL(value) ((PWM_FMR_FFIL_Msk & ((value) << PWM_FMR_FFIL_Pos)))

04773 #define PWM_FSR_FS_Msk (0xffu << PWM_FSR_FS_Pos) /**< \brief (PWM_FSR) Fault Status (fault input bit varies from 0 to 5) */

04865 #define PWM_WPSR_WPHWS5 (0x1u << 13) /**< \brief (PWM_WPSR) Write Protect HW Status */
04866 #define PWM_WPSR_WPVSRC_Pos 16
04867 #define PWM_WPSR_WPVSRC_Msk (0xffffu << PWM_WPSR_WPVSRC_Pos) /**< \brief (PWM_WPSR) Write Protect Violation Source */
04868 /* -------- PWM_RPR : (PWM Offset: 0x100) Receive Pointer Register -------- */

04901 #define PWM_PTCR_RXTEN (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (PWM_PTCR) Receiver Transfer Enable */
04902 #define PWM_PTCR_RXTDIS (0x1u << 1) /**< \brief (PWM_PTCR) Receiver Transfer Disable */
04903 #define PWM_PTCR_TXTEN (0x1u << 8) /**< \brief (PWM_PTCR) Transmitter Transfer Enable */
04904 #define PWM_PTCR_TXTDIS (0x1u << 9) /**< \brief (PWM_PTCR) Transmitter Transfer Disable */

04907 #define PWM_PTSR_TXTEN (0x1u << 8) /**< \brief (PWM_PTSR) Transmitter Transfer Enable */
