04913 /* -------- PWM_CMPVUPD : (PWM Offset: N/A) PWM Comparison 0 Value Update Register -------- */
04914 #define PWM_CMPVUPD_CVUPD_Pos 0
04915 #define PWM_CMPVUPD_CVUPD_Msk (0xffffffu << PWM_CMPVUPD_CVUPD_Pos) /**< \brief (PWM_CMPVUPD) Comparison x Value Update */
04916 #define PWM_CMPVUPD_CVUPD(value) ((PWM_CMPVUPD_CVUPD_Msk & ((value) << PWM_CMPVUPD_CVUPD_Pos)))
04917 #define PWM_CMPVUPD_CVMUPD (0x1u << 24) /**< \brief (PWM_CMPVUPD) Comparison x Value Mode Update */
04918 /* -------- PWM_CMPM : (PWM Offset: N/A) PWM Comparison 0 Mode Register -------- */
04919 #define PWM_CMPM_CEN (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (PWM_CMPM) Comparison x Enable */
04920 #define PWM_CMPM_CTR_Pos 4
04921 #define PWM_CMPM_CTR_Msk (0xfu << PWM_CMPM_CTR_Pos) /**< \brief (PWM_CMPM) Comparison x Trigger */
04922 #define PWM_CMPM_CTR(value) ((PWM_CMPM_CTR_Msk & ((value) << PWM_CMPM_CTR_Pos)))
04923 #define PWM_CMPM_CPR_Pos 8
04924 #define PWM_CMPM_CPR_Msk (0xfu << PWM_CMPM_CPR_Pos) /**< \brief (PWM_CMPM) Comparison x Period */
04925 #define PWM_CMPM_CPR(value) ((PWM_CMPM_CPR_Msk & ((value) << PWM_CMPM_CPR_Pos)))
04926 #define PWM_CMPM_CPRCNT_Pos 12
04927 #define PWM_CMPM_CPRCNT_Msk (0xfu << PWM_CMPM_CPRCNT_Pos) /**< \brief (PWM_CMPM) Comparison x Period Counter */
04928 #define PWM_CMPM_CPRCNT(value) ((PWM_CMPM_CPRCNT_Msk & ((value) << PWM_CMPM_CPRCNT_Pos)))
04929 #define PWM_CMPM_CUPR_Pos 16
04930 #define PWM_CMPM_CUPR_Msk (0xfu << PWM_CMPM_CUPR_Pos) /**< \brief (PWM_CMPM) Comparison x Update Period */
04931 #define PWM_CMPM_CUPR(value) ((PWM_CMPM_CUPR_Msk & ((value) << PWM_CMPM_CUPR_Pos)))
04932 #define PWM_CMPM_CUPRCNT_Pos 20
04933 #define PWM_CMPM_CUPRCNT_Msk (0xfu << PWM_CMPM_CUPRCNT_Pos) /**< \brief (PWM_CMPM) Comparison x Update Period Counter */
04934 #define PWM_CMPM_CUPRCNT(value) ((PWM_CMPM_CUPRCNT_Msk & ((value) << PWM_CMPM_CUPRCNT_Pos)))
04935 /* -------- PWM_CMPMUPD : (PWM Offset: N/A) PWM Comparison 0 Mode Update Register -------- */
04936 #define PWM_CMPMUPD_CENUPD (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (PWM_CMPMUPD) Comparison x Enable Update */
04937 #define PWM_CMPMUPD_CTRUPD_Pos 4
04938 #define PWM_CMPMUPD_CTRUPD_Msk (0xfu << PWM_CMPMUPD_CTRUPD_Pos) /**< \brief (PWM_CMPMUPD) Comparison x Trigger Update */
04939 #define PWM_CMPMUPD_CTRUPD(value) ((PWM_CMPMUPD_CTRUPD_Msk & ((value) << PWM_CMPMUPD_CTRUPD_Pos)))
04940 #define PWM_CMPMUPD_CPRUPD_Pos 8
04941 #define PWM_CMPMUPD_CPRUPD_Msk (0xfu << PWM_CMPMUPD_CPRUPD_Pos) /**< \brief (PWM_CMPMUPD) Comparison x Period Update */
04942 #define PWM_CMPMUPD_CPRUPD(value) ((PWM_CMPMUPD_CPRUPD_Msk & ((value) << PWM_CMPMUPD_CPRUPD_Pos)))
04943 #define PWM_CMPMUPD_CUPRUPD_Pos 16
04944 #define PWM_CMPMUPD_CUPRUPD_Msk (0xfu << PWM_CMPMUPD_CUPRUPD_Pos) /**< \brief (PWM_CMPMUPD) Comparison x Update Period Update */
04945 #define PWM_CMPMUPD_CUPRUPD(value) ((PWM_CMPMUPD_CUPRUPD_Msk & ((value) << PWM_CMPMUPD_CUPRUPD_Pos)))
04946 /* -------- PWM_CMR : (PWM Offset: N/A) PWM Channel Mode Register -------- */
04947 #define PWM_CMR_CPRE_Pos 0
04948 #define PWM_CMR_CPRE_Msk (0xfu << PWM_CMR_CPRE_Pos) /**< \brief (PWM_CMR) Channel Pre-scaler */
04949 #define   PWM_CMR_CPRE_MCK (0x0u << 0) /**< \brief (PWM_CMR) Master clock */
04950 #define   PWM_CMR_CPRE_MCK_DIV_2 (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (PWM_CMR) Master clock/2 */
04951 #define   PWM_CMR_CPRE_MCK_DIV_4 (0x2u << 0) /**< \brief (PWM_CMR) Master clock/4 */
04952 #define   PWM_CMR_CPRE_MCK_DIV_8 (0x3u << 0) /**< \brief (PWM_CMR) Master clock/8 */
04953 #define   PWM_CMR_CPRE_MCK_DIV_16 (0x4u << 0) /**< \brief (PWM_CMR) Master clock/16 */
04954 #define   PWM_CMR_CPRE_MCK_DIV_32 (0x5u << 0) /**< \brief (PWM_CMR) Master clock/32 */
04955 #define   PWM_CMR_CPRE_MCK_DIV_64 (0x6u << 0) /**< \brief (PWM_CMR) Master clock/64 */
04956 #define   PWM_CMR_CPRE_MCK_DIV_128 (0x7u << 0) /**< \brief (PWM_CMR) Master clock/128 */
04957 #define   PWM_CMR_CPRE_MCK_DIV_256 (0x8u << 0) /**< \brief (PWM_CMR) Master clock/256 */
04958 #define   PWM_CMR_CPRE_MCK_DIV_512 (0x9u << 0) /**< \brief (PWM_CMR) Master clock/512 */
04959 #define   PWM_CMR_CPRE_MCK_DIV_1024 (0xAu << 0) /**< \brief (PWM_CMR) Master clock/1024 */
04960 #define   PWM_CMR_CPRE_CLKA (0xBu << 0) /**< \brief (PWM_CMR) Clock A */
04961 #define   PWM_CMR_CPRE_CLKB (0xCu << 0) /**< \brief (PWM_CMR) Clock B */
04962 #define PWM_CMR_CALG (0x1u << 8) /**< \brief (PWM_CMR) Channel Alignment */
04963 #define PWM_CMR_CPOL (0x1u << 9) /**< \brief (PWM_CMR) Channel Polarity */
04964 #define PWM_CMR_CES (0x1u << 10) /**< \brief (PWM_CMR) Counter Event Selection */
04965 #define PWM_CMR_DTE (0x1u << 16) /**< \brief (PWM_CMR) Dead-Time Generator Enable */
04966 #define PWM_CMR_DTHI (0x1u << 17) /**< \brief (PWM_CMR) Dead-Time PWMHx Output Inverted */
04967 #define PWM_CMR_DTLI (0x1u << 18) /**< \brief (PWM_CMR) Dead-Time PWMLx Output Inverted */
04968 /* -------- PWM_CDTY : (PWM Offset: N/A) PWM Channel Duty Cycle Register -------- */
04969 #define PWM_CDTY_CDTY_Pos 0
04970 #define PWM_CDTY_CDTY_Msk (0xffffffu << PWM_CDTY_CDTY_Pos) /**< \brief (PWM_CDTY) Channel Duty-Cycle */
04971 #define PWM_CDTY_CDTY(value) ((PWM_CDTY_CDTY_Msk & ((value) << PWM_CDTY_CDTY_Pos)))
04972 /* -------- PWM_CDTYUPD : (PWM Offset: N/A) PWM Channel Duty Cycle Update Register -------- */
04973 #define PWM_CDTYUPD_CDTYUPD_Pos 0
04974 #define PWM_CDTYUPD_CDTYUPD_Msk (0xffffffu << PWM_CDTYUPD_CDTYUPD_Pos) /**< \brief (PWM_CDTYUPD) Channel Duty-Cycle Update */
04975 #define PWM_CDTYUPD_CDTYUPD(value) ((PWM_CDTYUPD_CDTYUPD_Msk & ((value) << PWM_CDTYUPD_CDTYUPD_Pos)))
04976 /* -------- PWM_CPRD : (PWM Offset: N/A) PWM Channel Period Register -------- */
04977 #define PWM_CPRD_CPRD_Pos 0
04978 #define PWM_CPRD_CPRD_Msk (0xffffffu << PWM_CPRD_CPRD_Pos) /**< \brief (PWM_CPRD) Channel Period */
04979 #define PWM_CPRD_CPRD(value) ((PWM_CPRD_CPRD_Msk & ((value) << PWM_CPRD_CPRD_Pos)))
04980 /* -------- PWM_CPRDUPD : (PWM Offset: N/A) PWM Channel Period Update Register -------- */
04981 #define PWM_CPRDUPD_CPRDUPD_Pos 0
04982 #define PWM_CPRDUPD_CPRDUPD_Msk (0xffffffu << PWM_CPRDUPD_CPRDUPD_Pos) /**< \brief (PWM_CPRDUPD) Channel Period Update */
04983 #define PWM_CPRDUPD_CPRDUPD(value) ((PWM_CPRDUPD_CPRDUPD_Msk & ((value) << PWM_CPRDUPD_CPRDUPD_Pos)))
04984 /* -------- PWM_CCNT : (PWM Offset: N/A) PWM Channel Counter Register -------- */
04985 #define PWM_CCNT_CNT_Pos 0
04986 #define PWM_CCNT_CNT_Msk (0xffffffu << PWM_CCNT_CNT_Pos) /**< \brief (PWM_CCNT) Channel Counter Register */
04987 /* -------- PWM_DT : (PWM Offset: N/A) PWM Channel Dead Time Register -------- */
04988 #define PWM_DT_DTH_Pos 0
04989 #define PWM_DT_DTH_Msk (0xffffu << PWM_DT_DTH_Pos) /**< \brief (PWM_DT) Dead-Time Value for PWMHx Output */
04990 #define PWM_DT_DTH(value) ((PWM_DT_DTH_Msk & ((value) << PWM_DT_DTH_Pos)))
04991 #define PWM_DT_DTL_Pos 16
04992 #define PWM_DT_DTL_Msk (0xffffu << PWM_DT_DTL_Pos) /**< \brief (PWM_DT) Dead-Time Value for PWMLx Output */
04993 #define PWM_DT_DTL(value) ((PWM_DT_DTL_Msk & ((value) << PWM_DT_DTL_Pos)))
04994 /* -------- PWM_DTUPD : (PWM Offset: N/A) PWM Channel Dead Time Update Register -------- */
04995 #define PWM_DTUPD_DTHUPD_Pos 0
04996 #define PWM_DTUPD_DTHUPD_Msk (0xffffu << PWM_DTUPD_DTHUPD_Pos) /**< \brief (PWM_DTUPD) Dead-Time Value Update for PWMHx Output */
04997 #define PWM_DTUPD_DTHUPD(value) ((PWM_DTUPD_DTHUPD_Msk & ((value) << PWM_DTUPD_DTHUPD_Pos)))
04998 #define PWM_DTUPD_DTLUPD_Pos 16
04999 #define PWM_DTUPD_DTLUPD_Msk (0xffffu << PWM_DTUPD_DTLUPD_Pos) /**< \brief (PWM_DTUPD) Dead-Time Value Update for PWMLx Output */
05000 #define PWM_DTUPD_DTLUPD(value) ((PWM_DTUPD_DTLUPD_Msk & ((value) << PWM_DTUPD_DTLUPD_Pos)))
05001 
05002 /*@}*/
05003 
05004 /* ============================================================================= */
05005 /**  SOFTWARE API DEFINITION FOR Reset Controller */
05006 /* ============================================================================= */
05007 /** \addtogroup SAM3XA_RSTC Reset Controller */
05008 /*@{*/
05009 
05010 #ifndef __ASSEMBLY__
05011 /** \brief Rstc hardware registers */
05012 typedef struct {
05013   WoReg RSTC_CR; /**< \brief (Rstc Offset: 0x00) Control Register */
05014   RoReg RSTC_SR; /**< \brief (Rstc Offset: 0x04) Status Register */
05015   RwReg RSTC_MR; /**< \brief (Rstc Offset: 0x08) Mode Register */
05016 } Rstc;
05017 #endif /* __ASSEMBLY__ */
05018 /* -------- RSTC_CR : (RSTC Offset: 0x00) Control Register -------- */
05019 #define RSTC_CR_PROCRST (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (RSTC_CR) Processor Reset */
05020 #define RSTC_CR_PERRST (0x1u << 2) /**< \brief (RSTC_CR) Peripheral Reset */
05021 #define RSTC_CR_EXTRST (0x1u << 3) /**< \brief (RSTC_CR) External Reset */
05022 #define RSTC_CR_KEY_Pos 24
05023 #define RSTC_CR_KEY_Msk (0xffu << RSTC_CR_KEY_Pos) /**< \brief (RSTC_CR) Password */
05024 #define RSTC_CR_KEY(value) ((RSTC_CR_KEY_Msk & ((value) << RSTC_CR_KEY_Pos)))
05025 /* -------- RSTC_SR : (RSTC Offset: 0x04) Status Register -------- */
05026 #define RSTC_SR_URSTS (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (RSTC_SR) User Reset Status */
05027 #define RSTC_SR_RSTTYP_Pos 8
05028 #define RSTC_SR_RSTTYP_Msk (0x7u << RSTC_SR_RSTTYP_Pos) /**< \brief (RSTC_SR) Reset Type */
05029 #define RSTC_SR_NRSTL (0x1u << 16) /**< \brief (RSTC_SR) NRST Pin Level */
05030 #define RSTC_SR_SRCMP (0x1u << 17) /**< \brief (RSTC_SR) Software Reset Command in Progress */
05031 /* -------- RSTC_MR : (RSTC Offset: 0x08) Mode Register -------- */
05032 #define RSTC_MR_URSTEN (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (RSTC_MR) User Reset Enable */
05033 #define RSTC_MR_URSTIEN (0x1u << 4) /**< \brief (RSTC_MR) User Reset Interrupt Enable */
05034 #define RSTC_MR_ERSTL_Pos 8
05035 #define RSTC_MR_ERSTL_Msk (0xfu << RSTC_MR_ERSTL_Pos) /**< \brief (RSTC_MR) External Reset Length */
05036 #define RSTC_MR_ERSTL(value) ((RSTC_MR_ERSTL_Msk & ((value) << RSTC_MR_ERSTL_Pos)))
05037 #define RSTC_MR_KEY_Pos 24
05038 #define RSTC_MR_KEY_Msk (0xffu << RSTC_MR_KEY_Pos) /**< \brief (RSTC_MR) Password */
05039 #define RSTC_MR_KEY(value) ((RSTC_MR_KEY_Msk & ((value) << RSTC_MR_KEY_Pos)))
05040 
05041 /*@}*/
05042 
05043 /* ============================================================================= */
05044 /**  SOFTWARE API DEFINITION FOR Real-time Clock */
05045 /* ============================================================================= */
05046 /** \addtogroup SAM3XA_RTC Real-time Clock */
05047 /*@{*/
05048 
05049 #ifndef __ASSEMBLY__
05050 /** \brief Rtc hardware registers */
05051 typedef struct {
05052   RwReg RTC_CR;        /**< \brief (Rtc Offset: 0x00) Control Register */
05053   RwReg RTC_MR;        /**< \brief (Rtc Offset: 0x04) Mode Register */
05054   RwReg RTC_TIMR;      /**< \brief (Rtc Offset: 0x08) Time Register */
05055   RwReg RTC_CALR;      /**< \brief (Rtc Offset: 0x0C) Calendar Register */
05056   RwReg RTC_TIMALR;    /**< \brief (Rtc Offset: 0x10) Time Alarm Register */
05057   RwReg RTC_CALALR;    /**< \brief (Rtc Offset: 0x14) Calendar Alarm Register */
05058   RoReg RTC_SR;        /**< \brief (Rtc Offset: 0x18) Status Register */
05059   WoReg RTC_SCCR;      /**< \brief (Rtc Offset: 0x1C) Status Clear Command Register */
05060   WoReg RTC_IER;       /**< \brief (Rtc Offset: 0x20) Interrupt Enable Register */
05061   WoReg RTC_IDR;       /**< \brief (Rtc Offset: 0x24) Interrupt Disable Register */
05062   RoReg RTC_IMR;       /**< \brief (Rtc Offset: 0x28) Interrupt Mask Register */
05063   RoReg RTC_VER;       /**< \brief (Rtc Offset: 0x2C) Valid Entry Register */
05064   RoReg Reserved1[45];
05065   RwReg RTC_WPMR;      /**< \brief (Rtc Offset: 0xE4) Write Protect Mode Register */
05066 } Rtc;
05067 #endif /* __ASSEMBLY__ */
05068 /* -------- RTC_CR : (RTC Offset: 0x00) Control Register -------- */
05069 #define RTC_CR_UPDTIM (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (RTC_CR) Update Request Time Register */
05070 #define RTC_CR_UPDCAL (0x1u << 1) /**< \brief (RTC_CR) Update Request Calendar Register */
05071 #define RTC_CR_TIMEVSEL_Pos 8
05072 #define RTC_CR_TIMEVSEL_Msk (0x3u << RTC_CR_TIMEVSEL_Pos) /**< \brief (RTC_CR) Time Event Selection */
05073 #define   RTC_CR_TIMEVSEL_MINUTE (0x0u << 8) /**< \brief (RTC_CR) Minute change */
05074 #define   RTC_CR_TIMEVSEL_HOUR (0x1u << 8) /**< \brief (RTC_CR) Hour change */
05075 #define   RTC_CR_TIMEVSEL_MIDNIGHT (0x2u << 8) /**< \brief (RTC_CR) Every day at midnight */
05076 #define   RTC_CR_TIMEVSEL_NOON (0x3u << 8) /**< \brief (RTC_CR) Every day at noon */
05077 #define RTC_CR_CALEVSEL_Pos 16
05078 #define RTC_CR_CALEVSEL_Msk (0x3u << RTC_CR_CALEVSEL_Pos) /**< \brief (RTC_CR) Calendar Event Selection */
05079 #define   RTC_CR_CALEVSEL_WEEK (0x0u << 16) /**< \brief (RTC_CR) Week change (every Monday at time 00:00:00) */
05080 #define   RTC_CR_CALEVSEL_MONTH (0x1u << 16) /**< \brief (RTC_CR) Month change (every 01 of each month at time 00:00:00) */
05081 #define   RTC_CR_CALEVSEL_YEAR (0x2u << 16) /**< \brief (RTC_CR) Year change (every January 1 at time 00:00:00) */
05082 /* -------- RTC_MR : (RTC Offset: 0x04) Mode Register -------- */
05083 #define RTC_MR_HRMOD (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (RTC_MR) 12-/24-hour Mode */
05084 /* -------- RTC_TIMR : (RTC Offset: 0x08) Time Register -------- */
05085 #define RTC_TIMR_SEC_Pos 0
05086 #define RTC_TIMR_SEC_Msk (0x7fu << RTC_TIMR_SEC_Pos) /**< \brief (RTC_TIMR) Current Second */
05087 #define RTC_TIMR_SEC(value) ((RTC_TIMR_SEC_Msk & ((value) << RTC_TIMR_SEC_Pos)))
05088 #define RTC_TIMR_MIN_Pos 8
05089 #define RTC_TIMR_MIN_Msk (0x7fu << RTC_TIMR_MIN_Pos) /**< \brief (RTC_TIMR) Current Minute */
05090 #define RTC_TIMR_MIN(value) ((RTC_TIMR_MIN_Msk & ((value) << RTC_TIMR_MIN_Pos)))
05091 #define RTC_TIMR_HOUR_Pos 16
05092 #define RTC_TIMR_HOUR_Msk (0x3fu << RTC_TIMR_HOUR_Pos) /**< \brief (RTC_TIMR) Current Hour */
05093 #define RTC_TIMR_HOUR(value) ((RTC_TIMR_HOUR_Msk & ((value) << RTC_TIMR_HOUR_Pos)))
05094 #define RTC_TIMR_AMPM (0x1u << 22) /**< \brief (RTC_TIMR) Ante Meridiem Post Meridiem Indicator */
05095 /* -------- RTC_CALR : (RTC Offset: 0x0C) Calendar Register -------- */
05096 #define RTC_CALR_CENT_Pos 0
05097 #define RTC_CALR_CENT_Msk (0x7fu << RTC_CALR_CENT_Pos) /**< \brief (RTC_CALR) Current Century */
05098 #define RTC_CALR_CENT(value) ((RTC_CALR_CENT_Msk & ((value) << RTC_CALR_CENT_Pos)))
05099 #define RTC_CALR_YEAR_Pos 8
05100 #define RTC_CALR_YEAR_Msk (0xffu << RTC_CALR_YEAR_Pos) /**< \brief (RTC_CALR) Current Year */
05101 #define RTC_CALR_YEAR(value) ((RTC_CALR_YEAR_Msk & ((value) << RTC_CALR_YEAR_Pos)))
05102 #define RTC_CALR_MONTH_Pos 16
05103 #define RTC_CALR_MONTH_Msk (0x1fu << RTC_CALR_MONTH_Pos) /**< \brief (RTC_CALR) Current Month */
05104 #define RTC_CALR_MONTH(value) ((RTC_CALR_MONTH_Msk & ((value) << RTC_CALR_MONTH_Pos)))
05105 #define RTC_CALR_DAY_Pos 21
05106 #define RTC_CALR_DAY_Msk (0x7u << RTC_CALR_DAY_Pos) /**< \brief (RTC_CALR) Current Day in Current Week */
05107 #define RTC_CALR_DAY(value) ((RTC_CALR_DAY_Msk & ((value) << RTC_CALR_DAY_Pos)))
05108 #define RTC_CALR_DATE_Pos 24
05109 #define RTC_CALR_DATE_Msk (0x3fu << RTC_CALR_DATE_Pos) /**< \brief (RTC_CALR) Current Day in Current Month */
05110 #define RTC_CALR_DATE(value) ((RTC_CALR_DATE_Msk & ((value) << RTC_CALR_DATE_Pos)))
05111 /* -------- RTC_TIMALR : (RTC Offset: 0x10) Time Alarm Register -------- */
05112 #define RTC_TIMALR_SEC_Pos 0
05113 #define RTC_TIMALR_SEC_Msk (0x7fu << RTC_TIMALR_SEC_Pos) /**< \brief (RTC_TIMALR) Second Alarm */
05114 #define RTC_TIMALR_SEC(value) ((RTC_TIMALR_SEC_Msk & ((value) << RTC_TIMALR_SEC_Pos)))
05115 #define RTC_TIMALR_SECEN (0x1u << 7) /**< \brief (RTC_TIMALR) Second Alarm Enable */
05116 #define RTC_TIMALR_MIN_Pos 8
05117 #define RTC_TIMALR_MIN_Msk (0x7fu << RTC_TIMALR_MIN_Pos) /**< \brief (RTC_TIMALR) Minute Alarm */
05118 #define RTC_TIMALR_MIN(value) ((RTC_TIMALR_MIN_Msk & ((value) << RTC_TIMALR_MIN_Pos)))
05119 #define RTC_TIMALR_MINEN (0x1u << 15) /**< \brief (RTC_TIMALR) Minute Alarm Enable */
05120 #define RTC_TIMALR_HOUR_Pos 16
05121 #define RTC_TIMALR_HOUR_Msk (0x3fu << RTC_TIMALR_HOUR_Pos) /**< \brief (RTC_TIMALR) Hour Alarm */
05122 #define RTC_TIMALR_HOUR(value) ((RTC_TIMALR_HOUR_Msk & ((value) << RTC_TIMALR_HOUR_Pos)))
05123 #define RTC_TIMALR_AMPM (0x1u << 22) /**< \brief (RTC_TIMALR) AM/PM Indicator */
05124 #define RTC_TIMALR_HOUREN (0x1u << 23) /**< \brief (RTC_TIMALR) Hour Alarm Enable */
05125 /* -------- RTC_CALALR : (RTC Offset: 0x14) Calendar Alarm Register -------- */
05126 #define RTC_CALALR_MONTH_Pos 16
05127 #define RTC_CALALR_MONTH_Msk (0x1fu << RTC_CALALR_MONTH_Pos) /**< \brief (RTC_CALALR) Month Alarm */
05128 #define RTC_CALALR_MONTH(value) ((RTC_CALALR_MONTH_Msk & ((value) << RTC_CALALR_MONTH_Pos)))
05129 #define RTC_CALALR_MTHEN (0x1u << 23) /**< \brief (RTC_CALALR) Month Alarm Enable */
05130 #define RTC_CALALR_DATE_Pos 24
05131 #define RTC_CALALR_DATE_Msk (0x3fu << RTC_CALALR_DATE_Pos) /**< \brief (RTC_CALALR) Date Alarm */
05132 #define RTC_CALALR_DATE(value) ((RTC_CALALR_DATE_Msk & ((value) << RTC_CALALR_DATE_Pos)))
05133 #define RTC_CALALR_DATEEN (0x1u << 31) /**< \brief (RTC_CALALR) Date Alarm Enable */
05134 /* -------- RTC_SR : (RTC Offset: 0x18) Status Register -------- */
05135 #define RTC_SR_ACKUPD (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (RTC_SR) Acknowledge for Update */
05136 #define RTC_SR_ALARM (0x1u << 1) /**< \brief (RTC_SR) Alarm Flag */
05137 #define RTC_SR_SEC (0x1u << 2) /**< \brief (RTC_SR) Second Event */
05138 #define RTC_SR_TIMEV (0x1u << 3) /**< \brief (RTC_SR) Time Event */
05139 #define RTC_SR_CALEV (0x1u << 4) /**< \brief (RTC_SR) Calendar Event */
05140 /* -------- RTC_SCCR : (RTC Offset: 0x1C) Status Clear Command Register -------- */
05141 #define RTC_SCCR_ACKCLR (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (RTC_SCCR) Acknowledge Clear */
05142 #define RTC_SCCR_ALRCLR (0x1u << 1) /**< \brief (RTC_SCCR) Alarm Clear */
05143 #define RTC_SCCR_SECCLR (0x1u << 2) /**< \brief (RTC_SCCR) Second Clear */
05144 #define RTC_SCCR_TIMCLR (0x1u << 3) /**< \brief (RTC_SCCR) Time Clear */
05145 #define RTC_SCCR_CALCLR (0x1u << 4) /**< \brief (RTC_SCCR) Calendar Clear */
05146 /* -------- RTC_IER : (RTC Offset: 0x20) Interrupt Enable Register -------- */
05147 #define RTC_IER_ACKEN (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (RTC_IER) Acknowledge Update Interrupt Enable */
05148 #define RTC_IER_ALREN (0x1u << 1) /**< \brief (RTC_IER) Alarm Interrupt Enable */
05149 #define RTC_IER_SECEN (0x1u << 2) /**< \brief (RTC_IER) Second Event Interrupt Enable */
05150 #define RTC_IER_TIMEN (0x1u << 3) /**< \brief (RTC_IER) Time Event Interrupt Enable */
05151 #define RTC_IER_CALEN (0x1u << 4) /**< \brief (RTC_IER) Calendar Event Interrupt Enable */
05152 /* -------- RTC_IDR : (RTC Offset: 0x24) Interrupt Disable Register -------- */
05153 #define RTC_IDR_ACKDIS (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (RTC_IDR) Acknowledge Update Interrupt Disable */
05154 #define RTC_IDR_ALRDIS (0x1u << 1) /**< \brief (RTC_IDR) Alarm Interrupt Disable */
05155 #define RTC_IDR_SECDIS (0x1u << 2) /**< \brief (RTC_IDR) Second Event Interrupt Disable */
05156 #define RTC_IDR_TIMDIS (0x1u << 3) /**< \brief (RTC_IDR) Time Event Interrupt Disable */
05157 #define RTC_IDR_CALDIS (0x1u << 4) /**< \brief (RTC_IDR) Calendar Event Interrupt Disable */
05158 /* -------- RTC_IMR : (RTC Offset: 0x28) Interrupt Mask Register -------- */
05159 #define RTC_IMR_ACK (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (RTC_IMR) Acknowledge Update Interrupt Mask */
05160 #define RTC_IMR_ALR (0x1u << 1) /**< \brief (RTC_IMR) Alarm Interrupt Mask */
05161 #define RTC_IMR_SEC (0x1u << 2) /**< \brief (RTC_IMR) Second Event Interrupt Mask */
05162 #define RTC_IMR_TIM (0x1u << 3) /**< \brief (RTC_IMR) Time Event Interrupt Mask */
05163 #define RTC_IMR_CAL (0x1u << 4) /**< \brief (RTC_IMR) Calendar Event Interrupt Mask */
05164 /* -------- RTC_VER : (RTC Offset: 0x2C) Valid Entry Register -------- */
05165 #define RTC_VER_NVTIM (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (RTC_VER) Non-valid Time */
05166 #define RTC_VER_NVCAL (0x1u << 1) /**< \brief (RTC_VER) Non-valid Calendar */
05167 #define RTC_VER_NVTIMALR (0x1u << 2) /**< \brief (RTC_VER) Non-valid Time Alarm */
05168 #define RTC_VER_NVCALALR (0x1u << 3) /**< \brief (RTC_VER) Non-valid Calendar Alarm */
05169 /* -------- RTC_WPMR : (RTC Offset: 0xE4) Write Protect Mode Register -------- */
05170 #define RTC_WPMR_WPEN (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (RTC_WPMR) Write Protect Enable */
05171 #define RTC_WPMR_WPKEY_Pos 8
05172 #define RTC_WPMR_WPKEY_Msk (0xffffffu << RTC_WPMR_WPKEY_Pos) /**< \brief (RTC_WPMR)  */
05173 #define RTC_WPMR_WPKEY(value) ((RTC_WPMR_WPKEY_Msk & ((value) << RTC_WPMR_WPKEY_Pos)))
05174 
05175 /*@}*/
05176 
05177 /* ============================================================================= */
05178 /**  SOFTWARE API DEFINITION FOR Real-time Timer */
05179 /* ============================================================================= */
05180 /** \addtogroup SAM3XA_RTT Real-time Timer */
05181 /*@{*/
05182 
05183 #ifndef __ASSEMBLY__
05184 /** \brief Rtt hardware registers */
05185 typedef struct {
05186   RwReg RTT_MR; /**< \brief (Rtt Offset: 0x00) Mode Register */
05187   RwReg RTT_AR; /**< \brief (Rtt Offset: 0x04) Alarm Register */
05188   RoReg RTT_VR; /**< \brief (Rtt Offset: 0x08) Value Register */
05189   RoReg RTT_SR; /**< \brief (Rtt Offset: 0x0C) Status Register */
05190 } Rtt;
05191 #endif /* __ASSEMBLY__ */
05192 /* -------- RTT_MR : (RTT Offset: 0x00) Mode Register -------- */
05193 #define RTT_MR_RTPRES_Pos 0
05194 #define RTT_MR_RTPRES_Msk (0xffffu << RTT_MR_RTPRES_Pos) /**< \brief (RTT_MR) Real-time Timer Prescaler Value */
05195 #define RTT_MR_RTPRES(value) ((RTT_MR_RTPRES_Msk & ((value) << RTT_MR_RTPRES_Pos)))
05196 #define RTT_MR_ALMIEN (0x1u << 16) /**< \brief (RTT_MR) Alarm Interrupt Enable */
05197 #define RTT_MR_RTTINCIEN (0x1u << 17) /**< \brief (RTT_MR) Real-time Timer Increment Interrupt Enable */
05198 #define RTT_MR_RTTRST (0x1u << 18) /**< \brief (RTT_MR) Real-time Timer Restart */
05199 /* -------- RTT_AR : (RTT Offset: 0x04) Alarm Register -------- */
05200 #define RTT_AR_ALMV_Pos 0
05201 #define RTT_AR_ALMV_Msk (0xffffffffu << RTT_AR_ALMV_Pos) /**< \brief (RTT_AR) Alarm Value */
05202 #define RTT_AR_ALMV(value) ((RTT_AR_ALMV_Msk & ((value) << RTT_AR_ALMV_Pos)))
05203 /* -------- RTT_VR : (RTT Offset: 0x08) Value Register -------- */
05204 #define RTT_VR_CRTV_Pos 0
05205 #define RTT_VR_CRTV_Msk (0xffffffffu << RTT_VR_CRTV_Pos) /**< \brief (RTT_VR) Current Real-time Value */
05206 /* -------- RTT_SR : (RTT Offset: 0x0C) Status Register -------- */
05207 #define RTT_SR_ALMS (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (RTT_SR) Real-time Alarm Status */
05208 #define RTT_SR_RTTINC (0x1u << 1) /**< \brief (RTT_SR) Real-time Timer Increment */
05209 
05210 /*@}*/
05211 
05212 /* ============================================================================= */
05213 /**  SOFTWARE API DEFINITION FOR SDRAM Controller */
05214 /* ============================================================================= */
05215 /** \addtogroup SAM3XA_SDRAMC SDRAM Controller */
05216 /*@{*/
05217 
05218 #ifndef __ASSEMBLY__
05219 /** \brief Sdramc hardware registers */
05220 typedef struct {
05221   RwReg SDRAMC_MR;    /**< \brief (Sdramc Offset: 0x00) SDRAMC Mode Register */
05222   RwReg SDRAMC_TR;    /**< \brief (Sdramc Offset: 0x04) SDRAMC Refresh Timer Register */
05223   RwReg SDRAMC_CR;    /**< \brief (Sdramc Offset: 0x08) SDRAMC Configuration Register */
05224   RoReg Reserved1[1];
05225   RwReg SDRAMC_LPR;   /**< \brief (Sdramc Offset: 0x10) SDRAMC Low Power Register */
05226   WoReg SDRAMC_IER;   /**< \brief (Sdramc Offset: 0x14) SDRAMC Interrupt Enable Register */
05227   WoReg SDRAMC_IDR;   /**< \brief (Sdramc Offset: 0x18) SDRAMC Interrupt Disable Register */
05228   RoReg SDRAMC_IMR;   /**< \brief (Sdramc Offset: 0x1C) SDRAMC Interrupt Mask Register */
05229   RoReg SDRAMC_ISR;   /**< \brief (Sdramc Offset: 0x20) SDRAMC Interrupt Status Register */
05230   RwReg SDRAMC_MDR;   /**< \brief (Sdramc Offset: 0x24) SDRAMC Memory Device Register */
05231   RwReg SDRAMC_CR1;   /**< \brief (Sdramc Offset: 0x28) SDRAMC Configuration Register 1 */
05232   RwReg SDRAMC_OCMS;  /**< \brief (Sdramc Offset: 0x2C) SDRAMC OCMS Register 1 */
05233 } Sdramc;
05234 #endif /* __ASSEMBLY__ */
05235 /* -------- SDRAMC_MR : (SDRAMC Offset: 0x00) SDRAMC Mode Register -------- */
05236 #define SDRAMC_MR_MODE_Pos 0
05237 #define SDRAMC_MR_MODE_Msk (0x7u << SDRAMC_MR_MODE_Pos) /**< \brief (SDRAMC_MR) SDRAMC Command Mode */
05238 #define   SDRAMC_MR_MODE_NORMAL (0x0u << 0) /**< \brief (SDRAMC_MR) Normal mode. Any access to the SDRAM is decoded normally. To activate this mode, command must be followed by a write to the SDRAM. */
05239 #define   SDRAMC_MR_MODE_NOP (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (SDRAMC_MR) The SDRAM Controller issues a NOP command when the SDRAM device is accessed regardless of the cycle. To activate this mode, command must be followed by a write to the SDRAM. */
05240 #define   SDRAMC_MR_MODE_ALLBANKS_PRECHARGE (0x2u << 0) /**< \brief (SDRAMC_MR) The SDRAM Controller issues an "All Banks Precharge" command when the SDRAM device is accessed regardless of the cycle. To activate this mode, command must be followed by a write to the SDRAM. */
05241 #define   SDRAMC_MR_MODE_LOAD_MODEREG (0x3u << 0) /**< \brief (SDRAMC_MR) The SDRAM Controller issues a "Load Mode Register" command when the SDRAM device is accessed regardless of the cycle. To activate this mode, command must be followed by a write to the SDRAM. */
05242 #define   SDRAMC_MR_MODE_AUTO_REFRESH (0x4u << 0) /**< \brief (SDRAMC_MR) The SDRAM Controller issues an "Auto-Refresh" Command when the SDRAM device is accessed regardless of the cycle. Previously, an "All Banks Precharge" command must be issued. To activate this mode, command must be followed by a write to the SDRAM. */
05243 #define   SDRAMC_MR_MODE_EXT_LOAD_MODEREG (0x5u << 0) /**< \brief (SDRAMC_MR) The SDRAM Controller issues an "Extended Load Mode Register" command when the SDRAM device is accessed regardless of the cycle. To activate this mode, the "Extended Load Mode Register" command must be followed by a write to the SDRAM. The write in the SDRAM must be done in the appropriate bank; most low-power SDRAM devices use the bank 1. */
05244 #define   SDRAMC_MR_MODE_DEEP_POWERDOWN (0x6u << 0) /**< \brief (SDRAMC_MR) Deep power-down mode. Enters deep power-down mode. */
05245 /* -------- SDRAMC_TR : (SDRAMC Offset: 0x04) SDRAMC Refresh Timer Register -------- */
05246 #define SDRAMC_TR_COUNT_Pos 0
05247 #define SDRAMC_TR_COUNT_Msk (0xfffu << SDRAMC_TR_COUNT_Pos) /**< \brief (SDRAMC_TR) SDRAMC Refresh Timer Count */
05248 #define SDRAMC_TR_COUNT(value) ((SDRAMC_TR_COUNT_Msk & ((value) << SDRAMC_TR_COUNT_Pos)))
05249 /* -------- SDRAMC_CR : (SDRAMC Offset: 0x08) SDRAMC Configuration Register -------- */
05250 #define SDRAMC_CR_NC_Pos 0
05251 #define SDRAMC_CR_NC_Msk (0x3u << SDRAMC_CR_NC_Pos) /**< \brief (SDRAMC_CR) Number of Column Bits */
05252 #define   SDRAMC_CR_NC_COL8 (0x0u << 0) /**< \brief (SDRAMC_CR) 8 column bits */
05253 #define   SDRAMC_CR_NC_COL9 (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (SDRAMC_CR) 9 column bits */
05254 #define   SDRAMC_CR_NC_COL10 (0x2u << 0) /**< \brief (SDRAMC_CR) 10 column bits */
05255 #define   SDRAMC_CR_NC_COL11 (0x3u << 0) /**< \brief (SDRAMC_CR) 11 column bits */
05256 #define SDRAMC_CR_NR_Pos 2
05257 #define SDRAMC_CR_NR_Msk (0x3u << SDRAMC_CR_NR_Pos) /**< \brief (SDRAMC_CR) Number of Row Bits */
05258 #define   SDRAMC_CR_NR_ROW11 (0x0u << 2) /**< \brief (SDRAMC_CR) 11 row bits */
05259 #define   SDRAMC_CR_NR_ROW12 (0x1u << 2) /**< \brief (SDRAMC_CR) 12 row bits */
05260 #define   SDRAMC_CR_NR_ROW13 (0x2u << 2) /**< \brief (SDRAMC_CR) 13 row bits */
05261 #define SDRAMC_CR_NB (0x1u << 4) /**< \brief (SDRAMC_CR) Number of Banks */
05262 #define   SDRAMC_CR_NB_BANK2 (0x0u << 4) /**< \brief (SDRAMC_CR) 2 banks */
05263 #define   SDRAMC_CR_NB_BANK4 (0x1u << 4) /**< \brief (SDRAMC_CR) 4 banks */
05264 #define SDRAMC_CR_CAS_Pos 5
05265 #define SDRAMC_CR_CAS_Msk (0x3u << SDRAMC_CR_CAS_Pos) /**< \brief (SDRAMC_CR) CAS Latency */
05266 #define   SDRAMC_CR_CAS_LATENCY1 (0x1u << 5) /**< \brief (SDRAMC_CR) 1 cycle CAS latency */
05267 #define   SDRAMC_CR_CAS_LATENCY2 (0x2u << 5) /**< \brief (SDRAMC_CR) 2 cycle CAS latency */
05268 #define   SDRAMC_CR_CAS_LATENCY3 (0x3u << 5) /**< \brief (SDRAMC_CR) 3 cycle CAS latency */
05269 #define SDRAMC_CR_DBW (0x1u << 7) /**< \brief (SDRAMC_CR) Data Bus Width */
05270 #define SDRAMC_CR_TWR_Pos 8
05271 #define SDRAMC_CR_TWR_Msk (0xfu << SDRAMC_CR_TWR_Pos) /**< \brief (SDRAMC_CR) Write Recovery Delay */
05272 #define SDRAMC_CR_TWR(value) ((SDRAMC_CR_TWR_Msk & ((value) << SDRAMC_CR_TWR_Pos)))
05273 #define SDRAMC_CR_TRC_TRFC_Pos 12
05274 #define SDRAMC_CR_TRC_TRFC_Msk (0xfu << SDRAMC_CR_TRC_TRFC_Pos) /**< \brief (SDRAMC_CR) Row Cycle Delay and Row Refresh Cycle */
05275 #define SDRAMC_CR_TRC_TRFC(value) ((SDRAMC_CR_TRC_TRFC_Msk & ((value) << SDRAMC_CR_TRC_TRFC_Pos)))
05276 #define SDRAMC_CR_TRP_Pos 16
05277 #define SDRAMC_CR_TRP_Msk (0xfu << SDRAMC_CR_TRP_Pos) /**< \brief (SDRAMC_CR) Row Precharge Delay */
05278 #define SDRAMC_CR_TRP(value) ((SDRAMC_CR_TRP_Msk & ((value) << SDRAMC_CR_TRP_Pos)))
05279 #define SDRAMC_CR_TRCD_Pos 20
05280 #define SDRAMC_CR_TRCD_Msk (0xfu << SDRAMC_CR_TRCD_Pos) /**< \brief (SDRAMC_CR) Row to Column Delay */
05281 #define SDRAMC_CR_TRCD(value) ((SDRAMC_CR_TRCD_Msk & ((value) << SDRAMC_CR_TRCD_Pos)))
05282 #define SDRAMC_CR_TRAS_Pos 24
05283 #define SDRAMC_CR_TRAS_Msk (0xfu << SDRAMC_CR_TRAS_Pos) /**< \brief (SDRAMC_CR) Active to Precharge Delay */
05284 #define SDRAMC_CR_TRAS(value) ((SDRAMC_CR_TRAS_Msk & ((value) << SDRAMC_CR_TRAS_Pos)))
05285 #define SDRAMC_CR_TXSR_Pos 28
05286 #define SDRAMC_CR_TXSR_Msk (0xfu << SDRAMC_CR_TXSR_Pos) /**< \brief (SDRAMC_CR) Exit Self Refresh to Active Delay */
05287 #define SDRAMC_CR_TXSR(value) ((SDRAMC_CR_TXSR_Msk & ((value) << SDRAMC_CR_TXSR_Pos)))
05288 /* -------- SDRAMC_LPR : (SDRAMC Offset: 0x10) SDRAMC Low Power Register -------- */
05289 #define SDRAMC_LPR_LPCB_Pos 0
05290 #define SDRAMC_LPR_LPCB_Msk (0x3u << SDRAMC_LPR_LPCB_Pos) /**< \brief (SDRAMC_LPR) Low-power Configuration Bits */
05291 #define   SDRAMC_LPR_LPCB_DISABLED (0x0u << 0) /**< \brief (SDRAMC_LPR) Low Power Feature is inhibited: no Power-down, Self-refresh or Deep Power-down command is issued to the SDRAM device. */
05292 #define   SDRAMC_LPR_LPCB_SELF_REFRESH (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (SDRAMC_LPR) The SDRAM Controller issues a Self-refresh command to the SDRAM device, the SDCK clock is deactivated and the SDCKE signal is set low. The SDRAM device leaves the Self Refresh Mode when accessed and enters it after the access. */
05293 #define   SDRAMC_LPR_LPCB_POWER_DOWN (0x2u << 0) /**< \brief (SDRAMC_LPR) The SDRAM Controller issues a Power-down Command to the SDRAM device after each access, the SDCKE signal is set to low. The SDRAM device leaves the Power-down Mode when accessed and enters it after the access. */
05294 #define   SDRAMC_LPR_LPCB_DEEP_POWER_DOWN (0x3u << 0) /**< \brief (SDRAMC_LPR) The SDRAM Controller issues a Deep Power-down command to the SDRAM device. This mode is unique to low-power SDRAM. */
05295 #define SDRAMC_LPR_PASR_Pos 4
05296 #define SDRAMC_LPR_PASR_Msk (0x7u << SDRAMC_LPR_PASR_Pos) /**< \brief (SDRAMC_LPR) Partial Array Self-refresh (only for low-power SDRAM) */
05297 #define SDRAMC_LPR_PASR(value) ((SDRAMC_LPR_PASR_Msk & ((value) << SDRAMC_LPR_PASR_Pos)))
05298 #define SDRAMC_LPR_TCSR_Pos 8
05299 #define SDRAMC_LPR_TCSR_Msk (0x3u << SDRAMC_LPR_TCSR_Pos) /**< \brief (SDRAMC_LPR) Temperature Compensated Self-Refresh (only for low-power SDRAM) */
05300 #define SDRAMC_LPR_TCSR(value) ((SDRAMC_LPR_TCSR_Msk & ((value) << SDRAMC_LPR_TCSR_Pos)))
05301 #define SDRAMC_LPR_DS_Pos 10
05302 #define SDRAMC_LPR_DS_Msk (0x3u << SDRAMC_LPR_DS_Pos) /**< \brief (SDRAMC_LPR) Drive Strength (only for low-power SDRAM) */
05303 #define SDRAMC_LPR_DS(value) ((SDRAMC_LPR_DS_Msk & ((value) << SDRAMC_LPR_DS_Pos)))
05304 #define SDRAMC_LPR_TIMEOUT_Pos 12
05305 #define SDRAMC_LPR_TIMEOUT_Msk (0x3u << SDRAMC_LPR_TIMEOUT_Pos) /**< \brief (SDRAMC_LPR) Time to define when low-power mode is enable */
05306 #define   SDRAMC_LPR_TIMEOUT_LP_LAST_XFER (0x0u << 12) /**< \brief (SDRAMC_LPR) The SDRAM controller activates the SDRAM low-power mode immediately after the end of the last transfer. */
05307 #define   SDRAMC_LPR_TIMEOUT_LP_LAST_XFER_64 (0x1u << 12) /**< \brief (SDRAMC_LPR) The SDRAM controller activates the SDRAM low-power mode 64 clock cycles after the end of the last transfer. */
05308 #define   SDRAMC_LPR_TIMEOUT_LP_LAST_XFER_128 (0x2u << 12) /**< \brief (SDRAMC_LPR) The SDRAM controller activates the SDRAM low-power mode 128 clock cycles after the end of the last transfer. */
05309 /* -------- SDRAMC_IER : (SDRAMC Offset: 0x14) SDRAMC Interrupt Enable Register -------- */
05310 #define SDRAMC_IER_RES (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (SDRAMC_IER) Refresh Error Status */
05311 /* -------- SDRAMC_IDR : (SDRAMC Offset: 0x18) SDRAMC Interrupt Disable Register -------- */
05312 #define SDRAMC_IDR_RES (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (SDRAMC_IDR) Refresh Error Status */
05313 /* -------- SDRAMC_IMR : (SDRAMC Offset: 0x1C) SDRAMC Interrupt Mask Register -------- */
05314 #define SDRAMC_IMR_RES (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (SDRAMC_IMR) Refresh Error Status */
05315 /* -------- SDRAMC_ISR : (SDRAMC Offset: 0x20) SDRAMC Interrupt Status Register -------- */
05316 #define SDRAMC_ISR_RES (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (SDRAMC_ISR) Refresh Error Status */
05317 /* -------- SDRAMC_MDR : (SDRAMC Offset: 0x24) SDRAMC Memory Device Register -------- */
05318 #define SDRAMC_MDR_MD_Pos 0
05319 #define SDRAMC_MDR_MD_Msk (0x3u << SDRAMC_MDR_MD_Pos) /**< \brief (SDRAMC_MDR) Memory Device Type */
05320 #define   SDRAMC_MDR_MD_SDRAM (0x0u << 0) /**< \brief (SDRAMC_MDR) SDRAM */
05321 #define   SDRAMC_MDR_MD_LPSDRAM (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (SDRAMC_MDR) Low-power SDRAM */
05322 /* -------- SDRAMC_CR1 : (SDRAMC Offset: 0x28) SDRAMC Configuration Register 1 -------- */
05323 #define SDRAMC_CR1_NC_Pos 0
05324 #define SDRAMC_CR1_NC_Msk (0x3u << SDRAMC_CR1_NC_Pos) /**< \brief (SDRAMC_CR1) Number of Column Bits */
05325 #define   SDRAMC_CR1_NC_COL8 (0x0u << 0) /**< \brief (SDRAMC_CR1) 8 column bits */
05326 #define   SDRAMC_CR1_NC_COL9 (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (SDRAMC_CR1) 9 column bits */
05327 #define   SDRAMC_CR1_NC_COL10 (0x2u << 0) /**< \brief (SDRAMC_CR1) 10 column bits */
05328 #define   SDRAMC_CR1_NC_COL11 (0x3u << 0) /**< \brief (SDRAMC_CR1) 11 column bits */
05329 #define SDRAMC_CR1_NR_Pos 2
05330 #define SDRAMC_CR1_NR_Msk (0x3u << SDRAMC_CR1_NR_Pos) /**< \brief (SDRAMC_CR1) Number of Row Bits */
05331 #define   SDRAMC_CR1_NR_ROW11 (0x0u << 2) /**< \brief (SDRAMC_CR1) 11 row bits */
05332 #define   SDRAMC_CR1_NR_ROW12 (0x1u << 2) /**< \brief (SDRAMC_CR1) 12 row bits */
05333 #define   SDRAMC_CR1_NR_ROW13 (0x2u << 2) /**< \brief (SDRAMC_CR1) 13 row bits */
05334 #define SDRAMC_CR1_NB (0x1u << 4) /**< \brief (SDRAMC_CR1) Number of Banks */
05335 #define   SDRAMC_CR1_NB_BANK2 (0x0u << 4) /**< \brief (SDRAMC_CR1) 2 banks */
05336 #define   SDRAMC_CR1_NB_BANK4 (0x1u << 4) /**< \brief (SDRAMC_CR1) 4 banks */
05337 #define SDRAMC_CR1_CAS_Pos 5
05338 #define SDRAMC_CR1_CAS_Msk (0x3u << SDRAMC_CR1_CAS_Pos) /**< \brief (SDRAMC_CR1) CAS Latency */
05339 #define   SDRAMC_CR1_CAS_LATENCY1 (0x1u << 5) /**< \brief (SDRAMC_CR1) 1 cycle CAS latency */
05340 #define   SDRAMC_CR1_CAS_LATENCY2 (0x2u << 5) /**< \brief (SDRAMC_CR1) 2 cycle CAS latency */
05341 #define   SDRAMC_CR1_CAS_LATENCY3 (0x3u << 5) /**< \brief (SDRAMC_CR1) 3 cycle CAS latency */
05342 #define SDRAMC_CR1_DBW (0x1u << 7) /**< \brief (SDRAMC_CR1) Data Bus Width */
05343 #define SDRAMC_CR1_TWR_Pos 8
05344 #define SDRAMC_CR1_TWR_Msk (0xfu << SDRAMC_CR1_TWR_Pos) /**< \brief (SDRAMC_CR1) Write Recovery Delay */
05345 #define SDRAMC_CR1_TWR(value) ((SDRAMC_CR1_TWR_Msk & ((value) << SDRAMC_CR1_TWR_Pos)))
05346 #define SDRAMC_CR1_TRC_TRFC_Pos 12
05347 #define SDRAMC_CR1_TRC_TRFC_Msk (0xfu << SDRAMC_CR1_TRC_TRFC_Pos) /**< \brief (SDRAMC_CR1) Row Cycle Delay and Row Refresh Cycle */
05348 #define SDRAMC_CR1_TRC_TRFC(value) ((SDRAMC_CR1_TRC_TRFC_Msk & ((value) << SDRAMC_CR1_TRC_TRFC_Pos)))
05349 #define SDRAMC_CR1_TRP_Pos 16
05350 #define SDRAMC_CR1_TRP_Msk (0xfu << SDRAMC_CR1_TRP_Pos) /**< \brief (SDRAMC_CR1) Row Precharge Delay */
05351 #define SDRAMC_CR1_TRP(value) ((SDRAMC_CR1_TRP_Msk & ((value) << SDRAMC_CR1_TRP_Pos)))
05352 #define SDRAMC_CR1_TRCD_Pos 20
05353 #define SDRAMC_CR1_TRCD_Msk (0xfu << SDRAMC_CR1_TRCD_Pos) /**< \brief (SDRAMC_CR1) Row to Column Delay */
05354 #define SDRAMC_CR1_TRCD(value) ((SDRAMC_CR1_TRCD_Msk & ((value) << SDRAMC_CR1_TRCD_Pos)))
05355 #define SDRAMC_CR1_TRAS_Pos 24
05356 #define SDRAMC_CR1_TRAS_Msk (0xfu << SDRAMC_CR1_TRAS_Pos) /**< \brief (SDRAMC_CR1) Active to Precharge Delay */
05357 #define SDRAMC_CR1_TRAS(value) ((SDRAMC_CR1_TRAS_Msk & ((value) << SDRAMC_CR1_TRAS_Pos)))
05358 #define SDRAMC_CR1_TXSR_Pos 28
05359 #define SDRAMC_CR1_TXSR_Msk (0xfu << SDRAMC_CR1_TXSR_Pos) /**< \brief (SDRAMC_CR1) Exit Self Refresh to Active Delay */
05360 #define SDRAMC_CR1_TXSR(value) ((SDRAMC_CR1_TXSR_Msk & ((value) << SDRAMC_CR1_TXSR_Pos)))
05361 /* -------- SDRAMC_OCMS : (SDRAMC Offset: 0x2C) SDRAMC OCMS Register 1 -------- */
05362 #define SDRAMC_OCMS_SDR_SE (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (SDRAMC_OCMS) SDRAM Memory Controller Scrambling Enable */
05363 
05364 /*@}*/
05365 
05366 /* ============================================================================= */
05367 /**  SOFTWARE API DEFINITION FOR Static Memory Controller */
05368 /* ============================================================================= */
05369 /** \addtogroup SAM3XA_SMC Static Memory Controller */
05370 /*@{*/
05371 
05372 #ifndef __ASSEMBLY__
05373 /** \brief SmcCs_number hardware registers */
05374 typedef struct {
05375   RwReg         SMC_SETUP;        /**< \brief (SmcCs_number Offset: 0x0) SMC Setup Register */
05376   RwReg         SMC_PULSE;        /**< \brief (SmcCs_number Offset: 0x4) SMC Pulse Register */
05377   RwReg         SMC_CYCLE;        /**< \brief (SmcCs_number Offset: 0x8) SMC Cycle Register */
05378   RwReg         SMC_TIMINGS;      /**< \brief (SmcCs_number Offset: 0xC) SMC Timings Register */
05379   RwReg         SMC_MODE;         /**< \brief (SmcCs_number Offset: 0x10) SMC Mode Register */
05380 } SmcCs_number;
05381 /** \brief Smc hardware registers */
05382 #define SMCCS_NUMBER_NUMBER 8
05383 typedef struct {
05384   RwReg         SMC_CFG;          /**< \brief (Smc Offset: 0x000) SMC NFC Configuration Register */
05385   WoReg         SMC_CTRL;         /**< \brief (Smc Offset: 0x004) SMC NFC Control Register */
05386   RoReg         SMC_SR;           /**< \brief (Smc Offset: 0x008) SMC NFC Status Register */
05387   WoReg         SMC_IER;          /**< \brief (Smc Offset: 0x00C) SMC NFC Interrupt Enable Register */
05388   WoReg         SMC_IDR;          /**< \brief (Smc Offset: 0x010) SMC NFC Interrupt Disable Register */
05389   RoReg         SMC_IMR;          /**< \brief (Smc Offset: 0x014) SMC NFC Interrupt Mask Register */
05390   RwReg         SMC_ADDR;         /**< \brief (Smc Offset: 0x018) SMC NFC Address Cycle Zero Register */
05391   RwReg         SMC_BANK;         /**< \brief (Smc Offset: 0x01C) SMC Bank Address Register */
05392   WoReg         SMC_ECC_CTRL;     /**< \brief (Smc Offset: 0x020) SMC ECC Control Register */
05393   RwReg         SMC_ECC_MD;       /**< \brief (Smc Offset: 0x024) SMC ECC Mode Register */
05394   RoReg         SMC_ECC_SR1;      /**< \brief (Smc Offset: 0x028) SMC ECC Status 1 Register */
05395   RoReg         SMC_ECC_PR0;      /**< \brief (Smc Offset: 0x02C) SMC ECC Parity 0 Register */
05396   RoReg         SMC_ECC_PR1;      /**< \brief (Smc Offset: 0x030) SMC ECC parity 1 Register */
05397   RoReg         SMC_ECC_SR2;      /**< \brief (Smc Offset: 0x034) SMC ECC status 2 Register */
05398   RoReg         SMC_ECC_PR2;      /**< \brief (Smc Offset: 0x038) SMC ECC parity 2 Register */
05399   RoReg         SMC_ECC_PR3;      /**< \brief (Smc Offset: 0x03C) SMC ECC parity 3 Register */
05400   RoReg         SMC_ECC_PR4;      /**< \brief (Smc Offset: 0x040) SMC ECC parity 4 Register */
05401   RoReg         SMC_ECC_PR5;      /**< \brief (Smc Offset: 0x044) SMC ECC parity 5 Register */
05402   RoReg         SMC_ECC_PR6;      /**< \brief (Smc Offset: 0x048) SMC ECC parity 6 Register */
05403   RoReg         SMC_ECC_PR7;      /**< \brief (Smc Offset: 0x04C) SMC ECC parity 7 Register */
05404   RoReg         SMC_ECC_PR8;      /**< \brief (Smc Offset: 0x050) SMC ECC parity 8 Register */
05405   RoReg         SMC_ECC_PR9;      /**< \brief (Smc Offset: 0x054) SMC ECC parity 9 Register */
05406   RoReg         SMC_ECC_PR10;     /**< \brief (Smc Offset: 0x058) SMC ECC parity 10 Register */
05407   RoReg         SMC_ECC_PR11;     /**< \brief (Smc Offset: 0x05C) SMC ECC parity 11 Register */
05408   RoReg         SMC_ECC_PR12;     /**< \brief (Smc Offset: 0x060) SMC ECC parity 12 Register */
05409   RoReg         SMC_ECC_PR13;     /**< \brief (Smc Offset: 0x064) SMC ECC parity 13 Register */
05410   RoReg         SMC_ECC_PR14;     /**< \brief (Smc Offset: 0x068) SMC ECC parity 14 Register */
05411   RoReg         SMC_ECC_PR15;     /**< \brief (Smc Offset: 0x06C) SMC ECC parity 15 Register */
05412   SmcCs_number  SMC_CS_NUMBER[SMCCS_NUMBER_NUMBER]; /**< \brief (Smc Offset: 0x70) CS_number = 0 .. 7 */
05413   RwReg         SMC_OCMS;         /**< \brief (Smc Offset: 0x110) SMC OCMS Register */
05414   WoReg         SMC_KEY1;         /**< \brief (Smc Offset: 0x114) SMC OCMS KEY1 Register */
05415   WoReg         SMC_KEY2;         /**< \brief (Smc Offset: 0x118) SMC OCMS KEY2 Register */
05416   RoReg         Reserved1[50];
05417   WoReg         SMC_WPCR;         /**< \brief (Smc Offset: 0x1E4) Write Protection Control Register */
05418   RoReg         SMC_WPSR;         /**< \brief (Smc Offset: 0x1E8) Write Protection Status Register */
05419 } Smc;
05420 #endif /* __ASSEMBLY__ */
05421 /* -------- SMC_CFG : (SMC Offset: 0x000) SMC NFC Configuration Register -------- */
05422 #define SMC_CFG_PAGESIZE_Pos 0
05423 #define SMC_CFG_PAGESIZE_Msk (0x3u << SMC_CFG_PAGESIZE_Pos) /**< \brief (SMC_CFG)  */
05424 #define   SMC_CFG_PAGESIZE_PS512_16 (0x0u << 0) /**< \brief (SMC_CFG) Main area 512 Bytes + Spare area 16 Bytes = 528 Bytes */
05425 #define   SMC_CFG_PAGESIZE_PS1024_32 (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (SMC_CFG) Main area 1024 Bytes + Spare area 32 Bytes = 1056 Bytes */
05426 #define   SMC_CFG_PAGESIZE_PS2048_64 (0x2u << 0) /**< \brief (SMC_CFG) Main area 2048 Bytes + Spare area 64 Bytes = 2112 Bytes */
05427 #define   SMC_CFG_PAGESIZE_PS4096_128 (0x3u << 0) /**< \brief (SMC_CFG) Main area 4096 Bytes + Spare area 128 Bytes = 4224 Bytes */
05428 #define SMC_CFG_WSPARE (0x1u << 8) /**< \brief (SMC_CFG) Write Spare Area */
05429 #define SMC_CFG_RSPARE (0x1u << 9) /**< \brief (SMC_CFG) Read Spare Area */
05430 #define SMC_CFG_EDGECTRL (0x1u << 12) /**< \brief (SMC_CFG) Rising/Falling Edge Detection Control */
05431 #define SMC_CFG_RBEDGE (0x1u << 13) /**< \brief (SMC_CFG) Ready/Busy Signal Edge Detection */
05432 #define SMC_CFG_DTOCYC_Pos 16
05433 #define SMC_CFG_DTOCYC_Msk (0xfu << SMC_CFG_DTOCYC_Pos) /**< \brief (SMC_CFG) Data Timeout Cycle Number */
05434 #define SMC_CFG_DTOCYC(value) ((SMC_CFG_DTOCYC_Msk & ((value) << SMC_CFG_DTOCYC_Pos)))
05435 #define SMC_CFG_DTOMUL_Pos 20
05436 #define SMC_CFG_DTOMUL_Msk (0x7u << SMC_CFG_DTOMUL_Pos) /**< \brief (SMC_CFG) Data Timeout Multiplier */
05437 #define   SMC_CFG_DTOMUL_X1 (0x0u << 20) /**< \brief (SMC_CFG) DTOCYC */
05438 #define   SMC_CFG_DTOMUL_X16 (0x1u << 20) /**< \brief (SMC_CFG) DTOCYC x 16 */
05439 #define   SMC_CFG_DTOMUL_X128 (0x2u << 20) /**< \brief (SMC_CFG) DTOCYC x 128 */
05440 #define   SMC_CFG_DTOMUL_X256 (0x3u << 20) /**< \brief (SMC_CFG) DTOCYC x 256 */
05441 #define   SMC_CFG_DTOMUL_X1024 (0x4u << 20) /**< \brief (SMC_CFG) DTOCYC x 1024 */
05442 #define   SMC_CFG_DTOMUL_X4096 (0x5u << 20) /**< \brief (SMC_CFG) DTOCYC x 4096 */
05443 #define   SMC_CFG_DTOMUL_X65536 (0x6u << 20) /**< \brief (SMC_CFG) DTOCYC x 65536 */
05444 #define   SMC_CFG_DTOMUL_X1048576 (0x7u << 20) /**< \brief (SMC_CFG) DTOCYC x 1048576 */
05445 /* -------- SMC_CTRL : (SMC Offset: 0x004) SMC NFC Control Register -------- */
05446 #define SMC_CTRL_NFCEN (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (SMC_CTRL) NAND Flash Controller Enable */
05447 #define SMC_CTRL_NFCDIS (0x1u << 1) /**< \brief (SMC_CTRL) NAND Flash Controller Disable */
05448 /* -------- SMC_SR : (SMC Offset: 0x008) SMC NFC Status Register -------- */
05449 #define SMC_SR_SMCSTS (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (SMC_SR) NAND Flash Controller status (this field cannot be reset) */
05450 #define SMC_SR_RB_RISE (0x1u << 4) /**< \brief (SMC_SR) Selected Ready Busy Rising Edge Detected */
05451 #define SMC_SR_RB_FALL (0x1u << 5) /**< \brief (SMC_SR) Selected Ready Busy Falling Edge Detected */
05452 #define SMC_SR_NFCBUSY (0x1u << 8) /**< \brief (SMC_SR) NFC Busy (this field cannot be reset) */
05453 #define SMC_SR_NFCWR (0x1u << 11) /**< \brief (SMC_SR) NFC Write/Read Operation (this field cannot be reset) */
05454 #define SMC_SR_NFCSID_Pos 12
05455 #define SMC_SR_NFCSID_Msk (0x7u << SMC_SR_NFCSID_Pos) /**< \brief (SMC_SR) NFC Chip Select ID (this field cannot be reset) */
05456 #define SMC_SR_XFRDONE (0x1u << 16) /**< \brief (SMC_SR) NFC Data Transfer Terminated */
05457 #define SMC_SR_CMDDONE (0x1u << 17) /**< \brief (SMC_SR) Command Done */
05458 #define SMC_SR_DTOE (0x1u << 20) /**< \brief (SMC_SR) Data Timeout Error */
05459 #define SMC_SR_UNDEF (0x1u << 21) /**< \brief (SMC_SR) Undefined Area Error */
05460 #define SMC_SR_AWB (0x1u << 22) /**< \brief (SMC_SR) Accessing While Busy */
05461 #define SMC_SR_NFCASE (0x1u << 23) /**< \brief (SMC_SR) NFC Access Size Error */
05462 #define SMC_SR_RB_EDGE0 (0x1u << 24) /**< \brief (SMC_SR) Ready/Busy Line 0 Edge Detected */
05463 /* -------- SMC_IER : (SMC Offset: 0x00C) SMC NFC Interrupt Enable Register -------- */
05464 #define SMC_IER_RB_RISE (0x1u << 4) /**< \brief (SMC_IER) Ready Busy Rising Edge Detection Interrupt Enable */
05465 #define SMC_IER_RB_FALL (0x1u << 5) /**< \brief (SMC_IER) Ready Busy Falling Edge Detection Interrupt Enable */
05466 #define SMC_IER_XFRDONE (0x1u << 16) /**< \brief (SMC_IER) Transfer Done Interrupt Enable */
05467 #define SMC_IER_CMDDONE (0x1u << 17) /**< \brief (SMC_IER) Command Done Interrupt Enable */
05468 #define SMC_IER_DTOE (0x1u << 20) /**< \brief (SMC_IER) Data Timeout Error Interrupt Enable */
05469 #define SMC_IER_UNDEF (0x1u << 21) /**< \brief (SMC_IER) Undefined Area Access Interrupt Enable */
05470 #define SMC_IER_AWB (0x1u << 22) /**< \brief (SMC_IER) Accessing While Busy Interrupt Enable */
05471 #define SMC_IER_NFCASE (0x1u << 23) /**< \brief (SMC_IER) NFC Access Size Error Interrupt Enable */
05472 #define SMC_IER_RB_EDGE0 (0x1u << 24) /**< \brief (SMC_IER) Ready/Busy Line 0 Interrupt Enable */
05473 /* -------- SMC_IDR : (SMC Offset: 0x010) SMC NFC Interrupt Disable Register -------- */
05474 #define SMC_IDR_RB_RISE (0x1u << 4) /**< \brief (SMC_IDR) Ready Busy Rising Edge Detection Interrupt Disable */
05475 #define SMC_IDR_RB_FALL (0x1u << 5) /**< \brief (SMC_IDR) Ready Busy Falling Edge Detection Interrupt Disable */
05476 #define SMC_IDR_XFRDONE (0x1u << 16) /**< \brief (SMC_IDR) Transfer Done Interrupt Disable */
05477 #define SMC_IDR_CMDDONE (0x1u << 17) /**< \brief (SMC_IDR) Command Done Interrupt Disable */
05478 #define SMC_IDR_DTOE (0x1u << 20) /**< \brief (SMC_IDR) Data Timeout Error Interrupt Disable */
05479 #define SMC_IDR_UNDEF (0x1u << 21) /**< \brief (SMC_IDR) Undefined Area Access Interrupt Disable */
05480 #define SMC_IDR_AWB (0x1u << 22) /**< \brief (SMC_IDR) Accessing While Busy Interrupt Disable */
05481 #define SMC_IDR_NFCASE (0x1u << 23) /**< \brief (SMC_IDR) NFC Access Size Error Interrupt Disable */
05482 #define SMC_IDR_RB_EDGE0 (0x1u << 24) /**< \brief (SMC_IDR) Ready/Busy Line 0 Interrupt Disable */
05483 /* -------- SMC_IMR : (SMC Offset: 0x014) SMC NFC Interrupt Mask Register -------- */
05484 #define SMC_IMR_RB_RISE (0x1u << 4) /**< \brief (SMC_IMR) Ready Busy Rising Edge Detection Interrupt Mask */
05485 #define SMC_IMR_RB_FALL (0x1u << 5) /**< \brief (SMC_IMR) Ready Busy Falling Edge Detection Interrupt Mask */
05486 #define SMC_IMR_XFRDONE (0x1u << 16) /**< \brief (SMC_IMR) Transfer Done Interrupt Mask */
05487 #define SMC_IMR_CMDDONE (0x1u << 17) /**< \brief (SMC_IMR) Command Done Interrupt Mask */
05488 #define SMC_IMR_DTOE (0x1u << 20) /**< \brief (SMC_IMR) Data Timeout Error Interrupt Mask */
05489 #define SMC_IMR_UNDEF (0x1u << 21) /**< \brief (SMC_IMR) Undefined Area Access Interrupt Mask5 */
05490 #define SMC_IMR_AWB (0x1u << 22) /**< \brief (SMC_IMR) Accessing While Busy Interrupt Mask */
05491 #define SMC_IMR_NFCASE (0x1u << 23) /**< \brief (SMC_IMR) NFC Access Size Error Interrupt Mask */
05492 #define SMC_IMR_RB_EDGE0 (0x1u << 24) /**< \brief (SMC_IMR) Ready/Busy Line 0 Interrupt Mask */
05493 /* -------- SMC_ADDR : (SMC Offset: 0x018) SMC NFC Address Cycle Zero Register -------- */
05494 #define SMC_ADDR_ADDR_CYCLE0_Pos 0
05495 #define SMC_ADDR_ADDR_CYCLE0_Msk (0xffu << SMC_ADDR_ADDR_CYCLE0_Pos) /**< \brief (SMC_ADDR) NAND Flash Array Address cycle 0 */
05496 #define SMC_ADDR_ADDR_CYCLE0(value) ((SMC_ADDR_ADDR_CYCLE0_Msk & ((value) << SMC_ADDR_ADDR_CYCLE0_Pos)))
05497 /* -------- SMC_BANK : (SMC Offset: 0x01C) SMC Bank Address Register -------- */
05498 #define SMC_BANK_BANK_Pos 0
05499 #define SMC_BANK_BANK_Msk (0x7u << SMC_BANK_BANK_Pos) /**< \brief (SMC_BANK) Bank Identifier */
05500 #define SMC_BANK_BANK(value) ((SMC_BANK_BANK_Msk & ((value) << SMC_BANK_BANK_Pos)))
05501 /* -------- SMC_ECC_CTRL : (SMC Offset: 0x020) SMC ECC Control Register -------- */
05502 #define SMC_ECC_CTRL_RST (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (SMC_ECC_CTRL) Reset ECC */
05503 #define SMC_ECC_CTRL_SWRST (0x1u << 1) /**< \brief (SMC_ECC_CTRL) Software Reset */
05504 /* -------- SMC_ECC_MD : (SMC Offset: 0x024) SMC ECC Mode Register -------- */
05505 #define SMC_ECC_MD_ECC_PAGESIZE_Pos 0
05506 #define SMC_ECC_MD_ECC_PAGESIZE_Msk (0x3u << SMC_ECC_MD_ECC_PAGESIZE_Pos) /**< \brief (SMC_ECC_MD) ECC Page Size */
05507 #define   SMC_ECC_MD_ECC_PAGESIZE_PS512_16 (0x0u << 0) /**< \brief (SMC_ECC_MD) Main area 512 Bytes + Spare area 16 Bytes = 528 Bytes */
05508 #define   SMC_ECC_MD_ECC_PAGESIZE_PS1024_32 (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (SMC_ECC_MD) Main area 1024 Bytes + Spare area 32 Bytes = 1056 Bytes */
05509 #define   SMC_ECC_MD_ECC_PAGESIZE_PS2048_64 (0x2u << 0) /**< \brief (SMC_ECC_MD) Main area 2048 Bytes + Spare area 64 Bytes = 2112 Bytes */
05510 #define   SMC_ECC_MD_ECC_PAGESIZE_PS4096_128 (0x3u << 0) /**< \brief (SMC_ECC_MD) Main area 4096 Bytes + Spare area 128 Bytes = 4224 Bytes */
05511 #define SMC_ECC_MD_TYPCORREC_Pos 4
05512 #define SMC_ECC_MD_TYPCORREC_Msk (0x3u << SMC_ECC_MD_TYPCORREC_Pos) /**< \brief (SMC_ECC_MD) Type of Correction */
05513 #define   SMC_ECC_MD_TYPCORREC_CPAGE (0x0u << 4) /**< \brief (SMC_ECC_MD) 1 bit correction for a page of 512/1024/2048/4096 Bytes  (for 8 or 16-bit NAND Flash) */
05514 #define   SMC_ECC_MD_TYPCORREC_C256B (0x1u << 4) /**< \brief (SMC_ECC_MD) 1 bit correction for 256 Bytes of data for a page of 512/2048/4096 bytes (for 8-bit NAND Flash only) */
05515 #define   SMC_ECC_MD_TYPCORREC_C512B (0x2u << 4) /**< \brief (SMC_ECC_MD) 1 bit correction for 512 Bytes of data for a page of 512/2048/4096 bytes (for 8-bit NAND Flash only) */
05516 /* -------- SMC_ECC_SR1 : (SMC Offset: 0x028) SMC ECC Status 1 Register -------- */
05517 #define SMC_ECC_SR1_RECERR0 (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (SMC_ECC_SR1) Recoverable Error */
05518 #define SMC_ECC_SR1_ECCERR0_Pos 1
05519 #define SMC_ECC_SR1_ECCERR0_Msk (0x3u << SMC_ECC_SR1_ECCERR0_Pos) /**< \brief (SMC_ECC_SR1) ECC Error */
05520 #define SMC_ECC_SR1_RECERR1 (0x1u << 4) /**< \brief (SMC_ECC_SR1) Recoverable Error in the page between the 256th and the 511th bytes or the 512nd and the 1023rd bytes */
05521 #define SMC_ECC_SR1_ECCERR1 (0x1u << 5) /**< \brief (SMC_ECC_SR1) ECC Error in the page between the 256th and the 511th bytes or between the 512nd and the 1023rd bytes */
05522 #define SMC_ECC_SR1_MULERR1 (0x1u << 6) /**< \brief (SMC_ECC_SR1) Multiple Error in the page between the 256th and the 511th bytes or between the 512nd and the 1023rd bytes */
05523 #define SMC_ECC_SR1_RECERR2 (0x1u << 8) /**< \brief (SMC_ECC_SR1) Recoverable Error in the page between the 512nd and the 767th bytes or between the 1024th and the 1535th bytes */
05524 #define SMC_ECC_SR1_ECCERR2 (0x1u << 9) /**< \brief (SMC_ECC_SR1) ECC Error in the page between the 512nd and the 767th bytes or between the 1024th and the 1535th bytes */
05525 #define SMC_ECC_SR1_MULERR2 (0x1u << 10) /**< \brief (SMC_ECC_SR1) Multiple Error in the page between the 512nd and the 767th bytes or between the 1024th and the 1535th bytes */
05526 #define SMC_ECC_SR1_RECERR3 (0x1u << 12) /**< \brief (SMC_ECC_SR1) Recoverable Error in the page between the 768th and the 1023rd bytes or between the 1536th and the 2047th bytes */
05527 #define SMC_ECC_SR1_ECCERR3 (0x1u << 13) /**< \brief (SMC_ECC_SR1) ECC Error in the page between the 768th and the 1023rd bytes or between the 1536th and the 2047th bytes */
05528 #define SMC_ECC_SR1_MULERR3 (0x1u << 14) /**< \brief (SMC_ECC_SR1) Multiple Error in the page between the 768th and the 1023rd bytes or between the 1536th and the 2047th bytes */
05529 #define SMC_ECC_SR1_RECERR4 (0x1u << 16) /**< \brief (SMC_ECC_SR1) Recoverable Error in the page between the 1024th and the 1279th bytes or between the 2048th and the 2559th bytes */
05530 #define SMC_ECC_SR1_ECCERR4_Pos 17
05531 #define SMC_ECC_SR1_ECCERR4_Msk (0x3u << SMC_ECC_SR1_ECCERR4_Pos) /**< \brief (SMC_ECC_SR1) ECC Error in the page between the 1024th and the 1279th bytes or between the 2048th and the 2559th bytes */
05532 #define SMC_ECC_SR1_RECERR5 (0x1u << 20) /**< \brief (SMC_ECC_SR1) Recoverable Error in the page between the 1280th and the 1535th bytes or between the 2560th and the 3071st bytes */
05533 #define SMC_ECC_SR1_ECCERR5_Pos 21
05534 #define SMC_ECC_SR1_ECCERR5_Msk (0x3u << SMC_ECC_SR1_ECCERR5_Pos) /**< \brief (SMC_ECC_SR1) ECC Error in the page between the 1280th and the 1535th bytes or between the 2560th and the 3071st bytes */
05535 #define SMC_ECC_SR1_RECERR6 (0x1u << 24) /**< \brief (SMC_ECC_SR1) Recoverable Error in the page between the 1536th and the 1791st bytes or between the 3072nd and the 3583rd bytes */
05536 #define SMC_ECC_SR1_ECCERR6_Pos 25
05537 #define SMC_ECC_SR1_ECCERR6_Msk (0x3u << SMC_ECC_SR1_ECCERR6_Pos) /**< \brief (SMC_ECC_SR1) ECC Error in the page between the 1536th and the 1791st bytes or between the 3072nd and the 3583rd bytes */
05538 #define SMC_ECC_SR1_RECERR7 (0x1u << 28) /**< \brief (SMC_ECC_SR1) Recoverable Error in the page between the 1792nd and the 2047th bytes or between the 3584th and the 4095th bytes */
05539 #define SMC_ECC_SR1_ECCERR7_Pos 29
05540 #define SMC_ECC_SR1_ECCERR7_Msk (0x3u << SMC_ECC_SR1_ECCERR7_Pos) /**< \brief (SMC_ECC_SR1) ECC Error in the page between the 1792nd and the 2047th bytes or between the 3584th and the 4095th bytes */
05541 /* -------- SMC_ECC_PR0 : (SMC Offset: 0x02C) SMC ECC Parity 0 Register -------- */
05542 #define SMC_ECC_PR0_BITADDR_Pos 0
05543 #define SMC_ECC_PR0_BITADDR_Msk (0xfu << SMC_ECC_PR0_BITADDR_Pos) /**< \brief (SMC_ECC_PR0) Bit Address */
05544 #define SMC_ECC_PR0_WORDADDR_Pos 4
05545 #define SMC_ECC_PR0_WORDADDR_Msk (0xfffu << SMC_ECC_PR0_WORDADDR_Pos) /**< \brief (SMC_ECC_PR0) Word Address */
05546 #define SMC_ECC_PR0_BITADDR_W9BIT_Pos 0
05547 #define SMC_ECC_PR0_BITADDR_W9BIT_Msk (0x7u << SMC_ECC_PR0_BITADDR_W9BIT_Pos) /**< \brief (SMC_ECC_PR0) Corrupted Bit Address in the Page between (i x 512) and ((i + 1) x 512) - 1) Bytes */
05548 #define SMC_ECC_PR0_WORDADDR_W9BIT_Pos 3
05549 #define SMC_ECC_PR0_WORDADDR_W9BIT_Msk (0x1ffu << SMC_ECC_PR0_WORDADDR_W9BIT_Pos) /**< \brief (SMC_ECC_PR0) Corrupted Word Address in the Page between (i x 512) and ((i + 1) x 512) - 1) Bytes */
05550 #define SMC_ECC_PR0_NPARITY_Pos 12
05551 #define SMC_ECC_PR0_NPARITY_Msk (0xfffu << SMC_ECC_PR0_NPARITY_Pos) /**< \brief (SMC_ECC_PR0) Parity N */
05552 #define SMC_ECC_PR0_BITADDR_W8BIT_Pos 0
05553 #define SMC_ECC_PR0_BITADDR_W8BIT_Msk (0x7u << SMC_ECC_PR0_BITADDR_W8BIT_Pos) /**< \brief (SMC_ECC_PR0) Corrupted Bit Address in the Page between (i x 256) and ((i + 1) x 512) - 1) Bytes */
05554 #define SMC_ECC_PR0_WORDADDR_W8BIT_Pos 3
05555 #define SMC_ECC_PR0_WORDADDR_W8BIT_Msk (0xffu << SMC_ECC_PR0_WORDADDR_W8BIT_Pos) /**< \brief (SMC_ECC_PR0) Corrupted Word Address in the Page between (i x 256) and ((i + 1) x 512) - 1) Bytes */
05556 #define SMC_ECC_PR0_NPARITY_W8BIT_Pos 12
05557 #define SMC_ECC_PR0_NPARITY_W8BIT_Msk (0x7ffu << SMC_ECC_PR0_NPARITY_W8BIT_Pos) /**< \brief (SMC_ECC_PR0) Parity N */
05558 /* -------- SMC_ECC_PR1 : (SMC Offset: 0x030) SMC ECC parity 1 Register -------- */
05559 #define SMC_ECC_PR1_NPARITY_Pos 0
05560 #define SMC_ECC_PR1_NPARITY_Msk (0xffffu << SMC_ECC_PR1_NPARITY_Pos) /**< \brief (SMC_ECC_PR1) Parity N */
05561 #define SMC_ECC_PR1_BITADDR_Pos 0
05562 #define SMC_ECC_PR1_BITADDR_Msk (0x7u << SMC_ECC_PR1_BITADDR_Pos) /**< \brief (SMC_ECC_PR1) Corrupted Bit Address in the Page between (i x 512) and ((i + 1) x 512) - 1) Bytes */
05563 #define SMC_ECC_PR1_WORDADDR_Pos 3
05564 #define SMC_ECC_PR1_WORDADDR_Msk (0x1ffu << SMC_ECC_PR1_WORDADDR_Pos) /**< \brief (SMC_ECC_PR1) Corrupted Word Address in the Page between (i x 512) and ((i + 1) x 512) - 1) Bytes */
05565 #define SMC_ECC_PR1_NPARITY_W9BIT_Pos 12
05566 #define SMC_ECC_PR1_NPARITY_W9BIT_Msk (0xfffu << SMC_ECC_PR1_NPARITY_W9BIT_Pos) /**< \brief (SMC_ECC_PR1) Parity N */
05567 #define SMC_ECC_PR1_WORDADDR_W8BIT_Pos 3
05568 #define SMC_ECC_PR1_WORDADDR_W8BIT_Msk (0xffu << SMC_ECC_PR1_WORDADDR_W8BIT_Pos) /**< \brief (SMC_ECC_PR1) Corrupted Word Address in the Page between (i x 256) and ((i + 1) x 512) - 1) Bytes */
05569 #define SMC_ECC_PR1_NPARITY_W8BIT_Pos 12
05570 #define SMC_ECC_PR1_NPARITY_W8BIT_Msk (0x7ffu << SMC_ECC_PR1_NPARITY_W8BIT_Pos) /**< \brief (SMC_ECC_PR1) Parity N */
05571 /* -------- SMC_ECC_SR2 : (SMC Offset: 0x034) SMC ECC status 2 Register -------- */
05572 #define SMC_ECC_SR2_RECERR8 (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (SMC_ECC_SR2) Recoverable Error in the page between the 2048th and the 2303rd bytes */
05573 #define SMC_ECC_SR2_ECCERR8_Pos 1
05574 #define SMC_ECC_SR2_ECCERR8_Msk (0x3u << SMC_ECC_SR2_ECCERR8_Pos) /**< \brief (SMC_ECC_SR2) ECC Error in the page between the 2048th and the 2303rd bytes */
05575 #define SMC_ECC_SR2_RECERR9 (0x1u << 4) /**< \brief (SMC_ECC_SR2) Recoverable Error in the page between the 2304th and the 2559th bytes */
05576 #define SMC_ECC_SR2_ECCERR9 (0x1u << 5) /**< \brief (SMC_ECC_SR2) ECC Error in the page between the 2304th and the 2559th bytes */
05577 #define SMC_ECC_SR2_MULERR9 (0x1u << 6) /**< \brief (SMC_ECC_SR2) Multiple Error in the page between the 2304th and the 2559th bytes */
05578 #define SMC_ECC_SR2_RECERR10 (0x1u << 8) /**< \brief (SMC_ECC_SR2) Recoverable Error in the page between the 2560th and the 2815th bytes */
05579 #define SMC_ECC_SR2_ECCERR10 (0x1u << 9) /**< \brief (SMC_ECC_SR2) ECC Error in the page between the 2560th and the 2815th bytes */

05755 #define SMC_TIMINGS_TADL_Pos 4
