05758 #define SMC_TIMINGS_TAR_Pos 8
05759 #define SMC_TIMINGS_TAR_Msk (0xfu << SMC_TIMINGS_TAR_Pos) /**< \brief (SMC_TIMINGS) ALE to REN Low Delay */
05760 #define SMC_TIMINGS_TAR(value) ((SMC_TIMINGS_TAR_Msk & ((value) << SMC_TIMINGS_TAR_Pos)))
05761 #define SMC_TIMINGS_OCMS (0x1u << 12) /**< \brief (SMC_TIMINGS) Off Chip Memory Scrambling Enable */
05762 #define SMC_TIMINGS_TRR_Pos 16
05763 #define SMC_TIMINGS_TRR_Msk (0xfu << SMC_TIMINGS_TRR_Pos) /**< \brief (SMC_TIMINGS) Ready to REN Low Delay */
05764 #define SMC_TIMINGS_TRR(value) ((SMC_TIMINGS_TRR_Msk & ((value) << SMC_TIMINGS_TRR_Pos)))
05765 #define SMC_TIMINGS_TWB_Pos 24
05766 #define SMC_TIMINGS_TWB_Msk (0xfu << SMC_TIMINGS_TWB_Pos) /**< \brief (SMC_TIMINGS) WEN High to REN to Busy */
05767 #define SMC_TIMINGS_TWB(value) ((SMC_TIMINGS_TWB_Msk & ((value) << SMC_TIMINGS_TWB_Pos)))
05768 #define SMC_TIMINGS_RBNSEL_Pos 28
05769 #define SMC_TIMINGS_RBNSEL_Msk (0x7u << SMC_TIMINGS_RBNSEL_Pos) /**< \brief (SMC_TIMINGS) Ready/Busy Line Selection */
05770 #define SMC_TIMINGS_RBNSEL(value) ((SMC_TIMINGS_RBNSEL_Msk & ((value) << SMC_TIMINGS_RBNSEL_Pos)))
05771 #define SMC_TIMINGS_NFSEL (0x1u << 31) /**< \brief (SMC_TIMINGS) NAND Flash Selection */
05772 /* -------- SMC_MODE : (SMC Offset: N/A) SMC Mode Register -------- */
05773 #define SMC_MODE_READ_MODE (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (SMC_MODE)  */
05774 #define   SMC_MODE_READ_MODE_NCS_CTRL (0x0u << 0) /**< \brief (SMC_MODE) The Read operation is controlled by the NCS signal. */
05775 #define   SMC_MODE_READ_MODE_NRD_CTRL (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (SMC_MODE) The Read operation is controlled by the NRD signal. */
05776 #define SMC_MODE_WRITE_MODE (0x1u << 1) /**< \brief (SMC_MODE)  */
05777 #define   SMC_MODE_WRITE_MODE_NCS_CTRL (0x0u << 1) /**< \brief (SMC_MODE) The Write operation is controller by the NCS signal. */
05778 #define   SMC_MODE_WRITE_MODE_NWE_CTRL (0x1u << 1) /**< \brief (SMC_MODE) The Write operation is controlled by the NWE signal. */
05779 #define SMC_MODE_EXNW_MODE_Pos 4
05780 #define SMC_MODE_EXNW_MODE_Msk (0x3u << SMC_MODE_EXNW_MODE_Pos) /**< \brief (SMC_MODE) NWAIT Mode */
05781 #define   SMC_MODE_EXNW_MODE_DISABLED (0x0u << 4) /**< \brief (SMC_MODE) Disabled */
05782 #define   SMC_MODE_EXNW_MODE_FROZEN (0x2u << 4) /**< \brief (SMC_MODE) Frozen Mode */
05783 #define   SMC_MODE_EXNW_MODE_READY (0x3u << 4) /**< \brief (SMC_MODE) Ready Mode */
05784 #define SMC_MODE_BAT (0x1u << 8) /**< \brief (SMC_MODE) Byte Access Type */
05785 #define SMC_MODE_DBW (0x1u << 12) /**< \brief (SMC_MODE) Data Bus Width */
05786 #define   SMC_MODE_DBW_BIT_8 (0x0u << 12) /**< \brief (SMC_MODE) 8-bit bus */
05787 #define   SMC_MODE_DBW_BIT_16 (0x1u << 12) /**< \brief (SMC_MODE) 16-bit bus */
05788 #define SMC_MODE_TDF_CYCLES_Pos 16
05789 #define SMC_MODE_TDF_CYCLES_Msk (0xfu << SMC_MODE_TDF_CYCLES_Pos) /**< \brief (SMC_MODE) Data Float Time */
05790 #define SMC_MODE_TDF_CYCLES(value) ((SMC_MODE_TDF_CYCLES_Msk & ((value) << SMC_MODE_TDF_CYCLES_Pos)))
05791 #define SMC_MODE_TDF_MODE (0x1u << 20) /**< \brief (SMC_MODE) TDF Optimization */
05792 /* -------- SMC_OCMS : (SMC Offset: 0x110) SMC OCMS Register -------- */
05793 #define SMC_OCMS_SMSE (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (SMC_OCMS) Static Memory Controller Scrambling Enable */
05794 #define SMC_OCMS_SRSE (0x1u << 1) /**< \brief (SMC_OCMS) SRAM Scrambling Enable */
05795 /* -------- SMC_KEY1 : (SMC Offset: 0x114) SMC OCMS KEY1 Register -------- */
05796 #define SMC_KEY1_KEY1_Pos 0
05797 #define SMC_KEY1_KEY1_Msk (0xffffffffu << SMC_KEY1_KEY1_Pos) /**< \brief (SMC_KEY1) Off Chip Memory Scrambling (OCMS) Key Part 1 */
05798 #define SMC_KEY1_KEY1(value) ((SMC_KEY1_KEY1_Msk & ((value) << SMC_KEY1_KEY1_Pos)))
05799 /* -------- SMC_KEY2 : (SMC Offset: 0x118) SMC OCMS KEY2 Register -------- */
05800 #define SMC_KEY2_KEY2_Pos 0
05801 #define SMC_KEY2_KEY2_Msk (0xffffffffu << SMC_KEY2_KEY2_Pos) /**< \brief (SMC_KEY2) Off Chip Memory Scrambling (OCMS) Key Part 2 */
05802 #define SMC_KEY2_KEY2(value) ((SMC_KEY2_KEY2_Msk & ((value) << SMC_KEY2_KEY2_Pos)))
05803 /* -------- SMC_WPCR : (SMC Offset: 0x1E4) Write Protection Control Register -------- */
05804 #define SMC_WPCR_WP_EN (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (SMC_WPCR) Write Protection Enable */
05805 #define SMC_WPCR_WP_KEY_Pos 8
05806 #define SMC_WPCR_WP_KEY_Msk (0xffffffu << SMC_WPCR_WP_KEY_Pos) /**< \brief (SMC_WPCR) Write Protection KEY password */
05807 #define SMC_WPCR_WP_KEY(value) ((SMC_WPCR_WP_KEY_Msk & ((value) << SMC_WPCR_WP_KEY_Pos)))
05808 /* -------- SMC_WPSR : (SMC Offset: 0x1E8) Write Protection Status Register -------- */
05809 #define SMC_WPSR_WP_VS_Pos 0
05810 #define SMC_WPSR_WP_VS_Msk (0xfu << SMC_WPSR_WP_VS_Pos) /**< \brief (SMC_WPSR) Write Protection Violation Status */
05811 #define SMC_WPSR_WP_VSRC_Pos 8
05812 #define SMC_WPSR_WP_VSRC_Msk (0xffffu << SMC_WPSR_WP_VSRC_Pos) /**< \brief (SMC_WPSR) Write Protection Violation Source */
05813 /* -------- NFCADDR_CMD : NFC Address Command -------- */
05814 #define NFCADDR_CMD_CMD1      (0xFFu <<  2) /* Command Register Value for Cycle 1 */
05815 #define NFCADDR_CMD_CMD2      (0xFFu << 10) /* Command Register Value for Cycle 2 */
05816 #define NFCADDR_CMD_VCMD2     (0x1u << 18)  /* Valid Cycle 2 Command */
05817 #define NFCADDR_CMD_ACYCLE    (0x7u << 19)  /* Number of Address required for the current command */
05818 #define   NFCADDR_CMD_ACYCLE_NONE    (0x0u << 19) /* No address cycle */
05819 #define   NFCADDR_CMD_ACYCLE_ONE     (0x1u << 19) /* One address cycle */
05820 #define   NFCADDR_CMD_ACYCLE_TWO     (0x2u << 19) /* Two address cycles */
05821 #define   NFCADDR_CMD_ACYCLE_THREE   (0x3u << 19) /* Three address cycles */
05822 #define   NFCADDR_CMD_ACYCLE_FOUR    (0x4u << 19) /* Four address cycles */
05823 #define   NFCADDR_CMD_ACYCLE_FIVE    (0x5u << 19) /* Five address cycles */
05824 #define NFCADDR_CMD_CSID      (0x7u << 22)  /* Chip Select Identifier */
05825 #define   NFCADDR_CMD_CSID_0                    (0x0u << 22) /* CS0 */
05826 #define   NFCADDR_CMD_CSID_1                    (0x1u << 22) /* CS1 */
05827 #define   NFCADDR_CMD_CSID_2                    (0x2u << 22) /* CS2 */
05828 #define   NFCADDR_CMD_CSID_3                    (0x3u << 22) /* CS3 */
05829 #define   NFCADDR_CMD_CSID_4                    (0x4u << 22) /* CS4 */
05830 #define   NFCADDR_CMD_CSID_5                    (0x5u << 22) /* CS5 */
05831 #define   NFCADDR_CMD_CSID_6                    (0x6u << 22) /* CS6 */
05832 #define   NFCADDR_CMD_CSID_7                    (0x7u << 22) /* CS7 */
05833 #define NFCADDR_CMD_NFCEN    (0x1u << 25)  /* NFC Enable */
05834 #define NFCADDR_CMD_NFCWR    (0x1u << 26)  /* NFC Write Enable */
05835 #define NFCADDR_CMD_NFCCMD   (0x1u << 27)  /* NFC Command Enable */
05836 
05837 /*@}*/
05838 
05839 /* ============================================================================= */
05840 /**  SOFTWARE API DEFINITION FOR Serial Peripheral Interface */
05841 /* ============================================================================= */
05842 /** \addtogroup SAM3XA_SPI Serial Peripheral Interface */
05843 /*@{*/
05844 
05845 #ifndef __ASSEMBLY__
05846 /** \brief Spi hardware registers */
05847 typedef struct {
05848   WoReg SPI_CR;        /**< \brief (Spi Offset: 0x00) Control Register */
05849   RwReg SPI_MR;        /**< \brief (Spi Offset: 0x04) Mode Register */
05850   RoReg SPI_RDR;       /**< \brief (Spi Offset: 0x08) Receive Data Register */
05851   WoReg SPI_TDR;       /**< \brief (Spi Offset: 0x0C) Transmit Data Register */
05852   RoReg SPI_SR;        /**< \brief (Spi Offset: 0x10) Status Register */
05853   WoReg SPI_IER;       /**< \brief (Spi Offset: 0x14) Interrupt Enable Register */
05854   WoReg SPI_IDR;       /**< \brief (Spi Offset: 0x18) Interrupt Disable Register */
05855   RoReg SPI_IMR;       /**< \brief (Spi Offset: 0x1C) Interrupt Mask Register */
05856   RoReg Reserved1[4];
05857   RwReg SPI_CSR[4];    /**< \brief (Spi Offset: 0x30) Chip Select Register */
05858   RoReg Reserved2[41];
05859   RwReg SPI_WPMR;      /**< \brief (Spi Offset: 0xE4) Write Protection Control Register */
05860   RoReg SPI_WPSR;      /**< \brief (Spi Offset: 0xE8) Write Protection Status Register */
05861 } Spi;
05862 #endif /* __ASSEMBLY__ */
05863 /* -------- SPI_CR : (SPI Offset: 0x00) Control Register -------- */
05864 #define SPI_CR_SPIEN (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (SPI_CR) SPI Enable */
05865 #define SPI_CR_SPIDIS (0x1u << 1) /**< \brief (SPI_CR) SPI Disable */
05866 #define SPI_CR_SWRST (0x1u << 7) /**< \brief (SPI_CR) SPI Software Reset */
05867 #define SPI_CR_LASTXFER (0x1u << 24) /**< \brief (SPI_CR) Last Transfer */
05868 /* -------- SPI_MR : (SPI Offset: 0x04) Mode Register -------- */
05869 #define SPI_MR_MSTR (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (SPI_MR) Master/Slave Mode */
05870 #define SPI_MR_PS (0x1u << 1) /**< \brief (SPI_MR) Peripheral Select */
05871 #define SPI_MR_PCSDEC (0x1u << 2) /**< \brief (SPI_MR) Chip Select Decode */
05872 #define SPI_MR_MODFDIS (0x1u << 4) /**< \brief (SPI_MR) Mode Fault Detection */
05873 #define SPI_MR_WDRBT (0x1u << 5) /**< \brief (SPI_MR) Wait Data Read Before Transfer */
05874 #define SPI_MR_LLB (0x1u << 7) /**< \brief (SPI_MR) Local Loopback Enable */
05875 #define SPI_MR_PCS_Pos 16
05876 #define SPI_MR_PCS_Msk (0xfu << SPI_MR_PCS_Pos) /**< \brief (SPI_MR) Peripheral Chip Select */
05877 #define SPI_MR_PCS(value) ((SPI_MR_PCS_Msk & ((value) << SPI_MR_PCS_Pos)))
05878 #define SPI_MR_DLYBCS_Pos 24
05879 #define SPI_MR_DLYBCS_Msk (0xffu << SPI_MR_DLYBCS_Pos) /**< \brief (SPI_MR) Delay Between Chip Selects */
05880 #define SPI_MR_DLYBCS(value) ((SPI_MR_DLYBCS_Msk & ((value) << SPI_MR_DLYBCS_Pos)))
05881 /* -------- SPI_RDR : (SPI Offset: 0x08) Receive Data Register -------- */
05882 #define SPI_RDR_RD_Pos 0
05883 #define SPI_RDR_RD_Msk (0xffffu << SPI_RDR_RD_Pos) /**< \brief (SPI_RDR) Receive Data */
05884 #define SPI_RDR_PCS_Pos 16
05885 #define SPI_RDR_PCS_Msk (0xfu << SPI_RDR_PCS_Pos) /**< \brief (SPI_RDR) Peripheral Chip Select */
05886 /* -------- SPI_TDR : (SPI Offset: 0x0C) Transmit Data Register -------- */
05887 #define SPI_TDR_TD_Pos 0
05888 #define SPI_TDR_TD_Msk (0xffffu << SPI_TDR_TD_Pos) /**< \brief (SPI_TDR) Transmit Data */
05889 #define SPI_TDR_TD(value) ((SPI_TDR_TD_Msk & ((value) << SPI_TDR_TD_Pos)))
05890 #define SPI_TDR_PCS_Pos 16
05891 #define SPI_TDR_PCS_Msk (0xfu << SPI_TDR_PCS_Pos) /**< \brief (SPI_TDR) Peripheral Chip Select */
05892 #define SPI_TDR_PCS(value) ((SPI_TDR_PCS_Msk & ((value) << SPI_TDR_PCS_Pos)))
05893 #define SPI_TDR_LASTXFER (0x1u << 24) /**< \brief (SPI_TDR) Last Transfer */
05894 /* -------- SPI_SR : (SPI Offset: 0x10) Status Register -------- */
05895 #define SPI_SR_RDRF (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (SPI_SR) Receive Data Register Full */
05896 #define SPI_SR_TDRE (0x1u << 1) /**< \brief (SPI_SR) Transmit Data Register Empty */
05897 #define SPI_SR_MODF (0x1u << 2) /**< \brief (SPI_SR) Mode Fault Error */
05898 #define SPI_SR_OVRES (0x1u << 3) /**< \brief (SPI_SR) Overrun Error Status */
05899 #define SPI_SR_NSSR (0x1u << 8) /**< \brief (SPI_SR) NSS Rising */
05900 #define SPI_SR_TXEMPTY (0x1u << 9) /**< \brief (SPI_SR) Transmission Registers Empty */
05901 #define SPI_SR_UNDES (0x1u << 10) /**< \brief (SPI_SR) Underrun Error Status (Slave Mode Only) */
05902 #define SPI_SR_SPIENS (0x1u << 16) /**< \brief (SPI_SR) SPI Enable Status */
05903 /* -------- SPI_IER : (SPI Offset: 0x14) Interrupt Enable Register -------- */
05904 #define SPI_IER_RDRF (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (SPI_IER) Receive Data Register Full Interrupt Enable */
05905 #define SPI_IER_TDRE (0x1u << 1) /**< \brief (SPI_IER) SPI Transmit Data Register Empty Interrupt Enable */
05906 #define SPI_IER_MODF (0x1u << 2) /**< \brief (SPI_IER) Mode Fault Error Interrupt Enable */
05907 #define SPI_IER_OVRES (0x1u << 3) /**< \brief (SPI_IER) Overrun Error Interrupt Enable */
05908 #define SPI_IER_NSSR (0x1u << 8) /**< \brief (SPI_IER) NSS Rising Interrupt Enable */
05909 #define SPI_IER_TXEMPTY (0x1u << 9) /**< \brief (SPI_IER) Transmission Registers Empty Enable */
05910 #define SPI_IER_UNDES (0x1u << 10) /**< \brief (SPI_IER) Underrun Error Interrupt Enable */
05911 /* -------- SPI_IDR : (SPI Offset: 0x18) Interrupt Disable Register -------- */
05912 #define SPI_IDR_RDRF (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (SPI_IDR) Receive Data Register Full Interrupt Disable */
05913 #define SPI_IDR_TDRE (0x1u << 1) /**< \brief (SPI_IDR) SPI Transmit Data Register Empty Interrupt Disable */
05914 #define SPI_IDR_MODF (0x1u << 2) /**< \brief (SPI_IDR) Mode Fault Error Interrupt Disable */
05915 #define SPI_IDR_OVRES (0x1u << 3) /**< \brief (SPI_IDR) Overrun Error Interrupt Disable */
05916 #define SPI_IDR_NSSR (0x1u << 8) /**< \brief (SPI_IDR) NSS Rising Interrupt Disable */
05917 #define SPI_IDR_TXEMPTY (0x1u << 9) /**< \brief (SPI_IDR) Transmission Registers Empty Disable */
05918 #define SPI_IDR_UNDES (0x1u << 10) /**< \brief (SPI_IDR) Underrun Error Interrupt Disable */
05919 /* -------- SPI_IMR : (SPI Offset: 0x1C) Interrupt Mask Register -------- */
05920 #define SPI_IMR_RDRF (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (SPI_IMR) Receive Data Register Full Interrupt Mask */
05921 #define SPI_IMR_TDRE (0x1u << 1) /**< \brief (SPI_IMR) SPI Transmit Data Register Empty Interrupt Mask */
05922 #define SPI_IMR_MODF (0x1u << 2) /**< \brief (SPI_IMR) Mode Fault Error Interrupt Mask */
05923 #define SPI_IMR_OVRES (0x1u << 3) /**< \brief (SPI_IMR) Overrun Error Interrupt Mask */
05924 #define SPI_IMR_NSSR (0x1u << 8) /**< \brief (SPI_IMR) NSS Rising Interrupt Mask */
05925 #define SPI_IMR_TXEMPTY (0x1u << 9) /**< \brief (SPI_IMR) Transmission Registers Empty Mask */
05926 #define SPI_IMR_UNDES (0x1u << 10) /**< \brief (SPI_IMR) Underrun Error Interrupt Mask */
05927 /* -------- SPI_CSR[4] : (SPI Offset: 0x30) Chip Select Register -------- */
05928 #define SPI_CSR_CPOL (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (SPI_CSR[4]) Clock Polarity */
05929 #define SPI_CSR_NCPHA (0x1u << 1) /**< \brief (SPI_CSR[4]) Clock Phase */
05930 #define SPI_CSR_CSNAAT (0x1u << 2) /**< \brief (SPI_CSR[4]) Chip Select Not Active After Transfer (Ignored if CSAAT = 1) */
05931 #define SPI_CSR_CSAAT (0x1u << 3) /**< \brief (SPI_CSR[4]) Chip Select Not Active After Transfer (Ignored if CSAAT = 1) */
05932 #define SPI_CSR_BITS_Pos 4
05933 #define SPI_CSR_BITS_Msk (0xfu << SPI_CSR_BITS_Pos) /**< \brief (SPI_CSR[4]) Bits Per Transfer */
05934 #define   SPI_CSR_BITS_8_BIT (0x0u << 4) /**< \brief (SPI_CSR[4]) 8 bits for transfer */
05935 #define   SPI_CSR_BITS_9_BIT (0x1u << 4) /**< \brief (SPI_CSR[4]) 9 bits for transfer */
05936 #define   SPI_CSR_BITS_10_BIT (0x2u << 4) /**< \brief (SPI_CSR[4]) 10 bits for transfer */
05937 #define   SPI_CSR_BITS_11_BIT (0x3u << 4) /**< \brief (SPI_CSR[4]) 11 bits for transfer */
05938 #define   SPI_CSR_BITS_12_BIT (0x4u << 4) /**< \brief (SPI_CSR[4]) 12 bits for transfer */
05939 #define   SPI_CSR_BITS_13_BIT (0x5u << 4) /**< \brief (SPI_CSR[4]) 13 bits for transfer */
05940 #define   SPI_CSR_BITS_14_BIT (0x6u << 4) /**< \brief (SPI_CSR[4]) 14 bits for transfer */
05941 #define   SPI_CSR_BITS_15_BIT (0x7u << 4) /**< \brief (SPI_CSR[4]) 15 bits for transfer */
05942 #define   SPI_CSR_BITS_16_BIT (0x8u << 4) /**< \brief (SPI_CSR[4]) 16 bits for transfer */
05943 #define SPI_CSR_SCBR_Pos 8
05944 #define SPI_CSR_SCBR_Msk (0xffu << SPI_CSR_SCBR_Pos) /**< \brief (SPI_CSR[4]) Serial Clock Baud Rate */
05945 #define SPI_CSR_SCBR(value) ((SPI_CSR_SCBR_Msk & ((value) << SPI_CSR_SCBR_Pos)))
05946 #define SPI_CSR_DLYBS_Pos 16
05947 #define SPI_CSR_DLYBS_Msk (0xffu << SPI_CSR_DLYBS_Pos) /**< \brief (SPI_CSR[4]) Delay Before SPCK */
05948 #define SPI_CSR_DLYBS(value) ((SPI_CSR_DLYBS_Msk & ((value) << SPI_CSR_DLYBS_Pos)))
05949 #define SPI_CSR_DLYBCT_Pos 24
05950 #define SPI_CSR_DLYBCT_Msk (0xffu << SPI_CSR_DLYBCT_Pos) /**< \brief (SPI_CSR[4]) Delay Between Consecutive Transfers */
05951 #define SPI_CSR_DLYBCT(value) ((SPI_CSR_DLYBCT_Msk & ((value) << SPI_CSR_DLYBCT_Pos)))
05952 /* -------- SPI_WPMR : (SPI Offset: 0xE4) Write Protection Control Register -------- */
05953 #define SPI_WPMR_SPIWPEN (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (SPI_WPMR) SPI Write Protection Enable */
05954 #define SPI_WPMR_SPIWPKEY_Pos 8
05955 #define SPI_WPMR_SPIWPKEY_Msk (0xffffffu << SPI_WPMR_SPIWPKEY_Pos) /**< \brief (SPI_WPMR) SPI Write Protection Key Password */
05956 #define SPI_WPMR_SPIWPKEY(value) ((SPI_WPMR_SPIWPKEY_Msk & ((value) << SPI_WPMR_SPIWPKEY_Pos)))
05957 /* -------- SPI_WPSR : (SPI Offset: 0xE8) Write Protection Status Register -------- */
05958 #define SPI_WPSR_SPIWPVS_Pos 0
05959 #define SPI_WPSR_SPIWPVS_Msk (0x7u << SPI_WPSR_SPIWPVS_Pos) /**< \brief (SPI_WPSR) SPI Write Protection Violation Status */
05960 #define SPI_WPSR_SPIWPVSRC_Pos 8
05961 #define SPI_WPSR_SPIWPVSRC_Msk (0xffu << SPI_WPSR_SPIWPVSRC_Pos) /**< \brief (SPI_WPSR) SPI Write Protection Violation Source */
05962 
05963 /*@}*/
05964 
05965 /* ============================================================================= */
05966 /**  SOFTWARE API DEFINITION FOR Synchronous Serial Controller */
05967 /* ============================================================================= */
05968 /** \addtogroup SAM3XA_SSC Synchronous Serial Controller */
05969 /*@{*/
05970 
05971 #ifndef __ASSEMBLY__
05972 /** \brief Ssc hardware registers */
05973 typedef struct {
05974   WoReg SSC_CR;        /**< \brief (Ssc Offset: 0x0) Control Register */
05975   RwReg SSC_CMR;       /**< \brief (Ssc Offset: 0x4) Clock Mode Register */
05976   RoReg Reserved1[2];
05977   RwReg SSC_RCMR;      /**< \brief (Ssc Offset: 0x10) Receive Clock Mode Register */
05978   RwReg SSC_RFMR;      /**< \brief (Ssc Offset: 0x14) Receive Frame Mode Register */
05979   RwReg SSC_TCMR;      /**< \brief (Ssc Offset: 0x18) Transmit Clock Mode Register */
05980   RwReg SSC_TFMR;      /**< \brief (Ssc Offset: 0x1C) Transmit Frame Mode Register */
05981   RoReg SSC_RHR;       /**< \brief (Ssc Offset: 0x20) Receive Holding Register */
05982   WoReg SSC_THR;       /**< \brief (Ssc Offset: 0x24) Transmit Holding Register */
05983   RoReg Reserved2[2];
05984   RoReg SSC_RSHR;      /**< \brief (Ssc Offset: 0x30) Receive Sync. Holding Register */
05985   RwReg SSC_TSHR;      /**< \brief (Ssc Offset: 0x34) Transmit Sync. Holding Register */
05986   RwReg SSC_RC0R;      /**< \brief (Ssc Offset: 0x38) Receive Compare 0 Register */
05987   RwReg SSC_RC1R;      /**< \brief (Ssc Offset: 0x3C) Receive Compare 1 Register */
05988   RoReg SSC_SR;        /**< \brief (Ssc Offset: 0x40) Status Register */
05989   WoReg SSC_IER;       /**< \brief (Ssc Offset: 0x44) Interrupt Enable Register */
05990   WoReg SSC_IDR;       /**< \brief (Ssc Offset: 0x48) Interrupt Disable Register */
05991   RoReg SSC_IMR;       /**< \brief (Ssc Offset: 0x4C) Interrupt Mask Register */
05992   RoReg Reserved3[37];
05993   RwReg SSC_WPMR;      /**< \brief (Ssc Offset: 0xE4) Write Protect Mode Register */
05994   RoReg SSC_WPSR;      /**< \brief (Ssc Offset: 0xE8) Write Protect Status Register */
05995 } Ssc;
05996 #endif /* __ASSEMBLY__ */
05997 /* -------- SSC_CR : (SSC Offset: 0x0) Control Register -------- */
05998 #define SSC_CR_RXEN (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (SSC_CR) Receive Enable */
05999 #define SSC_CR_RXDIS (0x1u << 1) /**< \brief (SSC_CR) Receive Disable */
06000 #define SSC_CR_TXEN (0x1u << 8) /**< \brief (SSC_CR) Transmit Enable */
06001 #define SSC_CR_TXDIS (0x1u << 9) /**< \brief (SSC_CR) Transmit Disable */
06002 #define SSC_CR_SWRST (0x1u << 15) /**< \brief (SSC_CR) Software Reset */
06003 /* -------- SSC_CMR : (SSC Offset: 0x4) Clock Mode Register -------- */
06004 #define SSC_CMR_DIV_Pos 0
06005 #define SSC_CMR_DIV_Msk (0xfffu << SSC_CMR_DIV_Pos) /**< \brief (SSC_CMR) Clock Divider */
06006 #define SSC_CMR_DIV(value) ((SSC_CMR_DIV_Msk & ((value) << SSC_CMR_DIV_Pos)))
06007 /* -------- SSC_RCMR : (SSC Offset: 0x10) Receive Clock Mode Register -------- */
06008 #define SSC_RCMR_CKS_Pos 0
06009 #define SSC_RCMR_CKS_Msk (0x3u << SSC_RCMR_CKS_Pos) /**< \brief (SSC_RCMR) Receive Clock Selection */
06010 #define   SSC_RCMR_CKS_MCK (0x0u << 0) /**< \brief (SSC_RCMR) Divided Clock */
06011 #define   SSC_RCMR_CKS_TK (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (SSC_RCMR) TK Clock signal */
06012 #define   SSC_RCMR_CKS_RK (0x2u << 0) /**< \brief (SSC_RCMR) RK pin */
06013 #define SSC_RCMR_CKO_Pos 2
06014 #define SSC_RCMR_CKO_Msk (0x7u << SSC_RCMR_CKO_Pos) /**< \brief (SSC_RCMR) Receive Clock Output Mode Selection */
06015 #define   SSC_RCMR_CKO_NONE (0x0u << 2) /**< \brief (SSC_RCMR) None */
06016 #define   SSC_RCMR_CKO_CONTINUOUS (0x1u << 2) /**< \brief (SSC_RCMR) Continuous Receive Clock */
06017 #define   SSC_RCMR_CKO_TRANSFER (0x2u << 2) /**< \brief (SSC_RCMR) Receive Clock only during data transfers */
06018 #define SSC_RCMR_CKI (0x1u << 5) /**< \brief (SSC_RCMR) Receive Clock Inversion */
06019 #define SSC_RCMR_CKG_Pos 6
06020 #define SSC_RCMR_CKG_Msk (0x3u << SSC_RCMR_CKG_Pos) /**< \brief (SSC_RCMR) Receive Clock Gating Selection */
06021 #define   SSC_RCMR_CKG_NONE (0x0u << 6) /**< \brief (SSC_RCMR) None */
06022 #define   SSC_RCMR_CKG_CONTINUOUS (0x1u << 6) /**< \brief (SSC_RCMR) Continuous Receive Clock */
06023 #define   SSC_RCMR_CKG_TRANSFER (0x2u << 6) /**< \brief (SSC_RCMR) Receive Clock only during data transfers */
06024 #define SSC_RCMR_START_Pos 8
06025 #define SSC_RCMR_START_Msk (0xfu << SSC_RCMR_START_Pos) /**< \brief (SSC_RCMR) Receive Start Selection */
06026 #define   SSC_RCMR_START_CONTINUOUS (0x0u << 8) /**< \brief (SSC_RCMR) Continuous, as soon as the receiver is enabled, and immediately after the end of transfer of the previous data. */
06027 #define   SSC_RCMR_START_TRANSMIT (0x1u << 8) /**< \brief (SSC_RCMR) Transmit start */
06028 #define   SSC_RCMR_START_RF_LOW (0x2u << 8) /**< \brief (SSC_RCMR) Detection of a low level on RF signal */
06029 #define   SSC_RCMR_START_RF_HIGH (0x3u << 8) /**< \brief (SSC_RCMR) Detection of a high level on RF signal */
06030 #define   SSC_RCMR_START_RF_FALLING (0x4u << 8) /**< \brief (SSC_RCMR) Detection of a falling edge on RF signal */
06031 #define   SSC_RCMR_START_RF_RISING (0x5u << 8) /**< \brief (SSC_RCMR) Detection of a rising edge on RF signal */
06032 #define   SSC_RCMR_START_RF_LEVEL (0x6u << 8) /**< \brief (SSC_RCMR) Detection of any level change on RF signal */
06033 #define   SSC_RCMR_START_RF_EDGE (0x7u << 8) /**< \brief (SSC_RCMR) Detection of any edge on RF signal */
06034 #define   SSC_RCMR_START_CMP_0 (0x8u << 8) /**< \brief (SSC_RCMR) Compare 0 */
06035 #define SSC_RCMR_STOP (0x1u << 12) /**< \brief (SSC_RCMR) Receive Stop Selection */
06036 #define SSC_RCMR_STTDLY_Pos 16
06037 #define SSC_RCMR_STTDLY_Msk (0xffu << SSC_RCMR_STTDLY_Pos) /**< \brief (SSC_RCMR) Receive Start Delay */
06038 #define SSC_RCMR_STTDLY(value) ((SSC_RCMR_STTDLY_Msk & ((value) << SSC_RCMR_STTDLY_Pos)))
06039 #define SSC_RCMR_PERIOD_Pos 24
06040 #define SSC_RCMR_PERIOD_Msk (0xffu << SSC_RCMR_PERIOD_Pos) /**< \brief (SSC_RCMR) Receive Period Divider Selection */
06041 #define SSC_RCMR_PERIOD(value) ((SSC_RCMR_PERIOD_Msk & ((value) << SSC_RCMR_PERIOD_Pos)))
06042 /* -------- SSC_RFMR : (SSC Offset: 0x14) Receive Frame Mode Register -------- */
06043 #define SSC_RFMR_DATLEN_Pos 0
06044 #define SSC_RFMR_DATLEN_Msk (0x1fu << SSC_RFMR_DATLEN_Pos) /**< \brief (SSC_RFMR) Data Length */
06045 #define SSC_RFMR_DATLEN(value) ((SSC_RFMR_DATLEN_Msk & ((value) << SSC_RFMR_DATLEN_Pos)))
06046 #define SSC_RFMR_LOOP (0x1u << 5) /**< \brief (SSC_RFMR) Loop Mode */
06047 #define SSC_RFMR_MSBF (0x1u << 7) /**< \brief (SSC_RFMR) Most Significant Bit First */
06048 #define SSC_RFMR_DATNB_Pos 8
06049 #define SSC_RFMR_DATNB_Msk (0xfu << SSC_RFMR_DATNB_Pos) /**< \brief (SSC_RFMR) Data Number per Frame */
06050 #define SSC_RFMR_DATNB(value) ((SSC_RFMR_DATNB_Msk & ((value) << SSC_RFMR_DATNB_Pos)))
06051 #define SSC_RFMR_FSLEN_Pos 16
06052 #define SSC_RFMR_FSLEN_Msk (0xfu << SSC_RFMR_FSLEN_Pos) /**< \brief (SSC_RFMR) Receive Frame Sync Length */
06053 #define SSC_RFMR_FSLEN(value) ((SSC_RFMR_FSLEN_Msk & ((value) << SSC_RFMR_FSLEN_Pos)))
06054 #define SSC_RFMR_FSOS_Pos 20
06055 #define SSC_RFMR_FSOS_Msk (0x7u << SSC_RFMR_FSOS_Pos) /**< \brief (SSC_RFMR) Receive Frame Sync Output Selection */
06056 #define   SSC_RFMR_FSOS_NONE (0x0u << 20) /**< \brief (SSC_RFMR) None */
06057 #define   SSC_RFMR_FSOS_NEGATIVE (0x1u << 20) /**< \brief (SSC_RFMR) Negative Pulse */
06058 #define   SSC_RFMR_FSOS_POSITIVE (0x2u << 20) /**< \brief (SSC_RFMR) Positive Pulse */
06059 #define   SSC_RFMR_FSOS_LOW (0x3u << 20) /**< \brief (SSC_RFMR) Driven Low during data transfer */
06060 #define   SSC_RFMR_FSOS_HIGH (0x4u << 20) /**< \brief (SSC_RFMR) Driven High during data transfer */
06061 #define   SSC_RFMR_FSOS_TOGGLING (0x5u << 20) /**< \brief (SSC_RFMR) Toggling at each start of data transfer */
06062 #define SSC_RFMR_FSEDGE (0x1u << 24) /**< \brief (SSC_RFMR) Frame Sync Edge Detection */
06063 #define   SSC_RFMR_FSEDGE_POSITIVE (0x0u << 24) /**< \brief (SSC_RFMR) Positive Edge Detection */
06064 #define   SSC_RFMR_FSEDGE_NEGATIVE (0x1u << 24) /**< \brief (SSC_RFMR) Negative Edge Detection */
06065 #define SSC_RFMR_FSLEN_EXT_Pos 28
06066 #define SSC_RFMR_FSLEN_EXT_Msk (0xfu << SSC_RFMR_FSLEN_EXT_Pos) /**< \brief (SSC_RFMR) FSLEN Field Extension */
06067 #define SSC_RFMR_FSLEN_EXT(value) ((SSC_RFMR_FSLEN_EXT_Msk & ((value) << SSC_RFMR_FSLEN_EXT_Pos)))
06068 /* -------- SSC_TCMR : (SSC Offset: 0x18) Transmit Clock Mode Register -------- */
06069 #define SSC_TCMR_CKS_Pos 0
06070 #define SSC_TCMR_CKS_Msk (0x3u << SSC_TCMR_CKS_Pos) /**< \brief (SSC_TCMR) Transmit Clock Selection */
06071 #define   SSC_TCMR_CKS_MCK (0x0u << 0) /**< \brief (SSC_TCMR) Divided Clock */
06072 #define   SSC_TCMR_CKS_TK (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (SSC_TCMR) TK Clock signal */
06073 #define   SSC_TCMR_CKS_RK (0x2u << 0) /**< \brief (SSC_TCMR) RK pin */
06074 #define SSC_TCMR_CKO_Pos 2
06075 #define SSC_TCMR_CKO_Msk (0x7u << SSC_TCMR_CKO_Pos) /**< \brief (SSC_TCMR) Transmit Clock Output Mode Selection */
06076 #define   SSC_TCMR_CKO_NONE (0x0u << 2) /**< \brief (SSC_TCMR) None */
06077 #define   SSC_TCMR_CKO_CONTINUOUS (0x1u << 2) /**< \brief (SSC_TCMR) Continuous Receive Clock */
06078 #define   SSC_TCMR_CKO_TRANSFER (0x2u << 2) /**< \brief (SSC_TCMR) Transmit Clock only during data transfers */
06079 #define SSC_TCMR_CKI (0x1u << 5) /**< \brief (SSC_TCMR) Transmit Clock Inversion */
06080 #define SSC_TCMR_CKG_Pos 6
06081 #define SSC_TCMR_CKG_Msk (0x3u << SSC_TCMR_CKG_Pos) /**< \brief (SSC_TCMR) Transmit Clock Gating Selection */
06082 #define   SSC_TCMR_CKG_NONE (0x0u << 6) /**< \brief (SSC_TCMR) None */
06083 #define   SSC_TCMR_CKG_CONTINUOUS (0x1u << 6) /**< \brief (SSC_TCMR) Transmit Clock enabled only if TF Low */
06084 #define   SSC_TCMR_CKG_TRANSFER (0x2u << 6) /**< \brief (SSC_TCMR) Transmit Clock enabled only if TF High */
06085 #define SSC_TCMR_START_Pos 8
06086 #define SSC_TCMR_START_Msk (0xfu << SSC_TCMR_START_Pos) /**< \brief (SSC_TCMR) Transmit Start Selection */
06087 #define   SSC_TCMR_START_CONTINUOUS (0x0u << 8) /**< \brief (SSC_TCMR) Continuous, as soon as a word is written in the SSC_THR Register (if Transmit is enabled), and immediately after the end of transfer of the previous data. */
06088 #define   SSC_TCMR_START_RECEIVE (0x1u << 8) /**< \brief (SSC_TCMR) Receive start */
06089 #define   SSC_TCMR_START_RF_LOW (0x2u << 8) /**< \brief (SSC_TCMR) Detection of a low level on TF signal */
06090 #define   SSC_TCMR_START_RF_HIGH (0x3u << 8) /**< \brief (SSC_TCMR) Detection of a high level on TF signal */
06091 #define   SSC_TCMR_START_RF_FALLING (0x4u << 8) /**< \brief (SSC_TCMR) Detection of a falling edge on TF signal */
06092 #define   SSC_TCMR_START_RF_RISING (0x5u << 8) /**< \brief (SSC_TCMR) Detection of a rising edge on TF signal */
06093 #define   SSC_TCMR_START_RF_LEVEL (0x6u << 8) /**< \brief (SSC_TCMR) Detection of any level change on TF signal */
06094 #define   SSC_TCMR_START_RF_EDGE (0x7u << 8) /**< \brief (SSC_TCMR) Detection of any edge on TF signal */
06095 #define   SSC_TCMR_START_CMP_0 (0x8u << 8) /**< \brief (SSC_TCMR) Compare 0 */
06096 #define SSC_TCMR_STTDLY_Pos 16
06097 #define SSC_TCMR_STTDLY_Msk (0xffu << SSC_TCMR_STTDLY_Pos) /**< \brief (SSC_TCMR) Transmit Start Delay */
06098 #define SSC_TCMR_STTDLY(value) ((SSC_TCMR_STTDLY_Msk & ((value) << SSC_TCMR_STTDLY_Pos)))
06099 #define SSC_TCMR_PERIOD_Pos 24
06100 #define SSC_TCMR_PERIOD_Msk (0xffu << SSC_TCMR_PERIOD_Pos) /**< \brief (SSC_TCMR) Transmit Period Divider Selection */
06101 #define SSC_TCMR_PERIOD(value) ((SSC_TCMR_PERIOD_Msk & ((value) << SSC_TCMR_PERIOD_Pos)))
06102 /* -------- SSC_TFMR : (SSC Offset: 0x1C) Transmit Frame Mode Register -------- */
06103 #define SSC_TFMR_DATLEN_Pos 0
06104 #define SSC_TFMR_DATLEN_Msk (0x1fu << SSC_TFMR_DATLEN_Pos) /**< \brief (SSC_TFMR) Data Length */
06105 #define SSC_TFMR_DATLEN(value) ((SSC_TFMR_DATLEN_Msk & ((value) << SSC_TFMR_DATLEN_Pos)))
06106 #define SSC_TFMR_DATDEF (0x1u << 5) /**< \brief (SSC_TFMR) Data Default Value */
06107 #define SSC_TFMR_MSBF (0x1u << 7) /**< \brief (SSC_TFMR) Most Significant Bit First */
06108 #define SSC_TFMR_DATNB_Pos 8
06109 #define SSC_TFMR_DATNB_Msk (0xfu << SSC_TFMR_DATNB_Pos) /**< \brief (SSC_TFMR) Data Number per frame */
06110 #define SSC_TFMR_DATNB(value) ((SSC_TFMR_DATNB_Msk & ((value) << SSC_TFMR_DATNB_Pos)))
06111 #define SSC_TFMR_FSLEN_Pos 16
06112 #define SSC_TFMR_FSLEN_Msk (0xfu << SSC_TFMR_FSLEN_Pos) /**< \brief (SSC_TFMR) Transmit Frame Sync Length */
06113 #define SSC_TFMR_FSLEN(value) ((SSC_TFMR_FSLEN_Msk & ((value) << SSC_TFMR_FSLEN_Pos)))
06114 #define SSC_TFMR_FSOS_Pos 20
06115 #define SSC_TFMR_FSOS_Msk (0x7u << SSC_TFMR_FSOS_Pos) /**< \brief (SSC_TFMR) Transmit Frame Sync Output Selection */
06116 #define   SSC_TFMR_FSOS_NONE (0x0u << 20) /**< \brief (SSC_TFMR) None */
06117 #define   SSC_TFMR_FSOS_NEGATIVE (0x1u << 20) /**< \brief (SSC_TFMR) Negative Pulse */
06118 #define   SSC_TFMR_FSOS_POSITIVE (0x2u << 20) /**< \brief (SSC_TFMR) Positive Pulse */
06119 #define   SSC_TFMR_FSOS_LOW (0x3u << 20) /**< \brief (SSC_TFMR) Driven Low during data transfer */
06120 #define   SSC_TFMR_FSOS_HIGH (0x4u << 20) /**< \brief (SSC_TFMR) Driven High during data transfer */
06121 #define   SSC_TFMR_FSOS_TOGGLING (0x5u << 20) /**< \brief (SSC_TFMR) Toggling at each start of data transfer */
06122 #define SSC_TFMR_FSDEN (0x1u << 23) /**< \brief (SSC_TFMR) Frame Sync Data Enable */
06123 #define SSC_TFMR_FSEDGE (0x1u << 24) /**< \brief (SSC_TFMR) Frame Sync Edge Detection */
06124 #define   SSC_TFMR_FSEDGE_POSITIVE (0x0u << 24) /**< \brief (SSC_TFMR) Positive Edge Detection */
06125 #define   SSC_TFMR_FSEDGE_NEGATIVE (0x1u << 24) /**< \brief (SSC_TFMR) Negative Edge Detection */
06126 #define SSC_TFMR_FSLEN_EXT_Pos 28
06127 #define SSC_TFMR_FSLEN_EXT_Msk (0xfu << SSC_TFMR_FSLEN_EXT_Pos) /**< \brief (SSC_TFMR) FSLEN Field Extension */
06128 #define SSC_TFMR_FSLEN_EXT(value) ((SSC_TFMR_FSLEN_EXT_Msk & ((value) << SSC_TFMR_FSLEN_EXT_Pos)))
06129 /* -------- SSC_RHR : (SSC Offset: 0x20) Receive Holding Register -------- */
06130 #define SSC_RHR_RDAT_Pos 0
06131 #define SSC_RHR_RDAT_Msk (0xffffffffu << SSC_RHR_RDAT_Pos) /**< \brief (SSC_RHR) Receive Data */
06132 /* -------- SSC_THR : (SSC Offset: 0x24) Transmit Holding Register -------- */
06133 #define SSC_THR_TDAT_Pos 0
06134 #define SSC_THR_TDAT_Msk (0xffffffffu << SSC_THR_TDAT_Pos) /**< \brief (SSC_THR) Transmit Data */
06135 #define SSC_THR_TDAT(value) ((SSC_THR_TDAT_Msk & ((value) << SSC_THR_TDAT_Pos)))
06136 /* -------- SSC_RSHR : (SSC Offset: 0x30) Receive Sync. Holding Register -------- */
06137 #define SSC_RSHR_RSDAT_Pos 0
06138 #define SSC_RSHR_RSDAT_Msk (0xffffu << SSC_RSHR_RSDAT_Pos) /**< \brief (SSC_RSHR) Receive Synchronization Data */
06139 /* -------- SSC_TSHR : (SSC Offset: 0x34) Transmit Sync. Holding Register -------- */
06140 #define SSC_TSHR_TSDAT_Pos 0
06141 #define SSC_TSHR_TSDAT_Msk (0xffffu << SSC_TSHR_TSDAT_Pos) /**< \brief (SSC_TSHR) Transmit Synchronization Data */
06142 #define SSC_TSHR_TSDAT(value) ((SSC_TSHR_TSDAT_Msk & ((value) << SSC_TSHR_TSDAT_Pos)))
06143 /* -------- SSC_RC0R : (SSC Offset: 0x38) Receive Compare 0 Register -------- */
06144 #define SSC_RC0R_CP0_Pos 0
06145 #define SSC_RC0R_CP0_Msk (0xffffu << SSC_RC0R_CP0_Pos) /**< \brief (SSC_RC0R) Receive Compare Data 0 */
06146 #define SSC_RC0R_CP0(value) ((SSC_RC0R_CP0_Msk & ((value) << SSC_RC0R_CP0_Pos)))
06147 /* -------- SSC_RC1R : (SSC Offset: 0x3C) Receive Compare 1 Register -------- */
06148 #define SSC_RC1R_CP1_Pos 0
06149 #define SSC_RC1R_CP1_Msk (0xffffu << SSC_RC1R_CP1_Pos) /**< \brief (SSC_RC1R) Receive Compare Data 1 */
06150 #define SSC_RC1R_CP1(value) ((SSC_RC1R_CP1_Msk & ((value) << SSC_RC1R_CP1_Pos)))
06151 /* -------- SSC_SR : (SSC Offset: 0x40) Status Register -------- */
06152 #define SSC_SR_TXRDY (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (SSC_SR) Transmit Ready */
06153 #define SSC_SR_TXEMPTY (0x1u << 1) /**< \brief (SSC_SR) Transmit Empty */
06154 #define SSC_SR_RXRDY (0x1u << 4) /**< \brief (SSC_SR) Receive Ready */
06155 #define SSC_SR_OVRUN (0x1u << 5) /**< \brief (SSC_SR) Receive Overrun */
06156 #define SSC_SR_CP0 (0x1u << 8) /**< \brief (SSC_SR) Compare 0 */
06157 #define SSC_SR_CP1 (0x1u << 9) /**< \brief (SSC_SR) Compare 1 */
06158 #define SSC_SR_TXSYN (0x1u << 10) /**< \brief (SSC_SR) Transmit Sync */
06159 #define SSC_SR_RXSYN (0x1u << 11) /**< \brief (SSC_SR) Receive Sync */
06160 #define SSC_SR_TXEN (0x1u << 16) /**< \brief (SSC_SR) Transmit Enable */
06161 #define SSC_SR_RXEN (0x1u << 17) /**< \brief (SSC_SR) Receive Enable */
06162 /* -------- SSC_IER : (SSC Offset: 0x44) Interrupt Enable Register -------- */
06163 #define SSC_IER_TXRDY (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (SSC_IER) Transmit Ready Interrupt Enable */
06164 #define SSC_IER_TXEMPTY (0x1u << 1) /**< \brief (SSC_IER) Transmit Empty Interrupt Enable */
06165 #define SSC_IER_RXRDY (0x1u << 4) /**< \brief (SSC_IER) Receive Ready Interrupt Enable */
06166 #define SSC_IER_OVRUN (0x1u << 5) /**< \brief (SSC_IER) Receive Overrun Interrupt Enable */
06167 #define SSC_IER_CP0 (0x1u << 8) /**< \brief (SSC_IER) Compare 0 Interrupt Enable */
06168 #define SSC_IER_CP1 (0x1u << 9) /**< \brief (SSC_IER) Compare 1 Interrupt Enable */
06169 #define SSC_IER_TXSYN (0x1u << 10) /**< \brief (SSC_IER) Tx Sync Interrupt Enable */
06170 #define SSC_IER_RXSYN (0x1u << 11) /**< \brief (SSC_IER) Rx Sync Interrupt Enable */
06171 /* -------- SSC_IDR : (SSC Offset: 0x48) Interrupt Disable Register -------- */
06172 #define SSC_IDR_TXRDY (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (SSC_IDR) Transmit Ready Interrupt Disable */
06173 #define SSC_IDR_TXEMPTY (0x1u << 1) /**< \brief (SSC_IDR) Transmit Empty Interrupt Disable */
06174 #define SSC_IDR_RXRDY (0x1u << 4) /**< \brief (SSC_IDR) Receive Ready Interrupt Disable */
06175 #define SSC_IDR_OVRUN (0x1u << 5) /**< \brief (SSC_IDR) Receive Overrun Interrupt Disable */
06176 #define SSC_IDR_CP0 (0x1u << 8) /**< \brief (SSC_IDR) Compare 0 Interrupt Disable */
06177 #define SSC_IDR_CP1 (0x1u << 9) /**< \brief (SSC_IDR) Compare 1 Interrupt Disable */
06178 #define SSC_IDR_TXSYN (0x1u << 10) /**< \brief (SSC_IDR) Tx Sync Interrupt Enable */
06179 #define SSC_IDR_RXSYN (0x1u << 11) /**< \brief (SSC_IDR) Rx Sync Interrupt Enable */
06180 /* -------- SSC_IMR : (SSC Offset: 0x4C) Interrupt Mask Register -------- */
06181 #define SSC_IMR_TXRDY (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (SSC_IMR) Transmit Ready Interrupt Mask */
06182 #define SSC_IMR_TXEMPTY (0x1u << 1) /**< \brief (SSC_IMR) Transmit Empty Interrupt Mask */
06183 #define SSC_IMR_RXRDY (0x1u << 4) /**< \brief (SSC_IMR) Receive Ready Interrupt Mask */
06184 #define SSC_IMR_OVRUN (0x1u << 5) /**< \brief (SSC_IMR) Receive Overrun Interrupt Mask */
06185 #define SSC_IMR_CP0 (0x1u << 8) /**< \brief (SSC_IMR) Compare 0 Interrupt Mask */
06186 #define SSC_IMR_CP1 (0x1u << 9) /**< \brief (SSC_IMR) Compare 1 Interrupt Mask */
06187 #define SSC_IMR_TXSYN (0x1u << 10) /**< \brief (SSC_IMR) Tx Sync Interrupt Mask */
06188 #define SSC_IMR_RXSYN (0x1u << 11) /**< \brief (SSC_IMR) Rx Sync Interrupt Mask */
06189 /* -------- SSC_WPMR : (SSC Offset: 0xE4) Write Protect Mode Register -------- */
06190 #define SSC_WPMR_WPEN (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (SSC_WPMR) Write Protect Enable */
06191 #define SSC_WPMR_WPKEY_Pos 8
06192 #define SSC_WPMR_WPKEY_Msk (0xffffffu << SSC_WPMR_WPKEY_Pos) /**< \brief (SSC_WPMR) Write Protect KEY */
06193 #define SSC_WPMR_WPKEY(value) ((SSC_WPMR_WPKEY_Msk & ((value) << SSC_WPMR_WPKEY_Pos)))
06194 /* -------- SSC_WPSR : (SSC Offset: 0xE8) Write Protect Status Register -------- */
06195 #define SSC_WPSR_WPVS (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (SSC_WPSR) Write Protect Violation Status */
06196 #define SSC_WPSR_WPVSRC_Pos 8
06197 #define SSC_WPSR_WPVSRC_Msk (0xffffu << SSC_WPSR_WPVSRC_Pos) /**< \brief (SSC_WPSR) Write Protect Violation Source */
06198 
06199 /*@}*/
06200 
06201 /* ============================================================================= */
06202 /**  SOFTWARE API DEFINITION FOR Supply Controller */
06203 /* ============================================================================= */
06204 /** \addtogroup SAM3XA_SUPC Supply Controller */
06205 /*@{*/
06206 
06207 #ifndef __ASSEMBLY__
06208 /** \brief Supc hardware registers */
06209 typedef struct {
06210   WoReg SUPC_CR;   /**< \brief (Supc Offset: 0x00) Supply Controller Control Register */
06211   RwReg SUPC_SMMR; /**< \brief (Supc Offset: 0x04) Supply Controller Supply Monitor Mode Register */
06212   RwReg SUPC_MR;   /**< \brief (Supc Offset: 0x08) Supply Controller Mode Register */
06213   RwReg SUPC_WUMR; /**< \brief (Supc Offset: 0x0C) Supply Controller Wake Up Mode Register */
06214   RwReg SUPC_WUIR; /**< \brief (Supc Offset: 0x10) Supply Controller Wake Up Inputs Register */
06215   RoReg SUPC_SR;   /**< \brief (Supc Offset: 0x14) Supply Controller Status Register */
06216 } Supc;
06217 #endif /* __ASSEMBLY__ */
06218 /* -------- SUPC_CR : (SUPC Offset: 0x00) Supply Controller Control Register -------- */
06219 #define SUPC_CR_VROFF (0x1u << 2) /**< \brief (SUPC_CR) Voltage Regulator Off */
06220 #define   SUPC_CR_VROFF_NO_EFFECT (0x0u << 2) /**< \brief (SUPC_CR) no effect. */
06221 #define   SUPC_CR_VROFF_STOP_VREG (0x1u << 2) /**< \brief (SUPC_CR) if KEY is correct, asserts vddcore_nreset and stops the voltage regulator. */
06222 #define SUPC_CR_XTALSEL (0x1u << 3) /**< \brief (SUPC_CR) Crystal Oscillator Select */
06223 #define   SUPC_CR_XTALSEL_NO_EFFECT (0x0u << 3) /**< \brief (SUPC_CR) no effect. */
06224 #define   SUPC_CR_XTALSEL_CRYSTAL_SEL (0x1u << 3) /**< \brief (SUPC_CR) if KEY is correct, switches the slow clock on the crystal oscillator output. */
06225 #define SUPC_CR_KEY_Pos 24
06226 #define SUPC_CR_KEY_Msk (0xffu << SUPC_CR_KEY_Pos) /**< \brief (SUPC_CR) Password */
06227 #define SUPC_CR_KEY(value) ((SUPC_CR_KEY_Msk & ((value) << SUPC_CR_KEY_Pos)))
06228 /* -------- SUPC_SMMR : (SUPC Offset: 0x04) Supply Controller Supply Monitor Mode Register -------- */
06229 #define SUPC_SMMR_SMTH_Pos 0
06230 #define SUPC_SMMR_SMTH_Msk (0xfu << SUPC_SMMR_SMTH_Pos) /**< \brief (SUPC_SMMR) Supply Monitor Threshold */
06231 #define   SUPC_SMMR_SMTH_1_9V (0x0u << 0) /**< \brief (SUPC_SMMR) 1.9 V */
06232 #define   SUPC_SMMR_SMTH_2_0V (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (SUPC_SMMR) 2.0 V */
06233 #define   SUPC_SMMR_SMTH_2_1V (0x2u << 0) /**< \brief (SUPC_SMMR) 2.1 V */
06234 #define   SUPC_SMMR_SMTH_2_2V (0x3u << 0) /**< \brief (SUPC_SMMR) 2.2 V */
06235 #define   SUPC_SMMR_SMTH_2_3V (0x4u << 0) /**< \brief (SUPC_SMMR) 2.3 V */
06236 #define   SUPC_SMMR_SMTH_2_4V (0x5u << 0) /**< \brief (SUPC_SMMR) 2.4 V */
06237 #define   SUPC_SMMR_SMTH_2_5V (0x6u << 0) /**< \brief (SUPC_SMMR) 2.5 V */
06238 #define   SUPC_SMMR_SMTH_2_6V (0x7u << 0) /**< \brief (SUPC_SMMR) 2.6 V */
06239 #define   SUPC_SMMR_SMTH_2_7V (0x8u << 0) /**< \brief (SUPC_SMMR) 2.7 V */
06240 #define   SUPC_SMMR_SMTH_2_8V (0x9u << 0) /**< \brief (SUPC_SMMR) 2.8 V */
06241 #define   SUPC_SMMR_SMTH_2_9V (0xAu << 0) /**< \brief (SUPC_SMMR) 2.9 V */
06242 #define   SUPC_SMMR_SMTH_3_0V (0xBu << 0) /**< \brief (SUPC_SMMR) 3.0 V */
06243 #define   SUPC_SMMR_SMTH_3_1V (0xCu << 0) /**< \brief (SUPC_SMMR) 3.1 V */
06244 #define   SUPC_SMMR_SMTH_3_2V (0xDu << 0) /**< \brief (SUPC_SMMR) 3.2 V */
06245 #define   SUPC_SMMR_SMTH_3_3V (0xEu << 0) /**< \brief (SUPC_SMMR) 3.3 V */
06246 #define   SUPC_SMMR_SMTH_3_4V (0xFu << 0) /**< \brief (SUPC_SMMR) 3.4 V */
06247 #define SUPC_SMMR_SMSMPL_Pos 8
06248 #define SUPC_SMMR_SMSMPL_Msk (0x7u << SUPC_SMMR_SMSMPL_Pos) /**< \brief (SUPC_SMMR) Supply Monitor Sampling Period */
06249 #define   SUPC_SMMR_SMSMPL_SMD (0x0u << 8) /**< \brief (SUPC_SMMR) Supply Monitor disabled */
06250 #define   SUPC_SMMR_SMSMPL_CSM (0x1u << 8) /**< \brief (SUPC_SMMR) Continuous Supply Monitor */
06251 #define   SUPC_SMMR_SMSMPL_32SLCK (0x2u << 8) /**< \brief (SUPC_SMMR) Supply Monitor enabled one SLCK period every 32 SLCK periods */
06252 #define   SUPC_SMMR_SMSMPL_256SLCK (0x3u << 8) /**< \brief (SUPC_SMMR) Supply Monitor enabled one SLCK period every 256 SLCK periods */
06253 #define   SUPC_SMMR_SMSMPL_2048SLCK (0x4u << 8) /**< \brief (SUPC_SMMR) Supply Monitor enabled one SLCK period every 2,048 SLCK periods */
06254 #define SUPC_SMMR_SMRSTEN (0x1u << 12) /**< \brief (SUPC_SMMR) Supply Monitor Reset Enable */
06255 #define   SUPC_SMMR_SMRSTEN_NOT_ENABLE (0x0u << 12) /**< \brief (SUPC_SMMR) the core reset signal "vddcore_nreset" is not affected when a supply monitor detection occurs. */
06256 #define   SUPC_SMMR_SMRSTEN_ENABLE (0x1u << 12) /**< \brief (SUPC_SMMR) the core reset signal, vddcore_nreset is asserted when a supply monitor detection occurs. */
06257 #define SUPC_SMMR_SMIEN (0x1u << 13) /**< \brief (SUPC_SMMR) Supply Monitor Interrupt Enable */
06258 #define   SUPC_SMMR_SMIEN_NOT_ENABLE (0x0u << 13) /**< \brief (SUPC_SMMR) the SUPC interrupt signal is not affected when a supply monitor detection occurs. */
06259 #define   SUPC_SMMR_SMIEN_ENABLE (0x1u << 13) /**< \brief (SUPC_SMMR) the SUPC interrupt signal is asserted when a supply monitor detection occurs. */
06260 /* -------- SUPC_MR : (SUPC Offset: 0x08) Supply Controller Mode Register -------- */
06261 #define SUPC_MR_BODRSTEN (0x1u << 12) /**< \brief (SUPC_MR) Brownout Detector Reset Enable */
06262 #define   SUPC_MR_BODRSTEN_NOT_ENABLE (0x0u << 12) /**< \brief (SUPC_MR) the core reset signal "vddcore_nreset" is not affected when a brownout detection occurs. */
06263 #define   SUPC_MR_BODRSTEN_ENABLE (0x1u << 12) /**< \brief (SUPC_MR) the core reset signal, vddcore_nreset is asserted when a brownout detection occurs. */
06264 #define SUPC_MR_BODDIS (0x1u << 13) /**< \brief (SUPC_MR) Brownout Detector Disable */
06265 #define   SUPC_MR_BODDIS_ENABLE (0x0u << 13) /**< \brief (SUPC_MR) the core brownout detector is enabled. */
06266 #define   SUPC_MR_BODDIS_DISABLE (0x1u << 13) /**< \brief (SUPC_MR) the core brownout detector is disabled. */
06267 #define SUPC_MR_VDDIORDYONREG (0x1u << 14) /**< \brief (SUPC_MR)  */
06268 #define SUPC_MR_OSCBYPASS (0x1u << 20) /**< \brief (SUPC_MR) Oscillator Bypass */
06269 #define   SUPC_MR_OSCBYPASS_NO_EFFECT (0x0u << 20) /**< \brief (SUPC_MR) no effect. Clock selection depends on XTALSEL value. */
06270 #define   SUPC_MR_OSCBYPASS_BYPASS (0x1u << 20) /**< \brief (SUPC_MR) the 32-KHz XTAL oscillator is selected and is put in bypass mode. */
06271 #define SUPC_MR_KEY_Pos 24
06272 #define SUPC_MR_KEY_Msk (0xffu << SUPC_MR_KEY_Pos) /**< \brief (SUPC_MR) Password Key */
06273 #define SUPC_MR_KEY(value) ((SUPC_MR_KEY_Msk & ((value) << SUPC_MR_KEY_Pos)))
06274 /* -------- SUPC_WUMR : (SUPC Offset: 0x0C) Supply Controller Wake Up Mode Register -------- */
06275 #define SUPC_WUMR_FWUPEN (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (SUPC_WUMR) Force Wake Up Enable */
06276 #define   SUPC_WUMR_FWUPEN_NOT_ENABLE (0x0u << 0) /**< \brief (SUPC_WUMR) the Force Wake Up pin has no wake up effect. */
06277 #define   SUPC_WUMR_FWUPEN_ENABLE (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (SUPC_WUMR) the Force Wake Up pin low forces the wake up of the core power supply. */
06278 #define SUPC_WUMR_SMEN (0x1u << 1) /**< \brief (SUPC_WUMR) Supply Monitor Wake Up Enable */
06279 #define   SUPC_WUMR_SMEN_NOT_ENABLE (0x0u << 1) /**< \brief (SUPC_WUMR) the supply monitor detection has no wake up effect. */
06280 #define   SUPC_WUMR_SMEN_ENABLE (0x1u << 1) /**< \brief (SUPC_WUMR) the supply monitor detection forces the wake up of the core power supply. */
06281 #define SUPC_WUMR_RTTEN (0x1u << 2) /**< \brief (SUPC_WUMR) Real Time Timer Wake Up Enable */
06282 #define   SUPC_WUMR_RTTEN_NOT_ENABLE (0x0u << 2) /**< \brief (SUPC_WUMR) the RTT alarm signal has no wake up effect. */
06283 #define   SUPC_WUMR_RTTEN_ENABLE (0x1u << 2) /**< \brief (SUPC_WUMR) the RTT alarm signal forces the wake up of the core power supply. */
06284 #define SUPC_WUMR_RTCEN (0x1u << 3) /**< \brief (SUPC_WUMR) Real Time Clock Wake Up Enable */
06285 #define   SUPC_WUMR_RTCEN_NOT_ENABLE (0x0u << 3) /**< \brief (SUPC_WUMR) the RTC alarm signal has no wake up effect. */
06286 #define   SUPC_WUMR_RTCEN_ENABLE (0x1u << 3) /**< \brief (SUPC_WUMR) the RTC alarm signal forces the wake up of the core power supply. */
06287 #define SUPC_WUMR_FWUPDBC_Pos 8
06288 #define SUPC_WUMR_FWUPDBC_Msk (0x7u << SUPC_WUMR_FWUPDBC_Pos) /**< \brief (SUPC_WUMR) Force Wake Up Debouncer Period */
06289 #define   SUPC_WUMR_FWUPDBC_IMMEDIATE (0x0u << 8) /**< \brief (SUPC_WUMR) Immediate, no debouncing, detected active at least on one Slow Clock edge. */
06290 #define   SUPC_WUMR_FWUPDBC_3_SCLK (0x1u << 8) /**< \brief (SUPC_WUMR) FWUP shall be low for at least 3 SLCK periods */
06291 #define   SUPC_WUMR_FWUPDBC_32_SCLK (0x2u << 8) /**< \brief (SUPC_WUMR) FWUP shall be low for at least 32 SLCK periods */
06292 #define   SUPC_WUMR_FWUPDBC_512_SCLK (0x3u << 8) /**< \brief (SUPC_WUMR) FWUP shall be low for at least 512 SLCK periods */
06293 #define   SUPC_WUMR_FWUPDBC_4096_SCLK (0x4u << 8) /**< \brief (SUPC_WUMR) FWUP shall be low for at least 4,096 SLCK periods */
06294 #define   SUPC_WUMR_FWUPDBC_32768_SCLK (0x5u << 8) /**< \brief (SUPC_WUMR) FWUP shall be low for at least 32,768 SLCK periods */
06295 #define SUPC_WUMR_WKUPDBC_Pos 12
06296 #define SUPC_WUMR_WKUPDBC_Msk (0x7u << SUPC_WUMR_WKUPDBC_Pos) /**< \brief (SUPC_WUMR) Wake Up Inputs Debouncer Period */
06297 #define   SUPC_WUMR_WKUPDBC_IMMEDIATE (0x0u << 12) /**< \brief (SUPC_WUMR) Immediate, no debouncing, detected active at least on one Slow Clock edge. */
06298 #define   SUPC_WUMR_WKUPDBC_3_SCLK (0x1u << 12) /**< \brief (SUPC_WUMR) WKUPx shall be in its active state for at least 3 SLCK periods */
06299 #define   SUPC_WUMR_WKUPDBC_32_SCLK (0x2u << 12) /**< \brief (SUPC_WUMR) WKUPx shall be in its active state for at least 32 SLCK periods */
06300 #define   SUPC_WUMR_WKUPDBC_512_SCLK (0x3u << 12) /**< \brief (SUPC_WUMR) WKUPx shall be in its active state for at least 512 SLCK periods */
06301 #define   SUPC_WUMR_WKUPDBC_4096_SCLK (0x4u << 12) /**< \brief (SUPC_WUMR) WKUPx shall be in its active state for at least 4,096 SLCK periods */
06302 #define   SUPC_WUMR_WKUPDBC_32768_SCLK (0x5u << 12) /**< \brief (SUPC_WUMR) WKUPx shall be in its active state for at least 32,768 SLCK periods */
06303 /* -------- SUPC_WUIR : (SUPC Offset: 0x10) Supply Controller Wake Up Inputs Register -------- */
06304 #define SUPC_WUIR_WKUPEN0 (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (SUPC_WUIR) Wake Up Input Enable 0 */
06305 #define   SUPC_WUIR_WKUPEN0_NOT_ENABLE (0x0u << 0) /**< \brief (SUPC_WUIR) the corresponding wake-up input has no wake up effect. */
06306 #define   SUPC_WUIR_WKUPEN0_ENABLE (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (SUPC_WUIR) the corresponding wake-up input forces the wake up of the core power supply. */
06307 #define SUPC_WUIR_WKUPEN1 (0x1u << 1) /**< \brief (SUPC_WUIR) Wake Up Input Enable 1 */
06308 #define   SUPC_WUIR_WKUPEN1_NOT_ENABLE (0x0u << 1) /**< \brief (SUPC_WUIR) the corresponding wake-up input has no wake up effect. */
06309 #define   SUPC_WUIR_WKUPEN1_ENABLE (0x1u << 1) /**< \brief (SUPC_WUIR) the corresponding wake-up input forces the wake up of the core power supply. */
06310 #define SUPC_WUIR_WKUPEN2 (0x1u << 2) /**< \brief (SUPC_WUIR) Wake Up Input Enable 2 */
06311 #define   SUPC_WUIR_WKUPEN2_NOT_ENABLE (0x0u << 2) /**< \brief (SUPC_WUIR) the corresponding wake-up input has no wake up effect. */
06312 #define   SUPC_WUIR_WKUPEN2_ENABLE (0x1u << 2) /**< \brief (SUPC_WUIR) the corresponding wake-up input forces the wake up of the core power supply. */
06313 #define SUPC_WUIR_WKUPEN3 (0x1u << 3) /**< \brief (SUPC_WUIR) Wake Up Input Enable 3 */
06314 #define   SUPC_WUIR_WKUPEN3_NOT_ENABLE (0x0u << 3) /**< \brief (SUPC_WUIR) the corresponding wake-up input has no wake up effect. */
06315 #define   SUPC_WUIR_WKUPEN3_ENABLE (0x1u << 3) /**< \brief (SUPC_WUIR) the corresponding wake-up input forces the wake up of the core power supply. */
06316 #define SUPC_WUIR_WKUPEN4 (0x1u << 4) /**< \brief (SUPC_WUIR) Wake Up Input Enable 4 */
06317 #define   SUPC_WUIR_WKUPEN4_NOT_ENABLE (0x0u << 4) /**< \brief (SUPC_WUIR) the corresponding wake-up input has no wake up effect. */
06318 #define   SUPC_WUIR_WKUPEN4_ENABLE (0x1u << 4) /**< \brief (SUPC_WUIR) the corresponding wake-up input forces the wake up of the core power supply. */
06319 #define SUPC_WUIR_WKUPEN5 (0x1u << 5) /**< \brief (SUPC_WUIR) Wake Up Input Enable 5 */
06320 #define   SUPC_WUIR_WKUPEN5_NOT_ENABLE (0x0u << 5) /**< \brief (SUPC_WUIR) the corresponding wake-up input has no wake up effect. */
06321 #define   SUPC_WUIR_WKUPEN5_ENABLE (0x1u << 5) /**< \brief (SUPC_WUIR) the corresponding wake-up input forces the wake up of the core power supply. */
06322 #define SUPC_WUIR_WKUPEN6 (0x1u << 6) /**< \brief (SUPC_WUIR) Wake Up Input Enable 6 */
06323 #define   SUPC_WUIR_WKUPEN6_NOT_ENABLE (0x0u << 6) /**< \brief (SUPC_WUIR) the corresponding wake-up input has no wake up effect. */
06324 #define   SUPC_WUIR_WKUPEN6_ENABLE (0x1u << 6) /**< \brief (SUPC_WUIR) the corresponding wake-up input forces the wake up of the core power supply. */
06325 #define SUPC_WUIR_WKUPEN7 (0x1u << 7) /**< \brief (SUPC_WUIR) Wake Up Input Enable 7 */
06326 #define   SUPC_WUIR_WKUPEN7_NOT_ENABLE (0x0u << 7) /**< \brief (SUPC_WUIR) the corresponding wake-up input has no wake up effect. */
06327 #define   SUPC_WUIR_WKUPEN7_ENABLE (0x1u << 7) /**< \brief (SUPC_WUIR) the corresponding wake-up input forces the wake up of the core power supply. */
06328 #define SUPC_WUIR_WKUPEN8 (0x1u << 8) /**< \brief (SUPC_WUIR) Wake Up Input Enable 8 */
06329 #define   SUPC_WUIR_WKUPEN8_NOT_ENABLE (0x0u << 8) /**< \brief (SUPC_WUIR) the corresponding wake-up input has no wake up effect. */
06330 #define   SUPC_WUIR_WKUPEN8_ENABLE (0x1u << 8) /**< \brief (SUPC_WUIR) the corresponding wake-up input forces the wake up of the core power supply. */
06331 #define SUPC_WUIR_WKUPEN9 (0x1u << 9) /**< \brief (SUPC_WUIR) Wake Up Input Enable 9 */
06332 #define   SUPC_WUIR_WKUPEN9_NOT_ENABLE (0x0u << 9) /**< \brief (SUPC_WUIR) the corresponding wake-up input has no wake up effect. */
06333 #define   SUPC_WUIR_WKUPEN9_ENABLE (0x1u << 9) /**< \brief (SUPC_WUIR) the corresponding wake-up input forces the wake up of the core power supply. */
06334 #define SUPC_WUIR_WKUPEN10 (0x1u << 10) /**< \brief (SUPC_WUIR) Wake Up Input Enable 10 */
06335 #define   SUPC_WUIR_WKUPEN10_NOT_ENABLE (0x0u << 10) /**< \brief (SUPC_WUIR) the corresponding wake-up input has no wake up effect. */
06336 #define   SUPC_WUIR_WKUPEN10_ENABLE (0x1u << 10) /**< \brief (SUPC_WUIR) the corresponding wake-up input forces the wake up of the core power supply. */
06337 #define SUPC_WUIR_WKUPEN11 (0x1u << 11) /**< \brief (SUPC_WUIR) Wake Up Input Enable 11 */
06338 #define   SUPC_WUIR_WKUPEN11_NOT_ENABLE (0x0u << 11) /**< \brief (SUPC_WUIR) the corresponding wake-up input has no wake up effect. */
06339 #define   SUPC_WUIR_WKUPEN11_ENABLE (0x1u << 11) /**< \brief (SUPC_WUIR) the corresponding wake-up input forces the wake up of the core power supply. */
06340 #define SUPC_WUIR_WKUPEN12 (0x1u << 12) /**< \brief (SUPC_WUIR) Wake Up Input Enable 12 */
06341 #define   SUPC_WUIR_WKUPEN12_NOT_ENABLE (0x0u << 12) /**< \brief (SUPC_WUIR) the corresponding wake-up input has no wake up effect. */
06342 #define   SUPC_WUIR_WKUPEN12_ENABLE (0x1u << 12) /**< \brief (SUPC_WUIR) the corresponding wake-up input forces the wake up of the core power supply. */
06343 #define SUPC_WUIR_WKUPEN13 (0x1u << 13) /**< \brief (SUPC_WUIR) Wake Up Input Enable 13 */
06344 #define   SUPC_WUIR_WKUPEN13_NOT_ENABLE (0x0u << 13) /**< \brief (SUPC_WUIR) the corresponding wake-up input has no wake up effect. */
06345 #define   SUPC_WUIR_WKUPEN13_ENABLE (0x1u << 13) /**< \brief (SUPC_WUIR) the corresponding wake-up input forces the wake up of the core power supply. */
06346 #define SUPC_WUIR_WKUPEN14 (0x1u << 14) /**< \brief (SUPC_WUIR) Wake Up Input Enable 14 */
06347 #define   SUPC_WUIR_WKUPEN14_NOT_ENABLE (0x0u << 14) /**< \brief (SUPC_WUIR) the corresponding wake-up input has no wake up effect. */
06348 #define   SUPC_WUIR_WKUPEN14_ENABLE (0x1u << 14) /**< \brief (SUPC_WUIR) the corresponding wake-up input forces the wake up of the core power supply. */
06349 #define SUPC_WUIR_WKUPEN15 (0x1u << 15) /**< \brief (SUPC_WUIR) Wake Up Input Enable 15 */
06350 #define   SUPC_WUIR_WKUPEN15_NOT_ENABLE (0x0u << 15) /**< \brief (SUPC_WUIR) the corresponding wake-up input has no wake up effect. */
06351 #define   SUPC_WUIR_WKUPEN15_ENABLE (0x1u << 15) /**< \brief (SUPC_WUIR) the corresponding wake-up input forces the wake up of the core power supply. */
06352 #define SUPC_WUIR_WKUPT0 (0x1u << 16) /**< \brief (SUPC_WUIR) Wake Up Input Transition 0 */
06353 #define   SUPC_WUIR_WKUPT0_HIGH_TO_LOW (0x0u << 16) /**< \brief (SUPC_WUIR) a high to low level transition on the corresponding wake-up input forces the wake up of the core power supply. */
06354 #define   SUPC_WUIR_WKUPT0_LOW_TO_HIGH (0x1u << 16) /**< \brief (SUPC_WUIR) a low to high level transition on the corresponding wake-up input forces the wake up of the core power supply. */
06355 #define SUPC_WUIR_WKUPT1 (0x1u << 17) /**< \brief (SUPC_WUIR) Wake Up Input Transition 1 */
06356 #define   SUPC_WUIR_WKUPT1_HIGH_TO_LOW (0x0u << 17) /**< \brief (SUPC_WUIR) a high to low level transition on the corresponding wake-up input forces the wake up of the core power supply. */
06357 #define   SUPC_WUIR_WKUPT1_LOW_TO_HIGH (0x1u << 17) /**< \brief (SUPC_WUIR) a low to high level transition on the corresponding wake-up input forces the wake up of the core power supply. */
06358 #define SUPC_WUIR_WKUPT2 (0x1u << 18) /**< \brief (SUPC_WUIR) Wake Up Input Transition 2 */
06359 #define   SUPC_WUIR_WKUPT2_HIGH_TO_LOW (0x0u << 18) /**< \brief (SUPC_WUIR) a high to low level transition on the corresponding wake-up input forces the wake up of the core power supply. */
06360 #define   SUPC_WUIR_WKUPT2_LOW_TO_HIGH (0x1u << 18) /**< \brief (SUPC_WUIR) a low to high level transition on the corresponding wake-up input forces the wake up of the core power supply. */
06361 #define SUPC_WUIR_WKUPT3 (0x1u << 19) /**< \brief (SUPC_WUIR) Wake Up Input Transition 3 */
06362 #define   SUPC_WUIR_WKUPT3_HIGH_TO_LOW (0x0u << 19) /**< \brief (SUPC_WUIR) a high to low level transition on the corresponding wake-up input forces the wake up of the core power supply. */
06363 #define   SUPC_WUIR_WKUPT3_LOW_TO_HIGH (0x1u << 19) /**< \brief (SUPC_WUIR) a low to high level transition on the corresponding wake-up input forces the wake up of the core power supply. */
06364 #define SUPC_WUIR_WKUPT4 (0x1u << 20) /**< \brief (SUPC_WUIR) Wake Up Input Transition 4 */
06365 #define   SUPC_WUIR_WKUPT4_HIGH_TO_LOW (0x0u << 20) /**< \brief (SUPC_WUIR) a high to low level transition on the corresponding wake-up input forces the wake up of the core power supply. */
06366 #define   SUPC_WUIR_WKUPT4_LOW_TO_HIGH (0x1u << 20) /**< \brief (SUPC_WUIR) a low to high level transition on the corresponding wake-up input forces the wake up of the core power supply. */
06367 #define SUPC_WUIR_WKUPT5 (0x1u << 21) /**< \brief (SUPC_WUIR) Wake Up Input Transition 5 */
06368 #define   SUPC_WUIR_WKUPT5_HIGH_TO_LOW (0x0u << 21) /**< \brief (SUPC_WUIR) a high to low level transition on the corresponding wake-up input forces the wake up of the core power supply. */
06369 #define   SUPC_WUIR_WKUPT5_LOW_TO_HIGH (0x1u << 21) /**< \brief (SUPC_WUIR) a low to high level transition on the corresponding wake-up input forces the wake up of the core power supply. */
06370 #define SUPC_WUIR_WKUPT6 (0x1u << 22) /**< \brief (SUPC_WUIR) Wake Up Input Transition 6 */
06371 #define   SUPC_WUIR_WKUPT6_HIGH_TO_LOW (0x0u << 22) /**< \brief (SUPC_WUIR) a high to low level transition on the corresponding wake-up input forces the wake up of the core power supply. */
06372 #define   SUPC_WUIR_WKUPT6_LOW_TO_HIGH (0x1u << 22) /**< \brief (SUPC_WUIR) a low to high level transition on the corresponding wake-up input forces the wake up of the core power supply. */
06373 #define SUPC_WUIR_WKUPT7 (0x1u << 23) /**< \brief (SUPC_WUIR) Wake Up Input Transition 7 */
06374 #define   SUPC_WUIR_WKUPT7_HIGH_TO_LOW (0x0u << 23) /**< \brief (SUPC_WUIR) a high to low level transition on the corresponding wake-up input forces the wake up of the core power supply. */
06375 #define   SUPC_WUIR_WKUPT7_LOW_TO_HIGH (0x1u << 23) /**< \brief (SUPC_WUIR) a low to high level transition on the corresponding wake-up input forces the wake up of the core power supply. */
06376 #define SUPC_WUIR_WKUPT8 (0x1u << 24) /**< \brief (SUPC_WUIR) Wake Up Input Transition 8 */
06377 #define   SUPC_WUIR_WKUPT8_HIGH_TO_LOW (0x0u << 24) /**< \brief (SUPC_WUIR) a high to low level transition on the corresponding wake-up input forces the wake up of the core power supply. */
06378 #define   SUPC_WUIR_WKUPT8_LOW_TO_HIGH (0x1u << 24) /**< \brief (SUPC_WUIR) a low to high level transition on the corresponding wake-up input forces the wake up of the core power supply. */

06380 #define   SUPC_WUIR_WKUPT9_HIGH_TO_LOW (0x0u << 25) /**< \brief (SUPC_WUIR) a high to low level transition on the corresponding wake-up input forces the wake up of the core power supply. */

06393 #define   SUPC_WUIR_WKUPT13_LOW_TO_HIGH (0x1u << 29) /**< \brief (SUPC_WUIR) a low to high level transition on the corresponding wake-up input forces the wake up of the core power supply. */
06394 #define SUPC_WUIR_WKUPT14 (0x1u << 30) /**< \brief (SUPC_WUIR) Wake Up Input Transition 14 */
06395 #define   SUPC_WUIR_WKUPT14_HIGH_TO_LOW (0x0u << 30) /**< \brief (SUPC_WUIR) a high to low level transition on the corresponding wake-up input forces the wake up of the core power supply. */
06396 #define   SUPC_WUIR_WKUPT14_LOW_TO_HIGH (0x1u << 30) /**< \brief (SUPC_WUIR) a low to high level transition on the corresponding wake-up input forces the wake up of the core power supply. */
06397 #define SUPC_WUIR_WKUPT15 (0x1u << 31) /**< \brief (SUPC_WUIR) Wake Up Input Transition 15 */
06398 #define   SUPC_WUIR_WKUPT15_HIGH_TO_LOW (0x0u << 31) /**< \brief (SUPC_WUIR) a high to low level transition on the corresponding wake-up input forces the wake up of the core power supply. */
06399 #define   SUPC_WUIR_WKUPT15_LOW_TO_HIGH (0x1u << 31) /**< \brief (SUPC_WUIR) a low to high level transition on the corresponding wake-up input forces the wake up of the core power supply. */
06400 /* -------- SUPC_SR : (SUPC Offset: 0x14) Supply Controller Status Register -------- */
06401 #define SUPC_SR_FWUPS (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (SUPC_SR) FWUP Wake Up Status */
06402 #define   SUPC_SR_FWUPS_NO (0x0u << 0) /**< \brief (SUPC_SR) no wake up due to the assertion of the FWUP pin has occurred since the last read of SUPC_SR. */
06403 #define   SUPC_SR_FWUPS_PRESENT (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (SUPC_SR) at least one wake up due to the assertion of the FWUP pin has occurred since the last read of SUPC_SR. */
06404 #define SUPC_SR_WKUPS (0x1u << 1) /**< \brief (SUPC_SR) WKUP Wake Up Status */
06405 #define   SUPC_SR_WKUPS_NO (0x0u << 1) /**< \brief (SUPC_SR) no wake up due to the assertion of the WKUP pins has occurred since the last read of SUPC_SR. */
06406 #define   SUPC_SR_WKUPS_PRESENT (0x1u << 1) /**< \brief (SUPC_SR) at least one wake up due to the assertion of the WKUP pins has occurred since the last read of SUPC_SR. */
06407 #define SUPC_SR_SMWS (0x1u << 2) /**< \brief (SUPC_SR) Supply Monitor Detection Wake Up Status */
06408 #define   SUPC_SR_SMWS_NO (0x0u << 2) /**< \brief (SUPC_SR) no wake up due to a supply monitor detection has occurred since the last read of SUPC_SR. */
06409 #define   SUPC_SR_SMWS_PRESENT (0x1u << 2) /**< \brief (SUPC_SR) at least one wake up due to a supply monitor detection has occurred since the last read of SUPC_SR. */
06410 #define SUPC_SR_BODRSTS (0x1u << 3) /**< \brief (SUPC_SR) Brownout Detector Reset Status */
06411 #define   SUPC_SR_BODRSTS_NO (0x0u << 3) /**< \brief (SUPC_SR) no core brownout rising edge event has been detected since the last read of the SUPC_SR. */
06412 #define   SUPC_SR_BODRSTS_PRESENT (0x1u << 3) /**< \brief (SUPC_SR) at least one brownout output rising edge event has been detected since the last read of the SUPC_SR. */
06413 #define SUPC_SR_SMRSTS (0x1u << 4) /**< \brief (SUPC_SR) Supply Monitor Reset Status */
06414 #define   SUPC_SR_SMRSTS_NO (0x0u << 4) /**< \brief (SUPC_SR) no supply monitor detection has generated a core reset since the last read of the SUPC_SR. */
06415 #define   SUPC_SR_SMRSTS_PRESENT (0x1u << 4) /**< \brief (SUPC_SR) at least one supply monitor detection has generated a core reset since the last read of the SUPC_SR. */
06416 #define SUPC_SR_SMS (0x1u << 5) /**< \brief (SUPC_SR) Supply Monitor Status */
06417 #define   SUPC_SR_SMS_NO (0x0u << 5) /**< \brief (SUPC_SR) no supply monitor detection since the last read of SUPC_SR. */
06418 #define   SUPC_SR_SMS_PRESENT (0x1u << 5) /**< \brief (SUPC_SR) at least one supply monitor detection since the last read of SUPC_SR. */
06419 #define SUPC_SR_SMOS (0x1u << 6) /**< \brief (SUPC_SR) Supply Monitor Output Status */
06420 #define   SUPC_SR_SMOS_HIGH (0x0u << 6) /**< \brief (SUPC_SR) the supply monitor detected VDDUTMI higher than its threshold at its last measurement. */
06421 #define   SUPC_SR_SMOS_LOW (0x1u << 6) /**< \brief (SUPC_SR) the supply monitor detected VDDUTMI lower than its threshold at its last measurement. */
06422 #define SUPC_SR_OSCSEL (0x1u << 7) /**< \brief (SUPC_SR) 32-kHz Oscillator Selection Status */
06423 #define   SUPC_SR_OSCSEL_RC (0x0u << 7) /**< \brief (SUPC_SR) the slow clock, SLCK is generated by the embedded 32-kHz RC oscillator. */
06424 #define   SUPC_SR_OSCSEL_CRYST (0x1u << 7) /**< \brief (SUPC_SR) the slow clock, SLCK is generated by the 32-kHz crystal oscillator. */
06425 #define SUPC_SR_FWUPIS (0x1u << 12) /**< \brief (SUPC_SR) FWUP Input Status */
06426 #define   SUPC_SR_FWUPIS_LOW (0x0u << 12) /**< \brief (SUPC_SR) FWUP input is tied low. */
06427 #define   SUPC_SR_FWUPIS_HIGH (0x1u << 12) /**< \brief (SUPC_SR) FWUP input is tied high. */
06428 #define SUPC_SR_WKUPIS0 (0x1u << 16) /**< \brief (SUPC_SR) WKUP Input Status 0 */
06429 #define   SUPC_SR_WKUPIS0_DIS (0x0u << 16) /**< \brief (SUPC_SR) the corresponding wake-up input is disabled, or was inactive at the time the debouncer triggered a wake up event. */
06430 #define   SUPC_SR_WKUPIS0_EN (0x1u << 16) /**< \brief (SUPC_SR) the corresponding wake-up input was active at the time the debouncer triggered a wake up event. */
06431 #define SUPC_SR_WKUPIS1 (0x1u << 17) /**< \brief (SUPC_SR) WKUP Input Status 1 */
06432 #define   SUPC_SR_WKUPIS1_DIS (0x0u << 17) /**< \brief (SUPC_SR) the corresponding wake-up input is disabled, or was inactive at the time the debouncer triggered a wake up event. */
06433 #define   SUPC_SR_WKUPIS1_EN (0x1u << 17) /**< \brief (SUPC_SR) the corresponding wake-up input was active at the time the debouncer triggered a wake up event. */
06434 #define SUPC_SR_WKUPIS2 (0x1u << 18) /**< \brief (SUPC_SR) WKUP Input Status 2 */
06435 #define   SUPC_SR_WKUPIS2_DIS (0x0u << 18) /**< \brief (SUPC_SR) the corresponding wake-up input is disabled, or was inactive at the time the debouncer triggered a wake up event. */
06436 #define   SUPC_SR_WKUPIS2_EN (0x1u << 18) /**< \brief (SUPC_SR) the corresponding wake-up input was active at the time the debouncer triggered a wake up event. */
06437 #define SUPC_SR_WKUPIS3 (0x1u << 19) /**< \brief (SUPC_SR) WKUP Input Status 3 */
06438 #define   SUPC_SR_WKUPIS3_DIS (0x0u << 19) /**< \brief (SUPC_SR) the corresponding wake-up input is disabled, or was inactive at the time the debouncer triggered a wake up event. */
06439 #define   SUPC_SR_WKUPIS3_EN (0x1u << 19) /**< \brief (SUPC_SR) the corresponding wake-up input was active at the time the debouncer triggered a wake up event. */
06440 #define SUPC_SR_WKUPIS4 (0x1u << 20) /**< \brief (SUPC_SR) WKUP Input Status 4 */
06441 #define   SUPC_SR_WKUPIS4_DIS (0x0u << 20) /**< \brief (SUPC_SR) the corresponding wake-up input is disabled, or was inactive at the time the debouncer triggered a wake up event. */
06442 #define   SUPC_SR_WKUPIS4_EN (0x1u << 20) /**< \brief (SUPC_SR) the corresponding wake-up input was active at the time the debouncer triggered a wake up event. */
06443 #define SUPC_SR_WKUPIS5 (0x1u << 21) /**< \brief (SUPC_SR) WKUP Input Status 5 */
06444 #define   SUPC_SR_WKUPIS5_DIS (0x0u << 21) /**< \brief (SUPC_SR) the corresponding wake-up input is disabled, or was inactive at the time the debouncer triggered a wake up event. */
06445 #define   SUPC_SR_WKUPIS5_EN (0x1u << 21) /**< \brief (SUPC_SR) the corresponding wake-up input was active at the time the debouncer triggered a wake up event. */
06446 #define SUPC_SR_WKUPIS6 (0x1u << 22) /**< \brief (SUPC_SR) WKUP Input Status 6 */
06447 #define   SUPC_SR_WKUPIS6_DIS (0x0u << 22) /**< \brief (SUPC_SR) the corresponding wake-up input is disabled, or was inactive at the time the debouncer triggered a wake up event. */
06448 #define   SUPC_SR_WKUPIS6_EN (0x1u << 22) /**< \brief (SUPC_SR) the corresponding wake-up input was active at the time the debouncer triggered a wake up event. */
06449 #define SUPC_SR_WKUPIS7 (0x1u << 23) /**< \brief (SUPC_SR) WKUP Input Status 7 */
06450 #define   SUPC_SR_WKUPIS7_DIS (0x0u << 23) /**< \brief (SUPC_SR) the corresponding wake-up input is disabled, or was inactive at the time the debouncer triggered a wake up event. */
06451 #define   SUPC_SR_WKUPIS7_EN (0x1u << 23) /**< \brief (SUPC_SR) the corresponding wake-up input was active at the time the debouncer triggered a wake up event. */
06452 #define SUPC_SR_WKUPIS8 (0x1u << 24) /**< \brief (SUPC_SR) WKUP Input Status 8 */
06453 #define   SUPC_SR_WKUPIS8_DIS (0x0u << 24) /**< \brief (SUPC_SR) the corresponding wake-up input is disabled, or was inactive at the time the debouncer triggered a wake up event. */
06454 #define   SUPC_SR_WKUPIS8_EN (0x1u << 24) /**< \brief (SUPC_SR) the corresponding wake-up input was active at the time the debouncer triggered a wake up event. */
06455 #define SUPC_SR_WKUPIS9 (0x1u << 25) /**< \brief (SUPC_SR) WKUP Input Status 9 */
06456 #define   SUPC_SR_WKUPIS9_DIS (0x0u << 25) /**< \brief (SUPC_SR) the corresponding wake-up input is disabled, or was inactive at the time the debouncer triggered a wake up event. */
06457 #define   SUPC_SR_WKUPIS9_EN (0x1u << 25) /**< \brief (SUPC_SR) the corresponding wake-up input was active at the time the debouncer triggered a wake up event. */
06458 #define SUPC_SR_WKUPIS10 (0x1u << 26) /**< \brief (SUPC_SR) WKUP Input Status 10 */
06459 #define   SUPC_SR_WKUPIS10_DIS (0x0u << 26) /**< \brief (SUPC_SR) the corresponding wake-up input is disabled, or was inactive at the time the debouncer triggered a wake up event. */
06460 #define   SUPC_SR_WKUPIS10_EN (0x1u << 26) /**< \brief (SUPC_SR) the corresponding wake-up input was active at the time the debouncer triggered a wake up event. */
06461 #define SUPC_SR_WKUPIS11 (0x1u << 27) /**< \brief (SUPC_SR) WKUP Input Status 11 */
06462 #define   SUPC_SR_WKUPIS11_DIS (0x0u << 27) /**< \brief (SUPC_SR) the corresponding wake-up input is disabled, or was inactive at the time the debouncer triggered a wake up event. */
06463 #define   SUPC_SR_WKUPIS11_EN (0x1u << 27) /**< \brief (SUPC_SR) the corresponding wake-up input was active at the time the debouncer triggered a wake up event. */
06464 #define SUPC_SR_WKUPIS12 (0x1u << 28) /**< \brief (SUPC_SR) WKUP Input Status 12 */
06465 #define   SUPC_SR_WKUPIS12_DIS (0x0u << 28) /**< \brief (SUPC_SR) the corresponding wake-up input is disabled, or was inactive at the time the debouncer triggered a wake up event. */
06466 #define   SUPC_SR_WKUPIS12_EN (0x1u << 28) /**< \brief (SUPC_SR) the corresponding wake-up input was active at the time the debouncer triggered a wake up event. */
06467 #define SUPC_SR_WKUPIS13 (0x1u << 29) /**< \brief (SUPC_SR) WKUP Input Status 13 */
06468 #define   SUPC_SR_WKUPIS13_DIS (0x0u << 29) /**< \brief (SUPC_SR) the corresponding wake-up input is disabled, or was inactive at the time the debouncer triggered a wake up event. */
06469 #define   SUPC_SR_WKUPIS13_EN (0x1u << 29) /**< \brief (SUPC_SR) the corresponding wake-up input was active at the time the debouncer triggered a wake up event. */
06470 #define SUPC_SR_WKUPIS14 (0x1u << 30) /**< \brief (SUPC_SR) WKUP Input Status 14 */
06471 #define   SUPC_SR_WKUPIS14_DIS (0x0u << 30) /**< \brief (SUPC_SR) the corresponding wake-up input is disabled, or was inactive at the time the debouncer triggered a wake up event. */
06472 #define   SUPC_SR_WKUPIS14_EN (0x1u << 30) /**< \brief (SUPC_SR) the corresponding wake-up input was active at the time the debouncer triggered a wake up event. */
06473 #define SUPC_SR_WKUPIS15 (0x1u << 31) /**< \brief (SUPC_SR) WKUP Input Status 15 */
06474 #define   SUPC_SR_WKUPIS15_DIS (0x0u << 31) /**< \brief (SUPC_SR) the corresponding wake-up input is disabled, or was inactive at the time the debouncer triggered a wake up event. */
06475 #define   SUPC_SR_WKUPIS15_EN (0x1u << 31) /**< \brief (SUPC_SR) the corresponding wake-up input was active at the time the debouncer triggered a wake up event. */
06476 
06477 /*@}*/
06478 
06479 /* ============================================================================= */
06480 /**  SOFTWARE API DEFINITION FOR Timer Counter */
06481 /* ============================================================================= */
06482 /** \addtogroup SAM3XA_TC Timer Counter */
06483 /*@{*/
06484 
06485 #ifndef __ASSEMBLY__
06486 /** \brief TcChannel hardware registers */
06487 typedef struct {
06488   RwReg      TC_CCR;        /**< \brief (TcChannel Offset: 0x0) Channel Control Register */
06489   RwReg      TC_CMR;        /**< \brief (TcChannel Offset: 0x4) Channel Mode Register */
06490   RwReg      TC_SMMR;       /**< \brief (TcChannel Offset: 0x8) Stepper Motor Mode Register */
06491   RoReg      Reserved1[1];
06492   RwReg      TC_CV;         /**< \brief (TcChannel Offset: 0x10) Counter Value */
06493   RwReg      TC_RA;         /**< \brief (TcChannel Offset: 0x14) Register A */
06494   RwReg      TC_RB;         /**< \brief (TcChannel Offset: 0x18) Register B */
06495   RwReg      TC_RC;         /**< \brief (TcChannel Offset: 0x1C) Register C */
06496   RwReg      TC_SR;         /**< \brief (TcChannel Offset: 0x20) Status Register */
06497   RwReg      TC_IER;        /**< \brief (TcChannel Offset: 0x24) Interrupt Enable Register */
06498   RwReg      TC_IDR;        /**< \brief (TcChannel Offset: 0x28) Interrupt Disable Register */
06499   RwReg      TC_IMR;        /**< \brief (TcChannel Offset: 0x2C) Interrupt Mask Register */
06500   RoReg      Reserved2[4];
06501 } TcChannel;
06502 /** \brief Tc hardware registers */
06503 #define TCCHANNEL_NUMBER 3
06504 typedef struct {
06505   TcChannel  TC_CHANNEL[TCCHANNEL_NUMBER]; /**< \brief (Tc Offset: 0x0) channel = 0 .. 2 */
06506   WoReg      TC_BCR;        /**< \brief (Tc Offset: 0xC0) Block Control Register */
06507   RwReg      TC_BMR;        /**< \brief (Tc Offset: 0xC4) Block Mode Register */
06508   WoReg      TC_QIER;       /**< \brief (Tc Offset: 0xC8) QDEC Interrupt Enable Register */
06509   WoReg      TC_QIDR;       /**< \brief (Tc Offset: 0xCC) QDEC Interrupt Disable Register */
06510   RoReg      TC_QIMR;       /**< \brief (Tc Offset: 0xD0) QDEC Interrupt Mask Register */
06511   RoReg      TC_QISR;       /**< \brief (Tc Offset: 0xD4) QDEC Interrupt Status Register */
06512   RwReg      TC_FMR;        /**< \brief (Tc Offset: 0xD8) Fault Mode Register */
06513   RoReg      Reserved1[2];
06514   RwReg      TC_WPMR;       /**< \brief (Tc Offset: 0xE4) Write Protect Mode Register */
06515 } Tc;
06516 #endif /* __ASSEMBLY__ */
06517 /* -------- TC_CCR : (TC Offset: N/A) Channel Control Register -------- */
06518 #define TC_CCR_CLKEN (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (TC_CCR) Counter Clock Enable Command */
06519 #define TC_CCR_CLKDIS (0x1u << 1) /**< \brief (TC_CCR) Counter Clock Disable Command */
06520 #define TC_CCR_SWTRG (0x1u << 2) /**< \brief (TC_CCR) Software Trigger Command */
06521 /* -------- TC_CMR : (TC Offset: N/A) Channel Mode Register -------- */
06522 #define TC_CMR_TCCLKS_Pos 0
06523 #define TC_CMR_TCCLKS_Msk (0x7u << TC_CMR_TCCLKS_Pos) /**< \brief (TC_CMR) Clock Selection */
06524 #define   TC_CMR_TCCLKS_TIMER_CLOCK1 (0x0u << 0) /**< \brief (TC_CMR) Clock selected: TCLK1 */
06525 #define   TC_CMR_TCCLKS_TIMER_CLOCK2 (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (TC_CMR) Clock selected: TCLK2 */
06526 #define   TC_CMR_TCCLKS_TIMER_CLOCK3 (0x2u << 0) /**< \brief (TC_CMR) Clock selected: TCLK3 */
06527 #define   TC_CMR_TCCLKS_TIMER_CLOCK4 (0x3u << 0) /**< \brief (TC_CMR) Clock selected: TCLK4 */
06528 #define   TC_CMR_TCCLKS_TIMER_CLOCK5 (0x4u << 0) /**< \brief (TC_CMR) Clock selected: TCLK5 */
06529 #define   TC_CMR_TCCLKS_XC0 (0x5u << 0) /**< \brief (TC_CMR) Clock selected: XC0 */
06530 #define   TC_CMR_TCCLKS_XC1 (0x6u << 0) /**< \brief (TC_CMR) Clock selected: XC1 */
06531 #define   TC_CMR_TCCLKS_XC2 (0x7u << 0) /**< \brief (TC_CMR) Clock selected: XC2 */
06532 #define TC_CMR_CLKI (0x1u << 3) /**< \brief (TC_CMR) Clock Invert */
06533 #define TC_CMR_BURST_Pos 4
06534 #define TC_CMR_BURST_Msk (0x3u << TC_CMR_BURST_Pos) /**< \brief (TC_CMR) Burst Signal Selection */
06535 #define   TC_CMR_BURST_NONE (0x0u << 4) /**< \brief (TC_CMR) The clock is not gated by an external signal. */
06536 #define   TC_CMR_BURST_XC0 (0x1u << 4) /**< \brief (TC_CMR) XC0 is ANDed with the selected clock. */
06537 #define   TC_CMR_BURST_XC1 (0x2u << 4) /**< \brief (TC_CMR) XC1 is ANDed with the selected clock. */
06538 #define   TC_CMR_BURST_XC2 (0x3u << 4) /**< \brief (TC_CMR) XC2 is ANDed with the selected clock. */
06539 #define TC_CMR_LDBSTOP (0x1u << 6) /**< \brief (TC_CMR) Counter Clock Stopped with RB Loading */
06540 #define TC_CMR_LDBDIS (0x1u << 7) /**< \brief (TC_CMR) Counter Clock Disable with RB Loading */
06541 #define TC_CMR_ETRGEDG_Pos 8
06542 #define TC_CMR_ETRGEDG_Msk (0x3u << TC_CMR_ETRGEDG_Pos) /**< \brief (TC_CMR) External Trigger Edge Selection */
06543 #define   TC_CMR_ETRGEDG_NONE (0x0u << 8) /**< \brief (TC_CMR) The clock is not gated by an external signal. */
06544 #define   TC_CMR_ETRGEDG_RISING (0x1u << 8) /**< \brief (TC_CMR) Rising edge */
06545 #define   TC_CMR_ETRGEDG_FALLING (0x2u << 8) /**< \brief (TC_CMR) Falling edge */
06546 #define   TC_CMR_ETRGEDG_EDGE (0x3u << 8) /**< \brief (TC_CMR) Each edge */
06547 #define TC_CMR_ABETRG (0x1u << 10) /**< \brief (TC_CMR) TIOA or TIOB External Trigger Selection */
06548 #define TC_CMR_CPCTRG (0x1u << 14) /**< \brief (TC_CMR) RC Compare Trigger Enable */
06549 #define TC_CMR_WAVE (0x1u << 15) /**< \brief (TC_CMR)  */
06550 #define TC_CMR_LDRA_Pos 16
06551 #define TC_CMR_LDRA_Msk (0x3u << TC_CMR_LDRA_Pos) /**< \brief (TC_CMR) RA Loading Selection */
06552 #define   TC_CMR_LDRA_NONE (0x0u << 16) /**< \brief (TC_CMR) None */
06553 #define   TC_CMR_LDRA_RISING (0x1u << 16) /**< \brief (TC_CMR) Rising edge of TIOA */
06554 #define   TC_CMR_LDRA_FALLING (0x2u << 16) /**< \brief (TC_CMR) Falling edge of TIOA */
06555 #define   TC_CMR_LDRA_EDGE (0x3u << 16) /**< \brief (TC_CMR) Each edge of TIOA */
06556 #define TC_CMR_LDRB_Pos 18
06557 #define TC_CMR_LDRB_Msk (0x3u << TC_CMR_LDRB_Pos) /**< \brief (TC_CMR) RB Loading Selection */
06558 #define   TC_CMR_LDRB_NONE (0x0u << 18) /**< \brief (TC_CMR) None */
06559 #define   TC_CMR_LDRB_RISING (0x1u << 18) /**< \brief (TC_CMR) Rising edge of TIOA */
06560 #define   TC_CMR_LDRB_FALLING (0x2u << 18) /**< \brief (TC_CMR) Falling edge of TIOA */
06561 #define   TC_CMR_LDRB_EDGE (0x3u << 18) /**< \brief (TC_CMR) Each edge of TIOA */
06562 #define TC_CMR_CPCSTOP (0x1u << 6) /**< \brief (TC_CMR) Counter Clock Stopped with RC Compare */
06563 #define TC_CMR_CPCDIS (0x1u << 7) /**< \brief (TC_CMR) Counter Clock Disable with RC Compare */
06564 #define TC_CMR_EEVTEDG_Pos 8
06565 #define TC_CMR_EEVTEDG_Msk (0x3u << TC_CMR_EEVTEDG_Pos) /**< \brief (TC_CMR) External Event Edge Selection */
06566 #define   TC_CMR_EEVTEDG_NONE (0x0u << 8) /**< \brief (TC_CMR) None */
06567 #define   TC_CMR_EEVTEDG_RISING (0x1u << 8) /**< \brief (TC_CMR) Rising edge */
06568 #define   TC_CMR_EEVTEDG_FALLING (0x2u << 8) /**< \brief (TC_CMR) Falling edge */
06569 #define   TC_CMR_EEVTEDG_EDGE (0x3u << 8) /**< \brief (TC_CMR) Each edge */
06570 #define TC_CMR_EEVT_Pos 10
06571 #define TC_CMR_EEVT_Msk (0x3u << TC_CMR_EEVT_Pos) /**< \brief (TC_CMR) External Event Selection */
06572 #define   TC_CMR_EEVT_TIOB (0x0u << 10) /**< \brief (TC_CMR) TIOB */
06573 #define   TC_CMR_EEVT_XC0 (0x1u << 10) /**< \brief (TC_CMR) XC0 */
06574 #define   TC_CMR_EEVT_XC1 (0x2u << 10) /**< \brief (TC_CMR) XC1 */
06575 #define   TC_CMR_EEVT_XC2 (0x3u << 10) /**< \brief (TC_CMR) XC2 */
06576 #define TC_CMR_ENETRG (0x1u << 12) /**< \brief (TC_CMR) External Event Trigger Enable */
06577 #define TC_CMR_WAVSEL_Pos 13
06578 #define TC_CMR_WAVSEL_Msk (0x3u << TC_CMR_WAVSEL_Pos) /**< \brief (TC_CMR) Waveform Selection */
06579 #define   TC_CMR_WAVSEL_UP (0x0u << 13) /**< \brief (TC_CMR) UP mode without automatic trigger on RC Compare */
06580 #define   TC_CMR_WAVSEL_UPDOWN (0x1u << 13) /**< \brief (TC_CMR) UPDOWN mode without automatic trigger on RC Compare */
06581 #define   TC_CMR_WAVSEL_UP_RC (0x2u << 13) /**< \brief (TC_CMR) UP mode with automatic trigger on RC Compare */
06582 #define   TC_CMR_WAVSEL_UPDOWN_RC (0x3u << 13) /**< \brief (TC_CMR) UPDOWN mode with automatic trigger on RC Compare */
06583 #define TC_CMR_ACPA_Pos 16
06584 #define TC_CMR_ACPA_Msk (0x3u << TC_CMR_ACPA_Pos) /**< \brief (TC_CMR) RA Compare Effect on TIOA */
06585 #define   TC_CMR_ACPA_NONE (0x0u << 16) /**< \brief (TC_CMR) None */
06586 #define   TC_CMR_ACPA_SET (0x1u << 16) /**< \brief (TC_CMR) Set */
06587 #define   TC_CMR_ACPA_CLEAR (0x2u << 16) /**< \brief (TC_CMR) Clear */
06588 #define   TC_CMR_ACPA_TOGGLE (0x3u << 16) /**< \brief (TC_CMR) Toggle */
06589 #define TC_CMR_ACPC_Pos 18
06590 #define TC_CMR_ACPC_Msk (0x3u << TC_CMR_ACPC_Pos) /**< \brief (TC_CMR) RC Compare Effect on TIOA */
06591 #define   TC_CMR_ACPC_NONE (0x0u << 18) /**< \brief (TC_CMR) None */
06592 #define   TC_CMR_ACPC_SET (0x1u << 18) /**< \brief (TC_CMR) Set */
06593 #define   TC_CMR_ACPC_CLEAR (0x2u << 18) /**< \brief (TC_CMR) Clear */
06594 #define   TC_CMR_ACPC_TOGGLE (0x3u << 18) /**< \brief (TC_CMR) Toggle */
06595 #define TC_CMR_AEEVT_Pos 20
06596 #define TC_CMR_AEEVT_Msk (0x3u << TC_CMR_AEEVT_Pos) /**< \brief (TC_CMR) External Event Effect on TIOA */
06597 #define   TC_CMR_AEEVT_NONE (0x0u << 20) /**< \brief (TC_CMR) None */
06598 #define   TC_CMR_AEEVT_SET (0x1u << 20) /**< \brief (TC_CMR) Set */
06599 #define   TC_CMR_AEEVT_CLEAR (0x2u << 20) /**< \brief (TC_CMR) Clear */
06600 #define   TC_CMR_AEEVT_TOGGLE (0x3u << 20) /**< \brief (TC_CMR) Toggle */
