06601 #define TC_CMR_ASWTRG_Pos 22
06602 #define TC_CMR_ASWTRG_Msk (0x3u << TC_CMR_ASWTRG_Pos) /**< \brief (TC_CMR) Software Trigger Effect on TIOA */
06603 #define   TC_CMR_ASWTRG_NONE (0x0u << 22) /**< \brief (TC_CMR) None */
06604 #define   TC_CMR_ASWTRG_SET (0x1u << 22) /**< \brief (TC_CMR) Set */
06605 #define   TC_CMR_ASWTRG_CLEAR (0x2u << 22) /**< \brief (TC_CMR) Clear */
06606 #define   TC_CMR_ASWTRG_TOGGLE (0x3u << 22) /**< \brief (TC_CMR) Toggle */
06607 #define TC_CMR_BCPB_Pos 24
06608 #define TC_CMR_BCPB_Msk (0x3u << TC_CMR_BCPB_Pos) /**< \brief (TC_CMR) RB Compare Effect on TIOB */
06609 #define   TC_CMR_BCPB_NONE (0x0u << 24) /**< \brief (TC_CMR) None */
06610 #define   TC_CMR_BCPB_SET (0x1u << 24) /**< \brief (TC_CMR) Set */
06611 #define   TC_CMR_BCPB_CLEAR (0x2u << 24) /**< \brief (TC_CMR) Clear */
06612 #define   TC_CMR_BCPB_TOGGLE (0x3u << 24) /**< \brief (TC_CMR) Toggle */
06613 #define TC_CMR_BCPC_Pos 26
06614 #define TC_CMR_BCPC_Msk (0x3u << TC_CMR_BCPC_Pos) /**< \brief (TC_CMR) RC Compare Effect on TIOB */
06615 #define   TC_CMR_BCPC_NONE (0x0u << 26) /**< \brief (TC_CMR) None */
06616 #define   TC_CMR_BCPC_SET (0x1u << 26) /**< \brief (TC_CMR) Set */
06617 #define   TC_CMR_BCPC_CLEAR (0x2u << 26) /**< \brief (TC_CMR) Clear */
06618 #define   TC_CMR_BCPC_TOGGLE (0x3u << 26) /**< \brief (TC_CMR) Toggle */
06619 #define TC_CMR_BEEVT_Pos 28
06620 #define TC_CMR_BEEVT_Msk (0x3u << TC_CMR_BEEVT_Pos) /**< \brief (TC_CMR) External Event Effect on TIOB */
06621 #define   TC_CMR_BEEVT_NONE (0x0u << 28) /**< \brief (TC_CMR) None */
06622 #define   TC_CMR_BEEVT_SET (0x1u << 28) /**< \brief (TC_CMR) Set */
06623 #define   TC_CMR_BEEVT_CLEAR (0x2u << 28) /**< \brief (TC_CMR) Clear */
06624 #define   TC_CMR_BEEVT_TOGGLE (0x3u << 28) /**< \brief (TC_CMR) Toggle */
06625 #define TC_CMR_BSWTRG_Pos 30
06626 #define TC_CMR_BSWTRG_Msk (0x3u << TC_CMR_BSWTRG_Pos) /**< \brief (TC_CMR) Software Trigger Effect on TIOB */
06627 #define   TC_CMR_BSWTRG_NONE (0x0u << 30) /**< \brief (TC_CMR) None */
06628 #define   TC_CMR_BSWTRG_SET (0x1u << 30) /**< \brief (TC_CMR) Set */
06629 #define   TC_CMR_BSWTRG_CLEAR (0x2u << 30) /**< \brief (TC_CMR) Clear */
06630 #define   TC_CMR_BSWTRG_TOGGLE (0x3u << 30) /**< \brief (TC_CMR) Toggle */
06631 /* -------- TC_SMMR : (TC Offset: N/A) Stepper Motor Mode Register -------- */
06632 #define TC_SMMR_GCEN (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (TC_SMMR) Gray Count Enable */
06633 #define TC_SMMR_DOWN (0x1u << 1) /**< \brief (TC_SMMR) DOWN Count */
06634 /* -------- TC_CV : (TC Offset: N/A) Counter Value -------- */
06635 #define TC_CV_CV_Pos 0
06636 #define TC_CV_CV_Msk (0xffffffffu << TC_CV_CV_Pos) /**< \brief (TC_CV) Counter Value */
06637 /* -------- TC_RA : (TC Offset: N/A) Register A -------- */
06638 #define TC_RA_RA_Pos 0
06639 #define TC_RA_RA_Msk (0xffffffffu << TC_RA_RA_Pos) /**< \brief (TC_RA) Register A */
06640 #define TC_RA_RA(value) ((TC_RA_RA_Msk & ((value) << TC_RA_RA_Pos)))
06641 /* -------- TC_RB : (TC Offset: N/A) Register B -------- */
06642 #define TC_RB_RB_Pos 0
06643 #define TC_RB_RB_Msk (0xffffffffu << TC_RB_RB_Pos) /**< \brief (TC_RB) Register B */
06644 #define TC_RB_RB(value) ((TC_RB_RB_Msk & ((value) << TC_RB_RB_Pos)))
06645 /* -------- TC_RC : (TC Offset: N/A) Register C -------- */
06646 #define TC_RC_RC_Pos 0
06647 #define TC_RC_RC_Msk (0xffffffffu << TC_RC_RC_Pos) /**< \brief (TC_RC) Register C */
06648 #define TC_RC_RC(value) ((TC_RC_RC_Msk & ((value) << TC_RC_RC_Pos)))
06649 /* -------- TC_SR : (TC Offset: N/A) Status Register -------- */
06650 #define TC_SR_COVFS (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (TC_SR) Counter Overflow Status */
06651 #define TC_SR_LOVRS (0x1u << 1) /**< \brief (TC_SR) Load Overrun Status */
06652 #define TC_SR_CPAS (0x1u << 2) /**< \brief (TC_SR) RA Compare Status */
06653 #define TC_SR_CPBS (0x1u << 3) /**< \brief (TC_SR) RB Compare Status */
06654 #define TC_SR_CPCS (0x1u << 4) /**< \brief (TC_SR) RC Compare Status */
06655 #define TC_SR_LDRAS (0x1u << 5) /**< \brief (TC_SR) RA Loading Status */
06656 #define TC_SR_LDRBS (0x1u << 6) /**< \brief (TC_SR) RB Loading Status */
06657 #define TC_SR_ETRGS (0x1u << 7) /**< \brief (TC_SR) External Trigger Status */
06658 #define TC_SR_CLKSTA (0x1u << 16) /**< \brief (TC_SR) Clock Enabling Status */
06659 #define TC_SR_MTIOA (0x1u << 17) /**< \brief (TC_SR) TIOA Mirror */
06660 #define TC_SR_MTIOB (0x1u << 18) /**< \brief (TC_SR) TIOB Mirror */
06661 /* -------- TC_IER : (TC Offset: N/A) Interrupt Enable Register -------- */
06662 #define TC_IER_COVFS (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (TC_IER) Counter Overflow */
06663 #define TC_IER_LOVRS (0x1u << 1) /**< \brief (TC_IER) Load Overrun */
06664 #define TC_IER_CPAS (0x1u << 2) /**< \brief (TC_IER) RA Compare */
06665 #define TC_IER_CPBS (0x1u << 3) /**< \brief (TC_IER) RB Compare */
06666 #define TC_IER_CPCS (0x1u << 4) /**< \brief (TC_IER) RC Compare */
06667 #define TC_IER_LDRAS (0x1u << 5) /**< \brief (TC_IER) RA Loading */
06668 #define TC_IER_LDRBS (0x1u << 6) /**< \brief (TC_IER) RB Loading */
06669 #define TC_IER_ETRGS (0x1u << 7) /**< \brief (TC_IER) External Trigger */
06670 /* -------- TC_IDR : (TC Offset: N/A) Interrupt Disable Register -------- */
06671 #define TC_IDR_COVFS (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (TC_IDR) Counter Overflow */
06672 #define TC_IDR_LOVRS (0x1u << 1) /**< \brief (TC_IDR) Load Overrun */
06673 #define TC_IDR_CPAS (0x1u << 2) /**< \brief (TC_IDR) RA Compare */
06674 #define TC_IDR_CPBS (0x1u << 3) /**< \brief (TC_IDR) RB Compare */
06675 #define TC_IDR_CPCS (0x1u << 4) /**< \brief (TC_IDR) RC Compare */
06676 #define TC_IDR_LDRAS (0x1u << 5) /**< \brief (TC_IDR) RA Loading */
06677 #define TC_IDR_LDRBS (0x1u << 6) /**< \brief (TC_IDR) RB Loading */
06678 #define TC_IDR_ETRGS (0x1u << 7) /**< \brief (TC_IDR) External Trigger */
06679 /* -------- TC_IMR : (TC Offset: N/A) Interrupt Mask Register -------- */
06680 #define TC_IMR_COVFS (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (TC_IMR) Counter Overflow */
06681 #define TC_IMR_LOVRS (0x1u << 1) /**< \brief (TC_IMR) Load Overrun */
06682 #define TC_IMR_CPAS (0x1u << 2) /**< \brief (TC_IMR) RA Compare */
06683 #define TC_IMR_CPBS (0x1u << 3) /**< \brief (TC_IMR) RB Compare */
06684 #define TC_IMR_CPCS (0x1u << 4) /**< \brief (TC_IMR) RC Compare */
06685 #define TC_IMR_LDRAS (0x1u << 5) /**< \brief (TC_IMR) RA Loading */
06686 #define TC_IMR_LDRBS (0x1u << 6) /**< \brief (TC_IMR) RB Loading */
06687 #define TC_IMR_ETRGS (0x1u << 7) /**< \brief (TC_IMR) External Trigger */
06688 /* -------- TC_BCR : (TC Offset: 0xC0) Block Control Register -------- */
06689 #define TC_BCR_SYNC (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (TC_BCR) Synchro Command */
06690 /* -------- TC_BMR : (TC Offset: 0xC4) Block Mode Register -------- */
06691 #define TC_BMR_TC0XC0S_Pos 0
06692 #define TC_BMR_TC0XC0S_Msk (0x3u << TC_BMR_TC0XC0S_Pos) /**< \brief (TC_BMR) External Clock Signal 0 Selection */
06693 #define   TC_BMR_TC0XC0S_TCLK0 (0x0u << 0) /**< \brief (TC_BMR) Signal connected to XC0: TCLK0 */
06694 #define   TC_BMR_TC0XC0S_TIOA1 (0x2u << 0) /**< \brief (TC_BMR) Signal connected to XC0: TIOA1 */
06695 #define   TC_BMR_TC0XC0S_TIOA2 (0x3u << 0) /**< \brief (TC_BMR) Signal connected to XC0: TIOA2 */
06696 #define TC_BMR_TC1XC1S_Pos 2
06697 #define TC_BMR_TC1XC1S_Msk (0x3u << TC_BMR_TC1XC1S_Pos) /**< \brief (TC_BMR) External Clock Signal 1 Selection */
06698 #define   TC_BMR_TC1XC1S_TCLK1 (0x0u << 2) /**< \brief (TC_BMR) Signal connected to XC1: TCLK1 */
06699 #define   TC_BMR_TC1XC1S_TIOA0 (0x2u << 2) /**< \brief (TC_BMR) Signal connected to XC1: TIOA0 */
06700 #define   TC_BMR_TC1XC1S_TIOA2 (0x3u << 2) /**< \brief (TC_BMR) Signal connected to XC1: TIOA2 */
06701 #define TC_BMR_TC2XC2S_Pos 4
06702 #define TC_BMR_TC2XC2S_Msk (0x3u << TC_BMR_TC2XC2S_Pos) /**< \brief (TC_BMR) External Clock Signal 2 Selection */
06703 #define   TC_BMR_TC2XC2S_TCLK2 (0x0u << 4) /**< \brief (TC_BMR) Signal connected to XC2: TCLK2 */
06704 #define   TC_BMR_TC2XC2S_TIOA1 (0x2u << 4) /**< \brief (TC_BMR) Signal connected to XC2: TIOA1 */
06705 #define   TC_BMR_TC2XC2S_TIOA2 (0x3u << 4) /**< \brief (TC_BMR) Signal connected to XC2: TIOA2 */
06706 #define TC_BMR_QDEN (0x1u << 8) /**< \brief (TC_BMR) Quadrature Decoder ENabled */
06707 #define TC_BMR_POSEN (0x1u << 9) /**< \brief (TC_BMR) POSition ENabled */
06708 #define TC_BMR_SPEEDEN (0x1u << 10) /**< \brief (TC_BMR) SPEED ENabled */
06709 #define TC_BMR_QDTRANS (0x1u << 11) /**< \brief (TC_BMR) Quadrature Decoding TRANSparent */
06710 #define TC_BMR_EDGPHA (0x1u << 12) /**< \brief (TC_BMR) EDGe on PHA count mode */
06711 #define TC_BMR_INVA (0x1u << 13) /**< \brief (TC_BMR) INVerted phA */
06712 #define TC_BMR_INVB (0x1u << 14) /**< \brief (TC_BMR) INVerted phB */
06713 #define TC_BMR_INVIDX (0x1u << 15) /**< \brief (TC_BMR) INVerted InDeX */
06714 #define TC_BMR_SWAP (0x1u << 16) /**< \brief (TC_BMR) SWAP PHA and PHB */
06715 #define TC_BMR_IDXPHB (0x1u << 17) /**< \brief (TC_BMR) InDeX pin is PHB pin */
06716 #define TC_BMR_FILTER (0x1u << 19) /**< \brief (TC_BMR)  */
06717 #define TC_BMR_MAXFILT_Pos 20
06718 #define TC_BMR_MAXFILT_Msk (0x3fu << TC_BMR_MAXFILT_Pos) /**< \brief (TC_BMR) MAXimum FILTer */
06719 #define TC_BMR_MAXFILT(value) ((TC_BMR_MAXFILT_Msk & ((value) << TC_BMR_MAXFILT_Pos)))
06720 /* -------- TC_QIER : (TC Offset: 0xC8) QDEC Interrupt Enable Register -------- */
06721 #define TC_QIER_IDX (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (TC_QIER) InDeX */
06722 #define TC_QIER_DIRCHG (0x1u << 1) /**< \brief (TC_QIER) DIRection CHanGe */
06723 #define TC_QIER_QERR (0x1u << 2) /**< \brief (TC_QIER) Quadrature ERRor */
06724 /* -------- TC_QIDR : (TC Offset: 0xCC) QDEC Interrupt Disable Register -------- */
06725 #define TC_QIDR_IDX (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (TC_QIDR) InDeX */
06726 #define TC_QIDR_DIRCHG (0x1u << 1) /**< \brief (TC_QIDR) DIRection CHanGe */
06727 #define TC_QIDR_QERR (0x1u << 2) /**< \brief (TC_QIDR) Quadrature ERRor */
06728 /* -------- TC_QIMR : (TC Offset: 0xD0) QDEC Interrupt Mask Register -------- */
06729 #define TC_QIMR_IDX (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (TC_QIMR) InDeX */
06730 #define TC_QIMR_DIRCHG (0x1u << 1) /**< \brief (TC_QIMR) DIRection CHanGe */
06731 #define TC_QIMR_QERR (0x1u << 2) /**< \brief (TC_QIMR) Quadrature ERRor */
06732 /* -------- TC_QISR : (TC Offset: 0xD4) QDEC Interrupt Status Register -------- */
06733 #define TC_QISR_IDX (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (TC_QISR) InDeX */
06734 #define TC_QISR_DIRCHG (0x1u << 1) /**< \brief (TC_QISR) DIRection CHanGe */
06735 #define TC_QISR_QERR (0x1u << 2) /**< \brief (TC_QISR) Quadrature ERRor */
06736 #define TC_QISR_DIR (0x1u << 8) /**< \brief (TC_QISR) Direction */
06737 /* -------- TC_FMR : (TC Offset: 0xD8) Fault Mode Register -------- */
06738 #define TC_FMR_ENCF0 (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (TC_FMR) ENable Compare Fault Channel 0 */
06739 #define TC_FMR_ENCF1 (0x1u << 1) /**< \brief (TC_FMR) ENable Compare Fault Channel 1 */
06740 /* -------- TC_WPMR : (TC Offset: 0xE4) Write Protect Mode Register -------- */
06741 #define TC_WPMR_WPEN (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (TC_WPMR) Write Protect Enable */
06742 #define TC_WPMR_WPKEY_Pos 8
06743 #define TC_WPMR_WPKEY_Msk (0xffffffu << TC_WPMR_WPKEY_Pos) /**< \brief (TC_WPMR) Write Protect KEY */
06744 #define TC_WPMR_WPKEY(value) ((TC_WPMR_WPKEY_Msk & ((value) << TC_WPMR_WPKEY_Pos)))
06745 
06746 /*@}*/
06747 
06748 /* ============================================================================= */
06749 /**  SOFTWARE API DEFINITION FOR True Random Number Generator */
06750 /* ============================================================================= */
06751 /** \addtogroup SAM3XA_TRNG True Random Number Generator */
06752 /*@{*/
06753 
06754 #ifndef __ASSEMBLY__
06755 /** \brief Trng hardware registers */
06756 typedef struct {
06757   WoReg TRNG_CR;       /**< \brief (Trng Offset: 0x00) Control Register */
06758   RoReg Reserved1[3];
06759   WoReg TRNG_IER;      /**< \brief (Trng Offset: 0x10) Interrupt Enable Register */
06760   WoReg TRNG_IDR;      /**< \brief (Trng Offset: 0x14) Interrupt Disable Register */
06761   RoReg TRNG_IMR;      /**< \brief (Trng Offset: 0x18) Interrupt Mask Register */
06762   RoReg TRNG_ISR;      /**< \brief (Trng Offset: 0x1C) Interrupt Status Register */
06763   RoReg Reserved2[12];
06764   RoReg TRNG_ODATA;    /**< \brief (Trng Offset: 0x50) Output Data Register */
06765 } Trng;
06766 #endif /* __ASSEMBLY__ */
06767 /* -------- TRNG_CR : (TRNG Offset: 0x00) Control Register -------- */
06768 #define TRNG_CR_ENABLE (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (TRNG_CR) Enables the TRNG to provide random values */
06769 #define TRNG_CR_KEY_Pos 8
06770 #define TRNG_CR_KEY_Msk (0xffffffu << TRNG_CR_KEY_Pos) /**< \brief (TRNG_CR) Security Key */
06771 #define TRNG_CR_KEY(value) ((TRNG_CR_KEY_Msk & ((value) << TRNG_CR_KEY_Pos)))
06772 /* -------- TRNG_IER : (TRNG Offset: 0x10) Interrupt Enable Register -------- */
06773 #define TRNG_IER_DATRDY (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (TRNG_IER) Data Ready Interrupt Enable */
06774 /* -------- TRNG_IDR : (TRNG Offset: 0x14) Interrupt Disable Register -------- */
06775 #define TRNG_IDR_DATRDY (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (TRNG_IDR) Data Ready Interrupt Disable */
06776 /* -------- TRNG_IMR : (TRNG Offset: 0x18) Interrupt Mask Register -------- */
06777 #define TRNG_IMR_DATRDY (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (TRNG_IMR) Data Ready Interrupt Mask */
06778 /* -------- TRNG_ISR : (TRNG Offset: 0x1C) Interrupt Status Register -------- */
06779 #define TRNG_ISR_DATRDY (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (TRNG_ISR) Data Ready */
06780 /* -------- TRNG_ODATA : (TRNG Offset: 0x50) Output Data Register -------- */
06781 #define TRNG_ODATA_ODATA_Pos 0
06782 #define TRNG_ODATA_ODATA_Msk (0xffffffffu << TRNG_ODATA_ODATA_Pos) /**< \brief (TRNG_ODATA) Output Data */
06783 
06784 /*@}*/
06785 
06786 /* ============================================================================= */
06787 /**  SOFTWARE API DEFINITION FOR Two-wire Interface */
06788 /* ============================================================================= */
06789 /** \addtogroup SAM3XA_TWI Two-wire Interface */
06790 /*@{*/
06791 
06792 #ifndef __ASSEMBLY__
06793 /** \brief Twi hardware registers */
06794 typedef struct {
06795   WoReg TWI_CR;        /**< \brief (Twi Offset: 0x00) Control Register */
06796   RwReg TWI_MMR;       /**< \brief (Twi Offset: 0x04) Master Mode Register */
06797   RwReg TWI_SMR;       /**< \brief (Twi Offset: 0x08) Slave Mode Register */
06798   RwReg TWI_IADR;      /**< \brief (Twi Offset: 0x0C) Internal Address Register */
06799   RwReg TWI_CWGR;      /**< \brief (Twi Offset: 0x10) Clock Waveform Generator Register */
06800   RoReg Reserved1[3];
06801   RoReg TWI_SR;        /**< \brief (Twi Offset: 0x20) Status Register */
06802   WoReg TWI_IER;       /**< \brief (Twi Offset: 0x24) Interrupt Enable Register */
06803   WoReg TWI_IDR;       /**< \brief (Twi Offset: 0x28) Interrupt Disable Register */
06804   RoReg TWI_IMR;       /**< \brief (Twi Offset: 0x2C) Interrupt Mask Register */
06805   RoReg TWI_RHR;       /**< \brief (Twi Offset: 0x30) Receive Holding Register */
06806   WoReg TWI_THR;       /**< \brief (Twi Offset: 0x34) Transmit Holding Register */
06807   RoReg Reserved2[50];
06808   RwReg TWI_RPR;       /**< \brief (Twi Offset: 0x100) Receive Pointer Register */
06809   RwReg TWI_RCR;       /**< \brief (Twi Offset: 0x104) Receive Counter Register */
06810   RwReg TWI_TPR;       /**< \brief (Twi Offset: 0x108) Transmit Pointer Register */
06811   RwReg TWI_TCR;       /**< \brief (Twi Offset: 0x10C) Transmit Counter Register */
06812   RwReg TWI_RNPR;      /**< \brief (Twi Offset: 0x110) Receive Next Pointer Register */
06813   RwReg TWI_RNCR;      /**< \brief (Twi Offset: 0x114) Receive Next Counter Register */
06814   RwReg TWI_TNPR;      /**< \brief (Twi Offset: 0x118) Transmit Next Pointer Register */
06815   RwReg TWI_TNCR;      /**< \brief (Twi Offset: 0x11C) Transmit Next Counter Register */
06816   WoReg TWI_PTCR;      /**< \brief (Twi Offset: 0x120) Transfer Control Register */
06817   RoReg TWI_PTSR;      /**< \brief (Twi Offset: 0x124) Transfer Status Register */
06818 } Twi;
06819 #endif /* __ASSEMBLY__ */
06820 /* -------- TWI_CR : (TWI Offset: 0x00) Control Register -------- */
06821 #define TWI_CR_START (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (TWI_CR) Send a START Condition */
06822 #define TWI_CR_STOP (0x1u << 1) /**< \brief (TWI_CR) Send a STOP Condition */
06823 #define TWI_CR_MSEN (0x1u << 2) /**< \brief (TWI_CR) TWI Master Mode Enabled */
06824 #define TWI_CR_MSDIS (0x1u << 3) /**< \brief (TWI_CR) TWI Master Mode Disabled */
06825 #define TWI_CR_SVEN (0x1u << 4) /**< \brief (TWI_CR) TWI Slave Mode Enabled */
06826 #define TWI_CR_SVDIS (0x1u << 5) /**< \brief (TWI_CR) TWI Slave Mode Disabled */
06827 #define TWI_CR_QUICK (0x1u << 6) /**< \brief (TWI_CR) SMBUS Quick Command */
06828 #define TWI_CR_SWRST (0x1u << 7) /**< \brief (TWI_CR) Software Reset */
06829 /* -------- TWI_MMR : (TWI Offset: 0x04) Master Mode Register -------- */
06830 #define TWI_MMR_IADRSZ_Pos 8
06831 #define TWI_MMR_IADRSZ_Msk (0x3u << TWI_MMR_IADRSZ_Pos) /**< \brief (TWI_MMR) Internal Device Address Size */
06832 #define   TWI_MMR_IADRSZ_NONE (0x0u << 8) /**< \brief (TWI_MMR) No internal device address */
06833 #define   TWI_MMR_IADRSZ_1_BYTE (0x1u << 8) /**< \brief (TWI_MMR) One-byte internal device address */
06834 #define   TWI_MMR_IADRSZ_2_BYTE (0x2u << 8) /**< \brief (TWI_MMR) Two-byte internal device address */
06835 #define   TWI_MMR_IADRSZ_3_BYTE (0x3u << 8) /**< \brief (TWI_MMR) Three-byte internal device address */
06836 #define TWI_MMR_MREAD (0x1u << 12) /**< \brief (TWI_MMR) Master Read Direction */
06837 #define TWI_MMR_DADR_Pos 16
06838 #define TWI_MMR_DADR_Msk (0x7fu << TWI_MMR_DADR_Pos) /**< \brief (TWI_MMR) Device Address */
06839 #define TWI_MMR_DADR(value) ((TWI_MMR_DADR_Msk & ((value) << TWI_MMR_DADR_Pos)))
06840 /* -------- TWI_SMR : (TWI Offset: 0x08) Slave Mode Register -------- */
06841 #define TWI_SMR_SADR_Pos 16
06842 #define TWI_SMR_SADR_Msk (0x7fu << TWI_SMR_SADR_Pos) /**< \brief (TWI_SMR) Slave Address */
06843 #define TWI_SMR_SADR(value) ((TWI_SMR_SADR_Msk & ((value) << TWI_SMR_SADR_Pos)))
06844 /* -------- TWI_IADR : (TWI Offset: 0x0C) Internal Address Register -------- */
06845 #define TWI_IADR_IADR_Pos 0
06846 #define TWI_IADR_IADR_Msk (0xffffffu << TWI_IADR_IADR_Pos) /**< \brief (TWI_IADR) Internal Address */
06847 #define TWI_IADR_IADR(value) ((TWI_IADR_IADR_Msk & ((value) << TWI_IADR_IADR_Pos)))
06848 /* -------- TWI_CWGR : (TWI Offset: 0x10) Clock Waveform Generator Register -------- */
06849 #define TWI_CWGR_CLDIV_Pos 0
06850 #define TWI_CWGR_CLDIV_Msk (0xffu << TWI_CWGR_CLDIV_Pos) /**< \brief (TWI_CWGR) Clock Low Divider */
06851 #define TWI_CWGR_CLDIV(value) ((TWI_CWGR_CLDIV_Msk & ((value) << TWI_CWGR_CLDIV_Pos)))
06852 #define TWI_CWGR_CHDIV_Pos 8
06853 #define TWI_CWGR_CHDIV_Msk (0xffu << TWI_CWGR_CHDIV_Pos) /**< \brief (TWI_CWGR) Clock High Divider */
06854 #define TWI_CWGR_CHDIV(value) ((TWI_CWGR_CHDIV_Msk & ((value) << TWI_CWGR_CHDIV_Pos)))
06855 #define TWI_CWGR_CKDIV_Pos 16
06856 #define TWI_CWGR_CKDIV_Msk (0x7u << TWI_CWGR_CKDIV_Pos) /**< \brief (TWI_CWGR) Clock Divider */
06857 #define TWI_CWGR_CKDIV(value) ((TWI_CWGR_CKDIV_Msk & ((value) << TWI_CWGR_CKDIV_Pos)))
06858 /* -------- TWI_SR : (TWI Offset: 0x20) Status Register -------- */
06859 #define TWI_SR_TXCOMP (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (TWI_SR) Transmission Completed (automatically set / reset) */
06860 #define TWI_SR_RXRDY (0x1u << 1) /**< \brief (TWI_SR) Receive Holding Register Ready (automatically set / reset) */
06861 #define TWI_SR_TXRDY (0x1u << 2) /**< \brief (TWI_SR) Transmit Holding Register Ready (automatically set / reset) */
06862 #define TWI_SR_SVREAD (0x1u << 3) /**< \brief (TWI_SR) Slave Read (automatically set / reset) */
06863 #define TWI_SR_SVACC (0x1u << 4) /**< \brief (TWI_SR) Slave Access (automatically set / reset) */
06864 #define TWI_SR_GACC (0x1u << 5) /**< \brief (TWI_SR) General Call Access (clear on read) */
06865 #define TWI_SR_OVRE (0x1u << 6) /**< \brief (TWI_SR) Overrun Error (clear on read) */
06866 #define TWI_SR_NACK (0x1u << 8) /**< \brief (TWI_SR) Not Acknowledged (clear on read) */
06867 #define TWI_SR_ARBLST (0x1u << 9) /**< \brief (TWI_SR) Arbitration Lost (clear on read) */
06868 #define TWI_SR_SCLWS (0x1u << 10) /**< \brief (TWI_SR) Clock Wait State (automatically set / reset) */
06869 #define TWI_SR_EOSACC (0x1u << 11) /**< \brief (TWI_SR) End Of Slave Access (clear on read) */
06870 #define TWI_SR_ENDRX (0x1u << 12) /**< \brief (TWI_SR) End of RX buffer */
06871 #define TWI_SR_ENDTX (0x1u << 13) /**< \brief (TWI_SR) End of TX buffer */
06872 #define TWI_SR_RXBUFF (0x1u << 14) /**< \brief (TWI_SR) RX Buffer Full */
06873 #define TWI_SR_TXBUFE (0x1u << 15) /**< \brief (TWI_SR) TX Buffer Empty */
06874 /* -------- TWI_IER : (TWI Offset: 0x24) Interrupt Enable Register -------- */
06875 #define TWI_IER_TXCOMP (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (TWI_IER) Transmission Completed Interrupt Enable */
06876 #define TWI_IER_RXRDY (0x1u << 1) /**< \brief (TWI_IER) Receive Holding Register Ready Interrupt Enable */
06877 #define TWI_IER_TXRDY (0x1u << 2) /**< \brief (TWI_IER) Transmit Holding Register Ready Interrupt Enable */
06878 #define TWI_IER_SVACC (0x1u << 4) /**< \brief (TWI_IER) Slave Access Interrupt Enable */
06879 #define TWI_IER_GACC (0x1u << 5) /**< \brief (TWI_IER) General Call Access Interrupt Enable */
06880 #define TWI_IER_OVRE (0x1u << 6) /**< \brief (TWI_IER) Overrun Error Interrupt Enable */
06881 #define TWI_IER_NACK (0x1u << 8) /**< \brief (TWI_IER) Not Acknowledge Interrupt Enable */
06882 #define TWI_IER_ARBLST (0x1u << 9) /**< \brief (TWI_IER) Arbitration Lost Interrupt Enable */
06883 #define TWI_IER_SCL_WS (0x1u << 10) /**< \brief (TWI_IER) Clock Wait State Interrupt Enable */
06884 #define TWI_IER_EOSACC (0x1u << 11) /**< \brief (TWI_IER) End Of Slave Access Interrupt Enable */
06885 #define TWI_IER_ENDRX (0x1u << 12) /**< \brief (TWI_IER) End of Receive Buffer Interrupt Enable */
06886 #define TWI_IER_ENDTX (0x1u << 13) /**< \brief (TWI_IER) End of Transmit Buffer Interrupt Enable */
06887 #define TWI_IER_RXBUFF (0x1u << 14) /**< \brief (TWI_IER) Receive Buffer Full Interrupt Enable */
06888 #define TWI_IER_TXBUFE (0x1u << 15) /**< \brief (TWI_IER) Transmit Buffer Empty Interrupt Enable */
06889 /* -------- TWI_IDR : (TWI Offset: 0x28) Interrupt Disable Register -------- */
06890 #define TWI_IDR_TXCOMP (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (TWI_IDR) Transmission Completed Interrupt Disable */
06891 #define TWI_IDR_RXRDY (0x1u << 1) /**< \brief (TWI_IDR) Receive Holding Register Ready Interrupt Disable */
06892 #define TWI_IDR_TXRDY (0x1u << 2) /**< \brief (TWI_IDR) Transmit Holding Register Ready Interrupt Disable */
06893 #define TWI_IDR_SVACC (0x1u << 4) /**< \brief (TWI_IDR) Slave Access Interrupt Disable */
06894 #define TWI_IDR_GACC (0x1u << 5) /**< \brief (TWI_IDR) General Call Access Interrupt Disable */
06895 #define TWI_IDR_OVRE (0x1u << 6) /**< \brief (TWI_IDR) Overrun Error Interrupt Disable */
06896 #define TWI_IDR_NACK (0x1u << 8) /**< \brief (TWI_IDR) Not Acknowledge Interrupt Disable */
06897 #define TWI_IDR_ARBLST (0x1u << 9) /**< \brief (TWI_IDR) Arbitration Lost Interrupt Disable */
06898 #define TWI_IDR_SCL_WS (0x1u << 10) /**< \brief (TWI_IDR) Clock Wait State Interrupt Disable */
06899 #define TWI_IDR_EOSACC (0x1u << 11) /**< \brief (TWI_IDR) End Of Slave Access Interrupt Disable */
06900 #define TWI_IDR_ENDRX (0x1u << 12) /**< \brief (TWI_IDR) End of Receive Buffer Interrupt Disable */
06901 #define TWI_IDR_ENDTX (0x1u << 13) /**< \brief (TWI_IDR) End of Transmit Buffer Interrupt Disable */
06902 #define TWI_IDR_RXBUFF (0x1u << 14) /**< \brief (TWI_IDR) Receive Buffer Full Interrupt Disable */
06903 #define TWI_IDR_TXBUFE (0x1u << 15) /**< \brief (TWI_IDR) Transmit Buffer Empty Interrupt Disable */
06904 /* -------- TWI_IMR : (TWI Offset: 0x2C) Interrupt Mask Register -------- */
06905 #define TWI_IMR_TXCOMP (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (TWI_IMR) Transmission Completed Interrupt Mask */
06906 #define TWI_IMR_RXRDY (0x1u << 1) /**< \brief (TWI_IMR) Receive Holding Register Ready Interrupt Mask */
06907 #define TWI_IMR_TXRDY (0x1u << 2) /**< \brief (TWI_IMR) Transmit Holding Register Ready Interrupt Mask */
06908 #define TWI_IMR_SVACC (0x1u << 4) /**< \brief (TWI_IMR) Slave Access Interrupt Mask */
06909 #define TWI_IMR_GACC (0x1u << 5) /**< \brief (TWI_IMR) General Call Access Interrupt Mask */
06910 #define TWI_IMR_OVRE (0x1u << 6) /**< \brief (TWI_IMR) Overrun Error Interrupt Mask */
06911 #define TWI_IMR_NACK (0x1u << 8) /**< \brief (TWI_IMR) Not Acknowledge Interrupt Mask */
06912 #define TWI_IMR_ARBLST (0x1u << 9) /**< \brief (TWI_IMR) Arbitration Lost Interrupt Mask */
06913 #define TWI_IMR_SCL_WS (0x1u << 10) /**< \brief (TWI_IMR) Clock Wait State Interrupt Mask */
06914 #define TWI_IMR_EOSACC (0x1u << 11) /**< \brief (TWI_IMR) End Of Slave Access Interrupt Mask */
06915 #define TWI_IMR_ENDRX (0x1u << 12) /**< \brief (TWI_IMR) End of Receive Buffer Interrupt Mask */
06916 #define TWI_IMR_ENDTX (0x1u << 13) /**< \brief (TWI_IMR) End of Transmit Buffer Interrupt Mask */
06917 #define TWI_IMR_RXBUFF (0x1u << 14) /**< \brief (TWI_IMR) Receive Buffer Full Interrupt Mask */
06918 #define TWI_IMR_TXBUFE (0x1u << 15) /**< \brief (TWI_IMR) Transmit Buffer Empty Interrupt Mask */
06919 /* -------- TWI_RHR : (TWI Offset: 0x30) Receive Holding Register -------- */
06920 #define TWI_RHR_RXDATA_Pos 0
06921 #define TWI_RHR_RXDATA_Msk (0xffu << TWI_RHR_RXDATA_Pos) /**< \brief (TWI_RHR) Master or Slave Receive Holding Data */
06922 /* -------- TWI_THR : (TWI Offset: 0x34) Transmit Holding Register -------- */
06923 #define TWI_THR_TXDATA_Pos 0
06924 #define TWI_THR_TXDATA_Msk (0xffu << TWI_THR_TXDATA_Pos) /**< \brief (TWI_THR) Master or Slave Transmit Holding Data */
06925 #define TWI_THR_TXDATA(value) ((TWI_THR_TXDATA_Msk & ((value) << TWI_THR_TXDATA_Pos)))
06926 /* -------- TWI_RPR : (TWI Offset: 0x100) Receive Pointer Register -------- */
06927 #define TWI_RPR_RXPTR_Pos 0
06928 #define TWI_RPR_RXPTR_Msk (0xffffffffu << TWI_RPR_RXPTR_Pos) /**< \brief (TWI_RPR) Receive Pointer Register */
06929 #define TWI_RPR_RXPTR(value) ((TWI_RPR_RXPTR_Msk & ((value) << TWI_RPR_RXPTR_Pos)))
06930 /* -------- TWI_RCR : (TWI Offset: 0x104) Receive Counter Register -------- */
06931 #define TWI_RCR_RXCTR_Pos 0
06932 #define TWI_RCR_RXCTR_Msk (0xffffu << TWI_RCR_RXCTR_Pos) /**< \brief (TWI_RCR) Receive Counter Register */
06933 #define TWI_RCR_RXCTR(value) ((TWI_RCR_RXCTR_Msk & ((value) << TWI_RCR_RXCTR_Pos)))
06934 /* -------- TWI_TPR : (TWI Offset: 0x108) Transmit Pointer Register -------- */
06935 #define TWI_TPR_TXPTR_Pos 0
06936 #define TWI_TPR_TXPTR_Msk (0xffffffffu << TWI_TPR_TXPTR_Pos) /**< \brief (TWI_TPR) Transmit Counter Register */
06937 #define TWI_TPR_TXPTR(value) ((TWI_TPR_TXPTR_Msk & ((value) << TWI_TPR_TXPTR_Pos)))
06938 /* -------- TWI_TCR : (TWI Offset: 0x10C) Transmit Counter Register -------- */
06939 #define TWI_TCR_TXCTR_Pos 0
06940 #define TWI_TCR_TXCTR_Msk (0xffffu << TWI_TCR_TXCTR_Pos) /**< \brief (TWI_TCR) Transmit Counter Register */
06941 #define TWI_TCR_TXCTR(value) ((TWI_TCR_TXCTR_Msk & ((value) << TWI_TCR_TXCTR_Pos)))
06942 /* -------- TWI_RNPR : (TWI Offset: 0x110) Receive Next Pointer Register -------- */
06943 #define TWI_RNPR_RXNPTR_Pos 0
06944 #define TWI_RNPR_RXNPTR_Msk (0xffffffffu << TWI_RNPR_RXNPTR_Pos) /**< \brief (TWI_RNPR) Receive Next Pointer */
06945 #define TWI_RNPR_RXNPTR(value) ((TWI_RNPR_RXNPTR_Msk & ((value) << TWI_RNPR_RXNPTR_Pos)))
06946 /* -------- TWI_RNCR : (TWI Offset: 0x114) Receive Next Counter Register -------- */
06947 #define TWI_RNCR_RXNCTR_Pos 0
06948 #define TWI_RNCR_RXNCTR_Msk (0xffffu << TWI_RNCR_RXNCTR_Pos) /**< \brief (TWI_RNCR) Receive Next Counter */
06949 #define TWI_RNCR_RXNCTR(value) ((TWI_RNCR_RXNCTR_Msk & ((value) << TWI_RNCR_RXNCTR_Pos)))
06950 /* -------- TWI_TNPR : (TWI Offset: 0x118) Transmit Next Pointer Register -------- */
06951 #define TWI_TNPR_TXNPTR_Pos 0
06952 #define TWI_TNPR_TXNPTR_Msk (0xffffffffu << TWI_TNPR_TXNPTR_Pos) /**< \brief (TWI_TNPR) Transmit Next Pointer */
06953 #define TWI_TNPR_TXNPTR(value) ((TWI_TNPR_TXNPTR_Msk & ((value) << TWI_TNPR_TXNPTR_Pos)))
06954 /* -------- TWI_TNCR : (TWI Offset: 0x11C) Transmit Next Counter Register -------- */
06955 #define TWI_TNCR_TXNCTR_Pos 0
06956 #define TWI_TNCR_TXNCTR_Msk (0xffffu << TWI_TNCR_TXNCTR_Pos) /**< \brief (TWI_TNCR) Transmit Counter Next */
06957 #define TWI_TNCR_TXNCTR(value) ((TWI_TNCR_TXNCTR_Msk & ((value) << TWI_TNCR_TXNCTR_Pos)))
06958 /* -------- TWI_PTCR : (TWI Offset: 0x120) Transfer Control Register -------- */
06959 #define TWI_PTCR_RXTEN (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (TWI_PTCR) Receiver Transfer Enable */
06960 #define TWI_PTCR_RXTDIS (0x1u << 1) /**< \brief (TWI_PTCR) Receiver Transfer Disable */
06961 #define TWI_PTCR_TXTEN (0x1u << 8) /**< \brief (TWI_PTCR) Transmitter Transfer Enable */
06962 #define TWI_PTCR_TXTDIS (0x1u << 9) /**< \brief (TWI_PTCR) Transmitter Transfer Disable */
06963 /* -------- TWI_PTSR : (TWI Offset: 0x124) Transfer Status Register -------- */
06964 #define TWI_PTSR_RXTEN (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (TWI_PTSR) Receiver Transfer Enable */
06965 #define TWI_PTSR_TXTEN (0x1u << 8) /**< \brief (TWI_PTSR) Transmitter Transfer Enable */
06966 
06967 /*@}*/
06968 
06969 /* ============================================================================= */
06970 /**  SOFTWARE API DEFINITION FOR Universal Asynchronous Receiver Transmitter */
06971 /* ============================================================================= */
06972 /** \addtogroup SAM3XA_UART Universal Asynchronous Receiver Transmitter */
06973 /*@{*/
06974 
06975 #ifndef __ASSEMBLY__
06976 /** \brief Uart hardware registers */
06977 typedef struct {
06978   WoReg UART_CR;       /**< \brief (Uart Offset: 0x0000) Control Register */
06979   RwReg UART_MR;       /**< \brief (Uart Offset: 0x0004) Mode Register */
06980   WoReg UART_IER;      /**< \brief (Uart Offset: 0x0008) Interrupt Enable Register */
06981   WoReg UART_IDR;      /**< \brief (Uart Offset: 0x000C) Interrupt Disable Register */
06982   RoReg UART_IMR;      /**< \brief (Uart Offset: 0x0010) Interrupt Mask Register */
06983   RoReg UART_SR;       /**< \brief (Uart Offset: 0x0014) Status Register */
06984   RoReg UART_RHR;      /**< \brief (Uart Offset: 0x0018) Receive Holding Register */
06985   WoReg UART_THR;      /**< \brief (Uart Offset: 0x001C) Transmit Holding Register */
06986   RwReg UART_BRGR;     /**< \brief (Uart Offset: 0x0020) Baud Rate Generator Register */
06987   RoReg Reserved1[55];
06988   RwReg UART_RPR;      /**< \brief (Uart Offset: 0x100) Receive Pointer Register */
06989   RwReg UART_RCR;      /**< \brief (Uart Offset: 0x104) Receive Counter Register */
06990   RwReg UART_TPR;      /**< \brief (Uart Offset: 0x108) Transmit Pointer Register */
06991   RwReg UART_TCR;      /**< \brief (Uart Offset: 0x10C) Transmit Counter Register */
06992   RwReg UART_RNPR;     /**< \brief (Uart Offset: 0x110) Receive Next Pointer Register */
06993   RwReg UART_RNCR;     /**< \brief (Uart Offset: 0x114) Receive Next Counter Register */
06994   RwReg UART_TNPR;     /**< \brief (Uart Offset: 0x118) Transmit Next Pointer Register */
06995   RwReg UART_TNCR;     /**< \brief (Uart Offset: 0x11C) Transmit Next Counter Register */
06996   WoReg UART_PTCR;     /**< \brief (Uart Offset: 0x120) Transfer Control Register */
06997   RoReg UART_PTSR;     /**< \brief (Uart Offset: 0x124) Transfer Status Register */
06998 } Uart;
06999 #endif /* __ASSEMBLY__ */
07000 /* -------- UART_CR : (UART Offset: 0x0000) Control Register -------- */
07001 #define UART_CR_RSTRX (0x1u << 2) /**< \brief (UART_CR) Reset Receiver */
07002 #define UART_CR_RSTTX (0x1u << 3) /**< \brief (UART_CR) Reset Transmitter */
07003 #define UART_CR_RXEN (0x1u << 4) /**< \brief (UART_CR) Receiver Enable */
07004 #define UART_CR_RXDIS (0x1u << 5) /**< \brief (UART_CR) Receiver Disable */
07005 #define UART_CR_TXEN (0x1u << 6) /**< \brief (UART_CR) Transmitter Enable */
07006 #define UART_CR_TXDIS (0x1u << 7) /**< \brief (UART_CR) Transmitter Disable */
07007 #define UART_CR_RSTSTA (0x1u << 8) /**< \brief (UART_CR) Reset Status Bits */
07008 /* -------- UART_MR : (UART Offset: 0x0004) Mode Register -------- */
07009 #define UART_MR_PAR_Pos 9
07010 #define UART_MR_PAR_Msk (0x7u << UART_MR_PAR_Pos) /**< \brief (UART_MR) Parity Type */
07011 #define   UART_MR_PAR_EVEN (0x0u << 9) /**< \brief (UART_MR) Even parity */
07012 #define   UART_MR_PAR_ODD (0x1u << 9) /**< \brief (UART_MR) Odd parity */
07013 #define   UART_MR_PAR_SPACE (0x2u << 9) /**< \brief (UART_MR) Space: parity forced to 0 */
07014 #define   UART_MR_PAR_MARK (0x3u << 9) /**< \brief (UART_MR) Mark: parity forced to 1 */
07015 #define   UART_MR_PAR_NO (0x4u << 9) /**< \brief (UART_MR) No parity */
07016 #define UART_MR_CHMODE_Pos 14
07017 #define UART_MR_CHMODE_Msk (0x3u << UART_MR_CHMODE_Pos) /**< \brief (UART_MR) Channel Mode */
07018 #define   UART_MR_CHMODE_NORMAL (0x0u << 14) /**< \brief (UART_MR) Normal Mode */
07019 #define   UART_MR_CHMODE_AUTOMATIC (0x1u << 14) /**< \brief (UART_MR) Automatic Echo */
07020 #define   UART_MR_CHMODE_LOCAL_LOOPBACK (0x2u << 14) /**< \brief (UART_MR) Local Loopback */
07021 #define   UART_MR_CHMODE_REMOTE_LOOPBACK (0x3u << 14) /**< \brief (UART_MR) Remote Loopback */
07022 /* -------- UART_IER : (UART Offset: 0x0008) Interrupt Enable Register -------- */
07023 #define UART_IER_RXRDY (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (UART_IER) Enable RXRDY Interrupt */
07024 #define UART_IER_TXRDY (0x1u << 1) /**< \brief (UART_IER) Enable TXRDY Interrupt */
07025 #define UART_IER_ENDRX (0x1u << 3) /**< \brief (UART_IER) Enable End of Receive Transfer Interrupt */
07026 #define UART_IER_ENDTX (0x1u << 4) /**< \brief (UART_IER) Enable End of Transmit Interrupt */
07027 #define UART_IER_OVRE (0x1u << 5) /**< \brief (UART_IER) Enable Overrun Error Interrupt */
07028 #define UART_IER_FRAME (0x1u << 6) /**< \brief (UART_IER) Enable Framing Error Interrupt */
07029 #define UART_IER_PARE (0x1u << 7) /**< \brief (UART_IER) Enable Parity Error Interrupt */
07030 #define UART_IER_TXEMPTY (0x1u << 9) /**< \brief (UART_IER) Enable TXEMPTY Interrupt */
07031 #define UART_IER_TXBUFE (0x1u << 11) /**< \brief (UART_IER) Enable Buffer Empty Interrupt */
07032 #define UART_IER_RXBUFF (0x1u << 12) /**< \brief (UART_IER) Enable Buffer Full Interrupt */
07033 /* -------- UART_IDR : (UART Offset: 0x000C) Interrupt Disable Register -------- */
07034 #define UART_IDR_RXRDY (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (UART_IDR) Disable RXRDY Interrupt */
07035 #define UART_IDR_TXRDY (0x1u << 1) /**< \brief (UART_IDR) Disable TXRDY Interrupt */
07036 #define UART_IDR_ENDRX (0x1u << 3) /**< \brief (UART_IDR) Disable End of Receive Transfer Interrupt */
07037 #define UART_IDR_ENDTX (0x1u << 4) /**< \brief (UART_IDR) Disable End of Transmit Interrupt */
07038 #define UART_IDR_OVRE (0x1u << 5) /**< \brief (UART_IDR) Disable Overrun Error Interrupt */
07039 #define UART_IDR_FRAME (0x1u << 6) /**< \brief (UART_IDR) Disable Framing Error Interrupt */
07040 #define UART_IDR_PARE (0x1u << 7) /**< \brief (UART_IDR) Disable Parity Error Interrupt */
07041 #define UART_IDR_TXEMPTY (0x1u << 9) /**< \brief (UART_IDR) Disable TXEMPTY Interrupt */
07042 #define UART_IDR_TXBUFE (0x1u << 11) /**< \brief (UART_IDR) Disable Buffer Empty Interrupt */
07043 #define UART_IDR_RXBUFF (0x1u << 12) /**< \brief (UART_IDR) Disable Buffer Full Interrupt */
07044 /* -------- UART_IMR : (UART Offset: 0x0010) Interrupt Mask Register -------- */
07045 #define UART_IMR_RXRDY (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (UART_IMR) Mask RXRDY Interrupt */
07046 #define UART_IMR_TXRDY (0x1u << 1) /**< \brief (UART_IMR) Disable TXRDY Interrupt */
07047 #define UART_IMR_ENDRX (0x1u << 3) /**< \brief (UART_IMR) Mask End of Receive Transfer Interrupt */
07048 #define UART_IMR_ENDTX (0x1u << 4) /**< \brief (UART_IMR) Mask End of Transmit Interrupt */
07049 #define UART_IMR_OVRE (0x1u << 5) /**< \brief (UART_IMR) Mask Overrun Error Interrupt */
07050 #define UART_IMR_FRAME (0x1u << 6) /**< \brief (UART_IMR) Mask Framing Error Interrupt */
07051 #define UART_IMR_PARE (0x1u << 7) /**< \brief (UART_IMR) Mask Parity Error Interrupt */
07052 #define UART_IMR_TXEMPTY (0x1u << 9) /**< \brief (UART_IMR) Mask TXEMPTY Interrupt */
07053 #define UART_IMR_TXBUFE (0x1u << 11) /**< \brief (UART_IMR) Mask TXBUFE Interrupt */
07054 #define UART_IMR_RXBUFF (0x1u << 12) /**< \brief (UART_IMR) Mask RXBUFF Interrupt */
07055 /* -------- UART_SR : (UART Offset: 0x0014) Status Register -------- */
07056 #define UART_SR_RXRDY (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (UART_SR) Receiver Ready */
07057 #define UART_SR_TXRDY (0x1u << 1) /**< \brief (UART_SR) Transmitter Ready */
07058 #define UART_SR_ENDRX (0x1u << 3) /**< \brief (UART_SR) End of Receiver Transfer */
07059 #define UART_SR_ENDTX (0x1u << 4) /**< \brief (UART_SR) End of Transmitter Transfer */
07060 #define UART_SR_OVRE (0x1u << 5) /**< \brief (UART_SR) Overrun Error */
07061 #define UART_SR_FRAME (0x1u << 6) /**< \brief (UART_SR) Framing Error */
07062 #define UART_SR_PARE (0x1u << 7) /**< \brief (UART_SR) Parity Error */
07063 #define UART_SR_TXEMPTY (0x1u << 9) /**< \brief (UART_SR) Transmitter Empty */
07064 #define UART_SR_TXBUFE (0x1u << 11) /**< \brief (UART_SR) Transmission Buffer Empty */
07065 #define UART_SR_RXBUFF (0x1u << 12) /**< \brief (UART_SR) Receive Buffer Full */
07066 /* -------- UART_RHR : (UART Offset: 0x0018) Receive Holding Register -------- */
07067 #define UART_RHR_RXCHR_Pos 0
07068 #define UART_RHR_RXCHR_Msk (0xffu << UART_RHR_RXCHR_Pos) /**< \brief (UART_RHR) Received Character */
07069 /* -------- UART_THR : (UART Offset: 0x001C) Transmit Holding Register -------- */
07070 #define UART_THR_TXCHR_Pos 0
07071 #define UART_THR_TXCHR_Msk (0xffu << UART_THR_TXCHR_Pos) /**< \brief (UART_THR) Character to be Transmitted */
07072 #define UART_THR_TXCHR(value) ((UART_THR_TXCHR_Msk & ((value) << UART_THR_TXCHR_Pos)))
07073 /* -------- UART_BRGR : (UART Offset: 0x0020) Baud Rate Generator Register -------- */
07074 #define UART_BRGR_CD_Pos 0
07075 #define UART_BRGR_CD_Msk (0xffffu << UART_BRGR_CD_Pos) /**< \brief (UART_BRGR) Clock Divisor */
07076 #define UART_BRGR_CD(value) ((UART_BRGR_CD_Msk & ((value) << UART_BRGR_CD_Pos)))
07077 /* -------- UART_RPR : (UART Offset: 0x100) Receive Pointer Register -------- */
07078 #define UART_RPR_RXPTR_Pos 0
07079 #define UART_RPR_RXPTR_Msk (0xffffffffu << UART_RPR_RXPTR_Pos) /**< \brief (UART_RPR) Receive Pointer Register */
07080 #define UART_RPR_RXPTR(value) ((UART_RPR_RXPTR_Msk & ((value) << UART_RPR_RXPTR_Pos)))
07081 /* -------- UART_RCR : (UART Offset: 0x104) Receive Counter Register -------- */
07082 #define UART_RCR_RXCTR_Pos 0
07083 #define UART_RCR_RXCTR_Msk (0xffffu << UART_RCR_RXCTR_Pos) /**< \brief (UART_RCR) Receive Counter Register */
07084 #define UART_RCR_RXCTR(value) ((UART_RCR_RXCTR_Msk & ((value) << UART_RCR_RXCTR_Pos)))
07085 /* -------- UART_TPR : (UART Offset: 0x108) Transmit Pointer Register -------- */
07086 #define UART_TPR_TXPTR_Pos 0
07087 #define UART_TPR_TXPTR_Msk (0xffffffffu << UART_TPR_TXPTR_Pos) /**< \brief (UART_TPR) Transmit Counter Register */
07088 #define UART_TPR_TXPTR(value) ((UART_TPR_TXPTR_Msk & ((value) << UART_TPR_TXPTR_Pos)))
07089 /* -------- UART_TCR : (UART Offset: 0x10C) Transmit Counter Register -------- */
07090 #define UART_TCR_TXCTR_Pos 0
07091 #define UART_TCR_TXCTR_Msk (0xffffu << UART_TCR_TXCTR_Pos) /**< \brief (UART_TCR) Transmit Counter Register */
07092 #define UART_TCR_TXCTR(value) ((UART_TCR_TXCTR_Msk & ((value) << UART_TCR_TXCTR_Pos)))
07093 /* -------- UART_RNPR : (UART Offset: 0x110) Receive Next Pointer Register -------- */
07094 #define UART_RNPR_RXNPTR_Pos 0
07095 #define UART_RNPR_RXNPTR_Msk (0xffffffffu << UART_RNPR_RXNPTR_Pos) /**< \brief (UART_RNPR) Receive Next Pointer */
07096 #define UART_RNPR_RXNPTR(value) ((UART_RNPR_RXNPTR_Msk & ((value) << UART_RNPR_RXNPTR_Pos)))
07097 /* -------- UART_RNCR : (UART Offset: 0x114) Receive Next Counter Register -------- */
07098 #define UART_RNCR_RXNCTR_Pos 0
07099 #define UART_RNCR_RXNCTR_Msk (0xffffu << UART_RNCR_RXNCTR_Pos) /**< \brief (UART_RNCR) Receive Next Counter */
07100 #define UART_RNCR_RXNCTR(value) ((UART_RNCR_RXNCTR_Msk & ((value) << UART_RNCR_RXNCTR_Pos)))
07101 /* -------- UART_TNPR : (UART Offset: 0x118) Transmit Next Pointer Register -------- */
07102 #define UART_TNPR_TXNPTR_Pos 0
07103 #define UART_TNPR_TXNPTR_Msk (0xffffffffu << UART_TNPR_TXNPTR_Pos) /**< \brief (UART_TNPR) Transmit Next Pointer */
07104 #define UART_TNPR_TXNPTR(value) ((UART_TNPR_TXNPTR_Msk & ((value) << UART_TNPR_TXNPTR_Pos)))
07105 /* -------- UART_TNCR : (UART Offset: 0x11C) Transmit Next Counter Register -------- */
07106 #define UART_TNCR_TXNCTR_Pos 0
07107 #define UART_TNCR_TXNCTR_Msk (0xffffu << UART_TNCR_TXNCTR_Pos) /**< \brief (UART_TNCR) Transmit Counter Next */
07108 #define UART_TNCR_TXNCTR(value) ((UART_TNCR_TXNCTR_Msk & ((value) << UART_TNCR_TXNCTR_Pos)))
07109 /* -------- UART_PTCR : (UART Offset: 0x120) Transfer Control Register -------- */
07110 #define UART_PTCR_RXTEN (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (UART_PTCR) Receiver Transfer Enable */
07111 #define UART_PTCR_RXTDIS (0x1u << 1) /**< \brief (UART_PTCR) Receiver Transfer Disable */
07112 #define UART_PTCR_TXTEN (0x1u << 8) /**< \brief (UART_PTCR) Transmitter Transfer Enable */
07113 #define UART_PTCR_TXTDIS (0x1u << 9) /**< \brief (UART_PTCR) Transmitter Transfer Disable */
07114 /* -------- UART_PTSR : (UART Offset: 0x124) Transfer Status Register -------- */
07115 #define UART_PTSR_RXTEN (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (UART_PTSR) Receiver Transfer Enable */
07116 #define UART_PTSR_TXTEN (0x1u << 8) /**< \brief (UART_PTSR) Transmitter Transfer Enable */
07117 
07118 /*@}*/
07119 
07120 /* ============================================================================= */
07121 /**  SOFTWARE API DEFINITION FOR USB On-The-Go Interface */
07122 /* ============================================================================= */
07123 /** \addtogroup SAM3XA_UOTGHS USB On-The-Go Interface */
07124 /*@{*/
07125 
07126 #ifndef __ASSEMBLY__
07127 /** \brief UotghsDevdma hardware registers */
07128 typedef struct {
07129   RwReg         UOTGHS_DEVDMANXTDSC;   /**< \brief (UotghsDevdma Offset: 0x0) Device DMA Channel Next Descriptor Address Register */
07130   RwReg         UOTGHS_DEVDMAADDRESS;  /**< \brief (UotghsDevdma Offset: 0x4) Device DMA Channel Address Register */
07131   RwReg         UOTGHS_DEVDMACONTROL;  /**< \brief (UotghsDevdma Offset: 0x8) Device DMA Channel Control Register */
07132   RwReg         UOTGHS_DEVDMASTATUS;   /**< \brief (UotghsDevdma Offset: 0xC) Device DMA Channel Status Register */
07133 } UotghsDevdma;
07134 /** \brief UotghsHstdma hardware registers */
07135 typedef struct {
07136   RwReg         UOTGHS_HSTDMANXTDSC;   /**< \brief (UotghsHstdma Offset: 0x0) Host DMA Channel Next Descriptor Address Register */
07137   RwReg         UOTGHS_HSTDMAADDRESS;  /**< \brief (UotghsHstdma Offset: 0x4) Host DMA Channel Address Register */
07138   RwReg         UOTGHS_HSTDMACONTROL;  /**< \brief (UotghsHstdma Offset: 0x8) Host DMA Channel Control Register */
07139   RwReg         UOTGHS_HSTDMASTATUS;   /**< \brief (UotghsHstdma Offset: 0xC) Host DMA Channel Status Register */
07140 } UotghsHstdma;
07141 /** \brief Uotghs hardware registers */
07142 #define UOTGHSDEVDMA_NUMBER 7
07143 #define UOTGHSHSTDMA_NUMBER 7
07144 typedef struct {
07145   RwReg         UOTGHS_DEVCTRL;        /**< \brief (Uotghs Offset: 0x0000) Device General Control Register */
07146   RoReg         UOTGHS_DEVISR;         /**< \brief (Uotghs Offset: 0x0004) Device Global Interrupt Status Register */
07147   WoReg         UOTGHS_DEVICR;         /**< \brief (Uotghs Offset: 0x0008) Device Global Interrupt Clear Register */
07148   WoReg         UOTGHS_DEVIFR;         /**< \brief (Uotghs Offset: 0x000C) Device Global Interrupt Set Register */
07149   RoReg         UOTGHS_DEVIMR;         /**< \brief (Uotghs Offset: 0x0010) Device Global Interrupt Mask Register */
07150   WoReg         UOTGHS_DEVIDR;         /**< \brief (Uotghs Offset: 0x0014) Device Global Interrupt Disable Register */
07151   WoReg         UOTGHS_DEVIER;         /**< \brief (Uotghs Offset: 0x0018) Device Global Interrupt Enable Register */
07152   RwReg         UOTGHS_DEVEPT;         /**< \brief (Uotghs Offset: 0x001C) Device Endpoint Register */
07153   RoReg         UOTGHS_DEVFNUM;        /**< \brief (Uotghs Offset: 0x0020) Device Frame Number Register */
07154   RoReg         Reserved1[55];
07155   RwReg         UOTGHS_DEVEPTCFG[10];  /**< \brief (Uotghs Offset: 0x100) Device Endpoint Configuration Register (n = 0) */
07156   RoReg         Reserved2[2];
07157   RoReg         UOTGHS_DEVEPTISR[10];  /**< \brief (Uotghs Offset: 0x130) Device Endpoint Status Register (n = 0) */
07158   RoReg         Reserved3[2];
07159   WoReg         UOTGHS_DEVEPTICR[10];  /**< \brief (Uotghs Offset: 0x160) Device Endpoint Clear Register (n = 0) */
07160   RoReg         Reserved4[2];
07161   WoReg         UOTGHS_DEVEPTIFR[10];  /**< \brief (Uotghs Offset: 0x190) Device Endpoint Set Register (n = 0) */
07162   RoReg         Reserved5[2];
07163   RoReg         UOTGHS_DEVEPTIMR[10];  /**< \brief (Uotghs Offset: 0x1C0) Device Endpoint Mask Register (n = 0) */
07164   RoReg         Reserved6[2];
07165   WoReg         UOTGHS_DEVEPTIER[10];  /**< \brief (Uotghs Offset: 0x1F0) Device Endpoint Enable Register (n = 0) */
07166   RoReg         Reserved7[2];
07167   WoReg         UOTGHS_DEVEPTIDR[10];  /**< \brief (Uotghs Offset: 0x220) Device Endpoint Disable Register (n = 0) */
07168   RoReg         Reserved8[50];
07169   UotghsDevdma  UOTGHS_DEVDMA[UOTGHSDEVDMA_NUMBER]; /**< \brief (Uotghs Offset: 0x310) n = 1 .. 7 */
07170   RoReg         Reserved9[32];
07171   RwReg         UOTGHS_HSTCTRL;        /**< \brief (Uotghs Offset: 0x0400) Host General Control Register */
07172   RoReg         UOTGHS_HSTISR;         /**< \brief (Uotghs Offset: 0x0404) Host Global Interrupt Status Register */
07173   WoReg         UOTGHS_HSTICR;         /**< \brief (Uotghs Offset: 0x0408) Host Global Interrupt Clear Register */
07174   WoReg         UOTGHS_HSTIFR;         /**< \brief (Uotghs Offset: 0x040C) Host Global Interrupt Set Register */
07175   RoReg         UOTGHS_HSTIMR;         /**< \brief (Uotghs Offset: 0x0410) Host Global Interrupt Mask Register */
07176   WoReg         UOTGHS_HSTIDR;         /**< \brief (Uotghs Offset: 0x0414) Host Global Interrupt Disable Register */
07177   WoReg         UOTGHS_HSTIER;         /**< \brief (Uotghs Offset: 0x0418) Host Global Interrupt Enable Register */
07178   RwReg         UOTGHS_HSTPIP;         /**< \brief (Uotghs Offset: 0x0041C) Host Pipe Register */
07179   RwReg         UOTGHS_HSTFNUM;        /**< \brief (Uotghs Offset: 0x0420) Host Frame Number Register */
07180   RwReg         UOTGHS_HSTADDR1;       /**< \brief (Uotghs Offset: 0x0424) Host Address 1 Register */
07181   RwReg         UOTGHS_HSTADDR2;       /**< \brief (Uotghs Offset: 0x0428) Host Address 2 Register */
07182   RwReg         UOTGHS_HSTADDR3;       /**< \brief (Uotghs Offset: 0x042C) Host Address 3 Register */
07183   RoReg         Reserved10[52];
07184   RwReg         UOTGHS_HSTPIPCFG[10];  /**< \brief (Uotghs Offset: 0x500) Host Pipe Configuration Register (n = 0) */
07185   RoReg         Reserved11[2];
07186   RoReg         UOTGHS_HSTPIPISR[10];  /**< \brief (Uotghs Offset: 0x530) Host Pipe Status Register (n = 0) */
07187   RoReg         Reserved12[2];
07188   WoReg         UOTGHS_HSTPIPICR[10];  /**< \brief (Uotghs Offset: 0x560) Host Pipe Clear Register (n = 0) */
07189   RoReg         Reserved13[2];
07190   WoReg         UOTGHS_HSTPIPIFR[10];  /**< \brief (Uotghs Offset: 0x590) Host Pipe Set Register (n = 0) */
07191   RoReg         Reserved14[2];
07192   RoReg         UOTGHS_HSTPIPIMR[10];  /**< \brief (Uotghs Offset: 0x5C0) Host Pipe Mask Register (n = 0) */
07193   RoReg         Reserved15[2];
07194   WoReg         UOTGHS_HSTPIPIER[10];  /**< \brief (Uotghs Offset: 0x5F0) Host Pipe Enable Register (n = 0) */
07195   RoReg         Reserved16[2];
07196   WoReg         UOTGHS_HSTPIPIDR[10];  /**< \brief (Uotghs Offset: 0x620) Host Pipe Disable Register (n = 0) */
07197   RoReg         Reserved17[2];
07198   RwReg         UOTGHS_HSTPIPINRQ[10]; /**< \brief (Uotghs Offset: 0x650) Host Pipe IN Request Register (n = 0) */
07199   RoReg         Reserved18[2];
07200   RwReg         UOTGHS_HSTPIPERR[10];  /**< \brief (Uotghs Offset: 0x680) Host Pipe Error Register (n = 0) */
07201   RoReg         Reserved19[26];
07202   UotghsHstdma  UOTGHS_HSTDMA[UOTGHSHSTDMA_NUMBER]; /**< \brief (Uotghs Offset: 0x710) n = 1 .. 7 */
07203   RoReg         Reserved20[32];
07204   RwReg         UOTGHS_CTRL;           /**< \brief (Uotghs Offset: 0x0800) General Control Register */
07205   RoReg         UOTGHS_SR;             /**< \brief (Uotghs Offset: 0x0804) General Status Register */
07206   WoReg         UOTGHS_SCR;            /**< \brief (Uotghs Offset: 0x0808) General Status Clear Register */
07207   WoReg         UOTGHS_SFR;            /**< \brief (Uotghs Offset: 0x080C) General Status Set Register */
07208   RoReg         Reserved21[7];
07209   RoReg         UOTGHS_FSM;            /**< \brief (Uotghs Offset: 0x082C) General Finite State Machine Register */
07210 } Uotghs;
07211 #endif /* __ASSEMBLY__ */
07212 /* -------- UOTGHS_DEVCTRL : (UOTGHS Offset: 0x0000) Device General Control Register -------- */
07213 #define UOTGHS_DEVCTRL_UADD_Pos 0
07214 #define UOTGHS_DEVCTRL_UADD_Msk (0x7fu << UOTGHS_DEVCTRL_UADD_Pos) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVCTRL) USB Address */
07215 #define UOTGHS_DEVCTRL_UADD(value) ((UOTGHS_DEVCTRL_UADD_Msk & ((value) << UOTGHS_DEVCTRL_UADD_Pos)))
07216 #define UOTGHS_DEVCTRL_ADDEN (0x1u << 7) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVCTRL) Address Enable */
07217 #define UOTGHS_DEVCTRL_DETACH (0x1u << 8) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVCTRL) Detach */
07218 #define UOTGHS_DEVCTRL_RMWKUP (0x1u << 9) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVCTRL) Remote Wake-Up */
07219 #define UOTGHS_DEVCTRL_SPDCONF_Pos 10
07220 #define UOTGHS_DEVCTRL_SPDCONF_Msk (0x3u << UOTGHS_DEVCTRL_SPDCONF_Pos) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVCTRL) Mode Configuration */
07221 #define   UOTGHS_DEVCTRL_SPDCONF_NORMAL (0x0u << 10) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVCTRL) The peripheral starts in full-speed mode and performs a high-speed reset to switch to the high-speed mode if the host is high-speed capable. */
07222 #define   UOTGHS_DEVCTRL_SPDCONF_LOW_POWER (0x1u << 10) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVCTRL) For a better consumption, if high-speed is not needed. */
07223 #define   UOTGHS_DEVCTRL_SPDCONF_HIGH_SPEED (0x2u << 10) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVCTRL) Forced high speed. */
07224 #define   UOTGHS_DEVCTRL_SPDCONF_FORCED_FS (0x3u << 10) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVCTRL) The peripheral remains in full-speed mode whatever the host speed capability. */
07225 #define UOTGHS_DEVCTRL_LS (0x1u << 12) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVCTRL) Low-Speed Mode Force */
07226 #define UOTGHS_DEVCTRL_TSTJ (0x1u << 13) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVCTRL) Test mode J */
07227 #define UOTGHS_DEVCTRL_TSTK (0x1u << 14) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVCTRL) Test mode K */
07228 #define UOTGHS_DEVCTRL_TSTPCKT (0x1u << 15) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVCTRL) Test packet mode */
07229 #define UOTGHS_DEVCTRL_OPMODE2 (0x1u << 16) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVCTRL) Specific Operational mode */
07230 /* -------- UOTGHS_DEVISR : (UOTGHS Offset: 0x0004) Device Global Interrupt Status Register -------- */
07231 #define UOTGHS_DEVISR_SUSP (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVISR) Suspend Interrupt */
07232 #define UOTGHS_DEVISR_MSOF (0x1u << 1) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVISR) Micro Start of Frame Interrupt */
07233 #define UOTGHS_DEVISR_SOF (0x1u << 2) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVISR) Start of Frame Interrupt */
07234 #define UOTGHS_DEVISR_EORST (0x1u << 3) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVISR) End of Reset Interrupt */
07235 #define UOTGHS_DEVISR_WAKEUP (0x1u << 4) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVISR) Wake-Up Interrupt */
07236 #define UOTGHS_DEVISR_EORSM (0x1u << 5) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVISR) End of Resume Interrupt */
07237 #define UOTGHS_DEVISR_UPRSM (0x1u << 6) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVISR) Upstream Resume Interrupt */
07238 #define UOTGHS_DEVISR_PEP_0 (0x1u << 12) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVISR) Endpoint 0 Interrupt */
07239 #define UOTGHS_DEVISR_PEP_1 (0x1u << 13) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVISR) Endpoint 1 Interrupt */
07240 #define UOTGHS_DEVISR_PEP_2 (0x1u << 14) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVISR) Endpoint 2 Interrupt */
07241 #define UOTGHS_DEVISR_PEP_3 (0x1u << 15) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVISR) Endpoint 3 Interrupt */
07242 #define UOTGHS_DEVISR_PEP_4 (0x1u << 16) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVISR) Endpoint 4 Interrupt */
07243 #define UOTGHS_DEVISR_PEP_5 (0x1u << 17) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVISR) Endpoint 5 Interrupt */
07244 #define UOTGHS_DEVISR_PEP_6 (0x1u << 18) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVISR) Endpoint 6 Interrupt */
07245 #define UOTGHS_DEVISR_PEP_7 (0x1u << 19) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVISR) Endpoint 7 Interrupt */
07246 #define UOTGHS_DEVISR_PEP_8 (0x1u << 20) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVISR) Endpoint 8 Interrupt */
07247 #define UOTGHS_DEVISR_PEP_9 (0x1u << 21) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVISR) Endpoint 9 Interrupt */
07248 #define UOTGHS_DEVISR_DMA_1 (0x1u << 25) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVISR) DMA Channel 1 Interrupt */
07249 #define UOTGHS_DEVISR_DMA_2 (0x1u << 26) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVISR) DMA Channel 2 Interrupt */
07250 #define UOTGHS_DEVISR_DMA_3 (0x1u << 27) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVISR) DMA Channel 3 Interrupt */
07251 #define UOTGHS_DEVISR_DMA_4 (0x1u << 28) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVISR) DMA Channel 4 Interrupt */
07252 #define UOTGHS_DEVISR_DMA_5 (0x1u << 29) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVISR) DMA Channel 5 Interrupt */
07253 #define UOTGHS_DEVISR_DMA_6 (0x1u << 30) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVISR) DMA Channel 6 Interrupt */
07254 /* -------- UOTGHS_DEVICR : (UOTGHS Offset: 0x0008) Device Global Interrupt Clear Register -------- */
07255 #define UOTGHS_DEVICR_SUSPC (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVICR) Suspend Interrupt Clear */
07256 #define UOTGHS_DEVICR_MSOFC (0x1u << 1) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVICR) Micro Start of Frame Interrupt Clear */
07257 #define UOTGHS_DEVICR_SOFC (0x1u << 2) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVICR) Start of Frame Interrupt Clear */
07258 #define UOTGHS_DEVICR_EORSTC (0x1u << 3) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVICR) End of Reset Interrupt Clear */
07259 #define UOTGHS_DEVICR_WAKEUPC (0x1u << 4) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVICR) Wake-Up Interrupt Clear */
07260 #define UOTGHS_DEVICR_EORSMC (0x1u << 5) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVICR) End of Resume Interrupt Clear */
07261 #define UOTGHS_DEVICR_UPRSMC (0x1u << 6) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVICR) Upstream Resume Interrupt Clear */
07262 /* -------- UOTGHS_DEVIFR : (UOTGHS Offset: 0x000C) Device Global Interrupt Set Register -------- */
07263 #define UOTGHS_DEVIFR_SUSPS (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVIFR) Suspend Interrupt Set */
07264 #define UOTGHS_DEVIFR_MSOFS (0x1u << 1) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVIFR) Micro Start of Frame Interrupt Set */
07265 #define UOTGHS_DEVIFR_SOFS (0x1u << 2) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVIFR) Start of Frame Interrupt Set */
07266 #define UOTGHS_DEVIFR_EORSTS (0x1u << 3) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVIFR) End of Reset Interrupt Set */
07267 #define UOTGHS_DEVIFR_WAKEUPS (0x1u << 4) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVIFR) Wake-Up Interrupt Set */
07268 #define UOTGHS_DEVIFR_EORSMS (0x1u << 5) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVIFR) End of Resume Interrupt Set */
07269 #define UOTGHS_DEVIFR_UPRSMS (0x1u << 6) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVIFR) Upstream Resume Interrupt Set */
07270 #define UOTGHS_DEVIFR_DMA_1 (0x1u << 25) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVIFR) DMA Channel 1 Interrupt Set */
07271 #define UOTGHS_DEVIFR_DMA_2 (0x1u << 26) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVIFR) DMA Channel 2 Interrupt Set */
07272 #define UOTGHS_DEVIFR_DMA_3 (0x1u << 27) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVIFR) DMA Channel 3 Interrupt Set */
07273 #define UOTGHS_DEVIFR_DMA_4 (0x1u << 28) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVIFR) DMA Channel 4 Interrupt Set */
07274 #define UOTGHS_DEVIFR_DMA_5 (0x1u << 29) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVIFR) DMA Channel 5 Interrupt Set */
07275 #define UOTGHS_DEVIFR_DMA_6 (0x1u << 30) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVIFR) DMA Channel 6 Interrupt Set */
07276 /* -------- UOTGHS_DEVIMR : (UOTGHS Offset: 0x0010) Device Global Interrupt Mask Register -------- */
07277 #define UOTGHS_DEVIMR_SUSPE (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVIMR) Suspend Interrupt Mask */
07278 #define UOTGHS_DEVIMR_MSOFE (0x1u << 1) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVIMR) Micro Start of Frame Interrupt Mask */
07279 #define UOTGHS_DEVIMR_SOFE (0x1u << 2) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVIMR) Start of Frame Interrupt Mask */
07280 #define UOTGHS_DEVIMR_EORSTE (0x1u << 3) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVIMR) End of Reset Interrupt Mask */
07281 #define UOTGHS_DEVIMR_WAKEUPE (0x1u << 4) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVIMR) Wake-Up Interrupt Mask */
07282 #define UOTGHS_DEVIMR_EORSME (0x1u << 5) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVIMR) End of Resume Interrupt Mask */
07283 #define UOTGHS_DEVIMR_UPRSME (0x1u << 6) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVIMR) Upstream Resume Interrupt Mask */
07284 #define UOTGHS_DEVIMR_PEP_0 (0x1u << 12) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVIMR) Endpoint 0 Interrupt Mask */
07285 #define UOTGHS_DEVIMR_PEP_1 (0x1u << 13) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVIMR) Endpoint 1 Interrupt Mask */
07286 #define UOTGHS_DEVIMR_PEP_2 (0x1u << 14) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVIMR) Endpoint 2 Interrupt Mask */
07287 #define UOTGHS_DEVIMR_PEP_3 (0x1u << 15) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVIMR) Endpoint 3 Interrupt Mask */
07288 #define UOTGHS_DEVIMR_PEP_4 (0x1u << 16) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVIMR) Endpoint 4 Interrupt Mask */
07289 #define UOTGHS_DEVIMR_PEP_5 (0x1u << 17) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVIMR) Endpoint 5 Interrupt Mask */
07290 #define UOTGHS_DEVIMR_PEP_6 (0x1u << 18) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVIMR) Endpoint 6 Interrupt Mask */
07291 #define UOTGHS_DEVIMR_PEP_7 (0x1u << 19) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVIMR) Endpoint 7 Interrupt Mask */
07292 #define UOTGHS_DEVIMR_PEP_8 (0x1u << 20) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVIMR) Endpoint 8 Interrupt Mask */
07293 #define UOTGHS_DEVIMR_PEP_9 (0x1u << 21) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVIMR) Endpoint 9 Interrupt Mask */
07294 #define UOTGHS_DEVIMR_DMA_1 (0x1u << 25) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVIMR) DMA Channel 1 Interrupt Mask */
07295 #define UOTGHS_DEVIMR_DMA_2 (0x1u << 26) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVIMR) DMA Channel 2 Interrupt Mask */
07296 #define UOTGHS_DEVIMR_DMA_3 (0x1u << 27) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVIMR) DMA Channel 3 Interrupt Mask */
07297 #define UOTGHS_DEVIMR_DMA_4 (0x1u << 28) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVIMR) DMA Channel 4 Interrupt Mask */
07298 #define UOTGHS_DEVIMR_DMA_5 (0x1u << 29) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVIMR) DMA Channel 5 Interrupt Mask */
07299 #define UOTGHS_DEVIMR_DMA_6 (0x1u << 30) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVIMR) DMA Channel 6 Interrupt Mask */
07300 /* -------- UOTGHS_DEVIDR : (UOTGHS Offset: 0x0014) Device Global Interrupt Disable Register -------- */
07301 #define UOTGHS_DEVIDR_SUSPEC (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVIDR) Suspend Interrupt Disable */
07302 #define UOTGHS_DEVIDR_MSOFEC (0x1u << 1) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVIDR) Micro Start of Frame Interrupt Disable */
07303 #define UOTGHS_DEVIDR_SOFEC (0x1u << 2) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVIDR) Start of Frame Interrupt Disable */
07304 #define UOTGHS_DEVIDR_EORSTEC (0x1u << 3) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVIDR) End of Reset Interrupt Disable */
07305 #define UOTGHS_DEVIDR_WAKEUPEC (0x1u << 4) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVIDR) Wake-Up Interrupt Disable */
07306 #define UOTGHS_DEVIDR_EORSMEC (0x1u << 5) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVIDR) End of Resume Interrupt Disable */
07307 #define UOTGHS_DEVIDR_UPRSMEC (0x1u << 6) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVIDR) Upstream Resume Interrupt Disable */
07308 #define UOTGHS_DEVIDR_PEP_0 (0x1u << 12) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVIDR) Endpoint 0 Interrupt Disable */
07309 #define UOTGHS_DEVIDR_PEP_1 (0x1u << 13) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVIDR) Endpoint 1 Interrupt Disable */
07310 #define UOTGHS_DEVIDR_PEP_2 (0x1u << 14) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVIDR) Endpoint 2 Interrupt Disable */
07311 #define UOTGHS_DEVIDR_PEP_3 (0x1u << 15) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVIDR) Endpoint 3 Interrupt Disable */
07312 #define UOTGHS_DEVIDR_PEP_4 (0x1u << 16) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVIDR) Endpoint 4 Interrupt Disable */
07313 #define UOTGHS_DEVIDR_PEP_5 (0x1u << 17) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVIDR) Endpoint 5 Interrupt Disable */
07314 #define UOTGHS_DEVIDR_PEP_6 (0x1u << 18) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVIDR) Endpoint 6 Interrupt Disable */
07315 #define UOTGHS_DEVIDR_PEP_7 (0x1u << 19) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVIDR) Endpoint 7 Interrupt Disable */
07316 #define UOTGHS_DEVIDR_PEP_8 (0x1u << 20) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVIDR) Endpoint 8 Interrupt Disable */
07317 #define UOTGHS_DEVIDR_PEP_9 (0x1u << 21) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVIDR) Endpoint 9 Interrupt Disable */
07318 #define UOTGHS_DEVIDR_DMA_1 (0x1u << 25) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVIDR) DMA Channel 1 Interrupt Disable */
07319 #define UOTGHS_DEVIDR_DMA_2 (0x1u << 26) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVIDR) DMA Channel 2 Interrupt Disable */
07320 #define UOTGHS_DEVIDR_DMA_3 (0x1u << 27) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVIDR) DMA Channel 3 Interrupt Disable */
07321 #define UOTGHS_DEVIDR_DMA_4 (0x1u << 28) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVIDR) DMA Channel 4 Interrupt Disable */
07322 #define UOTGHS_DEVIDR_DMA_5 (0x1u << 29) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVIDR) DMA Channel 5 Interrupt Disable */
07323 #define UOTGHS_DEVIDR_DMA_6 (0x1u << 30) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVIDR) DMA Channel 6 Interrupt Disable */
07324 /* -------- UOTGHS_DEVIER : (UOTGHS Offset: 0x0018) Device Global Interrupt Enable Register -------- */
07325 #define UOTGHS_DEVIER_SUSPES (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVIER) Suspend Interrupt Enable */
07326 #define UOTGHS_DEVIER_MSOFES (0x1u << 1) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVIER) Micro Start of Frame Interrupt Enable */
07327 #define UOTGHS_DEVIER_SOFES (0x1u << 2) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVIER) Start of Frame Interrupt Enable */
07328 #define UOTGHS_DEVIER_EORSTES (0x1u << 3) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVIER) End of Reset Interrupt Enable */
07329 #define UOTGHS_DEVIER_WAKEUPES (0x1u << 4) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVIER) Wake-Up Interrupt Enable */
07330 #define UOTGHS_DEVIER_EORSMES (0x1u << 5) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVIER) End of Resume Interrupt Enable */
07331 #define UOTGHS_DEVIER_UPRSMES (0x1u << 6) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVIER) Upstream Resume Interrupt Enable */
07332 #define UOTGHS_DEVIER_PEP_0 (0x1u << 12) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVIER) Endpoint 0 Interrupt Enable */
07333 #define UOTGHS_DEVIER_PEP_1 (0x1u << 13) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVIER) Endpoint 1 Interrupt Enable */
07334 #define UOTGHS_DEVIER_PEP_2 (0x1u << 14) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVIER) Endpoint 2 Interrupt Enable */
07335 #define UOTGHS_DEVIER_PEP_3 (0x1u << 15) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVIER) Endpoint 3 Interrupt Enable */
07336 #define UOTGHS_DEVIER_PEP_4 (0x1u << 16) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVIER) Endpoint 4 Interrupt Enable */
07337 #define UOTGHS_DEVIER_PEP_5 (0x1u << 17) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVIER) Endpoint 5 Interrupt Enable */
07338 #define UOTGHS_DEVIER_PEP_6 (0x1u << 18) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVIER) Endpoint 6 Interrupt Enable */
07339 #define UOTGHS_DEVIER_PEP_7 (0x1u << 19) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVIER) Endpoint 7 Interrupt Enable */
07340 #define UOTGHS_DEVIER_PEP_8 (0x1u << 20) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVIER) Endpoint 8 Interrupt Enable */
07341 #define UOTGHS_DEVIER_PEP_9 (0x1u << 21) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVIER) Endpoint 9 Interrupt Enable */
07342 #define UOTGHS_DEVIER_DMA_1 (0x1u << 25) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVIER) DMA Channel 1 Interrupt Enable */
07343 #define UOTGHS_DEVIER_DMA_2 (0x1u << 26) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVIER) DMA Channel 2 Interrupt Enable */
07344 #define UOTGHS_DEVIER_DMA_3 (0x1u << 27) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVIER) DMA Channel 3 Interrupt Enable */
07345 #define UOTGHS_DEVIER_DMA_4 (0x1u << 28) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVIER) DMA Channel 4 Interrupt Enable */
07346 #define UOTGHS_DEVIER_DMA_5 (0x1u << 29) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVIER) DMA Channel 5 Interrupt Enable */
07347 #define UOTGHS_DEVIER_DMA_6 (0x1u << 30) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVIER) DMA Channel 6 Interrupt Enable */
07348 /* -------- UOTGHS_DEVEPT : (UOTGHS Offset: 0x001C) Device Endpoint Register -------- */
07349 #define UOTGHS_DEVEPT_EPEN0 (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVEPT) Endpoint 0 Enable */
07350 #define UOTGHS_DEVEPT_EPEN1 (0x1u << 1) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVEPT) Endpoint 1 Enable */
07351 #define UOTGHS_DEVEPT_EPEN2 (0x1u << 2) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVEPT) Endpoint 2 Enable */
07352 #define UOTGHS_DEVEPT_EPEN3 (0x1u << 3) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVEPT) Endpoint 3 Enable */
07353 #define UOTGHS_DEVEPT_EPEN4 (0x1u << 4) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVEPT) Endpoint 4 Enable */
07354 #define UOTGHS_DEVEPT_EPEN5 (0x1u << 5) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVEPT) Endpoint 5 Enable */
07355 #define UOTGHS_DEVEPT_EPEN6 (0x1u << 6) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVEPT) Endpoint 6 Enable */
07356 #define UOTGHS_DEVEPT_EPEN7 (0x1u << 7) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVEPT) Endpoint 7 Enable */
07357 #define UOTGHS_DEVEPT_EPEN8 (0x1u << 8) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVEPT) Endpoint 8 Enable */
07358 #define UOTGHS_DEVEPT_EPRST0 (0x1u << 16) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVEPT) Endpoint 0 Reset */
07359 #define UOTGHS_DEVEPT_EPRST1 (0x1u << 17) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVEPT) Endpoint 1 Reset */
07360 #define UOTGHS_DEVEPT_EPRST2 (0x1u << 18) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVEPT) Endpoint 2 Reset */
07361 #define UOTGHS_DEVEPT_EPRST3 (0x1u << 19) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVEPT) Endpoint 3 Reset */
07362 #define UOTGHS_DEVEPT_EPRST4 (0x1u << 20) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVEPT) Endpoint 4 Reset */
07363 #define UOTGHS_DEVEPT_EPRST5 (0x1u << 21) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVEPT) Endpoint 5 Reset */
07364 #define UOTGHS_DEVEPT_EPRST6 (0x1u << 22) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVEPT) Endpoint 6 Reset */
07365 #define UOTGHS_DEVEPT_EPRST7 (0x1u << 23) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVEPT) Endpoint 7 Reset */
07366 #define UOTGHS_DEVEPT_EPRST8 (0x1u << 24) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVEPT) Endpoint 8 Reset */
07367 /* -------- UOTGHS_DEVFNUM : (UOTGHS Offset: 0x0020) Device Frame Number Register -------- */
07368 #define UOTGHS_DEVFNUM_MFNUM_Pos 0
07369 #define UOTGHS_DEVFNUM_MFNUM_Msk (0x7u << UOTGHS_DEVFNUM_MFNUM_Pos) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVFNUM) Micro Frame Number */
07370 #define UOTGHS_DEVFNUM_FNUM_Pos 3
07371 #define UOTGHS_DEVFNUM_FNUM_Msk (0x7ffu << UOTGHS_DEVFNUM_FNUM_Pos) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVFNUM) Frame Number */
07372 #define UOTGHS_DEVFNUM_FNCERR (0x1u << 15) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVFNUM) Frame Number CRC Error */
07373 /* -------- UOTGHS_DEVEPTCFG[10] : (UOTGHS Offset: 0x100) Device Endpoint Configuration Register (n = 0) -------- */
07374 #define UOTGHS_DEVEPTCFG_ALLOC (0x1u << 1) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVEPTCFG[10]) Endpoint Memory Allocate */
07375 #define UOTGHS_DEVEPTCFG_EPBK_Pos 2
07376 #define UOTGHS_DEVEPTCFG_EPBK_Msk (0x3u << UOTGHS_DEVEPTCFG_EPBK_Pos) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVEPTCFG[10]) Endpoint Banks */
07377 #define   UOTGHS_DEVEPTCFG_EPBK_1_BANK (0x0u << 2) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVEPTCFG[10]) Single-bank endpoint */
07378 #define   UOTGHS_DEVEPTCFG_EPBK_2_BANK (0x1u << 2) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVEPTCFG[10]) Double-bank endpoint */
07379 #define   UOTGHS_DEVEPTCFG_EPBK_3_BANK (0x2u << 2) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVEPTCFG[10]) Triple-bank endpoint */
07380 #define UOTGHS_DEVEPTCFG_EPSIZE_Pos 4
07381 #define UOTGHS_DEVEPTCFG_EPSIZE_Msk (0x7u << UOTGHS_DEVEPTCFG_EPSIZE_Pos) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVEPTCFG[10]) Endpoint Size */
07382 #define   UOTGHS_DEVEPTCFG_EPSIZE_8_BYTE (0x0u << 4) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVEPTCFG[10]) 8 bytes */
07383 #define   UOTGHS_DEVEPTCFG_EPSIZE_16_BYTE (0x1u << 4) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVEPTCFG[10]) 16 bytes */
07384 #define   UOTGHS_DEVEPTCFG_EPSIZE_32_BYTE (0x2u << 4) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVEPTCFG[10]) 32 bytes */
07385 #define   UOTGHS_DEVEPTCFG_EPSIZE_64_BYTE (0x3u << 4) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVEPTCFG[10]) 64 bytes */
07386 #define   UOTGHS_DEVEPTCFG_EPSIZE_128_BYTE (0x4u << 4) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVEPTCFG[10]) 128 bytes */
07387 #define   UOTGHS_DEVEPTCFG_EPSIZE_256_BYTE (0x5u << 4) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVEPTCFG[10]) 256 bytes */
07388 #define   UOTGHS_DEVEPTCFG_EPSIZE_512_BYTE (0x6u << 4) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVEPTCFG[10]) 512 bytes */
07389 #define   UOTGHS_DEVEPTCFG_EPSIZE_1024_BYTE (0x7u << 4) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVEPTCFG[10]) 1024 bytes */
07390 #define UOTGHS_DEVEPTCFG_EPDIR (0x1u << 8) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVEPTCFG[10]) Endpoint Direction */
07391 #define   UOTGHS_DEVEPTCFG_EPDIR_OUT (0x0u << 8) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVEPTCFG[10]) The endpoint direction is OUT. */
07392 #define   UOTGHS_DEVEPTCFG_EPDIR_IN (0x1u << 8) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVEPTCFG[10]) The endpoint direction is IN (nor for control endpoints). */
07393 #define UOTGHS_DEVEPTCFG_AUTOSW (0x1u << 9) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVEPTCFG[10]) Automatic Switch */
07394 #define UOTGHS_DEVEPTCFG_EPTYPE_Pos 11
07395 #define UOTGHS_DEVEPTCFG_EPTYPE_Msk (0x3u << UOTGHS_DEVEPTCFG_EPTYPE_Pos) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVEPTCFG[10]) Endpoint Type */
07396 #define   UOTGHS_DEVEPTCFG_EPTYPE_CTRL (0x0u << 11) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVEPTCFG[10]) Control */
07397 #define   UOTGHS_DEVEPTCFG_EPTYPE_ISO (0x1u << 11) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVEPTCFG[10]) Isochronous */
07398 #define   UOTGHS_DEVEPTCFG_EPTYPE_BLK (0x2u << 11) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVEPTCFG[10]) Bulk */
07399 #define   UOTGHS_DEVEPTCFG_EPTYPE_INTRPT (0x3u << 11) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVEPTCFG[10]) Interrupt */
07400 #define UOTGHS_DEVEPTCFG_NBTRANS_Pos 13
07401 #define UOTGHS_DEVEPTCFG_NBTRANS_Msk (0x3u << UOTGHS_DEVEPTCFG_NBTRANS_Pos) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVEPTCFG[10]) Number of transaction per microframe for isochronous endpoint */
07402 #define   UOTGHS_DEVEPTCFG_NBTRANS_0_TRANS (0x0u << 13) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVEPTCFG[10]) reserved to endpoint that does not have the high-bandwidth isochronous capability. */
07403 #define   UOTGHS_DEVEPTCFG_NBTRANS_1_TRANS (0x1u << 13) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVEPTCFG[10]) default value: one transaction per micro-frame. */
07404 #define   UOTGHS_DEVEPTCFG_NBTRANS_2_TRANS (0x2u << 13) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVEPTCFG[10]) 2 transactions per micro-frame. This endpoint should be configured as double-bank. */
07405 #define   UOTGHS_DEVEPTCFG_NBTRANS_3_TRANS (0x3u << 13) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVEPTCFG[10]) 3 transactions per micro-frame. This endpoint should be configured as triple-bank. */
07406 /* -------- UOTGHS_DEVEPTISR[10] : (UOTGHS Offset: 0x130) Device Endpoint Status Register (n = 0) -------- */
07407 #define UOTGHS_DEVEPTISR_TXINI (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVEPTISR[10]) Transmitted IN Data Interrupt */
07408 #define UOTGHS_DEVEPTISR_RXOUTI (0x1u << 1) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVEPTISR[10]) Received OUT Data Interrupt */
07409 #define UOTGHS_DEVEPTISR_RXSTPI (0x1u << 2) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVEPTISR[10]) Received SETUP Interrupt */
07410 #define UOTGHS_DEVEPTISR_UNDERFI (0x1u << 2) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVEPTISR[10]) Underflow Interrupt */
07411 #define UOTGHS_DEVEPTISR_NAKOUTI (0x1u << 3) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVEPTISR[10]) NAKed OUT Interrupt */
07412 #define UOTGHS_DEVEPTISR_HBISOINERRI (0x1u << 3) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVEPTISR[10]) High bandwidth isochronous IN Underflow Error Interrupt */
07413 #define UOTGHS_DEVEPTISR_NAKINI (0x1u << 4) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVEPTISR[10]) NAKed IN Interrupt */
07414 #define UOTGHS_DEVEPTISR_HBISOFLUSHI (0x1u << 4) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVEPTISR[10]) High Bandwidth Isochronous IN Flush Interrupt */
07415 #define UOTGHS_DEVEPTISR_OVERFI (0x1u << 5) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVEPTISR[10]) Overflow Interrupt */
07416 #define UOTGHS_DEVEPTISR_STALLEDI (0x1u << 6) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVEPTISR[10]) STALLed Interrupt */
07417 #define UOTGHS_DEVEPTISR_CRCERRI (0x1u << 6) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVEPTISR[10]) CRC Error Interrupt */
07418 #define UOTGHS_DEVEPTISR_SHORTPACKET (0x1u << 7) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVEPTISR[10]) Short Packet Interrupt */
07419 #define UOTGHS_DEVEPTISR_DTSEQ_Pos 8
07420 #define UOTGHS_DEVEPTISR_DTSEQ_Msk (0x3u << UOTGHS_DEVEPTISR_DTSEQ_Pos) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVEPTISR[10]) Data Toggle Sequence */
07421 #define   UOTGHS_DEVEPTISR_DTSEQ_DATA0 (0x0u << 8) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVEPTISR[10]) Data0 toggle sequence */
07422 #define   UOTGHS_DEVEPTISR_DTSEQ_DATA1 (0x1u << 8) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVEPTISR[10]) Data1 toggle sequence */
07423 #define   UOTGHS_DEVEPTISR_DTSEQ_DATA2 (0x2u << 8) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVEPTISR[10]) Data2 toggle sequence (for high-bandwidth isochronous endpoint) */
07424 #define   UOTGHS_DEVEPTISR_DTSEQ_MDATA (0x3u << 8) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVEPTISR[10]) MData toggle sequence (for high-bandwidth isochronous endpoint) */
07425 #define UOTGHS_DEVEPTISR_ERRORTRANS (0x1u << 10) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVEPTISR[10]) High-bandwidth isochronous OUT endpoint transaction error Interrupt */
07426 #define UOTGHS_DEVEPTISR_NBUSYBK_Pos 12
07427 #define UOTGHS_DEVEPTISR_NBUSYBK_Msk (0x3u << UOTGHS_DEVEPTISR_NBUSYBK_Pos) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVEPTISR[10]) Number of Busy Banks */
07428 #define   UOTGHS_DEVEPTISR_NBUSYBK_0_BUSY (0x0u << 12) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVEPTISR[10]) 0 busy bank (all banks free) */
07429 #define   UOTGHS_DEVEPTISR_NBUSYBK_1_BUSY (0x1u << 12) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVEPTISR[10]) 1 busy bank */
07430 #define   UOTGHS_DEVEPTISR_NBUSYBK_2_BUSY (0x2u << 12) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVEPTISR[10]) 2 busy banks */
07431 #define   UOTGHS_DEVEPTISR_NBUSYBK_3_BUSY (0x3u << 12) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVEPTISR[10]) 3 busy banks */
07432 #define UOTGHS_DEVEPTISR_CURRBK_Pos 14
07433 #define UOTGHS_DEVEPTISR_CURRBK_Msk (0x3u << UOTGHS_DEVEPTISR_CURRBK_Pos) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVEPTISR[10]) Current Bank */
07434 #define   UOTGHS_DEVEPTISR_CURRBK_BANK0 (0x0u << 14) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVEPTISR[10]) Current bank is bank0 */
07435 #define   UOTGHS_DEVEPTISR_CURRBK_BANK1 (0x1u << 14) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVEPTISR[10]) Current bank is bank1 */
07436 #define   UOTGHS_DEVEPTISR_CURRBK_BANK2 (0x2u << 14) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVEPTISR[10]) Current bank is bank2 */
07437 #define UOTGHS_DEVEPTISR_RWALL (0x1u << 16) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVEPTISR[10]) Read-write Allowed */
07438 #define UOTGHS_DEVEPTISR_CTRLDIR (0x1u << 17) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVEPTISR[10]) Control Direction */
07439 #define UOTGHS_DEVEPTISR_CFGOK (0x1u << 18) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVEPTISR[10]) Configuration OK Status */
07440 #define UOTGHS_DEVEPTISR_BYCT_Pos 20
07441 #define UOTGHS_DEVEPTISR_BYCT_Msk (0x7ffu << UOTGHS_DEVEPTISR_BYCT_Pos) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVEPTISR[10]) Byte Count */
07442 /* -------- UOTGHS_DEVEPTICR[10] : (UOTGHS Offset: 0x160) Device Endpoint Clear Register (n = 0) -------- */
07443 #define UOTGHS_DEVEPTICR_TXINIC (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVEPTICR[10]) Transmitted IN Data Interrupt Clear */
07444 #define UOTGHS_DEVEPTICR_RXOUTIC (0x1u << 1) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVEPTICR[10]) Received OUT Data Interrupt Clear */
07445 #define UOTGHS_DEVEPTICR_RXSTPIC (0x1u << 2) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVEPTICR[10]) Received SETUP Interrupt Clear */
07446 #define UOTGHS_DEVEPTICR_UNDERFIC (0x1u << 2) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVEPTICR[10]) Underflow Interrupt Clear */
07447 #define UOTGHS_DEVEPTICR_NAKOUTIC (0x1u << 3) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVEPTICR[10]) NAKed OUT Interrupt Clear */
07448 #define UOTGHS_DEVEPTICR_HBISOINERRIC (0x1u << 3) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVEPTICR[10]) High bandwidth isochronous IN Underflow Error Interrupt Clear */
07449 #define UOTGHS_DEVEPTICR_NAKINIC (0x1u << 4) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVEPTICR[10]) NAKed IN Interrupt Clear */
07450 #define UOTGHS_DEVEPTICR_HBISOFLUSHIC (0x1u << 4) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVEPTICR[10]) High Bandwidth Isochronous IN Flush Interrupt Clear */
07451 #define UOTGHS_DEVEPTICR_OVERFIC (0x1u << 5) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVEPTICR[10]) Overflow Interrupt Clear */
07452 #define UOTGHS_DEVEPTICR_STALLEDIC (0x1u << 6) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVEPTICR[10]) STALLed Interrupt Clear */
07453 #define UOTGHS_DEVEPTICR_CRCERRIC (0x1u << 6) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVEPTICR[10]) CRC Error Interrupt Clear */
07454 #define UOTGHS_DEVEPTICR_SHORTPACKETC (0x1u << 7) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVEPTICR[10]) Short Packet Interrupt Clear */
07455 /* -------- UOTGHS_DEVEPTIFR[10] : (UOTGHS Offset: 0x190) Device Endpoint Set Register (n = 0) -------- */
07456 #define UOTGHS_DEVEPTIFR_TXINIS (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVEPTIFR[10]) Transmitted IN Data Interrupt Set */
07457 #define UOTGHS_DEVEPTIFR_RXOUTIS (0x1u << 1) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVEPTIFR[10]) Received OUT Data Interrupt Set */
07458 #define UOTGHS_DEVEPTIFR_RXSTPIS (0x1u << 2) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVEPTIFR[10]) Received SETUP Interrupt Set */
07459 #define UOTGHS_DEVEPTIFR_UNDERFIS (0x1u << 2) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVEPTIFR[10]) Underflow Interrupt Set */
07460 #define UOTGHS_DEVEPTIFR_NAKOUTIS (0x1u << 3) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVEPTIFR[10]) NAKed OUT Interrupt Set */
07461 #define UOTGHS_DEVEPTIFR_HBISOINERRIS (0x1u << 3) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVEPTIFR[10]) High bandwidth isochronous IN Underflow Error Interrupt Set */
07462 #define UOTGHS_DEVEPTIFR_NAKINIS (0x1u << 4) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVEPTIFR[10]) NAKed IN Interrupt Set */
07463 #define UOTGHS_DEVEPTIFR_HBISOFLUSHIS (0x1u << 4) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVEPTIFR[10]) High Bandwidth Isochronous IN Flush Interrupt Set */
07464 #define UOTGHS_DEVEPTIFR_OVERFIS (0x1u << 5) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVEPTIFR[10]) Overflow Interrupt Set */
07465 #define UOTGHS_DEVEPTIFR_STALLEDIS (0x1u << 6) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVEPTIFR[10]) STALLed Interrupt Set */
07466 #define UOTGHS_DEVEPTIFR_CRCERRIS (0x1u << 6) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVEPTIFR[10]) CRC Error Interrupt Set */
07467 #define UOTGHS_DEVEPTIFR_SHORTPACKETS (0x1u << 7) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVEPTIFR[10]) Short Packet Interrupt Set */
07468 #define UOTGHS_DEVEPTIFR_NBUSYBKS (0x1u << 12) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVEPTIFR[10]) Number of Busy Banks Interrupt Set */
07469 /* -------- UOTGHS_DEVEPTIMR[10] : (UOTGHS Offset: 0x1C0) Device Endpoint Mask Register (n = 0) -------- */
07470 #define UOTGHS_DEVEPTIMR_TXINE (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVEPTIMR[10]) Transmitted IN Data Interrupt */
07471 #define UOTGHS_DEVEPTIMR_RXOUTE (0x1u << 1) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVEPTIMR[10]) Received OUT Data Interrupt */
07472 #define UOTGHS_DEVEPTIMR_RXSTPE (0x1u << 2) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVEPTIMR[10]) Received SETUP Interrupt */
07473 #define UOTGHS_DEVEPTIMR_UNDERFE (0x1u << 2) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVEPTIMR[10]) Underflow Interrupt */
07474 #define UOTGHS_DEVEPTIMR_NAKOUTE (0x1u << 3) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVEPTIMR[10]) NAKed OUT Interrupt */
07475 #define UOTGHS_DEVEPTIMR_HBISOINERRE (0x1u << 3) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVEPTIMR[10]) High Bandwidth Isochronous IN Error Interrupt */
07476 #define UOTGHS_DEVEPTIMR_NAKINE (0x1u << 4) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVEPTIMR[10]) NAKed IN Interrupt */
07477 #define UOTGHS_DEVEPTIMR_HBISOFLUSHE (0x1u << 4) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVEPTIMR[10]) High Bandwidth Isochronous IN Flush Interrupt */
07478 #define UOTGHS_DEVEPTIMR_OVERFE (0x1u << 5) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVEPTIMR[10]) Overflow Interrupt */
07479 #define UOTGHS_DEVEPTIMR_STALLEDE (0x1u << 6) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVEPTIMR[10]) STALLed Interrupt */
07480 #define UOTGHS_DEVEPTIMR_CRCERRE (0x1u << 6) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVEPTIMR[10]) CRC Error Interrupt */
07481 #define UOTGHS_DEVEPTIMR_SHORTPACKETE (0x1u << 7) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVEPTIMR[10]) Short Packet Interrupt */
07482 #define UOTGHS_DEVEPTIMR_MDATAE (0x1u << 8) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVEPTIMR[10]) MData Interrupt */
07483 #define UOTGHS_DEVEPTIMR_DATAXE (0x1u << 9) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVEPTIMR[10]) DataX Interrupt */
07484 #define UOTGHS_DEVEPTIMR_ERRORTRANSE (0x1u << 10) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVEPTIMR[10]) Transaction Error Interrupt */
07485 #define UOTGHS_DEVEPTIMR_NBUSYBKE (0x1u << 12) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVEPTIMR[10]) Number of Busy Banks Interrupt */
07486 #define UOTGHS_DEVEPTIMR_KILLBK (0x1u << 13) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVEPTIMR[10]) Kill IN Bank */
07487 #define UOTGHS_DEVEPTIMR_FIFOCON (0x1u << 14) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVEPTIMR[10]) FIFO Control */
07488 #define UOTGHS_DEVEPTIMR_EPDISHDMA (0x1u << 16) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVEPTIMR[10]) Endpoint Interrupts Disable HDMA Request */
07489 #define UOTGHS_DEVEPTIMR_NYETDIS (0x1u << 17) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVEPTIMR[10]) NYET Token Disable */
