07490 #define UOTGHS_DEVEPTIMR_RSTDT (0x1u << 18) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVEPTIMR[10]) Reset Data Toggle */
07491 #define UOTGHS_DEVEPTIMR_STALLRQ (0x1u << 19) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVEPTIMR[10]) STALL Request */
07492 /* -------- UOTGHS_DEVEPTIER[10] : (UOTGHS Offset: 0x1F0) Device Endpoint Enable Register (n = 0) -------- */
07493 #define UOTGHS_DEVEPTIER_TXINES (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVEPTIER[10]) Transmitted IN Data Interrupt Enable */
07494 #define UOTGHS_DEVEPTIER_RXOUTES (0x1u << 1) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVEPTIER[10]) Received OUT Data Interrupt Enable */
07495 #define UOTGHS_DEVEPTIER_RXSTPES (0x1u << 2) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVEPTIER[10]) Received SETUP Interrupt Enable */
07496 #define UOTGHS_DEVEPTIER_UNDERFES (0x1u << 2) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVEPTIER[10]) Underflow Interrupt Enable */
07497 #define UOTGHS_DEVEPTIER_NAKOUTES (0x1u << 3) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVEPTIER[10]) NAKed OUT Interrupt Enable */
07498 #define UOTGHS_DEVEPTIER_HBISOINERRES (0x1u << 3) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVEPTIER[10]) High Bandwidth Isochronous IN Error Interrupt Enable */
07499 #define UOTGHS_DEVEPTIER_NAKINES (0x1u << 4) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVEPTIER[10]) NAKed IN Interrupt Enable */
07500 #define UOTGHS_DEVEPTIER_HBISOFLUSHES (0x1u << 4) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVEPTIER[10]) High Bandwidth Isochronous IN Flush Interrupt Enable */
07501 #define UOTGHS_DEVEPTIER_OVERFES (0x1u << 5) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVEPTIER[10]) Overflow Interrupt Enable */
07502 #define UOTGHS_DEVEPTIER_STALLEDES (0x1u << 6) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVEPTIER[10]) STALLed Interrupt Enable */
07503 #define UOTGHS_DEVEPTIER_CRCERRES (0x1u << 6) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVEPTIER[10]) CRC Error Interrupt Enable */
07504 #define UOTGHS_DEVEPTIER_SHORTPACKETES (0x1u << 7) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVEPTIER[10]) Short Packet Interrupt Enable */
07505 #define UOTGHS_DEVEPTIER_MDATAES (0x1u << 8) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVEPTIER[10]) MData Interrupt Enable */
07506 #define UOTGHS_DEVEPTIER_DATAXES (0x1u << 9) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVEPTIER[10]) DataX Interrupt Enable */
07507 #define UOTGHS_DEVEPTIER_ERRORTRANSES (0x1u << 10) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVEPTIER[10]) Transaction Error Interrupt Enable */
07508 #define UOTGHS_DEVEPTIER_NBUSYBKES (0x1u << 12) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVEPTIER[10]) Number of Busy Banks Interrupt Enable */
07509 #define UOTGHS_DEVEPTIER_KILLBKS (0x1u << 13) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVEPTIER[10]) Kill IN Bank */
07510 #define UOTGHS_DEVEPTIER_EPDISHDMAS (0x1u << 16) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVEPTIER[10]) Endpoint Interrupts Disable HDMA Request Enable */
07511 #define UOTGHS_DEVEPTIER_NYETDISS (0x1u << 17) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVEPTIER[10]) NYET Token Disable Enable */
07512 #define UOTGHS_DEVEPTIER_RSTDTS (0x1u << 18) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVEPTIER[10]) Reset Data Toggle Enable */
07513 #define UOTGHS_DEVEPTIER_STALLRQS (0x1u << 19) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVEPTIER[10]) STALL Request Enable */
07514 /* -------- UOTGHS_DEVEPTIDR[10] : (UOTGHS Offset: 0x220) Device Endpoint Disable Register (n = 0) -------- */
07515 #define UOTGHS_DEVEPTIDR_TXINEC (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVEPTIDR[10]) Transmitted IN Interrupt Clear */
07516 #define UOTGHS_DEVEPTIDR_RXOUTEC (0x1u << 1) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVEPTIDR[10]) Received OUT Data Interrupt Clear */
07517 #define UOTGHS_DEVEPTIDR_RXSTPEC (0x1u << 2) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVEPTIDR[10]) Received SETUP Interrupt Clear */
07518 #define UOTGHS_DEVEPTIDR_UNDERFEC (0x1u << 2) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVEPTIDR[10]) Underflow Interrupt Clear */
07519 #define UOTGHS_DEVEPTIDR_NAKOUTEC (0x1u << 3) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVEPTIDR[10]) NAKed OUT Interrupt Clear */
07520 #define UOTGHS_DEVEPTIDR_HBISOINERREC (0x1u << 3) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVEPTIDR[10]) High Bandwidth Isochronous IN Error Interrupt Clear */
07521 #define UOTGHS_DEVEPTIDR_NAKINEC (0x1u << 4) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVEPTIDR[10]) NAKed IN Interrupt Clear */
07522 #define UOTGHS_DEVEPTIDR_HBISOFLUSHEC (0x1u << 4) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVEPTIDR[10]) High Bandwidth Isochronous IN Flush Interrupt Clear */
07523 #define UOTGHS_DEVEPTIDR_OVERFEC (0x1u << 5) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVEPTIDR[10]) Overflow Interrupt Clear */
07524 #define UOTGHS_DEVEPTIDR_STALLEDEC (0x1u << 6) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVEPTIDR[10]) STALLed Interrupt Clear */
07525 #define UOTGHS_DEVEPTIDR_CRCERREC (0x1u << 6) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVEPTIDR[10]) CRC Error Interrupt Clear */
07526 #define UOTGHS_DEVEPTIDR_SHORTPACKETEC (0x1u << 7) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVEPTIDR[10]) Shortpacket Interrupt Clear */
07527 #define UOTGHS_DEVEPTIDR_MDATEC (0x1u << 8) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVEPTIDR[10]) MData Interrupt Clear */
07528 #define UOTGHS_DEVEPTIDR_DATAXEC (0x1u << 9) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVEPTIDR[10]) DataX Interrupt Clear */
07529 #define UOTGHS_DEVEPTIDR_ERRORTRANSEC (0x1u << 10) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVEPTIDR[10]) Transaction Error Interrupt Clear */
07530 #define UOTGHS_DEVEPTIDR_NBUSYBKEC (0x1u << 12) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVEPTIDR[10]) Number of Busy Banks Interrupt Clear */
07531 #define UOTGHS_DEVEPTIDR_FIFOCONC (0x1u << 14) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVEPTIDR[10]) FIFO Control Clear */
07532 #define UOTGHS_DEVEPTIDR_EPDISHDMAC (0x1u << 16) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVEPTIDR[10]) Endpoint Interrupts Disable HDMA Request Clear */
07533 #define UOTGHS_DEVEPTIDR_NYETDISC (0x1u << 17) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVEPTIDR[10]) NYET Token Disable Clear */
07534 #define UOTGHS_DEVEPTIDR_STALLRQC (0x1u << 19) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVEPTIDR[10]) STALL Request Clear */
07535 /* -------- UOTGHS_DEVDMANXTDSC : (UOTGHS Offset: N/A) Device DMA Channel Next Descriptor Address Register -------- */
07536 #define UOTGHS_DEVDMANXTDSC_NXT_DSC_ADD_Pos 0
07537 #define UOTGHS_DEVDMANXTDSC_NXT_DSC_ADD_Msk (0xffffffffu << UOTGHS_DEVDMANXTDSC_NXT_DSC_ADD_Pos) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVDMANXTDSC) Next Descriptor Address */
07538 #define UOTGHS_DEVDMANXTDSC_NXT_DSC_ADD(value) ((UOTGHS_DEVDMANXTDSC_NXT_DSC_ADD_Msk & ((value) << UOTGHS_DEVDMANXTDSC_NXT_DSC_ADD_Pos)))
07539 /* -------- UOTGHS_DEVDMAADDRESS : (UOTGHS Offset: N/A) Device DMA Channel Address Register -------- */
07540 #define UOTGHS_DEVDMAADDRESS_BUFF_ADD_Pos 0
07541 #define UOTGHS_DEVDMAADDRESS_BUFF_ADD_Msk (0xffffffffu << UOTGHS_DEVDMAADDRESS_BUFF_ADD_Pos) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVDMAADDRESS) Buffer Address */
07542 #define UOTGHS_DEVDMAADDRESS_BUFF_ADD(value) ((UOTGHS_DEVDMAADDRESS_BUFF_ADD_Msk & ((value) << UOTGHS_DEVDMAADDRESS_BUFF_ADD_Pos)))
07543 /* -------- UOTGHS_DEVDMACONTROL : (UOTGHS Offset: N/A) Device DMA Channel Control Register -------- */
07544 #define UOTGHS_DEVDMACONTROL_CHANN_ENB (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVDMACONTROL) Channel Enable Command */
07545 #define UOTGHS_DEVDMACONTROL_LDNXT_DSC (0x1u << 1) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVDMACONTROL) Load Next Channel Transfer Descriptor Enable Command */
07546 #define UOTGHS_DEVDMACONTROL_END_TR_EN (0x1u << 2) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVDMACONTROL) End of Transfer Enable Control */
07547 #define UOTGHS_DEVDMACONTROL_END_B_EN (0x1u << 3) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVDMACONTROL) End of Buffer Enable Control */
07548 #define UOTGHS_DEVDMACONTROL_END_TR_IT (0x1u << 4) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVDMACONTROL) End of Transfer Interrupt Enable */
07549 #define UOTGHS_DEVDMACONTROL_END_BUFFIT (0x1u << 5) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVDMACONTROL) End of Buffer Interrupt Enable */
07550 #define UOTGHS_DEVDMACONTROL_DESC_LD_IT (0x1u << 6) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVDMACONTROL) Descriptor Loaded Interrupt Enable */
07551 #define UOTGHS_DEVDMACONTROL_BURST_LCK (0x1u << 7) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVDMACONTROL) Burst Lock Enable */
07552 #define UOTGHS_DEVDMACONTROL_BUFF_LENGTH_Pos 16
07553 #define UOTGHS_DEVDMACONTROL_BUFF_LENGTH_Msk (0xffffu << UOTGHS_DEVDMACONTROL_BUFF_LENGTH_Pos) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVDMACONTROL) Buffer Byte Length (Write-only) */
07554 #define UOTGHS_DEVDMACONTROL_BUFF_LENGTH(value) ((UOTGHS_DEVDMACONTROL_BUFF_LENGTH_Msk & ((value) << UOTGHS_DEVDMACONTROL_BUFF_LENGTH_Pos)))
07555 /* -------- UOTGHS_DEVDMASTATUS : (UOTGHS Offset: N/A) Device DMA Channel Status Register -------- */
07556 #define UOTGHS_DEVDMASTATUS_CHANN_ENB (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVDMASTATUS) Channel Enable Status */
07557 #define UOTGHS_DEVDMASTATUS_CHANN_ACT (0x1u << 1) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVDMASTATUS) Channel Active Status */
07558 #define UOTGHS_DEVDMASTATUS_END_TR_ST (0x1u << 4) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVDMASTATUS) End of Channel Transfer Status */
07559 #define UOTGHS_DEVDMASTATUS_END_BF_ST (0x1u << 5) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVDMASTATUS) End of Channel Buffer Status */
07560 #define UOTGHS_DEVDMASTATUS_DESC_LDST (0x1u << 6) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVDMASTATUS) Descriptor Loaded Status */
07561 #define UOTGHS_DEVDMASTATUS_BUFF_COUNT_Pos 16
07562 #define UOTGHS_DEVDMASTATUS_BUFF_COUNT_Msk (0xffffu << UOTGHS_DEVDMASTATUS_BUFF_COUNT_Pos) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_DEVDMASTATUS) Buffer Byte Count */
07563 #define UOTGHS_DEVDMASTATUS_BUFF_COUNT(value) ((UOTGHS_DEVDMASTATUS_BUFF_COUNT_Msk & ((value) << UOTGHS_DEVDMASTATUS_BUFF_COUNT_Pos)))
07564 /* -------- UOTGHS_HSTCTRL : (UOTGHS Offset: 0x0400) Host General Control Register -------- */
07565 #define UOTGHS_HSTCTRL_SOFE (0x1u << 8) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTCTRL) Start of Frame Generation Enable */
07566 #define UOTGHS_HSTCTRL_RESET (0x1u << 9) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTCTRL) Send USB Reset */
07567 #define UOTGHS_HSTCTRL_RESUME (0x1u << 10) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTCTRL) Send USB Resume */
07568 #define UOTGHS_HSTCTRL_SPDCONF_Pos 12
07569 #define UOTGHS_HSTCTRL_SPDCONF_Msk (0x3u << UOTGHS_HSTCTRL_SPDCONF_Pos) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTCTRL) Mode Configuration */
07570 #define   UOTGHS_HSTCTRL_SPDCONF_NORMAL (0x0u << 12) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTCTRL) The host starts in full-speed mode and performs a high-speed reset to switch to the high-speed mode if the downstream peripheral is high-speed capable. */
07571 #define   UOTGHS_HSTCTRL_SPDCONF_LOW_POWER (0x1u << 12) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTCTRL) For a better consumption, if high-speed is not needed. */
07572 #define   UOTGHS_HSTCTRL_SPDCONF_HIGH_SPEED (0x2u << 12) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTCTRL) Forced high speed. */
07573 #define   UOTGHS_HSTCTRL_SPDCONF_FORCED_FS (0x3u << 12) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTCTRL) The host remains to full-speed mode whatever the peripheral speed capability. */
07574 /* -------- UOTGHS_HSTISR : (UOTGHS Offset: 0x0404) Host Global Interrupt Status Register -------- */
07575 #define UOTGHS_HSTISR_DCONNI (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTISR) Device Connection Interrupt */
07576 #define UOTGHS_HSTISR_DDISCI (0x1u << 1) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTISR) Device Disconnection Interrupt */
07577 #define UOTGHS_HSTISR_RSTI (0x1u << 2) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTISR) USB Reset Sent Interrupt */
07578 #define UOTGHS_HSTISR_RSMEDI (0x1u << 3) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTISR) Downstream Resume Sent Interrupt */
07579 #define UOTGHS_HSTISR_RXRSMI (0x1u << 4) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTISR) Upstream Resume Received Interrupt */
07580 #define UOTGHS_HSTISR_HSOFI (0x1u << 5) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTISR) Host Start of Frame Interrupt */
07581 #define UOTGHS_HSTISR_HWUPI (0x1u << 6) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTISR) Host Wake-Up Interrupt */
07582 #define UOTGHS_HSTISR_PEP_0 (0x1u << 8) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTISR) Pipe 0 Interrupt */
07583 #define UOTGHS_HSTISR_PEP_1 (0x1u << 9) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTISR) Pipe 1 Interrupt */
07584 #define UOTGHS_HSTISR_PEP_2 (0x1u << 10) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTISR) Pipe 2 Interrupt */
07585 #define UOTGHS_HSTISR_PEP_3 (0x1u << 11) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTISR) Pipe 3 Interrupt */
07586 #define UOTGHS_HSTISR_PEP_4 (0x1u << 12) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTISR) Pipe 4 Interrupt */
07587 #define UOTGHS_HSTISR_PEP_5 (0x1u << 13) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTISR) Pipe 5 Interrupt */
07588 #define UOTGHS_HSTISR_PEP_6 (0x1u << 14) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTISR) Pipe 6 Interrupt */
07589 #define UOTGHS_HSTISR_PEP_7 (0x1u << 15) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTISR) Pipe 7 Interrupt */
07590 #define UOTGHS_HSTISR_PEP_8 (0x1u << 16) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTISR) Pipe 8 Interrupt */
07591 #define UOTGHS_HSTISR_PEP_9 (0x1u << 17) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTISR) Pipe 9 Interrupt */
07592 #define UOTGHS_HSTISR_DMA_1 (0x1u << 25) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTISR) DMA Channel 1 Interrupt */
07593 #define UOTGHS_HSTISR_DMA_2 (0x1u << 26) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTISR) DMA Channel 2 Interrupt */
07594 #define UOTGHS_HSTISR_DMA_3 (0x1u << 27) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTISR) DMA Channel 3 Interrupt */
07595 #define UOTGHS_HSTISR_DMA_4 (0x1u << 28) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTISR) DMA Channel 4 Interrupt */
07596 #define UOTGHS_HSTISR_DMA_5 (0x1u << 29) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTISR) DMA Channel 5 Interrupt */
07597 #define UOTGHS_HSTISR_DMA_6 (0x1u << 30) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTISR) DMA Channel 6 Interrupt */
07598 /* -------- UOTGHS_HSTICR : (UOTGHS Offset: 0x0408) Host Global Interrupt Clear Register -------- */
07599 #define UOTGHS_HSTICR_DCONNIC (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTICR) Device Connection Interrupt Clear */
07600 #define UOTGHS_HSTICR_DDISCIC (0x1u << 1) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTICR) Device Disconnection Interrupt Clear */
07601 #define UOTGHS_HSTICR_RSTIC (0x1u << 2) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTICR) USB Reset Sent Interrupt Clear */
07602 #define UOTGHS_HSTICR_RSMEDIC (0x1u << 3) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTICR) Downstream Resume Sent Interrupt Clear */
07603 #define UOTGHS_HSTICR_RXRSMIC (0x1u << 4) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTICR) Upstream Resume Received Interrupt Clear */
07604 #define UOTGHS_HSTICR_HSOFIC (0x1u << 5) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTICR) Host Start of Frame Interrupt Clear */
07605 #define UOTGHS_HSTICR_HWUPIC (0x1u << 6) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTICR) Host Wake-Up Interrupt Clear */
07606 /* -------- UOTGHS_HSTIFR : (UOTGHS Offset: 0x040C) Host Global Interrupt Set Register -------- */
07607 #define UOTGHS_HSTIFR_DCONNIS (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTIFR) Device Connection Interrupt Set */
07608 #define UOTGHS_HSTIFR_DDISCIS (0x1u << 1) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTIFR) Device Disconnection Interrupt Set */
07609 #define UOTGHS_HSTIFR_RSTIS (0x1u << 2) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTIFR) USB Reset Sent Interrupt Set */
07610 #define UOTGHS_HSTIFR_RSMEDIS (0x1u << 3) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTIFR) Downstream Resume Sent Interrupt Set */
07611 #define UOTGHS_HSTIFR_RXRSMIS (0x1u << 4) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTIFR) Upstream Resume Received Interrupt Set */
07612 #define UOTGHS_HSTIFR_HSOFIS (0x1u << 5) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTIFR) Host Start of Frame Interrupt Set */
07613 #define UOTGHS_HSTIFR_HWUPIS (0x1u << 6) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTIFR) Host Wake-Up Interrupt Set */
07614 #define UOTGHS_HSTIFR_DMA_1 (0x1u << 25) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTIFR) DMA Channel 1 Interrupt Set */
07615 #define UOTGHS_HSTIFR_DMA_2 (0x1u << 26) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTIFR) DMA Channel 2 Interrupt Set */
07616 #define UOTGHS_HSTIFR_DMA_3 (0x1u << 27) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTIFR) DMA Channel 3 Interrupt Set */
07617 #define UOTGHS_HSTIFR_DMA_4 (0x1u << 28) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTIFR) DMA Channel 4 Interrupt Set */
07618 #define UOTGHS_HSTIFR_DMA_5 (0x1u << 29) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTIFR) DMA Channel 5 Interrupt Set */
07619 #define UOTGHS_HSTIFR_DMA_6 (0x1u << 30) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTIFR) DMA Channel 6 Interrupt Set */
07620 /* -------- UOTGHS_HSTIMR : (UOTGHS Offset: 0x0410) Host Global Interrupt Mask Register -------- */
07621 #define UOTGHS_HSTIMR_DCONNIE (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTIMR) Device Connection Interrupt Enable */
07622 #define UOTGHS_HSTIMR_DDISCIE (0x1u << 1) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTIMR) Device Disconnection Interrupt Enable */
07623 #define UOTGHS_HSTIMR_RSTIE (0x1u << 2) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTIMR) USB Reset Sent Interrupt Enable */
07624 #define UOTGHS_HSTIMR_RSMEDIE (0x1u << 3) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTIMR) Downstream Resume Sent Interrupt Enable */
07625 #define UOTGHS_HSTIMR_RXRSMIE (0x1u << 4) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTIMR) Upstream Resume Received Interrupt Enable */
07626 #define UOTGHS_HSTIMR_HSOFIE (0x1u << 5) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTIMR) Host Start of Frame Interrupt Enable */
07627 #define UOTGHS_HSTIMR_HWUPIE (0x1u << 6) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTIMR) Host Wake-Up Interrupt Enable */
07628 #define UOTGHS_HSTIMR_PEP_0 (0x1u << 8) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTIMR) Pipe 0 Interrupt Enable */
07629 #define UOTGHS_HSTIMR_PEP_1 (0x1u << 9) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTIMR) Pipe 1 Interrupt Enable */
07630 #define UOTGHS_HSTIMR_PEP_2 (0x1u << 10) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTIMR) Pipe 2 Interrupt Enable */
07631 #define UOTGHS_HSTIMR_PEP_3 (0x1u << 11) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTIMR) Pipe 3 Interrupt Enable */
07632 #define UOTGHS_HSTIMR_PEP_4 (0x1u << 12) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTIMR) Pipe 4 Interrupt Enable */
07633 #define UOTGHS_HSTIMR_PEP_5 (0x1u << 13) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTIMR) Pipe 5 Interrupt Enable */
07634 #define UOTGHS_HSTIMR_PEP_6 (0x1u << 14) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTIMR) Pipe 6 Interrupt Enable */
07635 #define UOTGHS_HSTIMR_PEP_7 (0x1u << 15) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTIMR) Pipe 7 Interrupt Enable */
07636 #define UOTGHS_HSTIMR_PEP_8 (0x1u << 16) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTIMR) Pipe 8 Interrupt Enable */
07637 #define UOTGHS_HSTIMR_PEP_9 (0x1u << 17) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTIMR) Pipe 9 Interrupt Enable */
07638 #define UOTGHS_HSTIMR_DMA_1 (0x1u << 25) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTIMR) DMA Channel 1 Interrupt Enable */
07639 #define UOTGHS_HSTIMR_DMA_2 (0x1u << 26) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTIMR) DMA Channel 2 Interrupt Enable */
07640 #define UOTGHS_HSTIMR_DMA_3 (0x1u << 27) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTIMR) DMA Channel 3 Interrupt Enable */
07641 #define UOTGHS_HSTIMR_DMA_4 (0x1u << 28) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTIMR) DMA Channel 4 Interrupt Enable */
07642 #define UOTGHS_HSTIMR_DMA_5 (0x1u << 29) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTIMR) DMA Channel 5 Interrupt Enable */
07643 #define UOTGHS_HSTIMR_DMA_6 (0x1u << 30) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTIMR) DMA Channel 6 Interrupt Enable */
07644 /* -------- UOTGHS_HSTIDR : (UOTGHS Offset: 0x0414) Host Global Interrupt Disable Register -------- */
07645 #define UOTGHS_HSTIDR_DCONNIEC (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTIDR) Device Connection Interrupt Disable */
07646 #define UOTGHS_HSTIDR_DDISCIEC (0x1u << 1) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTIDR) Device Disconnection Interrupt Disable */
07647 #define UOTGHS_HSTIDR_RSTIEC (0x1u << 2) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTIDR) USB Reset Sent Interrupt Disable */
07648 #define UOTGHS_HSTIDR_RSMEDIEC (0x1u << 3) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTIDR) Downstream Resume Sent Interrupt Disable */
07649 #define UOTGHS_HSTIDR_RXRSMIEC (0x1u << 4) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTIDR) Upstream Resume Received Interrupt Disable */
07650 #define UOTGHS_HSTIDR_HSOFIEC (0x1u << 5) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTIDR) Host Start of Frame Interrupt Disable */
07651 #define UOTGHS_HSTIDR_HWUPIEC (0x1u << 6) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTIDR) Host Wake-Up Interrupt Disable */
07652 #define UOTGHS_HSTIDR_PEP_0 (0x1u << 8) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTIDR) Pipe 0 Interrupt Disable */
07653 #define UOTGHS_HSTIDR_PEP_1 (0x1u << 9) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTIDR) Pipe 1 Interrupt Disable */
07654 #define UOTGHS_HSTIDR_PEP_2 (0x1u << 10) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTIDR) Pipe 2 Interrupt Disable */
07655 #define UOTGHS_HSTIDR_PEP_3 (0x1u << 11) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTIDR) Pipe 3 Interrupt Disable */
07656 #define UOTGHS_HSTIDR_PEP_4 (0x1u << 12) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTIDR) Pipe 4 Interrupt Disable */
07657 #define UOTGHS_HSTIDR_PEP_5 (0x1u << 13) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTIDR) Pipe 5 Interrupt Disable */

07659 #define UOTGHS_HSTIDR_PEP_7 (0x1u << 15) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTIDR) Pipe 7 Interrupt Disable */
07660 #define UOTGHS_HSTIDR_PEP_8 (0x1u << 16) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTIDR) Pipe 8 Interrupt Disable */
07661 #define UOTGHS_HSTIDR_PEP_9 (0x1u << 17) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTIDR) Pipe 9 Interrupt Disable */
07662 #define UOTGHS_HSTIDR_DMA_1 (0x1u << 25) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTIDR) DMA Channel 1 Interrupt Disable */
07663 #define UOTGHS_HSTIDR_DMA_2 (0x1u << 26) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTIDR) DMA Channel 2 Interrupt Disable */
07664 #define UOTGHS_HSTIDR_DMA_3 (0x1u << 27) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTIDR) DMA Channel 3 Interrupt Disable */
07665 #define UOTGHS_HSTIDR_DMA_4 (0x1u << 28) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTIDR) DMA Channel 4 Interrupt Disable */
07666 #define UOTGHS_HSTIDR_DMA_5 (0x1u << 29) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTIDR) DMA Channel 5 Interrupt Disable */
07667 #define UOTGHS_HSTIDR_DMA_6 (0x1u << 30) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTIDR) DMA Channel 6 Interrupt Disable */
07668 /* -------- UOTGHS_HSTIER : (UOTGHS Offset: 0x0418) Host Global Interrupt Enable Register -------- */
07669 #define UOTGHS_HSTIER_DCONNIES (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTIER) Device Connection Interrupt Enable */
07670 #define UOTGHS_HSTIER_DDISCIES (0x1u << 1) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTIER) Device Disconnection Interrupt Enable */
07671 #define UOTGHS_HSTIER_RSTIES (0x1u << 2) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTIER) USB Reset Sent Interrupt Enable */
07672 #define UOTGHS_HSTIER_RSMEDIES (0x1u << 3) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTIER) Downstream Resume Sent Interrupt Enable */
07673 #define UOTGHS_HSTIER_RXRSMIES (0x1u << 4) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTIER) Upstream Resume Received Interrupt Enable */
07674 #define UOTGHS_HSTIER_HSOFIES (0x1u << 5) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTIER) Host Start of Frame Interrupt Enable */
07675 #define UOTGHS_HSTIER_HWUPIES (0x1u << 6) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTIER) Host Wake-Up Interrupt Enable */
07676 #define UOTGHS_HSTIER_PEP_0 (0x1u << 8) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTIER) Pipe 0 Interrupt Enable */
07677 #define UOTGHS_HSTIER_PEP_1 (0x1u << 9) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTIER) Pipe 1 Interrupt Enable */
07678 #define UOTGHS_HSTIER_PEP_2 (0x1u << 10) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTIER) Pipe 2 Interrupt Enable */
07679 #define UOTGHS_HSTIER_PEP_3 (0x1u << 11) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTIER) Pipe 3 Interrupt Enable */
07680 #define UOTGHS_HSTIER_PEP_4 (0x1u << 12) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTIER) Pipe 4 Interrupt Enable */
07681 #define UOTGHS_HSTIER_PEP_5 (0x1u << 13) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTIER) Pipe 5 Interrupt Enable */
07682 #define UOTGHS_HSTIER_PEP_6 (0x1u << 14) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTIER) Pipe 6 Interrupt Enable */
07683 #define UOTGHS_HSTIER_PEP_7 (0x1u << 15) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTIER) Pipe 7 Interrupt Enable */
07684 #define UOTGHS_HSTIER_PEP_8 (0x1u << 16) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTIER) Pipe 8 Interrupt Enable */
07685 #define UOTGHS_HSTIER_PEP_9 (0x1u << 17) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTIER) Pipe 9 Interrupt Enable */
07686 #define UOTGHS_HSTIER_DMA_1 (0x1u << 25) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTIER) DMA Channel 1 Interrupt Enable */
07687 #define UOTGHS_HSTIER_DMA_2 (0x1u << 26) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTIER) DMA Channel 2 Interrupt Enable */
07688 #define UOTGHS_HSTIER_DMA_3 (0x1u << 27) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTIER) DMA Channel 3 Interrupt Enable */

07690 #define UOTGHS_HSTIER_DMA_5 (0x1u << 29) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTIER) DMA Channel 5 Interrupt Enable */
07691 #define UOTGHS_HSTIER_DMA_6 (0x1u << 30) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTIER) DMA Channel 6 Interrupt Enable */
07692 /* -------- UOTGHS_HSTPIP : (UOTGHS Offset: 0x0041C) Host Pipe Register -------- */
07693 #define UOTGHS_HSTPIP_PEN0 (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTPIP) Pipe 0 Enable */
07694 #define UOTGHS_HSTPIP_PEN1 (0x1u << 1) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTPIP) Pipe 1 Enable */
07695 #define UOTGHS_HSTPIP_PEN2 (0x1u << 2) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTPIP) Pipe 2 Enable */
07696 #define UOTGHS_HSTPIP_PEN3 (0x1u << 3) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTPIP) Pipe 3 Enable */
07697 #define UOTGHS_HSTPIP_PEN4 (0x1u << 4) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTPIP) Pipe 4 Enable */
07698 #define UOTGHS_HSTPIP_PEN5 (0x1u << 5) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTPIP) Pipe 5 Enable */
07699 #define UOTGHS_HSTPIP_PEN6 (0x1u << 6) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTPIP) Pipe 6 Enable */
07700 #define UOTGHS_HSTPIP_PEN7 (0x1u << 7) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTPIP) Pipe 7 Enable */
07701 #define UOTGHS_HSTPIP_PEN8 (0x1u << 8) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTPIP) Pipe 8 Enable */
07702 #define UOTGHS_HSTPIP_PRST0 (0x1u << 16) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTPIP) Pipe 0 Reset */
07703 #define UOTGHS_HSTPIP_PRST1 (0x1u << 17) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTPIP) Pipe 1 Reset */
07704 #define UOTGHS_HSTPIP_PRST2 (0x1u << 18) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTPIP) Pipe 2 Reset */
07705 #define UOTGHS_HSTPIP_PRST3 (0x1u << 19) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTPIP) Pipe 3 Reset */
07706 #define UOTGHS_HSTPIP_PRST4 (0x1u << 20) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTPIP) Pipe 4 Reset */

07708 #define UOTGHS_HSTPIP_PRST6 (0x1u << 22) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTPIP) Pipe 6 Reset */
07709 #define UOTGHS_HSTPIP_PRST7 (0x1u << 23) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTPIP) Pipe 7 Reset */
07710 #define UOTGHS_HSTPIP_PRST8 (0x1u << 24) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTPIP) Pipe 8 Reset */
07711 /* -------- UOTGHS_HSTFNUM : (UOTGHS Offset: 0x0420) Host Frame Number Register -------- */
07712 #define UOTGHS_HSTFNUM_MFNUM_Pos 0
07713 #define UOTGHS_HSTFNUM_MFNUM_Msk (0x7u << UOTGHS_HSTFNUM_MFNUM_Pos) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTFNUM) Micro Frame Number */
07714 #define UOTGHS_HSTFNUM_MFNUM(value) ((UOTGHS_HSTFNUM_MFNUM_Msk & ((value) << UOTGHS_HSTFNUM_MFNUM_Pos)))
07715 #define UOTGHS_HSTFNUM_FNUM_Pos 3
07716 #define UOTGHS_HSTFNUM_FNUM_Msk (0x7ffu << UOTGHS_HSTFNUM_FNUM_Pos) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTFNUM) Frame Number */
07717 #define UOTGHS_HSTFNUM_FNUM(value) ((UOTGHS_HSTFNUM_FNUM_Msk & ((value) << UOTGHS_HSTFNUM_FNUM_Pos)))
07718 #define UOTGHS_HSTFNUM_FLENHIGH_Pos 16
07719 #define UOTGHS_HSTFNUM_FLENHIGH_Msk (0xffu << UOTGHS_HSTFNUM_FLENHIGH_Pos) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTFNUM) Frame Length */
07720 #define UOTGHS_HSTFNUM_FLENHIGH(value) ((UOTGHS_HSTFNUM_FLENHIGH_Msk & ((value) << UOTGHS_HSTFNUM_FLENHIGH_Pos)))

07730 #define UOTGHS_HSTADDR1_HSTADDRP2(value) ((UOTGHS_HSTADDR1_HSTADDRP2_Msk & ((value) << UOTGHS_HSTADDR1_HSTADDRP2_Pos)))

07743 #define UOTGHS_HSTADDR2_HSTADDRP6(value) ((UOTGHS_HSTADDR2_HSTADDRP6_Msk & ((value) << UOTGHS_HSTADDR2_HSTADDRP6_Pos)))
