07752 #define UOTGHS_HSTADDR3_HSTADDRP9_Msk (0x7fu << UOTGHS_HSTADDR3_HSTADDRP9_Pos) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTADDR3) USB Host Address */
07753 #define UOTGHS_HSTADDR3_HSTADDRP9(value) ((UOTGHS_HSTADDR3_HSTADDRP9_Msk & ((value) << UOTGHS_HSTADDR3_HSTADDRP9_Pos)))
07754 /* -------- UOTGHS_HSTPIPCFG[10] : (UOTGHS Offset: 0x500) Host Pipe Configuration Register (n = 0) -------- */
07755 #define UOTGHS_HSTPIPCFG_ALLOC (0x1u << 1) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTPIPCFG[10]) Pipe Memory Allocate */
07756 #define UOTGHS_HSTPIPCFG_PBK_Pos 2
07757 #define UOTGHS_HSTPIPCFG_PBK_Msk (0x3u << UOTGHS_HSTPIPCFG_PBK_Pos) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTPIPCFG[10]) Pipe Banks */
07758 #define   UOTGHS_HSTPIPCFG_PBK_1_BANK (0x0u << 2) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTPIPCFG[10]) Single-bank pipe */
07759 #define   UOTGHS_HSTPIPCFG_PBK_2_BANK (0x1u << 2) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTPIPCFG[10]) Double-bank pipe */
07760 #define   UOTGHS_HSTPIPCFG_PBK_3_BANK (0x2u << 2) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTPIPCFG[10]) Triple-bank pipe */
07761 #define UOTGHS_HSTPIPCFG_PSIZE_Pos 4
07762 #define UOTGHS_HSTPIPCFG_PSIZE_Msk (0x7u << UOTGHS_HSTPIPCFG_PSIZE_Pos) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTPIPCFG[10]) Pipe Size */
07763 #define   UOTGHS_HSTPIPCFG_PSIZE_8_BYTE (0x0u << 4) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTPIPCFG[10]) 8 bytes */
07764 #define   UOTGHS_HSTPIPCFG_PSIZE_16_BYTE (0x1u << 4) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTPIPCFG[10]) 16 bytes */
07765 #define   UOTGHS_HSTPIPCFG_PSIZE_32_BYTE (0x2u << 4) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTPIPCFG[10]) 32 bytes */
07766 #define   UOTGHS_HSTPIPCFG_PSIZE_64_BYTE (0x3u << 4) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTPIPCFG[10]) 64 bytes */
07767 #define   UOTGHS_HSTPIPCFG_PSIZE_128_BYTE (0x4u << 4) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTPIPCFG[10]) 128 bytes */
07768 #define   UOTGHS_HSTPIPCFG_PSIZE_256_BYTE (0x5u << 4) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTPIPCFG[10]) 256 bytes */
07769 #define   UOTGHS_HSTPIPCFG_PSIZE_512_BYTE (0x6u << 4) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTPIPCFG[10]) 512 bytes */
07770 #define   UOTGHS_HSTPIPCFG_PSIZE_1024_BYTE (0x7u << 4) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTPIPCFG[10]) 1024 bytes */
07771 #define UOTGHS_HSTPIPCFG_PTOKEN_Pos 8
07772 #define UOTGHS_HSTPIPCFG_PTOKEN_Msk (0x3u << UOTGHS_HSTPIPCFG_PTOKEN_Pos) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTPIPCFG[10]) Pipe Token */
07773 #define   UOTGHS_HSTPIPCFG_PTOKEN_SETUP (0x0u << 8) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTPIPCFG[10]) SETUP */
07774 #define   UOTGHS_HSTPIPCFG_PTOKEN_IN (0x1u << 8) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTPIPCFG[10]) IN */
07775 #define   UOTGHS_HSTPIPCFG_PTOKEN_OUT (0x2u << 8) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTPIPCFG[10]) OUT */
07776 #define UOTGHS_HSTPIPCFG_AUTOSW (0x1u << 10) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTPIPCFG[10]) Automatic Switch */
07777 #define UOTGHS_HSTPIPCFG_PTYPE_Pos 12
07778 #define UOTGHS_HSTPIPCFG_PTYPE_Msk (0x3u << UOTGHS_HSTPIPCFG_PTYPE_Pos) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTPIPCFG[10]) Pipe Type */
07779 #define   UOTGHS_HSTPIPCFG_PTYPE_CTRL (0x0u << 12) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTPIPCFG[10]) Control */
07780 #define   UOTGHS_HSTPIPCFG_PTYPE_ISO (0x1u << 12) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTPIPCFG[10]) Isochronous */
07781 #define   UOTGHS_HSTPIPCFG_PTYPE_BLK (0x2u << 12) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTPIPCFG[10]) Bulk */
07782 #define   UOTGHS_HSTPIPCFG_PTYPE_INTRPT (0x3u << 12) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTPIPCFG[10]) Interrupt */
07783 #define UOTGHS_HSTPIPCFG_PEPNUM_Pos 16
07784 #define UOTGHS_HSTPIPCFG_PEPNUM_Msk (0xfu << UOTGHS_HSTPIPCFG_PEPNUM_Pos) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTPIPCFG[10]) Pipe Endpoint Number */
07785 #define UOTGHS_HSTPIPCFG_PEPNUM(value) ((UOTGHS_HSTPIPCFG_PEPNUM_Msk & ((value) << UOTGHS_HSTPIPCFG_PEPNUM_Pos)))
07786 #define UOTGHS_HSTPIPCFG_PINGEN (0x1u << 20) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTPIPCFG[10]) Ping Enable */
07787 #define UOTGHS_HSTPIPCFG_INTFRQ_Pos 24
07788 #define UOTGHS_HSTPIPCFG_INTFRQ_Msk (0xffu << UOTGHS_HSTPIPCFG_INTFRQ_Pos) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTPIPCFG[10]) Pipe Interrupt Request Frequency */
07789 #define UOTGHS_HSTPIPCFG_INTFRQ(value) ((UOTGHS_HSTPIPCFG_INTFRQ_Msk & ((value) << UOTGHS_HSTPIPCFG_INTFRQ_Pos)))
07790 #define UOTGHS_HSTPIPCFG_BINTERVAL_Pos 24
07791 #define UOTGHS_HSTPIPCFG_BINTERVAL_Msk (0xffu << UOTGHS_HSTPIPCFG_BINTERVAL_Pos) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTPIPCFG[10]) bInterval parameter for the Bulk-Out/Ping transaction */
07792 #define UOTGHS_HSTPIPCFG_BINTERVAL(value) ((UOTGHS_HSTPIPCFG_BINTERVAL_Msk & ((value) << UOTGHS_HSTPIPCFG_BINTERVAL_Pos)))
07793 /* -------- UOTGHS_HSTPIPISR[10] : (UOTGHS Offset: 0x530) Host Pipe Status Register (n = 0) -------- */
07794 #define UOTGHS_HSTPIPISR_RXINI (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTPIPISR[10]) Received IN Data Interrupt */
07795 #define UOTGHS_HSTPIPISR_TXOUTI (0x1u << 1) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTPIPISR[10]) Transmitted OUT Data Interrupt */
07796 #define UOTGHS_HSTPIPISR_TXSTPI (0x1u << 2) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTPIPISR[10]) Transmitted SETUP Interrupt */
07797 #define UOTGHS_HSTPIPISR_UNDERFI (0x1u << 2) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTPIPISR[10]) Underflow Interrupt */
07798 #define UOTGHS_HSTPIPISR_PERRI (0x1u << 3) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTPIPISR[10]) Pipe Error Interrupt */
07799 #define UOTGHS_HSTPIPISR_NAKEDI (0x1u << 4) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTPIPISR[10]) NAKed Interrupt */
07800 #define UOTGHS_HSTPIPISR_OVERFI (0x1u << 5) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTPIPISR[10]) Overflow Interrupt */
07801 #define UOTGHS_HSTPIPISR_RXSTALLDI (0x1u << 6) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTPIPISR[10]) Received STALLed Interrupt */
07802 #define UOTGHS_HSTPIPISR_CRCERRI (0x1u << 6) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTPIPISR[10]) CRC Error Interrupt */
07803 #define UOTGHS_HSTPIPISR_SHORTPACKETI (0x1u << 7) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTPIPISR[10]) Short Packet Interrupt */
07804 #define UOTGHS_HSTPIPISR_DTSEQ_Pos 8
07805 #define UOTGHS_HSTPIPISR_DTSEQ_Msk (0x3u << UOTGHS_HSTPIPISR_DTSEQ_Pos) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTPIPISR[10]) Data Toggle Sequence */
07806 #define   UOTGHS_HSTPIPISR_DTSEQ_DATA0 (0x0u << 8) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTPIPISR[10]) Data0 toggle sequence */
07807 #define   UOTGHS_HSTPIPISR_DTSEQ_DATA1 (0x1u << 8) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTPIPISR[10]) Data1 toggle sequence */
07808 #define UOTGHS_HSTPIPISR_NBUSYBK_Pos 12
07809 #define UOTGHS_HSTPIPISR_NBUSYBK_Msk (0x3u << UOTGHS_HSTPIPISR_NBUSYBK_Pos) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTPIPISR[10]) Number of Busy Banks */
07810 #define   UOTGHS_HSTPIPISR_NBUSYBK_0_BUSY (0x0u << 12) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTPIPISR[10]) 0 busy bank (all banks free) */
07811 #define   UOTGHS_HSTPIPISR_NBUSYBK_1_BUSY (0x1u << 12) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTPIPISR[10]) 1 busy bank */
07812 #define   UOTGHS_HSTPIPISR_NBUSYBK_2_BUSY (0x2u << 12) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTPIPISR[10]) 2 busy banks */
07813 #define   UOTGHS_HSTPIPISR_NBUSYBK_3_BUSY (0x3u << 12) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTPIPISR[10]) 3 busy banks */
07814 #define UOTGHS_HSTPIPISR_CURRBK_Pos 14
07815 #define UOTGHS_HSTPIPISR_CURRBK_Msk (0x3u << UOTGHS_HSTPIPISR_CURRBK_Pos) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTPIPISR[10]) Current Bank */
07816 #define   UOTGHS_HSTPIPISR_CURRBK_BANK0 (0x0u << 14) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTPIPISR[10]) Current bank is bank0 */
07817 #define   UOTGHS_HSTPIPISR_CURRBK_BANK1 (0x1u << 14) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTPIPISR[10]) Current bank is bank1 */
07818 #define   UOTGHS_HSTPIPISR_CURRBK_BANK2 (0x2u << 14) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTPIPISR[10]) Current bank is bank2 */
07819 #define UOTGHS_HSTPIPISR_RWALL (0x1u << 16) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTPIPISR[10]) Read-write Allowed */
07820 #define UOTGHS_HSTPIPISR_CFGOK (0x1u << 18) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTPIPISR[10]) Configuration OK Status */
07821 #define UOTGHS_HSTPIPISR_PBYCT_Pos 20
07822 #define UOTGHS_HSTPIPISR_PBYCT_Msk (0x7ffu << UOTGHS_HSTPIPISR_PBYCT_Pos) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTPIPISR[10]) Pipe Byte Count */
07823 /* -------- UOTGHS_HSTPIPICR[10] : (UOTGHS Offset: 0x560) Host Pipe Clear Register (n = 0) -------- */
07824 #define UOTGHS_HSTPIPICR_RXINIC (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTPIPICR[10]) Received IN Data Interrupt Clear */
07825 #define UOTGHS_HSTPIPICR_TXOUTIC (0x1u << 1) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTPIPICR[10]) Transmitted OUT Data Interrupt Clear */
07826 #define UOTGHS_HSTPIPICR_TXSTPIC (0x1u << 2) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTPIPICR[10]) Transmitted SETUP Interrupt Clear */
07827 #define UOTGHS_HSTPIPICR_UNDERFIC (0x1u << 2) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTPIPICR[10]) Underflow Interrupt Clear */
07828 #define UOTGHS_HSTPIPICR_NAKEDIC (0x1u << 4) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTPIPICR[10]) NAKed Interrupt Clear */
07829 #define UOTGHS_HSTPIPICR_OVERFIC (0x1u << 5) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTPIPICR[10]) Overflow Interrupt Clear */
07830 #define UOTGHS_HSTPIPICR_RXSTALLDIC (0x1u << 6) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTPIPICR[10]) Received STALLed Interrupt Clear */
07831 #define UOTGHS_HSTPIPICR_CRCERRIC (0x1u << 6) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTPIPICR[10]) CRC Error Interrupt Clear */
07832 #define UOTGHS_HSTPIPICR_SHORTPACKETIC (0x1u << 7) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTPIPICR[10]) Short Packet Interrupt Clear */
07833 /* -------- UOTGHS_HSTPIPIFR[10] : (UOTGHS Offset: 0x590) Host Pipe Set Register (n = 0) -------- */
07834 #define UOTGHS_HSTPIPIFR_RXINIS (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTPIPIFR[10]) Received IN Data Interrupt Set */
07835 #define UOTGHS_HSTPIPIFR_TXOUTIS (0x1u << 1) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTPIPIFR[10]) Transmitted OUT Data Interrupt Set */
07836 #define UOTGHS_HSTPIPIFR_TXSTPIS (0x1u << 2) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTPIPIFR[10]) Transmitted SETUP Interrupt Set */
07837 #define UOTGHS_HSTPIPIFR_UNDERFIS (0x1u << 2) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTPIPIFR[10]) Underflow Interrupt Set */
07838 #define UOTGHS_HSTPIPIFR_PERRIS (0x1u << 3) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTPIPIFR[10]) Pipe Error Interrupt Set */
07839 #define UOTGHS_HSTPIPIFR_NAKEDIS (0x1u << 4) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTPIPIFR[10]) NAKed Interrupt Set */
07840 #define UOTGHS_HSTPIPIFR_OVERFIS (0x1u << 5) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTPIPIFR[10]) Overflow Interrupt Set */
07841 #define UOTGHS_HSTPIPIFR_RXSTALLDIS (0x1u << 6) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTPIPIFR[10]) Received STALLed Interrupt Set */
07842 #define UOTGHS_HSTPIPIFR_CRCERRIS (0x1u << 6) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTPIPIFR[10]) CRC Error Interrupt Set */
07843 #define UOTGHS_HSTPIPIFR_SHORTPACKETIS (0x1u << 7) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTPIPIFR[10]) Short Packet Interrupt Set */
07844 #define UOTGHS_HSTPIPIFR_NBUSYBKS (0x1u << 12) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTPIPIFR[10]) Number of Busy Banks Set */
07845 /* -------- UOTGHS_HSTPIPIMR[10] : (UOTGHS Offset: 0x5C0) Host Pipe Mask Register (n = 0) -------- */
07846 #define UOTGHS_HSTPIPIMR_RXINE (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTPIPIMR[10]) Received IN Data Interrupt Enable */
07847 #define UOTGHS_HSTPIPIMR_TXOUTE (0x1u << 1) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTPIPIMR[10]) Transmitted OUT Data Interrupt Enable */
07848 #define UOTGHS_HSTPIPIMR_TXSTPE (0x1u << 2) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTPIPIMR[10]) Transmitted SETUP Interrupt Enable */
07849 #define UOTGHS_HSTPIPIMR_UNDERFIE (0x1u << 2) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTPIPIMR[10]) Underflow Interrupt Enable */
07850 #define UOTGHS_HSTPIPIMR_PERRE (0x1u << 3) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTPIPIMR[10]) Pipe Error Interrupt Enable */
07851 #define UOTGHS_HSTPIPIMR_NAKEDE (0x1u << 4) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTPIPIMR[10]) NAKed Interrupt Enable */
07852 #define UOTGHS_HSTPIPIMR_OVERFIE (0x1u << 5) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTPIPIMR[10]) Overflow Interrupt Enable */
07853 #define UOTGHS_HSTPIPIMR_RXSTALLDE (0x1u << 6) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTPIPIMR[10]) Received STALLed Interrupt Enable */
07854 #define UOTGHS_HSTPIPIMR_CRCERRE (0x1u << 6) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTPIPIMR[10]) CRC Error Interrupt Enable */
07855 #define UOTGHS_HSTPIPIMR_SHORTPACKETIE (0x1u << 7) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTPIPIMR[10]) Short Packet Interrupt Enable */
07856 #define UOTGHS_HSTPIPIMR_NBUSYBKE (0x1u << 12) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTPIPIMR[10]) Number of Busy Banks Interrupt Enable */
07857 #define UOTGHS_HSTPIPIMR_FIFOCON (0x1u << 14) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTPIPIMR[10]) FIFO Control */
07858 #define UOTGHS_HSTPIPIMR_PDISHDMA (0x1u << 16) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTPIPIMR[10]) Pipe Interrupts Disable HDMA Request Enable */
07859 #define UOTGHS_HSTPIPIMR_PFREEZE (0x1u << 17) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTPIPIMR[10]) Pipe Freeze */
07860 #define UOTGHS_HSTPIPIMR_RSTDT (0x1u << 18) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTPIPIMR[10]) Reset Data Toggle */
07861 /* -------- UOTGHS_HSTPIPIER[10] : (UOTGHS Offset: 0x5F0) Host Pipe Enable Register (n = 0) -------- */
07862 #define UOTGHS_HSTPIPIER_RXINES (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTPIPIER[10]) Received IN Data Interrupt Enable */
07863 #define UOTGHS_HSTPIPIER_TXOUTES (0x1u << 1) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTPIPIER[10]) Transmitted OUT Data Interrupt Enable */
07864 #define UOTGHS_HSTPIPIER_TXSTPES (0x1u << 2) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTPIPIER[10]) Transmitted SETUP Interrupt Enable */
07865 #define UOTGHS_HSTPIPIER_UNDERFIES (0x1u << 2) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTPIPIER[10]) Underflow Interrupt Enable */
07866 #define UOTGHS_HSTPIPIER_PERRES (0x1u << 3) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTPIPIER[10]) Pipe Error Interrupt Enable */
07867 #define UOTGHS_HSTPIPIER_NAKEDES (0x1u << 4) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTPIPIER[10]) NAKed Interrupt Enable */
07868 #define UOTGHS_HSTPIPIER_OVERFIES (0x1u << 5) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTPIPIER[10]) Overflow Interrupt Enable */
07869 #define UOTGHS_HSTPIPIER_RXSTALLDES (0x1u << 6) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTPIPIER[10]) Received STALLed Interrupt Enable */
07870 #define UOTGHS_HSTPIPIER_CRCERRES (0x1u << 6) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTPIPIER[10]) CRC Error Interrupt Enable */
07871 #define UOTGHS_HSTPIPIER_SHORTPACKETIES (0x1u << 7) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTPIPIER[10]) Short Packet Interrupt Enable */
07872 #define UOTGHS_HSTPIPIER_NBUSYBKES (0x1u << 12) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTPIPIER[10]) Number of Busy Banks Enable */
07873 #define UOTGHS_HSTPIPIER_PDISHDMAS (0x1u << 16) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTPIPIER[10]) Pipe Interrupts Disable HDMA Request Enable */
07874 #define UOTGHS_HSTPIPIER_PFREEZES (0x1u << 17) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTPIPIER[10]) Pipe Freeze Enable */
07875 #define UOTGHS_HSTPIPIER_RSTDTS (0x1u << 18) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTPIPIER[10]) Reset Data Toggle Enable */
07876 /* -------- UOTGHS_HSTPIPIDR[10] : (UOTGHS Offset: 0x620) Host Pipe Disable Register (n = 0) -------- */
07877 #define UOTGHS_HSTPIPIDR_RXINEC (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTPIPIDR[10]) Received IN Data Interrupt Disable */
07878 #define UOTGHS_HSTPIPIDR_TXOUTEC (0x1u << 1) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTPIPIDR[10]) Transmitted OUT Data Interrupt Disable */
07879 #define UOTGHS_HSTPIPIDR_TXSTPEC (0x1u << 2) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTPIPIDR[10]) Transmitted SETUP Interrupt Disable */
07880 #define UOTGHS_HSTPIPIDR_UNDERFIEC (0x1u << 2) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTPIPIDR[10]) Underflow Interrupt Disable */
07881 #define UOTGHS_HSTPIPIDR_PERREC (0x1u << 3) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTPIPIDR[10]) Pipe Error Interrupt Disable */
07882 #define UOTGHS_HSTPIPIDR_NAKEDEC (0x1u << 4) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTPIPIDR[10]) NAKed Interrupt Disable */
07883 #define UOTGHS_HSTPIPIDR_OVERFIEC (0x1u << 5) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTPIPIDR[10]) Overflow Interrupt Disable */
07884 #define UOTGHS_HSTPIPIDR_RXSTALLDEC (0x1u << 6) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTPIPIDR[10]) Received STALLed Interrupt Disable */
07885 #define UOTGHS_HSTPIPIDR_CRCERREC (0x1u << 6) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTPIPIDR[10]) CRC Error Interrupt Disable */
07886 #define UOTGHS_HSTPIPIDR_SHORTPACKETIEC (0x1u << 7) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTPIPIDR[10]) Short Packet Interrupt Disable */
07887 #define UOTGHS_HSTPIPIDR_NBUSYBKEC (0x1u << 12) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTPIPIDR[10]) Number of Busy Banks Disable */
07888 #define UOTGHS_HSTPIPIDR_FIFOCONC (0x1u << 14) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTPIPIDR[10]) FIFO Control Disable */
07889 #define UOTGHS_HSTPIPIDR_PDISHDMAC (0x1u << 16) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTPIPIDR[10]) Pipe Interrupts Disable HDMA Request Disable */
07890 #define UOTGHS_HSTPIPIDR_PFREEZEC (0x1u << 17) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTPIPIDR[10]) Pipe Freeze Disable */
07891 /* -------- UOTGHS_HSTPIPINRQ[10] : (UOTGHS Offset: 0x650) Host Pipe IN Request Register (n = 0) -------- */
07892 #define UOTGHS_HSTPIPINRQ_INRQ_Pos 0
07893 #define UOTGHS_HSTPIPINRQ_INRQ_Msk (0xffu << UOTGHS_HSTPIPINRQ_INRQ_Pos) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTPIPINRQ[10]) IN Request Number before Freeze */
07894 #define UOTGHS_HSTPIPINRQ_INRQ(value) ((UOTGHS_HSTPIPINRQ_INRQ_Msk & ((value) << UOTGHS_HSTPIPINRQ_INRQ_Pos)))
07895 #define UOTGHS_HSTPIPINRQ_INMODE (0x1u << 8) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTPIPINRQ[10]) IN Request Mode */
07896 /* -------- UOTGHS_HSTPIPERR[10] : (UOTGHS Offset: 0x680) Host Pipe Error Register (n = 0) -------- */
07897 #define UOTGHS_HSTPIPERR_DATATGL (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTPIPERR[10]) Data Toggle Error */
07898 #define UOTGHS_HSTPIPERR_DATAPID (0x1u << 1) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTPIPERR[10]) Data PID Error */
07899 #define UOTGHS_HSTPIPERR_PID (0x1u << 2) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTPIPERR[10]) PID Error */
07900 #define UOTGHS_HSTPIPERR_TIMEOUT (0x1u << 3) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTPIPERR[10]) Time-Out Error */
07901 #define UOTGHS_HSTPIPERR_CRC16 (0x1u << 4) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTPIPERR[10]) CRC16 Error */
07902 #define UOTGHS_HSTPIPERR_COUNTER_Pos 5
07903 #define UOTGHS_HSTPIPERR_COUNTER_Msk (0x3u << UOTGHS_HSTPIPERR_COUNTER_Pos) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTPIPERR[10]) Error Counter */
07904 #define UOTGHS_HSTPIPERR_COUNTER(value) ((UOTGHS_HSTPIPERR_COUNTER_Msk & ((value) << UOTGHS_HSTPIPERR_COUNTER_Pos)))
07905 /* -------- UOTGHS_HSTDMANXTDSC : (UOTGHS Offset: N/A) Host DMA Channel Next Descriptor Address Register -------- */
07906 #define UOTGHS_HSTDMANXTDSC_NXT_DSC_ADD_Pos 0
07907 #define UOTGHS_HSTDMANXTDSC_NXT_DSC_ADD_Msk (0xffffffffu << UOTGHS_HSTDMANXTDSC_NXT_DSC_ADD_Pos) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTDMANXTDSC) Next Descriptor Address */
07908 #define UOTGHS_HSTDMANXTDSC_NXT_DSC_ADD(value) ((UOTGHS_HSTDMANXTDSC_NXT_DSC_ADD_Msk & ((value) << UOTGHS_HSTDMANXTDSC_NXT_DSC_ADD_Pos)))
07909 /* -------- UOTGHS_HSTDMAADDRESS : (UOTGHS Offset: N/A) Host DMA Channel Address Register -------- */
07910 #define UOTGHS_HSTDMAADDRESS_BUFF_ADD_Pos 0
07911 #define UOTGHS_HSTDMAADDRESS_BUFF_ADD_Msk (0xffffffffu << UOTGHS_HSTDMAADDRESS_BUFF_ADD_Pos) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTDMAADDRESS) Buffer Address */
07912 #define UOTGHS_HSTDMAADDRESS_BUFF_ADD(value) ((UOTGHS_HSTDMAADDRESS_BUFF_ADD_Msk & ((value) << UOTGHS_HSTDMAADDRESS_BUFF_ADD_Pos)))
07913 /* -------- UOTGHS_HSTDMACONTROL : (UOTGHS Offset: N/A) Host DMA Channel Control Register -------- */
07914 #define UOTGHS_HSTDMACONTROL_CHANN_ENB (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTDMACONTROL) Channel Enable Command */
07915 #define UOTGHS_HSTDMACONTROL_LDNXT_DSC (0x1u << 1) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTDMACONTROL) Load Next Channel Transfer Descriptor Enable Command */
07916 #define UOTGHS_HSTDMACONTROL_END_TR_EN (0x1u << 2) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTDMACONTROL) End of Transfer Enable (Control) */
07917 #define UOTGHS_HSTDMACONTROL_END_B_EN (0x1u << 3) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTDMACONTROL) End of Buffer Enable Control */
07918 #define UOTGHS_HSTDMACONTROL_END_TR_IT (0x1u << 4) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTDMACONTROL) End of Transfer Interrupt Enable */
07919 #define UOTGHS_HSTDMACONTROL_END_BUFFIT (0x1u << 5) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTDMACONTROL) End of Buffer Interrupt Enable */
07920 #define UOTGHS_HSTDMACONTROL_DESC_LD_IT (0x1u << 6) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTDMACONTROL) Descriptor Loaded Interrupt Enable */
07921 #define UOTGHS_HSTDMACONTROL_BURST_LCK (0x1u << 7) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTDMACONTROL) Burst Lock Enable */
07922 #define UOTGHS_HSTDMACONTROL_BUFF_LENGTH_Pos 16
07923 #define UOTGHS_HSTDMACONTROL_BUFF_LENGTH_Msk (0xffffu << UOTGHS_HSTDMACONTROL_BUFF_LENGTH_Pos) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTDMACONTROL) Buffer Byte Length (Write-only) */
07924 #define UOTGHS_HSTDMACONTROL_BUFF_LENGTH(value) ((UOTGHS_HSTDMACONTROL_BUFF_LENGTH_Msk & ((value) << UOTGHS_HSTDMACONTROL_BUFF_LENGTH_Pos)))
07925 /* -------- UOTGHS_HSTDMASTATUS : (UOTGHS Offset: N/A) Host DMA Channel Status Register -------- */
07926 #define UOTGHS_HSTDMASTATUS_CHANN_ENB (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTDMASTATUS) Channel Enable Status */
07927 #define UOTGHS_HSTDMASTATUS_CHANN_ACT (0x1u << 1) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTDMASTATUS) Channel Active Status */
07928 #define UOTGHS_HSTDMASTATUS_END_TR_ST (0x1u << 4) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTDMASTATUS) End of Channel Transfer Status */
07929 #define UOTGHS_HSTDMASTATUS_END_BF_ST (0x1u << 5) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTDMASTATUS) End of Channel Buffer Status */
07930 #define UOTGHS_HSTDMASTATUS_DESC_LDST (0x1u << 6) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTDMASTATUS) Descriptor Loaded Status */
07931 #define UOTGHS_HSTDMASTATUS_BUFF_COUNT_Pos 16
07932 #define UOTGHS_HSTDMASTATUS_BUFF_COUNT_Msk (0xffffu << UOTGHS_HSTDMASTATUS_BUFF_COUNT_Pos) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_HSTDMASTATUS) Buffer Byte Count */
07933 #define UOTGHS_HSTDMASTATUS_BUFF_COUNT(value) ((UOTGHS_HSTDMASTATUS_BUFF_COUNT_Msk & ((value) << UOTGHS_HSTDMASTATUS_BUFF_COUNT_Pos)))
07934 /* -------- UOTGHS_CTRL : (UOTGHS Offset: 0x0800) General Control Register -------- */
07935 #define UOTGHS_CTRL_IDTE (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_CTRL) ID Transition Interrupt Enable */
07936 #define UOTGHS_CTRL_VBUSTE (0x1u << 1) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_CTRL) VBus Transition Interrupt Enable */
07937 #define UOTGHS_CTRL_SRPE (0x1u << 2) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_CTRL) SRP Interrupt Enable */
07938 #define UOTGHS_CTRL_VBERRE (0x1u << 3) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_CTRL) VBus Error Interrupt Enable */
07939 #define UOTGHS_CTRL_BCERRE (0x1u << 4) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_CTRL) B-Connection Error Interrupt Enable */
07940 #define UOTGHS_CTRL_ROLEEXE (0x1u << 5) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_CTRL) Role Exchange Interrupt Enable */
07941 #define UOTGHS_CTRL_HNPERRE (0x1u << 6) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_CTRL) HNP Error Interrupt Enable */
07942 #define UOTGHS_CTRL_STOE (0x1u << 7) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_CTRL) Suspend Time-Out Interrupt Enable */
07943 #define UOTGHS_CTRL_VBUSHWC (0x1u << 8) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_CTRL) VBus Hardware Control */
07944 #define UOTGHS_CTRL_SRPSEL (0x1u << 9) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_CTRL) SRP Selection */
07945 #define UOTGHS_CTRL_SRPREQ (0x1u << 10) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_CTRL) SRP Request */
07946 #define UOTGHS_CTRL_HNPREQ (0x1u << 11) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_CTRL) HNP Request */
07947 #define UOTGHS_CTRL_OTGPADE (0x1u << 12) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_CTRL) OTG Pad Enable */
07948 #define UOTGHS_CTRL_VBUSPO (0x1u << 13) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_CTRL) VBus Polarity Off */
07949 #define UOTGHS_CTRL_FRZCLK (0x1u << 14) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_CTRL) Freeze USB Clock */
07950 #define UOTGHS_CTRL_USBE (0x1u << 15) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_CTRL) UOTGHS Enable */
07951 #define UOTGHS_CTRL_TIMVALUE_Pos 16
07952 #define UOTGHS_CTRL_TIMVALUE_Msk (0x3u << UOTGHS_CTRL_TIMVALUE_Pos) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_CTRL) Timer Value */
07953 #define UOTGHS_CTRL_TIMVALUE(value) ((UOTGHS_CTRL_TIMVALUE_Msk & ((value) << UOTGHS_CTRL_TIMVALUE_Pos)))
07954 #define UOTGHS_CTRL_TIMPAGE_Pos 20
07955 #define UOTGHS_CTRL_TIMPAGE_Msk (0x3u << UOTGHS_CTRL_TIMPAGE_Pos) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_CTRL) Timer Page */
07956 #define UOTGHS_CTRL_TIMPAGE(value) ((UOTGHS_CTRL_TIMPAGE_Msk & ((value) << UOTGHS_CTRL_TIMPAGE_Pos)))
07957 #define UOTGHS_CTRL_UNLOCK (0x1u << 22) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_CTRL) Timer Access Unlock */
07958 #define UOTGHS_CTRL_UIDE (0x1u << 24) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_CTRL) UOTGID Pin Enable */
07959 #define   UOTGHS_CTRL_UIDE_UIMOD (0x0u << 24) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_CTRL) The USB mode (device/host) is selected from the UIMOD bit. */
07960 #define   UOTGHS_CTRL_UIDE_UOTGID (0x1u << 24) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_CTRL) The USB mode (device/host) is selected from the UOTGID input pin. */
07961 #define UOTGHS_CTRL_UIMOD (0x1u << 25) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_CTRL) UOTGHS Mode */
07962 #define   UOTGHS_CTRL_UIMOD_Host (0x0u << 25) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_CTRL) The module is in USB host mode. */
07963 #define   UOTGHS_CTRL_UIMOD_Device (0x1u << 25) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_CTRL) The module is in USB device mode. */
07964 /* -------- UOTGHS_SR : (UOTGHS Offset: 0x0804) General Status Register -------- */
07965 #define UOTGHS_SR_IDTI (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_SR) ID Transition Interrupt */
07966 #define UOTGHS_SR_VBUSTI (0x1u << 1) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_SR) VBus Transition Interrupt */
07967 #define UOTGHS_SR_SRPI (0x1u << 2) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_SR) SRP Interrupt */
07968 #define UOTGHS_SR_VBERRI (0x1u << 3) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_SR) VBus Error Interrupt */
07969 #define UOTGHS_SR_BCERRI (0x1u << 4) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_SR) B-Connection Error Interrupt */
07970 #define UOTGHS_SR_ROLEEXI (0x1u << 5) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_SR) Role Exchange Interrupt */
07971 #define UOTGHS_SR_HNPERRI (0x1u << 6) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_SR) HNP Error Interrupt */
07972 #define UOTGHS_SR_STOI (0x1u << 7) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_SR) Suspend Time-Out Interrupt */
07973 #define UOTGHS_SR_VBUSRQ (0x1u << 9) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_SR) VBus Request */
07974 #define UOTGHS_SR_ID (0x1u << 10) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_SR) UOTGID Pin State */
07975 #define UOTGHS_SR_VBUS (0x1u << 11) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_SR) VBus Level */
07976 #define UOTGHS_SR_SPEED_Pos 12
07977 #define UOTGHS_SR_SPEED_Msk (0x3u << UOTGHS_SR_SPEED_Pos) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_SR) Speed Status */
07978 #define   UOTGHS_SR_SPEED_FULL_SPEED (0x0u << 12) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_SR) Full-Speed mode */
07979 #define   UOTGHS_SR_SPEED_HIGH_SPEED (0x1u << 12) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_SR) High-Speed mode */
07980 #define   UOTGHS_SR_SPEED_LOW_SPEED (0x2u << 12) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_SR) Low-Speed mode */
07981 #define UOTGHS_SR_CLKUSABLE (0x1u << 14) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_SR) UTMI Clock Usable */
07982 /* -------- UOTGHS_SCR : (UOTGHS Offset: 0x0808) General Status Clear Register -------- */
07983 #define UOTGHS_SCR_IDTIC (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_SCR) ID Transition Interrupt Clear */
07984 #define UOTGHS_SCR_VBUSTIC (0x1u << 1) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_SCR) VBus Transition Interrupt Clear */
07985 #define UOTGHS_SCR_SRPIC (0x1u << 2) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_SCR) SRP Interrupt Clear */
07986 #define UOTGHS_SCR_VBERRIC (0x1u << 3) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_SCR) VBus Error Interrupt Clear */
07987 #define UOTGHS_SCR_BCERRIC (0x1u << 4) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_SCR) B-Connection Error Interrupt Clear */
07988 #define UOTGHS_SCR_ROLEEXIC (0x1u << 5) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_SCR) Role Exchange Interrupt Clear */
07989 #define UOTGHS_SCR_HNPERRIC (0x1u << 6) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_SCR) HNP Error Interrupt Clear */
07990 #define UOTGHS_SCR_STOIC (0x1u << 7) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_SCR) Suspend Time-Out Interrupt Clear */
07991 #define UOTGHS_SCR_VBUSRQC (0x1u << 9) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_SCR) VBus Request Clear */
07992 /* -------- UOTGHS_SFR : (UOTGHS Offset: 0x080C) General Status Set Register -------- */
07993 #define UOTGHS_SFR_IDTIS (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_SFR) ID Transition Interrupt Set */
07994 #define UOTGHS_SFR_VBUSTIS (0x1u << 1) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_SFR) VBus Transition Interrupt Set */
07995 #define UOTGHS_SFR_SRPIS (0x1u << 2) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_SFR) SRP Interrupt Set */
07996 #define UOTGHS_SFR_VBERRIS (0x1u << 3) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_SFR) VBus Error Interrupt Set */
07997 #define UOTGHS_SFR_BCERRIS (0x1u << 4) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_SFR) B-Connection Error Interrupt Set */
07998 #define UOTGHS_SFR_ROLEEXIS (0x1u << 5) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_SFR) Role Exchange Interrupt Set */
07999 #define UOTGHS_SFR_HNPERRIS (0x1u << 6) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_SFR) HNP Error Interrupt Set */
08000 #define UOTGHS_SFR_STOIS (0x1u << 7) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_SFR) Suspend Time-Out Interrupt Set */
08001 #define UOTGHS_SFR_VBUSRQS (0x1u << 9) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_SFR) VBus Request Set */
08002 /* -------- UOTGHS_FSM : (UOTGHS Offset: 0x082C) General Finite State Machine Register -------- */
08003 #define UOTGHS_FSM_DRDSTATE_Pos 0
08004 #define UOTGHS_FSM_DRDSTATE_Msk (0xfu << UOTGHS_FSM_DRDSTATE_Pos) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_FSM)  */
08005 #define   UOTGHS_FSM_DRDSTATE_A_IDLESTATE (0x0u << 0) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_FSM) This is the start state for A-devices (when the ID pin is 0) */
08006 #define   UOTGHS_FSM_DRDSTATE_A_WAIT_VRISE (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_FSM) In this state, the A-device waits for the voltage on VBus to rise above the A-device VBus Valid threshold (4.4 V). */
08007 #define   UOTGHS_FSM_DRDSTATE_A_WAIT_BCON (0x2u << 0) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_FSM) In this state, the A-device waits for the B-device to signal a connection. */
08008 #define   UOTGHS_FSM_DRDSTATE_A_HOST (0x3u << 0) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_FSM) In this state, the A-device that operates in Host mode is operational. */
08009 #define   UOTGHS_FSM_DRDSTATE_A_SUSPEND (0x4u << 0) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_FSM) The A-device operating as a host is in the suspend mode. */
08010 #define   UOTGHS_FSM_DRDSTATE_A_PERIPHERAL (0x5u << 0) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_FSM) The A-device operates as a peripheral. */
08011 #define   UOTGHS_FSM_DRDSTATE_A_WAIT_VFALL (0x6u << 0) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_FSM) In this state, the A-device waits for the voltage on VBus to drop below the A-device Session Valid threshold (1.4 V). */
08012 #define   UOTGHS_FSM_DRDSTATE_A_VBUS_ERR (0x7u << 0) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_FSM) In this state, the A-device waits for recovery of the over-current condition that caused it to enter this state. */
08013 #define   UOTGHS_FSM_DRDSTATE_A_WAIT_DISCHARGE (0x8u << 0) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_FSM) In this state, the A-device waits for the data USB line to discharge (100 us). */
08014 #define   UOTGHS_FSM_DRDSTATE_B_IDLE (0x9u << 0) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_FSM) This is the start state for B-device (when the ID pin is 1). */
08015 #define   UOTGHS_FSM_DRDSTATE_B_PERIPHERAL (0xAu << 0) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_FSM) In this state, the B-device acts as the peripheral. */
08016 #define   UOTGHS_FSM_DRDSTATE_B_WAIT_BEGIN_HNP (0xBu << 0) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_FSM) In this state, the B-device is in suspend mode and waits until 3 ms before initiating the HNP protocol if requested. */
08017 #define   UOTGHS_FSM_DRDSTATE_B_WAIT_DISCHARGE (0xCu << 0) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_FSM) In this state, the B-device waits for the data USB line to discharge (100 us) before becoming Host. */
08018 #define   UOTGHS_FSM_DRDSTATE_B_WAIT_ACON (0xDu << 0) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_FSM) In this state, the B-device waits for the A-device to signal a connect before becoming B-Host. */
08019 #define   UOTGHS_FSM_DRDSTATE_B_HOST (0xEu << 0) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_FSM) In this state, the B-device acts as the Host. */
08020 #define   UOTGHS_FSM_DRDSTATE_B_SRP_INIT (0xFu << 0) /**< \brief (UOTGHS_FSM) In this state, the B-device attempts to start a session using the SRP protocol. */
08021 
08022 /*@}*/
08023 
08024 /* ============================================================================= */
08025 /**  SOFTWARE API DEFINITION FOR Universal Synchronous Asynchronous Receiver Transmitter */
08026 /* ============================================================================= */
08027 /** \addtogroup SAM3XA_USART Universal Synchronous Asynchronous Receiver Transmitter */
08028 /*@{*/
08029 
08030 #ifndef __ASSEMBLY__
08031 /** \brief Usart hardware registers */
08032 typedef struct {
08033   WoReg US_CR;         /**< \brief (Usart Offset: 0x0000) Control Register */
08034   RwReg US_MR;         /**< \brief (Usart Offset: 0x0004) Mode Register */
08035   WoReg US_IER;        /**< \brief (Usart Offset: 0x0008) Interrupt Enable Register */
08036   WoReg US_IDR;        /**< \brief (Usart Offset: 0x000C) Interrupt Disable Register */
08037   RoReg US_IMR;        /**< \brief (Usart Offset: 0x0010) Interrupt Mask Register */
08038   RoReg US_CSR;        /**< \brief (Usart Offset: 0x0014) Channel Status Register */
08039   RoReg US_RHR;        /**< \brief (Usart Offset: 0x0018) Receiver Holding Register */
08040   WoReg US_THR;        /**< \brief (Usart Offset: 0x001C) Transmitter Holding Register */
08041   RwReg US_BRGR;       /**< \brief (Usart Offset: 0x0020) Baud Rate Generator Register */
08042   RwReg US_RTOR;       /**< \brief (Usart Offset: 0x0024) Receiver Time-out Register */
08043   RwReg US_TTGR;       /**< \brief (Usart Offset: 0x0028) Transmitter Timeguard Register */
08044   RoReg Reserved1[5];
08045   RwReg US_FIDI;       /**< \brief (Usart Offset: 0x0040) FI DI Ratio Register */
08046   RoReg US_NER;        /**< \brief (Usart Offset: 0x0044) Number of Errors Register */
08047   RoReg Reserved2[1];
08048   RwReg US_IF;         /**< \brief (Usart Offset: 0x004C) IrDA Filter Register */
08049   RwReg US_MAN;        /**< \brief (Usart Offset: 0x0050) Manchester Encoder Decoder Register */
08050   RwReg US_LINMR;      /**< \brief (Usart Offset: 0x0054) LIN Mode Register */
08051   RwReg US_LINIR;      /**< \brief (Usart Offset: 0x0058) LIN Identifier Register */
08052   RoReg Reserved3[34];
08053   RwReg US_WPMR;       /**< \brief (Usart Offset: 0xE4) Write Protect Mode Register */
08054   RoReg US_WPSR;       /**< \brief (Usart Offset: 0xE8) Write Protect Status Register */
08055   RoReg Reserved4[5];
08056   RwReg US_RPR;        /**< \brief (Usart Offset: 0x100) Receive Pointer Register */
08057   RwReg US_RCR;        /**< \brief (Usart Offset: 0x104) Receive Counter Register */
08058   RwReg US_TPR;        /**< \brief (Usart Offset: 0x108) Transmit Pointer Register */
08059   RwReg US_TCR;        /**< \brief (Usart Offset: 0x10C) Transmit Counter Register */
08060   RwReg US_RNPR;       /**< \brief (Usart Offset: 0x110) Receive Next Pointer Register */
08061   RwReg US_RNCR;       /**< \brief (Usart Offset: 0x114) Receive Next Counter Register */
08062   RwReg US_TNPR;       /**< \brief (Usart Offset: 0x118) Transmit Next Pointer Register */
08063   RwReg US_TNCR;       /**< \brief (Usart Offset: 0x11C) Transmit Next Counter Register */
08064   WoReg US_PTCR;       /**< \brief (Usart Offset: 0x120) Transfer Control Register */
08065   RoReg US_PTSR;       /**< \brief (Usart Offset: 0x124) Transfer Status Register */
08066 } Usart;
08067 #endif /* __ASSEMBLY__ */
08068 /* -------- US_CR : (USART Offset: 0x0000) Control Register -------- */
08069 #define US_CR_RSTRX (0x1u << 2) /**< \brief (US_CR) Reset Receiver */
08070 #define US_CR_RSTTX (0x1u << 3) /**< \brief (US_CR) Reset Transmitter */
08071 #define US_CR_RXEN (0x1u << 4) /**< \brief (US_CR) Receiver Enable */
08072 #define US_CR_RXDIS (0x1u << 5) /**< \brief (US_CR) Receiver Disable */
08073 #define US_CR_TXEN (0x1u << 6) /**< \brief (US_CR) Transmitter Enable */
08074 #define US_CR_TXDIS (0x1u << 7) /**< \brief (US_CR) Transmitter Disable */
08075 #define US_CR_RSTSTA (0x1u << 8) /**< \brief (US_CR) Reset Status Bits */
08076 #define US_CR_STTBRK (0x1u << 9) /**< \brief (US_CR) Start Break */
08077 #define US_CR_STPBRK (0x1u << 10) /**< \brief (US_CR) Stop Break */
08078 #define US_CR_STTTO (0x1u << 11) /**< \brief (US_CR) Start Time-out */
08079 #define US_CR_SENDA (0x1u << 12) /**< \brief (US_CR) Send Address */
08080 #define US_CR_RSTIT (0x1u << 13) /**< \brief (US_CR) Reset Iterations */
08081 #define US_CR_RSTNACK (0x1u << 14) /**< \brief (US_CR) Reset Non Acknowledge */
08082 #define US_CR_RETTO (0x1u << 15) /**< \brief (US_CR) Rearm Time-out */
08083 #define US_CR_RTSEN (0x1u << 18) /**< \brief (US_CR) Request to Send Enable */
08084 #define US_CR_FCS (0x1u << 18) /**< \brief (US_CR) Force SPI Chip Select */
08085 #define US_CR_RTSDIS (0x1u << 19) /**< \brief (US_CR) Request to Send Disable */
08086 #define US_CR_RCS (0x1u << 19) /**< \brief (US_CR) Release SPI Chip Select */
08087 #define US_CR_LINABT (0x1u << 20) /**< \brief (US_CR) Abort LIN Transmission */
08088 #define US_CR_LINWKUP (0x1u << 21) /**< \brief (US_CR) Send LIN Wakeup Signal */
08089 /* -------- US_MR : (USART Offset: 0x0004) Mode Register -------- */
08090 #define US_MR_USART_MODE_Pos 0
08091 #define US_MR_USART_MODE_Msk (0xfu << US_MR_USART_MODE_Pos) /**< \brief (US_MR)  */
08092 #define   US_MR_USART_MODE_NORMAL (0x0u << 0) /**< \brief (US_MR) Normal mode */
08093 #define   US_MR_USART_MODE_RS485 (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (US_MR) RS485 */
08094 #define   US_MR_USART_MODE_HW_HANDSHAKING (0x2u << 0) /**< \brief (US_MR) Hardware Handshaking */
08095 #define   US_MR_USART_MODE_IS07816_T_0 (0x4u << 0) /**< \brief (US_MR) IS07816 Protocol: T = 0 */
08096 #define   US_MR_USART_MODE_IS07816_T_1 (0x6u << 0) /**< \brief (US_MR) IS07816 Protocol: T = 1 */
08097 #define   US_MR_USART_MODE_IRDA (0x8u << 0) /**< \brief (US_MR) IrDA */
08098 #define   US_MR_USART_MODE_LIN_MASTER (0xAu << 0) /**< \brief (US_MR) LIN Master */
08099 #define   US_MR_USART_MODE_LIN_SLAVE (0xBu << 0) /**< \brief (US_MR) LIN Slave */
08100 #define   US_MR_USART_MODE_SPI_MASTER (0xEu << 0) /**< \brief (US_MR) SPI Master */
08101 #define   US_MR_USART_MODE_SPI_SLAVE (0xFu << 0) /**< \brief (US_MR) SPI Slave */
08102 #define US_MR_USCLKS_Pos 4
08103 #define US_MR_USCLKS_Msk (0x3u << US_MR_USCLKS_Pos) /**< \brief (US_MR) Clock Selection */
08104 #define   US_MR_USCLKS_MCK (0x0u << 4) /**< \brief (US_MR) Master Clock MCK is selected */
08105 #define   US_MR_USCLKS_DIV (0x1u << 4) /**< \brief (US_MR) Internal Clock Divided MCK/DIV (DIV=8) is selected */
08106 #define   US_MR_USCLKS_SCK (0x3u << 4) /**< \brief (US_MR) Serial Clock SLK is selected */
08107 #define US_MR_CHRL_Pos 6
08108 #define US_MR_CHRL_Msk (0x3u << US_MR_CHRL_Pos) /**< \brief (US_MR) Character Length. */
08109 #define   US_MR_CHRL_5_BIT (0x0u << 6) /**< \brief (US_MR) Character length is 5 bits */
08110 #define   US_MR_CHRL_6_BIT (0x1u << 6) /**< \brief (US_MR) Character length is 6 bits */
08111 #define   US_MR_CHRL_7_BIT (0x2u << 6) /**< \brief (US_MR) Character length is 7 bits */
08112 #define   US_MR_CHRL_8_BIT (0x3u << 6) /**< \brief (US_MR) Character length is 8 bits */
08113 #define US_MR_SYNC (0x1u << 8) /**< \brief (US_MR) Synchronous Mode Select */
08114 #define US_MR_CPHA (0x1u << 8) /**< \brief (US_MR) SPI Clock Phase */
08115 #define US_MR_PAR_Pos 9
08116 #define US_MR_PAR_Msk (0x7u << US_MR_PAR_Pos) /**< \brief (US_MR) Parity Type */
08117 #define   US_MR_PAR_EVEN (0x0u << 9) /**< \brief (US_MR) Even parity */
08118 #define   US_MR_PAR_ODD (0x1u << 9) /**< \brief (US_MR) Odd parity */
08119 #define   US_MR_PAR_SPACE (0x2u << 9) /**< \brief (US_MR) Parity forced to 0 (Space) */
08120 #define   US_MR_PAR_MARK (0x3u << 9) /**< \brief (US_MR) Parity forced to 1 (Mark) */
08121 #define   US_MR_PAR_NO (0x4u << 9) /**< \brief (US_MR) No parity */
08122 #define   US_MR_PAR_MULTIDROP (0x6u << 9) /**< \brief (US_MR) Multidrop mode */
08123 #define US_MR_NBSTOP_Pos 12
08124 #define US_MR_NBSTOP_Msk (0x3u << US_MR_NBSTOP_Pos) /**< \brief (US_MR) Number of Stop Bits */
08125 #define   US_MR_NBSTOP_1_BIT (0x0u << 12) /**< \brief (US_MR) 1 stop bit */
08126 #define   US_MR_NBSTOP_1_5_BIT (0x1u << 12) /**< \brief (US_MR) 1.5 stop bit (SYNC = 0) or reserved (SYNC = 1) */
08127 #define   US_MR_NBSTOP_2_BIT (0x2u << 12) /**< \brief (US_MR) 2 stop bits */
08128 #define US_MR_CHMODE_Pos 14
08129 #define US_MR_CHMODE_Msk (0x3u << US_MR_CHMODE_Pos) /**< \brief (US_MR) Channel Mode */
08130 #define   US_MR_CHMODE_NORMAL (0x0u << 14) /**< \brief (US_MR) Normal Mode */
08131 #define   US_MR_CHMODE_AUTOMATIC (0x1u << 14) /**< \brief (US_MR) Automatic Echo. Receiver input is connected to the TXD pin. */
08132 #define   US_MR_CHMODE_LOCAL_LOOPBACK (0x2u << 14) /**< \brief (US_MR) Local Loopback. Transmitter output is connected to the Receiver Input. */
08133 #define   US_MR_CHMODE_REMOTE_LOOPBACK (0x3u << 14) /**< \brief (US_MR) Remote Loopback. RXD pin is internally connected to the TXD pin. */
08134 #define US_MR_MSBF (0x1u << 16) /**< \brief (US_MR) Bit Order */
08135 #define US_MR_CPOL (0x1u << 16) /**< \brief (US_MR) SPI Clock Polarity */
08136 #define US_MR_MODE9 (0x1u << 17) /**< \brief (US_MR) 9-bit Character Length */
08137 #define US_MR_CLKO (0x1u << 18) /**< \brief (US_MR) Clock Output Select */
08138 #define US_MR_OVER (0x1u << 19) /**< \brief (US_MR) Oversampling Mode */
08139 #define US_MR_INACK (0x1u << 20) /**< \brief (US_MR) Inhibit Non Acknowledge */
08140 #define US_MR_DSNACK (0x1u << 21) /**< \brief (US_MR) Disable Successive NACK */
08141 #define US_MR_VAR_SYNC (0x1u << 22) /**< \brief (US_MR) Variable Synchronization of Command/Data Sync Start Frame Delimiter */
08142 #define US_MR_INVDATA (0x1u << 23) /**< \brief (US_MR) INverted Data */
08143 #define US_MR_MAX_ITERATION_Pos 24
08144 #define US_MR_MAX_ITERATION_Msk (0x7u << US_MR_MAX_ITERATION_Pos) /**< \brief (US_MR)  */
08145 #define US_MR_MAX_ITERATION(value) ((US_MR_MAX_ITERATION_Msk & ((value) << US_MR_MAX_ITERATION_Pos)))
08146 #define US_MR_FILTER (0x1u << 28) /**< \brief (US_MR) Infrared Receive Line Filter */
08147 #define US_MR_MAN (0x1u << 29) /**< \brief (US_MR) Manchester Encoder/Decoder Enable */
08148 #define US_MR_MODSYNC (0x1u << 30) /**< \brief (US_MR) Manchester Synchronization Mode */
08149 #define US_MR_ONEBIT (0x1u << 31) /**< \brief (US_MR) Start Frame Delimiter Selector */
08150 /* -------- US_IER : (USART Offset: 0x0008) Interrupt Enable Register -------- */
08151 #define US_IER_RXRDY (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (US_IER) RXRDY Interrupt Enable */
08152 #define US_IER_TXRDY (0x1u << 1) /**< \brief (US_IER) TXRDY Interrupt Enable */
08153 #define US_IER_RXBRK (0x1u << 2) /**< \brief (US_IER) Receiver Break Interrupt Enable */
08154 #define US_IER_ENDRX (0x1u << 3) /**< \brief (US_IER) End of Receive Transfer Interrupt Enable */
08155 #define US_IER_ENDTX (0x1u << 4) /**< \brief (US_IER) End of Transmit Interrupt Enable */
08156 #define US_IER_OVRE (0x1u << 5) /**< \brief (US_IER) Overrun Error Interrupt Enable */
08157 #define US_IER_FRAME (0x1u << 6) /**< \brief (US_IER) Framing Error Interrupt Enable */
08158 #define US_IER_PARE (0x1u << 7) /**< \brief (US_IER) Parity Error Interrupt Enable */
08159 #define US_IER_TIMEOUT (0x1u << 8) /**< \brief (US_IER) Time-out Interrupt Enable */
08160 #define US_IER_TXEMPTY (0x1u << 9) /**< \brief (US_IER) TXEMPTY Interrupt Enable */
08161 #define US_IER_ITER (0x1u << 10) /**< \brief (US_IER) Max number of Repetitions Reached */
08162 #define US_IER_UNRE (0x1u << 10) /**< \brief (US_IER) SPI Underrun Error */
08163 #define US_IER_TXBUFE (0x1u << 11) /**< \brief (US_IER) Buffer Empty Interrupt Enable */
08164 #define US_IER_RXBUFF (0x1u << 12) /**< \brief (US_IER) Buffer Full Interrupt Enable */
08165 #define US_IER_NACK (0x1u << 13) /**< \brief (US_IER) Non Acknowledge Interrupt Enable */
08166 #define US_IER_LINBK (0x1u << 13) /**< \brief (US_IER) LIN Break Sent or LIN Break Received Interrupt Enable */
08167 #define US_IER_LINID (0x1u << 14) /**< \brief (US_IER) LIN Identifier Sent or LIN Identifier Received Interrupt Enable */
08168 #define US_IER_LINTC (0x1u << 15) /**< \brief (US_IER) LIN Transfer Completed Interrupt Enable */
08169 #define US_IER_CTSIC (0x1u << 19) /**< \brief (US_IER) Clear to Send Input Change Interrupt Enable */
08170 #define US_IER_MANE (0x1u << 24) /**< \brief (US_IER) Manchester Error Interrupt Enable */
08171 #define US_IER_LINBE (0x1u << 25) /**< \brief (US_IER) LIN Bus Error Interrupt Enable */
08172 #define US_IER_LINISFE (0x1u << 26) /**< \brief (US_IER) LIN Inconsistent Synch Field Error Interrupt Enable */
08173 #define US_IER_LINIPE (0x1u << 27) /**< \brief (US_IER) LIN Identifier Parity Interrupt Enable */
08174 #define US_IER_LINCE (0x1u << 28) /**< \brief (US_IER) LIN Checksum Error Interrupt Enable */
08175 #define US_IER_LINSNRE (0x1u << 29) /**< \brief (US_IER) LIN Slave Not Responding Error Interrupt Enable */
08176 /* -------- US_IDR : (USART Offset: 0x000C) Interrupt Disable Register -------- */
08177 #define US_IDR_RXRDY (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (US_IDR) RXRDY Interrupt Disable */
08178 #define US_IDR_TXRDY (0x1u << 1) /**< \brief (US_IDR) TXRDY Interrupt Disable */
08179 #define US_IDR_RXBRK (0x1u << 2) /**< \brief (US_IDR) Receiver Break Interrupt Disable */
08180 #define US_IDR_ENDRX (0x1u << 3) /**< \brief (US_IDR) End of Receive Transfer Interrupt Disable */
08181 #define US_IDR_ENDTX (0x1u << 4) /**< \brief (US_IDR) End of Transmit Interrupt Disable */
08182 #define US_IDR_OVRE (0x1u << 5) /**< \brief (US_IDR) Overrun Error Interrupt Disable */
08183 #define US_IDR_FRAME (0x1u << 6) /**< \brief (US_IDR) Framing Error Interrupt Disable */
08184 #define US_IDR_PARE (0x1u << 7) /**< \brief (US_IDR) Parity Error Interrupt Disable */
08185 #define US_IDR_TIMEOUT (0x1u << 8) /**< \brief (US_IDR) Time-out Interrupt Disable */
08186 #define US_IDR_TXEMPTY (0x1u << 9) /**< \brief (US_IDR) TXEMPTY Interrupt Disable */
08187 #define US_IDR_ITER (0x1u << 10) /**< \brief (US_IDR) Max number of Repetitions Reached Disable */
08188 #define US_IDR_UNRE (0x1u << 10) /**< \brief (US_IDR) SPI Underrun Error Disable */
08189 #define US_IDR_TXBUFE (0x1u << 11) /**< \brief (US_IDR) Buffer Empty Interrupt Disable */
08190 #define US_IDR_RXBUFF (0x1u << 12) /**< \brief (US_IDR) Buffer Full Interrupt Disable */
08191 #define US_IDR_NACK (0x1u << 13) /**< \brief (US_IDR) Non Acknowledge Interrupt Disable */
08192 #define US_IDR_LINBK (0x1u << 13) /**< \brief (US_IDR) LIN Break Sent or LIN Break Received Interrupt Disable */
08193 #define US_IDR_LINID (0x1u << 14) /**< \brief (US_IDR) LIN Identifier Sent or LIN Identifier Received Interrupt Disable */
08194 #define US_IDR_LINTC (0x1u << 15) /**< \brief (US_IDR) LIN Transfer Completed Interrupt Disable */
08195 #define US_IDR_CTSIC (0x1u << 19) /**< \brief (US_IDR) Clear to Send Input Change Interrupt Disable */
08196 #define US_IDR_MANE (0x1u << 24) /**< \brief (US_IDR) Manchester Error Interrupt Disable */
08197 #define US_IDR_LINBE (0x1u << 25) /**< \brief (US_IDR) LIN Bus Error Interrupt Disable */
08198 #define US_IDR_LINISFE (0x1u << 26) /**< \brief (US_IDR) LIN Inconsistent Synch Field Error Interrupt Disable */
08199 #define US_IDR_LINIPE (0x1u << 27) /**< \brief (US_IDR) LIN Identifier Parity Interrupt Disable */
08200 #define US_IDR_LINCE (0x1u << 28) /**< \brief (US_IDR) LIN Checksum Error Interrupt Disable */
08201 #define US_IDR_LINSNRE (0x1u << 29) /**< \brief (US_IDR) LIN Slave Not Responding Error Interrupt Disable */
08202 /* -------- US_IMR : (USART Offset: 0x0010) Interrupt Mask Register -------- */
08203 #define US_IMR_RXRDY (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (US_IMR) RXRDY Interrupt Mask */
08204 #define US_IMR_TXRDY (0x1u << 1) /**< \brief (US_IMR) TXRDY Interrupt Mask */
08205 #define US_IMR_RXBRK (0x1u << 2) /**< \brief (US_IMR) Receiver Break Interrupt Mask */
08206 #define US_IMR_ENDRX (0x1u << 3) /**< \brief (US_IMR) End of Receive Transfer Interrupt Mask */
08207 #define US_IMR_ENDTX (0x1u << 4) /**< \brief (US_IMR) End of Transmit Interrupt Mask */
08208 #define US_IMR_OVRE (0x1u << 5) /**< \brief (US_IMR) Overrun Error Interrupt Mask */
08209 #define US_IMR_FRAME (0x1u << 6) /**< \brief (US_IMR) Framing Error Interrupt Mask */
08210 #define US_IMR_PARE (0x1u << 7) /**< \brief (US_IMR) Parity Error Interrupt Mask */
08211 #define US_IMR_TIMEOUT (0x1u << 8) /**< \brief (US_IMR) Time-out Interrupt Mask */
08212 #define US_IMR_TXEMPTY (0x1u << 9) /**< \brief (US_IMR) TXEMPTY Interrupt Mask */
08213 #define US_IMR_ITER (0x1u << 10) /**< \brief (US_IMR) Max number of Repetitions Reached Mask */
08214 #define US_IMR_UNRE (0x1u << 10) /**< \brief (US_IMR) SPI Underrun Error Mask */
08215 #define US_IMR_TXBUFE (0x1u << 11) /**< \brief (US_IMR) Buffer Empty Interrupt Mask */
08216 #define US_IMR_RXBUFF (0x1u << 12) /**< \brief (US_IMR) Buffer Full Interrupt Mask */
08217 #define US_IMR_NACK (0x1u << 13) /**< \brief (US_IMR) Non Acknowledge Interrupt Mask */
08218 #define US_IMR_LINBK (0x1u << 13) /**< \brief (US_IMR) LIN Break Sent or LIN Break Received Interrupt Mask */
08219 #define US_IMR_LINID (0x1u << 14) /**< \brief (US_IMR) LIN Identifier Sent or LIN Identifier Received Interrupt Mask */
08220 #define US_IMR_LINTC (0x1u << 15) /**< \brief (US_IMR) LIN Transfer Completed Interrupt Mask */
08221 #define US_IMR_CTSIC (0x1u << 19) /**< \brief (US_IMR) Clear to Send Input Change Interrupt Mask */
08222 #define US_IMR_MANE (0x1u << 24) /**< \brief (US_IMR) Manchester Error Interrupt Mask */
08223 #define US_IMR_LINBE (0x1u << 25) /**< \brief (US_IMR) LIN Bus Error Interrupt Mask */
08224 #define US_IMR_LINISFE (0x1u << 26) /**< \brief (US_IMR) LIN Inconsistent Synch Field Error Interrupt Mask */
08225 #define US_IMR_LINIPE (0x1u << 27) /**< \brief (US_IMR) LIN Identifier Parity Interrupt Mask */
08226 #define US_IMR_LINCE (0x1u << 28) /**< \brief (US_IMR) LIN Checksum Error Interrupt Mask */
08227 #define US_IMR_LINSNRE (0x1u << 29) /**< \brief (US_IMR) LIN Slave Not Responding Error Interrupt Mask */
08228 /* -------- US_CSR : (USART Offset: 0x0014) Channel Status Register -------- */
08229 #define US_CSR_RXRDY (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (US_CSR) Receiver Ready */
08230 #define US_CSR_TXRDY (0x1u << 1) /**< \brief (US_CSR) Transmitter Ready */
08231 #define US_CSR_RXBRK (0x1u << 2) /**< \brief (US_CSR) Break Received/End of Break */
08232 #define US_CSR_ENDRX (0x1u << 3) /**< \brief (US_CSR) End of Receiver Transfer */
08233 #define US_CSR_ENDTX (0x1u << 4) /**< \brief (US_CSR) End of Transmitter Transfer */
08234 #define US_CSR_OVRE (0x1u << 5) /**< \brief (US_CSR) Overrun Error */
08235 #define US_CSR_FRAME (0x1u << 6) /**< \brief (US_CSR) Framing Error */
08236 #define US_CSR_PARE (0x1u << 7) /**< \brief (US_CSR) Parity Error */
08237 #define US_CSR_TIMEOUT (0x1u << 8) /**< \brief (US_CSR) Receiver Time-out */
08238 #define US_CSR_TXEMPTY (0x1u << 9) /**< \brief (US_CSR) Transmitter Empty */
08239 #define US_CSR_ITER (0x1u << 10) /**< \brief (US_CSR) Max number of Repetitions Reached */
08240 #define US_CSR_UNRE (0x1u << 10) /**< \brief (US_CSR) SPI Underrun Error */
08241 #define US_CSR_TXBUFE (0x1u << 11) /**< \brief (US_CSR) Transmission Buffer Empty */
08242 #define US_CSR_RXBUFF (0x1u << 12) /**< \brief (US_CSR) Reception Buffer Full */
08243 #define US_CSR_NACK (0x1u << 13) /**< \brief (US_CSR) Non Acknowledge Interrupt */
08244 #define US_CSR_LINBK (0x1u << 13) /**< \brief (US_CSR) LIN Break Sent or LIN Break Received */
08245 #define US_CSR_LINID (0x1u << 14) /**< \brief (US_CSR) LIN Identifier Sent or LIN Identifier Received */
08246 #define US_CSR_LINTC (0x1u << 15) /**< \brief (US_CSR) LIN Transfer Completed */
08247 #define US_CSR_CTSIC (0x1u << 19) /**< \brief (US_CSR) Clear to Send Input Change Flag */
08248 #define US_CSR_CTS (0x1u << 23) /**< \brief (US_CSR) Image of CTS Input */
08249 #define US_CSR_LINBLS (0x1u << 23) /**< \brief (US_CSR) LIN Bus Line Status */
08250 #define US_CSR_MANERR (0x1u << 24) /**< \brief (US_CSR) Manchester Error */
08251 #define US_CSR_LINBE (0x1u << 25) /**< \brief (US_CSR) LIN Bit Error */
08252 #define US_CSR_LINISFE (0x1u << 26) /**< \brief (US_CSR) LIN Inconsistent Synch Field Error */
08253 #define US_CSR_LINIPE (0x1u << 27) /**< \brief (US_CSR) LIN Identifier Parity Error */
08254 #define US_CSR_LINCE (0x1u << 28) /**< \brief (US_CSR) LIN Checksum Error */
08255 #define US_CSR_LINSNRE (0x1u << 29) /**< \brief (US_CSR) LIN Slave Not Responding Error */
08256 /* -------- US_RHR : (USART Offset: 0x0018) Receiver Holding Register -------- */
08257 #define US_RHR_RXCHR_Pos 0
08258 #define US_RHR_RXCHR_Msk (0x1ffu << US_RHR_RXCHR_Pos) /**< \brief (US_RHR) Received Character */
08259 #define US_RHR_RXSYNH (0x1u << 15) /**< \brief (US_RHR) Received Sync */
08260 /* -------- US_THR : (USART Offset: 0x001C) Transmitter Holding Register -------- */
08261 #define US_THR_TXCHR_Pos 0
08262 #define US_THR_TXCHR_Msk (0x1ffu << US_THR_TXCHR_Pos) /**< \brief (US_THR) Character to be Transmitted */
08263 #define US_THR_TXCHR(value) ((US_THR_TXCHR_Msk & ((value) << US_THR_TXCHR_Pos)))
08264 #define US_THR_TXSYNH (0x1u << 15) /**< \brief (US_THR) Sync Field to be transmitted */
08265 /* -------- US_BRGR : (USART Offset: 0x0020) Baud Rate Generator Register -------- */
08266 #define US_BRGR_CD_Pos 0
08267 #define US_BRGR_CD_Msk (0xffffu << US_BRGR_CD_Pos) /**< \brief (US_BRGR) Clock Divider */
08268 #define US_BRGR_CD(value) ((US_BRGR_CD_Msk & ((value) << US_BRGR_CD_Pos)))
08269 #define US_BRGR_FP_Pos 16
08270 #define US_BRGR_FP_Msk (0x7u << US_BRGR_FP_Pos) /**< \brief (US_BRGR) Fractional Part */
08271 #define US_BRGR_FP(value) ((US_BRGR_FP_Msk & ((value) << US_BRGR_FP_Pos)))
08272 /* -------- US_RTOR : (USART Offset: 0x0024) Receiver Time-out Register -------- */
08273 #define US_RTOR_TO_Pos 0
08274 #define US_RTOR_TO_Msk (0x1ffffu << US_RTOR_TO_Pos) /**< \brief (US_RTOR) Time-out Value */
08275 #define US_RTOR_TO(value) ((US_RTOR_TO_Msk & ((value) << US_RTOR_TO_Pos)))
08276 /* -------- US_TTGR : (USART Offset: 0x0028) Transmitter Timeguard Register -------- */
08277 #define US_TTGR_TG_Pos 0
08278 #define US_TTGR_TG_Msk (0xffu << US_TTGR_TG_Pos) /**< \brief (US_TTGR) Timeguard Value */
08279 #define US_TTGR_TG(value) ((US_TTGR_TG_Msk & ((value) << US_TTGR_TG_Pos)))
08280 /* -------- US_FIDI : (USART Offset: 0x0040) FI DI Ratio Register -------- */
08281 #define US_FIDI_FI_DI_RATIO_Pos 0
08282 #define US_FIDI_FI_DI_RATIO_Msk (0x7ffu << US_FIDI_FI_DI_RATIO_Pos) /**< \brief (US_FIDI) FI Over DI Ratio Value */
08283 #define US_FIDI_FI_DI_RATIO(value) ((US_FIDI_FI_DI_RATIO_Msk & ((value) << US_FIDI_FI_DI_RATIO_Pos)))
08284 /* -------- US_NER : (USART Offset: 0x0044) Number of Errors Register -------- */
08285 #define US_NER_NB_ERRORS_Pos 0
08286 #define US_NER_NB_ERRORS_Msk (0xffu << US_NER_NB_ERRORS_Pos) /**< \brief (US_NER) Number of Errors */
08287 /* -------- US_IF : (USART Offset: 0x004C) IrDA Filter Register -------- */
08288 #define US_IF_IRDA_FILTER_Pos 0
08289 #define US_IF_IRDA_FILTER_Msk (0xffu << US_IF_IRDA_FILTER_Pos) /**< \brief (US_IF) IrDA Filter */
08290 #define US_IF_IRDA_FILTER(value) ((US_IF_IRDA_FILTER_Msk & ((value) << US_IF_IRDA_FILTER_Pos)))
08291 /* -------- US_MAN : (USART Offset: 0x0050) Manchester Encoder Decoder Register -------- */
08292 #define US_MAN_TX_PL_Pos 0
08293 #define US_MAN_TX_PL_Msk (0xfu << US_MAN_TX_PL_Pos) /**< \brief (US_MAN) Transmitter Preamble Length */
08294 #define US_MAN_TX_PL(value) ((US_MAN_TX_PL_Msk & ((value) << US_MAN_TX_PL_Pos)))
08295 #define US_MAN_TX_PP_Pos 8
08296 #define US_MAN_TX_PP_Msk (0x3u << US_MAN_TX_PP_Pos) /**< \brief (US_MAN) Transmitter Preamble Pattern */
08297 #define   US_MAN_TX_PP_ALL_ONE (0x0u << 8) /**< \brief (US_MAN) The preamble is composed of '1's */
08298 #define   US_MAN_TX_PP_ALL_ZERO (0x1u << 8) /**< \brief (US_MAN) The preamble is composed of '0's */
08299 #define   US_MAN_TX_PP_ZERO_ONE (0x2u << 8) /**< \brief (US_MAN) The preamble is composed of '01's */
08300 #define   US_MAN_TX_PP_ONE_ZERO (0x3u << 8) /**< \brief (US_MAN) The preamble is composed of '10's */
08301 #define US_MAN_TX_MPOL (0x1u << 12) /**< \brief (US_MAN) Transmitter Manchester Polarity */
08302 #define US_MAN_RX_PL_Pos 16
08303 #define US_MAN_RX_PL_Msk (0xfu << US_MAN_RX_PL_Pos) /**< \brief (US_MAN) Receiver Preamble Length */
08304 #define US_MAN_RX_PL(value) ((US_MAN_RX_PL_Msk & ((value) << US_MAN_RX_PL_Pos)))
08305 #define US_MAN_RX_PP_Pos 24
08306 #define US_MAN_RX_PP_Msk (0x3u << US_MAN_RX_PP_Pos) /**< \brief (US_MAN) Receiver Preamble Pattern detected */
08307 #define   US_MAN_RX_PP_ALL_ONE (0x0u << 24) /**< \brief (US_MAN) The preamble is composed of '1's */
08308 #define   US_MAN_RX_PP_ALL_ZERO (0x1u << 24) /**< \brief (US_MAN) The preamble is composed of '0's */
08309 #define   US_MAN_RX_PP_ZERO_ONE (0x2u << 24) /**< \brief (US_MAN) The preamble is composed of '01's */
08310 #define   US_MAN_RX_PP_ONE_ZERO (0x3u << 24) /**< \brief (US_MAN) The preamble is composed of '10's */
08311 #define US_MAN_RX_MPOL (0x1u << 28) /**< \brief (US_MAN) Receiver Manchester Polarity */
08312 #define US_MAN_STUCKTO1 (0x1u << 29) /**< \brief (US_MAN)  */
08313 #define US_MAN_DRIFT (0x1u << 30) /**< \brief (US_MAN) Drift compensation */
08314 /* -------- US_LINMR : (USART Offset: 0x0054) LIN Mode Register -------- */
08315 #define US_LINMR_NACT_Pos 0
08316 #define US_LINMR_NACT_Msk (0x3u << US_LINMR_NACT_Pos) /**< \brief (US_LINMR) LIN Node Action */
08317 #define   US_LINMR_NACT_PUBLISH (0x0u << 0) /**< \brief (US_LINMR) The USART transmits the response. */
08318 #define   US_LINMR_NACT_SUBSCRIBE (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (US_LINMR) The USART receives the response. */
08319 #define   US_LINMR_NACT_IGNORE (0x2u << 0) /**< \brief (US_LINMR) The USART does not transmit and does not receive the response. */
08320 #define US_LINMR_PARDIS (0x1u << 2) /**< \brief (US_LINMR) Parity Disable */
08321 #define US_LINMR_CHKDIS (0x1u << 3) /**< \brief (US_LINMR) Checksum Disable */
08322 #define US_LINMR_CHKTYP (0x1u << 4) /**< \brief (US_LINMR) Checksum Type */
08323 #define US_LINMR_DLM (0x1u << 5) /**< \brief (US_LINMR) Data Length Mode */
08324 #define US_LINMR_FSDIS (0x1u << 6) /**< \brief (US_LINMR) Frame Slot Mode Disable */
08325 #define US_LINMR_WKUPTYP (0x1u << 7) /**< \brief (US_LINMR) Wakeup Signal Type */
08326 #define US_LINMR_DLC_Pos 8
08327 #define US_LINMR_DLC_Msk (0xffu << US_LINMR_DLC_Pos) /**< \brief (US_LINMR) Data Length Control */
08328 #define US_LINMR_DLC(value) ((US_LINMR_DLC_Msk & ((value) << US_LINMR_DLC_Pos)))
08329 #define US_LINMR_PDCM (0x1u << 16) /**< \brief (US_LINMR) PDC Mode */
08330 /* -------- US_LINIR : (USART Offset: 0x0058) LIN Identifier Register -------- */
08331 #define US_LINIR_IDCHR_Pos 0
08332 #define US_LINIR_IDCHR_Msk (0xffu << US_LINIR_IDCHR_Pos) /**< \brief (US_LINIR) Identifier Character */
08333 #define US_LINIR_IDCHR(value) ((US_LINIR_IDCHR_Msk & ((value) << US_LINIR_IDCHR_Pos)))
08334 /* -------- US_WPMR : (USART Offset: 0xE4) Write Protect Mode Register -------- */
08335 #define US_WPMR_WPEN (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (US_WPMR) Write Protect Enable */
08336 #define US_WPMR_WPKEY_Pos 8
08337 #define US_WPMR_WPKEY_Msk (0xffffffu << US_WPMR_WPKEY_Pos) /**< \brief (US_WPMR) Write Protect KEY */
08338 #define US_WPMR_WPKEY(value) ((US_WPMR_WPKEY_Msk & ((value) << US_WPMR_WPKEY_Pos)))
08339 /* -------- US_WPSR : (USART Offset: 0xE8) Write Protect Status Register -------- */
08340 #define US_WPSR_WPVS (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (US_WPSR) Write Protect Violation Status */
08341 #define US_WPSR_WPVSRC_Pos 8
08342 #define US_WPSR_WPVSRC_Msk (0xffffu << US_WPSR_WPVSRC_Pos) /**< \brief (US_WPSR) Write Protect Violation Source */
08343 /* -------- US_RPR : (USART Offset: 0x100) Receive Pointer Register -------- */
08344 #define US_RPR_RXPTR_Pos 0
08345 #define US_RPR_RXPTR_Msk (0xffffffffu << US_RPR_RXPTR_Pos) /**< \brief (US_RPR) Receive Pointer Register */
08346 #define US_RPR_RXPTR(value) ((US_RPR_RXPTR_Msk & ((value) << US_RPR_RXPTR_Pos)))
08347 /* -------- US_RCR : (USART Offset: 0x104) Receive Counter Register -------- */
08348 #define US_RCR_RXCTR_Pos 0
08349 #define US_RCR_RXCTR_Msk (0xffffu << US_RCR_RXCTR_Pos) /**< \brief (US_RCR) Receive Counter Register */
08350 #define US_RCR_RXCTR(value) ((US_RCR_RXCTR_Msk & ((value) << US_RCR_RXCTR_Pos)))
08351 /* -------- US_TPR : (USART Offset: 0x108) Transmit Pointer Register -------- */
08352 #define US_TPR_TXPTR_Pos 0
08353 #define US_TPR_TXPTR_Msk (0xffffffffu << US_TPR_TXPTR_Pos) /**< \brief (US_TPR) Transmit Counter Register */
08354 #define US_TPR_TXPTR(value) ((US_TPR_TXPTR_Msk & ((value) << US_TPR_TXPTR_Pos)))
08355 /* -------- US_TCR : (USART Offset: 0x10C) Transmit Counter Register -------- */
08356 #define US_TCR_TXCTR_Pos 0
08357 #define US_TCR_TXCTR_Msk (0xffffu << US_TCR_TXCTR_Pos) /**< \brief (US_TCR) Transmit Counter Register */
08358 #define US_TCR_TXCTR(value) ((US_TCR_TXCTR_Msk & ((value) << US_TCR_TXCTR_Pos)))
08359 /* -------- US_RNPR : (USART Offset: 0x110) Receive Next Pointer Register -------- */
08360 #define US_RNPR_RXNPTR_Pos 0
08361 #define US_RNPR_RXNPTR_Msk (0xffffffffu << US_RNPR_RXNPTR_Pos) /**< \brief (US_RNPR) Receive Next Pointer */
08362 #define US_RNPR_RXNPTR(value) ((US_RNPR_RXNPTR_Msk & ((value) << US_RNPR_RXNPTR_Pos)))
08363 /* -------- US_RNCR : (USART Offset: 0x114) Receive Next Counter Register -------- */
08364 #define US_RNCR_RXNCTR_Pos 0
08365 #define US_RNCR_RXNCTR_Msk (0xffffu << US_RNCR_RXNCTR_Pos) /**< \brief (US_RNCR) Receive Next Counter */
08366 #define US_RNCR_RXNCTR(value) ((US_RNCR_RXNCTR_Msk & ((value) << US_RNCR_RXNCTR_Pos)))
08367 /* -------- US_TNPR : (USART Offset: 0x118) Transmit Next Pointer Register -------- */
08368 #define US_TNPR_TXNPTR_Pos 0
08369 #define US_TNPR_TXNPTR_Msk (0xffffffffu << US_TNPR_TXNPTR_Pos) /**< \brief (US_TNPR) Transmit Next Pointer */
08370 #define US_TNPR_TXNPTR(value) ((US_TNPR_TXNPTR_Msk & ((value) << US_TNPR_TXNPTR_Pos)))
08371 /* -------- US_TNCR : (USART Offset: 0x11C) Transmit Next Counter Register -------- */
08372 #define US_TNCR_TXNCTR_Pos 0
08373 #define US_TNCR_TXNCTR_Msk (0xffffu << US_TNCR_TXNCTR_Pos) /**< \brief (US_TNCR) Transmit Counter Next */
08374 #define US_TNCR_TXNCTR(value) ((US_TNCR_TXNCTR_Msk & ((value) << US_TNCR_TXNCTR_Pos)))
08375 /* -------- US_PTCR : (USART Offset: 0x120) Transfer Control Register -------- */
08376 #define US_PTCR_RXTEN (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (US_PTCR) Receiver Transfer Enable */
08377 #define US_PTCR_RXTDIS (0x1u << 1) /**< \brief (US_PTCR) Receiver Transfer Disable */
08378 #define US_PTCR_TXTEN (0x1u << 8) /**< \brief (US_PTCR) Transmitter Transfer Enable */
08379 #define US_PTCR_TXTDIS (0x1u << 9) /**< \brief (US_PTCR) Transmitter Transfer Disable */
08380 /* -------- US_PTSR : (USART Offset: 0x124) Transfer Status Register -------- */
08381 #define US_PTSR_RXTEN (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (US_PTSR) Receiver Transfer Enable */
08382 #define US_PTSR_TXTEN (0x1u << 8) /**< \brief (US_PTSR) Transmitter Transfer Enable */
08383 
08384 /*@}*/
08385 
08386 /* ============================================================================= */
08387 /**  SOFTWARE API DEFINITION FOR Watchdog Timer */
08388 /* ============================================================================= */
08389 /** \addtogroup SAM3XA_WDT Watchdog Timer */
08390 /*@{*/
08391 
08392 #ifndef __ASSEMBLY__
08393 /** \brief Wdt hardware registers */
08394 typedef struct {
08395   WoReg WDT_CR; /**< \brief (Wdt Offset: 0x00) Control Register */
08396   RwReg WDT_MR; /**< \brief (Wdt Offset: 0x04) Mode Register */
08397   RoReg WDT_SR; /**< \brief (Wdt Offset: 0x08) Status Register */
08398 } Wdt;
08399 #endif /* __ASSEMBLY__ */
08400 /* -------- WDT_CR : (WDT Offset: 0x00) Control Register -------- */
08401 #define WDT_CR_WDRSTT (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (WDT_CR) Watchdog Restart */
08402 #define WDT_CR_KEY_Pos 24
08403 #define WDT_CR_KEY_Msk (0xffu << WDT_CR_KEY_Pos) /**< \brief (WDT_CR) Password */
08404 #define WDT_CR_KEY(value) ((WDT_CR_KEY_Msk & ((value) << WDT_CR_KEY_Pos)))
08405 /* -------- WDT_MR : (WDT Offset: 0x04) Mode Register -------- */
08406 #define WDT_MR_WDV_Pos 0
08407 #define WDT_MR_WDV_Msk (0xfffu << WDT_MR_WDV_Pos) /**< \brief (WDT_MR) Watchdog Counter Value */
08408 #define WDT_MR_WDV(value) ((WDT_MR_WDV_Msk & ((value) << WDT_MR_WDV_Pos)))
08409 #define WDT_MR_WDFIEN (0x1u << 12) /**< \brief (WDT_MR) Watchdog Fault Interrupt Enable */
08410 #define WDT_MR_WDRSTEN (0x1u << 13) /**< \brief (WDT_MR) Watchdog Reset Enable */
08411 #define WDT_MR_WDRPROC (0x1u << 14) /**< \brief (WDT_MR) Watchdog Reset Processor */
08412 #define WDT_MR_WDDIS (0x1u << 15) /**< \brief (WDT_MR) Watchdog Disable */
08413 #define WDT_MR_WDD_Pos 16
08414 #define WDT_MR_WDD_Msk (0xfffu << WDT_MR_WDD_Pos) /**< \brief (WDT_MR) Watchdog Delta Value */
08415 #define WDT_MR_WDD(value) ((WDT_MR_WDD_Msk & ((value) << WDT_MR_WDD_Pos)))
08416 #define WDT_MR_WDDBGHLT (0x1u << 28) /**< \brief (WDT_MR) Watchdog Debug Halt */
08417 #define WDT_MR_WDIDLEHLT (0x1u << 29) /**< \brief (WDT_MR) Watchdog Idle Halt */
08418 /* -------- WDT_SR : (WDT Offset: 0x08) Status Register -------- */
08419 #define WDT_SR_WDUNF (0x1u << 0) /**< \brief (WDT_SR) Watchdog Underflow */
08420 #define WDT_SR_WDERR (0x1u << 1) /**< \brief (WDT_SR) Watchdog Error */
08421 
08422 /*@}*/
08423 
08424 /*@}*/
08425 
08426 /* ************************************************************************** */
08427 /*   REGISTER ACCESS DEFINITIONS FOR SAM3XA */
08428 /* ************************************************************************** */
08429 /** \addtogroup SAM3XA_reg Registers Access Definitions */
08430 /*@{*/
08431 
08432 /* ========== Register definition for HSMCI peripheral ========== */
08433 #define REG_HSMCI_CR              REG_ACCESS(WoReg, 0x40000000U) /**< \brief (HSMCI) Control Register */
08434 #define REG_HSMCI_MR              REG_ACCESS(RwReg, 0x40000004U) /**< \brief (HSMCI) Mode Register */
08435 #define REG_HSMCI_DTOR            REG_ACCESS(RwReg, 0x40000008U) /**< \brief (HSMCI) Data Timeout Register */
08436 #define REG_HSMCI_SDCR            REG_ACCESS(RwReg, 0x4000000CU) /**< \brief (HSMCI) SD/SDIO Card Register */
08437 #define REG_HSMCI_ARGR            REG_ACCESS(RwReg, 0x40000010U) /**< \brief (HSMCI) Argument Register */
08438 #define REG_HSMCI_CMDR            REG_ACCESS(WoReg, 0x40000014U) /**< \brief (HSMCI) Command Register */
08439 #define REG_HSMCI_BLKR            REG_ACCESS(RwReg, 0x40000018U) /**< \brief (HSMCI) Block Register */
08440 #define REG_HSMCI_CSTOR           REG_ACCESS(RwReg, 0x4000001CU) /**< \brief (HSMCI) Completion Signal Timeout Register */

08805 /* ========== Register definition for USART0 peripheral ========== */

09024 /* ========== Register definition for EMAC peripheral ========== */
09025 #define REG_EMAC_NCR              REG_ACCESS(RwReg, 0x400B0000U) /**< \brief (EMAC) Network Control Register */
09026 #define REG_EMAC_NCFGR            REG_ACCESS(RwReg, 0x400B0004U) /**< \brief (EMAC) Network Configuration Register */
09027 #define REG_EMAC_NSR              REG_ACCESS(RoReg, 0x400B0008U) /**< \brief (EMAC) Network Status Register */
09028 #define REG_EMAC_TSR              REG_ACCESS(RwReg, 0x400B0014U) /**< \brief (EMAC) Transmit Status Register */
09029 #define REG_EMAC_RBQP             REG_ACCESS(RwReg, 0x400B0018U) /**< \brief (EMAC) Receive Buffer Queue Pointer Register */
09030 #define REG_EMAC_TBQP             REG_ACCESS(RwReg, 0x400B001CU) /**< \brief (EMAC) Transmit Buffer Queue Pointer Register */
09031 #define REG_EMAC_RSR              REG_ACCESS(RwReg, 0x400B0020U) /**< \brief (EMAC) Receive Status Register */
09032 #define REG_EMAC_ISR              REG_ACCESS(RwReg, 0x400B0024U) /**< \brief (EMAC) Interrupt Status Register */
09033 #define REG_EMAC_IER              REG_ACCESS(WoReg, 0x400B0028U) /**< \brief (EMAC) Interrupt Enable Register */
09034 #define REG_EMAC_IDR              REG_ACCESS(WoReg, 0x400B002CU) /**< \brief (EMAC) Interrupt Disable Register */
09035 #define REG_EMAC_IMR              REG_ACCESS(RoReg, 0x400B0030U) /**< \brief (EMAC) Interrupt Mask Register */
09036 #define REG_EMAC_MAN              REG_ACCESS(RwReg, 0x400B0034U) /**< \brief (EMAC) Phy Maintenance Register */
09037 #define REG_EMAC_PTR              REG_ACCESS(RwReg, 0x400B0038U) /**< \brief (EMAC) Pause Time Register */
09038 #define REG_EMAC_PFR              REG_ACCESS(RwReg, 0x400B003CU) /**< \brief (EMAC) Pause Frames Received Register */
09039 #define REG_EMAC_FTO              REG_ACCESS(RwReg, 0x400B0040U) /**< \brief (EMAC) Frames Transmitted Ok Register */
09040 #define REG_EMAC_SCF              REG_ACCESS(RwReg, 0x400B0044U) /**< \brief (EMAC) Single Collision Frames Register */
09041 #define REG_EMAC_MCF              REG_ACCESS(RwReg, 0x400B0048U) /**< \brief (EMAC) Multiple Collision Frames Register */
09042 #define REG_EMAC_FRO              REG_ACCESS(RwReg, 0x400B004CU) /**< \brief (EMAC) Frames Received Ok Register */
09043 #define REG_EMAC_FCSE             REG_ACCESS(RwReg, 0x400B0050U) /**< \brief (EMAC) Frame Check Sequence Errors Register */
09044 #define REG_EMAC_ALE              REG_ACCESS(RwReg, 0x400B0054U) /**< \brief (EMAC) Alignment Errors Register */
09045 #define REG_EMAC_DTF              REG_ACCESS(RwReg, 0x400B0058U) /**< \brief (EMAC) Deferred Transmission Frames Register */
09046 #define REG_EMAC_LCOL             REG_ACCESS(RwReg, 0x400B005CU) /**< \brief (EMAC) Late Collisions Register */
09047 #define REG_EMAC_ECOL             REG_ACCESS(RwReg, 0x400B0060U) /**< \brief (EMAC) Excessive Collisions Register */
09048 #define REG_EMAC_TUND             REG_ACCESS(RwReg, 0x400B0064U) /**< \brief (EMAC) Transmit Underrun Errors Register */
09049 #define REG_EMAC_CSE              REG_ACCESS(RwReg, 0x400B0068U) /**< \brief (EMAC) Carrier Sense Errors Register */
09050 #define REG_EMAC_RRE              REG_ACCESS(RwReg, 0x400B006CU) /**< \brief (EMAC) Receive Resource Errors Register */
09051 #define REG_EMAC_ROV              REG_ACCESS(RwReg, 0x400B0070U) /**< \brief (EMAC) Receive Overrun Errors Register */
09052 #define REG_EMAC_RSE              REG_ACCESS(RwReg, 0x400B0074U) /**< \brief (EMAC) Receive Symbol Errors Register */
09053 #define REG_EMAC_ELE              REG_ACCESS(RwReg, 0x400B0078U) /**< \brief (EMAC) Excessive Length Errors Register */
09054 #define REG_EMAC_RJA              REG_ACCESS(RwReg, 0x400B007CU) /**< \brief (EMAC) Receive Jabbers Register */
09055 #define REG_EMAC_USF              REG_ACCESS(RwReg, 0x400B0080U) /**< \brief (EMAC) Undersize Frames Register */
09056 #define REG_EMAC_STE              REG_ACCESS(RwReg, 0x400B0084U) /**< \brief (EMAC) SQE Test Errors Register */
09057 #define REG_EMAC_RLE              REG_ACCESS(RwReg, 0x400B0088U) /**< \brief (EMAC) Received Length Field Mismatch Register */
09058 #define REG_EMAC_HRB              REG_ACCESS(RwReg, 0x400B0090U) /**< \brief (EMAC) Hash Register Bottom [31:0] Register */
09059 #define REG_EMAC_HRT              REG_ACCESS(RwReg, 0x400B0094U) /**< \brief (EMAC) Hash Register Top [63:32] Register */
09060 #define REG_EMAC_SA1B             REG_ACCESS(RwReg, 0x400B0098U) /**< \brief (EMAC) Specific Address 1 Bottom Register */
09061 #define REG_EMAC_SA1T             REG_ACCESS(RwReg, 0x400B009CU) /**< \brief (EMAC) Specific Address 1 Top Register */

09067 #define REG_EMAC_SA4T             REG_ACCESS(RwReg, 0x400B00B4U) /**< \brief (EMAC) Specific Address 4 Top Register */

09069 #define REG_EMAC_USRIO            REG_ACCESS(RwReg, 0x400B00C0U) /**< \brief (EMAC) User Input/Output Register */
