09702 #define REG_PIOE_SCDR             REG_ACCESS(RwReg, 0x400E168CU) /**< \brief (PIOE) Slow Clock Divider Debouncing Register */
09703 #define REG_PIOE_OWER             REG_ACCESS(WoReg, 0x400E16A0U) /**< \brief (PIOE) Output Write Enable */
09704 #define REG_PIOE_OWDR             REG_ACCESS(WoReg, 0x400E16A4U) /**< \brief (PIOE) Output Write Disable */
09705 #define REG_PIOE_OWSR             REG_ACCESS(RoReg, 0x400E16A8U) /**< \brief (PIOE) Output Write Status Register */
09706 #define REG_PIOE_AIMER            REG_ACCESS(WoReg, 0x400E16B0U) /**< \brief (PIOE) Additional Interrupt Modes Enable Register */
09707 #define REG_PIOE_AIMDR            REG_ACCESS(WoReg, 0x400E16B4U) /**< \brief (PIOE) Additional Interrupt Modes Disables Register */
09708 #define REG_PIOE_AIMMR            REG_ACCESS(RoReg, 0x400E16B8U) /**< \brief (PIOE) Additional Interrupt Modes Mask Register */
09709 #define REG_PIOE_ESR              REG_ACCESS(WoReg, 0x400E16C0U) /**< \brief (PIOE) Edge Select Register */
09710 #define REG_PIOE_LSR              REG_ACCESS(WoReg, 0x400E16C4U) /**< \brief (PIOE) Level Select Register */
09711 #define REG_PIOE_ELSR             REG_ACCESS(RoReg, 0x400E16C8U) /**< \brief (PIOE) Edge/Level Status Register */
09712 #define REG_PIOE_FELLSR           REG_ACCESS(WoReg, 0x400E16D0U) /**< \brief (PIOE) Falling Edge/Low Level Select Register */
09713 #define REG_PIOE_REHLSR           REG_ACCESS(WoReg, 0x400E16D4U) /**< \brief (PIOE) Rising Edge/ High Level Select Register */
09714 #define REG_PIOE_FRLHSR           REG_ACCESS(RoReg, 0x400E16D8U) /**< \brief (PIOE) Fall/Rise - Low/High Status Register */
09715 #define REG_PIOE_LOCKSR           REG_ACCESS(RoReg, 0x400E16E0U) /**< \brief (PIOE) Lock Status */
09716 #define REG_PIOE_WPMR             REG_ACCESS(RwReg, 0x400E16E4U) /**< \brief (PIOE) Write Protect Mode Register */
09717 #define REG_PIOE_WPSR             REG_ACCESS(RoReg, 0x400E16E8U) /**< \brief (PIOE) Write Protect Status Register */
09718 /* ========== Register definition for PIOF peripheral ========== */
09719 #define REG_PIOF_PER              REG_ACCESS(WoReg, 0x400E1800U) /**< \brief (PIOF) PIO Enable Register */
09720 #define REG_PIOF_PDR              REG_ACCESS(WoReg, 0x400E1804U) /**< \brief (PIOF) PIO Disable Register */
09721 #define REG_PIOF_PSR              REG_ACCESS(RoReg, 0x400E1808U) /**< \brief (PIOF) PIO Status Register */
09722 #define REG_PIOF_OER              REG_ACCESS(WoReg, 0x400E1810U) /**< \brief (PIOF) Output Enable Register */
09723 #define REG_PIOF_ODR              REG_ACCESS(WoReg, 0x400E1814U) /**< \brief (PIOF) Output Disable Register */
09724 #define REG_PIOF_OSR              REG_ACCESS(RoReg, 0x400E1818U) /**< \brief (PIOF) Output Status Register */
09725 #define REG_PIOF_IFER             REG_ACCESS(WoReg, 0x400E1820U) /**< \brief (PIOF) Glitch Input Filter Enable Register */
09726 #define REG_PIOF_IFDR             REG_ACCESS(WoReg, 0x400E1824U) /**< \brief (PIOF) Glitch Input Filter Disable Register */
09727 #define REG_PIOF_IFSR             REG_ACCESS(RoReg, 0x400E1828U) /**< \brief (PIOF) Glitch Input Filter Status Register */
09728 #define REG_PIOF_SODR             REG_ACCESS(WoReg, 0x400E1830U) /**< \brief (PIOF) Set Output Data Register */
09729 #define REG_PIOF_CODR             REG_ACCESS(WoReg, 0x400E1834U) /**< \brief (PIOF) Clear Output Data Register */
09730 #define REG_PIOF_ODSR             REG_ACCESS(RwReg, 0x400E1838U) /**< \brief (PIOF) Output Data Status Register */
09731 #define REG_PIOF_PDSR             REG_ACCESS(RoReg, 0x400E183CU) /**< \brief (PIOF) Pin Data Status Register */
09732 #define REG_PIOF_IER              REG_ACCESS(WoReg, 0x400E1840U) /**< \brief (PIOF) Interrupt Enable Register */
09733 #define REG_PIOF_IDR              REG_ACCESS(WoReg, 0x400E1844U) /**< \brief (PIOF) Interrupt Disable Register */
09734 #define REG_PIOF_IMR              REG_ACCESS(RoReg, 0x400E1848U) /**< \brief (PIOF) Interrupt Mask Register */
09735 #define REG_PIOF_ISR              REG_ACCESS(RoReg, 0x400E184CU) /**< \brief (PIOF) Interrupt Status Register */
09736 #define REG_PIOF_MDER             REG_ACCESS(WoReg, 0x400E1850U) /**< \brief (PIOF) Multi-driver Enable Register */
09737 #define REG_PIOF_MDDR             REG_ACCESS(WoReg, 0x400E1854U) /**< \brief (PIOF) Multi-driver Disable Register */
09738 #define REG_PIOF_MDSR             REG_ACCESS(RoReg, 0x400E1858U) /**< \brief (PIOF) Multi-driver Status Register */
09739 #define REG_PIOF_PUDR             REG_ACCESS(WoReg, 0x400E1860U) /**< \brief (PIOF) Pull-up Disable Register */
09740 #define REG_PIOF_PUER             REG_ACCESS(WoReg, 0x400E1864U) /**< \brief (PIOF) Pull-up Enable Register */
09741 #define REG_PIOF_PUSR             REG_ACCESS(RoReg, 0x400E1868U) /**< \brief (PIOF) Pad Pull-up Status Register */
09742 #define REG_PIOF_ABSR             REG_ACCESS(RwReg, 0x400E1870U) /**< \brief (PIOF) Peripheral AB Select Register */
09743 #define REG_PIOF_SCIFSR           REG_ACCESS(WoReg, 0x400E1880U) /**< \brief (PIOF) System Clock Glitch Input Filter Select Register */
09744 #define REG_PIOF_DIFSR            REG_ACCESS(WoReg, 0x400E1884U) /**< \brief (PIOF) Debouncing Input Filter Select Register */
09745 #define REG_PIOF_IFDGSR           REG_ACCESS(RoReg, 0x400E1888U) /**< \brief (PIOF) Glitch or Debouncing Input Filter Clock Selection Status Register */
09746 #define REG_PIOF_SCDR             REG_ACCESS(RwReg, 0x400E188CU) /**< \brief (PIOF) Slow Clock Divider Debouncing Register */
09747 #define REG_PIOF_OWER             REG_ACCESS(WoReg, 0x400E18A0U) /**< \brief (PIOF) Output Write Enable */
09748 #define REG_PIOF_OWDR             REG_ACCESS(WoReg, 0x400E18A4U) /**< \brief (PIOF) Output Write Disable */
09749 #define REG_PIOF_OWSR             REG_ACCESS(RoReg, 0x400E18A8U) /**< \brief (PIOF) Output Write Status Register */
09750 #define REG_PIOF_AIMER            REG_ACCESS(WoReg, 0x400E18B0U) /**< \brief (PIOF) Additional Interrupt Modes Enable Register */
09751 #define REG_PIOF_AIMDR            REG_ACCESS(WoReg, 0x400E18B4U) /**< \brief (PIOF) Additional Interrupt Modes Disables Register */
09752 #define REG_PIOF_AIMMR            REG_ACCESS(RoReg, 0x400E18B8U) /**< \brief (PIOF) Additional Interrupt Modes Mask Register */
09753 #define REG_PIOF_ESR              REG_ACCESS(WoReg, 0x400E18C0U) /**< \brief (PIOF) Edge Select Register */
09754 #define REG_PIOF_LSR              REG_ACCESS(WoReg, 0x400E18C4U) /**< \brief (PIOF) Level Select Register */
09755 #define REG_PIOF_ELSR             REG_ACCESS(RoReg, 0x400E18C8U) /**< \brief (PIOF) Edge/Level Status Register */
09756 #define REG_PIOF_FELLSR           REG_ACCESS(WoReg, 0x400E18D0U) /**< \brief (PIOF) Falling Edge/Low Level Select Register */
09757 #define REG_PIOF_REHLSR           REG_ACCESS(WoReg, 0x400E18D4U) /**< \brief (PIOF) Rising Edge/ High Level Select Register */
09758 #define REG_PIOF_FRLHSR           REG_ACCESS(RoReg, 0x400E18D8U) /**< \brief (PIOF) Fall/Rise - Low/High Status Register */
09759 #define REG_PIOF_LOCKSR           REG_ACCESS(RoReg, 0x400E18E0U) /**< \brief (PIOF) Lock Status */
09760 #define REG_PIOF_WPMR             REG_ACCESS(RwReg, 0x400E18E4U) /**< \brief (PIOF) Write Protect Mode Register */
09761 #define REG_PIOF_WPSR             REG_ACCESS(RoReg, 0x400E18E8U) /**< \brief (PIOF) Write Protect Status Register */
09762 /* ========== Register definition for RSTC peripheral ========== */
09763 #define REG_RSTC_CR               REG_ACCESS(WoReg, 0x400E1A00U) /**< \brief (RSTC) Control Register */
09764 #define REG_RSTC_SR               REG_ACCESS(RoReg, 0x400E1A04U) /**< \brief (RSTC) Status Register */
09765 #define REG_RSTC_MR               REG_ACCESS(RwReg, 0x400E1A08U) /**< \brief (RSTC) Mode Register */
09766 /* ========== Register definition for SUPC peripheral ========== */
09767 #define REG_SUPC_CR               REG_ACCESS(WoReg, 0x400E1A10U) /**< \brief (SUPC) Supply Controller Control Register */
09768 #define REG_SUPC_SMMR             REG_ACCESS(RwReg, 0x400E1A14U) /**< \brief (SUPC) Supply Controller Supply Monitor Mode Register */
09769 #define REG_SUPC_MR               REG_ACCESS(RwReg, 0x400E1A18U) /**< \brief (SUPC) Supply Controller Mode Register */
09770 #define REG_SUPC_WUMR             REG_ACCESS(RwReg, 0x400E1A1CU) /**< \brief (SUPC) Supply Controller Wake Up Mode Register */
09771 #define REG_SUPC_WUIR             REG_ACCESS(RwReg, 0x400E1A20U) /**< \brief (SUPC) Supply Controller Wake Up Inputs Register */
09772 #define REG_SUPC_SR               REG_ACCESS(RoReg, 0x400E1A24U) /**< \brief (SUPC) Supply Controller Status Register */
09773 /* ========== Register definition for RTT peripheral ========== */
09774 #define REG_RTT_MR                REG_ACCESS(RwReg, 0x400E1A30U) /**< \brief (RTT) Mode Register */
09775 #define REG_RTT_AR                REG_ACCESS(RwReg, 0x400E1A34U) /**< \brief (RTT) Alarm Register */
09776 #define REG_RTT_VR                REG_ACCESS(RoReg, 0x400E1A38U) /**< \brief (RTT) Value Register */
09777 #define REG_RTT_SR                REG_ACCESS(RoReg, 0x400E1A3CU) /**< \brief (RTT) Status Register */
09778 /* ========== Register definition for WDT peripheral ========== */
09779 #define REG_WDT_CR                REG_ACCESS(WoReg, 0x400E1A50U) /**< \brief (WDT) Control Register */
09780 #define REG_WDT_MR                REG_ACCESS(RwReg, 0x400E1A54U) /**< \brief (WDT) Mode Register */
09781 #define REG_WDT_SR                REG_ACCESS(RoReg, 0x400E1A58U) /**< \brief (WDT) Status Register */
09782 /* ========== Register definition for RTC peripheral ========== */
09783 #define REG_RTC_CR                REG_ACCESS(RwReg, 0x400E1A60U) /**< \brief (RTC) Control Register */
09784 #define REG_RTC_MR                REG_ACCESS(RwReg, 0x400E1A64U) /**< \brief (RTC) Mode Register */
09785 #define REG_RTC_TIMR              REG_ACCESS(RwReg, 0x400E1A68U) /**< \brief (RTC) Time Register */
09786 #define REG_RTC_CALR              REG_ACCESS(RwReg, 0x400E1A6CU) /**< \brief (RTC) Calendar Register */
09787 #define REG_RTC_TIMALR            REG_ACCESS(RwReg, 0x400E1A70U) /**< \brief (RTC) Time Alarm Register */
09788 #define REG_RTC_CALALR            REG_ACCESS(RwReg, 0x400E1A74U) /**< \brief (RTC) Calendar Alarm Register */
09789 #define REG_RTC_SR                REG_ACCESS(RoReg, 0x400E1A78U) /**< \brief (RTC) Status Register */
09790 #define REG_RTC_SCCR              REG_ACCESS(WoReg, 0x400E1A7CU) /**< \brief (RTC) Status Clear Command Register */
09791 #define REG_RTC_IER               REG_ACCESS(WoReg, 0x400E1A80U) /**< \brief (RTC) Interrupt Enable Register */
09792 #define REG_RTC_IDR               REG_ACCESS(WoReg, 0x400E1A84U) /**< \brief (RTC) Interrupt Disable Register */
09793 #define REG_RTC_IMR               REG_ACCESS(RoReg, 0x400E1A88U) /**< \brief (RTC) Interrupt Mask Register */
09794 #define REG_RTC_VER               REG_ACCESS(RoReg, 0x400E1A8CU) /**< \brief (RTC) Valid Entry Register */
09795 #define REG_RTC_WPMR              REG_ACCESS(RwReg, 0x400E1B44U) /**< \brief (RTC) Write Protect Mode Register */
09796 /* ========== Register definition for GPBR peripheral ========== */
09797 #define REG_GPBR_GPBR0            REG_ACCESS(RwReg, 0x400E1A90U) /**< \brief (GPBR) General Purpose Backup Register 0 */
09798 #define REG_GPBR_GPBR1            REG_ACCESS(RwReg, 0x400E1A94U) /**< \brief (GPBR) General Purpose Backup Register 1 */
09799 #define REG_GPBR_GPBR2            REG_ACCESS(RwReg, 0x400E1A98U) /**< \brief (GPBR) General Purpose Backup Register 2 */
09800 #define REG_GPBR_GPBR3            REG_ACCESS(RwReg, 0x400E1A9CU) /**< \brief (GPBR) General Purpose Backup Register 3 */
09801 #define REG_GPBR_GPBR4            REG_ACCESS(RwReg, 0x400E1AA0U) /**< \brief (GPBR) General Purpose Backup Register 4 */
09802 #define REG_GPBR_GPBR5            REG_ACCESS(RwReg, 0x400E1AA4U) /**< \brief (GPBR) General Purpose Backup Register 5 */
09803 #define REG_GPBR_GPBR6            REG_ACCESS(RwReg, 0x400E1AA8U) /**< \brief (GPBR) General Purpose Backup Register 6 */
09804 #define REG_GPBR_GPBR7            REG_ACCESS(RwReg, 0x400E1AACU) /**< \brief (GPBR) General Purpose Backup Register 7 */
09805 /*@}*/
09806 
09807 /* ************************************************************************** */
09808 /*   PERIPHERAL ID DEFINITIONS FOR SAM3XA */
09809 /* ************************************************************************** */
09810 /** \addtogroup SAM3XA_id Peripheral Ids Definitions */
09811 /*@{*/
09812 
09813 #define ID_SUPC   ( 0) /**< \brief Supply Controller (SUPC) */
09814 #define ID_RSTC   ( 1) /**< \brief Reset Controller (RSTC) */
09815 #define ID_RTC    ( 2) /**< \brief Real Time Clock (RTC) */
09816 #define ID_RTT    ( 3) /**< \brief Real Time Timer (RTT) */
09817 #define ID_WDT    ( 4) /**< \brief Watchdog Timer (WDT) */
09818 #define ID_PMC    ( 5) /**< \brief Power Management Controller (PMC) */
09819 #define ID_EFC0   ( 6) /**< \brief Enhanced Flash Controller 0 (EFC0) */
09820 #define ID_EFC1   ( 7) /**< \brief Enhanced Flash Controller 1 (EFC1) */
09821 #define ID_UART   ( 8) /**< \brief Universal Asynchronous Receiver Transceiver (UART) */
09822 #define ID_SMC    ( 9) /**< \brief Static Memory Controller (SMC) */
09823 #define ID_SDRAMC (10) /**< \brief Synchronous Dynamic RAM Controller (SDRAMC) */
09824 #define ID_PIOA   (11) /**< \brief Parallel I/O Controller A, (PIOA) */
09825 #define ID_PIOB   (12) /**< \brief Parallel I/O Controller B (PIOB) */
09826 #define ID_PIOC   (13) /**< \brief Parallel I/O Controller C (PIOC) */
09827 #define ID_PIOD   (14) /**< \brief Parallel I/O Controller D (PIOD) */
09828 #define ID_PIOE   (15) /**< \brief Parallel I/O Controller E (PIOE) */
09829 #define ID_PIOF   (16) /**< \brief Parallel I/O Controller F (PIOF) */
09830 #define ID_USART0 (17) /**< \brief USART 0 (USART0) */
09831 #define ID_USART1 (18) /**< \brief USART 1 (USART1) */
09832 #define ID_USART2 (19) /**< \brief USART 2 (USART2) */
09833 #define ID_USART3 (20) /**< \brief USART 3 (USART3) */
09834 #define ID_HSMCI  (21) /**< \brief Multimedia Card Interface (HSMCI) */
09835 #define ID_TWI0   (22) /**< \brief Two-Wire Interface 0 (TWI0) */
09836 #define ID_TWI1   (23) /**< \brief Two-Wire Interface 1 (TWI1) */
09837 #define ID_SPI0   (24) /**< \brief Serial Peripheral Interface (SPI0) */
09838 #define ID_SPI1   (25) /**< \brief Serial Peripheral Interface (SPI1) */
09839 #define ID_SSC    (26) /**< \brief Synchronous Serial Controller (SSC) */
09840 #define ID_TC0    (27) /**< \brief Timer Counter 0 (TC0) */
09841 #define ID_TC1    (28) /**< \brief Timer Counter 1 (TC1) */
09842 #define ID_TC2    (29) /**< \brief Timer Counter 2 (TC2) */
09843 #define ID_TC3    (30) /**< \brief Timer Counter 3 (TC3) */
09844 #define ID_TC4    (31) /**< \brief Timer Counter 4 (TC4) */
09845 #define ID_TC5    (32) /**< \brief Timer Counter 5 (TC5) */
09846 #define ID_TC6    (33) /**< \brief Timer Counter 6 (TC6) */
09847 #define ID_TC7    (34) /**< \brief Timer Counter 7 (TC7) */
09848 #define ID_TC8    (35) /**< \brief Timer Counter 8 (TC8) */
09849 #define ID_PWM    (36) /**< \brief Pulse Width Modulation Controller (PWM) */
09850 #define ID_ADC    (37) /**< \brief ADC Controller (ADC) */
09851 #define ID_DACC   (38) /**< \brief DAC Controller (DACC) */
09852 #define ID_DMAC   (39) /**< \brief DMA Controller (DMAC) */
09853 #define ID_UOTGHS (40) /**< \brief USB OTG High Speed (UOTGHS) */
09854 #define ID_TRNG   (41) /**< \brief True Random Number Generator (TRNG) */
09855 #define ID_EMAC   (42) /**< \brief Ethernet MAC (EMAC) */
09856 #define ID_CAN0   (43) /**< \brief CAN Controller 0 (CAN0) */
09857 #define ID_CAN1   (44) /**< \brief CAN Controller 1 (CAN1) */
09858 /*@}*/
09859 
09860 /* ************************************************************************** */
09861 /*   BASE ADDRESS DEFINITIONS FOR SAM3XA */
09862 /* ************************************************************************** */
09863 /** \addtogroup SAM3XA_base Peripheral Base Address Definitions */
09864 /*@{*/
09865 
09866 #define HSMCI      CAST(Hsmci     , 0x40000000U) /**< \brief (HSMCI     ) Base Address */
09867 #define SSC        CAST(Ssc       , 0x40004000U) /**< \brief (SSC       ) Base Address */
09868 #define SPI0       CAST(Spi       , 0x40008000U) /**< \brief (SPI0      ) Base Address */
09869 #define SPI1       CAST(Spi       , 0x4000C000U) /**< \brief (SPI1      ) Base Address */
09870 #define TC0        CAST(Tc        , 0x40080000U) /**< \brief (TC0       ) Base Address */
09871 #define TC1        CAST(Tc        , 0x40084000U) /**< \brief (TC1       ) Base Address */
09872 #define TC2        CAST(Tc        , 0x40088000U) /**< \brief (TC2       ) Base Address */
09873 #define TWI0       CAST(Twi       , 0x4008C000U) /**< \brief (TWI0      ) Base Address */
09874 #define PDC_TWI0   CAST(Pdc       , 0x4008C100U) /**< \brief (PDC_TWI0  ) Base Address */
09875 #define TWI1       CAST(Twi       , 0x40090000U) /**< \brief (TWI1      ) Base Address */
09876 #define PDC_TWI1   CAST(Pdc       , 0x40090100U) /**< \brief (PDC_TWI1  ) Base Address */
09877 #define PWM        CAST(Pwm       , 0x40094000U) /**< \brief (PWM       ) Base Address */
09878 #define PDC_PWM    CAST(Pdc       , 0x40094100U) /**< \brief (PDC_PWM   ) Base Address */
09879 #define USART0     CAST(Usart     , 0x40098000U) /**< \brief (USART0    ) Base Address */
09880 #define PDC_USART0 CAST(Pdc       , 0x40098100U) /**< \brief (PDC_USART0) Base Address */
09881 #define USART1     CAST(Usart     , 0x4009C000U) /**< \brief (USART1    ) Base Address */
09882 #define PDC_USART1 CAST(Pdc       , 0x4009C100U) /**< \brief (PDC_USART1) Base Address */
09883 #define USART2     CAST(Usart     , 0x400A0000U) /**< \brief (USART2    ) Base Address */
09884 #define PDC_USART2 CAST(Pdc       , 0x400A0100U) /**< \brief (PDC_USART2) Base Address */
09885 #define USART3     CAST(Usart     , 0x400A4000U) /**< \brief (USART3    ) Base Address */
09886 #define PDC_USART3 CAST(Pdc       , 0x400A4100U) /**< \brief (PDC_USART3) Base Address */
09887 #define UOTGHS     CAST(Uotghs    , 0x400AC000U) /**< \brief (UOTGHS    ) Base Address */
09888 #define EMAC       CAST(Emac      , 0x400B0000U) /**< \brief (EMAC      ) Base Address */
09889 #define CAN0       CAST(Can       , 0x400B4000U) /**< \brief (CAN0      ) Base Address */
09890 #define CAN1       CAST(Can       , 0x400B8000U) /**< \brief (CAN1      ) Base Address */
09891 #define TRNG       CAST(Trng      , 0x400BC000U) /**< \brief (TRNG      ) Base Address */
09892 #define ADC        CAST(Adc       , 0x400C0000U) /**< \brief (ADC       ) Base Address */
09893 #define PDC_ADC    CAST(Pdc       , 0x400C0100U) /**< \brief (PDC_ADC   ) Base Address */
09894 #define DMAC       CAST(Dmac      , 0x400C4000U) /**< \brief (DMAC      ) Base Address */
09895 #define DACC       CAST(Dacc      , 0x400C8000U) /**< \brief (DACC      ) Base Address */
09896 #define PDC_DACC   CAST(Pdc       , 0x400C8100U) /**< \brief (PDC_DACC  ) Base Address */
09897 #define SMC        CAST(Smc       , 0x400E0000U) /**< \brief (SMC       ) Base Address */
09898 #define SDRAMC     CAST(Sdramc    , 0x400E0200U) /**< \brief (SDRAMC    ) Base Address */
09899 #define MATRIX     CAST(Matrix    , 0x400E0400U) /**< \brief (MATRIX    ) Base Address */
09900 #define PMC        CAST(Pmc       , 0x400E0600U) /**< \brief (PMC       ) Base Address */
09901 #define UART       CAST(Uart      , 0x400E0800U) /**< \brief (UART      ) Base Address */
09902 #define PDC_UART   CAST(Pdc       , 0x400E0900U) /**< \brief (PDC_UART  ) Base Address */
09903 #define CHIPID     CAST(Chipid    , 0x400E0940U) /**< \brief (CHIPID    ) Base Address */
09904 #define EFC0       CAST(Efc       , 0x400E0A00U) /**< \brief (EFC0      ) Base Address */
09905 #define EFC1       CAST(Efc       , 0x400E0C00U) /**< \brief (EFC1      ) Base Address */
09906 #define PIOA       CAST(Pio       , 0x400E0E00U) /**< \brief (PIOA      ) Base Address */
09907 #define PIOB       CAST(Pio       , 0x400E1000U) /**< \brief (PIOB      ) Base Address */
09908 #define PIOC       CAST(Pio       , 0x400E1200U) /**< \brief (PIOC      ) Base Address */
09909 #define PIOD       CAST(Pio       , 0x400E1400U) /**< \brief (PIOD      ) Base Address */
09910 #define PIOE       CAST(Pio       , 0x400E1600U) /**< \brief (PIOE      ) Base Address */
09911 #define PIOF       CAST(Pio       , 0x400E1800U) /**< \brief (PIOF      ) Base Address */
09912 #define RSTC       CAST(Rstc      , 0x400E1A00U) /**< \brief (RSTC      ) Base Address */
09913 #define SUPC       CAST(Supc      , 0x400E1A10U) /**< \brief (SUPC      ) Base Address */
09914 #define RTT        CAST(Rtt       , 0x400E1A30U) /**< \brief (RTT       ) Base Address */
09915 #define WDT        CAST(Wdt       , 0x400E1A50U) /**< \brief (WDT       ) Base Address */
09916 #define RTC        CAST(Rtc       , 0x400E1A60U) /**< \brief (RTC       ) Base Address */
09917 #define GPBR       CAST(Gpbr      , 0x400E1A90U) /**< \brief (GPBR      ) Base Address */
09918 /*@}*/
09919 
09920 /* ************************************************************************** */
09921 /*   PIO DEFINITIONS FOR SAM3XA */
09922 /* ************************************************************************** */
09923 /** \addtogroup SAM3XA_pio Peripheral Pio Definitions */
09924 /*@{*/
09925 
09926 #define PIO_PA0                 (1u << 0) /**< \brief Pin Controlled by PA0 */
09927 #define PIO_PA1                 (1u << 1) /**< \brief Pin Controlled by PA1 */
09928 #define PIO_PA2                 (1u << 2) /**< \brief Pin Controlled by PA2 */
09929 #define PIO_PA3                 (1u << 3) /**< \brief Pin Controlled by PA3 */
09930 #define PIO_PA4                 (1u << 4) /**< \brief Pin Controlled by PA4 */
09931 #define PIO_PA5                 (1u << 5) /**< \brief Pin Controlled by PA5 */
09932 #define PIO_PA6                 (1u << 6) /**< \brief Pin Controlled by PA6 */
09933 #define PIO_PA7                 (1u << 7) /**< \brief Pin Controlled by PA7 */
09934 #define PIO_PA8                 (1u << 8) /**< \brief Pin Controlled by PA8 */
09935 #define PIO_PA9                 (1u << 9) /**< \brief Pin Controlled by PA9 */
09936 #define PIO_PA10                (1u << 10) /**< \brief Pin Controlled by PA10 */
09937 #define PIO_PA11                (1u << 11) /**< \brief Pin Controlled by PA11 */
09938 #define PIO_PA12                (1u << 12) /**< \brief Pin Controlled by PA12 */
09939 #define PIO_PA13                (1u << 13) /**< \brief Pin Controlled by PA13 */

10205 #define PIO_PB9A_EMDIO       (1u << 9)   /**< \brief Emac signal: EMDIO */
10206 #define PIO_PB5A_ERX0        (1u << 5)   /**< \brief Emac signal: ERX0 */
10207 #define PIO_PB6A_ERX1        (1u << 6)   /**< \brief Emac signal: ERX1 */
10208 #define PIO_PC11B_ERX2       (1u << 11)  /**< \brief Emac signal: ERX2 */
10209 #define PIO_PC12B_ERX3       (1u << 12)  /**< \brief Emac signal: ERX3 */
10210 #define PIO_PC14B_ERXCK      (1u << 14)  /**< \brief Emac signal: ERXCK */
10211 #define PIO_PB7A_ERXER       (1u << 7)   /**< \brief Emac signal: ERXER */
10212 #define PIO_PB2A_ETX0        (1u << 2)   /**< \brief Emac signal: ETX0 */
10213 #define PIO_PB3A_ETX1        (1u << 3)   /**< \brief Emac signal: ETX1 */
10214 #define PIO_PC15B_ETX2       (1u << 15)  /**< \brief Emac signal: ETX2 */
10215 #define PIO_PC16B_ETX3       (1u << 16)  /**< \brief Emac signal: ETX3 */
10216 #define PIO_PB0A_ETXCK       (1u << 0)   /**< \brief Emac signal: ETXCK */
10217 #define PIO_PB1A_ETXEN       (1u << 1)   /**< \brief Emac signal: ETXEN */
10218 #define PIO_PC17B_ETXER      (1u << 17)  /**< \brief Emac signal: ETXER */

10220 #define PIO_PA20A_MCCDA      (1u << 20)  /**< \brief Hsmci signal: MCCDA */

10222 #define PIO_PA19A_MCCK       (1u << 19)  /**< \brief Hsmci signal: MCCK */

10377 #define PIO_PA12A_RXD1       (1u << 12)  /**< \brief Usart1 signal: RXD1 */
10378 #define PIO_PA16A_SCK1       (1u << 16)  /**< \brief Usart1 signal: SCK1 */
10379 #define PIO_PA13A_TXD1       (1u << 13)  /**< \brief Usart1 signal: TXD1 */

10391 #define PIO_PD4B_TXD3        (1u << 4)   /**< \brief Usart3 signal: TXD3 */
10392 /*@}*/
10393 
10394 /* ************************************************************************** */
10395 /*   MEMORY MAPPING DEFINITIONS FOR SAM3XA */
10396 /* ************************************************************************** */
10397 
10398 #define IFLASH0_ADDR    (0x00080000u) /**< Internal Flash 0 base address */
10399 #define IROM_ADDR       (0x00100000u) /**< Internal ROM base address */
10400 #define IRAM0_ADDR      (0x20000000u) /**< Internal RAM 0 base address */
10401 #define IRAM1_ADDR      (0x20080000u) /**< Internal RAM 1 base address */
10402 #define NFC_RAM_ADDR    (0x20100000u) /**< NAND Flash Controller RAM base address */
10403 #define UOTGHS_RAM_ADDR (0x20180000u) /**< USB On-The-Go Interface RAM base address */
10404 #define EBI_CS0_ADDR    (0x60000000u) /**< EBI Chip Select 0 base address */
10405 #define EBI_CS1_ADDR    (0x61000000u) /**< EBI Chip Select 1 base address */
10406 #define EBI_CS2_ADDR    (0x62000000u) /**< EBI Chip Select 2 base address */
10407 #define EBI_CS3_ADDR    (0x63000000u) /**< EBI Chip Select 3 base address */
10408 #define EBI_CS4_ADDR    (0x64000000u) /**< EBI Chip Select 4 base address */
10409 #define EBI_CS5_ADDR    (0x65000000u) /**< EBI Chip Select 5 base address */
10410 #define EBI_CS6_ADDR    (0x66000000u) /**< EBI Chip Select 6 base address */
10411 #define EBI_CS7_ADDR    (0x67000000u) /**< EBI Chip Select 7 base address */
10412 
10413 #if defined sam3x2
10414 #  define IFLASH1_ADDR    (0x00090000u) /**< Internal Flash 1 base address */
10415 #  define IFLASH_SIZE     (0x20000u)
10416 #  define IFLASH_PAGE_SIZE              (256) /* Internal FLASH 0 Page Size: 256 bytes */
10417 #  define IFLASH_LOCK_REGION_SIZE     (16384) /* Internal FLASH 0 Lock Region Size: 16 Kbytes */
10418 #  define IFLASH_NB_OF_PAGES            (256) /* Internal FLASH 0 Number of Pages: 256 */
10419 #  define IFLASH_NB_OF_LOCK_BITS          (8) /* Internal FLASH 0 Number of Lock Bits: 8 */
10420 
10421 #  define NFC_RAM_SIZE    (0x1000u)
10422 
10423 #  define IRAM0_SIZE      (0x4000u)
10424 #  define IRAM1_SIZE      (0x4000u)
10425 #  define IRAM_SIZE       (IRAM0_SIZE+IRAM1_SIZE)
10426 #  define IRAM_ADDR       (IRAM1_ADDR-IRAM0_SIZE)
10427 #elif defined sam3x2c | defined sam3a2
10428 #  define IFLASH1_ADDR    (0x00090000u) /**< Internal Flash 1 base address */
10429 #  define IFLASH_SIZE     (0x20000u)
10430 #  define IFLASH_PAGE_SIZE              (256) /* Internal FLASH 0 Page Size: 256 bytes */
10431 #  define IFLASH_LOCK_REGION_SIZE     (16384) /* Internal FLASH 0 Lock Region Size: 16 Kbytes */
10432 #  define IFLASH_NB_OF_PAGES            (256) /* Internal FLASH 0 Number of Pages: 256 */
10433 #  define IFLASH_NB_OF_LOCK_BITS          (8) /* Internal FLASH 0 Number of Lock Bits: 8 */
10434 #  define IRAM_SIZE 0x8000
10435 
10436 #  define IRAM0_SIZE      (0x4000u)
10437 #  define IRAM1_SIZE      (0x4000u)
10438 #  define IRAM_SIZE       (IRAM0_SIZE+IRAM1_SIZE)
10439 #  define IRAM_ADDR       (IRAM1_ADDR-IRAM0_SIZE)
10440 #elif defined sam3x4
10441 #  define IFLASH1_ADDR    (0x000A0000u) /**< Internal Flash 1 base address */
10442 #  define IFLASH_SIZE     (0x40000u)
10443 #  define IFLASH_PAGE_SIZE              (256) /* Internal FLASH 0 Page Size: 256 bytes */
10444 #  define IFLASH_LOCK_REGION_SIZE     (16384) /* Internal FLASH 0 Lock Region Size: 16 Kbytes */
10445 #  define IFLASH_NB_OF_PAGES            (512) /* Internal FLASH 0 Number of Pages: 512 */
10446 #  define IFLASH_NB_OF_LOCK_BITS         (16) /* Internal FLASH 0 Number of Lock Bits: 16 */
10447 
10448 #  define NFC_RAM_SIZE    (0x1000u)
10449 
10450 #  define IRAM0_SIZE      (0x8000u)
10451 #  define IRAM1_SIZE      (0x8000u)
10452 #  define IRAM_SIZE       (IRAM0_SIZE+IRAM1_SIZE)
10453 #  define IRAM_ADDR       (IRAM1_ADDR-IRAM0_SIZE)
